title: pmc-6000309-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-6000309-1
病例摘要：一名65岁男性患者，持续性刺激性咳嗽超过15天，因右肺门肿块病变入院。无面部水肿和浅表静脉曲张。既往为吸烟者，有高血压和糖尿病病史。在支气管镜检查中发现肿瘤堵塞了右上叶支气管，并侵犯了中间支气管。通过经支气管活检诊断为鳞状细胞癌。胸部增强CT显示最大直径80毫米的肿块位于右上肺叶。肿瘤直接侵犯了右侧肺动脉弓和广泛范围内的上腔静脉。发现左侧臂头静脉（BCV）沿着纵隔左缘向下延伸至冠状窦（）。经胸超声心动图检测到前外侧降主动脉内有血流，冠状窦扩张（直径21毫米），未见其他心脏异常。根据这些发现，诊断为PALSVC。通过脑部磁共振成像、上腹部CT扫描和骨核素扫描均未发现其他器官的转移病灶。2006年10月31日进行了右侧后外侧胸腔切开术。如预期的那样，肿瘤侵犯了上腔静脉壁，并且没有观察到左侧臂头静脉分叉。上腔静脉被分离、夹闭并切除，在静脉内注射5,000 IU的钠肝素后进行操作。使用4-0聚丙烯线进行了直径12毫米环形PTFE移植物在右侧臂头静脉和上腔静脉起始部之间的植入。通过双袖状右上中叶切除术完成了肿瘤切除。使用3-0维力克（Ethicon, USA）进行了右主支气管与下叶支气管断端的间断缝合。完成了右肺动脉干和右下肺动脉重建（）。并进行了系统性纵隔淋巴结清扫。所有切除边缘均在显微镜检查中未见恶性肿瘤。作为抗凝治疗，术后第一天开始使用低分子肝素，胸腔引流移除后转用华法林继续治疗。术后过程顺利，在第12天出院。最终病理诊断为分化差的鳞状细胞癌侵犯右上腔静脉，右侧肺动脉和纵隔淋巴结转移阳性。在接受4个周期（吉西他滨和顺铂）化疗和1个周期放疗后，胸部MRI显示移植物通畅和PALSVC存在（）。因远处转移于术后21个月死亡。

metadata.original_text: A 65-year-old man with continuous irritable cough over 15 days was admitted to our department for a mass lesion in the right hilum. He presented with no face swelling and superficial varicose veins. He was a former smoker, and medical history included hypertension and diabetes mellitus. At bronchoscopy, the tumor was found occluding the right upper lobar bronchus and infiltrating the bronchus intermedius. It was diagnosed as squamous cell carcinoma by transbronchial tumor biopsy. Chest contrast computed tomography (CT) revealed that the mass of 80 mm in the maximum diameter located in the right upper lobe. The tumor directly invaded the arch of the right PA and a wide range of SVC. It was discovered that the left brachiocephalic vein (BCV) along the left margin of mediastinum walking down the line directly into the coronary sinus (). A venous flow was detected in the anterolateral descending aorta with dilatation of the coronary sinus (diameter of 21 mm) without other heart abnormalities by transthoracic echocardiography. Based on these findings, the diagnosis of PLSVC was made. There were no detectable metastases in other organs through brain magnetic resonance imaging (MRI), upper abdomen CT scan and bone nuclear scan. The right posterolateral thoracotomy was performed on October 31, 2006. As expected, the tumor invaded the wall of SVC and no left brachial cephalic vein bifurcation was observed. The SVC was separated, clamped and resected following intravenous injection of 5, 000 IU of sodium heparin. The ringed PTFE graft of 12 mm in diameter was interpositioned between the right brachial cephalic vein and the origin of SVC by running sutures with 4-0 polypropylene. The tumor resection was completed by double sleeve lobectomy of right upper and middle lobes. The anastomosis between the right main bronchus and the cut end of the lower lobe bronchus was performed by interrupted suture using 3-0 Vicryl (Ethicon, USA). Right PA trunk and right lower PA reconstruction was completed by the running suture with 4-0 polypropylene (). And systematic mediastinal lymph node dissection was performed. All excised margins were tested microscopically negative for malignancy. As anticoagulation treatment, we began with low molecular Heparin on the operative day, then switched and continued to warfarin when thoracic drains removed. The postoperative course was uneventful, and the patient was discharged from the hospital on the 12th postoperative day. Final pathological diagnosis was poorly differentiated squamous cell carcinoma invaded the right SVC, right PA and mediastinal nodes were positive for malignancy. After 4 cycles of chemotherapy (Gemzar and cisplatin) and 1 cycle of radiotherapy, Chest MRI showed patency of the graft and PLSVC (). He died 21 months after operation because of remote metastasis.

title: pmc-6000673-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-6000673-1
病例摘要：一名15岁的男孩因持续两个月的发热、食欲减退和无痰咳嗽入院。在入院前几周，他被怀疑患有社区获得性肺炎并接受了抗生素治疗，但咳嗽和发热症状并未缓解。入院时，他有发热、心动过速、呼吸困难和脾脏肿大。实验室检查显示全血细胞减少；尿液分析和红细胞沉降率正常，血液和尿液培养均为阴性。他的痰液革兰氏染色结果显示为阳性球菌。痰液涂片未发现抗酸杆菌。乙型肝炎表面抗原、抗HCV抗体和抗HIV抗体检测均为阴性。ANA、抗ds-DNA、p-ANCA和c-ANCA均呈阴性。外周血涂片和骨髓穿刺结果正常。心脏超声检查也未见异常。他的胸部X光片和胸部CT扫描显示双侧和周围结节状及肺泡样模式，主要位于肺下叶。纵隔淋巴结肿大和胸腔积液未见。腹部超声和CT检查显示肝脾肿大，脾脏肿大于肝脏更为明显。腹主动脉旁淋巴结肿大未见。由于患者监护人的反对，未进行支气管镜检查和开胸活检。两天后，在他的左腿上观察到几处小的棕色结节状病变（）。进行了皮肤切除活检。一天后，他出现右侧偏瘫、癫痫发作和失语症状。脑CT扫描显示左侧颞叶和基底节区有广泛的低密度区域，并在注射IV对比剂后几乎没有增强（）。此时，皮肤活检结果已准备好。皮下和真皮深层存在严重的淋巴细胞和组织细胞浸润以及不典型的淋巴细胞。细胞的主要聚集部位围绕血管、神经及其附属结构。血管内皮层有炎症反应，但没有血管炎的形态学模式。淋巴样细胞CD45RO染色呈阳性：因此诊断为淋巴瘤样肉芽肿病（LG）（）。他接受了糖皮质激素冲击治疗和口服环磷酰胺治疗，但在12天后因临床无改善且对治疗无反应而去世。

metadata.original_text: A 15-year-old boy was admitted with a 2-month history of fever, decreased appetite and nonproductive cough. Cough and fever progressed despite of antibiotics prescription for presumed community-acquired pneumonia a few weeks prior to admission. At the time of admission, he had fever, tachycardia, respiratory distress and splenomegaly. In laboratory findings, he had pancytopenia; urine analysis and ESR was normal, blood and urine culture was negative. Gram stain of his sputum showed gram positive cocci. Acid fast bacillus was not found in sputum smear. HBsAg and Anti-HCV and Anti-HIV were negative. ANA, Anti ds-DNA, p-ANCA and c-ANCA were requested but all of them were negative. Peripheral blood smear and bone marrow aspiration were normal. Echocardiography also was normal. His chest X-ray and CT-scan of thorax showed bilateral and peripheral nodular and alveolar pattern, predominantly in lower lobes of the lung. Mediastinal lymphadenopathy and pleural effusion were not seen (). Abdominal sonography and CT showed hepatosplenomegaly. Splenomegaly was more prominent than hepatomegaly. Para-aortic lymphadenopathy was not seen. Bronchoscopy and open lung biopsy were not performed because the patient's guardian did not permit. Two days later, we saw a few small brown nodular lesions on the left leg (). Skin excisional biopsy was taken. One day later, he developed right hemiplegia, seizure and aphasia. Brain CT scan showed a broad hypo dense area on the left temporal and basal ganglia that had little enhancement after injection of Ⅳ contrast (). At this time, the result of skin biopsy was prepared. There was severe infiltration of lymphocytes and histiocytes and atypical lymphocytes on the subcutaneous and deep parts of the derma. The main aggregation of the cells was around the vessels and nerves and appendices of the skin. The endothelial layer of the vessels had inflammation, but there was no morphologic pattern of vasculitis. Lymphoid cells had positive reaction with CD45RO: so lymphomatoid granulomatosis (LG) was diagnosed (). He was treated with steroid pulse therapy and oral cyclophosphamide but after 12 days he expired without any clinical improvement and any response to the treatment.

title: pmc-6000835-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-6000835-1
病例摘要：一名51岁的泰国女性于2012年7月因左下肢水肿和左侧腹股沟疼痛性肿块入院，病程为6个月。体格检查发现双侧腹股沟淋巴结融合，大小达9厘米，质地坚硬，伴有红斑、压痛，无波动或溃疡。观察到双下肢明显肿胀。其他浅表淋巴结未见异常。除上述症状外，其余体格检查均正常。左侧腹股沟淋巴结的切取活检显示转移性圆形细胞肿瘤，免疫组化结果显示vimentin、S100和HMB-45阳性。因此推测原发肿瘤可能位于下肢、腹腔或生殖泌尿系统。全面皮肤检查未发现任何皮损。眼科检查、胃镜、结肠镜和膀胱镜均无异常表现。妇科及盆腔检查亦未见病变证据。否认有既往皮肤病变或切除史。全腹部计算机断层扫描显示腹腔和盆腔内多发淋巴结肿大，最大直径达9.5厘米，并伴有髂静脉压迫，但未发现特定器官的病变。胸部CT无异常表现。患者被诊断为原发部位不明的转移性黑色素瘤。由于患者的费用问题未能进行分子检测，且标本质量不佳无法进一步测试。在调查过程中，她出现了严重疼痛，需要使用高剂量的阿片类药物止痛，因此接受了20 Gy的姑息性放疗以治疗双侧腹股沟淋巴结。尽管进行了放疗，但剩余肿瘤大小仍达7.4厘米，根据CT扫描结果。对于后续全身治疗，根据国家报销政策，她无法获得免疫检查点抑制剂或靶向药物。化疗被开具了卡铂（AUC5）和紫杉醇175 mg/m2共6个周期。在完成计划的化疗后，症状有所改善。首次3个月的CT扫描显示病情稳定，但随后从2012年8月至2017年11月的CT扫描结果显示肿瘤逐渐缩小（）。随访期间，患者出现了多处唇部、躯干和眼周及腹股沟区域的色素脱失斑块，这符合白癜风的表现。

metadata.original_text: A 51-year-old Thai woman was hospitalized in July 2012 with edema at the left lower extremities and painful left inguinal mass for 6 months. Physical examination revealed matted bilateral inguinal lymph nodes up to 9 cm in size with hard consistency, erythema, and tenderness without fluctuation or ulcer. Marked swelling at both lower extremities was observed. There was no other superficial lymphadenopathy. Otherwise, physical examinations were normal. Incisional biopsy of the left inguinal lymph node revealed metastatic round cell tumor which is immunohistochemistry positive for vimentin, S100, and HMB-45. The immunophenotype is consistent with malignant melanoma (). Therefore, primary tumors in the lower extremities, abdominal cavity, and anogenital organ were suspected. By complete skin examination, no cutaneous lesion was identified. Ophthalmoscopy, gastroscopy, colonoscopy, and cystoscopy were completely normal. Genital and pelvic examinations did not show any evidence of lesion. She denied previous abnormal or removal of cutaneous lesion. Computer tomography of the whole abdomen showed multiple enlarged lymph nodes throughout the abdominal and pelvic cavity up to 9.5 cm, along with compression of both iliac veins without an organ-specific lesion (). CT chest was unremarkable. The patient was diagnosed with metastatic melanoma of unknown primary. The molecular testing had not been done due to the patient's reimbursement issue, and the specimen was poor in quality for further testing. During the investigation, she developed severe pain requiring high-dose opioid, so she has undergone 20 Gy of palliative radiotherapy for bilateral inguinal lymph nodes. Despite radiotherapy, the remaining tumors were up to 7.4 cm based on the CT scan. For the subsequent systemic therapy, according to a national reimbursement policy, she could not access an immune checkpoint inhibitor or targeted drug. Chemotherapy was prescribed with carboplatin (AUC5) and paclitaxel 175 mg/m2 for 6 cycles. After completion of the planned chemotherapy, the symptom was slightly improved. The CT scan at the first 3 months showed that the response was stable disease, but the following CT scan demonstrated a gradual decrease in size over time from August 2012 to November 2017 (). During the follow-up period, the patient developed multiple depigmented patches around the lips, trunk, and periorbital and inguinal area, which are typical of vitiligo.

title: pmc-6000836-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-6000836-1
病例摘要：一名50岁男性患者因右侧腿部无力、麻木和尿潴留症状持续一天前来就诊。两周前开始出现轻微背部疼痛及右侧腿部无力，近24小时内症状明显加重。神经系统检查显示右侧腿的力量较左侧弱（Lovett测试右侧2/5，左侧4/5），膝反射亢进，双侧巴宾斯基征阳性。此外，在右侧腿部和T8以下皮肤感觉减退；而在左侧，则在T10以下皮肤感觉减退，并且远端温度感觉丧失。既往病史显示30年前曾发生颈椎创伤，当时玻璃碎片嵌入患者颈部左侧，患者自行移除了可见的玻璃碎片并未寻求医疗帮助，因此没有进行临床和影像学检查。此后没有出现神经系统症状。腰椎及胸椎区域的计算机断层扫描（CT）显示L5-S1间盘轻度凸出，无其他明显临床意义的发现（“西门子 SOMATOM Emotion 6”）。（未展示图像）。为进一步探索患者症状的原因，进行了C1-L2段磁共振成像（MRI）检查（“西门子 MAGNETOM Avanto 1.5 T”）。在C4-Th3水平，脊髓增厚且T2加权图像上呈高信号，符合脊髓炎的表现；但未见明显对比增强（图示和图示）。在C6-C7水平发现一个椭圆形（1.6 x 0.4 cm），T1和T2加权图像低信号的病灶。由于怀疑有异物存在，进行了C1-Th3水平的CT扫描，并显示有一个高密度病灶占据脊髓腔及左侧椎间孔。（图示）。结合CT和MRI结果以及既往30年前颈椎受伤并存留玻璃碎片的情况，确定该病灶代表脊髓内的玻璃异物。患者还进行了颈椎X线检查，但由于玻璃碎片可能位于C6-C7水平，被周围结构遮挡而无法可视化（图示）。考虑到临床表现、创伤与当前症状之间的时间间隔较长以及MRI影像学发现，怀疑为急性脱髓鞘发作而非创伤性脊髓损伤。进一步的诊断工作通常会包括腰椎穿刺以检测寡克隆带、细胞和蛋白质，但由于存在扰动异物并导致其在穿刺过程中突然减压时迁移的风险而被禁忌。当时无法进行抗水通道蛋白-4特异性抗体检查，并计划稍后进行。患者符合急性横贯性脊髓炎的纳入标准：双侧且不一定对称的感觉、运动和自主神经功能障碍，明确的感觉水平，在症状出现后的4小时内至21天内达到高峰，并排除其他原因（肿瘤、血管性和压迫性）[]。压迫原因被排除，因为MRI所见的脊髓病理变化远离玻璃碎片的位置，考虑到异物大小及其可能对脊髓的影响，如果在脊髓腔内迁移的话，这种情况不太可能发生。因此，由于过去30年中玻璃碎片处于休眠状态，认为它不是患者症状的直接原因。开始使用甲基泼尼松龙500 mg静脉滴注每日6天进行治疗。经神经外科会诊后决定不从脊髓腔内移除异物，因为手术风险可能超过其益处。在咨询时，患者已经表现出对药物管理的改善。鉴于情况并非超急性，症状更可能是由脊髓内的炎症和脱髓鞘反应所解释。

metadata.original_text: A 50-year-old male patient presented with a one-day history of right leg weakness, numbness, and urinary retention. There was mild back pain and right leg weakness for two weeks which worsened significantly during the last 24 hours. On neurological examination the patient‘s right leg was weaker than the left (2/5 and 4/5 on Lovett test, respectively), the patellar reflex was exaggerated, and Babinski sign was positive bilaterally. Also, on the right side, there was sensory loss in the leg and below the Th8 dermatome. On the left, there was sensory loss below Th10 dermatome and distal loss of temperature sensation. Past medical history revealed a cervical trauma which occurred 30 years ago when a glass chip lodged into the left side of the patient's neck. The patient removed the visible glass shard from his neck and did not seek medical attention; therefore no clinical and radiological investigations were carried out. No neurological symptoms followed this incident. Computed tomography (CT) of the lumbosacral and thoracic regions showed a mild convexity of the L5-S1 intervertebral disc with no other clinically significant findings (“Siemens SOMATOM Emotion 6”) (images not shown). To further explore the possible causes of the patient's symptoms, magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) of the C1–L2 segments was performed (“Siemens MAGNETOM Avanto 1.5 T”). At the level of C4–Th3 the spinal cord was thickened and hyperintense on T2W images, features consistent with myelitis; however there was no appreciable contrast uptake (Figures and ). At the level of C6–C7 an oblong (1.6 x 0.4 cm), T1 and T2 hypointense lesion was found (). Because a foreign body was suspected, CT scan of the C1–Th3 levels was performed and demonstrated a hyperdense lesion occupying the spinal canal and the left intervertebral foramen (). Combining the CT and MRI results with the past medical history of an old injury with a glass fragment, it was determined that the lesion represented a glass foreign body in the spinal canal. The patient also had an X-ray of the cervical spine but the foreign body could not be visualized, most likely due to being located at the level of C6-C7, where it was obscured by the surrounding structures (). Taking into account the clinical picture, an extensive period of time between the trauma and current presentation, and MR imaging findings, an acute demyelinating episode rather than traumatic spinal cord injury was suspected. Further diagnostic work-up would typically have included a lumbar puncture to identify oligoclonal bands, cells, and protein, but it was contraindicated due to the risk of disturbing the foreign body and causing it to migrate upon a sudden decrease in pressure during puncture. Serum Aquaporin-4-specific antibodies could not be performed at the time and were planned for a later time. The patient fulfilled the inclusion criteria for acute transverse myelitis: bilateral and not necessarily symmetrical sensory, motor, and autonomic spinal cord dysfunction, a clear sensory level, peak of symptoms within 4 hours and 21 days after onset of symptoms, and exclusion of other causes (neoplastic, vascular, and compressive) []. Compressive cause was excluded because the spinal cord pathology seen on MRI extends far from the location of the glass shard, which would be unlikely given the size of the foreign object and its possible effect upon the spinal cord if it migrated within the spinal canal. Thus, because the glass fragment lay dormant for the last 30 years, it was deemed not to be the direct cause of the patients' symptoms. Treatment with methylprednisolone 500 mg intravenously daily for 6 days was initiated. After consultation with the neurosurgeons it was decided not to remove the foreign body from the spinal canal, because the risks of surgery would outweigh the benefits. At the time of consultation, the patient was already showing improvement on medical management. Given that the situation was not hyperacute, the symptoms were better explained by the inflammatory and demyelinating reaction within the spinal cord rat

title: pmc-6000840-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-6000840-1
病例摘要：一名51岁的女性因持续三天的疲劳、恶心和呕吐前来就诊。她在2014年7月被诊断为盆腔淋巴结转移性黑色素瘤，并在2014年9月至2015年4月期间接受了伊匹木单抗（anti-CTLA-4）与纳武单抗（PD-1抑制剂）的联合治疗，共接受了4个周期的联合疗法和9个周期的纳武单抗单药治疗，起初有混合反应，随后疾病缓慢进展。2015年4月，她被纳入一项研究，在盆腔肿块放疗与派姆单抗（PD-1抑制剂）联合治疗中接受了总共9个周期的派姆单抗治疗，未出现毒性反应。2016年12月发现新的脑转移病灶，并于2017年1月开始使用派姆单抗治疗。在第二次接受派姆单抗治疗后的第二天，她出现了疲劳和恶心的症状，并开始间歇性呕吐和腹泻。腹部CT检查显示弥漫性结肠炎。感染相关检测包括艰难梭菌抗原、粪便培养、病毒PCR及虫卵和寄生虫检查均为阴性。她接受了甲基泼尼松龙2mg/kg/天的治疗。在四天的住院期间，她的腹痛加剧，并出现了黑便，随后发展为鲜红色血便。由于严重的腹部膨胀，48小时后进行了重复影像学检查，结果显示大量游离气体和大、小肠环状胀气，符合结肠炎伴麻痹性肠梗阻的情况下穿孔。她被送往手术室进行紧急肠切除术，在横结肠处发现了穿孔部位。切除的横结肠浆膜充血发暗，并在该处识别出了穿孔点（）。结肠黏膜显示弥漫性水肿皱褶，以及融合的黄色渗出物和多发溃疡（）。组织学切片证实了全层坏死性炎症和多发溃疡的存在（图示）。这些发现提示为急性结肠炎伴多发溃疡和穿孔。未发现肠道转移性黑色素瘤的证据。

metadata.original_text: A 51-year-old woman presented with fatigue, nausea, and vomiting for three days. She was diagnosed with metastatic melanoma to pelvic nodes in July 2014 and was treated with ipilimumab (anti-CTLA-4) in combination with nivolumab (PD-1 inhibitor) between September 2014 and April 2015, receiving a total of 4 cycles of combination therapy and 9 cycles of nivolumab monotherapy with an initial mixed response followed by slow progression of disease. In April 2015 she was enrolled on a study of radiation (to pelvic mass) in combination with pembrolizumab (PD-1 inhibitor), receiving a total of 9 cycles of pembrolizumab with no toxicities. In December 2016 she was found to have new brain metastases and in January 2017 pembrolizumab was added. The day following her second dose of pembrolizumab, she developed fatigue and nausea and began having intermittent vomiting and diarrhea. Abdominal CT scan demonstrated diffuse colitis. Infectious studies including C. difficile antigen, stool culture, viral PCR, and ova and parasites exam were all negative. She was started on methylprednisolone 2m/kg/day. Over four days of hospitalization, her abdominal pain worsened and she developed melena, which progressed to bright red blood per rectum. She was given infliximab at 10mg/kg. Repeat imaging performed 48 hours later due to severe abdominal distension showed large amounts of free air with gaseous distention of large and small bowel loops, consistent with perforation in the context of colitis with ileus. She was taken to the operating room for emergent bowel resection and a perforation site was identified at the transverse colon. The resected transverse colon serosa was congested and dusky with site of perforation identified (). The colonic mucosa revealed diffusely edematous folds as well as confluent areas of yellowish exudate and multifocal ulcers (). Histologic sections confirmed the presence of transmural necroinflammation and multifocal ulceration (Figures and ). The findings were of a fulminant colitis with multifocal ulceration and perforation. No evidence of metastatic melanoma to the bowel was identified.

title: pmc-6000842-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-6000842-1
病例摘要：一名65岁、右手为主的非裔美国男性通过紧急医疗服务被送至急诊室。他在吸食可卡因后不久开始出现左臂疼痛，描述为“痉挛性”。他报告说，这种疼痛非常剧烈，导致他变得虚弱并摔倒在地面上。疼痛使他感觉“想要从窗户跳出去”。他否认头部受伤，并且没有失去意识（LOC）。患者没有胸痛、呼吸困难或运动时的气短。他否认颈部、背部或腹部疼痛。患者的既往病史包括糖尿病、高血压、丙型肝炎、窦性心律不齐、阵发性房颤、高脂血症、深静脉血栓形成、慢性肾病、肺门纵隔淋巴结肿大、舒张期心力衰竭、瓣膜性心脏病和非持续性室速伴永久起搏器。患者承认间歇性可卡因滥用。他的药物包括阿托伐他汀、呋塞米、异山梨酯单硝酸盐、对乙酰氨基酚与可待因复方制剂、阿哌沙班、肼屈嗪、二甲双胍、沙丁胺醇硫酸盐、氨氯地平和坦洛新。生命体征基本在正常范围内，除了血压为142/83 mmHg。患者的左桡动脉脉搏强，左手的毛细血管再充盈迅速，没有压痛或畸形。患者被注意到有左臂无力以及类似舞蹈样或笨拙样的左臂运动。他的左腿也显得较弱。没有麻木感。有趣的是，对左臂任何部位进行轻触都会产生显著不适，以至于他不愿意让任何东西接触左臂。他在左侧上肢快速交替动作方面表现出减少，并且有轻微的精细运动控制困难。他的左臂和左腿肌力均为4/5级。颅神经II到XII粗略检查正常。没有发现视野缺损。眼球外展运动完好无损。面部表情对称。没有证据表明双侧同时性失认症。体检未见搏动性腹部肿块，双侧桡动脉脉冲相等。患者无法准确描述症状的起始时间。他的左臂疼痛在静脉注射吗啡4毫克后有所缓解。心电图（ECG）显示窦性心动过速伴一度房室传导阻滞，以及ST和T波异常，提示可能有侧壁缺血[见]。然而，这与他两年前的ECG相比没有变化[见]。他的心脏酶检测结果为阴性。头部无对比CT扫描显示后部右侧顶叶急性2.2厘米脑内出血伴血管源性水肿[见]。上肢X光片未见异常。胸部X光片显示正常的心脏轮廓和肺血管结构。实验室数据显示肌酐水平为1.34 mg/dL。尿液药物筛查显示可卡因阳性。根据神经外科会诊，患者被置于尼卡地平持续输注以维持收缩压在140 mmHg，并转入神经重症监护病房。他的左臂疼痛在24小时后消失。颈动脉超声未见有临床意义的颈动脉狭窄，双侧椎动脉前向血流存在。头部和颈部CT血管造影未发现动脉瘤。他住院期间的心脏酶检测结果始终为阴性。由于患者一年前已经进行了冠状动脉造影且显示正常冠脉，因此没有进行心脏导管检查。心脏病学会诊后，患者被诊断无急性冠脉综合征（ACS）或缺血证据。随后，他被转至康复设施接受治疗。

metadata.original_text: A 65-year-old right hand dominant, African American male presented to the ED via emergency medical service. He had just finished smoking crack cocaine when he developed left arm pain that he described as “cramping”. He reported that the pain was so intense that he became weak causing him to fall onto the ground. The pain made him feel like “jumping out of the window.” He denied any head injury and he had no loss of consciousness (LOC). The patient had no chest, shortness of breath, or dyspnea on exertion. He denied any neck, back, or abdominal pain. The patient's past medical history included diabetes, hypertension, hepatitis C, sick sinus syndrome, paroxysmal atrial fibrillation, hyperlipidemia, deep vein thrombosis, chronic kidney disease, hilar mediastinal adenopathy, diastolic heart failure, valvular heart disease, and cardiac arrhythmia of nonsustained ventricular tachycardia with a permanent pacemaker. The patient admitted to intermittent cocaine abuse. His medications include atorvastatin, furosemide, isosorbide mononitrate, acetaminophen with codeine, apixaban, hydralazine, metformin, albuterol sulfate, amlodipine, and tamsulosin. Vital signs were essentially within normal limits with the exception of a blood pressure of 142/83 mmHg. The patient had a strong left radial pulse and brisk capillary refill of the left hand with no tenderness or deformity. The patient was noted to have left arm weakness and what looked like choreiform or clumsy left arm movements. His left leg was also noted to be weak. There was no numbness. Interestingly, light touch to any part of the left arm produced significant discomfort to the point where he did not want anything touching the left arm. He was noted to have decreased rapid alternating movements on the left upper extremity as well as mild difficulty with fine motor control. His left arm and left leg motor strength was 4/5. His cranial nerves II to XII were grossly intact. There were no visual fields cuts noted. Extraocular motility was intact. The grimace was symmetric. There was no evidence of double simultaneous extinction. There were no pulsatile abdominal masses on exam and the bilateral radial pulses were equal. The patient was unable to tell the exact time of onset of his symptoms. The patient's left arm pain improved with morphine 4 mg intravenously. The electrocardiogram (ECG) showed sinus tachycardia with first degree atria-ventricular block, as well as ST and T wave abnormality suggestive of lateral ischemia []. This is however unchanged compared to his ECG from two years previously []. His cardiac enzyme was negative. A computed tomography (CT) scan of the head without contrast showed an acute 2.2 cm intraparenchymal hemorrhage with vasogenic edema in the posterior right parietal lobe [see ]. X-rays of the upper extremity were unremarkable. The chest X-ray showed normal cardiac silhouette and pulmonary vasculature. Laboratory data showed a creatinine of 1.34 mg/dL. The urine drug screen showed cocaine. The patient was placed on a continuous nicardipine infusion to maintain a systolic blood pressure of 140 mm Hg as per neurosurgical consultation. He was transferred to a neurointensive care unit. His left arm pain resolved after 24 hours. The carotid ultrasound showed no hemodynamically significant carotid stenosis and antegrade flow was present in the bilateral vertebral arteries. A CT angiography of the head and neck did not show any aneurysms. His serial cardiac enzymes remained negative throughout his hospitalization. A cardiac catheterization was not performed as the patient had it done one year previously showing angiographically normal coronaries. A cardiology consult was obtained and the patient was found to have no evidence of acute coronary syndrome (ACS) or ischemia. He was subsequently discharged to a rehabilitation facility.

title: pmc-6000843-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-6000843-1
病例摘要：一名42岁男性患者，有长达9年的间歇性咳痰病史。他还报告了反复发热、寒战和夜间盗汗的症状，但否认有呼吸困难、胸痛、咯血或体重减轻的情况。两个月前因类似症状再次就诊急诊科，并接受了7天的左氧氟沙星治疗，症状有所暂时缓解。既往病史仅糖尿病。他没有手术史，也没有服用任何药物。他是一名园丁，否认吸烟、饮酒或吸毒的历史。体检时生命体征稳定，在空气中吸氧饱和度正常。胸部听诊显示左侧下肺野呼吸音略减低并有鼾音。其余检查未见异常。生化检测和血常规均无明显异常，白细胞计数为7.0。痰抗酸杆菌涂片和细菌培养均为阴性。胸片显示左侧基底段肺实变伴树芽征及LMSB狭窄（）。胸部CT扫描显示左侧肺基底部广泛树芽征伴融合实变、纵隔淋巴结肿大，以及LMSB狭窄（）。纤维支气管镜检查发现中段LMSB近完全阻塞和扭曲（）。使用内镜活检钳进行机械减容后，支气管镜能够通过至远端LMSB，在此观察到一金属异物（）。活检的气道黏膜组织病理分析显示炎症及鳞状上皮化生，但未见恶性证据。随后患者接受了硬质支气管镜检查，并使用硬质支气管镜钳取出2.7厘米长的金属异物（）。阻塞LMSB的肉芽组织用氩离子凝固术治疗。患者报告症状立即有所改善。进一步询问后，他回忆起12年前曾误吸一小块铝制饮料容器，当时作为牙线使用，该物体在此期间一直留存未取出。随访支气管镜检查显示远端LMSB持续狭窄。使用电凝刀环形切开和球囊扩张的硬质支气管镜检查用于恢复腔道通畅。一个月后再次CT扫描显示左侧肺树芽征及实变完全消退，LMSB通气恢复正常。患者的慢性咳嗽症状消失，并且目前无任何症状。

metadata.original_text: A 42-year-old man presented with a nine-year history of intermittent productive cough. He also endorsed recurrent episodes of fevers, chills, and night sweats but denied shortness of breath, chest pain, hemoptysis, or weight loss. He presented to the Emergency Department for similar symptoms two months prior and was given a seven-day course of levofloxacin, with temporary improvement in symptoms. Past medical history was significant only for diabetes mellitus. He had no prior surgery and did not take any medications. He worked as a gardener and denied any history of smoking, alcohol, or drug use. On examination, vital signs were stable with normal oxygen saturation on room air. Chest auscultation revealed mildly decreased breath sounds and rhonchi in the left lower lung field. The remainder of the examination was normal. A chemistry panel and CBC were unremarkable, including a WBC of 7.0. Sputum AFB smears and bacterial cultures were all negative. Chest radiograph showed left basilar lung consolidation with tree-in-bud opacities and stenosis of the LMSB (). Chest CT scan showed extensive tree-in-bud opacities with confluent consolidation in the left lung base, enlarged hilar and mediastinal lymph nodes, and stenosis of the LMSB (). Flexible bronchoscopy revealed near-occlusion and distortion of the mid-LMSB (). Mechanical debulking with endoscopic biopsy forceps allowed for passage of the bronchoscope to the distal LMSB where a metallic foreign body was appreciated (). Histologic analysis of the biopsied endobronchial tissue revealed inflammation and squamous metaplasia, but no evidence of malignancy. Subsequently, the patient underwent rigid bronchoscopy and a 2.7 centimeter metal foreign body was retrieved using rigid bronchoscopy forceps (). Granulation tissue occluding the LMSB was treated with argon plasma coagulation. The patient reported immediate improvement in his symptoms. Upon further questioning, he recalled a previous aspiration of a small piece of an aluminum beverage container that he used in lieu of dental floss 12 years before. This object was retained over that time period until we removed it. Follow-up surveillance bronchoscopy demonstrated persistent endobronchial stricture in the distal LMSB. Rigid bronchoscopy with radial incisions by electrocautery knife and balloon dilation was used to restore luminal patency. Repeat CT scan one month after endobronchial therapy showed resolution of the left lung tree-in-bud opacities and consolidation and restored patency of the LMSB. The patient's chronic cough resolved and he remains asymptomatic.

title: pmc-6000848-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-6000848-1
病例摘要：一名66岁的白人男性因左手背有一个21×20mm大小、凸起、结痂、鳞状的病变，伴有边缘红斑前来就诊（）。他报告说这个病变已经存在几年了，但最近有增长。既往病史包括多种分布的角化棘皮瘤、基底细胞癌（BCC）和脂溢性角化病，使他处于更高的表皮癌风险中[]。在初级保健机构对该病变进行了诊断，认为是角化棘皮瘤，但也考虑了可能是基底细胞癌或鳞状细胞癌。之前的一次基底细胞癌通过六周的外用咪喹莫特治疗成功管理。为该患者提供了AK病灶切除术的选择，但他表示有兴趣尝试不同的方法。同时，患者参加了关于Kanuka蜂蜜在玫瑰痤疮中应用的一项临床试验[]，决定尝试将Kanuka蜂蜜外用于其角化棘皮瘤上。使用Honevo®医用级Kanuka蜂蜜（90% Kanuka蜂蜜，10% 甘油），每天一次，用指尖少量涂抹于病变及其周围5mm的正常皮肤上，持续10-30秒后，保留30-60分钟再用水清洗掉。连续进行了五天治疗后，患者因病灶疼痛暂停了两天治疗，在此期间，病变被轻轻挑破以进行去痂处理。这个过程总共重复了三个月；在此期间没有使用其他治疗方法，也没有出现不良反应。随着治疗的进行，病变逐渐缩小，最初迅速减少了干燥、结痂的状态。经过三个月后，病变残留部分表现为20mm×17mm大小的粉红色皮肤区域，无增生、结痂或皮肤完整性丧失（）。在六个月时，没有发现复发迹象。九个月时，该区域皮肤完全恢复正常。治疗两年后的电话随访中，患者报告该区域皮肤仍然完全正常且未见复发。此时拍摄了一张照片（）.

metadata.original_text: A 66-year-old Caucasian gentleman presented to his GP with a singular, raised, crusted, scaly lesion of 21 × 20mm size with marginal erythema on the dorsum of his left hand (). He reported that the lesion was present for several years but had noted recent growth. Medical history included AK, basal cell carcinoma (BCC), and seborrheic keratoses in various distributions over recent years, putting him at a higher risk of keratinocyte carcinoma []. The lesion was diagnosed in the primary care setting as an AK, though possibility of BCC and SCC was considered. The previous BCC had been managed successfully with six weeks of topical imiquimod treatment. Procedural removal of the AK was offered to the patient, but he expressed interest in trying a different approach. The patient was contemporaneously enrolled in a clinical trial examining the use of Kanuka honey on rosacea [] and decided to try using the Kanuka honey topically on his AK. Honevo® medical grade Kanuka honey (90% Kanuka honey, 10% glycerin) was topically applied once daily using a small amount on the fingertip rubbed into the lesion and surrounding 5 mm of normal skin for 10–30 seconds. It was left on for 30–60 minutes and then washed off with water. This was done consecutively for five days, after which the patient took a treatment break of two days due to lesion tenderness. During the break, the lesion was gently picked at, thereby debriding it. This process was repeated for a total of three months; there were no other treatments used prior to or during this regimen and there were no adverse reactions. The lesion gradually reduced in size with an initial rapid reduction in its dry, crusted nature. After three months, residual appearance of the lesion was a 20 mm by 17 mm area of pink skin with no elements of hypertrophy, crusting, or loss of skin integrity (). At six months, there were no signs of recurrence. At nine months, the appearance of the skin had fully returned to normal. A telephone follow-up was conducted at two years after treatment, and the patient reported that his skin in the area was still completely normal and that there were no signs of recurrence. A photograph was taken at this time ().

title: pmc-6000850-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-6000850-1
病例摘要：一名66岁的女性因六个月内出现缺铁性贫血、腹泻和直肠出血而进行门诊结肠镜检查。她的病史包括胃食管反流病和慢性腰痛，每天服用两次萘普生。血液学检测显示血红蛋白为7.4 g/dL，平均红细胞体积为70.6 fL。结肠镜检查发现回盲部有四个类似膈膜的狭窄，伴有瘢痕和溃疡，间隔在正常黏膜之间（）。从回盲部狭窄处取得的活检结果显示溃疡、急性炎症和反应性改变（）。患者被告知停用萘普生并避免使用其他非甾体抗炎药。患者随后被安排在三个月后进行重复结肠镜检查以监测病变是否消退。后续结肠镜检查显示，回盲部类似膈膜的狭窄在内镜下（）和病理学上（）均有所改善。

metadata.original_text: A 66-year-old woman presented for an outpatient colonoscopy for evaluation of six months of iron deficiency anemia, diarrhea, and rectal bleeding. Her history was significant for gastroesophageal reflux disease and chronic low back pain, on twice-daily naproxen. Serologic studies were notable for hemoglobin of 7.4 g/dL and a mean corpuscular volume of 70.6 fL. Colonoscopy demonstrated four diaphragm-like strictures, with scarring and ulceration, interspaced between normal mucosa in the cecum and ascending colon (). Biopsies obtained from the cecal and ascending strictures revealed ulceration, acute inflammation, and reactive changes (). The patient was instructed to discontinue naproxen and avoid all other NSAIDs. Patient was subsequently scheduled for a repeat colonoscopy in three months to monitor for resolution. Subsequent colonoscopy revealed both endoscopic () and pathologic resolution () of the diaphragm-like proximal colonic strictures.

title: pmc-6000855-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-6000855-1
病例摘要：一名19岁白人男性因严重原发性硬化胆管炎接受原位肝移植，术后5周因动脉假性动脉瘤破裂导致的肝脏功能不全需要再次移植。他接受了超过40次输血。第二次供体为76岁男性，无肝病史。患者在再次移植后的术后过程中包括由于急性肾损伤、巨细胞病毒感染、戊型肝炎感染和吻合口处肝动脉狭窄（通过血管成形术和支架植入治疗）。值得注意的是，肝动脉狭窄导致类似缺血的胆管病变和长期胆汁淤积。患者在移植后8个月病情稳定。他接受了环孢素和麦考酚酸酯进行免疫抑制，并且还使用了阿司匹林和熊去氧胆酸。在该时期进行了肝脏活检，显示大量增生、含铁的巨噬细胞以及严重的胆管损伤和丢失，符合早期轻度慢性排斥反应（）。由于多次输血、肾损伤和巨细胞病毒感染等因素的存在及出现，认为继发性铁过载是导致贫血的原因。8个月后，观察到肝酶水平升高：丙氨酸转氨酶（ALT），127 IU/L；天冬氨酸转氨酶（AST），61 IU/L；碱性磷酸酶，209 IU/L；γ-谷氨酰转移酶（GGT），222 IU/L。广泛的实验室和影像学检查未发现异常，除了铁相关参数：血清铁，110 ng/ml；铁蛋白，3170 mg/dl（移植前为29 mg/dL）；转铁蛋白，119 mg/dL；转铁蛋白饱和度，66%。重复肝脏活检显示窦状隙纤维化和轻度胆管增生。铁染色显示巨噬细胞和肝细胞中显著的铁积累，符合明显的含铁血黄素沉着（）。结合异常实验室铁参数和活检结果表明铁积累明显恶化且没有新的继发性铁过载的风险因素，我们怀疑是原发性而非继发性含铁血黄素沉着。对患者DNA进行基因检测排除了既往遗传性血色素沉着病，并未发现常见的HFE突变（C282Y或H63D）。对活检样本进行高分辨率熔解曲线分析揭示复合杂合子C282Y/H63D，证实供体组织存在遗传缺陷，在没有已知HFE突变的受者中引发遗传性血色素沉着病。磁共振成像（MRI）用于铁评估显示轻度肝脏铁过载，符合5 mg/gr，并未在其他器官：胰腺、肾上腺、脾脏和心脏中发现铁积累。确诊后，患者被纳入了放血治疗计划。

metadata.original_text: A 19-year-old Caucasian male presenting with severe primary sclerosing cholangitis underwent orthotopic liver transplantation and required a retransplant 5 weeks later due to a liver insufficiency caused by ligation of ruptured arterial pseudoaneurysm. He received more than 40 blood transfusions. The second donor was a 76-year-old male without a history of liver disease. The patient's postoperative course after retransplant included prolonged hemodialysis (8 weeks) due to acute kidney injury, cytomegalovirus (CMV) infection, hepatitis E infection, and hepatic artery stenosis in the anastomosis area, treated by angioplasty and stent insertion. Of note, hepatic artery stenosis resulted in ischemic-like cholangiopathy and prolonged cholestasis. The patient's condition stabilized eight months after transplantation. Cyclosporin and Myfortic were administered for immunosuppression, in addition to aspirin and ursodeoxycholic acid. A liver biopsy performed at that period revealed numerous hypertrophic, iron-loaded macrophages and severe bile duct damage and loss, consistent with early mild chronic rejection (). Hemosiderosis was attributed to secondary iron overload, considering the numerous risk factors for this complication presenting before and after the retransplant (multiple blood transfusions, kidney injury, and CMV infection). Eight months later, elevation of liver enzymes was observed: alanine transaminase (ALT), 127 IU/L, aspartate transaminase (AST), 61 IU/L, alkaline phosphatase, 209 IU/L, and gamma-glutamyl-transpeptidase (GGT), 222 IU/ L. Extensive laboratory and radiologic evaluations showed no abnormalities, aside from iron-related parameters: serum iron, 110 ng/ml, ferritin, 3170 mg/dl (versus 29 mg/dL before transplant), transferrin, 119 mg/dL, and transferrin saturation, 66%. Repeated liver biopsy revealed sinusoidal fibrosis with mild cholangiolar proliferation. Iron staining showed significant accumulation of iron in macrophages and hepatocytes, consistent with marked hemosiderosis (). The combination of abnormal laboratory iron parameters and biopsy findings showing clear worsening of iron accumulation, without apparent new risk factors for secondary iron overload, led us to suspect primary rather than secondary hemosiderosis. Genetic testing of the patient's DNA ruled out preexisting HH and did not show any common HFE mutations (C282Y or H63D). Genetic high-resolution melt curve analysis of a biopsy sample revealed compound C282Y/H63D heterozygosity, confirming a genetic defect in the donor tissue, which elicited hereditary hemochromatosis in a recipient without any known HFE mutation. Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI) performed or iron assessment revealed mild hepatic iron overload, consistent with 5 mg/gr, and did not show accumulation of iron in other organs: pancreas, adrenals, spleen, and heart. Following the confirmation of the diagnosis, the patient was enrolled in a phlebotomy program.

title: pmc-6000865-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-6000865-1
病例摘要：一名五岁男童开始经历一种爆裂感，随后立即出现热感和压力感，从颅底中部开始并向两侧各辐射两厘米。他来自非近亲结合的家庭，出生史中没有使用器械，既往的医学、手术及发育史均无异常。这种感觉与双侧后舌麻木和说话困难同时发生，持续15秒，并逐渐减轻。上述症状每年大约在头部突然侧向旋转（任一方向）约五到十次时出现，且与创伤无关，随着年龄增长频率降低。十一岁至十五岁期间，作为一名竞技击剑运动员，在进行涉及极端、突然侧向旋转头部的动作时，该患者会经历相同的症状，频率约为每周一次到两次。十九岁时，在军事训练和战斗中，当头部受到各种形式的轻微外部创伤导致突然侧向旋转时，他经历了大约十五次相同症状。退伍后，这些发作在没有创伤的情况下通过简单侧向旋转头部持续了六个月，并自发缓解。二十一岁首次因上述症状就医时，患者的体格检查和神经系统检查均正常，包括颅神经检查。值得注意的是，患者并非过度弹性，也没有家族类似病史。颈椎磁共振成像（MRI）显示C1椎体前弓轻度发育性增大、寰枢关节轻度退行性变以及下端脊髓管径在正常范围的低端，未发现异常骨刺或舌下神经管异常。进一步询问后得知，患者的祖母也有同样的状况。

metadata.original_text: A five-year-old male began experiencing a popping sensation followed immediately by the sensation of heat and pressure starting medially at the base of the skull which radiated two centimeters bilaterally. He was a product of a nonconsanguineous union, whose birth history did not involve instrumentation and whose past medical, surgical, and developmental histories were all noncontributory. This sensation was experienced simultaneously with bilateral numbness of the posterior tongue and difficulty in speaking, both of which lasted fifteen seconds with gradual attenuation. The above would occur upon abrupt lateral rotation (either direction) of the head approximately five to ten times a year unrelated to trauma, diminishing in frequency as the patient aged. Between the ages of eleven and fifteen, as a competitive fencer, the patient would experience the same symptomology when performing actions involving extreme, abrupt lateral rotation of the head, translating to a frequency of approximately once to twice weekly. At the age of nineteen, during military training and combat, the same symptomology was experienced approximately fifteen times when abrupt lateral rotation of the head prompted by various forms of minor external head trauma was experienced. After discharge from the military, frequency of these episodes was sustained with simple lateral rotation of the head outside the context of trauma for six months with spontaneous abatement. At the age of twenty-one, the first time the patient came to medical attention for the above complaint, the patient's physical and neurologic examinations were completely normal, including cranial nerve exam. Of note, the patient was not hyperelastic, nor was there a family history of the same. Magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) of the cervical spine (Figures –) was performed revealing slight dysplastic enlargement of the anterior arch of C1 vertebrate, mild degenerative changes of the atlantoaxial junction, and spinal canal caliber on the lower end of normal limits. No evidence for abnormal bone spurring or abnormality of the hypoglossal canal was found. Of note, upon further query, it was found that the patient's grandmother also had the same condition.

title: pmc-6000869-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-6000869-1
病例摘要：一名72岁的女性因胰头颈部癌进行更详细的评估和手术治疗而被转诊至我院。她大约一年前开始出现腹痛，最近六个月疼痛加剧。疼痛在餐后并局限于右上腹部。过去两个月内，她出现了全身性黄疸及瘙痒的症状。患者没有饮酒或吸烟的历史。该患者因胰头颈部癌的可能性很大而被转诊给我们进行手术咨询，并且由于胆管和肝外胆管扩张导致症状缓解，在之前的医疗机构植入了塑料支架。入院后，她接受了腹部计算机断层扫描（CT）、内镜超声成像以及诊断性十二指肠活检。腹部增强CT显示胰头颈部有18mm×20mm的低密度肿块（）。此外，进行了内镜超声检查以排除十二指肠周围病变（）。在胰头颈部区域观察到一个20mm×19mm的病变，并且胰体内的主胰管轻微扩张。同时，胆总管（CBD）远端增厚并含有泥沙样物质。随后进行了诊断性活检以进行病理评估。活检结果显示微细结构下为不规则灰白色软组织，具有未分化的恶性肿瘤特征。在Whipple手术过程中，在门静脉左侧切断胰颈后，冷冻切片显示胰腺组织有更多受累。尽管额外切除2cm的胰腺组织，但残留的胰腺仍然存在肉眼可见的肿瘤侵犯。因此，患者接受了全胰切除术。术后病理研究确定了最大直径为4cm的肿瘤，并且该肿瘤已延伸至十二指肠。观察到静脉、淋巴管和神经鞘膜受侵；然而，没有发现确切的远处转移证据。由于胆总管周围闭塞导致胆汁流动长期受阻，引起了慢性胆囊炎和胰腺炎，这在组织病理学评估中得到了证实。苏木精和伊红染色显示肿瘤内存在两种细胞群，包括梭形纤维母细胞样细胞和平滑肌样细胞（）。此外，间质细胞的增殖模式为束状（）。肿瘤组织或相邻组织中没有发现分化良好的成分。总体而言，该肿瘤被归类为病理分期II A。进行了免疫组化染色，肿瘤对CD68、溶菌酶、α1-抗胰蛋白酶和波形蛋白呈阳性反应（）。同时，它对S-100P、角蛋白、上皮膜抗原、肌球蛋白、CD34、平滑肌抗原、MDM2和CDK4均呈阴性。因此，肿瘤诊断符合UPS。肿瘤Ki-67表达超过30%。为了评估转移的发生，在手术后第6个月、12个月、18个月、24个月和36个月进行了对比增强胸部高分辨率CT扫描和腹部盆腔多层螺旋CT扫描，并未发现转移证据。术后开始使用胰岛素和Creon以维持生命。通过定期的CT扫描和超声成像进行进一步随访检查。幸运的是，在5年随访期间，她没有疾病复发，并且能够很好地耐受全胰切除术。

metadata.original_text: A 72-year-old woman was referred to our hospital with pancreatic head and neck carcinoma for more evaluations and surgical operation. She had been suffering from abdominal pain for about 1 year, and the pain has become more intense in the last 6 months. The pain was postprandial and localized to the right upper abdomen. She has become icteric with generalized spread plus itching since past 2 months. The patient had no history of alcohol consumption or smoking. The patient was referred to us with a highly probable diagnosis of pancreatic head and neck carcinoma to be consulted for surgery. Also, a plastic stent was implanted for her in the previous health center due to intra- and extrahepatic duct dilation for the relief of patient symptoms and signs. After admission to our hospital, she was evaluated by abdominal computed tomography (CT), endosonographic imaging, and diagnostic ampullary biopsy. The abdominal CT scan with contrast exhibited an 18 mm × 20 mm hypodense mass at the head and neck of the pancreas (). Also, endosonographic imaging was performed to rule out periampullary lesions (). A 20 mm × 19 mm lesion was seen in the pancreatic head and neck region, and the main pancreatic duct was slightly dilated in the body of the pancreas. Moreover, the common bile duct (CBD) was distally thickened and contained sludge. Subsequently, diagnostic biopsy for pathological assessment was done. The biopsy revealed an irregular gray-creamy soft tissue which had undifferentiated malignant tumor features at microscopic evaluations. During the Whipple procedure, after cutting the neck of the pancreas in the left side of the portal vein, the frozen section revealed more involvement of pancreatic tissue. Although additional 2 cm was resected, the pancreas residue still had tumor involvement, macroscopically. Therefore, the patient was undergone total pancreatectomy. Postoperative pathological studies were established and indicated a tumor with the greatest dimension of 4 cm which was extended to the duodenum. Invasion of the venous, lymphatic vessels and perineural sites was seen; however, no exact evidence of distant metastasis was found. The periampullary occlusion had hindered the bile flow over time, leading to chronic cholecystitis and pancreatitis which was confirmed by histopathological assessments. The hematoxylin and eosin staining revealed the presence of two cellular populations including spindle fibroblast-like and pleomorphic cells within the tumor. In addition, the proliferation pattern of the mesenchymal cells was storiform (). There was not any well-differentiated component in the tumor tissue or adjacent tissue. Overall, the pathologic stage II A was assigned to the tumor. The immunohistochemical staining was performed, and the tumor was positive for CD68, lysozyme, alpha 1-antichymotrypsin, and vimentin (). Also, it was negative for S-100P, cytokeratin, epithelial membrane antigen, desmin, CD34, smooth muscle antigen, MDM2, and CDK4. Therefore, the tumor diagnosis was compatible with UPS. The tumor Ki-67 expression was more than 30%. To evaluate metastasis occurrence, contrast-enhanced thoracic high-resolution CT scan and multidetector CT scan of abdominopelvic were done at 6, 12, 18, 24, and 36 months after operation, and no evidence of metastasis was detected. Insulin and Creon were started after surgery for long life. The further follow-up investigations were done by periodic CT scan and ultrasonic imaging. Fortunately, she was disease-free during 5-year follow-up and tolerated total pancreatectomy, well.

title: pmc-6000873-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-6000873-1
病例摘要：一名64岁男性，有微乳头状甲状腺癌和经过化疗和放疗后无活动性疾病证据的IIIb期肺腺癌病史。他因新发疲劳、恶心、头皮触痛和干燥皮肤等症状就诊。他的药物包括：用于治疗化疗引起的神经病变的加巴喷丁300毫克，每日四次；用于治疗表皮生长因子受体（EGFR）阳性肺腺癌的厄洛替尼150毫克，每日一次；以及用于主观胃食管反流病的奥美拉唑40毫克，每日一次。头部筛查磁共振成像显示新发低血供垂体肿块，大小约为1厘米×0.8厘米。体检时，患者的 vital signs 在正常范围内。在体格检查中，所有四肢均发现干燥皮肤。手指大小比例适当，并未观察到前突、肢端肥大或库欣综合征特征。心脏和肺部检查结果正常。初步实验室检测结果显示正常的游离三碘甲状腺原氨酸（T3）为2.4 pg/mL（正常范围1.8–4.2 pg/mL），总T3为86 ng/dL（正常范围70–172 ng/dL），以及正常的游离四碘甲状腺原氨酸为1.00 ng/dL（正常范围0.84–1.68 ng/dL）。催乳素水平升高至28.9 ng/mL（正常范围2.5–17.0 ng/mL）。患者的早晨皮质醇水平极低，<1.0 mcg/dL（正常范围> 10 mcg/dL），睾酮水平也低于20 ng/dL（280–1100 ng/dL）。促黄体生成激素水平较低，为0.05 mIU/mL（正常范围1.8–12.0 mIU/L）。患者开始服用泼尼松20毫克/日口服后，立即注意到他的精力和食欲有所改善，并且恶心减轻。为了长期皮质醇替代疗法，患者的治疗从泼尼松改为氢化可的松，每日早晨20毫克，晚上10毫克。患者还被告知急性肾上腺危象的风险，并被告知如果突然生病应将氢化可的松增加到90毫克/日。在初次诊断一个月后，患者出现双侧视野缺损和周边视力丧失的急性视觉问题。重复MRI显示垂体肿块迅速增大，几乎翻了一番，描述为2.2厘米×1.2厘米大小，并压迫上方视交叉（optic chiasm）。随后，患者接受了经蝶窦切除术以切除垂体肿块。显微镜下病理学特征表明该肿块坚实且纤维化。宏观分析显示腺垂体纤维化转移性肺腺癌。进一步的组织学分析揭示了阳性识别的细胞角蛋白7、TTF-1、Ki-67以及表皮生长因子受体（EGFR）阳性，伴有EGFR基因核苷酸变化，表现出T790M和L858R阳性。这一病理学结果表明患者已知肺腺癌史中的进一步EGFR突变，最初仅表现为EGFR突变L585R阳性。经蝶窦切除术及随后的全脑放疗后，进一步检测结果显示早晨皮质醇水平仍低于1.0 mcg/dL（正常范围> 10 mcg/dL），睾酮水平低于20 ng/dL（280–1100 ng/dL）。促黄体生成激素水平较低，为<0.1 mIU/mL（正常范围1.8–12.0 mIU/L），卵泡刺激素为0.8 mIU/mL（正常范围1.5–12.4 mIU/mL）。游离T4低于正常值，为0.65 ng/dL（正常范围0.84–1.68 ng/dL）和促甲状腺激素水平较低，为0.019 MCI/mL（正常范围0.4–4.0 MCI/mL）。催乳素水平较之前降低但仍高于正常值，为14.9 ng/mL（正常范围2.5–17.0 ng/mL）。

metadata.original_text: A 64-year-old man with a medical history of micropapillary thyroid cancer and stage IIIb lung adenocarcinoma with no evidence of active disease for 3 years after chemotherapy and radiation presented with subjective complaints of new onset fatigue, nausea, scalp tenderness, and xeroderma. His medications included gabapentin 300 mg four times a day for chemotherapy-induced neuropathy, erlotinib 150 mg once daily for epidermal growth factor receptor- (EGFR-) positive lung adenocarcinoma, and omeprazole 40 mg once daily for subjective gastroesophageal reflux disease. A screening magnetic resonance image of the head revealed a new hypovascular pituitary mass measuring approximately 1 cm by 0.8 cm (). On examination, the patient's vital signs were within normal limits. On physical exam, xeroderma was appreciated in all extremities. Finger size was proportional and no prognathism, acromegaly, or Cushingoid features were appreciated. The cardiopulmonary exam was normal. Initial lab values demonstrated normal free triiodothyronine (T3) of 2.4 pg/mL (normal range (NR) 1.8–4.2 pg/mL), normal T3 of 86 ng/dL (NR 70–172 ng/dL), and normal free thyroxine of 1.00 ng/dL (NR 0.84–1.68 ng/dL). Prolactin was elevated at 28.9 ng/mL (NR 2.5–17.0 ng/mL). The patient's morning cortisol was immeasurably low at <1.0 mcg/dL (NR > 10 mcg/dL) as was the patient's testosterone level at <20 ng/dL (280–1100 ng/dL). Luteinizing hormone was low at 0.05 mIU/mL (NR 1.8–12.0 mIU/L). The patient was started on prednisone 20 mg by mouth daily, at which point he noticed immediate improvement in his energy and appetite as well as decrease in his nausea. For chronic steroid replacement therapy, the patient's treatment was changed from prednisone to hydrocortisone 20 mg of hydrocortisone in the morning and 10 mg in the evening. The patient was additionally instructed about the dangers of adrenal crisis and told to increase his hydrocortisone to 90 mg daily if acutely ill. Within a month of initial diagnoses, the patient suffered acute visual bilateral field cut and loss of peripheral vision. A repeat MRI demonstrated rapid enlargement of his pituitary mass, nearly doubled in size and described as a 2.2 cm by 1.2 cm mass impinging on the overlying optic chiasm (). The patient subsequently underwent transsphenoidal resection of his pituitary mass. Gross histology characterized the mass as firm and fibrous. Macroscopic analysis revealed metastatic lung adenocarcinoma described as adenohypophysis fibrosis. Further histologic analysis revealed positive identification of cytokeratin 7, TTF-1, Ki-67, and epidermal growth factor receptor (EGFR) positive with EGFR gene nucleotide change demonstrating T790M and L858R positivity. This histopathology demonstrated further EGFR mutation of the patient's known history of lung adenocarcinoma which initially was only positive for EGFR mutation L585R. After transsphenoidal resection and subsequent whole-brain radiation, further results demonstrated a continued low morning cortisol at <1.0 mcg/dL (NR > 10 mcg/dL) and testosterone level at <20 ng/dL (280–1100 ng/dL). Luteinizing hormone was low at <0.1 mIU/mL (NR 1.8–12.0 mIU/L) as was follicle-stimulating hormone 0.8 mIU/mL (NR 1.5–12.4 mIU/mL). Free T4 was low at 0.65 ng/dL (NR 0.84–1.68 ng/dL) and thyroid-stimulating hormone was low at 0.019 MCI/mL (NR 0.4–4.0 MCI/mL). Prolactin was lower than previous but still elevated at 14.9 ng/mL (NR 2.5–17.0 ng/mL).

title: pmc-6000876-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-6000876-1
病例摘要：一名32岁男性因进行性呼吸困难和下肢水肿就诊。其既往病史包括艾滋病和肾盂移行细胞癌伴转移，左侧肾脏切除术。他有脊椎骨、纵隔淋巴结和肺部的转移性疾病。他接受了吉西他滨和顺铂治疗，并随后接受阿特朱单抗的挽救性治疗。他还正在接受整合酶抑制剂联合抗逆转录病毒疗法（埃利维格拉韦/共比司他/恩曲他滨/替诺福韦/艾米那韦），病毒载量不可检测，CD4计数为444个/mm³。体格检查显示心动过速、呼吸困难、右侧胸腔呼吸音减弱和下肢水肿。胸部X光片显示右侧胸腔积液和左上肺部肿块状密度增大。实验室数据显示贫血和肌钙蛋白I水平升高。患者在接受输血和治疗性胸腔穿刺后症状部分缓解。经胸超声心动图显示左心室功能正常，右、左心房内存在一个大而移动的囊性肿块。食管超声心动图显示一个由实性和囊性成分组成的大型肿块。下肢MRI检测到双侧小腿肌层多个增强肿瘤性肿块（图未展示），支持肿瘤病变。考虑到疾病的广泛程度，患者不适合手术治疗，并在入院后几天内去世。

metadata.original_text: A 32-year-old male presented with progressive shortness of breath and leg swelling. He had a past medical history significant for HIV disease and metastatic transitional cell cancer of the renal pelvis and left nephrectomy. He had metastatic involvement of the spinal bones, mediastinal lymph nodes, and lungs. He received gemcitabine and cisplatin followed by salvage treatment with atezolizumab. He was also on combination antiretroviral therapy (elvitegravir/cobicistat/emtricitabine/tenofovir/alafenamide) with undetectable viral load and CD4 count of 444 cells/mm3. The physical exam was remarkable for tachycardia, respiratory distress, decreased breath sounds in the right hemithorax, and lower extremity swelling. A chest X-ray showed a right-sided pleural effusion and an enlarged nodular density in the left upper lobe. Laboratory data revealed anemia and an elevated troponin I. Patient symptoms resolved partially after he received a blood transfusion and underwent therapeutic thoracentesis. Transthoracic echocardiography revealed normal left ventricular function and a large, mobile, cystic mass in the right and left atrium. Transesophageal echocardiography revealed a large mass composed of solid and cystic components. The solid component, a 5 × 2.3 cm2 mass, had invaded the basal half of the interatrial septum and the cystic component was found to protrude into the left atrium (). Multiple enhancing neoplastic masses in the muscular compartment in both calves were detected on MRI of the lower extremities, which were in favor of neoplastic lesions (Figures –). The patient was not a candidate for surgery considering the extent of disease and he expired few days after presentation.

title: pmc-6000878-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-6000878-1
病例摘要：该病例是一位75岁女性患者，患有带状疱疹后神经痛已有8年。2016年12月，在我们医院的麻醉科进行了Gasserian神经节阻滞术以治疗右侧第一支三叉神经神经痛。在口角外侧约2.5厘米处沿向瞳孔方向的直线进行穿刺，X光影像引导下将针插入。从正面观察，当引导针尖端到达卵圆孔时，确认针尖位置略偏向中线内侧。随后，在确认异常感觉后，注射了2%利多卡因，并在V1和V2区域确认了感觉丧失。接着，注射99.5%乙醇（0.2毫升）后进行了持续180秒、温度为90°C的射频热凝固术。次日，患者注意到右眼视力突然下降并出现结膜充血。她前往附近的眼科医生处就诊，并被诊断为右眼结膜充血、角膜上皮缺损和Descemet膜皱褶。由于没有改善，两天后她再次来到我们医院。右眼的初始视力为0.03（未计）。裂隙灯检查显示整个周边结膜显著充血，角膜浅层新生血管化尤为明显，在11点至5点钟方向有约3×4毫米大小的角膜上皮缺损，Descemet膜皱褶和轻度基质水肿；但前房内没有炎症迹象。患者未感到眼部疼痛，右眼使用Cochet-Bonnet触觉测定器测量的角膜敏感性为<10毫米，在左眼则为60毫米，显示右眼角膜敏感性显著下降。她被诊断为NK阶段2（）。治疗开始使用每日两次、浓度为0.3%的氧氟沙星眼膏（Tarivid® 0.3%；Santen Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd., Osaka, Japan）和每日四次、浓度为2%的rebamipide眼液（Mucosta® 单剂量滴眼液，Otsuka Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd., Tokyo, Japan）。在神经节阻滞一周后，角膜上皮缺损逐渐缓解（图略）。由于结膜显著充血持续存在，我们每日三次使用氟甲松龙眼液（氟甲松龙® 0.1%；Santen Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd.）。在神经节阻滞后一个月时，出现了严重的结膜显著充血、非常严重的11点至5点钟方向角膜浅层新生血管化、持续的具有平滑和卷曲边缘的角膜缺损以及中央角膜水肿。两个月后（），出现浅表点状角膜病变（SPK）、结膜显著充血、11点至5点钟方向角膜浅层新生血管化、角膜上皮不规则、中央角膜瘢痕形成和右眼角膜敏感性为10毫米。2017年4月使用HRT II RCM检查时，未在右眼中观察到角膜基底层神经纤维（图略）。在三叉神经阻滞后五个月时，观察到了角膜上皮轻微不规则和中央角膜瘢痕；然而，结膜显著充血和角膜浅层新生血管化总体有所改善，并且右眼的角膜敏感性恢复到约50毫米，尽管SPK仍然存在（）。此时，角膜上皮缺损总体有所改善；因此，停用了氧氟沙星眼膏。rebamipide和氟甲松龙眼液继续使用并进行随访。根据患者的描述，她已经恢复了脸颊的触觉。角膜溃疡有时复发但会在一周左右自行恢复。在三叉神经阻滞后六个月时，右眼角膜敏感性为60毫米。SPK、结膜显著充血和角膜浅层新生血管化

metadata.original_text: The subject was a 75-year-old woman who had suffered from postherpetic neuralgia for 8 years. In December 2016, she underwent a Gasserian ganglion nerve block at the Department of Anesthesiology of our hospital. Gasserian ganglion nerve block was performed to treat the first branch neuralgia of the trigeminal nerve in the right at the point which is 2.5 cm lateral to the right angle of the mouth, following a straight line directed toward the pupil. A needle was inserted under guidance of X-ray imaging on the monitor display. When the tip of the guiding needle reached the foramen ovale, the location of the needle tip was confirmed to be slightly inside from the median in the frontal view. Next, after confirming dysesthesia, 2% xylocaine was injected. And then loss of sensation was confirmed in the V1 and V2 regions. After injecting 99.5% ethanol (0.2 mL), radiofrequency thermocoagulation was added continuously for 180 seconds at 90°C. On the following day, the patient noticed a sudden visual acuity (VA) decline and hyperemia in the right eye. She visited a neighborhood ophthalmologist and was diagnosed with conjunctival hyperemia, corneal epithelial defect, and Descemet's folds in the right eye. Because no improvement was achieved, she visited our hospital two days later. The initial VA was 0.03 (n.c.) in the right eye. A slit-lamp examination revealed severe conjunctival hyperemia all around the periphery, remarkable corneal superficial neovascularization, especially, at 11 to 5 o'clock, corneal epithelial defects of the size approximately 3 × 4 mm, Descemet's membrane folds, and mild stromal edema were observed; however, no signs of inflammation were seen in the anterior chamber. The patient did not experience any eye pain and corneal sensitivity measured with Cochet-Bonnet esthesiometer was <10 mm in the right eye and 60 mm in the left, showing remarkable decline of corneal sensitivity in the right. She was diagnosed with NK stage 2 (). Treatment was started with 0.3% ofloxacin ophthalmic ointment (Tarivid® ophthalmic ointment 0.3%; Santen Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd., Osaka, Japan) twice daily and rebamipide ophthalmic suspension (Mucosta® ophthalmic suspension unit dose 2%; Otsuka Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd., Tokyo, Japan) 4 times daily. The corneal epithelial defects were gradually alleviated at 1 week after ganglion nerve block (Figures and ). Because severe conjunctival hyperemia persisted, we added fluorometholone ophthalmic suspension (fluorometholone® ophthalmic suspension unit dose 0.1%; Santen Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd.) 3 times daily. At 1 month after ganglion nerve block () severe conjunctival hyperemia, very severe corneal superficial neovascularization at 11 to 5 o'clock, persistent corneal defects with smooth and rolled edges, and stromal swelling in the central cornea occurred. At 2 months (), superficial punctate keratopathy (SPK), conjunctival hyperemia, corneal superficial neovascularization at 11 to 5 o'clock, irregularity of corneal epithelium, stromal scarring in the central cornea, and the right corneal sensation of 10 mm remained. Evaluation with the HRT II RCM was made in April 2017 and no corneal subbasal nerve fibers were observed in the right eye (Figures and ). Five months after the trigeminal nerve block, slight irregularity of corneal epithelium and stromal scarring in the central cornea were observed; however, conjunctival hyperemia and corneal superficial neovascularization were overall improving and the corneal sensation in the right eye also recovered to about 50 mm although SPK remained (). At this point, corneal epithelial defect was overall improving; therefore, ofloxacin eye ointment was stopped. Rebamipide and fluorometholone eye drops were continued and the patient was followed up. According to the patient, she had regained the sense of touch on the cheek. Corneal erosion sometimes recurred but it recovered in about a week. Six months after the trigeminal nerve block, the corneal sensation in the right eye was 60 mm. SPK and conjunctival hyperemia, corneal superficial neovascularization,

title: pmc-6000879-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-6000879-1
病例摘要：一名65岁无家族史和个人病史的男性因2天内出现轻微构音障碍和命名困难，难以找到合适的词语并进行对话而入院。此外，其家属报告了至少一个月前运动笨拙和步态不稳的症状。在神经学检查中，患者意识清晰，语言流利、连贯且自发，但有轻度失语症。他表现出明显的帕金森症状：额纹反射持续存在；患者的眨眼频率降低，表情减少，右侧肢体出现中度震颤减慢和运动减少，并伴有右臂摆动减少（霍恩-耶尔期I级）。检查未发现其他异常。鉴于临床怀疑为帕金森症，我们进行了基线的全面血液检测，结果正常或阴性。脑MRI显示左侧壳核信号强度增加并有弥散受限，提示腔隙性梗死（）。根据最初的MRI发现，进行了心脏超声、Holter监测和颈动脉多普勒超声检查以完成血管研究，结果显示无显著异常变化。使用123I-碘佛肽SPECT（DaTSCAN）研究帕金森症，显示尾状核不对称摄取放射性标记物（左侧尾状核摄取减少），左壳核几乎完全无活动，特别是左侧（）。出院时的初步诊断为缺血性中风和原发性帕金森病。患者在家休养。病情进展不佳：持续构音障碍且运动能力显著下降至无法行走或站立。两周后因昏迷状态再次入院。紧急EEG显示左半球短间隔（<2秒）侧向发作间期棘慢波放电（三相尖波和棘波），前部区域振幅更大，偶尔扩散到对侧半球。在24小时内，患者陷入昏迷（格拉斯哥昏迷量表3分）并被转入重症监护室。尽管给予多种抗癫痫药物（左乙拉西坦、丙戊酸钠、丙泊酚和咪达唑仑），他仍处于昏迷状态，并表现出右侧手臂的阵挛运动。一个月后进行的额外脑MRI显示病变进展，左侧半球和右侧颞顶叶皮质出现斑片状、回旋状高信号强度，仅在弥散序列中可见（）。患者的快速神经功能恶化、肌阵挛的存在以及MRI发现指向克雅病的诊断。为了排除其他可能引起进行性痴呆的原因，进行了肿瘤扩展研究，包括肿瘤标志物、神经内分泌抗体和胸腹部CT扫描；这些检查结果均为阴性。脑脊液细胞计数和生化及微生物学分析均呈阴性；西班牙国家微生物中心进行的14-3-3蛋白定性检测为阳性（）。在第一次EEG后两个月进行的额外EEG显示混乱的慢波背景活动，伴有全脑周期性尖波复合体（PSWCs），频率为1赫兹（）。基因研究未发现PRNP基因突变；编码第129位密码子多态性的研究揭示了甲硫氨酸/缬氨酸杂合子（M129V）的存在。根据世界卫生组织诊断标准，最终确诊为散发性克雅病。患者在发病后5个月去世；未能进行尸检。

metadata.original_text: A 65-year-old man with no relevant family or personal history was admitted due to a 2-day history of mild dysarthria and naming impairment with difficulty finding words and holding a conversation. Furthermore, his family reported at least one-month history of motor awkwardness and gait instability. During the neurological examination, the patient was well oriented, displayed fluent, coherent spontaneous language, and had mild dysnomia. He had remarkable clinical symptoms of parkinsonism: glabellar reflex was persistent; the patient presented a decreased blinking rate, hypomimia, moderate bradykinesia and hypokinesia in the right limbs, and slow gait with reduced right arm swing (Hoehn & Yahr stage I). The examination revealed no further abnormalities. With the clinical suspicion of parkinsonism, we performed a complete blood test performed at baseline, with either normal or negative. A brain MRI scan revealed increased signal intensity in the left putamen with diffusion restriction, suggesting lacunar infarction (). By the initial findings obtained in the MRI, vascular study was completed with echocardiogram, Holter monitoring, and Doppler ultrasound of the supra-aortic trunks which showed no significant alterations. Parkinsonism was studied using 123I-ioflupane SPECT (DaTSCAN), which revealed asymmetrical tracer uptake in the caudate nuclei (decreased uptake in the left caudate nucleus) and a near-complete lack of activity in the putamina, particularly on the left side (). On discharge, the initial working diagnosis was ischemic stroke and idiopathic Parkinson's disease. The patient remained at home. Progression was poor: dysphasia persisted and mobility decreased dramatically until the patient was unable to walk or even hold a standing position. He was readmitted 2 weeks later in a state of stupor. An emergency EEG revealed short-interval (<2 s) lateralized interictal epileptiform discharges in the left hemisphere (triphasic sharp waves and spikes); discharges were of greater amplitude in anterior regions and occasionally spread to the contralateral hemisphere. Within 24 hours, the patient went into coma (Glasgow Coma Scale 3) and was admitted to the intensive care unit. In the following days, and despite administration of several antiepileptic drugs (levetiracetam, valproate, propofol, and midazolam), he remained comatose and displayed clonic movements in the right arm. An additional brain MRI scan performed a month after the initial scan revealed progression of the lesions, with a patchy, gyriform hyperintensity predominantly affecting the cortex of the left hemisphere and the right temporoparietal cortex, visible in diffusion sequences only (). Our patient's rapid neurological deterioration, the presence of myoclonus, and MRI findings pointed to a diagnosis of Creutzfeldt-Jakob disease. To rule out other possible causes of rapidly progressive dementia, we conducted a tumour extension study including tumour markers, onconeural antibodies, and a thoracic-abdominal CT scan; the study yielded negative results. The results from a CSF cell count and a biochemical and microbiological analysis were negative; Harrington test for the determination of 14-3-3 protein on CSF was positive (test was performed at Spain's National Microbiology Centre). An additional EEG performed 2 months after the first EEG revealed disorganised slow background activity, with generalized periodic sharp-wave complexes (PSWCs) at a frequency of 1 Hz (). A genetic study found no mutations in the PRNP gene; the study of codon 129 polymorphisms revealed methionine/valine heterozygosity (M129V). The probable diagnosis of sporadic CJD was reached based on the World Health Organization (WHO) diagnostic criteria []. He died 5 months after disease onset; autopsy was not granted.

title: pmc-6000880-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-6000880-1
病例摘要：患者为40岁初产妇。5年前因非典型阴道出血和月经过多被妇科医生诊断为粘膜下子宫肌瘤。她接受了宫腔镜肌瘤切除术，切除了一枚1厘米大小和一枚3厘米大小的位于宫底2-3点处的粘膜下子宫肌瘤。术后10个月出现继发性月经量减少后怀疑发生Asherman综合征。因此进行了输卵管造影和磁共振成像（MRI）。根据输卵管造影结果，怀疑存在宫腔内粘连；而通过MRI发现宫腔狭窄。宫腔镜检查显示切除部位有薄膜状粘连，符合肌瘤组织特征，确诊为Asherman综合征。诊断后8个月，患者接受了宫腔镜粘连松解术。左侧宫底观察到的薄膜状粘连用Hegar宫颈扩张器容易分离，并在扩张后放置了宫内节育器。根据欧洲子宫内膜异位症学会分类标准，被确诊为Asherman综合征I期，术后月经恢复正常。尽管患者有强烈的生育愿望，但7年未能怀孕促使她选择体外受精（IVF）。妊娠7周时自然流产，随后进行了宫颈扩张和宫腔刮除术。流产后6个月，通过IVF再次怀孕，并在妊娠7周时转诊至我院。妊娠19周时，产科超声检查发现羊膜腔内有自由边缘的组织，在妊娠31周时MRI检查确定为羊膜片状物（）。此后孕期顺利，因臀位于妊娠38周2天时行择期剖宫产。分娩后胎盘附着在子宫壁上，难以手动剥离。胎盘植入部位子宫表面血管充血（），诊断为胎盘植入。胎盘紧贴子宫壁，尽管子宫腔内几乎无出血，但经知情同意后进行了剖宫产子宫切除术。腹腔内左侧宫底观察到4厘米的浆膜下子宫肌瘤，并在右侧附件、子宫后方和前方直肠发现由子宫内膜异位症引起的粘连。手术时间为101分钟，总失血量为1584毫升（包括羊水）。未输血。取出子宫后的肉眼检查显示胎盘从宫底到后壁广泛附着于肌层，并伴有宫底部分变薄（）。根据产后病理检查结果确认胎盘绒毛侵犯肌层，无中间蜕膜板，确诊为胎盘植入。术后恢复顺利，在产后第7天健康出院。

metadata.original_text: The patient was a 40-year-old primiparous woman. She was diagnosed with submucosal fibroids by her previous gynecologist 5 years prior, based on chief complaints of atypical genital bleeding and hypermenorrhea. She underwent hysteroscopic myomectomy for one 1 cm sized and one 3 cm sized submucosal fibroid located between 2 and 3 o'clock in the uterine fundus. Asherman's syndrome was suspected after the patient exhibited secondary hypomenorrhea 10 months after surgery. Therefore, hysterosalpingography and magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) were performed. Intrauterine adhesions were suspected based on hysterosalpingography findings, while uterine cavity narrowing was identified using MRI. Hysteroscopy revealed filmy adhesions consistent with myomatous tissue at the excision site, and the patient was diagnosed with Asherman's syndrome. Eight months after diagnosis, the patient underwent hysteroscopic adhesiolysis. The filmy adhesions observed on the left side of the fundus were easily separated with Hegar cervical dilators, and an intrauterine device was inserted after dilation. The patient was diagnosed with stage I Asherman's syndrome defined by European Society for Hysteroscopy classification of intrauterine adhesions, and menstrual flow returned to normal after the operation. While the patient had a strong desire to bear children, her inability to conceive for 7 years led her to pursue in vitro fertilization (IVF). After having a miscarriage at 7 weeks of gestation, she underwent cervical dilatation and uterine curettage. Six months after the miscarriage, the patient became pregnant again through IVF and was referred to our hospital at 7 weeks of gestation. At 19 weeks of gestation, tissues with a free edge were visualized within the amniotic cavity using obstetric ultrasound and were determined to be amniotic sheets on MRI at 31 weeks of gestation (). The course of pregnancy was uneventful thereafter, and an elective cesarean section was performed at 38 weeks and 2 days of gestation because of a breech presentation. The placenta adhered to the uterine wall after childbirth and could not be easily separated manually. The blood vessels on the uterine surface at the placental implantation site were engorged (), leading us to diagnose the patient with placenta increta. The placenta remained firmly adherent to the uterine wall, and although there was almost no bleeding from the uterine cavity, cesarean hysterectomy was performed after informed consent was obtained from the patient. In the abdominal cavity, 4 cm subserosal uterine fibroids were observed on the left side of the fundus, and adhesions thought to be caused by endometriosis were found in the right adnexa, posterior uterus, and anterior rectum. The operative time was 101 minutes, while the total blood loss was 1,584 ml (including amniotic fluid). Blood transfusion was not required. Macroscopic examination of the uterus after extraction showed the presence of placenta from the fundus to the posterior wall, diffusely adherent to the myometrium (), along with partial thinning of the fundus. Placenta increta was confirmed based on postpartum histological findings of placental villi invading the myometrium, without an interposed decidual plate. The postoperative course was uneventful, and the patient was discharged in good health on the 7th postpartum day.

title: pmc-6000912-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-6000912-1
病例摘要：患者是一名45岁西班牙裔男性，患有原因不明的终末期肾病、高血压和高脂血症。他的HLA分型为A 2,- B 7, 35, Cw 4, 7, DR 4,- DQ 8,-。供者是一位46岁的西班牙裔女性，有高脂血症的既往史，并且24小时尿肌酐清除率为151 ml/min。她的HLA分型为A 2,31, B 35,44, Cw 4,5, DR 4,-, DQ 7,8。患者在进行活体相关肾移植前已经接受了两年的间歇性血液透析治疗。诱导疗法包括巴利昔单抗和强的松龙。维持疗法使用他克莫司、吗替麦考酚酯和泼尼松。他在移植后的两年中没有出现异常情况，基线血清肌酐为1.5–1.7 mg/dL（134–150 μmol/L），没有蛋白尿或镜下血尿。在移植后两年内，他因下肢水肿前来肾移植门诊就诊，这些症状在过去三天内突然出现。他表示一周前曾经历类似流感的症状。此外，他还承认误服了每天两次、每次1 mg的他克莫司近一个月的时间，而不是规定的每日三次、每次3 mg的剂量。在就诊前约三周，他已经纠正了这一错误。体检显示血压正常且无发热。心血管和呼吸系统检查均未见异常。患者有眶周水肿和下肢6 mm凹陷性水肿。没有移植肾区压痛或血管杂音。实验室数据显示血清肌酐为2.2 mg/dL（194 μmol/L）。尿液分析显示中度蛋白尿（之前无蛋白尿），红细胞超过50个/高倍视野，白细胞11–20个/高倍视野，并且尿蛋白/肌酐比值为8.2 g（之前为100 mg）。他克莫司谷浓度为4.9 ng/mL。由于急性肾损伤、蛋白尿和血尿以及免疫抑制不足的情况，高度怀疑急性排斥反应或可能因原发疾病复发导致的快速进行性肾小球肾炎。进行了肾脏超声检查和活检。鉴于无意中药物不依从的风险，泼尼松剂量从每日10 mg增加到50 mg，他克莫司剂量从每日三次、每次3 mg增加到每日两次、每次5 mg，并将吗替麦考酚酯增加至每日两次、每次1500 mg。值得注意的是，在就诊前一个月内，BK病毒和供者特异性抗体检测结果均为阴性。肾脏超声未见肾积水或结石。三天后进行了活检。初步活检报告与感染后肾小球肾炎一致。鉴于最近的感染，进行了抗链球菌溶血素O（ASO）抗体、C3和C4的检测。由于初次活检中没有发现任何肾小球用于免疫荧光染色（IF），他被安排进行重复活检。在此期间，C3和C4的结果报告出来。C3水平较低为59 mg/dL，而C4正常为35 mg/dL。第二次肾脏活检一周后显示有少量残留的内皮下电子致密沉积物，但没有证据表明存在大量内皮下电子致密沉积物。免疫荧光染色显示肾小球和部分肾小管中非特异性斑片状C3染色，其他试剂均为阴性，包括肾小管细胞中的C4d、BK病毒和SV40。没有证据表明有细胞介导或抗体介导的肾小球肾炎。总体而言，活检结果与正在恢复的感染后肾小球肾炎一致。抗链球菌溶血素O（ASO）水平升高至603 IU/mL，高度提示链球菌是致病原因。鉴于他的急性肾损伤似乎不是由排斥反应引起的，他克莫司剂量被减少回基础剂量每日三次、每次3 mg，并将泼尼松逐渐减量到每日10 mg。通过呋塞米实现了液体管理。未开具任何抗生素。一个月后，血清肌酐降至1.9 mg/dL（168 μmol/L），在三个月内恢复至基线水平，蛋白尿和镜下血尿完全消失。

metadata.original_text: The patient was a 45-year-old Hispanic male who had end-stage renal disease of unknown etiology, hypertension, and hyperlipidemia. His HLA typing was A 2,- B 7, 35, Cw 4, 7, DR 4,- DQ 8,-. His donor was a 46-year-old Hispanic female with history of hyperlipidemia with a measured 24-hour urine creatinine clearance of 151 ml/min. Her HLA typing was A 2,31, B 35,44, Cw 4,5, DR 4,-, DQ 7,8. The patient had been on intermittent hemodialysis for two years prior to undergoing living related kidney transplant. Induction therapy consisted of basiliximab and solumedrol. Maintenance therapy was with tacrolimus, mycophenolate mofetil, and prednisone. His two-year course after transplant had been unremarkable, with a baseline serum creatinine of 1.5–1.7 mg/dL (134–150 μmol/L), without proteinuria or hematuria. Two years after transplant he presented to the renal transplant clinic with complaints of lower extremity edema that had appeared over the previous three days. He stated he had experienced a flu-like illness a week prior. In addition, he admitted to inadvertently taking tacrolimus 1 mg q12h, rather than his prescribed dose of 3 mg twice a day for almost one month. He had corrected the dose approximately 3 weeks prior to presentation. On examination, he was normotensive and afebrile. Cardiovascular and respiratory examinations were normal. He had periorbital edema and 6 mm pitting edema in lower extremities. He did not have graft tenderness or bruit. Laboratory data was remarkable for creatinine of 2.2 mg/dL (194 μmol/L). Urinalysis showed moderate blood and 3+ protein (previously no proteinuria), urinary sediment of more than 50 red blood cells (RBCs), 11–20 white blood cells (WBCs) per high power field (HPF), and urine protein/creatinine ratio of 8.2 g (previously 100 mg). Tacrolimus trough was 4.9 ng/mL. Due to acute kidney injury, proteinuria, and hematuria in the setting of suboptimal immunosuppression, there was a high concern for acute rejection versus rapidly progressive glomerulonephritis perhaps due to recurrence of the unknown primary disease. Renal ultrasound and a renal biopsy were ordered. Given the risk of acute rejection due to inadvertent medication noncompliance, prednisone was increased from 10 mg daily to 50 mg daily, tacrolimus was increased from 3 mg twice a day to 5 mg twice a day, and mycophenolate mofetil was increased to 1500 mg twice a day. Of note, BK virus and donor specific antibodies were negative a month prior. The renal US was negative for hydronephrosis or calculi. Three days later, a biopsy was performed. Preliminary biopsy report was consistent with postinfectious glomerulonephritis (). Due to the recent infection, anti-streptolysin O (ASO) antibodies, C3, and C4 were ordered. Since initial biopsy did not have any glomeruli for immunofluorescence (IF), he was scheduled for repeat biopsy. In the interim, C3 and C4 were reported. C3 was low at 59 mg/dL with a normal C4 at 35 mg/dL (). Tacrolimus trough was 8.6 ng/mL. Second kidney biopsy one week later revealed minimal residual subendothelial electron dense deposits, but no evidence of large subepithelial electron dense deposits (). IF showed nonspecific patchy staining with C3 in glomeruli and some tubules. All other reagents were negative, including C4d in peritubular capillaries, BK, and SV40 in tubular cells. There is no evidence of cell-mediated or antibody mediated glomerulonephritis. Overall, biopsy was consistent with resolving postinfectious glomerulonephritis. Anti-streptolysin O (ASO) was elevated at 603 IU/mL (), highly indicative of Streptococcus being the causative agent. Given that his AKI did not appear to be due to rejection, tacrolimus was decreased back to his basal dose of 3 mg twice a day and prednisone was tapered to 10 mg daily. Fluid management was achieved with furosemide. He was not prescribed any antibiotics. A month later, creatinine had decreased to 1.9 mg/dL (168 μmol/L), and in a 3-month period, it had returned to baseline and proteinuria and hematuria had completely resolved ( and ).

title: pmc-6000913-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-6000913-1
病例摘要：一名2岁健康男孩在医生处接受了办公室手术包皮环切术。在手术过程中，观察到严重的出血，直接压迫无法控制。医生尝试通过多次深部缝合来止血；成功止住了出血，并将患者送回家。术后期间，孩子出现逐渐加重的排尿疼痛和困难，仅在用力后排出少量尿液。在此期间，孩子被开具了止痛药以缓解不适，未进行进一步评估。大约一周后，因发热（体温=38.1°C）、烦躁、呕吐、尿潴留以及显著腹胀，他被转诊至区级医院。腹部检查显示肠鸣音减弱、叩诊浊音和严重压痛。紧急盆腔超声检查发现腹腔内有大量游离液体，并且膀胱内仅有少量尿液。初步实验室检测结果显示白细胞增多伴有左移、血清肌酐和血尿素氮水平升高。6-Fr喂养导管的膀胱造影未能通过冠状尿道口。患者接受了紧急中线剖腹手术，诊断为急性腹痛，并进行了液体引流。在膀胱顶部发现一个小的腹膜内膀胱破裂。由于近全段尿道梗阻，诊断为腹膜内膀胱破裂伴尿性腹水。在两层缝合下修复了破裂部位，并固定了一个耻骨上膀胱造瘘管。两个月后，患者被转诊至我们中心进行进一步评估和治疗。通过耻骨上导管进行了逆行排尿膀胱尿道造影（VCUG），显示远端尿道梗阻（）。在全身麻醉下尝试进行尿道镜检查失败，因距尿道口1厘米处完全梗阻。决定探索该区域并修复尿道。通过环形切开术将远端尿道从海绵体上提。3-Fr输尿管导管也无法通过梗阻部分（）。在梗阻部位发现了一个5毫米的纤维化组织（）。海绵体被从阴茎海绵体中分离，以防止在端对端尿道吻合术后发生医源性包皮内板弯曲。完全切除梗阻的纤维化尿道部分，并在8-Fr硅胶导管上进行两层端对端尿道吻合术和海绵体成形术；使用dartos蒂瓣覆盖吻合口处。术后过程顺利，患者带着耻骨上和尿道造瘘管出院。手术后七天移除了尿道造瘘管。在正常排尿和超声检查后，四周后移除了耻骨上导管。手术六周后进行了VCUG，结果显示膀胱和尿道正常，并且排尿良好（）。在2.5年的随访期间，患者无症状，肾功能、超声检查和排尿模式均正常。尿流率研究中最大流量速率为15.3 ml/sec。

metadata.original_text: A 2-year-old healthy boy underwent an office-based surgical circumcision by his physician. During the procedure, profound bleeding was observed that was not controlled by applying direct pressure. The physician attempted to control the bleeding by multiple deep suturing; the bleeding was stopped successfully and the patient was discharged home. During the postoperative period, the child had progressive painful and difficult voiding with only few drops of urine after straining. During this period the child was prescribed painkillers for his discomfort and no additional evaluation was done. After about a week he was referred to a district hospital with fever (temperature=38.1C), agitation, vomiting, urinary retention, and significant abdominal distension. Abdominal examination showed decreased bowel sounds, dull percussion, and severe guarding. Urgent abdominopelvic ultrasound revealed large volume of free fluid in the abdomen and pelvis, with small amount of urine in the bladder. The initial lab tests also showed leukocytosis with left shift and increased blood creatinine and blood urea nitrogen. Catheterization with a 6-Fr feeding tube failed because it did not pass beyond the subcoronal urethra. The patient underwent emergency midline laparotomy with the diagnosis of acute abdomen and the fluid was drained. A small intraperitoneal bladder rupture was noticed at the dome of bladder. The gastrointestinal tract was inspected precisely and was intact. The diagnosis of intraperitoneal bladder rupture with urinary ascites was made probably due to near-total urethral obstruction. The rupture site was repaired in two layers and a suprapubic cystostomy catheter was fixed. Two months later, the patient was referred to our center for further evaluation and treatment. Antegrade voiding cystourethrography (VCUG) was performed via the suprapubic catheter that showed terminal urethral obstruction (). Urethroscopy was attempted under general anesthesia that failed due to complete obstruction at 1 cm from the meatus. Decision was made to explore the area and to repair the urethra. Through a circumferential incision, distal urethra was elevated from the corpus spongiosum. A 3-Fr ureteric catheter also did not pass the obstructed part (). A 5-mm fibrotic tissue was encountered at the site of obstruction (). The corpus spongiosum was dissected free from the corpora cavernosa to prevent iatrogenic chordee after end-to-end urethral anastomosis. The obstructed fibrotic part of urethra was completely resected and an end-to-end urethral anastomosis was performed along with spongioplasty over an 8-Fr silicon catheter in two layers; dartos pedicled flap was used to cover the site of anastomosis. The postoperative period was uneventful and the patient was discharged home with suprapubic and urethral catheter. The urethral catheter was removed seven days following the surgery. The suprapubic catheter was removed four weeks after the surgery following normal urethral voiding and normal ultrasound. A VCUG was performed six weeks after the surgery that showed normal bladder and urethra with acceptable voiding per urethra (). During a 2.5-year follow-up period, the patient was asymptomatic with normal renal function, ultrasound, and voiding pattern. He had a maximum flow rate of 15.3 ml/sec in uroflowmetry study.

title: pmc-6000923-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-6000923-1
病例摘要：供体1是一名来自中国广西的6岁男孩。2015年5月13日，他因不明原因发热、失眠和拒食拒饮而出现症状。由于随后表现出激动、尖叫和言语混乱等症状，被送往当地医院。三天后，他出现了吞咽困难和流涎增多的症状。尽管使用利巴韦林治疗，他的病情仍逐渐恶化，并于5月26日因不明原因的病毒性脑炎去世（图）。脑脊液分析显示压力为60滴/分钟，清澈透明，葡萄糖水平为4.7 mmol/L，蛋白质水平为265 mg/L。计算机断层扫描（CT）显示双侧颞叶密度略低。HIV、乙型肝炎、丙型肝炎和梅毒的检测结果均为阴性。此前，供体经常与家犬接触，但自从搬到另一个城市与其祖母同住后便不再有这种暴露。他的家人否认曾接触过可能患有狂犬病的动物或接种过狂犬疫苗的历史。其肾脏和角膜被用于移植。供体2是一名来自中国河北的11岁女孩。她的初始症状是9月22日出现恶心、寒战和呕吐。一天后，病情恶化，她出现了发热、意识障碍、昏迷、呼吸衰竭和血压下降等症状，并于10月5日发展为无精打采和重症肌无力。她在10月11日因急性播散性脑脊髓炎去世（图）。脑脊液分析结果正常。磁共振成像（MRI）显示大脑和颈髓广泛信号异常。HIV、乙型肝炎、丙型肝炎、梅毒、巨细胞病毒、EB病毒、柯萨奇病毒、单纯疱疹病毒、腺病毒和风疹病毒的检测结果均为阴性。她的家人否认接触过可能患有狂犬病的动物或接种过狂犬疫苗的历史。其肾脏和肝脏被用于移植。受者1是一名55岁男性，于2015年5月27日接受了来自供体1的肾移植手术。移植物恢复良好，并使用他克莫司、霉酚酸钠和泼尼松进行免疫抑制治疗。患者最初在2015年7月10日出现症状（图）。磁共振成像显示双侧室旁区及深部白质有斑点状异常信号（T1WI低或等信号，T2WI和FLAIR高信号），提示白质脱髓鞘病变。根据典型症状于7月24日临床诊断为狂犬病；4天后通过唾液、尿液和痰液样本中可检测到特定的狂犬病毒核酸而确诊。患者于8月23日去世。他的家人否认接触过可能患有狂犬病的动物或接种过狂犬疫苗的历史。受者2是一名43岁男性，于2015年5月27日接受了来自供体1的肾移植手术。移植物恢复良好，并使用他克莫司、霉酚酸钠和泼尼松进行免疫抑制治疗。患者最初在2015年7月14日出现症状（图）。计算机断层扫描显示右侧基底节区有可疑斑点状低密度区域。根据典型症状于7月24日临床诊断为狂犬病；4天后通过唾液和尿液样本中可检测到特定的狂犬病毒核酸而确诊。患者于8月17日去世。他的家人否认接触过可能患有狂犬病的动物或接种过狂犬疫苗的历史。受者3是一名57岁女性，于2016年10月11日接受了来自供体2的肝移植手术。移植物恢复良好，并使用他克莫司、霉酚酸酯和甲基泼尼松龙进行免疫抑制治疗。患者最初在2017年3月18日出现症状（图）。计算机断层扫描显示左侧基底节区有可疑斑点状低密度区域。根据典型症状于3月24日临床诊断为狂犬病，4天后通过唾液和尿液样本中可检测到特定的狂犬病毒核酸而确诊。

metadata.original_text: Donor 1 was a 6-year-old boy from Guangxi province in China. The initial symptoms on 13 May 2015 were fever of unknown cause with insomnia and refusal to eat or drink. He was sent to a local hospital due to subsequent agitation, screaming and incoherent speech. Three days later, he suffered from dysphagia and hypersalivation. His condition subsequently worsened despite treatment with ribavirin. Finally, he died on 26 May after receiving an initial diagnosis of viral encephalitis of unknown cause (Fig. ). Cerebrospinal fluid (CSF) analysis revealed an opening pressure of 60 drops/min, transparent and limpid fluid, a glucose level of 4.7 mmol/L, and a protein level of 265 mg/L. Computed tomography (CT) revealed a slightly decreased density in the bilateral temporal lobes. Tests for HIV, hepatitis B, hepatitis C, and syphilis yielded negative results. Earlier, the donor had frequent contact with domestic dogs but no longer had this type of exposure since moving to live with his grandmother in another city. His family members denied either exposure to potentially rabid animals or history of rabies vaccinations. His kidneys and corneas were donated for transplantation. Donor 2 was an 11-year-old girl who lived in Hebei province in China. Her initial symptoms were nausea, chills and vomiting on 22 Sep 2016. One day later, her condition worsened, and she suffered from fever, disorder of consciousness, coma, respiratory failure and decreased blood pressure, followed by insipidus and myasthenia gravis on 5 Oct. She died on 11 Oct after an initial diagnosis of acute disseminated encephalomyelitis (Fig. ). The results of CSF analysis were normal. Magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) revealed diffuse signal abnormalities throughout the brain and cervical spinal cord. Tests for HIV, hepatitis B, hepatitis C, syphilis, cytomegalovirus, Epstein Barr virus, coxsackie virus, herpes simplex virus, adenovirus and rubella virus yielded negative results. Her family members denied exposure to potentially rabid animals or history of rabies vaccinations. Her kidneys and liver were donated for transplantation. Recipient 1 was a 55-year-old male who received a kidney transplant from donor 1 on 27 May 2015. The allograft recovered successfully, and the immunosuppressive regimen included tacrolimus, mycophenolate sodium and prednisone. The patient initially became symptomatic on 10 Jul 2015 (Fig. ). MRI revealed mottled signal abnormalities around the bilateral ventricles and deep white matter (low or equal signal on T1WI and high signal on T2WI and Flair), which indicated white matter demyelination. He was clinically diagnosed with rabies on 24 Jul according to the typical symptoms; this diagnosis was confirmed 4 days later by detectable rabies virus-specific nucleic acids in saliva, urine, and sputum samples. The patient died on 23 Aug. His family members denied exposure to potentially rabid animals or history of rabies vaccinations. Recipient 2 was a 43-year-old male who received a kidney transplant from donor 1 on 27 May 2015. The allograft recovered successfully, and the immunosuppressive regimen included tacrolimus, mycophenolate sodium and prednisone. The patient initially became symptomatic on 14 Jul 2015 (Fig. ). CT revealed a suspicious mottled low-density region in the right basal ganglia region. He was clinically diagnosed with rabies on 24 Jul according to the typical symptoms, which was confirmed 4 days later by detectable rabies virus-specific nucleic acids in saliva and urine samples. The patient died on 17 Aug. His family members denied exposure to potentially rabid animals or history of rabies vaccinations. Recipient 3 was a 57-year-old female who received a liver transplant from donor 2 on 11 Oct 2016. The allograft recovered successfully, and the immunosuppressive regimen included tacrolimus, mycophenolate mofetil and methylprednisolone. The patient initially became symptomatic on 18 Mar 2017 (Fig. ). CT revealed a suspicious mottled low-density region in the left basal ganglia region. She was clinically diagnosed with rabies on 24

title: pmc-6000971-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-6000971-1
病例摘要：一名51岁男性于2016年6月因高钙血症和肾功能衰竭被收治在中国南京医科大学第一附属医院（南京）的肾脏科。患者在入院前20天出现持续性的腿部和腰部疼痛，此前在当地医院检查显示逐渐异常的肾功能（血清肌酐304.2 μmol/L），高血钙水平（4.86 mmol/L），以及极高的甲状旁腺激素（PTH）水平（1551 ng/L；参考范围：12–88 ng/L）。经过补液、利尿剂和血液透析治疗后，患者被转至我院。除了1年期的慢性肾病第三阶段外，没有其他异常情况。入院时，患者报告疲劳、骨痛和多尿症状。体格检查显示血压为119/80 mmHg，心率为71次/分，但未发现淋巴结、头部、颈部、心脏、肺部、腹部或关节的特异性发现。实验室检测结果显示校正后的血钙水平为3.39 mmol/L，磷水平为0.84 mmol/L，PTH为540 ng/mL（透析后血清肌酐151 μmol/L），血红蛋白为120 g/L。尿钙为9.2 mmol/24 h。心电图（ECG）显示完全右束支传导阻滞和胸前导联异常ST段，正常校正的QT间期（QTc）。肌钙蛋白分析结果显示肌红蛋白水平为31 μg/L，高敏心脏肌钙蛋白T水平为826 ng/L。超声检查发现左侧甲状旁腺下极有结节。单光子发射计算机断层扫描结果提示左侧甲状旁腺下极腺瘤。由于没有家族史和噻嗪类或锂剂的用药史，诊断为由甲状旁腺腺瘤引起的原发性高钙血症。鉴于心脏肌钙蛋白T水平升高及心电图ST段变化，考虑急性心肌损伤，因此推迟了甲状旁腺切除术进行多学科会诊。最终诊断包括：高钙血症、原发性高钙血症、甲状旁腺腺瘤、急性肾损伤、慢性肾病和急性心肌损伤。通过每日3000 mL液体（60%生理盐水[0.9%]和40%葡萄糖[5%]）补充，每天三次40 mg呋塞米，每天25 mg钙化醇以及血液透析来降低血钙水平。右侧股静脉双腔导管用于血管通路。在床旁使用一种商用连续性RRT设备（multiFiltrate，费森尤斯医疗德意志联邦共和国，巴登-霍姆堡）开始低钙腹膜透析（1.25 mmol），每次8小时的缓慢延长透析。透析液流量为4800 mL/h。校正后的血钙水平变化见图。由于血钙降低不理想且准备进行甲状旁腺切除术，将缓慢延长透析改为每8小时RCA预稀释血液滤过，替代率为4300 mL/h。替代溶液由当地药房配制（钠105 mmol/L；碳酸氢盐21.5 mmol/L；无钙；镁0.5 mmol/L；葡萄糖6.7 mmol/L）。在血细胞比容为32%时，4%柠檬酸钠（柠檬酸剂量4.2 mmol/L）的输注速率为220 mL/h，血液流速120 mL/min。考虑到治疗时间限制，我们逐渐将RCA-血液滤过第一阶段钙补充速率从5.6 mmol/h降低到2.2 mmol/h（见图）。在RCA-血液滤过期间，滤后离子钙为0.34–0.53 mmol/L。校正后的血钙水平从3.5 mmol/L降至3.2 mmol/L，离子钙从1.97 mmol/L降至1.67 mmol/L。尽管估计有30 mmol的钙丢失，这一结果并不令人满意。在RCA-血液滤过第二阶段开始使用较低的钙输注速率（1.1 mmol/h）（见图）。然而，在治疗15分钟后，患者报告胸痛和心悸。当时，他的血细胞比容为32%。
