In May 2015, visual acuity further reduced to 3/10 and both fundus examination and OCT revealed a reactivation of the neovascular membrane, edema and pigment epithelial detachment. For this reason, the patient was again treated with intravitreal injections of ranibizumab (0.5 mg), firstly on a monthly basis and thereafter using treat and extend approach, with overall six injections till the end of February 2016, when visual acuity increased to 6/10. At the follow-up visit in May 2016, the neovascular membrane appeared inactive and the visual acuity was stable at 6/10, so the ophthalmologist decided for a pro re nata approach (i.e., as needed). In the same period, the patient referred to the Movement Disorders Clinic due to intermittent tremor on the left hand, started around February 2016. He did not complain non-motor symptoms. Neurological examination disclosed resting tremor on the left hand, mild bradykinesia of left lower limb, and mild rigidity of head and trunk. His motor Unified Parkinson’s Disease Rating Scale (UPDRS) was 11/108. The patient had no family history of PD or other neurodegenerative diseases nor had he been ever exposed to pesticides. Magnetic Resonance Imaging of the brain showed rare small subcortical white matters hyperintensities on T2 (mainly periventricular and frontal) and some bilateral hypointensities in T1 in the striatum, more prominent on the right, compatible with small ischemic lesions. Single Photon Emission Computerized Tomography (SPECT) of the Dopamine Transporter (DAT) with 123I-ioflupane documented a significant and clear low uptake of DAT, mostly in the right striatum (Figure ). A diagnosis of clinically established PD was made based on new criteria of the Movement Disorders Society (). A treatment with levodopa/carbidopa (300 mg/daily) was started at the beginning of 2017, due to worsening of tremor and bradykinesia leading to gait impairment and fatigue (motor UPDRS = 15/108). At follow-up examination in May 2017, response to levodopa was demonstrated by improvement of motor symptoms (motor UPDRS = 6/108), particularly of gait. Up to November 2017 other two injections of ranibizumab were intravitreally administered with visual acuity equal to 3/10 and the patient was in stable treatment with levodopa/carbidopa (300 mg/daily).

title: pmc-6003786-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-6003786-1
病例摘要：一名35岁男性因持续10天的高热、呼吸困难、心悸和关节痛就诊于卡拉奇市民医院急诊科。患者食欲差，感到疲劳。否认任何外伤史、过敏史或其他医疗状况以及体重减轻。心脏肺部、消化系统和泌尿生殖系统的检查均未发现异常。他不吸烟也不饮酒，并且日常生活没有变化。然而，他是静脉药物滥用者。该患者无重大手术史。他的病史显示房间隔缺损22.18毫米，左向右分流，之前通过经食管超声心动图诊断（图）。体格检查发现脱水但定向力正常。血压为100/70 mmHg，心率为每分钟100次，呼吸频率为每分钟20次，体温为38.9°C。发热伴有寒战、畏冷和出汗，并有多处关节痛。心血管检查未闻及杂音。肺部听诊清晰。腹部无压痛；未发现肝脾肿大或淋巴结病。然而，他的脾脏在肋缘下2厘米处增大。四肢的运动和感觉检查均正常。患者无重要既往史和家族史。对该患者的初步检查开始进行。实验室检查包括全血细胞计数（CBC），结果显示Hb水平=12.6g/dl（正常范围：13.0 - 16.5 gm/dL）和白细胞总数（TLC）=15,000/μL（正常范围：4 - 11 x 103/μL）。疟疾寄生虫检测和登革热测试均未见异常。其他检查包括人类免疫缺陷病毒（HIV）和肝炎的血清学检测，结果均为阴性。由于持续高热，怀疑患者患有感染性心内膜炎（IE）。因此进行了超声心动图和血液培养。超声心动图未显示赘生物。然而，在两个不同部位采集的两份血液样本（间隔12小时用于培养）均被证实为耐甲氧西林金黄色葡萄球菌（MRSA）阳性。患者接受了为期六周的静脉万古霉素治疗，剂量为每日一次1克和静脉庆大霉素，每日两次80毫克。最终，发热消退，并计划并成功执行了房间隔缺损闭合手术。在术后恢复良好后，患者出院。他进一步被转介至康复中心进行药物滥用治疗。该患者每月定期随访，目前状况良好。

metadata.original_text: A 35-year-old male presented to the Emergency Department of Civil Hospital Karachi with a 10-day history of high-grade fever, shortness of breath, palpitations, and joint pain. The patient had poor appetite and fatigue. He denied any history of trauma, allergies, any other medical conditions, or weight loss. A review of the cardiopulmonary, gastrointestinal, and genitourinary systems was unremarkable. He did not smoke or use alcohol, and there had been no changes in his daily routine. However, he was an intravenous drug abuser. The patient had no history of any major surgery. His history demonstrated an ostium secundum of 22.18 mm with left to right shunt, which was diagnosed previously by transoesophageal echocardiography (Figure ). On physical examination, he was found to be dehydrated but oriented to time, place, and person. His blood pressure was 100/70 mm Hg and his heart rate was 100 beats/minute. The respiratory rate was 20 breaths/minute and his temperature was 102°F. His fever was associated with chills, rigors, and sweating with multiple joint pains. On cardiovascular examination, no murmur was auscultated. The lungs were clear on auscultation. The abdomen was non-tender; hepatomegaly or lymphadenopathy was not detected. However, his spleen was enlarged 2 cm below the costal margin. Motor and sensory examination of all four limbs were normal. Past and family history of the patient was insignificant. The patient's workup was initiated. Laboratory findings included complete blood cell count (CBC) showing Hb level = 12.6g/dl (normal range: 13.0 - 16.5 gm/dL) and total leukocyte count (TLC) = 15,000/μL (normal range: 4 - 11 x 103/μL). Malarial parasite and dengue tests were insignificant. Other tests including serology for human immunodeficiency virus (HIV) and hepatitis showed normal findings. Due to his persistent high-grade fever, IE was suspected in the patient. Therefore, echocardiography and blood culture were performed. Echocardiography did not show any vegetation. However, two blood samples drawn from two different sites (12 hours apart for culture) were found to be positive for methicillin-resistant Staphylococcus aureus (MRSA). The patient was treated with intravenous (IV) vancomycin, 1 gm once daily, and IV gentamicin, 80 mg twice a day, for a period of six weeks for S. aureus. The fever eventually subsided, and subsequently, a surgery for the closure of ASD was planned and executed successfully. The patient was discharged from the hospital after he recovered well from surgery. He was further referred to the rehabilitation centre for drug abuse treatment. The patient visits on a monthly basis for follow–up and continues to do well.

title: pmc-6003787-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-6003787-1
病例摘要：{
    "title_zh": "pmc-6003787-1",
    "diagnosis_zh": "",
    "text_zh": "我们的患者是一名49岁男性，因肛缘12厘米处的进展期IVa期直肠腺癌伴有肝转移而就诊。他接受了七周期卡培他滨-奥沙利铂的新辅助化疗，随后进行了长程放化疗。该治疗方案包括在外院进行强度调制放射治疗(IMRT)，盆腔区域共45 Gy分25次照射，随后对盆腔肿瘤进行锥形剂量递减至5.4 Gy分3次照射和额外的3.6 Gy分2次照射到直肠肿瘤上，同时给予卡培他滨和曲妥珠单抗。之后，患者接受了腹腔镜辅助低位前切除术并进行了结肠直肠盆腔吻合及回肠造口术。病理结果显示为ypT4N1b期直肠腺癌伴淋巴管血管侵犯。在此期间，他的肝脏病灶通过多次微波消融和化疗栓塞得到了成功治疗。五个月后的再分期正电子发射断层扫描-计算机断层扫描(PET-CT)显示，在左侧盆侧壁淋巴结中发现了一个新的FDG摄取活跃的病灶，没有其他部位的疾病。患者被转介进行针对这一唯一活动性病灶的根治性放疗。该患者已经超过了我们机构和RTOG 0822及RTOG 0529所规定的肠道耐受的理想剂量限制。具体来说，他之前的放射治疗包括小肠的最大点剂量为54 Gy，V(50 Gy)为16 cc，V(45 Gy)为105 cc，V(40 Gy)为198 cc，V(35 Gy)为329 cc；后两种体积几乎达到了理想接受35和40 Gy剂量的两倍。大肠也超过了理想的剂量限制，V(45 Gy)为41 cc。然而，在这个年轻患者寡复发的情况下，我们旨在为该患者提供根治性治疗。因此，他接受了MR引导下的立体定向体部放射治疗(SBRT)，35 Gy分5次照射每天隔天一次到左侧盆侧壁淋巴结，并额外扩大了3 mm的计划靶区体积(图，A部分)。SBRT后小肠和大肠的最大等效剂量2 (使用α/β = 3)分别为71.5 Gy和84.5 Gy。复发位置相对于先前照射区域的位置如图所示。模拟及治疗前MRI扫描在ViewRay系统(ViewRay, Inc., Oakwood Village, OH)上获得，采用0.35 T MRI进行成像。使用True Fast Imaging with Steady State Free Precession (TRUFI)序列获取了厚度为1.5 mm、视野为50 x 45 x 43 cm的三维MRI图像，无需注射对比剂。每次成像后，医生评估靶区及其与周围解剖结构的关系。如果关键结构接近靶区发生移动，则医生可以选择创建一个适应性计划以最小化对关键结构的剂量。在这种情况下，由于肠道相对于靶区的位置没有显著变化，因此不需要进行适应性规划。治疗使用ViewRay系统上的IMRT，采用三个钴-60源，每120度间隔分布。在治疗过程中，通过冠状面进行每秒四帧的MRI成像以跟踪靶区的亚分次运动。患者未出现急性毒性反应。SBRT完成后一个月，患者成功进行了回肠造口术复位，并恢复了正常的肠道功能。SBRT后两个月的复查MRI显示无疾病证据。
"}`whel

metadata.original_text: Our patient is a 39-year-old male who presented with metastatic stage IVa cT2cN2M1a rectal adenocarcinoma located 12 cm from the anal verge with metastases to the liver. He underwent neoadjuvant chemotherapy with seven cycles of capecitabine-oxaliplatin, followed by long-course chemoradiation. This course consisted of intensity modulated radiation therapy (IMRT) at an outside center, 45 Gy in 25 fractions to the pelvis with a subsequent pelvic cone down of 5.4 Gy in three fractions and an additional 3.6 Gy in two fractions to the gross rectal tumor, given concurrently with capecitabine and trastuzumab. He subsequently underwent laparoscopic-assisted low anterior resection with colorectal pelvic anastomosis and diverting loop ileostomy. Pathology from this revealed ypT4N1b rectal adenocarcinoma with lymphovascular invasion. Throughout this period, his liver lesions were successfully treated with several courses of microwave ablation and chemoembolization. Restaging positron emission tomography-computed tomography (PET-CT) scan five months later demonstrated a new single site of FDG-avidity within a 1.1 cm left pelvic sidewall lymph node with no other sites of disease. He was referred for curative intent radiation therapy to this lymph node to treat his only active site of disease. This patient had already exceeded the ideal dose constraints for bowel tolerance utilized by our institution and as outlined in RTOG 0822 and RTOG 0529 [,]. Specifically, his prior radiation treatment included a maximum point dose to the small bowel of 54 Gy, with V (50 Gy) of 16 cc, V (45 Gy) of 105 cc, V (40 Gy) of 198 cc, and V (35 Gy) of 329 cc; the latter two volumes are nearly double the ideal volume receiving 35 and 40 Gy. Large bowel had also exceeded ideal constraints, with V (45 Gy) of 41 cc. However, in the context of this young patient with oligorecurrent disease, we aimed to offer this patient curative-intent treatment. The patient was thus treated with MR-guided SBRT, 35 Gy in five fractions delivered every other day to the left pelvic sidewall lymph node plus a 3 mm planning target volume expansion (Figure , panel A). Cumulative EQD2 (using α/β = 3) maximum point dose to the small and large bowel was 71.5 and 84.5 Gy, respectively. The location of the recurrence in relation to the prior irradiated field is demonstrated in Figure . The simulation and daily setup pre-treatment MRI scans were obtained on the ViewRay system (ViewRay, Inc., Oakwood Village, OH) incorporating a 0.35 T MRI. The same imaging protocol using a True Fast Imaging with Steady State Free Precession (TRUFI) sequence was performed to acquire the 3D MRI images with 1.5 mm thickness and a field of view of 50 x 45 x 43 cm without contrast injection. The total acquisition time was 172 seconds. After image acquisition each day, a physician assessed the target and relation to surrounding anatomy. In the case of movement of critical structures close to the target, the physician had the option to create an adaptive plan that minimized the dose to critical structures. In this case, no adaptive planning was required as the position of the bowel relative to the target did not move significantly. Treatment was delivered using IMRT on the ViewRay system with three Cobalt-60 sources spaced at 120 degrees apart. During treatment delivery, cine MRI imaging at a rate of four frames per second was performed through a sagittal plane to track the intra-fractional motion of the target. The patient experienced no acute toxicity. One month after completion of SBRT, the patient underwent a successful ileostomy reversal, with excellent progression toward return of normal bowel function. Repeat MRI at two months post-SBRT demonstrated no evidence of disease.

title: pmc-6003789-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-6003789-1
病例摘要：一名67岁的女性因过去一个月右上腹疼痛加剧，伴有恶心和呕吐而入院进行评估。她描述疼痛为轻至中度、持续性，并向背部放射，与进食无关，没有缓解或加重的因素。她否认发热、黄疸或排便和尿液问题。她在过去的两个月内体重减轻了10公斤。她的病史包括心房颤动，通过美托洛尔良好控制。她承认在社交场合吸烟和饮酒。家族史无特殊发现。初次评估时，生命体征正常，体温98°F，脉搏61次/分钟，呼吸频率12次/分钟，血压130/85。腹部检查显示右上腹（RUQ）可触及、边界不清的轻至中度压痛性肿块，无反跳痛。其余体格检查未见异常。实验室检查结果显示白细胞计数为10.2×109/L，血红蛋白135 g/L，血糖6.1 mmol/L，肌酐0.8 mg/dL，丙氨酸氨基转移酶（ALAT）9 U/L，天门冬氨酸氨基转移酶（ASAT）18 U/L，总胆红素6.8 mmol/L（直接胆红素3.6 mmol/L），国际标准化比值为0.94。癌胚抗原（CEA）为0.6 ng/mL（正常上限：<5 ng/mL）。腹部超声和胸部、腹部及骨盆的计算机断层扫描（CT）显示一个大而边界不清、不均匀的肿块完全替代了胆囊体部和底部，并广泛侵犯相邻肝段、十二指肠、胰头头部以及肝曲结肠。有多处局部区域淋巴结肿大，未见其他可疑远处转移病灶。磁共振胆道造影未发现肝内外胆管扩张。晚期IIIb-IVa期胆管癌是主要鉴别诊断，急性或慢性胆囊炎伴有弥漫性肿块形成XG的可能性较低。详细讨论了可能的术中情景、手术切除范围及其风险、益处和预后，并获得了知情同意。外科探查确认了术前影像学发现，显示一个占据整个肝下间隙并附着于相邻肝段、网膜、肝十二指肠韧带、第二部分十二指肠及结肠近三分之一的肿块。未见腹腔内积液、脓肿或可疑转移性恶性肿瘤病灶。术中未进行冷冻切片活检。尽管存在广泛的纤维化和粘连，我们仍能通过软组织平面定义并分离受累结构，安全地切除整个肿块及其相邻肝段和局部区域淋巴结以进行适当的分期和预后评估。术后病理显示一个8x11 cm的XG肿瘤，胆囊壁弥漫性、显著增厚（至1.5 cm），腔内充满海绵状脓液样物质。组织学检查显示深部破裂的Rokitansky-Aschoff窦穿透肌层，并伴有类似肿瘤的腺肌瘤区域（图）。有多个泡沫巨噬细胞和黄色瘤细胞聚集区（图）以及含有胆固醇的小体性肉芽肿（图）和微小胆汁湖（图）。相邻肝组织有轻至中度反应性炎症改变，伴淋巴细胞浸润的门管区和脂肪变性。未观察到异常或恶性细胞，并且增大的门脉旁淋巴结显示非特异性炎性反应。术后恢复顺利

metadata.original_text: A 67-year-old woman was admitted to hospital for an evaluation of worsening right upper abdominal tenderness associated with episodes of nausea and vomiting for the last month. She described the pain as mild to moderate, continuous, radiating to the back, unrelated to eating, and without alleviating or exacerbating factors. She denied fevers, jaundice, or issues with bowel movements and urination. She admitted to a 10 kg weight loss over the last two months. Her medical history was significant for sinus tachycardia with good medical control on metoprolol. She admitted smoking and drinking on social occasions. Her family history was unrevealing. At initial evaluation, her vital signs were within normal limits with a body temperature of 98°F, a pulse rate of 61 beats per minute, a respiratory frequency of 12 breaths per minute, and a blood pressure of 130/85. The abdominal exam revealed a palpable, poorly defined, mildly to moderately tender tumor-like firmness in the right upper quadrant (RUQ) without rebound tenderness. The remainder of her physical examination was unremarkable. The laboratory evaluation revealed a white blood cell (WBC) count of 10.2×109/L, hemoglobin 135 g/L, glucose 6.1 mmol/L, creatinine 0.8 mg/dL, alanine aminotransferase (ALAT) 9 U/L, aspartate aminotransferase (ASAT) 18 U/L, total bilirubin 6.8 mmol/L (direct bilirubin 3.6 mmol/L), and an international normalized ratio of 0.94. Tumor marker cancer antigen 19-9 (CA 19-9) was 14.4 U/mL (normal limit: < 34 U/mL) and carcinoembryonic antigen (CEA) was 0.6 ng/mL (normal limit: < 5 ng/mL). Abdominal ultrasonography (US) and computed tomography (CT) of the chest, abdomen, and pelvis revealed a large, ill-defined, heterogeneous mass completely replacing the gallbladder body and fundus with an extensive involvement of the adjacent liver segments, the duodenum, the head of the pancreas, and the hepatic flexure of the colon (Figures -). There were several, enlarged, loco-regional lymph nodes with no other lesions suspicious of distant metastatic disease. There was no intra- or extrahepatic biliary tree dilatation confirmed by magnetic resonance cholangiography. Advanced stage IIIb-IVa CG was the main differential diagnosis and the possibility of acute or chronic cholecystitis with diffuse mass-forming XG was lower on the list. A detailed discussion of the possible intraoperative scenarios and the extent of the surgical resection with the risks, benefits, and prognosis was carried out, and informed consent was obtained. Surgical exploration confirmed the preoperative imaging findings and revealed a mass occupying the entire subhepatic space adherent to the adjacent liver segments, omentum, hepatoduodenal ligament, the second portion of the duodenum, and proximal one-third of the transverse colon. No intra-abdominal collections, abscesses or lesions suspicious of metastatic malignant disease were seen. Intra-operative frozen-section biopsies were not performed. Despite the extensive fibrosis and adhesions, we were able to define and dissect through soft tissue planes and safely separate the involved structures to perform a resection of the entire mass with adjacent liver segments and loco-regional lymph nodes for proper staging and prognosis. Surgical pathology revealed an 8x11 cm XG tumor with diffuse, marked thickening of the gallbladder wall (up to 1.5 cm) and lumen filled with spongiform purulent matter. Histology showed deep, ruptured Rokitansky-Aschoff sinuses penetrating the muscle layer with areas of tumor-resembling adenomyosis (Figure ). There were multiple foci of crowding of foamy macrophages and xanthoma cells (Figure ) alongside foreign body granulomas consisting of cholesterol (Figure ) and tiny bile lakes (Figure ). There were mild to moderate reactive inflammatory changes of the adjacent hepatic tissue with lymphocytic infiltration of portal tracts and fatty degeneration. No atypical cells or malignant cells were observed and the enlarged periportal lymph nodes showed a nonspecific inflammatory reaction. The postoperative course was uneventful

title: pmc-6003790-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-6003790-1
病例摘要：患者1是一位13个月大的女性，因房屋火灾遭受火焰烧伤。她有73%体表面积的三度烧伤。她的右膝有关节开放性损伤，在SEF植入前进行了四次皮肤移植手术。在受伤后46天放置了SEF，并保持了三周。使用K-针和140毫米棒作为微SEF系统。在SEF植入后，她还需要进行一次额外的右膝皮肤移植手术。在受伤后的八个月随访中，她的PT/OT记录报告关节活动范围（ROM）在正常范围内（WNL），肌肉力量为5/5级。然而，她在SEF存在期间仍然有关节不稳定的情况，需要使用膝部固定器八周。但没有记录到因长期并发症而需要进行额外手术的情况。

metadata.original_text: Patient 1 was a 13-month-old female who sustained a flame injury from a house fire. She had 73% TBSA third-degree injuries. Her right knee had an open joint injury that was treated with four skin grafting procedures prior to SEF placement. SEF was placed 46 days after the injury and was kept on for three weeks. K-wires and a 140-mm bar were used as a micro-SEF system. The patient required one additional skin grafting procedure to her right knee after SEF was in place. She had an eight-month follow-up after the injury and her PT/OT notes reported ROM within normal limits (WNL) and a 5/5 motor strength. She did have continued joint instability after SEF that required eight weeks of knee immobilizer use. However, no long-term complications requiring additional surgeries were recorded.

title: pmc-6003790-2
text:
病例标题：pmc-6003790-2
病例摘要：患者2是一名10岁8个月大的男性，因交通事故（MVA）遭受火焰烧伤。他有62.5%的TBSA三度烧伤。他的右肘关节有开放性损伤，在SEF植入前进行了7次皮肤移植手术。在受伤后55天放置了SEF，并持续使用了六周。外部固定系统使用了Shantz针和杆；这些装置被锁定在完全伸展的位置。患者在SEF植入后不需要额外的右肘皮肤移植手术。从受伤后的10个月随访中，物理治疗/作业治疗记录显示其伸展和屈曲范围为30-110°，旋前角度为30°，旋后功能正常（WNL），肌肉力量为5/5级。未记录其他并发症。

metadata.original_text: Patient 2 was a 10-year-8-month-old male who sustained a flame injury after a motor vehicle accident (MVA). He had 62.5% TBSA third-degree injuries. His right elbow had an open joint injury that was treated with seven skin grafting procedures prior to SEF placement. SEF was placed 55 days after the injury and was kept on for six weeks. Shantz pins and bars were placed as the external fixator system; this was locked in full extension. The patient required no additional skin grafting procedures to his right elbow after SEF placement. He had a 10-month follow-up after the injury and his PT/OT notes documented a final ROM of 30–110° in the extension and flexion arc, supination of 30° and pronation WNL, and a 5/5 motor strength. No other complications were recorded for this patient.

title: pmc-6003790-3
text:
病例标题：pmc-6003790-3
病例摘要：患者3是一名4岁4个月大的男性，因房屋火灾遭受火焰烧伤。他有41.5%的三度烧伤面积。他的右肘关节受伤并进行了两次皮肤移植手术，在SEF植入前进行处理。在受伤后43天放置了SEF，并持续使用四周。使用Synthes中型外固定器系统放置了Shantz针和棒；这些装置被锁定在完全伸展位置。患者在SEF植入后不需要额外的右肘皮肤移植手术。他在SEF植入后出现了肘关节挛缩，通过前臂软组织整形手术进行了松解治疗。在他手术释放之前，他的屈伸活动范围为0-25°，旋前为0°，旋后为0°。受伤后的13个月随访中，物理治疗/作业治疗记录显示其最终的屈伸活动范围为0°-119°，旋前69°，旋后80°，肌力为5/5级。他唯一的并发症是肘关节挛缩。

metadata.original_text: Patient 3 was a 4-year-4-month-old male who sustained a flame injury from a house fire. He had 41.5% TBSA third-degree injuries. His right elbow had an open joint injury that was treated with two skin grafting procedures prior to SEF placement. SEF was placed 43 days after the injury and was kept on for four weeks. Shantz pins and bars were placed using the Synthes medium external fixator system; this was locked in full extension. The patient required no additional skin grafting procedures to his right elbow after SEF placement. He developed an elbow contracture that was treated with an antecubital soft tissue plastic surgery contracture release. Prior to his surgical release, he had an ROM of 0–25° in the extension and flexion arc, supination of 0°, and pronation 0°. He had a 13-month follow-up after the injury and his PT/OT notes reported a final ROM of 0°–119° in the extension and flexion arc, supination of 69° and pronation 80°, and a 5/5 motor strength. His only complication was the elbow contracture.

title: pmc-6003790-4
text:
病例标题：pmc-6003790-4
病例摘要：患者4是一名17岁9个月大的男性，在一起涉及电线的交通事故中遭受火焰和电击伤。他有30%体表面积（TBSA）的三度烧伤。他的右肘有关节开放性损伤，术前进行了两次皮肤移植手术后才放置外固定架。在转至我们机构之前，在墨西哥还进行了其他未知手术。外固定架于受伤23天后置入，并保持了7.5周。使用Synthes小型外固定器系统中的4毫米Shantz针和杆进行固定，且固定器被固定在完全伸展位置。患者因尺寸不足导致外固定架失败。在外固定架初次植入8天后进行了修订手术，使用的是Synthes大型外固定器系统。在放置外固定架后，他需要额外进行三次右肘皮肤移植手术。受伤后的12个月随访中，物理治疗/职业治疗记录显示其伸展和屈曲弧度的最终关节活动范围为0°-110°，旋前30°，旋后70°。他还存在一些持续的手肘屈曲肌力4/5级、伸展2/5级以及旋前/旋后的1/5级肌力减弱。并发症包括外固定架失败和肌力减弱。

metadata.original_text: Patient 4 was a 17-year-9-month-old male who sustained a flame and electrical injury after an MVA involving a power line. He had 30% TBSA third-degree injuries. His right elbow had an open joint injury that was treated with two skin grafting procedures prior to SEF placement. Other unknown procedures were performed in Mexico before transfer to our institution. SEF was placed 23 days after the injury and was kept on for 7.5 weeks. Four-millimeter Shantz pins and bars from the Synthes small external fixator set were placed; the fixator was secured in full extension. The patient had an SEF failure likely due to under sizing. The fixator was revised with a Synthes large external fixator system eight days after the initial one. The patient required three additional skin grafting procedures to his right elbow after SEF placement. He had a 12-month follow-up after the injury and his PT/OT notes reported a final ROM of 0°–110° in the extension and flexion arc, supination of 30°, and pronation 70°. He did have some continued weakness with elbow flexion at 4/5, extension 2/5, and pronation/supination 1/5 motor strength. His complications were SEF failure and weakness.

title: pmc-6003790-5
text:
病例标题：pmc-6003790-5
病例摘要：患者5是一名7岁4个月大的男性，因接触电线导致电烧伤。他有32%体表面积的三度烧伤。他的左膝有关节开放性损伤，在SEF植入前进行了三次皮肤移植手术。在受伤后24天植入了SEF，并持续使用了8.5周。外部固定器采用Shantz针和棒进行固定，保持完全伸展状态。在SEF植入后，他需要额外进行两次左膝皮肤移植手术。他还需要在SEF期间进行骨突切除术。没有记录到他的物理治疗/职业治疗笔记或后续随访情况。他没有出现显著的并发症。

metadata.original_text: Patient 5 was a 7-year-4-month-old-male who sustained an electrical burn involving a power line. He had 32% TBSA third-degree injuries. His left knee had an open joint injury that was treated with three skin grafting procedures prior to SEF placement. SEF was placed 24 days after the injury and was kept on for 8.5 weeks. Shantz pins and bars were placed as the external fixator; this was locked in full extension. The patient required two additional skin grafting procedures to his left knee after SEF placement. He also required a bony prominence resection while in SEF. He had no PT/OT notes or follow-up recorded. He had no significant complications.

title: pmc-6003790-6
text:
病例标题：pmc-6003790-6
病例摘要：患者6是一名11岁6个月大的男性，因车祸（MVA）导致火焰烧伤。他有25%体表面积的三度烧伤。他的左膝有关节开放性损伤，在SEF植入前进行了三次皮肤移植手术。SEF在受伤后74天植入，并保持了九周。使用Shantz针和棒作为外固定系统，该系统锁定在完全伸展位置。在SEF植入后，他不需要额外的皮肤移植手术来修复左膝。由于左膝长时间处于完全伸展位固定，没有记录到关节活动范围（ROM）测量值。并发症很多。患者因受伤导致内侧副韧带和内侧股骨骺损伤，并自发性膝关节融合。由于生长板受损，他出现了膝内翻畸形以及4.0厘米的肢体长度差异，这引起了持续疼痛。最终，他需要进行截骨术和Ilizarov装置植入以纠正对齐并延长肢体长度。

metadata.original_text: Patient 6 was an 11-year-6-month-old male who sustained a flame burn from an MVA. He had 25% TBSA third-degree injuries. His left knee had an open joint injury that was treated with three skin grafting procedures prior to SEF placement. SEF was placed 74 days after injury and was kept on for nine weeks. Shantz pins and bars were placed as the external fixator system; this was locked in full extension. He required no additional skin grafting procedures to his left knee after SEF placement. The patient had no ROM measurements recorded because the left knee was immobilized in full extension for a prolonged period of time. Complications were extensive. The patient ended up with significant damage to the medial collateral ligament and the medial femoral epiphysis from the injury developed a spontaneous knee fusion. Because of the growth plate disturbances, he developed a varus deformity and leg length discrepancy of 4.0 cm which caused persistent pain. He ended up requiring an osteotomy and Ilizarov placement for alignment correction and lengthening.

title: pmc-6003790-7
text:
病例标题：pmc-6003790-7
病例摘要：患者7是一名8岁5个月大的男性，因车祸烧伤。他有79%体表面积的三度烧伤。他的右膝有关节开放性损伤，在SEF置入前进行了六次皮肤移植手术。在受伤后61天置入了SEF，并保持了五周。使用史密斯-内夫·理查兹系统，采用5.0毫米Shantz针和杆进行SEF置入。在SEF置入后，他左膝不需要额外的皮肤移植手术。从受伤后的随访中可以看出，在10个月后，他的PT/OT记录显示右膝的伸展和屈曲范围分别为0°-45°。最后一次记录的肌力为3+/5。他的并发症是膝关节僵硬和无力。

metadata.original_text: Patient 7 was an 8-year-5-month-old male who sustained a flame burn from an MVA. He had 79% TBSA third-degree injuries. His right knee had an open joint injury that was treated with six skin grafting procedures prior to SEF placement. SEF was placed 61 days after the injury and was kept on for five weeks. An SEF was placed using the Smith Nephew Richards system with 5.0-mm Shantz pins and bars. The patient required no additional skin grafting procedures to his left knee after SEF placement. He had a 10-month follow-up after the injury and his PT/OT notes recorded a final ROM of 0°–45° in the extension and flexion arc. His last recorded motor strength was 3+/5. His complication was residual knee stiffness and weakness.

title: pmc-6003790-8
text:
病例标题：pmc-6003790-8
病例摘要：患者8是一名16岁6个月大的男性，因接触电线而遭受电烧伤。他有48%体表面积的三度烧伤。他的右肘关节有开放性损伤，在SEF植入前进行了六次皮肤移植手术。在受伤后53天放置了SEF，并持续使用了六周。使用史密斯-内夫·理查兹系统，采用5.0毫米舍恩茨针和杆进行了SEF的植入。在SEF植入后，他左膝不需要额外进行皮肤移植手术。然而，在移除SEF后，他需要进行两次额外的手术以处理并发症，包括一次手术涉及尺神经移位、异位骨化切除以及关节纤维性粘连的释放。第二次手术是为了覆盖肘部释放后出现的软组织缺损。在受伤后的13个月随访中，他的理疗记录报告了伸展和屈曲弧度范围为20°-90°，旋前和旋后未进行测试，肌力为4-/5级。在他进行肘关节挛缩释放手术之前，他的伸展和屈曲弧度范围为0°-30°，旋前角度为25°，旋后角度为85°，肌力未进行测试。并发症包括异位骨化、肘管综合征和肘部僵硬。

metadata.original_text: Patient 8 was a 16-year-6-month-old male who sustained an electrical burn from contact with a power line. He had 48% TBSA third-degree injuries. His right elbow had an open joint injury that was treated with six skin grafting procedures prior to SEF placement. SEF was placed 53 days after the injury and was kept on for six weeks. An SEF was placed using the Smith Nephew Richards system with 5.0-mm Shantz pins and rods. The patient required no additional skin grafting procedures to his left knee after SEF placement. However, he did require two additional surgeries after the SEF was removed because of complications, including one surgery that incorporated an ulnar nerve transposition, heterotopic ossification removal, and contracture release with arthrofibrosis excision. The second surgery was a flap to cover soft tissue deficit that occurred after the elbow release. The patient had a 13-month follow-up after the injury and his PT/OT notes reported a final ROM of 20°–90° in the extension and flexion arc, supination and pronation were not tested, and a 4-/5 motor strength. Prior to his elbow contracture release, he had an ROM of 0°–30° in the extension and flexion arc, supination of 25° and pronation 85°, and motor strength was not tested. Complications included heterotopic ossification, cubital tunnel syndrome, and elbow stiffness.

title: pmc-6003790-9
text:
病例标题：pmc-6003790-9
病例摘要：患者9是一位2个月大的女性，因房屋火灾遭受火焰烧伤。她有49.5%的TBSA三度烧伤和3%的TBSA二度烧伤，总计53%。她的左肘关节有开放性损伤，在SEF植入前进行了皮肤移植手术。SEF在受伤后74天被放置，并持续了8.5周。使用了三个毫米的Shantz针和杆作为外固定器。在SEF植入后，患者不需要额外的皮肤移植手术来修复左肘关节。然而，她确实需要进行一次SEF修订，因为最初的固定器被拉出。由于重大自然灾害和转院到另一家医院，患者失访。在SEF移除时，患者的肘部出现了一些僵硬和挛缩；但她的最终活动范围和力量情况未知。

metadata.original_text: Patient 9 was a 2-month-old female who sustained a flame burn from a house fire. She had 49.5% TBSA third-degree injuries and 3% TBSA second-degree injuries, 53% total. Her left elbow had an open joint injury that was treated with one skin grafting procedure prior to SEF placement. SEF was placed 74 days after the injury and was kept on for 8.5 weeks. Three-millimeter Shantz pins and rods were placed as an external fixator. The patient required no additional skin grafting procedures to her left elbow after SEF placement. However, she did require an SEF revision because the initial fixator was pulled out. She was lost to follow-up owing to a major natural disaster and transfer to a different hospital. The patient did develop some elbow stiffness and contracture at the time of SEF removal; however, her final ROM and strength are unknown.

title: pmc-6003791-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-6003791-1
病例摘要：一名64岁的女性因持续一个月的逐渐加重的呼吸困难和咳嗽入院。这些症状伴随有非故意性的八磅体重减轻。两周前，她被她的家庭医生看过，并开始服用左氧氟沙星治疗被认为的肺炎。初始抗生素治疗未能改善症状，最终患者需要补充氧气。胸部CT扫描显示双肺内无数囊状病变及弥漫性磨玻璃样阴影，在肝脏中也发现了一个病灶（图 ， 图 ）。对该患者的肺和肝疾病进行了广泛的检查，包括病毒、细菌和真菌感染的检测、人类免疫缺陷病毒感染测试、肝炎面板、扩展的结缔组织疾病工作以及全面的间质性肺病标志物。肿瘤标志物显示癌胚抗原19-9升高。腹部超声显示肝脏内无数囊状病变；大多数看起来是简单的。它还显示出胆管和胰管扩张。肝活检提示良性单纯囊壁及急性肝细胞炎症。这些发现提出了包括胆管阻塞、肿块效应、邻近脓肿或药物/毒素不良反应在内的诊断可能性。最终，由于CT扫描的不寻常发现以及肝活检未能提供诊断结果，进行了肺活检。通过视频辅助透视手术在右胸楔形切除获取了肺组织。病理检查显示右上叶、中叶和下叶存在中度分化的腺癌转移。

metadata.original_text: A 64-year-old female was admitted with progressively worsening dyspnea and cough of one-month duration. These symptoms were associated with an unintentional eight-pound weight loss. She was seen two weeks earlier by her primary physician and started on levofloxacin for what was thought to be pneumonia. Initial antibiotic therapy failed to improve symptoms and patient eventually required supplemental oxygen. A CT scan of the chest showed innumerable cystic lesions with diffuse ground glass opacities in both lungs and a lesion in the liver (Figure , Figure ). The patient underwent extensive workup for lung and liver disease including viral, bacterial, and fungal infection workups, human immunodeficiency virus testing, hepatitis panel, expanded connective tissue disease workup, and comprehensive interstitial lung disease markers. Cancer markers revealed an elevated cancer antigen 19-9. An abdominal ultrasound revealed innumerable cystic lesions throughout the liver; the majority were simple in appearance. It also showed intrahepatic and extrahepatic biliary and pancreatic duct dilatation. Liver biopsy was suggestive of a benign simple cyst wall and acute inflammation of hepatocytes. These findings raised a differential diagnosis including bile duct obstruction, mass effect, adjacent abscess, or adverse drug/toxin effect. Eventually, due to the unusual findings on CT scan and the failure of liver biopsy to provide a diagnosis, a lung biopsy was performed. Lung tissue was obtained by videoscopic-assisted fluoroscopic surgery to the right chest with wedge resection. Pathological examination showed metastatic with moderately differentiated adenocarcinoma in the right upper lobe, middle lobe, and lower lobe.

title: pmc-6003792-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-6003792-1
病例摘要：一名87岁的男性患者因助手发现其昏睡被送至急诊科。他在看电视时突然倒在椅子上，目光呆滞，口中流涎。没有近期发热、头痛、跌倒或创伤的病史，也没有最近住院的历史。既往病史包括高血压、慢性肾病5期、脑血管意外、由于房室传导阻滞植入的心脏起搏器、因良性前列腺增生进行经尿道前列腺切除术以及肺结核。长期用药包括阿司匹林、奥美拉唑、氨氯地平和呋塞米。体检显示其格拉斯哥昏迷量表评分为7分（M4E2V1），瞳孔等大且对光反应正常。生命体征稳定，体温36.7℃，心率66次/分钟，呼吸频率18次/分钟，在室内的血氧饱和度为99%，血压144/84 mmHg。新发右侧偏瘫，反射正常。没有头部受伤或脑脊液鼻漏的证据。即刻毛细血管血糖为8.7 mmol/L。感染标志物正常，白细胞计数5.6 x103/µL，C反应蛋白0.3 mg/L，血尿素氮17.7 mmol/L（稳定），钠离子137 mmol/L，钾离子5.1 mmol/L，肌酐331 µmol/L（稳定），校正钙2.29 mmol/L。肝功能测试正常。心电图（ECG）未显示急性心肌缺血的证据。紧急头部CT检查发现硬脑膜静脉窦内有气泡（双侧海绵窦、上矢状窦、直窦和左侧乙状窦）（图示）。头部CT没有明确的缺血性改变。最初认为颅内气肿是导致其昏睡和右侧偏瘫的原因。神经外科团队建议保守管理颅内气肿。两天后进行了面部骨CT检查，以排除创伤，因为这是最常见的引起颅内气肿的原因。CT扫描显示右侧上颌窦外侧壁有轻微移位的骨折。值得注意的是，在左侧大脑中动脉供血区发现急性梗死伴出血转化、左心室压迫和由此产生的中线移位（图示）。颅内气肿已消退。鉴于其术前状态较差，病情严重以及未能及时诊断出脑卒中的情况，患者被保守管理。他开始服用他汀类药物；由于有显著的出血性转化导致中线移位，抗血小板药物暂时停用。他接受了物理治疗但一直卧床不起。一个月后重复头部CT检查显示出血性转化有所改善，中线移位消失。随后开始使用双重抗血小板疗法。尽管进行了医疗管理，患者在初次就诊一个月后去世。

metadata.original_text: An 87-year-old man was conveyed to the emergency department after being found to be drowsy by his helper. He was watching television before he was found slumped in a chair, staring into space with saliva drooling. There was no history of recent fever, headache, fall, or trauma, and no recent hospitalization. Past medical history was significant for hypertension, stage 5 chronic kidney disease, a cerebrovascular accident, pacemaker insertion for sick sinus syndrome, a transurethral resection of the prostate for benign prostatic hyperplasia and pulmonary tuberculosis. His long-term medications were aspirin, omeprazole, amlodipine, and furosemide. On examination, his Glasgow coma scale was 7 (M4E2V1), and his pupils were equal and reactive. His vital signs were stable, with a temperature of 36.7 degree Celsius, pulse rate of 66 beats per minute, respiratory rate of 18 breaths per minute, oxygen saturation of 99% on room air, and blood pressure of 144/84 mmHg. He had a new onset right hemiparesis and normal reflexes. There was no evidence of any head injury or cerebrospinal fluid otorrhea or rhinorrhea. Stat capillary blood glucose was 8.7 mmol/L. Infective markers were normal, white blood count was 5.6 x103/µL, C-reactive protein was 0.3 mg/L, urea was 17.7 mmol/L (stable), sodium was 137 mmol/L, potassium was 5.1 mmol/L, creatinine was 331 µmol/L (stable), and corrected calcium was 2.29 mmol/L. The liver function test was normal. Electrocardiogram (ECG) did not show any evidence of acute myocardial ischemia. An urgent CT brain revealed air bubbles within the dural venous sinuses (bilateral cavernous, superior sagittal, straight, and left sigmoid sinuses) (Figure ). There was no definite evidence of ischemic changes on CT brain. Pneumocephalus was initially thought to be the cause of his drowsiness and right hemiparesis. The neurosurgery team suggested conservative management of the pneumocephalus. A facial bone CT was ordered to rule out trauma, as it is the commonest cause of pneumocephalus. The CT scan, done two days later, demonstrated a minimally displaced fracture of the lateral wall of the right maxillary sinus. Of note, there was an acute left middle cerebral artery territory infarct with hemorrhagic conversion, a mass effect on the left ventricle, and a resultant midline shift (Figure ). The pneumocephalus had resolved. In view of a poor premorbid state, the severity of the stroke, and a lapse in the diagnosis of stroke, the patient was conservatively managed. He was started on statins; antiplatelets were held off in view of significant hemorrhagic conversion causing the midline shift. He underwent physiotherapy but remained bed-ridden. A repeat CT brain one month later showed improvement in hemorrhagic transformation and a resolution of midline shift. He was then started on dual antiplatelet therapy. Despite the medical management, he demised one month after the initial presentation.

title: pmc-6003794-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-6003794-1
病例摘要：一名23岁的女性因左下腹痛和轻度血清肌酐升高（1.21 mg/dl，基线值为0.8-1 mg/dl）就诊。这些症状是在一个月后随访泌尿科检查时通过常规血液检测发现的。当时她没有尿路症状，系统回顾也未见异常。体格检查无明显异常，未发现特定异常。尿液分析和妊娠试验均为阴性。腹部计算机断层扫描（CT）显示左侧肾脏积水以及双侧输尿管增厚（图示）。一个月前，她在出现急性肾损伤后放置了右侧输尿管支架，并且当时的腹部CT检查结果显示右侧肾脏积水及双侧近端输尿管增厚的证据。此外，在初次住院期间对输尿管标本进行活检发现正常尿路上皮伴有慢性炎症的表现。进一步的工作包括胸部X光、性传播感染检测、补体活性水平和其他自身免疫标志物均未见异常。在此次入院期间，左侧和右侧输尿管分别放置了支架，并且将右侧的输尿管支架进行了更换。对两侧输尿管再次进行活检显示良性上皮生长及慢性炎症的表现，与一个月前的结果一致。根据手术报告，输尿管增厚区域的外观符合尿道炎囊状表现。然而，在进一步询问后得知，患者仅有一次泌尿系统感染史、无肾结石病史及其他与此症状相关的风险因素。该患者在症状缓解后出院，并进行了密切随访。

metadata.original_text: A 23-year-old woman presented with left lower quadrant abdominal pain and mildly elevated creatinine of 1.21 mg/dl (baseline 0.8-1 mg/dl) that was identified on routine blood draw at a one-month follow-up urology appointment. She had no urinary symptoms at that time and the review of systems was otherwise unremarkable. The physical examination was unremarkable without any focal abnormalities. Urinalysis and pregnancy testing were negative. Computed tomography abdomen revealed hydronephrosis of the left kidney as well as bilateral ureteral thickening (Figures -). One month prior, she had a right ureter stent placed after she presented with acute kidney injury, and the CT abdomen at that time showed evidence of right hydronephrosis and bilateral proximal ureteral thickening. In addition, biopsies of ureter specimens found normal urothelium with signs of chronic inflammation during that initial hospitalization. Further workup was negative, including chest x-ray, sexually transmitted infection testing, complement activity levels, and other autoimmune markers. During this admission, a stent was placed in the left ureter and the right ureter stent was replaced. Repeat biopsies of both the right and left ureters showed findings of benign epithelial growth and chronic inflammation that were previously noted the month prior. Per the operative report, the region of the ureter thickening had the gross appearance of ureteritis cystica. However, upon further questioning, the patient had a history of only one urinary tract infection, no nephrolithiasis, and no other risk factors for this presentation. The patient was discharged home symptom-free and proceeded with close urological follow-up.

title: pmc-6003795-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-6003795-1
主要诊断：先天性血管瘤
病例摘要：一名两个月大的女婴因出生后未能消退的多个肿块而被送入医院。她是由非近亲结合怀孕的，母亲孕期无异常情况。婴儿在37周时通过阴道分娩，并且身体表面发现了多个肿块。出院时医生建议随访观察。然而，父母决定寻求更多的医疗帮助并为孩子办理了住院手续以进行进一步检查。体格检查显示，患儿意识清晰、活泼。未见黄疸和四肢苍白。生命体征均在正常范围内，体重增长与出生体重相符。在前额和头皮上观察到两个大小分别为26毫米×19毫米和19毫米×17毫米的肿块（图-）。腹部还发现一个较小的肿块，大小为11毫米×10毫米（图）。所有三个肿块均为红色且无出血现象。父母报告称这些肿块自出生以来没有变化。未发现类似家族史，父母均健康。触诊未见肝脾肿大，也未检测到其他皮肤病变。患儿未表现出任何其他系统异常。进行了超声检查，结果显示肝脏、脾脏和肾脏正常，无肿块或病灶。多普勒检查显示快速流动的血管性病灶，这与其他文章中报道的情况一致[]。全血细胞计数显示白细胞、血小板、红细胞压积和红细胞水平均在正常范围内。确诊为先天性血管瘤，并向家属详细解释了该状况及其可能的并发症。采取观察等待的方法，计划三个月后进行定期随访。要求家庭密切监测肿块大小的变化，并告知如果肿块未能消退或继续增大，则将提供适当的手术治疗。

metadata.original_text: A two-week-old female was brought in with an initial complaint of multiple masses that failed to regress since birth. She was born from a nonconsanguineous union and the mother’s pregnancy was uneventful. The baby was delivered vaginally at 37 weeks of gestation and multiples masses were found over the body. The treating physician advised follow-ups on discharge. However, the parents decided to seek more medical help for the child and she was admitted for more investigations. On physical exam, the child was alert and active. She was not jaundiced and no pallor was noted on the extremities. Her vitals were all within the normal range and the birth weight and changes in weight corresponded properly. Two masses measuring 26 mm by 19 mm and 19 mm by 17 mm were observed on the forehead and the scalp (Figures -). One smaller mass was seen on the abdomen, measuring 11 mm by 10 mm (Figure ). All three masses were red and non-hemorrhagic. The parents reported that the size of the masses did not change since birth. No similar family history was found and both parents were healthy. Any hepatosplenomegaly was not observed on palpation nor were any other cutaneous lesions detected. She did not present with any other systemic abnormalities. An ultrasound was performed, and it revealed a normal liver, spleen, and kidneys with no masses or lesions. A Doppler examination also showed a fast-flow vascular lesion, as reported by many other articles []. The full blood count showed normal levels of white blood cells, platelets, hematocrit, and red blood cells. The diagnosis of congenital hemangioma was confirmed and the family was properly educated about the condition as well as possible complications. A wait and watch approach was adopted and the child was scheduled for regular visits at three months. The family was asked to properly monitor the size of the masses and informed that appropriate surgical treatment would be provided if the masses fail to regress or if they continue to grow.

title: pmc-6003796-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-6003796-1
病例摘要：一名19岁的女性在车祸中被弹出车外。现场采取了完整的脊柱保护措施，并用刚性颈托固定了她的颈部。随后，她被送往我们的急诊室。她抱怨颈部疼痛。生命体征和神经学检查均正常。发现左侧股骨粉碎性骨折。颈椎CT显示寰枕关节和寰枢关节分离（图）。颈椎MRI证实诊断，在颅椎交界处有完全的韧带断裂，并且双侧寰枢关节有分离（图-）。虽然CCI为1.2毫米，但BDI为19毫米，这符合AO损伤的诊断。患者用冠状-环形固定衣固定，并紧急进行了后路枕颈融合术（图）。出院时佩戴刚性颈托并定期门诊随访。在一年的随访中，神经学检查正常，无颈部疼痛报告，否认吞咽困难。

metadata.original_text: A 19-year-old female suffered a motor vehicle accident causing her to be ejected from the car. Complete spinal precautions were followed at the scene and her neck was immobilized with a rigid collar. The patient then was transported to our emergency room. She was complaining of neck pain. Her vital signs and neurological examination were normal. She was found to have an associated left comminuted femur fracture. CT of the cervical spine showed concomitant atlanto-occipital and atlanto-axial dissociation (Figure ). MRI of the cervical spine confirmed the diagnosis with total ligamentous disruption at the craniovertebral junction (CVJ) and distraction of the atlanto-axial joints bilaterally (Figures -). While the CCI was normal (1.2 mm), the BDI was 19 mm, which is diagnostic of AOD. The patient was immobilized with a crown-halo vest and a posterior occipitocervical fusion was performed urgently (Figure ). The patient then was discharged on a rigid collar and followed up in the clinic. During her one year appointment, the patient was neurologically normal, reported no neck pain, and denied any dysphagia.

title: pmc-6003799-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-6003799-1
病例摘要：一名71岁的女性患者，2006年因右髋关节囊内骨折接受治疗。她在2006年接受了DHS（动态髋螺钉固定）手术。由于随后出现骨坏死，她在2010年进行了全髋关节置换术。她的既往病史包括高血压，并在25年前因乳腺癌接受了左侧乳房切除术。在此之前，自2010年的手术以来，她没有因为髋部问题感到不适。影像学检查显示为温哥华B3型周围假体骨折（图未示），表现为高度抛光的双锥形股骨柄通过水泥帽和股骨近端外侧壁横向移位。考虑了两种治疗方案：一是进行股骨头组件翻修并使用异体骨移植，二是进行股骨近端置换术。前者通常适用于低需求患者且伴有大量医学合并症的情况，而后者虽然对患者的手术创伤较大，但可以立即负重并促进早期康复。该患者接受了双组件翻修关节成形术（图示）；利用股骨近端已有的多条骨折线替代延长的粗隆间截骨术，移除了股骨近端的假体和水泥，并植入了模块化内植物（LPS ® DePuy 肢体保存系统（位于美国印第安纳州沃斯瓦）进行股骨近端置换）。同时更换了髋臼组件。虽然这增加了额外步骤并稍微加大了手术创伤，但它允许使用更大的假体头，并优化任何版本问题以降低术后脱位的风险。还使用了一个额外的粗隆爪钢板将股骨近端的骨头重新固定到假体上，从而确保良好的外展功能。患者在手术过程中没有出现并发症。她在术后第一天开始立即负重行走，受到Zimmer支架保护。在术后六周评估时，她能够独立行走，但仍然继续使用步行框架以增强平衡和信心。

metadata.original_text: A 71-year-old woman with a history of a right hip intra-capsular fracture in 2006 presented to the emergency department after a fall at her home. In 2006 she had a DHS (dynamic hip screw) as a result of right hip intra-capsular fracture. She developed osteonecrosis which led to a total hip replacement in 2010. Her medical history was relevant for hypertension and had a left mastectomy 25 years ago due to breast cancer. Prior to this episode she denied any trouble with this hip since her surgery in 2010. Her radiographs demonstrate a Vancouver B3 peri-prosthetic fracture (Figures -), with lateral extrusion of the highly polished double taper stem through the cement mantle and through lateral wall of the proximal femur. Two treatment options were considered; i) A femoral component revision with an allograft and ii) A proximal femoral replacement. The former option is often preferred for low-demand patients with extensive medical co-morbidities, while the latter- while representing a larger surgical insult for the patient- facilitates immediate weight bearing and early rehabilitation. The patient underwent a both component revision arthroplasty procedure (Figure ); using an the multiple fracture lines already present through the proximal femur in lieu of an extended trochanteric osteotomy, the prosthesis and cement were removed from the proximal femur, and a modular endoprosthesis (LPS ® DePuy Limb Preservation System (Warsaw, IN, USA) proximal femoral replacement) inserted. The acetabular component was also revised. While representing an addition extra step and a slightly increased magnitude of the surgical insult, it allows use of a larger head, and the optimsation of any version issues to reduce the risk of post-operative dislocation. An additional trochanteric claw plate was used to re-attach the bone of the proximal femur to the prosthesis, thus ensuring good abductor function. The patient tolerated the surgery without incident. She was able to commence immediate full weight-bearing, protected with a Zimmer frame, on postoperative day one. At her six-week postoperative evaluation, she was ambulating independently, though had continued with the use of her walking frame for ‘balance and confidence’.

title: pmc-6003800-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-6003800-1
病例摘要：一名59岁的左利手女性，有高血压、脂肪肝炎、甲状腺功能减退和阻塞性睡眠呼吸暂停（OSA）的病史，在过去一周中出现进行性意识改变、意志缺乏和无法自理。家属报告称，她最近一周饮食摄入不足且记忆力逐渐下降。一个月前，她接受了腹腔镜Roux-en-Y胃旁路减肥手术。术后恢复顺利，并在夜间使用持续正压气道通气（CPAP）的情况下保持正常的精神状态出院。三天后，她在CPAP不遵从的情况下从床上摔下，处于嗜睡状态被送入急诊科。她因急性低氧性呼吸衰竭被收治于外科重症监护室并进行了气管插管。胸部CT仅显示双侧少量胸腔积液。最终拔管，并在睡眠时使用CPAP治疗后转至普通护理楼层。尽管有充足的氧气供应，患者仍然表现出可唤醒但定向障碍和注意力下降的症状。颅神经、运动和感觉检查均正常。磁共振成像（MRI）脑部显示半卵圆中心的非特异性白质病变（图）。腰椎穿刺发现髓鞘基本蛋白水平升高。她的维生素D-25和甲基丙二酸水平偏低。甲状腺功能检测结果符合甲状腺功能减退症。其余代谢检查均无异常。最终，她被转至康复护理机构，并安排神经科随访。

metadata.original_text: A 59-year-old left-handed female with a history of hypertension, steatohepatitis, hypothyroidism, and obstructive sleep apnea (OSA) was brought to the emergency department (ED) with progressive altered mental status, abulia, and inability to care for herself. The family reported inadequate dietary intake and increasing forgetfulness in the last week. Her history was significant for laparoscopic Roux-en-Y gastric bypass bariatric surgery one month prior. The post-operative course was uneventful, and she was discharged home with normal mental status on nightly continuous positive airway pressure (CPAP). Three days later she was brought to the ED in a lethargic state after falling out of bed in the setting of CPAP noncompliance. She was admitted to the surgical intensive care unit for acute hypoxic respiratory failure and was intubated. Computed tomography (CT) chest only showed small bilateral pleural effusions. She was eventually extubated and placed on a regimen of CPAP when asleep and transferred to the regular nursing floor. Despite adequate oxygenation, the patient remained arousable but disoriented with decreased attention span. Cranial nerve, motor and sensory examinations were normal. Magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) brain showed nonspecific white matter disease of the centrum semiovale (Figure ). Lumbar puncture revealed an elevated myelin basic protein. Her vitamin D-25 and methylmalonic acid levels were low. Her thyroid function workup was consistent with hypothyroidism. The rest of her metabolic workup was unremarkable. She was eventually discharged to a skilled nursing facility (SNF) with neurology follow-up.

title: pmc-6003800-2
text:
病例标题：pmc-6003800-2
病例摘要：一名71岁女性，有原位卵巢腺癌病史（已行阑尾切除术和右侧半结肠切除术），近期出现全身性强直阵挛发作。最初的一次发作发生在进行支气管镜活检以评估肺门肿块的过程中。病理结果显示为良性反应性淋巴结。在该过程中，她出现了皮肤花斑状变色，从腹部开始逐渐蔓延至双肩。开始进行袋式通气，并被转送至外科重症监护室（ICU），并进行了气管插管。头部CT显示有多发空气栓塞（图示）。连续脑电图监测显示频繁的周期性侧向棘慢波发放。她的抗癫痫药物迅速升级为戊巴比妥，同时使用左乙拉西坦、拉考沙胺和苯妥英钠。她的格拉斯哥昏迷量表评分为3分（E:1；V:1；M:1）。神经系统检查显示双侧瞳孔迟钝但对光反应存在，四肢反射消失。当时她被转送至神经内科ICU。此后她的神经系统检查结果保持不变。入院第14天的脑电图显示双额叶皮质功能障碍的变化，提示严重的弥漫性脑病。未见癫痫发作活动。腰椎穿刺液分析显示髓鞘基本蛋白升高，但未检测到白细胞、红细胞和细胞学异常。次日的头部MRI扫描显示渐进性的广泛白质改变，分布在边缘区和半卵圆中心（图示）。她逐渐从抗癫痫治疗中撤出，仅使用左乙拉西坦单药治疗。病情逐渐好转，但仍需气管切开术和经皮胃造口管。最终被转至急性康复设施。

metadata.original_text: A 71-year-old female with a history of in situ ovarian adenocarcinoma status post appendectomy and right-sided hemicolectomy developed generalized tonic-clonic seizure activity. An initial seizure was noted while undergoing an endobronchial biopsy procedure for evaluation of a perihilar mass. Pathology was consistent with a benign reactive lymph node. During the procedure, she developed mottled discoloration of her skin, spreading from her abdomen to both shoulders. Bag ventilation was started, and she was transferred to the surgical intensive care unit (ICU) and intubated. CT head revealed multiple air emboli (Figure ). Continuous electroencephalography (CEEG) monitoring revealed frequent periodic lateralized epileptiform discharges. Her anti-epileptic medication was rapidly escalated to pentobarbital in addition to levetiracetam, lacosamide, and phenytoin. Her Glasgow Coma Scale was 3 (E:1;V:1;M:1). Neurological examination was significant for sluggish but reactive bilateral pupils and areflexic quadriplegia. She was transferred to the neurological ICU at that time. Her neurological examination remained same thereafter. On day 14 of her admission, EEG showed changes consistent with bilateral cortical dysfunction in bifrontal regions indicating severe diffuse encephalopathy. No seizure activity was noted on EEG. Cerebrospinal fluid (CSF) analysis revealed an elevated myelin basic protein but with undetected white blood cells (WBCs), red blood cells (RBCs), and negative cytology. MRI brain scan the following day showed progressive diffuse white matter changes in a watershed distribution and centrum semiovale (Figure ). She was weaned from her antiepileptic regimen to levetiracetam monotherapy. She slowly improved, but required tracheostomy and percutaneous gastrostomy tube. She was eventually transferred to an acute rehabilitation facility.

title: pmc-6003802-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-6003802-1
病例摘要：一位87岁的白人男性，有良性前列腺增生和肠易激综合症的病史，因尿失禁、腹泻、腹痛、低血压和意识状态改变入院。到达医院时根据症状和初步检查被诊断为继发于泌尿道感染的脓毒性休克。患者过去两周一直有下腹部疼痛的症状。他去看了家庭医生，并进行了腹部和骨盆的计算机断层扫描（CT），结果显示前列腺肥大和双侧肾盂积水。患者的症状逐渐加重，最终入院治疗。到达医院时，患者血流动力学稳定，但很快恶化。生命体征显示血压为88/55 mmHg，心率为143次/分钟，呼吸频率为20次/分钟，体温为96.3°F。初步重要的实验室检查结果包括急性肾损伤，肌酐从基线的1.2 mg/dL升高到12 mg/dL，血清尿素氮（BUN）为161 mg/dL。血液和体液样本培养显示代谢性酸中毒，由乳酸酸中毒引起。尿检结果显示感染迹象，并送样进行培养。到达医院时的体检发现轻微的痛苦表现、出汗、前列腺肿大且触痛，腹部膨胀但无压痛、反跳痛或异常皮肤发现。手术当天到出院期间的白细胞值详见表 。患者在急诊科接受了经验性静脉抗生素治疗和液体复苏，并放置了尿管以缓解尿道阻塞。尿管插入后显示有肉眼可见的血尿，但第二天血尿消失。血液和尿液培养结果为大肠杆菌阳性，初始抗生素被下调至对病原体敏感的头孢曲松。三天前拍摄的胸部X光片未发现急性心肺变化（图 ）。入院第五天，患者出现腹痛加剧、便秘和主观发热的症状。生命体征显示体温为97.2°F，血压为111/70 mmHg，脉搏为87次/分钟，呼吸频率为20次/分钟，氧饱和度为97%。腹部检查发现肠鸣音减弱，轻度膨胀、压痛、叩诊呈鼓音和弥漫性触痛。进行了立位胸部X光片检查。立位胸部X光片显示腹膜腔内有游离气体（图 ）。腹部X光片显示非阻塞性肠道气体模式，没有发现肠管扩张或气液平面。外科团队紧急会诊评估腹膜腔积气，并建议进行急诊腹腔镜探查，无需进一步检查或成像。患者接受了急诊腹腔镜探查手术，因在腹腔镜下未见穿孔而转为开腹手术。仔细检查腹部腔室未发现肠管或泌尿生殖道穿孔、任何其他外科原因引起的腹膜炎、游离液体或脓肿形成。术后X光片显示于术后第一天腹膜腔积气消失（图 ）。

metadata.original_text: An 87-year-old Caucasian male with a past medical history of benign prostatic hyperplasia and irritable bowel syndrome presented to the hospital with urinary incontinence, diarrhea, abdominal pain, hypotension and altered mental status. A diagnosis of septic shock secondary to urinary tract infection was made on arrival based on symptomology and initial investigation. The patient had a history of lower abdominal pain for last two weeks. He visited his primary care physician and underwent a computed tomography (CT) scan of the abdomen and pelvis which showed hypertrophy of the prostate and bilateral hydronephrosis. The patient had progression of symptoms leading to hospitalization. On arrival to the hospital, the patient was hemodynamically stable but quickly decompensated. Vitals showed a blood pressure of 88/55 mmHg, heart rate of 143 beats per minute, respiratory rate of 20 breaths per minute, and temperature of 96.3°F. Initial pertinent laboratory findings included acute kidney injury with serum creatinine of 12 mg/dL (from a baseline of 1.2 mg/dL) and blood urea nitrogen (BUN) of 161 mg/dL. Labs demonstrated an anion gap metabolic acidosis secondary to lactic acidosis. Urinalysis showed evidence of infection, and blood and urine samples sent for cultures. Physical exam at arrival was significant for a minor distress, diaphoresis, enlarged and tender prostate, abdominal distension without tenderness to palpation, guarding, rebound tenderness, or abnormal dermatological findings. The white blood cell values from the day of surgery until discharge are detailed in Table . The patient received empiric intravenous antibiotics and fluid resuscitation in the emergency department along with placement of a urinary catheter to relieve urinary obstruction. Urinary catheter placement revealed gross hematuria, but hematuria resolved by the next day. Blood and urine cultures were positive for E. coli and initial antibiotics were deescalated to ceftriaxone, to which the organism was sensitive. No acute cardiopulmonary changes were visualized on chest X-ray taken three days prior (Figure ). On day five of his admission, the patient experienced increased abdominal pain, constipation, and subjective fevers. Vitals showed a temperature of 97.2°F, a blood pressure of 111/70 mmHg, a pulse of 87 beats per minute, respiratory rate of 20 respirations per minute, and oxygen saturation of 97%. Abdominal exam was significant for hypoactive bowel sounds, mild distension, guarding, tympany on percussion, and diffuse tenderness to palpation. An upright chest X-ray was ordered. Upright chest X-ray revealed free intraperitoneal air (Figure ). An abdominal X-ray showed a nonobstructive bowel gas pattern without signs of dilated loops of bowel or air-fluid levels. The surgical team was emergently consulted for evaluation of pneumoperitoneum, and an urgent exploratory laparoscopy was recommended without further evaluation or imaging. The patient underwent emergent exploratory laparoscopy that was converted to laparotomy, as there was no evidence of a perforation visualized on laparoscopy. Meticulous examination of the abdominal cavity revealed no evidence of an intestinal or genitourinary tract perforation or any other surgical causes, peritonitis, free fluid, or abscess formation. Post-operative X-ray, completed on post-operation day one, demonstrated resolution of the pneumoperitoneum (Figure ).

title: pmc-6003803-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-6003803-1
病例摘要：病史和体格检查 一名75岁的女性，有纤维肌痛和舍格伦综合征的既往病史，在急诊科因严重高血压就诊。患者家中未服用任何药物。体格检查显示患者轻微呼吸困难。生命体征如下：血压182/91毫米汞柱，心率每分钟72次，呼吸频率每分钟15次，吸空气时血氧饱和度为93%。患者的下肢有+2凹陷性水肿。其余的体格检查未见异常。住院过程 给予患者肼屈嗪和可乐定后，血压有所改善。因肌酐升高（3.8毫克/分升）及血尿素氮为29毫克/分升，肾脏科被咨询进行评估。在医院的既往病历中显示她的肌酐水平一年前为2.5毫克/分升。进一步检查发现24小时蛋白尿为3.89克。尿常规显示蛋白质+++、红细胞5-10个/高倍视野和白细胞10-15个/高倍视野。考虑到舍格伦综合征的既往病史，患者疑似急性间质性肾炎或可能的免疫复合物介导疾病。她的C3和C4补体水平较低。血清免疫固定电泳未发现单克隆免疫球蛋白。抗核抗体检测呈阳性（滴度1:640），HBV、HCV及抗中性粒细胞胞浆抗体均为阴性。在光镜检查下，共观察到三个肾小球，其中两个为全球硬化，一个显示节段性瘢痕化。节段性病变伴有纤维反应，提示可能的愈合/纤维新月体。肾小球还表现出明显的系膜扩张，银染色和PAS染色均为阴性。Congo红染色也为阴性。未在特殊染色中观察到血管壁沉积物，也未见活动性坏死或新月体病变。间质中有轻度纤维化存在。此外，在血管内还观察到了轻度的内膜纤维化，无血栓形成或血管炎。免疫荧光检查显示弥漫性全球3+模糊系膜；血管壁呈IgG阳性（图）。肾小球染色显示1+ IgM、C1q、2+ C3、κ和λ轻链各1+（图）。IgG和白蛋白在管腔细胞质中显示出蛋白质再吸收颗粒。未见显著的纤维蛋白原染色。电镜证实了扩张系膜区域及增厚肾小球基底膜中的广泛电子致密沉积物（图-）。这些沉积物具有独特的丝状亚结构，未显示跨膜棘突形成。未观察到额外的肾外沉积物。

metadata.original_text: History and physical examination A 75-year-old female with a past medical history of fibromyalgia and Sjogren’s syndrome presented to the emergency department with severe hypertension. The patient was not taking any medication at home. On physical examination, the patient was in slight distress. The vitals were as follows: blood pressure of 182/91 mmHg, heart rate of 72 beats per minute, respiratory rate of 15 breaths per minute, and oxygen saturation of 93% on room air. The patient had 2+ pitting edema of lower extremities. The rest of the physical examination was unremarkable. Hospital course The blood pressure of the patient improved after giving hydralazine and clonidine. Nephrology was consulted for evaluation of increased creatinine (3.8 mg/dl) with blood urea nitrogen of 29 mg/dl. Review of the past medical record in the hospital showed her creatinine level of 2.5 mg/dl, a year ago. Further workup revealed 24-hour proteinuria of 3.89 grams. Urine dipstick showed 3+ protein, 5-10 red blood cells and 10-15 white blood cells per high power field. Considering the past medical history of Sjogren’s syndrome, the patient was suspected to have acute interstitial nephritis or possible immune-complex-mediated disease. Her C3 and C4 complement levels were low. Serum immunofixation did not reveal any monoclonal immunoglobulin. Serologies for antinuclear antibody was positive (titer, 1:640), negative for anti-double-stranded DNA, hepatitis B and C, and antineutrophilic cytoplasmic antibodies. On light microscopy (LM), three glomeruli were present for evaluation, two of which were globally sclerotic and one showed segmental scarring. The segmental lesion had an accompanying fibrous reaction, suggestive of a possible healed/fibrous crescent. The glomeruli also featured noticeable mesangial expansion, which was negative for Silver methenamine and positive for Periodic acid-Schiff (PAS) staining. Congo-red stain was also negative. No capillary wall deposits were seen on special stains and no active necrotizing or crescent lesions were present. Moderate interstitial fibrosis was present in the interstitium. Furthermore, moderate intimal fibrosis was seen in vessels, with no thrombosis or vasculitis. Immunofluorescent (IF) showed diffuse global 3+ smudgy mesangial; the capillary wall was positivity noted with immunoglobulin G (IgG) (Figure ). Glomerular staining showed 1+ IgM, C1q, 2+ C3, 1+ staining with both kappa and lambda light chains (Figure ). IgG and albumin stained protein reabsorption granules in the tubular cytoplasm were noted. No significant staining was seen with fibrinogen. EM confirmed the presence of extensive electron dense deposits in the expanded mesangial regions and throughout the thickened glomerular basement membranes (Figures -). These deposits had a distinct fibrillary substructure and they did not show any transmembranous spicule formation. No extra-glomerular deposits were seen.

title: pmc-6003805-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-6003805-1
病例摘要：一名49岁的女性患者，有高血压、先兆子痫、焦虑和双相情感障碍的病史，并正在服用丁螺环酮。她因“多种不适”被送往急诊科。她的现病史显示头痛持续了一周，最初在到达前的一天晚上开始出现，伴有恶心和呕吐。第二天她去了急诊室并接受了药物治疗，症状缓解了大约两天后再次复发，于是她又去了一家外部医院进行了头部计算机断层扫描（CT）和腰椎穿刺检查，结果均为阴性。患者因肌钙蛋白水平升高被收治入院，并进行了心脏导管检查，未进行干预，结果显示单个血管有60%的阻塞。患者在出院一天后因持续头痛再次就诊。她描述头痛类似于先兆子痫时的头痛，感觉“像整个头部被紧紧包裹”。她的初始生命体征如下：血压172/92 mmHg，心率81次/分，呼吸频率18次/分，在室内的血氧饱和度为99%。体检显示患者疼痛但无毒性表现，心脏和肺部听诊正常。神经系统检查未见异常，无局部麻木、无力或协调性、步态或颅神经异常。胸部X光片、初步实验室检查和心电图结果均正常。患者接受了1000毫升静脉液体补充、静脉注射甲氧氯普胺和酮咯酸治疗，但症状仅轻微改善，并在多次复查中仍显得不适。她被安置在观察病房并进行了脑部磁共振成像（MRI）。脑部MRI显示左侧额中回、右侧顶叶和左侧颞叶有三个点状区域的局灶性受限扩散，这些表现与急性梗死一致。提供的图像如下（图）。神经科会诊后，患者被转入卒中服务病房。她的卒中检查包括头部和颈部计算机断层血管造影、经胸超声心动图和食管超声心动图，结果均无异常。此时的鉴别诊断缩小为血管炎或雷诺综合征导致的严重头痛伴急性梗死的原因。神经外科会诊后进行了血管造影，结果显示中 cerebral动脉M1段及远端中 cerebral动脉、右侧后交通动脉和远端前交通动脉存在雷诺综合征证据。双联抗血小板治疗（阿司匹林和氯吡格雷）被启动，并患者出院随访卒中诊所和全科医生处。

metadata.original_text: A 49-year-old woman with a past medical history of hypertension, preeclampsia, anxiety, and bipolar disorder on buspirone, presented to the emergency department with triage complaint of “multiple complaints”. Her history of present illness revealed a persistent headache that initially started one week prior to arrival. The patient recalled onset in the evening associated with nausea and vomiting. She went to an urgent care the next day and received medications, after which she felt better for about two days. When her symptoms recurred, she went to an outside hospital where she had a computed tomography scan of the head and lumbar puncture, both of which were negative. The patient was admitted for an elevated troponin level and received a cardiac catheterization without intervention, findings significant for 60% blockage of a single vessel. The patient presented to us one day post discharge due to persistent headache. She described the headache as similar to her prior preeclampsia headache, feeling "like a grip around" her entire head. Her initial vital signs were as follows: blood pressure 172/92 mmHg, pulse 81, respiratory rate 18, and oxygen saturation 99% on room air. A physical exam revealed a woman in pain but nontoxic appearing. Her heart and lung sounds were normal. Her neurological exam was unremarkable with no focal numbness, weakness, or abnormalities with coordination, gait, or cranial nerves. The chest plain film, initial lab, and electrocardiogram results were normal. The patient received one liter intravenous fluids, metoclopramide intravenous, and ketorolac intravenous with minimal improvement and still appeared uncomfortable on multiple reassessments. The patient was placed in the observation unit and a magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) of the brain was ordered. The magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) of the brain showed three punctate regions of focal restricted diffusion in the left middle frontal gyrus, right parietal lobe, and left temporal lobe that appeared consistent with acute infarcts. The image is provided below (Figure ). Neurology was consulted and the patient was admitted to the stroke service. Her stroke workup, which included computed tomography angiography of the head and neck, transthoracic echocardiogram, and a transesophageal echocardiogram, was unremarkable. The differential at that point was narrowed down to vasculitis versus RCVS as the cause of the severe headache associated with acute infarction. Neurosurgery was consulted and an angiogram was performed, showing evidence of RCVS in the middle cerebral artery, M1 segment, and distal middle cerebral artery territories as well as the right posterior cerebral artery and distal anterior cerebral artery. Dual antiplatelet therapy with aspirin and clopidogrel was initiated and the patient was discharged to follow up with the stroke clinic and her primary care provider.

title: pmc-6003897-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-6003897-1
主要诊断：肺腺癌伴多发转移
病例摘要：一名71岁的男性因疑似肺癌被转诊至我院。计算机断层扫描(CT)显示右中叶原发肿瘤及淋巴结转移（右肺门、气管分叉和左侧颈部）、脑部、双侧肾上腺和骨骼的转移（图）。左颈淋巴结穿刺活检病理检查明确显示为腺癌。免疫组化结果显示角蛋白7和甲状腺转录因子1(TTF-1)阳性，角蛋白20阴性。因此，我们确诊为肺腺癌伴多发转移。根据TNM分类，其肺癌分期为IVB期（T2a N3 M1c）。该患者接受了卡铂、紫杉醇和贝伐珠单抗的化疗。一个月后，他在来院接受预定的化疗时出现右下腹痛。虽然白细胞计数在正常范围内，但其血清C反应蛋白水平明显升高至11.67 mg/dL。增强CT检查显示阑尾肿大及近端阑尾周围积液（图）。诊断为急性阑尾炎，并立即进行了腹腔镜阑尾切除术。手术中观察到肿大的阑尾和脓性积聚（图）。腹腔镜检查未发现其他转移灶（如阑尾肿瘤或腹膜播散）。苏木精-伊红染色组织病理学分析显示阑尾内浸润性腺癌侵犯黏膜、肌层和肌层。TTF-1免疫组化阳性表明阑尾转移来自肺腺癌，而非原发性阑尾恶性肿瘤（图）。术后恢复顺利，在术后第7天出院。其肺科医生在手术后继续进行连续化疗。

metadata.original_text: A 71-year-old man was referred to our hospital from his primary physician because of suspected LC. Computed tomography (CT) revealed a primary tumor in the right middle lobe and metastases in the lymph nodes (hilum of the right lung, bifurcation of the trachea, and left side of the neck), brain, both adrenal glands, and bones (Fig. ). Pathological examination of a needle biopsy of the left cervical lymph node clearly revealed adenocarcinoma. Immunohistological findings showed positive staining of cytokeratin 7 and thyroid transcription factor 1 (TTF-1) and negative staining of cytokeratin 20. Therefore, we definitively diagnosed pulmonary adenocarcinoma and multiple metastases. His LC was categorized as stage IVB (T2a N3 M1c) according to the TNM classification []. This patient received chemotherapy with carboplatin, paclitaxel, and bevacizumab. One month later, he presented with right lower quadrant pain when he visited our hospital to receive his scheduled chemotherapy. His serum level of C-reactive protein was clearly increased at 11.67 mg/dL, although his white blood cell count was within the normal range. Enhanced CT findings showed an enlarged appendix and fluid collection near the distal appendix (Fig. ). A diagnosis of AA was made, and laparoscopic appendectomy was promptly performed. A swollen appendix and pus collection were clearly observed during surgery (Fig. ). Laparoscopic survey of the abdominal cavity revealed no additional metastases (e.g., appendiceal tumor or peritoneal dissemination). Histological analysis by hematoxylin eosin staining revealed invasive adenocarcinoma in the appendix that infiltrated the mucosal, submucosal, and muscular layers. Positive immunostaining of TTF-1 indicated that the appendiceal metastasis was from pulmonary adenocarcinoma, not a primary appendiceal malignancy (Fig. ). The postoperative course was uneventful, and the patient was discharged on postoperative day 7. The patient’s pulmonary internist resumed continuous chemotherapy after surgery.

title: pmc-6004088-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-6004088-1
病例摘要：我们的患者是一位19岁的初产妇希腊潘诺克女性，最近被诊断为遗传性抗凝血酶（AT）缺乏症。她之前因有两次早期妊娠丢失的历史而进行了血栓形成倾向测试。她没有深静脉血栓（DVT）的病史，但她的母亲在年轻时曾患有产后DVT。她的基本筛查结果正常：蛋白C、游离蛋白S、AT、激活蛋白C（APC）耐受性、狼疮抗凝物、FV莱登突变、因子II（FII）G20210A突变、空腹血清同型半胱氨酸、抗心磷脂抗体、抗β-2糖蛋白1（抗b2 GP1）抗体；然而，她的AT活性为51%（正常范围70–120%；荧光液相抗凝血酶；Instrumentation Laboratory, 米兰，意大利）。她的母亲和三个兄弟姐妹中的两个也被发现有AT缺乏症，因此诊断为遗传性杂合子AT缺乏症。由于没有进行AT抗原测试，我们无法将该病分类为I型或II型缺乏症。在确诊三个月后她再次怀孕。鉴于这种疾病胎儿-母体并发症的高发率以及患者的流产史，我们决定在整个孕期使用调整剂量的低分子量肝素（LMWH）进行管理。她每月通过检测D-二聚体、AT活性和抗-Xa测量值（荧光液相抗-Xa，单阶段荧光液相测定法；Instrumentation Laboratory, 米兰，意大利）进行监测。在调整锡扎帕林剂量后，使用荧光液相抗-Xa活性测定，她继续以每日14,000 IU的剂量皮下注射。在此剂量下，怀孕前6个月的峰值抗-Xa活性范围为0.46至0.79 IU/ml，这与她的体重50公斤不成比例。这被认为是AT缺乏症患者中已知的肝素耐药现象所致。在妊娠晚期，抗-Xa活性下降，范围为0.23至0.45 IU/ml。提高肝素剂量的努力未能显著增加抗-Xa活性，反而进一步降低了AT水平；因此我们恢复了14,000 IU的剂量。在整个孕期中，D-二聚体保持在较低水平（93–317 μg/L），AT从第28周前为33–35%，之后上升至46–57%。她的怀孕过程顺利。由于胎儿臀位，在妊娠第39周安排了剖宫产手术。最后一次锡扎帕林剂量在手术前24小时给予。分娩前，AT活性为54%。为了克服血栓形成的风险，分娩前3小时她接受了Kybernin P（人源性AT III浓缩物；CSL Behring）预防性注射，剂量为3000 IU，静脉注射，根据当前推荐的计算方法如下：浓缩剂量 = (120% - 当前AT(%)) × 体重(kg) / 1.4。她接受了全身麻醉，并在8小时后以常规剂量4500 IU皮下注射了锡扎帕林。她顺利分娩了一个健康、体重2610克的小于胎龄男婴，该婴儿一年后检测AT水平正常。剖宫产过程中和之后没有出现增加的出血情况。输注后的2小时内她的AT水平为112%，第二天的谷值为65%。在每次给予AT前测量功能AT水平，并通过使用初始AT剂量的大约66%或2000 IU来维持其在60至100%之间。我们计划根据各种文献数据给药6天，但由于她在第五次剂量后出现过敏反应，因此AT治疗持续了4天。之后，由于她出现了过敏反应，AT被停止使用，并将锡扎帕林增加到先前的每日14,000 IU剂量。她在分娩后6天内没有并发症并出院，在产后继续每天接受4500 IU的锡扎帕林治疗6周。

metadata.original_text: Our patient was a 19-year-old primigravida Greek Pomak woman who was recently diagnosed as having hereditary AT deficiency. She had been previously referred for thrombophilia testing, due to a history of two first trimester pregnancy losses. She had no history of deep vein thrombosis (VTE), but her mother had suffered from postpartum VTE at a young age. Her basic screening for thrombophilia was normal: protein C, free protein S, AT, activated protein C (APC) resistance, lupus anticoagulant, FV Leiden, factor II (FII) G20210A mutation, fasting serum homocysteine, anticardiolipin antibodies, anti-beta-2 glycoprotein 1 (anti-b2 GP1) antibodies; however, she showed an AT activity of 51% (normal range 70–120%; chromogenic Liquid Antithrombin; Instrumentation Laboratory, Milano, Italy). Her mother and two out of three of her siblings were also found to have AT deficiency, so a diagnosis of hereditary heterozygous AT deficiency was established. AT antigen testing was not available so we cannot classify the disorder as type I or II deficiency. Three months after diagnosis she was pregnant again. We decided to manage her with adjusted dose of low molecular weight heparin (LMWH) throughout pregnancy due to the high incidence of fetomaternal complications in this disorder and our patient’s history of miscarriages. She was monitored monthly with d-dimers, AT activity, and anti-Xa measurements (liquid anti-Xa, one-stage chromogenic assay with no exogenous AT; Instrumentation Laboratory, Milano, Italy). After titrating tinzaparin dose, using chromogenic anti-Xa activity, she continued with a daily dose of 14,000 IU applied subcutaneously. With this dose the peak anti-Xa activity ranged between 0.46 and 0.79 IU/ml during the first 6 months of pregnancy, which was in great discordance with her body weight of 50 kg. This was attributed to the well-known heparin resistance phenomenon in patients with AT deficiency. During the last trimester anti-Xa activity dropped and ranged between 0.23 and 0.45 IU/ml. An attempt to raise the heparin dose did not result in significant increase in anti-Xa, but further decreased the AT levels; so we resumed the 14,000 IU dose. Throughout pregnancy d-dimers were low (93–317 μg/L) and AT was 33–35% until the 28th week, rising to 46–57% thereafter. Her pregnancy was uneventful. A cesarean section was scheduled at the 39th week due to breech presentation of the fetus. The last tinzaparin dose was given 24 hours before surgery. Prior to delivery, AT activity was 54%. In order to overcome the risk of thrombosis, 3 hours before delivery she received Kybernin P (human AT III concentrate; CSL Behring) prophylactically at a dose of 3000 IU intravenously administered, calculated according to current recommendations as follows: concentrate dose = (120% − current AT(%)) × body weight (kg) divided by 1.4. She proceeded to have general anesthesia and received tinzaparin subcutaneously 8 hours later at the conventional dose of 4500 IU. She delivered a healthy, 2610 g weight, small for gestational age male baby, who was also tested a year later and was found to have normal AT levels. There was no increased bleeding during and after caesarean section. Her AT level 2 hours after infusion was 112% and trough level the next day was 65%. Functional AT levels were measured daily prior to each dose of AT and levels were maintained between 60 and 100% by using approximately 66% of the initial AT dose or 2000 IU. We planned to administer AT for 6 days, according to various literature data, but in total she received AT for 4 days because she developed an allergic reaction after the fifth dose, so AT was discontinued and tinzaparin increased at the prior dose of 14,000 IU/day. She was discharged 6 days after delivery without complications and tinzaparin 4500 IU daily was continued for 6 weeks postpartum.

title: pmc-6004287-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-6004287-1
主要诊断：破伤风和伴发的T1LR
病例摘要：一名56岁的中国汉族女性于2016年因左上肢出现红色斑块并伴有疼痛两天，吞咽时有异物感三天而就诊于上海皮肤病医院。患者有6年的麻风病史。她在2011年被诊断为BB，并接受了为期一年的多药疗法（MDT），即每月口服利福平600毫克和氯法齐明300毫克；每日口服对氨基苯砜100毫克和氯法齐明50毫克，结果在2012年临床治愈。最初考虑为T1LR，随后给予甲基泼尼松龙口服治疗，剂量为每天20毫克。两天后，患者的症状加重，伴有颈部肌肉紧张、张口困难，并且左上肢的红色斑块扩散至大部分区域。体格检查显示患者血压和脉搏正常，体温37.8°C，但有呼吸急促的表现。面部表情表现为苦笑面容和牙关紧闭，嘴角向上向外牵拉，说话困难。患者的腹部肌肉过于紧张无法触及肝脏和脾脏。颈部及四肢持续僵硬，并伴有角弓反张和间歇性阵发性痉挛。左上肢观察到麻醉性红色斑块（图）。双侧尺神经和右侧腓总神经增粗并有压痛，患者出现右足下垂、右小腿伸肌萎缩以及右脚溃疡。实验室检查显示白细胞计数为12000/mm³（参考值：3690-9160/mm³），中性粒细胞比例81%（参考值：50%-70%）。肝肾功能正常。皮肤刮片在六个不同部位检测到抗酸杆菌，结果从阴性至1+不等。根据患者的病史和临床症状，诊断为破伤风伴发T1LR。患者接受了以下治疗：每日通过500毫升5%葡萄糖生理盐水静脉输注给予10万单位的破伤风抗毒素；每日四次肌肉注射20万单位青霉素；以及每日通过250毫升5%葡萄糖静脉输注给予200毫克氢化可的松。此外，每天肌肉注射10毫克地西泮和50毫克异丙嗪。患者被安置在暗、安静的房间以减少光线刺激并预防痉挛。另外，在口腔放置牙垫以防咬伤舌头。右脚溃疡每日清创后用3%过氧化氢冲洗，并在伤口周围注射2万单位破伤风抗毒素。阵发性肌张力障碍和痉挛强度在5天后开始减轻。12天后，患者病情稳定出院。她在我们的门诊随访并接受MDT及口服泼尼松40毫克/日治疗以预防T1LR共4个月；最终红色斑块和神经痛逐渐消退。

metadata.original_text: A 56-year-old Chinese Han female presented to Shanghai Dermatology Hospital in 2016 with symptoms of erythematous plaques and pain over her left upper limb for 2 days and foreign object sensation in the throat when swallowing for 3 days. The patient had a 6-year history of leprosy. She was diagnosed with BB in 2011 and received multidrug therapy (MDT) (600 mg of rifampin and 300 mg of clofazimine monthly; 100 mg of dapsone and 50 mg of clofazimine daily) for 1 year, resulting in a clinical cure in 2012. T1LR were initially considered, followed by treatment with 20 mg/day of methylprednisolone given orally. Two days later, the patient’s symptoms were aggravated, with neck muscle tension and difficulty in opening her mouth, and the erythematous plaques had spread over most of her left upper limb. On physical examination, the patient had a normal blood pressure and pulse with a temperature of 37.8 °C, but she displayed shortness of breath. Her facial expressions included a wry smile and trismus, with the corners of her mouth pulling outward and upward, and she had difficulty speaking. The patient’s abdominal muscles were too stiff for palpation of the patient’s liver and spleen. Persistent stiffness was found in the neck and four limbs, together with opisthotonus and occasional paroxysmal spasms. Anesthetic erythematous plaques were observed over her left upper limb (Fig. ). The bilateral ulnar nerves and right common peroneal nerve were thickened and exhibited tenderness. The patient exhibited right foot drop, atrophy of the extensor of the right lower leg, and an ulcer on the right foot. Laboratory examinations showed a white cell count of 12 000/mm3 (reference value: 3690–9160/mm3) and neutrophils 81% (reference value: 50–70%). Her liver and renal function tests were normal. Slit skin smears showed the presence of acid-fast bacilli ranging from negative to a score of 1+ at 6 different sites. According to her medical history and clinical symptoms, she was diagnosed with tetanus and BT accompanying T1LR. This patient was given the following: 100 000 IU tetanus antitoxin in a 500-ml 5% glucose-saline intravenous infusion daily; 200 000 U penicillin in an intramuscular injection four times a day; and 200 mg of hydrocortisone in a 250-ml 5% glucose intravenous infusion daily. Additionally, 10 mg/day of diazepam and 50 mg/day of phenergan were given by intramuscular injection. The patient was hospitalized in a dark, quiet room to reduce light stimulation and prevent spasms. In addition, a dental pad was placed in the oral cavity to prevent the patient from biting her tongue. The ulcer on her right foot was debrided every day, followed by rinsing with 3% hydrogen peroxide and injection of 20 000 IU tetanus antitoxin around the wound. The paroxysmal spasticity and intensity of the spasms started to decrease after 5 days. Twelve days later, she was discharged from the hospital in stable condition. She was followed up in our outpatient department and treated with MDT and 40 mg/day of prednisone orally with taper to prevent T1LR for 4 months; the erythematous plaques and neuropathic pain eventually subsided.

title: pmc-6004288-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-6004288-1
病例摘要：一名39岁的意大利男性患者因过去几个月出现头痛和恶心前来就诊。CT和MRI检查显示一个边界不清的肿瘤，大小为39 × 37 × 29毫米（前后×横断面×颅底-颅顶）。在CT上，病变表现为轻微低密度且对比增强不良。在MRI上，在液体抑制反转恢复序列（FLAIR）和T2加权成像中检测到高信号强度。在T1加权成像中，病变显示为低信号。在使用对比剂的T1加权图像中，右侧小脑半球的病变未见对比增强，且无阻塞性脑积水（图）。该患者没有其他合并症；他未曾进行过手术。他不服用任何药物。他从未饮酒、吸烟或使用其他毒品。他已婚，有两个孩子，在一家家族拥有的餐馆工作。他的家族中没有类似病例报告；过去也没有亲属患肿瘤的记录。入院时的神经系统检查未发现感觉运动功能障碍、颅神经功能障碍，反射正常，站立和行走能力也无不稳定现象。血压、脉搏、体温以及实验室检查（包括全血细胞计数、肝功能、肾功能和C反应蛋白）均在正常范围内。手术指征明确，并获得了患者的书面同意。患者在全身麻醉下采取半坐位进行手术，监测使用了体感诱发电位和肌电图。进行了右侧枕下开颅术。术中观察到一个玻璃状灰黑色的肿瘤，与周围组织界限不清。通过显微外科技术（使用Sonoca 300，Söring GmBH，Quickborn，德国）分块切除肿瘤。术后CT检查显示正常，无脑积水和出血。患者在神经外科重症监护病房观察一夜后，第二天转至普通病房，未出现神经系统功能障碍。术后48小时进行的MRI检查未见残留肿瘤。他的术后恢复过程顺利，未接受辅助治疗，在15个月的随访期内也未发现肿瘤复发（图）。最后一次随访15个月后的神经学检查未发现任何神经功能障碍。术前经历的恶心和头痛已停止。在组织病理学检查中，苏木精-伊红染色石蜡切片显示肿瘤以小到中等细胞为主，紧密生长，有时呈弥漫性浸润周围的小脑组织。肿瘤细胞主要含有轻度嗜酸性、有时透明的胞质和圆形至卵圆形的核以及较小的核仁。一些肿瘤细胞显示出星形胶质细胞分化特征。此外，在非脂质区域中约10%的肿瘤区域由灶状脂化细胞组成（图）。未观察到显著的有丝分裂活性，< 1次/20高倍视野，并且没有坏死现象。在免疫组化分析中，NeuN（图）在非脂质细胞中的检测率为80%，synaptophysin（图）在30%的非脂质细胞中检测到。肿瘤细胞对神经丝蛋白呈阴性（图；周围中枢神经系统组织染色阳性），而铬色素A呈阴性。胶质纤维酸性蛋白（GFAP）在20%的肿瘤细胞中观察到（图）。Ki-67/MIB-1增殖指数（图），由核MIB1单克隆抗体染色确定，约为2%（图）。

metadata.original_text: A 39-year-old Italian man presented to our department suffering from headache and nausea over the past months. CT and MRI revealed an ill-defined, 39 × 37 × 29 mm (anterior-posterior×transverse×cranial-caudal) tumor. On CT, the lesion presented as slightly hypointense with poor contrast enhancement. On MRI, a hyperintensity on fluid-attenuated inversion recovery (FLAIR) sequence and on T2-weighted imaging was detected. On T1-weighted imaging, the lesion showed a hypointensity. The lesion showed poor contrast enhancement of the right cerebellar hemisphere without an obstructive hydrocephalus on T1-weighted images with contrast enhancement (Fig. ). Our patient did not suffer from any other comorbidities; he had not undergone any surgeries. He did not use medication. He had never consumed alcohol, smoked tobacco, or used other drugs. He is married, has two children, and works as a cook in a family owned restaurant. Similar cases were not reported in his family; no relatives had suffered from a tumor in the past. Neurological examinations at admission showed no sensorimotor deficits, no cranial nerve deficits, normal response of his reflexes, and normal standing and walking abilities without any unstableness. Blood pressure, pulse, temperature, and laboratory findings (that is, complete blood count, liver function, renal function, and C-reactive protein) were within normal range. Surgery was indicated and written consent was obtained. Surgery was performed under general anesthesia with our patient in a semi-sitting position. Monitoring was done with somatosensory and muscle-evoked potentials. A right-sided suboccipital craniotomy was performed. On intraoperative examination, we observed a glassy gray-black tumor that was not well demarcated from the surrounding tissue. Piecemeal tumor removal was performed by microsurgical technique using the Sonoca 300 (Söring GmBH, Quickborn, Germany). A postoperative CT scan revealed a regular finding without hydrocephalus and hemorrhage. Our patient was observed in our neurosurgical intensive care unit for one night and was transferred to a general ward the following day without neurological deficiency. Postoperative MRI, which was performed 48 hours after surgery, showed no residual tumor. His postoperative course was uneventful. He received no adjuvant treatment and there has been no evidence of tumor recurrence over a period of 15 months (Fig. ). A neurological examination at last follow-up, 15 months after surgery, revealed no neurological deficits. The preoperative nausea and headache he experienced had stopped. On histopathological examination, hematoxylin and eosin-stained paraffin sections showed predominantly small to moderately cellular tumor growing compactly, sometimes diffuse, infiltrating the surrounding cerebellar tissue. Tumor cells contained mainly light eosinophilic, sometimes clear, cytoplasm and round to oval nuclei and smaller nucleoli. Some tumor cells showed an astrocytic differentiation. Furthermore, around 10% of the tumor area comprised focal lipidized cells (Fig. ). No significant mitotic activity, < 1 mitosis/20 high-power field (HPF), and no necrosis were observed. In immunohistochemical analysis NeuN (Fig. ) was detected in 80% and synaptophysin (Fig. ) was detected in 30% of the non-lipomatous cells. Tumor cells were negative for neurofilament (Fig. ; surrounding CNS tissue stained positive) and chromogranin A. Glial fibrillary acid protein (GFAP) was observed in 20% of the tumor cells (Fig. ). Ki-67/MIB-1 proliferation index (Fig. ), as determined by nuclear MIB1 monoclonal antibody staining, was around 2% (Fig. ).

title: pmc-6004679-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-6004679-1
病例摘要：一名60岁的未婚白人男性患有慢性精神分裂症，跌倒在地板上无法起身或行走。检查时发现他有不对称的微笑和左腿明显的瘫痪症状。他因疑似中风被收治入院。从他的亲属处得知，他成长于挪威海岸边的一个村庄，是家中五个兄弟姐妹中的第四位。他在学校表现平平，并从小开始在当地渔业行业工作。30岁时，他搬到了另一个地区，在一家酒店担任管理员。37岁时，他回到家乡与同情的家庭住在一起。此后，他一直从事当地渔业行业的辅助管理工作，直到56岁。从20多岁起，他的精神症状时有发作，直到40岁才被诊断为精神分裂症。之后，他一直在接受门诊精神病治疗，直至本次发病。55岁时，他被诊断出患有2型糖尿病。在本次发病前两个月左右被诊断出骨质疏松症。这是他第一次住院。他的亲属表示，过去4-5年里，他一直有吞咽困难、言语障碍和步态不稳的症状。这些信息得到了其全科医生的证实。在过去3-4个月中，他的身体状况恶化，疲劳加剧。他变得非常懒散，在短暂体力劳动后容易感到疲惫不堪。他出现了嗜睡症状，每晚睡眠时间长达10-12小时，并且体重减轻了4-5公斤，步态不稳。为了下楼梯，他喜欢坐在臀部上滑行，一次一级地滑下楼梯直到到达底层。他有数十年的重度吸烟史。他的饮酒量不多。入院前的主要精神症状包括社会退缩和关于几个小人（大小如玩偶）附着在他身上的妄想。此外，他还出现了听觉和视觉幻觉。他对可能具有命令性质的听觉幻觉内容非常不愿意谈论。1997年开始使用抗精神病药物利培酮片剂治疗。一年后，药物更换为奥氮平片剂。剂量在每天7.5至15毫克之间变化，没有出现客观或主观副作用。也没有明显的锥体外系副作用。体检时，他意识清晰、定向力正常，但左髋和膝关节有轻微疼痛。体温（耳温）37.4°C，血压136/83 mmHg，脉搏规律每分钟82次，血氧饱和度97%。颈动脉听诊未发现杂音。心律规则无脉冲减退，未闻及心脏杂音。肺部检查欠佳，呼吸弱，可能在双侧肺底部听到少量湿啰音。神经系统检查显示快速左右摆动舌头时有运动障碍、构音困难、上肢肌肉力量减弱（5−/4+），左腿肌力减弱（未量化），左侧跟腱反射不对称（右侧下垂，左侧无反应）。入院前的常规药物包括奥氮平片剂12.5毫克/天（7.5毫克 + 5毫克）、二甲双胍片剂每日三次各500毫克、钙/骨化醇片剂每日两次各500毫克/400 IU和对乙酰氨基酚片剂每日两次各500毫克。血液检查结果正常：血红蛋白（Hgb）14.0 g/dL，红细胞比容0.44，白细胞计数8.2 × 109/L，血小板计数275 × 109/L，中性粒细胞计数5.6 × 109/L，淋巴细胞计数1.5 × 109/L，单核细胞计数0.7 × 109/L，嗜酸性粒细胞计数0.4 × 109/L，嗜碱性粒细胞计数<0.1 × 109/L。唯一异常的检查结果来自

metadata.original_text: A 60-year-old white unmarried man with chronic schizophrenia fell to the floor and was unable to get up or walk. When examined he had an asymmetrical smile and apparent paresis of his left leg. He was hospitalized with a tentative diagnosis of stroke. From his relatives we learned that he had grown up in a village on the Norwegian coastline as the fourth of five siblings. He did not excel at school, and started at an early age to work in the local fishing industry. He held the job until at the age of 30 he moved to another part of the country. There he worked as a custodian at a hotel. At age 37 he went back to his home village to live close to his compassionate family of origin. He was then employed as an assistant custodian (supported employment) in the local fishing industry until he was 56-years old. He was treated for psychotic symptoms on-and-off from his mid-twenties. He was not diagnosed as having schizophrenia until he was 40-years old. Since then he received out-patient psychiatric treatment until the present illness occurred. At the age of 55, diabetes mellitus type 2 was diagnosed. Osteoporosis was diagnosed 2–3 months prior to the present illness. This was the first time he had been hospitalized. His family members said that he had had swallowing problems, difficulties with speech, and unsteady gait for the last 4–5 years. This information was corroborated by our patient’s general practitioner. He had deteriorated physically over the last 3–4 months with increased fatigue. He had developed general inertia and was easily exhausted after a short period of physical labor. He had developed hypersomnia, with 10–12 hours of sleep per night, a weight loss of 4–5 kg, and an unsteady gait. To descend the stairs he preferred to sit on his buttocks and slide down the staircase one step at a time until reaching the lower floor. He had been a heavy tobacco smoker for several decades.
