title: pmc-6006788-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-6006788-1
病例摘要：患者为57岁女性，居住在泰国北部纳农省的昌克朗区。她是一名园丁，从未出国，仅前往过泰国纳农附近的phisit和phijit府旅行。该患者于2014年5月因左脸颊出现单个皮肤结节（1.0 × 1.5 cm）以及左侧嘴角脱屑前来昌克朗医院就诊。未在身体其他部位观察到皮肤结节。来自脸颊结节的两块甲醛固定的皮肤活检组织（尺寸分别为0.6 × 0.5 × 0.4 cm³和0.5 × 0.5 × 0.2 cm³）被送往昌甲医学院病理学系进行组织病理学检查。组织病理学分析显示表皮溃疡伴真皮慢性炎症严重，且存在大量细胞内圆形或椭圆形小体，呈利什曼原虫的amastigotes形态（1-2 μm宽和2-4 μm长）。一周后，从结节处采集了一块新鲜皮肤活检组织（尺寸为0.4 × 0.5 × 0.3 cm³），送往昌甲医学院寄生虫学系进行病原体培养及种属鉴定。该皮肤活检样本在Schneider’s昆虫培养基中补充20%胎牛血清和每毫升50国际单位青霉素、50 μg/ml链霉素的条件下于25°C培养。3天后观察到活动性前鞭毛虫，因此确诊为皮肤利什曼病。患者接受了口服两性霉素B治疗，剂量为1 mg/kg/天，持续1天，并接受氟康唑200 mg/天治疗45天。治疗6个月后，皮肤病变完全消失（图）。术前实验室检查显示仅有轻度贫血，血红蛋白浓度为10.9 g/dl，白细胞计数为7700个/mm³，血小板计数为483,000个/mm³。未见肝脾肿大或可触及的淋巴结。未进行肝脏功能检查，肾功能正常且HIV抗体检测呈阴性。患者拒绝进行骨髓活检以评估内脏利什曼病。她没有报告其他潜在疾病、常规用药或其他症状，并且总体健康状况良好。

metadata.original_text: The patient was a 57-year-old woman who lives in Chiang Klang District, Nan Province, northern Thailand. She is a gardener and has never been abroad, only travelling to Phitsanulok and Phijit, provinces near Nan in Thailand. The patient presented in May 2014 at Chiang Klang Hospital with a single skin nodule on her left cheek (1.0 × 1.5 cm), and also with crusting at the left angle of the mouth (Fig. ). No skin nodules in other sites of the body were observed. Two pieces of formalin-fixed skin biopsy from the cheek nodule (0.6 × 0.5 × 0.4 cm3 and 0.5 × 0.5 × 0.2 cm3) were sent to the Department of Pathology, Faculty of Medicine, Chiang Mai University for histopathological investigation. Histopathological analyses revealed epidermal ulceration with a heavy, chronic inflammation of the dermis (Fig. ) and numerous intracellular small round or oval-shaped bodies, with the appearance of amastigotes (1–2 μm in width and 2–4 μm in length) of Leishmania spp. (Fig. ). A week later, a fresh skin biopsy from the nodule (0.4 × 0.5 × 0.3 cm3) was collected and sent to Department of Parasitology, Faculty of Medicine, Chiang Mai University for confirmation of diagnosis by parasite culture and species identification. The skin biopsy sample was cultured in Schneider’s insect medium supplemented with 20% foetal bovine serum (FBS) and 50 International Units penicillin/ml, 50 μg/ml streptomycin at 25°C. Motile promastigotes were first observed on day 3 of the culture. Therefore, the patient was confirmed as diagnosed with cutaneous leishmaniasis. She was treated with oral amphotericin B at 1 mg/kg/day for 1 day and fluconazole at 200 mg/day for 45 days. The skin lesion had disappeared completely by six months after treatment (Fig. ). Pre-treatment laboratory investigation showed only mild anaemia with a haemoglobin concentration of 10.9 g/dl, white blood count of 7700 cells/mm3, and platelet count of 483,000/mm3. There was no hepatosplenomegaly or palpable lymph nodes. Liver function was not investigated, renal function was within normal limits and HIV serology was negative. The patient declined a bone marrow biopsy for evaluation of visceral leishmaniasis. She did not report any other underlying disease, routine drug use, or any other symptoms, and in general was in a good state of health.

title: pmc-6006841-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-6006841-1
病例摘要：一位85岁的日本男性，有鼻腔恶性黑素瘤的病史，因严重的甲状腺功能亢进和血糖控制不佳前来我部门就诊。他之前因桥本氏病引起的甲状腺功能减退症以及2型糖尿病接受过胰岛素自我注射治疗，并在治疗恶性黑素瘤前进行了鼻腔手术，随后接受了四次计划中的纳武单抗疗法。之后，在纳武单抗治疗后给予了两次标准的伊匹木单抗疗程作为第三种治疗方法。在接受双疗程伊匹木单抗治疗两周后，他出现了疲劳、恶心和出汗的症状，并进展为临床和生化甲状腺功能亢进。入院时，他的体温为38.0°C，心率加快，烦躁不安且急性焦虑但仍然意识清醒（躁动）。格拉斯哥昏迷量表评分为14/15。血压降至70/50 mmHg。体格检查显示弥漫性甲状腺肿大而无突眼。腹部柔软、无压痛，皮肤温暖湿润。他还出现多汗、颈静脉充盈和周围水肿，胸部听诊清晰。他的既往病史包括62岁时因桥本氏病诊断为甲状腺功能减退症，并接受甲状腺激素替代治疗；以及通过自我注射胰岛素治疗的2型糖尿病，血糖控制良好。他有家族性甲状腺疾病和糖尿病史。心电图显示显著的心动过速伴房颤，但胸部X光片正常。实验室数据见表 。实验室检查结果显示以下甲状腺功能指标：促甲状腺激素（TSH）低于敏感度，游离三碘甲腺原氨酸（FT3）31.7 pg/ml，游离四碘甲腺原氨酸（FT4）3.43 ng/dl。值得注意的是，他的甲状腺球蛋白升高至48,000 IU/ml。促甲状腺激素受体抗体为阴性，并且99mTc标记的甲状腺扫描显示摄取显著减少（Tc保留指数-摄取比值0.0%；正常范围0.4–3.0）。他的血糖明显升高，因此我们需要增加胰岛素剂量以控制血糖。进一步的免疫学检查结果显示谷氨酸脱羧酶抗体（GAD）、胰岛细胞瘤抗原2抗体（IA-2）和胰岛自身抗体（IAA）的血清水平均正常。根据日本甲状腺协会甲状腺风暴的诊断标准[1]，他被诊断为甲状腺风暴1型（TS1），明确的甲状腺风暴，因为他有甲状腺功能亢进、中枢神经系统症状（躁动）、发热（38°C）、胃肠道症状（恶心、呕吐）和房颤时的心率加快（135次/分钟）。根据Burch和Wartofsky甲状腺风暴的诊断标准[2]，他的得分为60；得分高于45提示甲状腺风暴。Graves病的可能性较小，因为促甲状腺激素免疫球蛋白在正常范围内，并且99mTc显像显示摄取较低。这些结果表明他甲状腺风暴的诊断是由于破坏性甲状腺炎所致。他的临床过程见图 。他接受了静脉注射胰岛素输注和静脉液体治疗。最初，甲状腺风暴用口服碘化钾（每6小时50 mg）治疗，并使用短效β-肾上腺素受体阻滞剂拉尼洛尔盐酸盐以4–10 μg/kg/分钟的剂量控制心率。当他被诊断为兴奋性甲状腺炎时，停止了碘化钾的使用。第11天给予泼尼松龙作为免疫相关不良事件和甲状腺风暴的治疗，剂量为每天0.5–0.7 mg/kg。尽管先前的研究建议泼尼松龙的最佳剂量为每天1–2 mg/kg[3]，但由于合并且未控制的糖尿病，我们使用了较低的剂量。到第5天，心动过速已解决，并停止了拉尼洛尔盐酸盐的使用。

metadata.original_text: An 85-year-old Japanese man with a history of malignant melanoma of the nasal cavity presented to our department with severe thyrotoxicosis and poor blood glucose control. He had been treated for hypothyroidism secondary to Hashimoto’s disease and type 2 diabetes mellitus with insulin self-injection therapy before undergoing treatment of malignant melanoma. A surgical operation of his nasal cavity was done at first, followed by one of four planned cycles of nivolumab therapy. Subsequently, two courses of ipilimumab were given as standard therapy after nivolumab therapy. Two weeks later after receiving a dual course of ipilimumab as a third treatment, he presented with a fatigue, nausea, and sweating, which progressed to clinical and biochemical thyrotoxicosis. On admission to our hospital, he was febrile with a temperature of 38.0 °C, tachycardic, agitated, and acutely anxious but still conscious (restlessness). His Glasgow Coma Scale score was 14/15. His blood pressure had decreased to 70/50 mmHg. His physical examination revealed a diffuse goiter without exophthalmoses. His abdomen was soft and non-tender and his skin was warm and wet. He was also diaphoretic with jugular venous distension and peripheral edema, and his chest was clinically clear. His medical history included hypothyroidism due to Hashimoto’s disease, diagnosed at 62 years of age and treated with thyroid hormone replacement, as well as type 2 diabetes mellitus treated by self-injection of insulin with a good glycemic control. He had both family histories of thyroid diseases and diabetes. An electrocardiogram showed marked tachycardia with atrial fibrillation, but a chest radiograph was normal. The laboratory data are shown in Table . Laboratory investigation revealed the following thyroid function results: thyroid-stimulating hormone (TSH) below sensitivity, free triiodothyronine (FT3) 31.7 pg/ml, and free thyroxine (FT4) 3.43 ng/dl. Remarkably, his thyroglobulin was elevated to 48,000 IU/ml. TSH receptor antibody was negative, and a 99mTc-labeled thyroid scan revealed a markedly decreased uptake (Tc retention index-uptake ratio 0.0%; normal range 0.4–3.0). His blood glucose was markedly elevated; in which case, we needed to increase the amount of insulin to control his blood glucose. Further immunological investigation revealed normal serum levels of anti-glutamic acid decarboxylase (GAD) antibody, anti-insulinoma antigen 2 (IA-2) antibody, and insulin autoantibody (IAA). According to the diagnostic criteria of the Japan Thyroid Association for thyroid storm [], he was diagnosed as having thyroid storm 1 (TS1), definite thyroid storm, since he had thyrotoxicosis, a central nervous system symptom (restlessness), fever (38 °C), GI symptoms (nausea, vomiting), and tachycardia (135 beats per minute) in atrial fibrillation. Based on the diagnostic criteria of Burch and Wartofsky for thyroid storm, he scored 60; a score higher than 45 is suggestive of thyroid storm []. Graves’ disease was less likely as thyroid-stimulating immunoglobulin was within the normal range, and 99mTc-scintigraphy revealed a quite low uptake. These results indicated that his diagnosis of thyroid storm was due to destructive thyroiditis. His clinical course is shown in Fig. . He was treated with an intravenously administered insulin infusion and intravenously administered fluid therapy. At first, the thyroid storm was treated with orally administered potassium iodide (50 mg every 6 hours) and a short-acting beta-adrenoreceptor blocker, landiolol hydrochloride, was used at 4–10 μg/kg per minute to control his heart rate. The potassium iodide was aborted when he was diagnosed as having distractive thyroiditis. Prednisolone was given at 0.5–0.7 mg/kg per day as a treatment for irAE and thyroid storm. Although previous reports suggested the optimum dosage of prednisolone to be 1–2 mg/kg per day [, ], we used a lower dose due to the coexisting and uncontrolled diabetes mellitus. 病例标题：pmc-6006860-1
主要诊断：急性创伤性心肌梗死
病例摘要：一名20岁女性患者因胸部被棒球击中后2小时出现严重而钝痛的胸骨后疼痛和呼吸困难前来我院就诊。受伤立即后，她短暂失去意识但没有抽搐发作。症状持续了半小时并自行缓解。生命体征显示血压为95/64 mmHg，心率为70次/分钟。未见胸部穿透伤。心电图（ECG）显示窦性心律、V2至V3导联QS波群、V2至V5导联ST段抬高和T波倒置（图）。实验室检查显示肌钙蛋白I水平为19.03 ng/ml（正常范围<0.01 ng/ml）。胸部计算机断层扫描（CT）未见创伤性损伤，但发现冠状动脉钙化（图）。其父母回忆起5岁时有持续数天的高热病史。患者因急性创伤性心肌梗死被收入我院。入院后12小时，血清肌钙蛋白I峰值为20.3 ng/ml，肌酸激酶(CK)为1237 U/L，CK-MB为101 U/L。入院时血清脑钠肽(BNP)水平正常，为85.9 pg/ml。住院期间，连续心电图变化与进行性心肌梗死一致。Holter监测显示频繁的室性期前收缩。经胸超声心动图显示左心室大小正常，轻微前壁运动减弱。值得注意的是，在左前降支(LAD)动脉近端检测到多个直径为7.5至8.5 mm的巨大瘤样扩张（图），并伴有缓慢血流速度。为了进一步评估冠状动脉夹层动脉瘤(CAA)，我们进行了对比增强冠状动脉CT血管造影(CTA)，并进行三维重建冠状动脉。近端LAD动脉环形钙化、多个瘤样扩张、血栓和闭塞被可视化（图）。CTA还显示左前降支(LAD)动脉存在串珠样瘤样扩张的多发性瘤样扩张（图）。抗核抗体(ANA)轻微阳性（1:10），意义不明。C3（0.864 g/L）、C4（0.912 g/L）、CRP（<1.0 mg/L）、ASO（<25 IU/ml）、血沉（15 mm/h）、类风湿因子（<25 IU/ml）和ANCA均在正常范围内。这些结果似乎不支持活动性血管炎、风湿性疾病或免疫学疾病。根据典型的影像学表现及儿童期发热史，我们认识到患者潜在的冠状动脉结构异常最可能是川崎病所致。考虑到稳定的血流动力学参数以及LAD动脉多发巨大瘤样扩张，我们对该年轻患者采取保守治疗策略，包括至少1年的双重抗血小板治疗（阿司匹林和氯吡格雷），并调整卡托普利和美托洛尔以预防心室重构。2个月随访时，患者无症状。心电图仅在V2和V3导联显示QS波群，其他异常均已消失（图）。超声心动图显示左心室舒张末径为48 mm，LAD动脉血流速度正常，未见心室扩张或运动减弱。两年后，患者仍无症状。

metadata.original_text: A 20-year-old female patient presented to our hospital with a history of severe and dull substernal chest pain and breathlessness after being hit by a baseball to her chest 2 h ago. Immediately after being hit, she had an episode of syncope briefly without convulsion. The symptoms lasted for half-an-hour and resolved spontaneously. Her vital signs showed blood pressure of 95/64 mmHg and pulse of 70 beats/minute. There was no sign of chest wall penetrating injury. Electrocardiogram (ECG) revealed sinus rhythm with QS complexes in leads V2 to V3, ST segment elevation and T-wave inversion in leads V2 to V5 (Fig. ). Laboratory tests showed cardiac Troponin I level of 19.03 ng/ml (normal range < 0.01 ng/ml). Chest computer tomography (CT) revealed no traumatic injury but demonstrated coronary artery calcifications (Fig. ). Her parents recalled a history of high fever lasting for several days at the age of 5-year-old. The patient was admitted to our hospital diagnosed of acute traumatic MI. Serum Troponin I was peaked to 20.3 ng/ml, creatine phosphokinase(CK) to 1237 U/L and CK-MB to 101 U/L 12 h after admission. Serum BNP level was normal at 85.9 pg/ml on admission. During hospitalization, serial ECG changes were consistent with an evolving MI. She had frequent ventricular premature beats on the Holter monitor. Trans-thoracic echocardiography revealed normal left ventricular size and mild anterior hypokinesis. Notably, multiple giant left anterior descending (LAD) aneurysms with diameters from 7.5 to 8.5 mm (Fig. ) and slow flow velocity were detected. To further assess CAA, we performed contrast enhanced coronary artery computer tomography angiography (CTA)with three-dimensional (3-D)reconstruction of coronary arteries. A ringed calcification in the proximal portion of LAD artery with multiple aneurysms, thrombi and occlusions were visualized (Fig. ). CTA also demonstrated multiple aneurysms with beads-on-string appearance in the LAD artery (Fig. ). Antinuclear antibody (ANA) was minimally positive (1:10) with unknown significance. Serum levels of C3 (0.864 g/L), C4 (0.912 g/L), CRP (< 1.0 mg/L), ASO (< 25 IU/ml), ESR (15 mm/h), Rheumatoid Factor (< 25 IU/ml) and ANCA were within normal ranges. Those results did not seem to support active vasculitis, rheumatic or immunologic diseases. Based on the typical images and her childhood fever history, we recognized that the patient’s underlying coronary structural abnormality was most likely originated from KD. Considering stable hemodynamic parameters and multiple giant aneurismal dilatations of LAD artery, we managed this young patient with a conservative strategy including dual anti-platelet treatment with aspirin and clopidogrel for at least 1 year, and titrations of captopril and metoprolol to prevent ventricular remodeling. At the 2-month follow-up, the patient remained asymptomatic. ECG showed QS complex only in V2 and V3 leads and other abnormalities were resolved (Fig. ). Echocardiography revealed left ventricular diastolic dimension of 48 mm, normal LAD artery velocity, and no ventricular dilatation or akinesis. She remained asymptomatic two year later.

title: pmc-6006918-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-6006918-1
病例摘要：我们报告了一例33岁女性患者的病例，她在一次重大正面碰撞的交通事故中未系安全带。她抵达Advocate Christ医疗中心（一家高流量、学术性的一级创伤中心）时无反应，格拉斯哥昏迷量表(GCS)评分为5分，并进行了气管插管以保护气道。双侧呼吸音均存在。心率143次/分钟，血压71/46毫米汞柱，心动过速且低血压。超声检查创伤（FAST）未发现腹腔或心包积液。胸部X光显示左侧血胸，放置了胸管并引流出1200毫升血液（见图）。此时决定紧急将患者送往手术室进行探查。患者仰卧位，在胸腔内进行了左前外侧切口。进入胸腔时发现大量出血，但未见心包填塞。尽管对肺门进行了交叉夹闭，出血仍持续不止。在按照大量输血方案复苏过程中，未检测到二氧化碳分压。打开心包后取出心脏并开始心肺复苏。还发现了心包上部右侧的一个缺陷以及前右房一个3厘米的缺损（见图）。尽管采取了止血和复苏措施，患者仍未能存活。失血量超过6升。

metadata.original_text: We present the case of a 33-year-old female who was an unrestrained driver in a MVC with major front-end damage where airbags were deployed. She arrived to Advocate Christ Medical Center (a high volume, academic, level 1 trauma center) unresponsive with a Glasgow Coma Scale (GCS) of 5 and was intubated for airway protection. Breath sounds were noted to be present bilaterally. She was tachycardic and hypotensive with a heart rate of 143 and blood pressure of 71/46. A focused assessment with sonography for trauma (FAST) demonstrated no evidence of intra-abdominal or pericardial fluid. A left sided hemothorax was present on chest x-ray, and a chest tube was placed with 1200 mL of bloody output initially (See Fig. ). At this point, the decision was made to take patient emergently to the operating room (OR) for exploration. A left anterolateral thoracotomy incision was made with the patient in a supine position. There was a significant amount of blood upon entry into the chest cavity, and there was no cardiac tamponade. Despite cross clamping the pulmonary hilum, the bleeding continued. While being resuscitated with the massive transfusion protocol, there was no end tidal CO2 noted. The pericardium was opened, heart delivered, and cardiac massage was started. A separate defect in the superior, right side of the pericardium was found as well as a 3 cm defect in the anterior right atrium (See Fig. ). Despite measures to control hemorrhage and resuscitate the patient, the patient did not survive. The blood loss was greater than 6 l.

title: pmc-6006918-2
text:
病例标题：pmc-6006918-2
病例摘要：第二例是一名58岁男性，涉及一起高速车祸。患者从车辆中长时间脱困，并在失去意识后被插管。到达现场时其GCS评分为3分。他血压偏低，在进行FAST检查未发现腹腔内出血的情况下，左侧上腹部视图显示有大量左胸腔积血。放置了胸腔引流管，最初引流出900毫升血液，随后每小时200毫升持续2小时。根据引流情况和持续的复苏需求，决定将患者送往手术室。在仰卧位下进行了左侧前外侧胸骨切开术。胸腔内约有1升凝固的血液来自前心包撕裂伤，长约15厘米。通过该缺损处，左房耳部有一个1厘米长的撕裂伤正在快速出血（见图）。损伤部位被清创并用3-0聚丙烯缝线和Satinsky夹进行缝合修复。关闭了心包缺损以防止心脏疝出。患者恢复良好，并最终出院回家。

metadata.original_text: The second case is a 58-year-old male who was involved in a high-speed MVC. The patient had a prolonged extrication from his vehicle and was intubated after being found unresponsive. On arrival his GCS was 3 T. He was hypotensive with FAST negative for intra-abdominal blood, but a large left hemothorax was identified on the left upper quadrant view. A chest tube was placed with initially 900 mL of blood out followed by 200 mL per hour for 2 h. Based on the output and ongoing resuscitation requirements, the decision was made to take the patient to the OR. A left anterolateral thoracotomy incision was made with the patient in supine position. There was approximately 1 L of clotted blood within the chest cavity coming from an anterior pericardial laceration, about 15 cm in length. Through the defect there was brisk bleeding coming from a 1 cm laceration on the left atrial appendage (See Fig. ). The injury was debrided and repaired using a running 3–0 polypropylene suture over a Satinsky clamp. The pericardial defect was closed to prevent cardiac herniation. The patient recovered well and was eventually discharged home.

title: pmc-6006941-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-6006941-1
主要诊断：浆细胞瘤
病例摘要：一名42岁女性由全科医生就诊，口腔检查发现双侧扁桃体增大且右侧略大于左侧，表面未见异常。她接受了两次阿莫西林治疗但未见好转。随后被转诊至耳鼻喉科。她的既往病史无特殊。我们未发现不明原因的颈部淋巴结肿大、显著全身症状、恶性肿瘤或免疫功能低下。所有实验室参数均在正常范围内。腭扁桃体的磁共振成像（MRI）未见明显肿块病变。轴位非对比T1加权（600/8/2 [TR/TE/NEX]）和冠状STIR MRI（5700/80/1）图像显示右侧扁桃体大于左侧，但未见肿块或异常的T2延长（提示肿瘤）。轴位T2加权（4400/100/2）及钆增强T1加权脂肪抑制（550/8/1）图像也未在右侧扁桃体发现肿块。但在增强MRI上，左侧扁桃体显示黏膜隐窝线性强化，而右侧扁桃体的隐窝部分被大肿块遮蔽且无强化（图）。因可能为恶性肿瘤，患者接受了右侧扁桃体的完全手术切除。病理检查结果显示弥漫性的单形浆细胞样细胞，胞质丰富、嗜酸性、细颗粒状，核偏位。偶尔可见双核和多形性细胞，有巨大核和显著的核仁，还观察到分裂象。未见淀粉样物质沉积。免疫组化显示浆细胞弥漫性地对λ轻链（DAKO, Glostrup, Denmark）、IgG（DAKO）及CD43（DAKO）呈阳性反应；部分对上皮膜抗原（DAKO）呈阳性；但对κ轻链（DAKO）、IgA（DAKO）、IgM（DAKO）和CD20（DAKO）呈阴性。额外的免疫组化染色显示细胞对浆细胞标记物CD138、MUM-1及CD56呈阳性。因此，我们诊断为浆细胞瘤（图）。进行了转移工作以寻找多发性骨髓瘤/轻链病。实验室检测未见贫血，血钙、白蛋白、总蛋白和肌酐水平均正常。尿液中缺乏Bence-Jones蛋白。骨骼检查结果为阴性。骨髓活检显示浆细胞<5%，排除了骨浆细胞瘤。未发现单克隆丙种球蛋白病，排除了免疫固定异常。κ/λ比值正常。无需辅助治疗，随访6个月后患者临床无疾病表现。

metadata.original_text: A 42-year-old female was seen by a primary care physician, whose examination of the oral cavity revealed smooth bilaterally enlarged tonsils, with the right tonsil being slightly larger than the left. No surface abnormality was evident. She was prescribed two courses of amoxicillin but did not improve. She was then referred to our otorhinolaryngology department. Her medical history was unremarkable. We found no unexplained cervical lymphadenopathy, no significant systemic symptom, no malignancy, and no immunocompromise. All laboratory parameters were within normal limits. Magnetic resonance (MR) images of the palatine tonsils did not reveal any obvious mass lesion. Axial noncontrast T1 (600/8/2 [TR/TE/NEX]) and coronal STIR MR (5700/80/1) images of the palatine tonsils showed that the right tonsil was larger than the left. No mass or abnormal T2 prolongation (suggestive of a tumor) was evident. An axial T2-weighted image (4400/100/2) and a postgadolinium T1-weighted image with fat saturation (550/8/1) also failed to reveal any mass in the right tonsil, but on postcontrast MRI, the left tonsil showed mucosal crypts with linear enhancement, while on the right side the crypts were partly obliterated by a large mass and did not display enhancement (Fig. ). The patient underwent complete surgical resection of the right tonsil because of a possible malignancy. Histological examination of the specimen revealed diffuse sheets of monomorphous plasmacytoid cells with abundant, eosinophilic finely granular cytoplasm, and eccentric nuclei. Occasional binucleated and pleomorphic cells with giant nuclei and prominent nucleoli were also observed, as were mitotic figures. No amyloid deposition was apparent. Immunohistochemically, the plasma cells were diffusely immunoreactive for the λ light chain (DAKO, Glostrup, Denmark), IgG (DAKO), and CD43 (DAKO); partially positive for epithelial membrane antigen (DAKO); but negative for the κ light chain (DAKO), IgA (DAKO), IgM (DAKO), and CD20 (DAKO). Additional immunohistochemical staining showed that the cells were positive for the plasma cell markers CD138, MUM-1, and CD56. Thus, we diagnosed a plasmacytoma (Fig. ). A metastatic workup was performed to search for multiple myeloma/light chain disease. Laboratory testing revealed the absence of anemia, and the serum calcium, albumin, total protein, and creatinine levels were normal. The urine lacked Bence-Jones protein. The bone survey was negative. Bone marrow biopsy revealed < 5% plasma cells, ruling out plasmacytoma of the bone. No monoclonal gammopathy was evident, precluding an immunofixation disorder. The kappa-to-lambda ratio was normal. No adjuvant treatment was indicated, and the patient remains clinically free of disease after 6 months of follow-up.

title: pmc-6007005-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-6007005-1
病例摘要：一名29岁的男性患者，有9年前接受LRYGB手术的既往病史，因右上腹（RUQ）剧烈、严重的疼痛前来急诊科就诊。疼痛始于两个月前，呈间歇性发作，并偶尔放射至右侧肩部，随着时间的推移逐渐加重。尽管在这些发作期间感到恶心，但患者没有报告便秘、胀气或呕吐。疼痛与任何运动或饮食无关，非处方止痛药可以缓解症状。十年前，该患者因重度肥胖通过睡眠研究被诊断为阻塞性睡眠呼吸暂停（OSA）。他随后接受了LRYGB手术作为治疗。他没有其他医疗问题。家族史中值得注意的是糖尿病和高血压，但无高脂血症或肥胖病史。手术前他的体质指数（BMI）为49.3 Kg/m2。他成功进行了LRYGB手术，没有并发症或再入院。术后一年半，他随访了主刀医生。在此期间，他减重75公斤，达到BMI 26.9 Kg/m2。术后他能够维持体重，但过去两年未继续随访。在这两年中，他的体重增加，BMI升至29.9 Kg/m2，之后他调整饮食以降低BMI到23.9 Kg/m2。这种减重是在本次就诊前实现的。体格检查显示患者无发热，生命体征正常。腹部检查发现上腹、中央和右季肋区有中度压痛，并伴有墨菲氏征阳性。实验室检查包括全血细胞计数、尿液分析、肝肾功能测试均在正常范围内。超声检查发现两个胆囊结石以及胆总管上段直径略增粗，提示可能的胆道梗阻。结合其症状和检查结果，患者被收治入院并计划进行胆囊切除术。第二天早上进行了正式腹腔镜胆囊切除术。在探查过程中观察到共同通道扭转，表明存在内部疝，尽管患者的主诉并未将内部疝纳入鉴别诊断中。通过腹腔镜无法进行疝的复位，随后进行了迷你中线开腹手术以减少疝并进行更详细的检查。疝通过肠系膜缺陷位于消化支和胆胰支之间。识别了两个吻合口，并完成了内部疝的完全复位以及肠系膜发现的缺损缝合。未发现其他缺损。小肠的肠系膜显示有明显的白色血管。观察到白色浓稠液体积聚在右旁结肠沟和莫里森囊中。所有液体均被抽出，总量为752毫升。液体检査显示甘油三酯水平为534 mg/dL，乳酸脱氢酶（LDH）水平为512 U/L。放置了一个标准的布莱克引流管（24 F）。患者术后恢复顺利。在术后第一天，从引流管中收集了440毫升液体，外观呈乳糜状；而在术后第2至第4天，引流液变为清澈。引流管于术后第四天被移除。患者在术后第四天能够独立行走、进食和饮水，并无并发症而出院。患者未返回随访，当团队联系他时，他表示至今没有不适症状。

metadata.original_text: A 29-year-old male, with a known surgical history of LRYGB 9 years ago, presented to the emergency department complaining of sharp, severe abdominal pain in the right upper quadrant (RUQ). The pain began two months ago in an intermittent fashion that would occasionally radiate to his right shoulder and progressively became worse with time. The patient did not report any constipation, distension, or vomiting despite feeling nauseated during these attacks. The pain was not related to any movement or meals and it was moderately relieved by over the counter analgesia. Ten years ago, the patient was diagnosed with obstructive sleep apnea (OSA), through a sleep study, due to morbid obesity. He then was advised to undergo LRYGB as a treatment. He does have any other medical problems. Family history is notable for diabetes mellitus and hypertension but no history of hyperlipidemia or obesity. His body mass index (BMI) prior to the surgery was 49.3 Kg/m2. He underwent a successful LRYGB with no complications or readmissions. After the surgery for a year and a half, he followed up with his primary surgeon. During that time, he lost 75 Kg, reaching a BMI of 26.9 Kg/m2. He then was able to maintain his weight following the operation, but failed to continue to follow up for the past 2 years. In those 2 years, he gained weight, raising his BMI to 29.9 Kg/m2, after which he modified his diet to reduce his BMI to 23.9 Kg/m2. This weight reduction was achieved prior to his presentation. On physical examination, the patient was afebrile with normal vital signs. Examination of his abdomen revealed moderate tenderness over the epigastrium, central abdomen, and right hypochondrium with a positive Murphy’s sign. His laboratory investigations, including complete blood count, urine analysis, liver and renal function tests, were all within normal limits. An ultrasound examination revealed two gallstones and upper borderline diameter of common bile duct, raising the suspicion of biliary obstruction. Correlating his investigation results with his symptoms, he was admitted and scheduled for a cholecystectomy. Formal laparoscopic cholecystectomy was carried out the next morning. During exploration, twisting of the common channel was observed, indicating an internal hernia, although the patient’s complaint did not suggest internal hernia in the differential diagnosis. The internal hernia was identified but reduction was not feasible through laparoscopy. Mini midline laparotomy was subsequently done for reduction of the hernia and more detailed exploration. The hernia was through the mesenteric defect between the alimentary limb and the biliopancreatic limbs. Both limbs of the anastomosis were identified and complete reduction of the internal hernia was done, in addition to suturing of the defect found in the mesentery. No other defects were found. The small intestine’s mesentery showed prominent whitish colored vessels. Whitish thick fluid was noticed, accumulating in the right paracolic gutter and in Morison’s pouch. All of the fluid was then aspirated, measuring a total of 752 mL. Analysis of the fluid showed a triglyceride level of 534 mg/dL and a Lactate Dehydrogenase (LDH) level of 512 U/L. A classic Blake drain 24 F was inserted into the pelvis. The patient passed an uneventful post-operative period. On Postoperative Day (POD) one, fluid collected from the drain was 440 ml, chylous in appearance, while on POD 2–4 the drainage was serous in appearance. The drain was removed on POD 4. The patient was discharged on POD 4 after being able to ambulate independently on his own and eat and drink with no complications. The patient did not return back for his follow-up visits and when he was called by the team, he confirmed that he has no complains up to this day.

title: pmc-6007058-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-6007058-1
病例摘要：一名34岁男性，有15年克罗恩病（CD）病史，因腹痛、非血便腹泻和体重下降入院。体格检查显示中度腹部压痛，并在右下腹发现腹部肿块。实验室检查结果显示C反应蛋白（CRP 7.5 mg/dl）显著升高。结肠镜检查发现巴氏瓣处有溃疡，取得的黏膜活检组织病理学检查提示活动性CD。由于无法进行终末回肠内窥镜检查，进行了磁共振肠造影，结果提示终末回肠存在以炎症为主的短段狭窄。鉴于急性疾病发作和狭窄型表型，将治疗从泼尼松龙和硫唑嘌呤改为抗肿瘤坏死因子（TNF）-α抗体阿达利姆单抗。在诱导使用阿达利姆单抗12周后，临床缓解得到实现，并且C反应蛋白水平恢复正常。又过了4个月，临床缓解仍然维持，实验室炎症标志物仍处于低水平，但患者因下颌区域严重疼痛前往颅面外科就诊。口腔检查发现右侧下颌颊侧黏膜有溃疡性病变（图）。为了排除恶性病变，取了口腔病损的活检，并显示为溃疡性口炎伴有非干酪样肉芽肿，符合口腔CD（图）。通过缩短阿达利姆单抗给药间隔至每周一次来加强免疫抑制治疗。10周后的随访检查确认口腔CD病变完全愈合（图）。在持续治疗的12个月随访期间，在继续治疗下未发现活动性CD的迹象。

metadata.original_text: A 34-year-old man with a 15-year history of Crohn’s Disease (CD) was admitted to our hospital due to abdominal pain, non-bloody diarrhea and weight loss. Physical examination demonstrated moderate abdominal tenderness with an abdominal mass in the right lower quadrant. Laboratory findings revealed a significantly elevated C-reactive protein (CRP 7.5 mg/dl). Colonoscopy with ulcerations localized at the Bauhin’s valve and histological examination of obtained mucosal biopsies were suggestive for active CD. As endoscopic intubation of the terminal ileum was not possible, MR enteroclysis was performed and indicative of a predominant inflammatory, short-segment stenosis of the terminal ileum. Given the acute disease flare and the stricturing phenotype, medical treatment was switched from prednisolone and azathioprine to the anti-tumor-necrosis-factor (TNF)-alpha antibody adalimumab. Twelve weeks after induction of adalimumab therapy, clinical remission was achieved and CRP level returned to normal. Another four months later, clinical remission was still maintained and laboratory inflammation markers remained low, but the patient presented in the clinic for Cranio-Maxillo Surgery due to severe pain in the mandibular area. Examination of the oral cavity detected ulcerative lesions of the buccal-side mucosa of the right mandible (Fig. ). To rule out malignancy, a biopsy of the oral lesions was obtained and revealed ulcerative stomatitis with noncaseating granulomas consistent with oral CD (Fig. ). Intensification of immunosuppressive therapy was initiated by shortening the adalimumab administration interval to weekly administration. A follow-up examination after 10 weeks confirmed complete healing of the oral CD lesion (Fig. ). During a follow-up period of 12 months, no signs of active CD became evident under continued therapy.

title: pmc-6007063-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-6007063-1
病例摘要：一名11岁7个月大的女孩因身材矮小就诊于庆北国立儿童医院。患者通过足月阴道分娩出生，妊娠期为38周；出生时体重2.6公斤，没有围产期问题。然而，她出生时有不完全腭裂和颅缝早闭。在一个月大时，通过脑干诱发电位听力测试首次筛查发现双耳听力损失。出生后进行的“先天性代谢错误”检查显示患有先天性甲状腺功能减退症，患者在当地医院接受左旋甲状腺素治疗直到3岁；停药后确认甲状腺功能正常。当她1岁时，因发育迟缓和不完全腭裂及颅缝早闭的修复而转诊至我院。头部计算机断层扫描显示有听觉缺陷，并根据耳鼻喉科医生的建议佩戴了助听器。患者分别在整形外科和神经外科接受了颅骨重建和不完全腭裂修复手术。因发育语言迟缓，她被安排到儿科神经内科随访，但失访了。当这名患者11岁7个月再次就诊时，身高为124.8厘米（标准差分数[SDS]：-3.6），体重为46公斤（SDS：0.65公斤），体质指数（BMI）为29.53公斤/平方米（Z分数：1.89）。她有特殊的面部特征，包括异常长的眼睑开口、弓形眉、薄上唇和大耳朵（图）。此外，还表现出后天生长迟缓和骨骼畸形，包括不完全腭裂、颅缝早闭和短指症（图）。这些畸形特征及其发育迟缓被认为是Kabuki综合征的迹象。她的核型为46,XX。根据格鲁利奇和皮莱图表，她的骨龄为8岁10个月，被认为延迟。基于这些典型的临床特征，进行了KMT2D和KDM6A基因的突变分析。按照CARE指南报告了该病例，并在获得患者父母知情同意后，经庆北大学支里医院机构审查委员会批准进行了分子分析。从外周血中提取基因组DNA，并使用Illumina Inc.（圣地亚哥，加利福尼亚州）的TruSight One测序面板进行文库制备，该面板富集了12兆碱基对覆盖4813个临床相关基因区域。大规模并行测序在 Illumina NextSeq 平台上进行。序列读数使用Burrow-Wheeler Aligner（版本0.7.12，MEM算法）与hg19参考序列对齐，并使用Picard Tools（版本1.96）去除重复读数。Genome Analysis Toolkit（GATK，版本3.5）进行了局部重新校准和碱基质量重校正，GATK HaplotypeCaller进行了变异检测。变体通过Variant Effect Predictor和AnnoVar注释。使用公共数据库（1000基因组项目、外显子变异服务器和外显子聚合联盟）过滤掉了常见突变（频率≥1%）。进一步使用韩国参考基因组数据库筛选了特定人群的常见突变。患者在KMT2D基因中存在c.8200C > T，p(Arg2734*)无义突变，位于第32外显子。由于通过Sanger测序未发现父母携带此突变，因此该患者为KMT2D基因的新发杂合突变（附加文件：图S1）。我们还进行了其他与Kabuki综合征相关的异常检查。一岁时进行的二维心脏超声、腹部超声和脑磁共振成像均未见异常。眼科检查结果也正常。

metadata.original_text: An 11-year, 7-month-old girl visited the Kyungpook National Children’s Hospital because of a short stature. The patient had been born via vaginal delivery at a gestational age of 38 weeks; she weighed 2.6 kg at birth, and there were no perinatal problems. However, she had an incomplete cleft palate and craniosynostosis at birth. Hearing loss in both ears was detected at the age of 1 month by brainstem-evoked response audiometry during an initial screening test. An ‘inborn errors of metabolism’ workup performed after birth revealed congenital hypothyroidism, for which the patient received levothyroxine at the local hospital until she was 3 years old; normal thyroid function was confirmed after discontinuing the medication. When she was 1 year old, she was transferred to our hospital because of a developmental delay and for a repair of her incomplete cleft palate and craniosynostosis. Brain computed tomography revealed an auditory defect, and she began wearing hearing aids, as prescribed by an otolaryngologist. The patient underwent skull reconstruction and incomplete cleft palate repair at the Departments of Plastic Surgery and Neurosurgery, respectively. She was scheduled for follow-up at the Department of Pediatric Neurology due to her developmental language delay, but she was lost to follow-up. When the patient re-visited our hospital at the age of 11 years and 7 months, she had a height of 124.8 cm (standard deviation score [SDS]: − 3.6), weight of 46 kg (SDS: 0.65 kg), and body mass index (BMI) of 29.53 kg/m2 (Z score: 1.89). She had distinctive facial features, including abnormally long openings between the eyelids, arch-shaped eyebrows, a thin upper lip, and large ears (Fig. ). Moreover, she showed postnatal growth retardation and skeletal anomalies, including an incomplete cleft palate, craniosynostosis, and brachydactyly (Fig. ). These dysmorphic features and her developmental delay were considered suggestive of Kabuki syndrome. Her karyotype was 46,XX. Her bone age was 8 years and 10 months, which was considered delayed according to the Greulich and Pyle atlas []. Based on these characteristic clinical features, mutational analyses for the KMT2D and KDM6A genes were performed. The CARE guidelines were followed in reporting this case, and the molecular analyses were approved by the Institutional Review Board of the Kyungpook National University Chilgok Hospital after obtaining informed consent from the patient’s parents. Genomic DNA was extracted from peripheral blood, and library preparations were performed with the TruSight One Sequencing Panel (Illumina, Inc., San Diego, CA, USA), which enriches a 12 Mb region spanning 4813 genes of clinical relevance. Large-scale parallel sequencing was performed with the Illumina NextSeq platform. Sequence reads were aligned with the hg19 reference sequence using the Burrow-Wheeler Aligner (version 0.7.12, MEM algorithm). Duplicate reads were removed using Picard Tools (version 1.96). Local realignment and base quality recalibration were performed with the Genome Analysis Toolkit (GATK, version 3.5), and variant calling was performed using the GATK HaplotypeCaller. Variants were annotated with the Variant Effect Predictor and AnnoVar. Common variants with minor allele frequencies (≥1%) were filtered out using public databases (1000 Genomes Project, Exome Variant Server, and Exome Aggregation Consortium). Population-specific common variants were further filtered using the Korean Reference Genome Database []. The patient had the nonsense mutation of c.8200C > T, p(Arg2734*) in exon 32 in the KMT2D gene. As neither parent had this mutation, as determined by Sanger sequencing, the patient had a de novo heterozygous mutation in the KMT2D gene (Additional file : Figure S1). We then performed additional examinations to detect other anomalies associated with Kabuki syndrome. Two-dimensional echocardiography, abdominal ultrasonography, and brain magnetic resonance imaging that had been performed at 1 year of age, showed no abnormalities. Ophthalmological findings were also normal. Th

title: pmc-6007364-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-6007364-1
病例摘要：一名43岁男性，有高血压、高尿酸血症、中心性肥胖和双侧腕管综合征的病史，因右腰部间歇性疼痛就诊于全科医生。腹部检查时触及上腹部肿块，其余体格检查正常。进行了腹部CT扫描，显示一个大小为24 × 15 × 13 cm³的部分囊性巨大肿块，位于上腹部区域，介于左肝叶、胃、胰腺和横结肠之间。初步诊断考虑：囊性淋巴管瘤、囊性间皮瘤、非交通型胃底腺癌（GD）和囊性GIST。同时进行的生化检查显示CEA水平升高至281 µg/L，而CA 19-9在正常范围内。MRI最终确诊为非交通型胃底腺癌（GD）。PETCT结果显示肿块后壁有中度代谢摄取，无法区分良性或恶性起源。胃镜检查发现胃体外压迫，黏膜正常。鉴于可能的肿瘤退化和巨大肿块造成的困难，决定进行剖腹手术。在手术过程中，发现一个30 cm长轴的巨大胃底腺癌（GD），沿整个小弯部分并处于紧张状态（图）。切开囊肿后，排出2 L粘液。囊肿腔与胃腔不相通。进行了全胃切除术，并行Roux-en-Y胃空肠吻合术和淋巴结清扫术。病理检查描述为正常胃组织伴非交通型胃底腺癌（GDC），紧邻小弯。空的GDC大小为21 cm × 10 × 9.5 cm（图）。GDC样本显示分泌粘液的上皮细胞，部分区域有溃疡。囊壁增厚且具有纤维和肌肉样特征。胃和GDC中均未发现异型增生或化生。Pancytokeratine免疫标记正常，KI67增殖略有升高。PAS染色显示粘液存在但无印戒细胞。总体而言，18枚取样的淋巴结均为良性。诊断为非交通型胃底腺癌（GDC）且未发生恶性转化。术后恢复顺利，在术后第10天出院。术后6个月随访时患者状况良好。CEA目前为3.06 mg/L。

metadata.original_text: A 43-year-old man with a history of hypertension, hyperuricemia, android obesity and bilateral carpal tunnel, presented at his general practitioner with intermittent pain in right lumbar region. On abdominal examination we palpates an epigastric mass, the rest of the physical examination was normal. A abdominal CT scan was realized and demonstrates the presence of a voluminous mass of 24 × 15 × 13 cm3, partially cystic, located in the epigastric region, between the left lobe of the liver, the stomach, the pancreas and the transverse colon. The differential diagnoses are: cystic lymphangioma, cystic mesothelioma, non-communicating GD and cystic GIST. A biology carried out at the same time an increased CEA level of 281 µg/L, and CA 19-9 being within normal limits. MRI gave a diagnosis of a non-communicating GD (Fig. ). The PETCT showed a moderately hypermetabolic uptake in the posterior wall of the mass, which could not differentiate a benign or malignant origin. Gastric endoscopy showed an extrinsic compression of the gastric body, with a normal mucosa. A decision for laparotomy surgery was made in view of the possible neoplastic degeneration and the difficulties caused by the volume of the mass. During the surgery, a GD of 30 cm of major axis, located along the entirety of the small curvature and under tension was highlighted (Fig. ). The incision of the cyst allowed 2 L of mucus to be evacueted. The lumen of the cyst did not communicate with that of the stomach. We performed a total gastrectomy with a roux-en-y loop oesophago-jejunostomy and a lymphadenectomy. The histological examination described a normal stomach with a GDC without communication and adjacent to the little curvate. The size of the empty GDC was 21 cm × 10 × 9.5 cm (Fig. ). The sample of the GDC showed a mucus-secreting epithelium with some zones of ulceration. The wall was thick and had a fibrous and muscular aspect. No evidence of dysplasia or metaplasia was found in the stomach and neither in the GDC. The immune marking of pancytokeratine was normal and the KI67 proliferation was little elevated. The PAS coloration showed mucus but there was no signet ring cell. Overall, 18 sampled lymph nodes were free of malignancy. The diagnosis was a total GDC with no malignant transformation. The postoperative course was uneventful and, the patient was discharged on the 10-day postoperatively. At 6 months postoperatively the patient is currently well. The CEA is currently at 3,06 mg/L.

title: pmc-6007444-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-6007444-1
病例摘要：一名24岁白人男性因发热和右上腹疼痛前来我院门诊。他有近期上呼吸道感染的历史，已口服氨苄西林治疗。患者还有一年前因巨大嗜铬细胞瘤而进行左侧肾上腺切除、远端胰腺切除及脾脏切除的病史。他的既往病史无其他显著异常。临床检查发现上腹部压痛和颈部淋巴结肿大。超声检查显示胆囊壁增厚，提示急性胆囊炎，未见结石或泥沙样物质（图示）。由于白细胞计数增加、腹痛以及巨大嗜铬细胞瘤的病史，进行了计算机断层扫描(CT)。CT确认了无石性胆囊炎，并显示出全身淋巴结肿大。实验室检查结果显著：白细胞计数23.940/µl（正常范围：4.500-9.500/µl），血小板计数426,000/µl（150,000-400,000），乳酸脱氢酶(LDH) 438 U/l（135-225），天冬氨酸转氨酶(AST) 116 U/l（10-50），丙氨酸转氨酶(ALT) 185 U/l（10-50），γ-谷氨酰转移酶(GGT) 258 U/l（10-71），碱性磷酸酶(AP) 437 U/l（40-129），C反应蛋白(CRP) 10.2 mg/l（<5mg/l）。表总结了住院期间的实验室检查结果。图展示了患者肝功能酶的变化过程。EB病毒包膜抗原(EBV VCA)免疫球蛋白G(IgG)水平升高（39 U/l；正常范围：<0 U/l），而IgM水平正常。嗜异凝集试验显示EB病毒感染IgM抗体阳性。我们进行了巨细胞病毒(CMV) ELISA，结果显示IgG和IgM值均在正常范围内。EBV特异性核抗原(EBNA)抗体为阴性。两周后进行的EBV VCA IgM控制测试显示VCA IgM抗体水平升高。外周血涂片证实了不典型淋巴细胞增多。在接受对症治疗后，患者的状况迅速改善，并在入院第17天时一般情况良好出院。

metadata.original_text: A 24-year-old Caucasian male presented to our outpatient clinic with fever and pain in the right upper abdominal quadrant. He had a history of a recent upper respiratory tract infection, which was treated with oral amoxicillin. The patient also had a history of left adrenal gland resection, distal pancreatectomy, and splenectomy due to a large pheochromocytoma two years earlier. His past medical history was otherwise unremarkable. A clinical examination revealed a tenderness in the epigastric abdomen and a cervical lymphadenopathy. An ultrasound examination revealed a thickened gallbladder wall as a sign of acute cholecystitis without evidence of gallstones or sludge, as shown in Figure . Due to increasing leukocytosis, abdominal pain, and the history of a huge pheochromocytoma, computed tomography (CT) was performed. This confirmed an acalculous cholecystitis and showed a generalized lymphadenopathy. Laboratory values were significant for: white blood cell (WBC) count 23.940/µl (range: 4.500-9.500/µl), thrombocytes 426.000/µl (150.000-400.000), lactate dehydrogenase (LDH) 438 U/l (135-225), aspartate aminotransferase (AST) 116 U/l (10-50), alanine aminotransferase (ALT) 185 U/l (10-50), gamma-glutamyltransferase (GGT) 258 U/l (10-71), alkaline phosphatase (AP) 437 U/l (40-129), c reactive protein (CRP) 10.2 mg/l (< 5mg/l). Table summarizes the laboratory values throughout the hospital stay. Figure presents the course of the patients' liver enzymes. The mononucleosis enzyme-linked immunosorbent assay (ELISA) showed elevated virus capsid antigen (VCA) immunoglobulin G (IgG) levels (39 U/l; range < 0 U/l) and normal VCA immunoglobulin M (IgM) levels. The heterophile antibody test for mononucleosis IgM antibodies was positive. We performed a cytomegalovirus (CMV) ELISA, which showed normal values for IgG and IgM. Epstein-Barr virus (EBV)-specific nuclear antigen (EBNA) antibodies were negative. A VCA IgM control test two weeks later showed elevated VCA IgM antibodies. The peripheral blood smear confirmed atypical lymphocytosis. Under symptomatic therapy, the patient’s state improved rapidly and he was discharged on the 17th day after admission in good general condition.

title: pmc-6007447-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-6007447-1
病例摘要：一名47岁的女性因左上腹痛一天前来急诊科就诊。她报告说，中到重度的腹痛逐渐开始，呈阵发性、持续性，并位于她的左上腹部，放射至下胸部和背部。疼痛伴随出汗、恶心以及多次呕吐非血性和非胆汁性的液体。入院时，生命体征稳定。其全血细胞计数、生化检查和肝功能测试结果均在正常范围内。凝血功能处于亚治疗水平。既往病史包括非缺血性心肌病伴左室血栓以及四次脑血管意外，伴有右侧腿部麻木感。她的情况正在使用华法林进行管理。体格检查显示左侧下肺野有细小的啰音，并且左上腹部有显著压痛。患者报告称，在入院前两天停止服用华法林。心脏磁共振成像（MRI）显示室间隔和心尖部为主的透壁性梗死。超声心动图显示左心室轻度扩大，伴有中到重度的左心室功能不全，射血分数为30%至35%，远端前壁、前间隔和心尖部呈无运动状态，伴轻微的二尖瓣反流。冠状动脉造影结果未见异常。腹部计算机断层扫描（CT）显示轻度的心脏增大，并且在左室前下壁有既往梗死病灶。我们注意到左心室顶部有一个37.47毫米钙化血栓，周围有钙化（图）。还观察到脾脏和右肾的梗死以及双侧肾脏瘢痕形成（图-）。患者最初接受了肝素滴注，并在第三天转换为华法林治疗。经过七天后腹痛完全缓解，出院前强调了药物依从性问题。

metadata.original_text: A 47-year-old woman presented to the emergency department with concerns of left upper abdominal pain for one day. She reported that the moderate to severe abdominal pain had a gradual onset, was crampy, constant, and located in the left upper part of her abdomen radiating to the lower chest and back. The pain was associated with diaphoresis, nausea, and several instances of vomiting non-bloody, non-bilious liquid. On admission, her vitals were stable. The results of her complete blood counts, comprehensive metabolic panels, and hepatic function tests were within reference ranges. Her coagulation profile was at a subtherapeutic level. Her past medical history includes nonischemic cardiomyopathy with left ventricular thrombus and four previous cerebrovascular accidents with residual right leg numbness. Her condition was being managed with warfarin. A physical examination showed fine crackles within the left lower lobe and significant tenderness in the left upper abdomen. The patient reported that she had stopped taking warfarin two days prior to admission. Cardiac magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) showed septal and apical predominantly transmural infarct. A transthoracic echocardiogram showed a mildly dilated left ventricle with moderate to severe left ventricular dysfunction, an ejection fraction of 30% to 35% with distal anterior, anteroseptal, and apical akinesis with mild mitral regurgitation. Cardiac catheterization findings were unremarkable. A computed tomography (CT) scan of her abdomen showed mild cardiomegaly with previous infarction on the anterior-inferior wall of the left ventricle. We noted a 37.47 mm calcified thrombus in the left ventricular apex with peripheral calcifications (Figure ). We also noted infarction in the spleen and right kidney with bilateral renal scarring (Figures -). The patient was initially started on a heparin drip and later bridged to warfarin on the third day. She was discharged with complete resolution of her abdominal pain after seven days, and medication compliance was reinforced before discharge.

title: pmc-6007448-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-6007448-1
病例摘要：一名27岁非洲裔美国男性，既往有哮喘和过敏性鼻炎病史。因不明原因发热三周入院。伴随症状包括夜间盗汗、体重减轻、疲劳、恶心和腹泻。体格检查发现其血流动力学稳定，体温为102°F，并且左侧后颈部淋巴结肿大广泛。实验室检查显示轻度贫血，肝炎面板、抗核抗体（ANA）、人类免疫缺陷病毒（HIV1/HIV2）、莱姆病抗体及传染性单核细胞增多症（IM）血清学检测均为阴性，快速血浆反应素试验（RPR）非反应性，未发现巴贝西虫感染。胸部和腹部的计算机断层扫描（CT）未见异常。颈部超声检查和CT影像显示左侧后颈动脉链区域淋巴结肿大广泛（图示）。在超声引导下进行的淋巴结活检显示出多形性外观，并有局灶性坏死区，以及一部分中等大小的不典型淋巴细胞群，提示为不典型的淋巴增生性疾病。进行了切除活检以排除恶性肿瘤和霍奇金病。病理检查结果显示为组织细胞坏死性淋巴结炎（图示）。组织学、免疫组化及流式细胞术结果均符合组织细胞坏死性淋巴结炎的诊断。进行了包括BCL2、CD2、CD3、CD5、CD7、CD15、CD20、CD30、CD34、CD68、CD117、CD138、EBV、HSV、PAX5、Alk1、CMV、Ki67、角蛋白和S100在内的免疫组化染色。标记有CD68的增生组织细胞对列出的T细胞和B细胞标志物均为阴性。流式细胞术表型分析显示淋巴结中存在混合成熟的T和B淋巴细胞群，其T细胞：B细胞比例正常。未检测到单克隆T或B细胞群体，并且没有急性白血病过程的免疫表型证据。患者接受了布洛芬治疗，在五个月内完全康复。

metadata.original_text: A 27-year-old African American male with a past medical history of asthma and allergic rhinitis presented with a three-week history fever of unknown origin. Associated symptoms included drenching night sweats, weight loss, fatigue, nausea, and diarrhea. On physical examination, he was found to be hemodynamically stable and febrile at 102°F. He was also found to have extensive left sided, posterior, cervical lymphadenopathy. Laboratory studies indicated a mild anemia with negative hepatitis panel, anti-nuclear antibody (ANA), human immunodeficiency virus (HIV1/HIV2), Lyme antibody, and infectious mononucleosis (IM) serology, non-reactive rapid plasma reagin (RPR), and a negative Babesiosis smear. Computed tomography (CT scan) of the chest and abdomen were unremarkable. Ultrasound (U/S) and CT imaging of the neck demonstrated extensive adenopathy throughout the left posterior cervical carotid chain (Figure ). U/S guided lymph node biopsy showed polymorphous appearance with areas of zonal necrosis and a subpopulation of medium-large atypical lymphoid cells suggesting an atypical lymphoproliferative disorder. Excision biopsy was performed to rule out malignancy and Hodgkin disease. Pathology showed histiocytic necrotizing lymphadenitis (Figure ). The histologic, immunohistochemical and flow cytometric findings were consistent with histiocytic necrotizing lymphadenitis. Immunohistochemical stains were performed to include BCL2, CD2, CD3, CD5, CD7, CD15, CD20, CD30, CD34, CD68, CD117, CD138, Epstein–Barr virus (EBV), herpes simplex virus (HSV), PAX5, Alk1, cytomegalovirus (CMV), Ki67, pankeratin, S100. Proliferating histiocytes marked with CD68 were negative for the listed T cell and B cell markers. Phenotypic analysis by flow cytometry revealed a mixed population of mature T and B lymphocytes with normal T cell:B cell ratio for lymph node. Monoclonal T cell or B cell populations were not detected and there was no immunophenotypic evidence of an acute leukemic process. The patient was managed with ibuprofen and fully recovered in five months’ time.

title: pmc-6007497-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-6007497-1
病例摘要：我们报告了一例68岁白种女性的病例，她有多发性合并症：类风湿关节炎（血清阳性）、共同变异免疫缺陷、高血压、甲状腺功能减退和骨质疏松。患者于2013年被诊断为类风湿关节炎。她在2015年5月由她的全科医生进行活检后确诊出现皮肤血管炎。最初她接受了霉酚酸酯、羟氯喹和泼尼松的治疗，症状有所改善。随后泼尼松逐渐减量，但她的关节症状却恶化了，并出现了滑膜炎。因此，她被转为使用甲氨蝶呤治疗。六个月后，由于在使用甲氨蝶呤期间出现脱发且疾病控制不佳，改用来氟米特治疗。几个月后，患者的皮肤病变再次加重。决定开始患者接受阿巴西普治疗。在开始阿巴西普之前，进行了必要的实验室检查和筛查。随后的就诊中，她接受了10 mg/kg剂量的静脉注射阿巴西普，并同时使用来氟米特、羟氯喹和泼尼松进行联合治疗。在接受阿巴西普两周后的复查中，皮肤病变在首次接受阿巴西普后几天内有所消退。四个月后的随访中，患者继续表现出对该疗法的良好反应。随后停用了泼尼松，患者继续使用阿巴西普、羟氯喹和来氟米特。一个月后她再次就诊时，没有出现皮肤病变的复发。

metadata.original_text: We present a case of a 68-year-old Caucasian female known to have multiple comorbidities: seropositive rheumatoid arthritis, common variable immunodeficiency, hypertension, hypothyroidism, and osteoporosis. The patient was diagnosed with rheumatoid arthritis in 2013. She developed cutaneous vasculitis, confirmed by biopsy performed by her primary care physician in May, 2015. She was initially treated with mycophenolate, hydroxychloroquine, and prednisone with initial improvement. The prednisone was tapered off, but she then developed worsening of joint symptoms and synovitis. For this reason, she was switched to methotrexate. Six months later, leflunomide was substituted due to hair loss and inadequate disease control on methotrexate. It was several months later that her cutaneous lesions worsened again. The decision was made to start the patient on abatacept. Arrangements were made with required laboratory testing and screening prior to starting abatacept. On the following visit, the patient was given abatacept 10 mg/kg intravenous infusion with concurrent therapy of leflunomide, hydroxychloroquine, and prednisone. The patient was reevaluated after two weeks of infusion, with clearing of lesions several days after the first dose of abatacept. On her four-month follow-up visit, the patient continued to demonstrate a satisfactory response to this therapy. Prednisone was discontinued, and the patient was kept on abatacept, hydroxychloroquine, and leflunomide. The patient returned to office a month later without any recurrence of her cutaneous lesions.

title: pmc-6007498-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-6007498-1
病例摘要：一名46岁男性患者，有遗传性出血性毛细血管扩张症（HHT）病史，并因主动脉瓣关闭不全接受了主动脉瓣置换手术。他否认接受过精神治疗、服用抗精神病药物、近期拔除智齿或颞下颌关节脱位的病史。在肺移植术后第五天，患者在重症监护病房开始出现下颌疼痛、张口受限以及以口面肌张力障碍形式表现的症状。体格检查显示双侧下颌半脱位，伴有关节盘-髁突复合体再吸收抑制、咀嚼肌收缩、触痛、面部三分之一的肌张力障碍伴关节阻塞和无法进行口腔闭合或侧向运动以及轻微吞咽困难。入院前一小时，由于谵妄亢进，患者接受了2.5毫克氟哌啶醇和0.25毫克利培酮（两次剂量）的治疗。决定进行颅面及脑部CT检查（未使用静脉对比剂）（图），结果显示双侧髁突半脱位至颞窝前方，无骨损伤证据。对患者的镇痛和肌肉松弛进行了处理。随后进行了Nelaton复位手法，并采用消毒技术放置了巴顿绷带。通过CT确认了后临床及影像学复位，显示髁突位置正常。患者在住院期间没有进一步出现半脱位的情况。

metadata.original_text: The case of a 46-year-old male patient with a background of HHT and aortic valve replacement due to aortic insufficiency is presented. He denies having had psychiatrict treatment, consumed antipsychotic drugs, had recent molar extractions or a background of TMJ dislocation. On the fifth day after a lung transplant, in the intensive therapy unit, the patient begins to experience symptoms of mandibular pain, trismus and extrapyramidalism symptoms in the form of oromandibular dystonia. In physical exam he presented signs of bilateral jaw subluxation with reuptake inhibition of the articular condyle–disc complex, contraction at the masticatory muscles level, fascies dolorosa, dystonia of the facial third with articular blocking and incapacity for bucal closure or lateral excursion and slight dysphagia. As background of the hospitalization, he had received, an hour before said event, 2.5 mg of haloperidol and 0.25 mg of risperidone (two doses) due to hyperactive delirium. It was decided to take a computed tomography (CT) of the craniofacial complex and brain without IV contrast (Fig. ), where the following was seen: dislocation of both mandibular condyles with anterior position to the temporal’s glenoid cavity, without evidence of associated bone injuries. Analgesia and muscular relaxation of the patient was carried out. The Nelaton reduction maneuver and later placing of Barton bandaging was done following the technique, using an antiseptic. Posterior clinical and radiological reduction is verified through CT, evidencing a normal condylar position. The patient progresses without further subluxations during his hospitalization.

title: pmc-6007794-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-6007794-1
病例摘要：一位61岁男性因烧伤被转介至我们的烧伤中心。烧伤面积为20%总烧伤面积（TBSA），且为IIb-III度，涉及胸部、腹部和右臂。患者接受了薄层皮肤移植治疗。在成功管理并愈合移植皮片后，我们出院了该患者。8个月后，患者因供体部位感染性开放伤口被其家庭医生转介至我们处进行管理。体检发现供体部位、左上肢和左下肢有感染区域，伴有过度增生的组织（图1）。伤口培养结果显示存在金黄色葡萄球菌、大肠杆菌及耐甲氧西林金黄色葡萄球菌（MRSE）细菌。患者是重度吸烟者，并患有多发性硬化症。据我们所知，忽视和不当的伤口护理导致了供体部位的开放和继发感染。入院一天后，我们进行了手术清创并移除了过度增生的肉芽组织。术后，我们每天使用非粘附性抗菌藻酸盐敷料（Silvercell®）进行换药，并用过滤水红外线-A（wIRA）照射治疗。我们部门使用的wIRA方案是每日三次对所有伤口区域进行60厘米距离30分钟的照射。“Hydrosun 505®”型号（Hydrosun Medizintechnik，Müllheim, Germany）。患者对此应用耐受良好，无任何不适。在治疗五周后，患者出院时供体部位左大腿和左小腿已愈合，左前臂和左上臂的伤口几乎完全愈合（图2）。

metadata.original_text: A 61-year-old male was referred to our burn center with burn injuries. The burn percentage was 20% Total Burn Surface Area (TBSA) and IIb-III degree, involving thorax, abdomen, and right arm. Patient was treated with split-thickness skin graft. We discharged the patient after successful management with healed graft and nearly healed donor wounds. 8 months later, the patient was referred to us from his primary care physician for management of infected open wounds in donor sites. Physical examination revealed infected area with hypergranulated tissue in donor sites, left upper limb and left lower limb (Figure 1 ). Wound cultures showed Staphylococcus aureus, Escherichia coli and Staphylococcus epidermidis (Methicillin-resistent, MRSE) bacteria. Patient was a heavy smoker and suffered from multiple sclerosis. Up to our knowledge, neglect and inadequate wound care were responsible for the opening and secondary infection of donor sites. One day after admission we performed a surgical debridement and removed the hypertrophic granulation tissue. After the operation we started daily wound dressing with a non-adherent antimicrobial alginate dressing (Silvercell®) and irradiation with water-filtered infrared-A (wIRA). Water-filtered infrared-A (wIRA) protocols used at our department were radiations all wound areas three times daily with a 60 cm distance for 30 minutes with a “Hydrosun 505®” model (Hydrosun Medizintechnik, Müllheim, Germany). The patient tolerated this application well without any complaints. After 5 weeks the patient was discharged with healed donor sites left thigh and left lower leg and nearly totally healed sites left forearm and left upper arm (Figure 2 ).

title: pmc-6008297-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-6008297-1
病例摘要：一位80岁的男性患者，因颈椎后纵韧带骨化导致颈椎管狭窄，在一次摔倒事故后不久被转至急诊室。患者意识清醒，出现四肢完全瘫痪、C4颈椎感觉水平以下的感觉减退，并伴有进行性限制性呼吸衰竭，需要辅助通气和最终的气管切开术。颈椎磁共振成像显示在C3-C4椎间盘水平存在颈椎脊髓压迫，并且在C3和C4椎体水平观察到髓内高信号，患者保守治疗。在ICU进行常规脱机过程时，尝试间歇性自主呼吸试验过程中发生了意外的心脏骤停，使患者及其医疗团队不愿意继续进一步的脱机过程。自颈椎脊髓损伤后58天，该患者被转至我院进行进一步康复。他意识清醒，并接受压力支持机械通气，备用率为16次/分钟。他有肩带肌以下的完全四肢瘫痪，在两侧C2到C3水平保留了感觉，存在尿潴留。肢体和躯干僵硬并伴有挛缩，四肢肌肉反射消失。根据ISNCSCI标准，神经损伤平面为C3，总感觉评分为4分。没有骶部感觉保留，而深部肛门压力保留，美国脊髓损伤协会分级为B级。胸部X光片和计算机断层扫描显示双侧广泛性肺不张。患者偶尔出现肺部感染迹象。通过积极的肺部护理和康复治疗，包括物理支持排痰、机械辅助清除气管分泌物（CoughAssist E70®，Philips Japan, Tokyo）、呼吸机肌肉训练以及管理腹壁痉挛，影像学检查结果有所改善。其呼气潮气量（VT）测量为150毫升。尽管根据ISNCSCI标准的神经状态未发生变化，但由于患者的一般状况改善，他愿意从机械通气中脱机。在获得知情同意后，在受伤后第131天开始尝试使用IntelliVent®-ASV进行自动脱机。IntelliVent®-ASV（Hamilton Medical AG, Switzerland）是一种闭环通气模式，根据理想分钟通气量（%MV）的百分比调整压力支持。理想MV（100%MV）是基于患者的身高和性别计算得出。根据Otis方程[]，自适应支持通气将选择最佳VT-呼吸频率（RR）耦合以实现最适呼吸做功。IntelliVent®-ASV具有相关功能：二氧化碳（CO2）消除的自动调整、氧合的自动调整、名为Quick Wean (QW) 的自动脱机工具以及自主呼吸试验（SBT）。目标%MV的设置是基于监测到的末梢二氧化碳或自发呼吸频率进行自动化。根据脉搏血氧仪（SpO2）监测的血红蛋白饱和度分数，自动调节 Inspiratory 氧气比例或正压呼气末期压力。在QW模式下，当自发呼吸率低于预测目标范围上限时，%MV会逐渐减少到选定水平以促进VT的恢复。为了通过增加呼吸肌的工作量来促进其恢复，我们将QW模式的支持水平设置为70%MV。当自发呼吸满足预设的氧气和通气条件1分钟后，使用SBT模式。我们每天从上午9:00至下午6:00操作SBT模式。

metadata.original_text: An 80-year-old man with known cervical canal stenosis due to ossification of the cervical posterior longitudinal ligament was transferred to an emergency room soon after a falling accident. The patient was alert and had complete tetraplegia, sensory deficits below the C4 cervical sensory level, and progressive restrictive respiratory failure that required assisted ventilation, and, eventually, a tracheostomy. Cervical spine magnetic resonance imaging showed cervical cord compression that was worse at the C3–C4 intervertebral level, and an intramedullary high signal at C3 and C4 vertebral levels, and the patient was managed conservatively. During the conventional weaning process of trials of intermittent spontaneous breathing in the ICU, an unexpected cardiac arrest made both the patient and medical staff reluctant to proceed with further weaning. Fifty-eight days after cervical cord injury, the patient was transferred to our hospital for further rehabilitation. He was fully conscious and received pressure-support mechanical ventilation with back-up rates of 16 breaths. He had total tetraplegia below shoulder girdle muscles with a preserved sensation from C2 to C3 on both sides, and a urinary obstruction. The limbs and trunk were stiff with contracture, and muscle stretch reflexes of the limbs were abolished. Neurological level of injury was C3 according to the ISNCSCI, with a total sensory score of four. There was no sensory sacral sparing, while the deep anal pressure was preserved, and the American Spinal Injury Association scale graded B. Chest roentgenogram and computerized tomography showed bilateral, widespread atelectasis. The patient occasionally showed signs of pulmonary infection. Intensive pulmonary care and rehabilitation, including physical support for expectoration, mechanically assisted removal of tracheal secretions (CoughAssist E70®, Philips Japan, Tokyo), ventilator muscle training, and management of the spasticity of the abdominal wall, resulted in the improvement of the roentgenological findings. His expiratory tidal volume (VT) measured 150 mL. Although the neurological status according to the ISNCSCI was unchanged, the patient was willing to be weaned from mechanical ventilation as his general condition improved. After informed consent was given, we attempted automated weaning from mechanical ventilation using IntelliVent®-ASV on and after 131 days of injury. IntelliVent®-ASV (Hamilton Medical AG, Switzerland) is a closed-loop ventilation mode that adjusts the pressure support in terms of the percentage of the ideal minute volume (%MV). The ideal MV (100%MV) is calculated from the patient’s height and gender. Based on Otis’ equation [], adaptive support ventilation will select the best VT–respiratory rate (RR) coupling for the optimal work of breathing. IntelliVent®-ASV has interrelated functions: an auto-adjustment for carbon dioxide (CO2) elimination, an auto-adjustment for oxygenation, an auto-weaning tool named Quick Wean (QW), and a spontaneous breathing trial (SBT). The setting of the target %MV is automated based on either the monitored end-tidal CO2 or monitored spontaneous breathing rate. The auto adjustment of fraction of inspiratory oxygen or positive end-expiratory pressure is based on the monitored oxygen saturation fraction of hemoglobin with a pulse oximeter (SpO2) []. The QW mode is an optional automated weaning, and progressively reduces the pressure support, monitors for readiness-to-wean criteria, and provides the option to automatically conduct a fully controlled SBT. In the QW mode, when the spontaneous rate is less than the upper limit of the predicted target range, %MV is automatically decreased gradually to the selected level. To facilitate the recovery of VT by means of the loading work on respiratory muscles, we set the level of support to 70%MV for the QW mode. When spontaneous breathing satisfied the pre-determined conditions of oxygenation and ventilation for 1 min, the SBT mode was used. We operated the SBT mode during the day from 9:00 a.m. to 6:00 p.m. In the QW mode,

title: pmc-6008505-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-6008505-1
病例摘要：一名56岁高血压男性因右眼无法外展前来咨询。病史始于约34年前，当时他首次注意到右眼的外展受限。在此期间，他逐渐发现所有右眼运动均受限，并伴有左眼下转受限、偶尔出现复视的症状。直到一个月前，他突然出现了右侧面部无力和构音障碍，但没有半身瘫痪或偏瘫。患者就诊时视力良好，色觉正常，无相对传入性瞳孔缺陷，但有右水平共轭凝视麻痹，右眼内收受限伴左眼下转时眼球震颤，以及右侧周围面神经麻痹的表现（表现为四毫米的眼睑闭合不全、鼻唇沟浅和不能皱眉）。神经系统检查其余部分未见异常。裂隙灯检查除成熟白内障外基本无异常。间接眼底镜检查显示双眼高血压性视网膜病变的证据。图1展示了患者眼球运动的复合图，表现为右水平凝视麻痹及右眼内收受限，仅存左眼下转运动。图2强调了周围面神经麻痹的表现，患者右侧鼻唇沟浅、右侧四毫米的眼睑闭合不全，并伴有枕额肌、皱眉肌和人中肌群无力。磁共振成像显示在延髓/脑桥交界处有出血伴完全含铁血黄素环，与一个“爆米花球”样外观的明确病变相关（图3、图4和图5）。患者由神经外科和神经内科共同管理，以期进行可能的切除手术。

metadata.original_text: A fifty-six-year-old hypertensive male came in for consult due to an inability to abduct the right eye. History of the present illness started about thirty-four years prior when he first noted a limited abduction of the right eye. During the interim, he noted a gradually progressive limitation in all movements of the right eye, and a limitation in adduction of the left eye, associated with occasional diplopia. No consults were sought until a month prior when he noticed a sudden-onset right-sided facial weakness and dysarthria, with no hemiparesis or hemiplegia. The patient came into the clinic with good visual acuity, good color vision, and no relative afferent pupillary defect, but with a right horizontal conjugate gaze palsy, a limitation of adduction of the right eye with associated nystagmus of the left eye on abduction, and a right peripheral facial nerve palsy demonstrated by a four-millimeter lagophthalmos, a shallow nasolabial fold, and an inability to wrinkle the forehead. The rest of the neurologic examination was unremarkable. Slit lamp examination was also essentially unremarkable except for immature cataracts. Indirect ophthalmoscopy showed evidence of hypertensive retinopathy on both eyes. Figure 1 shows the patient’s extraocular muscle movements in a composite diagram. There is a right horizontal gaze palsy and a limited adduction of the right eye. The sole extraocular muscle movement remaining is an abduction of the left eye. Figure 2 highlights the peripheral facial nerve palsy. The patient has a shallow nasolabial fold on the right, a four-millimeter lagophthalmos on the right, and weakness of the occipitofrontalis, corrugator supercilli and procerus muscles. On magnetic resonance imaging, there is a hemorrhage with a complete hemosiderin ring at the level of the pons/ponto-medullary junction, associated with a well-defined lesion with a “popcorn ball” appearance resembling that of a cavernoma (Figure 3 , Figure 4 , and Figure 5 ). The patient was co-managed with neurosurgery and neurology services for possible resection.

title: pmc-6008506-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-6008506-1
病例摘要：一位21岁的女性因右眼前方出现黑点并伴有中心视力扭曲一周前来就诊。没有外伤史。双眼的最佳矫正视力（BCVA）均为20/20。前节检查双眼基本正常。右眼的眼底检查显示黄灰色的视网膜下病变，位于视网膜颞上方，并有视网膜色素上皮脱离（图1）。该病灶未累及黄斑中心凹。视神经盘和视网膜血管均正常，且未见玻璃体细胞。左眼的眼底检查正常。患者一个月前被诊断为因子 VIII 缺陷症。她的凝血功能和血液学检查结果均正常，但因子 VIII - C 水平为 37.5%（正常范围 50-150%）。眼底荧光素血管造影（FFA）显示典型的外黄斑区脉络膜新生血管膜（CNVM）（图1）。与患者讨论治疗方案后，对 CNVM 进行了激光光凝治疗。6周后随访时，右眼视力为 20/30，N6。临床检查发现外黄斑区新生血管成分正在消退，而邻近黄斑中心凹的新生血管成分仍在活动。这些发现通过 FFA 和光学相干断层扫描（OCT）得到了确认（图2）。患者接受了光动力疗法（PDT），并在2天后进行了玻璃体内三氯丙醇注射（4 mg/0.1 ml）。6周后，右眼视力为 20/30，眼内压（IOP）为 32 mmHg。开始使用托吡卡胺男盐酸盐滴眼液（0.5%）每日两次。由于外黄斑区 CNVM 相关的持续高荧光性，进行了热激光光凝治疗。经过治疗后，眼内压在两周内降至12 mmHg，并继续进行相同治疗。八周后的下一次随访时，视力为 20/60，N10。临床检查发现邻近黄斑中心凹的脉络膜新生血管膜复发，通过FFA和OCT得到了确认。患者接受了四次贝伐单抗（1.25 mg/0.05 ml）玻璃体内注射治疗，间隔4-6周。眼内压恢复正常后停止了局部抗青光眼治疗。第四次注射六周后，右眼视力改善至 20/30，N6。CNVM 出现瘢痕化（图3）。然而，FFA 显示持续渗漏。患者接受了 PDT 和玻璃体内贝伐单抗的联合治疗。7周后，视力提高到 20/20。临床检查发现 CNVM 瘢痕化。患者每两周随访一次。14周后，患者报告右眼视野扭曲增加。右眼的最佳矫正视力（BCVA）为20/20。OCT显示视网膜下积液和FFA显示外黄斑区脉络膜新生血管膜复发。患者接受了玻璃体内贝伐单抗注射（1.25 mg/0.05 ml）。六周后随访时，症状缓解；视力为 20/20。临床发现通过OCT和FFA得到了确认（图4）。最后一次随访（即贝伐单抗注射后10年），右眼的最佳矫正视力保持在20/20，眼底稳定。

metadata.original_text: A 21-year-old female presented with complaints of seeing a black spot in front of the right eye associated with distortion of the central vision of one week duration. There was no history of trauma. Best-corrected visual acuity (BCVA) in both eyes was 20/20. Anterior segment examination was essentially normal in both eyes. Fundus examination of the right eye revealed a yellowish-gray subretinal lesion with subretinal fluid supero-temporal to the fovea and pigment epithelial detachment (Figure 1 ). The lesion spared the fovea. Optic disc and retinal vasculature appeared normal and no vitreous cells were noted. Fundus examination of the left eye was normal. The patient was a diagnosed case of factor VIII deficiency about a month back. Her coagulation profile and hemogram were normal. However, factor VIII – C level was 37.5% (Normal range 50–150%). Fundus fluorescein angiography (FFA) revealed a classic extrafoveal choroidal neovascular membrane (CNVM) (Figure 1 ). Focal laser photocoagulation to the CNVM was done after discussing the treatment options with the patient. The patient reported after 6 weeks with visual acuity in the right eye 20/30, N6. Clinical examination revealed a regressing extrafoveal neovascular component and an active juxtafoveal neovascular component. Clinical findings were confirmed on FFA and optical coherence tomography (OCT) (Figure 2 ). The patient was treated with photodynamic therapy (PDT) followed by intravitreal triamcinolone acetonide (IVTA) injection (4 mg/0.1 ml) 2 days later. After 6 weeks, visual acuity in the right eye was 20/30 and the intraocular pressure (IOP) was 32 mmHg. Topical Timolol maleate 0.5% twice a day was started. Since there was persistent hyperfluorescence related to the extrafoveal CNVM, thermal laser photocoagulation was done. With treatment, IOP came down to 12 mmHg in 2 weeks and the same treatment was continued. On the next visit eight weeks later, visual acuity was 20/60, N10. Clinical examination revealed recurrence of the juxtafoveal choroidal neovascular membrane, which was confirmed on FFA and OCT. The patient was treated with four intravitreal injections of bevacizumab (1.25 mg/0.05 ml) at an interval of 4–6 weeks. The IOP was found to have normalized and hence topical antiglaucoma treatment was stopped. Six weeks after the fourth injection, visual acuity in the right eye improved to 20/30, N6. CNVM appeared scarred (Figure 3 ). However, there was persistent leakage on FFA. The patient was treated with a combination of PDT and intravitreal bevacizumab. After 7 weeks, visual acuity improved to 20/20. Clinically, CNVM appeared scarred. The patient was followed up at intervals of 2 weeks. Fourteen weeks later, the patient reported with an increase in distortion in the right eye. BCVA was 20/20 in the right eye. OCT showed subretinal fluid and FFA showed recurrent extrafoveal CNVM. The patient was treated with intravitreal bevacizumab (1.25 mg/0.05 ml). The patient was seen six weeks later when she reported resolution of symptoms; her visual acuity was 20/20. Clinical findings were confirmed on OCT and FFA (Figure 4 ). When seen last (i.e. 10 years post bevacizumab injection), BCVA was maintained at 20/20 and the fundus remained stable.

title: pmc-6008534-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-6008534-1
病例摘要：一名54岁的女性患者，四肢完整，在进行右侧拇指腕掌关节置换术及韧带重建手术前接受了BPA。在BPA开始后立即，她感觉到右前臂和手部似乎躺在胸前，当这些部位悬挂在担架边缘时尤为明显。术后，她的右手感觉“沉重”，手指呈垂直堆叠状，如图所示。手术后14至16小时，她开始感到拇指疼痛。然而，在手术完成后的约3.5天以及麻醉效果消退后的69小时内，她的第二指到第五指在堆叠位置上的不活动感持续存在。在此期间，尽管患者描述这些幻觉感觉不舒服，但她并没有手指部位的疼痛。未进行神经传导研究。本研究按照田纳西大学健康科学中心的建议进行。本报告中讨论的程序并非一项研究的一部分，而是常规临床护理。受试者根据《赫尔辛基宣言》的规定提供了书面知情同意，以供发表其临床资料。

metadata.original_text: A 54-year-old woman with all limbs intact received BPA in advance of right thumb carpometacarpal arthroplasty with ligament reconstruction. Immediately after BPA onset, she felt her right forearm and hand resting across her chest when it was hanging over the side of the gurney. After surgery, her right hand felt “heavy” with the fingers stacked vertically on top of each other, as shown in Figure . She began experiencing right thumb pain 14–16 h after the operation had been completed. However, the sensation of immobility of her 2nd through 5th digits in the stacked position lasted for ~3.5 days after surgery and 69 h after the anesthesia wore off. During this time, although the patient described the phantom sensations as being uncomfortable, she experienced no pain in the fingers. No nerve conduction studies were performed. This study was carried out in accordance with the recommendations of the University of Tennessee Health Science Center. The procedure discussed in this report was not part of a research study but rather routine clinical care. The subject gave written informed consent for publication of her clinical details in accordance with the Declaration of Helsinki.

title: pmc-6008614-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-6008614-1
病例摘要：一名70岁的男性患者因在家摔倒两次而前往急诊部门。在进食轻食后站立时，他经历了两次短暂的意识丧失。第二次摔倒时，患者的右肩、脸颊和脚部受伤，因此前来就诊。当天早些时候，患者接受了结肠镜检查以进行常规癌症筛查。他遵循了肠道准备的正确程序，并未出现与该程序或麻醉相关的任何即时并发症。自结肠镜检查以来，他一直经历间歇性的腹部绞痛。在此期间他还感到头晕，但归因于与肠道准备有关的脱水。患者否认头部撞击、胸痛、呼吸困难、恶心、呕吐或粪便带血的症状。患者的既往病史包括冠状动脉疾病、高脂血症和高血压。在结肠镜检查前一天，他服用了贝那普利、阿司匹林和阿托伐他汀。体格检查显示患者无发热，心率为87次/分钟，血压为130/78毫米汞柱。头部、颈部、胸部和神经系统检查均正常。腹部检查发现右下腹和左下腹有压痛，并有一些自愿性保护反应，但未触及肿块或反跳痛。骨科检查显示右侧肩锁关节处有压痛，并且右侧第五跖骨出现瘀斑，无畸形，所有关节活动范围正常。实验室检查结果显示血红蛋白为12.4 g/dL，血小板和生化指标均正常。头部计算机断层扫描（CT）和肩部及胸部X光片结果均为正常。脚部X光片显示第五跖骨骨折未移位。腹部和盆腔CT显示中度腹腔内出血伴脾脏裂伤（图略）。患者被收入重症监护室，并进行了多次腹部检查和每四小时一次的血红蛋白测量。入院48小时后，他的血红蛋白降至8 g/dL，但随后趋于稳定。患者在医院观察3天后状态良好，最终出院回家。

metadata.original_text: A 70-year-old man presented to the emergency department (ED) after falling twice at home. While standing after eating a light meal, he had two separate episodes of brief loss of consciousness. On the second fall, the patient had hit his right shoulder, cheek, and foot, prompting the visit. The patient had received a colonoscopy earlier in the day for routine cancer screening. He had followed proper protocol regarding his bowel prep and had not had any immediate complications related to the procedure or anesthesia. Since the colonoscopy, he had continuous bouts of cramping abdominal pain. He had also felt dizzy throughout this period but attributed it to dehydration related to his bowel prep. The patient denied striking his head, chest pain, shortness of breath, nausea, vomiting, or blood in his stools. His past medical history was significant for coronary artery disease, hyperlipidemia, and hypertension. The patient took his benazepril, aspirin, and atorvastatin on the day prior to colonoscopy. On physical exam, the patient was afebrile with a heart rate of 87 and blood pressure of 130/78. The patient's head, neck, chest, and neurological exams were entirely normal. His abdominal exam was remarkable for tenderness in the right and left lower quadrant with some voluntary guarding, but no masses or rebound was appreciated. His orthopedic exam demonstrated tenderness to his right acromioclavicular joint and ecchymosis of his right 5th metatarsal with no deformity and normal range of motion at all joints. On laboratory evaluation, the patient's hemoglobin was 12.4 g/dL, with normal platelets and chemistry studies. Head computed tomography (CT) and shoulder and chest radiography were normal. Foot radiography demonstrated a nondisplaced 5th metatarsal fracture. CT of the abdomen and pelvis demonstrated moderate hemoperitoneum with splenic laceration (Figures , , and ). The patient was admitted to the intensive care unit and underwent serial abdominal exams and every four-hour hemoglobin measurements. His hemoglobin fell to 8 g/dL at 48 hours after admission but subsequently stabilized. The patient was observed in the hospital and ultimately discharged home on hospital day 3 in good condition.

title: pmc-6008617-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-6008617-1
病例摘要：一名36岁的女性（身高，147厘米；体重，50公斤）患有先天性无汗腺症(CIPA)，计划进行左侧全髋关节置换术的翻修手术。她因出生后反复出现不明原因发热、无汗、烧伤和骨折被诊断为CIPA。她之前已经进行了7次脊柱畸形矫正手术以及两侧各一次全髋关节置换手术。尽管观察到一般性发汗减少和热痛觉缺失，但患者在感到有高热风险时自行进行体表冷却，并保持体温约36°C。未观察到智力迟缓或直立性低血压的症状。胸部X光片和心电图均未发现异常。血液生化检查除轻度贫血（血红蛋白水平10.6 g/dl）外，其他指标正常。术前未给予任何预处理药物。患者被带入手术室后，常规监测并开始测量脑电双频指数(BIS)。在尿道膀胱、食管和胸前皮肤三个部位测量体温，并通过热空气加热器控制体温。通过目标控制输注方式以每毫升4 μg的效应浓度给予异丙酚。肌肉松弛剂罗库溴铵50 mg给药后，气管插管。气管插管后两分钟内，收缩压从130 mmHg升至145 mmHg，心率从60次/分增加到95次/分(bpm)。随后，收缩压降至125 mmHg。异丙酚以目标浓度2-4 μg/ml持续静脉输注，并保持BIS值在40-60之间。动脉导管置入后，患者体位从仰卧改为右侧侧卧位。手术开始。由于手术过程中未出现与疼痛相关的循环变化，因此未给予镇痛药。关于血流动力学，在20分钟内快速失血600 ml时，血压从113/66 mmHg降至93/55 mmHg，心率从55次/分增加到70次/分(a)；在30分钟内失血850 ml时，收缩压从108/65 mmHg降至95/60 mmHg，心率从66次/分增加到74次/分(b)。给予0.1 mg的苯肾上腺素后，血压从87/55 mmHg升至117/76 mmHg，心率从70次/分降至65次/分(c)。手术时间为6小时49分钟，麻醉持续时间8小时41分钟。失血量为3350 ml。术中输注了1600 ml预先采集的自体血液、900 ml回收血液以及720 ml新鲜冷冻血浆。三个测量点处的体温均被控制并保持在36.0°C至36.9°C之间。手术完成后，患者被返回仰卧位，并拔除了气管插管。由于术后未抱怨疼痛，因此未给予任何镇痛药。她在手术后第6周出院。术前、手术开始后以及手术结束时共采集了三次血液样本，测量了儿茶酚胺和皮质醇的水平。所有时间点的去甲肾上腺素水平均低于正常范围，而所有时间点的肾上腺素和皮质醇水平均在正常范围内。

metadata.original_text: A 36-year-old woman (height, 147 cm; weight, 50 kg) with CIPA was scheduled for revision of left total hip arthroplasty. She was diagnosed as having CIPA because of recurrent episodes of unexplained fever, anhidrosis, burns, and bone fractures after birth. She had previously undergone 7 operations for spinal deformity and 1 operation of total hip arthroplasty in both the left and right sides. Although lack of general diaphoresis and thermal nociception were observed, the patient performed body surface cooling at her own discretion when she felt she was at a risk of hyperthermia, and her body temperature was kept approximately 36°C. No signs of mental retardation or orthostatic hypotension were observed. No abnormality was detected on chest radiographs and electrocardiograms. Blood biochemistry revealed no abnormality except mild anemia indicated by a hemoglobin level of 10.6 g/dl. No premedication was administered. After the patient was brought into the operating room, routine monitoring and measurement of the bispectral index (BIS) were started. Body temperature was measured at 3 different sites (urinary bladder, esophagus, and precordial skin) and controlled by a hot-air-type heater. Propofol was administered at an effect-site concentration of 4 μg/ml by target-controlled infusion. After muscle relaxation had been achieved by administration of 50 mg of rocuronium, the trachea was intubated. Immediately after endotracheal intubation, systolic blood pressure increased from 130 to 145 mmHg, and heart rate increased from 60 to 95 beats per minute (bpm). Two minutes later, systolic blood pressure had decreased to 125 mmHg. Propofol was continuously infused intravenously at a target concentration of 2 to 4 μg/ml () and BIS levels were maintained between 40 and 60. After an arterial catheter had been placed, her position was changed from the supine to right lateral position. Surgery was then started. Since no circulatory change associated with pain occurred during surgery, opioids were not administered. Regarding hemodynamics, when 600 ml of blood was rapidly lost within 20 minutes, blood pressure decreased from 113/66 to 93/55 mmHg and heart rate increased from 55 to 70 bpm ( a). Similarly, when 850 ml of blood was lost within 30 minutes, systolic blood pressure decreased from 108/65 to 95/60 mmHg and heart rate increased from 66 to 74 bpm ( b). Administration of 0.1 mg of phenylephrine increased blood pressure from 87/55 to 117/76 mmHg and decreased heart rate from 70 to 65 bpm ( c). The operative time was 6 hours and 49 minutes, and the duration of anesthesia was 8 hours and 41 minutes. The volume of blood loss was 3350 ml. Blood transfusion was performed with 1600 ml of preoperatively donated autologous blood, 900 ml of salvaged blood, and 720 ml of fresh frozen plasma. Intraoperative body temperature was controlled and kept between 36.0°C and 36.9°C at all 3 measurement points. After surgery had been completed, the patient was returned to the supine position and she was extubated. Since she did not complain of any pain after the surgery, no analgesic was administered. She was discharged at 6 weeks after the operation. Blood samples were collected 3 times: before anesthesia induction, after the start of surgery, and at the end of surgery. The levels of catecholamine fractions and cortisol were measured. Norepinephrine levels were below the normal range at all time points, and the levels of epinephrine and cortisol were within the normal ranges at all time points ().

title: pmc-6008645-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-6008645-1
病例摘要：第一位患者是一位七八十岁的男性，既往无特殊病史。该患者因左肝等血供结节伴缓慢静脉排空，在腹部动态CT检查中被发现。实验室数据包括血液细胞计数、生化指标和肿瘤标志物水平均在正常范围内，除了轻度升高的CRP（0.39 mg/dL）和降低的血红蛋白（8.9 g/dL）。未见乙型肝炎病毒或丙型肝炎病毒感染。根据临床表现，医生初步诊断为肝细胞癌，并进行了左半肝切除术。肉眼观察，肝脏结节切面显示边界不清、分叶状边缘的周边结节，直径32 x 21 mm，颜色明显偏白。该肝脏背景未见显著变化。肿瘤组织学检查显示一个未被包膜包裹、界限不明确且扩展性较强的结节。此癌性结节显示出异常上皮细胞的实性增生，主要排列成实性巢状、小梁或界限不清、融合的小管样结构。在高倍镜下观察，这些异常细胞为中等大小至小型，相对均匀，具有增大且深染的核和少量胞浆，无任何粘液内含物的证据。有趣的是，在此肿瘤中未见显著的纤维性间质。免疫组化结果显示上述癌细胞不仅特异性表达CK7（胆管细胞标记物），还表达CK8/CK18（肝细胞和胆管细胞共同标记物）和CK19/CD56（潜在干细胞标记物），而对肝细胞（肝细胞标记物）呈阴性。根据所有这些特征，最终诊断为原发性CHC-INT。截至目前，该患者术后随访一年，未见复发迹象。

metadata.original_text: The first patient, who was a man in his late seventies with an unremarkable previous medical history, presented with isovascular nodule accompanied by slow venous wash-out on abdominal dynamic CT in the left lobe of liver. The laboratory data, including the blood cell count, chemistry, and tumor marker levels, were within the normal limits, with the exception of mildly elevated CRP (0.39 mg/dL) and decreased hemoglobin (8.9 g/dL) levels. Neither infection of HBV nor infection of HCV was noted. Based on the clinical findings, the initial diagnosis by the clinicians was most likely HCC, and, thus, left partial hepatectomy was performed. On gross examination, the cut surface of hepatic nodule () showed a poorly demarcated peripheral nodule in lobulated margins, measuring 32 x 21 mm in diameter, which appeared clearly whitish in color. The background of this liver showed no remarkable change (). A microscopic examination of the tumor demonstrated an unencapsulated, ill-defined, and expansive nodule (). This cancerous nodule showed a solid proliferation of atypical epithelial cells, arranged predominantly in solid nests (), trabeculae, and/or ill-defined, fused tubule-like structures (). On a high-power view, these atypical cells were small-to-medium-sized and relatively uniform, having enlarged hyperchromatic nuclei and scant cytoplasm without any evidence of intracytoplasmic mucin (). Intriguingly, prominent fibrous stroma was not evident in this tumor. Immunohistochemistry revealed that the abovementioned carcinoma cells were specifically positive for not only CK7 (cholangiocytes marker) but also CK8/CK18 (markers for both hepatocytes and cholangiocytes) and CK19/CD56 (potential stem cells markers), whereas they were negative for Hepatocyte (hepatocytes marker) [, ]. Based on all of these features, the final diagnosis was primary CHC-INT. To date, this patient has been followed up for 1 year since surgery, and he remains well without any sign of recurrence.

title: pmc-6008645-2
text:
病例标题：pmc-6008645-2
病例摘要：第二例患者为70多岁的男性，有超过25年的HCV阳性慢性肝炎和复发性HCC病史。该患者因腹腔动态CT显示S5剩余肝脏内伴有静脉洗脱的轻度高血管性和环形增强结节而就诊。实验室检查结果大多在正常范围内，仅AST（37 IU/L）、总胆红素（1.8 mg/dL）和CEA（5.55 ng/mL）略高于正常值。未观察到乙型肝炎病毒感染。根据临床表现，医生初步诊断为复发性HCC，并进行了部分S5肝切除术。肉眼检查显示肝脏结节切面呈分叶状边缘、界限不清的门脉区结节，直径35 x 26 mm，颜色明显偏白，并伴有明显的和组织学上的门静脉渗透（）。肿瘤显微镜下表现为未被包膜包裹、边界不清晰且浸润性生长/侵袭性的结节，显示为典型的上皮细胞的实性增生，主要排列成实性巢状、网状或不规则融合的小管样结构，并且以侵略性的方式侵犯门静脉，伴有局部神经鞘内侵犯（）。在高倍镜下观察这些异常细胞与上述第一例病例中的细胞非常相似。未见显著的纤维化间质。该肝脏背景表现为轻度慢性肝炎（F1/A1）和脂肪变性。免疫组化显示，这些癌细胞特异性地表达CK7（）、CK18（）和c-kit（潜在干细胞标记物），而对CK8、肝细胞和CD56均为阴性。根据所有这些特征，最终诊断为原发性CHC-INT。该患者在手术后一年三个月出现剩余肝脏内复发的CHC-INT，但术后两年随访期间病情未见恶化。

metadata.original_text: The second patient, who was also a man in his early seventies with more than 25-year follow-up for HCV-positive chronic hepatitis and recurrent HCC, presented with mildly hypervascular and ring-enhanced nodule accompanied by venous wash-out on abdominal dynamic CT in the S5 of the remnant liver. The laboratory data were mostly within the normal limits, with the exception of mildly elevated AST (37 IU/L), total bilirubin (1.8 mg/dL), and CEA (5.55 ng/mL) levels. No infection of HBV was observed. Based on the clinical findings, the initial diagnosis by the clinicians was recurrent HCC, and, thus, partial S5 hepatectomy was performed. On gross examination, the cut surface of hepatic nodule () showed a poorly demarcated portal nodule in lobulated margins with central necrosis, measuring 35 x 26 mm in diameter, which appeared clearly whitish in color, accompanied by not only gross but also histopathological portal vein permeation (). A microscopic examination of the tumor showed an unencapsulated, ill-defined, and expansive/infiltrative nodule, displaying a solid proliferation of atypical epithelial cells, arranged predominantly in solid nests, trabeculae, and/or irregular and fused tubule-like structures, aggressively involving the portal vein with focal perineural invasion (). On a high-power view, these atypical cells were very similar to those of the abovementioned first case. Prominent fibrous stroma was not seen either. The background of this liver showed mild chronic hepatitis (F1/A1) and steatosis. Immunohistochemistry showed that those carcinoma cells were specifically positive for not only CK7 () but also CK18 () and c-kit (potential stem cells marker) [, ], whereas they were negative for CK8, Hepatocyte, and CD56. Based on all of these features, the final diagnosis was primary CHC-INT as well. The recurrence of CHC-INT in the remnant liver occurred 1 year and 3 months after this surgery, but he remains not worse with follow-up for the postoperative 2 years.

title: pmc-6008661-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-6008661-1
病例摘要：一名62岁男性因顽固性骶尾部疼痛就诊。患者有2型糖尿病病史（使用利格列汀/二甲双胍治疗）、未治疗的高血压、儿童期脑膜炎后右侧偏瘫、肾结石和吸烟史。盆腔计算机断层扫描(CT)显示骶骨处有一个9x7.5x9厘米的大肿块，局部软组织密度增加，导致骶椎广泛性溶骨性病变并向左侧髂骨延伸，提示为脊索瘤。患者接受了全骶切除术，并部分切除了左髂骨并进行了重建。病理检查结果显示，骶尾部侵犯了甲状腺癌，通过促甲状腺激素受体抗体和TTF-1免疫组织化学染色验证（图和）。甲状腺超声显示右侧叶有一个20毫米的实性结节以及左侧叶两个分别为11毫米和9毫米的低回声实性结节，最小的一个有粗大钙化。未发现淋巴结肿大。18F-氟脱氧葡萄糖正电子发射断层扫描(18F-FDG-PET)显示甲状腺左叶有一个高代谢灶，符合疑似恶性肿瘤，并且在第五腰椎和骨盆骨骼中检测到放射性药物摄取，提示为继发性侵犯（图）。因此，患者接受了全甲状腺切除术。组织学检查仅发现多灶性滤泡型乳头状癌（至少六个病灶）和嗜酸细胞型变异，没有浸润性癌，肿瘤大小从2毫米到15毫米不等，无血行、淋巴管或神经鞘膜侵犯迹象，且切缘未受肿瘤侵犯（pT1b[m]NxM1R0）。随后进行了放射性碘治疗。术后显像显示在骶骨残余部分和下腰椎、双侧髂骨及前颈部有高摄取灶。促甲状腺激素刺激的甲状腺球蛋白为24490 ng/mL。随访磁共振成像显示盆腔病灶持续存在并进展。此时患者无法行走，留置了长期膀胱导尿管，并患有大便失禁和未控制的顽固性慢性疼痛。

metadata.original_text: A 62-year-old male presented with refractory sacral coccygeal pain. The patient had past medical history of type 2 diabetes mellitus (treated with linagliptin/metformin), nontreated high blood pressure, right-sided hemiparesis following meningitis in childhood, nephrolithiasis, and smoking history. The pelvic computed tomography (CT) revealed a 9x7.5x9 cm bulky mass in the sacrum with locally increased soft tissue density, causing extensive lytic lesions of the sacred vertebrae and extending to the left iliac bone, suggestive of chordoma. The patient underwent total sacrectomy with partial excision and reconstruction of the left iliac bone. The anatomopathological examination revealed sacrococcygeal involvement by a thyroid carcinoma, as verified by immunohistochemical staining for thyroglobulin and TTF-1, predominantly papillary (follicular variant), however with foci of nondifferentiated (insular) carcinoma (Figures and ). Thyroid ultrasonography showed a solid nodule of 20 mm in the right lobe and two solid hypoechogenic nodules of 11 and 9 mm in the left lobe, the smallest with coarse calcifications. No lymphadenopathies were found. 18F-fluorodeoxyglucose positron-emission tomography (18F-FDG-PET) revealed a hypermetabolic focus in the left lobe of the thyroid, consistent with the suspected malignant neoplasia, and uptake of the radiopharmaceutical drug in the fifth lumbar vertebra and pelvic bones, consistent with secondary involvement (). Consequently, the patient underwent total thyroidectomy.
