title: pmc-6009036-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-6009036-1
病例摘要：一名41岁女性因持续性肝功能异常、无痛性黄染和皮肤瘙痒3个月前来我院进一步评估和管理。入院时体检显示重度黄疸，巩膜和皮肤黄染，但腹部无压痛或移动性浊音。肝功能检查显示严重肝损伤和阻塞性黄疸（表）。超声检查发现一个大小为5.0 × 5.3 cm、边界清晰、囊性病变，内部有多个分隔，回声增强，无壁结节证据。上腹部增强CT显示左内叶肝脏有一个边缘分明、薄而光滑的囊性肿块，并伴有胆管梗阻。囊肿内容物均匀一致，密度似水，提示为囊肿。MRI检查显示T1加权像低信号、T2加权像高信号的均匀病变。超声、CT和磁共振胰胆管成像（MRCP）均显示右肝管轻度扩张、左肝管和胆总管显著扩张、胆囊增大，胆道远端正常（图）。胆管梗阻可能的原因包括胆管肿瘤、胆总管结石或肝囊肿压迫胆总管。进行了内镜逆行胰胆管造影（ERCP）以确定梗阻原因。该检查显示右肝管扩张，但左肝管和胆总管未见异常。未发现结石，但在胆总管中观察到一个大肿块，提示可疑胆管肿瘤。为了治疗严重的肝损伤和黄疸，成功进行了内镜下Oddi括约肌切开术、经皮逆行胆道引流（ERBD）和鼻胆管引流（ENBD），而不是进行剖腹手术，因为存在凝血障碍（图）。这些操作后，巩膜和皮肤逐渐褪色，肝功能明显改善，凝血障碍接近正常水平（表）。四周后，因怀疑胆管肿瘤进行了开腹手术。通过胆道镜检查胆总管时，在左肝管处发现一个突出的、带蒂的大肿块。该肿块在内镜针刀电切下从根部完全切除，未见活动性出血（图）。肿块形态类似囊壁和囊腔空间（图）。将胆道镜从肿块残端插入肝管中，并未观察到囊腺瘤或囊腺癌分泌的粘稠液体。术后病理检查提示为无异型性和肿瘤细胞的肝囊肿壁（图）。为了防止胆汁泄漏并观察根部切口愈合和术后出血情况，保留了T形管。两个月后，所有肝功能指标恢复正常范围（表）。上腹部超声和CT显示肝管正常，肝囊肿大小与术前相同。通过T形管瘘进行了胆道镜检查。未发现胆管肿瘤证据。胆道镜可以从胆管壁的缺损处进入囊肿，并且切口周围黏膜恢复良好，无狭窄迹象。术后三年，患者一般情况良好，无胆汁淤积或胆管结石症状。囊肿几乎没有变化（图）。

metadata.original_text: A 41-year-old woman presented to our hospital for further evaluation and management of persistent liver dysfunction, painless xanthochromia, and skin itching for 3 months. On admission, a physical examination showed severe icteric sclera and skin without abdominal tenderness or positive shifting dullness. Liver function showed severe hepatic injury and obstructive jaundice (Table ). US showed a 5.0 × 5.3 cm, well-circumscribed anechoic lesion with many separations, increased through-transmission of sound, and no evidence of mural nodularity. Epigastric enhanced CT showed a cystic mass with sharply defined margins and smooth, thin, non-reinforced walls in the left medial liver lobe, and obstruction of the biliary tract. The contents of the mass were homogeneous, with water-density lesions, suggesting that it was a cyst. MRI showed a homogeneously hypointense lesion on T1-weighted imaging and this was homogeneously hyperintense on T2-weighted imaging. US, CT, and magnetic resonance cholangiopancreatography (MRCP) showed a slightly ectatic right hepatic duct, a greatly ectatic left hepatic duct and common bile duct, an enlarged gallbladder, and a normal distal end of the choledochus (Fig. ). Possible reasons for biliary obstruction were bile duct tumor, common bile duct stones, or compression of the common bile duct by a hepatic cyst. Endoscopic retrograde cholangiography (ERC) was performed to define the cause of obstruction. This procedure showed that the right hepatic duct was ectatic, but the left hepatic duct and common bile duct were not observed. There were no stone, but a large lump was observed in the common bile duct, which suggested suspicious bile duct tumor. Endoscopic sphincterotomy, endoscopic retrograde biliary drainage(ERBD), and endoscopic nasobiliary draingage(ENBD) were successfully performed to drain bile for severe hepatic injury and jaundice, rather than laparotomy, because of coagulation disorders (Fig. ). After these procedures, the icteric sclera and skin gradually faded, liver function was obviously improved, and coagulation disorders were close to normal levels (Table ). Four weeks later, an open operation was performed for suspicion of bile duct tumor. In exploration of the common bile duct by a choledochoscope, a large pedunculated lump protruding into the common bile duct from the left hepatic duct was discovered. This lump was completely removed from the root of the lump by endoscopic needle-knife electrotomy without active hemorrhage (Fig. ). The morphology of the lump was similar to the gallbladder with a capsule wall and capsular space (Fig. ). The choledochoscope was inserted into the hepatic duct from the stump of the lump and there was no viscous liquid secreted by cystadenoma or cystadenocarcinoma. Postoperative pathology of the lump suggested a hepatic cyst wall without heterocysts or tumor cells (Fig. ). A T tube was retained in the common bile duct in order to prevent bile leakage and observe the recovery of the root incision of the lump and postoperative bleeding. Two months later, all of the liver function indices recovered to the normal range (Table ). Epigastric US and CT showed a normal hepatic duct and the hepatic cyst was the same size compared with preoperatively. A choledochoscopic examination was performed through a T-tube fistula. There was no evidence of bile duct tumor. The choledochoscope could enter into the cyst from the defect of the bile duct wall, and the mucosa around the incision recovered well, with no signs of stricture. Three years after the procedure, the patient was in a good general condition, without signs of cholestasis or bile duct stones. The cyst had barely changed (Fig. ).

title: pmc-6009975-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-6009975-1
病例摘要：在此次入院前，一名27岁的女性因食用芒果后出现面部红肿和水肿而前往当地医院就诊。她接受了每天静脉注射地塞米松（5 mg）五天的治疗。患者逐渐出现了满月脸、痤疮、多毛症、低钾血症以及一个月内体重减轻5公斤的症状。入院时，患者的病史包括一个月的面部水肿、体重下降和痤疮。她的家族中没有库欣综合征、嗜铬细胞瘤或多发性内分泌腺瘤2型的历史。16个月前在一次常规体检中，在当地医院发现右肾上腺后叶有一个5.5厘米的肿块，但患者当时无症状且未进一步就医。仰卧位时，患者的血压为双侧120/75 mmHg，脉搏规律，每分钟76次。身高164 cm，体重48 kg（体质指数：17.8 kg/m²）。患者有满月脸、面部严重水肿、胡须、中心脂肪沉积和瘦弱的四肢及萎缩肌肉，无胫前水肿。皮肤上散布着痤疮，腋下有色素沉着。实验室检查显示低钾血症显著（2.1 mmol/L；正常范围3.5-5.5 mmol/L），口服和静脉补钾均无法恢复正常，直到添加螺内酯后才得以纠正。75克口服葡萄糖耐量试验证实了糖尿病的存在，空腹血糖水平为9.19 mmol/l，2小时血糖水平为21.66 mmol/L，HbA1c水平为6.3%。她开始使用胰岛素阿斯帕特30（每日48 U）。内分泌检查显示皮质醇分泌严重升高且失去昼夜节律性。血浆ACTH水平升高至1157 pg/mL，确诊为依赖ACTH的库欣综合征。除了睾酮外，儿茶酚胺代谢物、生长激素、降钙素和泌乳素水平均在正常范围内（表）。MRI及对比增强MRI未发现垂体腺瘤，考虑为肾上腺皮质异位分泌（EAS）。腹部增强CT扫描显示肿块位于右侧肾上腺而非右肝后叶。肿块是一个不均匀的实性肿瘤，轻度强化并有部分非强化区域（图）。PET/CT显示肿瘤中等程度摄取氟脱氧葡萄糖（FDG）（图）。对比增强CT和PET-CT均提示双侧肾上腺增生，但颈部、胸部和骨盆正常。我们准备进行下垂体后静脉采样（IPSS）以测定ACTH，并进行肾上腺静脉采样以确定ACTH的来源。但在入院后患者的一般状况迅速恶化，进行了右侧肾上腺肿瘤切除术。在手术过程中，在移动右侧肾上腺肿块时未出现高血压危象。发现一个6.5厘米的黑色肿块起源于右肾上腺内侧支（图）。HE染色显示大多数细胞为类嗜铬细胞样细胞。此外，肿瘤囊下有多个卵圆形嗜酸性细胞（图）。免疫组化染色显示CgA（Fig. ）和CD56（Fig. ）阳性，Ki67标记指数约为16%（Fig. ）的类嗜铬细胞样细胞阳性。未见ACTH免疫染色阳性（Fig. ）。在肿瘤周围细胞中发现CRH和Melan-A（Fig. 和 Fig. ）阳性染色，而CgA和CD56阴性，表明CRH的确来自肿瘤周围的细胞。手术后一天，ACTH水平从715降至14.3 pg/ml，血皮质醇水平从超过50降至10.4 μg/dl。术后一周，血钾和血糖水平恢复正常，无需药物治疗。库欣综合征的症状和体征在两个月内逐渐消失，并开始使用氢化可的松补充（初始剂量为每日60 mg并逐步减量）

metadata.original_text: Prior to this admission, a 27-year-old woman sought medical attention at a local hospital because of facial redness and edema caused by eating a mango. She was treated with dexamethasone (5 mg intravenously daily) for five days. The patient gradually developed a round face, acne, hirsutism, hypokalemia, and 5 kg of weight loss over the course of one month since receiving dexamethasone. Upon hospitalization, the patient presented with a one-month history of facial edema, weight loss, and acne. She had no family history of Cushing’s syndrome, pheochromocytoma, or multiple endocrine neoplasia type 2. A 5.5-cm mass located in the right posterior lobe of the liver was detected by ultrasound in a routine physical examination 16 months ago at a local hospital; however, the patient had no symptom and did not seek further medical attention at that time. The patient’s blood pressure was 120/75 mmHg in both arms in the supine position, with a regular pulse of 76 bpm. Her height was 164 cm and her weight was 48 kg (body mass index:17.8 kg/m2). The patient had “moon face” and severe facial edema, beard, central deposition of fat with slim extremities and atrophic muscles, and no pretibial edema. The skin was diffused with acne and both armpits had hyperpigmentaion. Laboratory tests revealed marked hypokalemia (2.1 mmol/L; normal range, 3.5–5.5 mmol/L), which could not be normalized with oral and intravenous potassium supplementation until spironolactone was added. A 75-g oral glucose tolerance test confirmed diabetes mellitus with a fasting blood glucose level of 9.19 mmol/l and a 2-h glucose level of 21.66 mmol/L, with a HbA1c level of 6.3%. She was started on insulin aspart30 (48 U daily). Endocrinological investigation identified severe hypercortisolism with loss of circadian rhythm. Plasma ACTH level was elevated to 1157 pg/mL, confirming ACTH-dependent Cushing’s syndrome. Except for testosterone, the catecholamine metabolites, growth hormone, calcitonin, and prolactin levels were all within the normal range (Table ). MRI and contrasted MRI revealed no pituitary adenoma and EAS was considered. Abdominal contrast-enhanced CT scanning revealed that the mass lesion was located in the right adrenal gland and not in the right hepatic posterior lobe. The mass was a heterogeneous solid tumor which was mildly enhanced with some patchy nonenhancing areas (Fig. ). PET/CT showed moderate fluorodeoxyglucose (FDG) uptake in the mass (Fig. ). Both contrasted CT and PET-CT revealed bilateral adrenal hyperplasia, but the neck, thorax, and pelvis were normal. We prepared to do inferior petrosal sinus sampling (IPSS) for ACTH assays, adrenal vein sampling for ACTH assays to make out the origin of ACTH. But the patient’s general condition rapidly deteriorated after admission, Adrenal tumorectomy was performed. During surgery, when the right adrenal mass was mobilized, no hypertensive crisis occurred. A 6.5-cm black mass was found arising from the medial branch of the right adrenal gland (Fig. ). Hematoxylin-eosin staining of the tumor revealed that most of the cells were chromaffin-like cells. In addition, there were multifocal oval eosinophilic cells under the tumor capsule (Fig. ). Immunohistochemical staining showed positive staining for chromogranin A (CgA) (Fig. ) and CD56 (Fig. ), with a Ki67 labeling index of approximately 16% (Fig. ) for chromaffin-like cells. No positive ACTH immunostaining was noticed (Fig. ). Positive immunostaining for CRH and Melan-A (Fig. and ) and negative immunostaining for CgA and CD56 were found in the eosinophilic cells, indicating that CRH production is indeed derived from the tumor’s peripheral cells. One day after surgery, ACTH levels had decreased from 715 to 14.3 pg/ml and serum cortisol level had decreased from more than 50 to 10.4 μg/dl. One week postoperatively, blood potassium and glucose levels normalized without the need for medication. The signs and symptoms of Cushing’s syndrome gradually disappeared within two months, and the hydrocortisone supplementation (initial dosage was 60 mg daily and tapered

title: pmc-6010360-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-6010360-1
病例摘要：一名四岁女孩，有窒息性胸廓发育不良（Jeune 综合征）和终末期肾病的病史，并在肾移植后接受免疫抑制治疗以对抗慢性排斥反应。她因心肺功能衰竭被收治入我们三级儿童重症监护病房（PICU）。患儿已插管并开始机械通气。她每天进行腹膜透析以治疗肾功能衰竭，过去六个月一直在使用达普松预防肺炎衣原体感染。在住院期间，她出现了多种并发症，包括败血症、电解质紊乱和血小板减少。她在使用芬太尼、咪达唑仑、霉酚酸酯、泼尼松龙、泮托拉唑、头孢吡肟和达普松等药物。在住院第三周，患儿出现腹泻，并随后发展为代谢性酸中毒。此外，在吸入氧气浓度增加至100%的情况下，尽管脉搏血氧饱和度（脉动外周毛细血管氧饱和度SPO2）显示低氧饱和度（82%-87%），但仍观察到发绀现象。血液气体分析结果符合代谢性酸中毒（pH 7.23，动脉氧分压PaO2 125 mmHg，动脉血二氧化碳分压PaCO2 42 mmHg，碳酸氢盐HCo3 14.6，碱剩余BE -9）。鉴于发绀和脉搏血氧饱和度低（SPO2）而动脉氧分压正常的情况，怀疑为高铁血红蛋白血症。进行了甲基血红蛋白测定，结果显示甲基血红蛋白水平为21.5%（正常范围0-2%）。实验室检查排除了溶血的可能性。由于该患儿有终末期肾病，未考虑使用美蓝治疗，并开始通过胃管给予每日维生素C 500 mg。达普松停用，每月进行布地米定雾化吸入以预防肺炎衣原体感染。连续的甲基血红蛋白水平测定显示逐渐改善的趋势。48小时内，高铁血红蛋白血症自行缓解，水平降至0.4 mg/dl。在继续使用维生素C四天后停止，并且停用维生素C后，甲基血红蛋白水平保持低于0.3 mg/dl。经过仔细审查药物和检查结果后，我们得出结论认为达普松可能是导致该患儿高铁血红蛋白血症的可能原因。

metadata.original_text: A four-year-old girl with a history of asphyxiating thoracic dysplasia (Jeune syndrome) and end-stage renal disease, with a post-renal transplant, was on immunosuppressive therapy for chronic rejection. She was admitted to our tertiary care pediatric intensive care unit (PICU) with cardiorespiratory failure. The child was intubated and started on mechanical ventilation. The child was on daily peritoneal dialysis for renal failure and on dapsone for Pneumocystis prophylaxis for the last six months. During the hospital stay, she developed multiple complications, including sepsis, electrolyte imbalance, and thrombocytopenia. She was on various medications, including fentanyl, midazolam, mycophenolate, prednisolone, pantoprazole, cefepime, and dapsone. During the third week of hospital stay, the child had diarrhea and then developed metabolic acidosis. She was also noted to have cyanosis, low oxygen saturation (82% to 87%) by pulse oximetry (peripheral capillary oxygen saturation (SPO2)), despite the escalation of inspired oxygen to 100%. A blood gas analysis consistent with metabolic acidosis (ph 7.23, oxygen partial pressure (PaO2) 125 mmHg, partial pressure of carbon dioxide in arterial blood (PaCo2) 42 mmHg, HCo3 14.6, bases excess (BE) -9). With cyanosis, low oxygen saturation by pulse oximetry (SPO2) in the setting of normal oxygen partial pressure (PaO2) methemoglobinemia was suspected. Co-oximetry was ordered, which revealed a methemoglobin level of 21.5% (normal range 0 to 2%). Laboratory workup ruled out hemolysis. Since the child had end-stage renal disease, methylene blue was not considered as a treatment option, and she was started on daily ascorbic acid 500 mg via a gastrostomy tube. Dapsone was discontinued and pentamidine nebulization monthly started for Pneumocystis prophylaxis. Serial methemoglobin levels on co-oximetry showed an improving trend. Within 48 hours, the methemoglobinemia resolved and the level came down to 0.4 mg/dl. Ascorbic acid was continued for four more days and discontinued. Off ascorbic acid, the methemoglobin level remained less than 0.3 mg/dl. After a meticulous review of the medications and workup, we concluded that dapsone was the probable cause of methemoglobinemia in this child.

title: pmc-6010361-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-6010361-1
主要诊断：吉兰-巴雷综合征
病例摘要：一名15岁的女孩因过去10天逐渐加重的下肢无力、2天内无法排尿以及间歇性6/10级下腹部疼痛前来急诊。她没有发热、皮疹、头痛、腰痛或视力模糊等伴随症状。也没有前驱呼吸道感染或腹泻病史。既往无重要疾病史。在出现这些症状约24天前，她在被狗咬后接受了神经组织羊脑抗狂犬疫苗接种。体格检查显示患者未处于急性痛苦状态。体温正常，生命体征如下：a) 血压：130/80 mmHg；b) 呼吸频率：每分钟18次；c) 心率：每分钟102次。神经系统检查未见面部不对称和颅神经功能完好。下肢运动系统检查显示以下情况：a) 膝关节力量：膝盖以下为⅕级；b) 髋部肌肉力量：双侧髋屈肌和伸展肌均为⅕级；c) 双腿的肌张力和反射：双腿肌张力降低，膝腱反射和踝腱反射消失；d) 关节位置感和振动觉：关节位置感和振动觉减弱，双侧足底有感觉过敏。上肢检查正常。心肺系统在检查中无异常发现。腹部检查时，在耻骨联合上方可触及尿潴留的膀胱，并且触痛明显。实验室检查显示血红蛋白为12.5 g/dL，红细胞比容为44%；白细胞计数为6500/cmm；使用韦斯特格伦法测定的第1小时红细胞沉降率为23 mm（正常范围：45–100 mg/dl）。脑脊液检查显示脑脊液清澈、压力正常，葡萄糖浓度75 mg/dL（正常范围：45–100 mg/dl），蛋白质浓度2.5 g/L（正常范围：0.18–0.45 g/dl）和白细胞计数为2/cmm（出现蛋白-细胞分离现象）。根据体格检查和脑脊液检查结果，初步诊断为吉兰-巴雷综合征。电生理学研究（确诊试验）显示有髓鞘脱失性多发神经病，符合吉兰-巴雷综合征的特征。血浆置换和物理治疗在6至8个月内几乎完全恢复了她的健康状况。

metadata.original_text: A 15-year-old girl presented to the emergency department with a history of progressive lower limbs weakness for 10 days, inability to pass urine and intermittent grade 6/10 lower abdominal pain for two days. She had no associated symptoms like fever, rash, headache, backache or blurring of vision. No antecedent respiratory tract infection or diarrheal illness. Past medical history was insignificant. About 24 days prior to these symptoms, she received neural tissue sheep brain anti-rabies vaccine following a dog bite. On physical examination, the patient was not in acute distress. She was afebrile and her vitals were: a) Blood pressure: 130/80 mm Hg; b) Respiratory rate: 18 breaths/minute; c) Heart rate: 102 bpm. Neurological examination revealed no facial asymmetry and intact cranial nerves. Motor system examination of the lower limbs revealed following: a) Power of the knee: grade ⅕ below the knees; b) Power of the hips: grade ⅕ of the hip flexors and extensors bilaterally; c) Tone and reflexes of the legs: hypotonia of legs bilaterally with loss of knee and ankle reflexes bilaterally; d) Joint position and vibration sense: reduced joint position and vibration was noticed, and there was hyperesthesia of the soles bilaterally. Upper limbs were normal on physical examination. The cardiorespiratory system was unremarkable on examination. On abdominal examination, urinary bladder was palpable above the symphysis pubis and was tender on palpation. Laboratory investigations revealed hemoglobin of 12.5 g/dl with the hematocrit of 44%; TLC was 6500/cmm and ESR at the first hour using Westergren method was 23 mm. Cerebrospinal fluid examination (CSF) revealed clear fluid, normal opening pressure, glucose 75 mg/dl (normal range: 45–100 mg/dl), proteins 2.5 g/l (normal range: 0.18–0.45 g/dl) and WBCs 2/cmm (albuminocytologic dissociation). Based on physical examination and CSF findings a provisional diagnosis of Guillain–Barre syndrome was made. Electrophysiological study (confirmatory test) revealed demyelinating polyneuropathy consistent with Guillain–Barre syndrome. Plasmapheresis and physical therapy sessions resulted in a nearly complete recovery in six to eight months.

title: pmc-6010465-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-6010465-1
病例摘要：一位68岁的男性患者于2014年10月因孤立性右腋窝肿块就诊。腋窝活检显示为原发不明的低分化（分级3，Ki67 85%）神经内分泌癌（CD56、嗜铬粒蛋白和突触素阳性；TTF1、CDX2和默克尔细胞多瘤病毒阴性）。正电子发射断层扫描/计算机断层摄影术显示右腋窝肿块且未发现其他可识别的病灶。患者于2014年10月至2015年4月接受了六次卡铂和依托泊苷化疗，经过三次疗程后出现部分缓解，但在第六次疗程后出现了肿瘤生长的证据。他于2015年6月被转介至实验性癌症医学团队，并同意参加TARGET研究。同时，他也接受了孤立腋窝肿块的手术切除，成功实现了完全切除，并在2015年7月获得了新鲜组织用于PDX和转化研究。经过短暂的无病期后，患者于2015年12月因盆腔内出现转移性结节复发。患者于2016年3月至10月接受了卡培他滨和替莫唑胺治疗，最佳反应为疾病进展。随后将治疗方案改为干扰素和沙丁胺醇，目前根据RECIST 1.1标准，其病情在该联合治疗下保持稳定。

metadata.original_text: A 68-year old gentleman presented with an isolated right axillary mass in October 2014. An axillary biopsy revealed poorly-differentiated (Grade 3, Ki67 85%) neuroendocrine carcinoma of unknown origin (positive for CD56, chromagranin and synaptophysin; negative for TTF1, CDX2 and Merkel Cell Polyomavirus). Positron emission technology/computed tomography demonstrated a right axillary mass and no other identifiable sites of disease. The patient received six cycles of carboplatin and etoposide chemotherapy between Oct 2014 and April 2015 with RECIST partial response after three cycles but with evidence of tumor growth after cycle 6. He was referred to the Experimental Cancer Medicine Team and consented to TARGET in June 2015. In parallel he was referred for surgical resection of the isolated axillary mass which achieved a complete resection and permitted access to fresh tissue for PDX and translational research in July 2015. Following a brief disease-free period, the patient relapsed with metastatic nodules within the retroperitoneum in December 2015. The patient was treated with capecitabine and temozolamide between March and October 2016 with best response of progressive disease. Treatment was switched to interferon and sandostatin and his disease has remained stable by RECIST 1.1 criteria on this combination at the time of writing.

title: pmc-6010516-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-6010516-1
病例摘要：一名40岁白人男性，有系统性血管炎（PAN）的既往诊断，在2016年1月因门脉高压相关的食管静脉曲张导致大量呕血入院。在他儿童时期，他患有慢性关节痛和踝关节肿胀，被诊断为幼年特发性关节炎。到4岁时，他表现出发育迟缓的症状，包括行走困难。20岁时，他反复出现缺血性中风，导致持续的语言障碍、共济失调和无力。在此期间，他还出现了反复的紫色皮下结节，这些结节会溃疡，但对糖皮质激素有反应。基于皮肤活检的结果，他被诊断为PAN。他需要长期维持每天7.5毫克泼尼松的剂量，减少剂量会导致皮肤病变复发。在他儿童时期，他没有明确原因地出现了视力丧失，体检未发现炎症性眼部疾病。他的视力在过去几年中一直稳定。他的病史还包括反复出现口腔和生殖器溃疡，这些溃疡也对糖皮质激素有反应。他的淋巴细胞计数偏低（绝对淋巴细胞计数400/μl [1000-4800]，CD3 422/μl [600-2990]，CD4 370/μl [440-2160]，CD8 49/μl [120-1320]，CD19 11/μl [100-700]），但淋巴细胞对丝裂原的增殖试验正常。此外，他还存在低γ球蛋白血症（IgG 383 mg/dl [762-1488]，IgA 46 [70-390]，IgM <20 [38-328]），但对破伤风和肺炎链球菌的抗体水平保护性正常。没有反复感染的历史记录。

metadata.original_text: A 40-year-old Caucasian male, with a prior diagnosis of PAN, presented in January 2016 with large volume hematemesis from esophageal varices related to portal hypertension. Throughout his childhood he had chronic arthralgia and swelling of his ankles diagnosed as juvenile idiopathic arthritis. By age 4, he manifested developmental delays, including difficulty with ambulation. At the age of 20, he developed recurrent ischemic strokes causing persistent dysarthria, ataxia, and weakness. During that time, he developed recurrent violaceous subcutaneous lesions that would ulcerate, but were responsive to glucocorticoids. He was diagnosed with PAN based on skin biopsies. He required a long-term maintenance dose of prednisone 7.5 mg daily, as reduction would led to recurrent skin lesions. In childhood, he developed poorly explained visual loss without evidence of inflammatory eye disease on physical exam. His visual acuity had been stable for the last couple years prior to presentation. His history was also remarkable for recurrent mouth and genital ulcers, which were also responsive to glucocorticoids. He had lymphopenia (absolute lymphocytes count 400/μl [1000-4800], CD3 422/μl [600-2990], CD4 370/μl [440-2160], CD8 49/μl [120-1320], CD19 11/μl [100-700]), yet normal lymphocyte proliferation studies to mitogens. Additionally, he had hypogammaglobulinemia (IgG 383 mg/dl [762-1488], IgA 46 [70-390], IgM <20 [38-328]), but had protective antibody levels to both tetanus and pneumococcus. There was no history of recurrent infections.

title: pmc-6010516-2
text:
病例标题：pmc-6010516-2
病例摘要：一名43岁的白人男性，是患者1的兄弟，有类似的临床表现。在他5岁时，因多发性关节炎被诊断为幼年特发性关节炎。8岁时，他被诊断为第四期霍奇金淋巴瘤（记录不可用）。最初他仅接受了放射治疗，但后来转为化疗 [初始使用MOPP（ Mechlorethamine、Vincristine、Procarbazine 和 Prednisone），后改为ABVD（Doxorubicin、Bleomycin、Vinblastine 和 Dacarbazine）]，一年后达到缓解。24岁时，他突然出现左侧持续性麻木，并随后出现了双侧感觉神经性听力损失，左耳几乎完全失聪。26岁时，他因粪便中出现鲜红色血液而就诊，需要切除6英寸的小肠，原因不明。到29岁时，他发展为心力衰竭和肺动脉高压，推测与ABVD治疗有关。他的病史还包括上腔静脉闭塞（疑似由导管引起）和食道静脉曲张。免疫学评估显示正常免疫球蛋白、对丝裂原的淋巴细胞增殖以及除CD8计数略低（83/μl）外正常的淋巴细胞亚群。他具有破伤风保护性抗体水平。根据这些表现，高度怀疑为DADA2。每位患者及其父母均获得了书面知情同意，用于遗传测试及此病例报告的发表。对两名患者及其未受影响的父母进行了ADA2外显子测序（方法见参考文献）。仅在患者2中检测了腺苷脱氨酶2水平，并与DADA2患者、成人携带者和成年健康对照组进行了比较。

metadata.original_text: A 43-year-old Caucasian male, brother to Patient 1, had a similar presentation. At 5 years of age, he was diagnosed with juvenile idiopathic arthritis after presenting with polyarthritis. At the age of 8, he was diagnosed with stage IV Hodgkin’s lymphoma (records were not available). He was initially treated with radiation therapy alone, but later transitioned to chemotherapy [initially with MOPP (mechlorethamine, vincristine, procarbazine, and prednisone) and later converted to ABVD (doxorubicin, bleomycin, vinblastine, and dacarbazine)] with remission achieved 1 year later. At age 24, he developed sudden onset left-sided persistent numbness followed by bilateral sensorineural hearing loss with near complete left-sided deafness. At age 26, he presented with bright red blood in his stool, which required resection of 6 inches of small intestines for reasons that were unclear. By age 29, he developed heart failure and pulmonary hypertension presumed secondary to ABVD treatment. His history was also significant for superior vena cava occlusion, presumed secondary to a port catheter, and esophageal varices. Immunologic evaluation revealed normal immunoglobulins, lymphocyte proliferation to mitogens, and lymphocyte subsets except for a slightly low CD8 count (83/μl). He had protective antibody levels to tetanus. Based on these presentations, there was a high suspicion for DADA2. Written informed consent was obtained for each patient, as well as their parents for genetic testing, and for the publication of this case report. ADA2 exon sequencing was performed on both patients and their unaffected parents as previously described (). Adenosine deaminase 2 levels were tested only in Patient 2 with comparisons made to DADA2 patients, adult carriers for ADA2 mutations and adult healthy controls.

title: pmc-6010554-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-6010554-1
病例摘要：一名35岁女性因间歇性头痛持续5年、绝经超过2个月以及视力模糊和泌乳超过1个月入院。五年前，患者开始经历逐渐加重的枕部和额部间歇性头痛。在入院前一个月，她出现视力减退，并且右侧颞侧视野缺失，同时伴有双侧泌乳现象，没有脓性或血性的分泌物。自症状出现以来，患者未出现恶心、呕吐、嗜睡、寒战、脱发或疲劳等症状。计算机断层扫描（CT）显示鞍上区域存在不规则的囊实性肿块，大小为1.4*1厘米，并且可以显著增强。在平扫CT中，病灶实性部分的CT值为40 Hounsfield单位（HU），而在增强后，该值为74 HU，囊性部分未见增强。病灶边界不清晰，密度不均匀，未观察到明显的钙化。海绵窦受累。脑室系统、沟回、脑裂和池均无异常。此外，中线结构未见移位，颅骨结构也未见异常。鼻旁窦亦未见明显异常。磁共振成像（MRI）显示鞍上区域存在不规则的囊实性肿块，并且涉及垂体柄，病灶与垂体之间的边界不清。此外，该肿块压迫视交叉，病灶实性部分显著增强，而囊性部分未见增强。脑部或鼻旁窦内无异常信号，亦未见钙化（图）。辅助检查显示患者的尿量和比重均在正常范围内（尿量：1800 mL/天；尿比重：1.015）。垂体功能评估结果显示泌乳素水平升高（45.47 μg/L，女性正常范围为2.8–29.2 U/L），生长激素（GH）和性腺激素功能完整。胰岛素样生长因子1（IGF-1）水平为120 ng/ml（109–284 ng/ml）。垂体-甲状腺轴和垂体-肾上腺轴均完整（表）。血沉和CRP水平正常，结核及其他感染相关的指标均为阴性。由于垂体柄增厚，在进行任何侵入性操作前进行了脑脊液分析以确定肿块的性质。脑脊液分析结果除人绒毛膜促性腺激素（hCG）显著升高（18.54 U/L，正常范围：0–5 U/L）外均正常。然而，血清hCG和甲胎蛋白（AFP）水平正常。建议进行活检以明确诊断，但患者拒绝。考虑到畸胎瘤的可能性，推荐放射治疗。经过10次放射治疗（总计10 Gy），颅内肿块未见缩小，头痛亦无缓解。因此，患者再次入院。除了生长激素和促性腺激素缺乏外，其他轴均完整（表）。IGF-1水平为89 ng/ml（109–284 ng/ml）。重复脑脊液分析显示CSF中的hCG水平未见明显下降（17.41 U/L，正常范围：0–5 U/L）。MRI检查未见肿块缩小的迹象（图）。由于颅内肿块增大，患者被转至神经外科部门进行肿瘤全切除。病理分析提示为颅咽管瘤（图）。在显微镜下，鞍区处侧裂分离，并释放脑脊液。大脑组织塌陷，颞叶的一部分被移除。肿瘤位于鞍上区域，在垂体柄纵轴的第二个间隙内被切除并冷冻分析。肿瘤与下丘脑关系密切。止血后，使用纱布填塞。

metadata.original_text: A 35-year-old female was admitted to our hospital complaining of an intermittent headache for 5 years, menopause for more than 2 months, and blurred vision and lactation for more than 1 month. Five years prior, the patient began suffering from intermittent and gradually deteriorating occipital and frontal headaches. One month prior to admission, she had impaired vision and an absent right temporal view and simultaneous bilateral galactorrhea, without purulent or bloody secretions. Since the onset of symptoms, the patient experienced no nausea or vomiting, sleepiness, chills, hair loss, or fatigue. Computed tomography (CT) showed an irregular cystic solid mass in the suprasellar area. The size of the mass was 1.4*1 cm and could be markedly enhanced. The CT value of the solid part of the lesion on plain CT was 40 Hounsfield units (HU); in the enhancement, the value was 74 HU, and the cystic part showed no enhancement. The boundary of the lesion was less clear, the density was not uniform, and no obvious calcification was observed. The cavernous sinus was involved. There were no abnormalities in the ventricular system, sulcus, brain split and pool. Moreover, there was no shift in the midline structure, and no abnormalities were found in the skull structure. The sinuses exhibited no obvious abnormalities. Magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) of the brain and pituitary showed an irregular cystic solid mass in the suprasellar area, involving in the pituitary stalk, and the boundary between the lesion and pituitary was unclear. In addition, the mass pressed on the optic chiasm, and the solid part of the lesion was significantly enhanced, while the cystic part showed no enhancement. There was no abnormal signal in the brain or paranasal sinuses nor signs of calcification (Figure ). Auxiliary examinations revealed that the patient's urine volume and specific gravity were within the normal range (urine volume: 1,800 mL/day; urine specific gravity: 1.015). A pituitary function evaluation showed hyperprolactinemia (45.47 μg/L, normal range for female: 2.8–29.2 U/L) and intact growth hormone (GH) and gonadotropin function. The insulin-like growth factor 1 (IGF-1) level was 120 ng/ml (109–284 ng/ml). The pituitary-thyroid and pituitary-adrenal axis were intact (Tables –). The blood sedimentation and CRP level were normal, and indicators related to tuberculosis and other infections were negative. Because of the thickening of the pituitary stalk, CSF analysis was performed to identify the nature of the mass lesion before any invasive procedures were performed. The results of CSF analysis were normal except for a significantly increased human HCG (18.54 U/L, normal range: 0–5 U/L) level. However, the serum HCG and α-fetoprotein (AFP) levels were normal. A biopsy was recommended to clarify the diagnosis, but the patient declined. Considering the possibility of a germinoma, radiotherapy was recommended. No regression of the intracranial mass and no resolution of the headache were observed after 10 radiotherapy treatments (total 10 Gy). Therefore, the patient was admitted a second time. Apart from a deficiency in GH and hypogonadotropic hormones, the other axes were intact (Tables –). The IGF-1 level was 89 ng/ml (109–284 ng/ml). A repeated CSF analysis indicated there was no obvious decrease in the HCG level in the CSF (17.41 U/L, normal range: 0–5 U/L). An MRI showed no signs of shrinkage of the mass (Figure ). Due to the enlarged intracranial mass, the patient was transferred to the neurosurgical department for total resection of the mass. The pathological analysis was indicative of a craniopharyngioma (Figure ). Under a microscope, the lateral fissure was separated at the saddle area, and CSF was released. The brain tissue collapsed, and a portion of the temporal lobe was removed. The tumor was located in the suprasellar area. The tumor was removed from the second gap along the longitudinal axis of the pituitary stalk and was frozen for analysis. The tumor and hypothalamus were closely related. Hemostasis was achieved, and the gauze invento

title: pmc-6010806-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-6010806-1
病例摘要：一名54岁男性商人因过去三个月逐渐加重的呼吸困难前来我们的诊所就诊。他还抱怨有间歇性咳嗽，伴有黄色痰液，并且在运动时出现呼吸困难已有半年时间。他有良好控制的高血压史，并每天吸一包烟。家族病史中值得注意的是肺腺癌。旅行史显示在过去一年中有去过中国的云南省。他在入院前一个月首先在当地诊所就诊了一位胸科医生，胸部X光检查显示双侧肺野浸润增加。口服阿奇霉素治疗后，他的呼吸困难没有改善。然后他来到我们的诊所寻求第二意见。体检时否认发热、关节痛、干眼或口干、肌肉无力、下肢凹陷性水肿和皮肤疹子。体格检查除双侧肺部听诊有细湿啰音外均无异常。胸部X光显示双侧弥漫间质浸润（图）。他被收治入院进一步进行呼吸功能的评估和监测。住院期间，患者没有发热，呼吸模式平顺。环境空气中动脉血氧饱和度（SpO2）为95%。血液白细胞计数未见白细胞增多或左移。自身免疫标志物包括类风湿因子、抗核抗体、抗Smith抗体、抗核糖核酸蛋白抗体、抗SSA、抗SSB和抗Scl-70均为阴性。从诱导痰中提取的肺炎衣原体聚合酶链反应检测结果为阴性。三组痰培养中有一组显示非结核分枝杆菌，考虑到他的症状和影像学发现，后来归因于环境污染。胸部CT显示双侧肺野广泛斑片状磨玻璃样密度影叠加有间质增厚的间隔线和小叶内间隔线，呈“铺路石”模式（图）。肺功能测试显示单次呼气一氧化碳弥散能力正常降低（DLCO 5.42 mmol/min/kPa，相当于预测值的57.7%）。支气管镜检查未见气道病变。经皮超声支气管镜（EBUS）显示“暴风雪征”，提示右下肺上叶段磨玻璃样密度影（图）。刷检细胞学、支气管肺泡灌洗液（BAL）和活检均进行。刷检细胞学未见恶性细胞。宏观上，BAL标本外观清晰。BAL微生物培养未发现细菌、结核分枝杆菌（TB）、非结核分枝杆菌（NTM）、真菌或肺炎衣原体。我们进行了钳取活检和冷冻活检以获取较大病灶的组织样本。通过钳取活检获得的四个0.2×0.2×0.1 cm组织碎片病理报告仅显示慢性炎症。另一方面，通过冷冻活检获得的四个0.5×0.5×0.2 cm组织碎片显示过碘酸-雪夫（PAS）阳性颗粒状蛋白性渗出物和轻度间质淋巴细胞浸润填充肺泡空间，符合肺泡蛋白沉积病（PAP）（图）。我们与患者讨论了治疗方案，并建议进行全肺灌洗。患者拒绝我们的治疗建议，选择密切随访。他出院后接受门诊随访。后来他的呼吸困难自发缓解，多次胸部X光检查显示双侧间质浸润消退。

metadata.original_text: A 54-year-old male businessman presented to our clinic with progressive shortness of breath for the last three months. He also complained of intermittent cough with yellowish sputum and dyspnoea upon exertion for half a year. He had a history of well-controlled hypertension and smoking one pack of cigarettes per day. Family history was remarkable for adenocarcinoma of the lung. Travel history was remarkable for travel to Yunnan, China, in the past year. He first visited a pulmonologist in a local clinic a month prior to admission, where chest X-ray demonstrated increased infiltration over bilateral lung fields. Oral azithromycin was administered, but his dyspnoea progressed. He then visited our clinic for a second opinion. Upon examination, he denied fever, joint pain, dry eyes or mouth, muscle weakness, pitting oedema over lower legs, and skin rash. Physical examination was unremarkable, except chest auscultation demonstrating fine crackles over bilateral lung fields. Chest X-ray showed diffuse interstitial infiltration bilaterally (Fig. ). He was admitted for further workup and monitoring of his respiratory performance. During hospitalization, the patient had no fever, and respiratory pattern was smooth. Peripheral capillary oxygen saturation (SpO2) was 95% under ambient air. Serum white blood cell count showed no leucocytosis or left shift. Autoimmune markers, including rheumatoid factor, antinuclear antibody, anti-Smith antibody, anti-ribonucleoprotein antibody, anti-SSA, anti-SSB, and anti-Scl-70, were all negative. Polymerase chain reaction of Pneumocystis jiroveci from induced sputum was negative. One of three sets of sputum culture demonstrated non-tuberculous mycobacteria, which was later attributed to environmental contamination given his symptoms and image findings. Chest CT disclosed extensive patchy ground-glass opacities superimposed with thickened interlobular septa and intralobular lines over both lung fields, demonstrating a “crazy paving” pattern (Fig.). Pulmonary function test showed normal spirometry and moderately reduced diffusing capacity of the lungs for carbon monoxide (DLCO) on single breath diffusing capacity test (5.42 mmol/min/kPa, correlated with 57.7% of predicted value). Bronchoscopy indicated no endobronchial lesions. A radial probe endobronchial ultrasound (EBUS) showed a “blizzard sign”, suggesting ground-glass opacity over the superior segment of the right lower lobe (Fig.) . Brush cytology, bronchoalveolar lavage (BAL), and biopsy were performed. Brush cytology was negative for malignant cells. Macroscopically, the BAL specimen was clear in appearance. Microbiological workup of BAL was negative for presence of bacteria, tubercolosis (TB), non-tuberculous mycobacteria (NTM), fungus, and Pneumocystis jiroveci. We performed both a forceps biopsy and a cryobiopsy on the larger-sized lesions. Pathological report of the four 0.2 × 0.2 × 0.1 cm tissue fragments obtained by forceps biopsy indicated only chronic inflammation. On the other hand, the four 0.5 × 0.5 × 0.2 cm tissue fragments acquired by cryobiopsy revealed periodic acid-Schiff (PAS)-positive granular proteinaceous exudate with mild interstitial lymphocytic infiltration filling the alveolar spaces consistent with PAP (Fig.). We discussed the treatment options with the patient, and whole lung lavage was advised. The patient declined our suggested treatment and opted for close surveillance. He was discharged with outpatient follow up. Later, his shortness of breath spontaneously resolved, and serial chest X-rays showed resolution of the interstitial infiltration of the lungs.

title: pmc-6011099-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-6011099-1
病例摘要：一名5岁男童在2岁时因反复发生的鼻窦和肺部感染以及XLP1（SH2D1A基因中的无义突变c. 191G>A）家族史而引起了免疫学服务的关注。值得注意的是，他的叔叔患有XLP1，并有EBV相关的中枢神经系统淋巴瘤病史。NK细胞和CD8细胞的SAP表达缺失，证实了XLP1的诊断。NKT细胞无法检测到。还观察到了严重的低γ球蛋白血症。他被监测并维持每月一次的静脉免疫球蛋白（IVIG）输注，仅有轻微的鼻窦和肺部感染突破。由于社会原因，对IVIG的依从性不佳。家庭推迟了干细胞移植。5岁时，他因急性行为改变就诊，表现为无法控制的攻击性，需要住院精神科治疗。基本实验室检查包括全血细胞计数和全面代谢面板均正常。具体来说，未发现低色素症、转氨酶升高以及炎症标志物（如C-反应蛋白CRP）和血小板计数正常。脑部MRI显示T2 FLAIR序列上有多处非增强的小病灶，主要位于额叶，并散布在皮质下白质中。这些病变在首次就诊后两周及四个月的重复MRI检查中未发生变化，提示这些病变可能是胶质瘢痕，且没有急性脑炎。PCR检测发现血液中有EBV存在（2300拷贝/毫升）。脑脊液（CSF）也显示有EBV（73拷贝/毫升），其他方面正常，仅轻度升高白细胞计数（8个/毫米³），其中79%为淋巴细胞和21%为单核细胞。立即开始静脉丙种球蛋白1克/公斤和静脉更昔洛韦10毫克/公斤/天治疗。然而，在接受14天的更昔洛韦治疗后，EBV计数仍然显著升高。在住院第16天和第23天分别给予利妥昔单抗。从第16天到第23天每天给予泼尼松龙1毫克/公斤，并于第23天重复静脉免疫球蛋白1克/公斤治疗。更昔洛韦治疗4个月后继续使用缬更昔洛韦45毫克/公斤/天。在利妥昔单抗输注前，EBV计数达到每毫升血液2300个EBV基因组拷贝。在第二次利妥昔单抗输注后的第五天，血液中CD19+和CD20+淋巴细胞及EBV PCR均消失，并且在接下来的五个月内持续未检出。在此期间进行了造血干细胞移植（HSCT）。初次就诊时IgM对EBV不可检测，患者从未发生血清转化。

metadata.original_text: A 5-year-old male initially came to the attention of the immunology service at 2 years of age with a history of recurrent sinopulmonary infections and a family history of XLP1 (nonsense mutation c. 191G>A in the SH2D1A gene). Of note, his uncle with XLP1 had a history of EBV-related central nervous system (CNS) lymphoma. SAP expression was found to be absent in NK and CD8 cells, confirming the diagnosis of XLP1. NKT cells were undetectable. Profound hypogammaglobulinemia was also noted. He was monitored and maintained on monthly intravenous immunoglobulin (IVIG) infusions with only minor breakthrough sinopulmonary infections. Adherence to IVIG was suboptimal due to social reasons. The family deferred stem cell transplantation. At the age of 5 years, he presented with acute behavioral changes, manifesting as uncontrolled aggression, requiring inpatient psychiatric treatment. Basic labs including complete blood count and comprehensive metabolic panel were normal. Specifically, no cytopenias, no transaminitis, and normal inflammatory markers including C-reactive protein (CRP) and platelet count were noted. MRI of the brain showed multiple small nonenhancing foci on T2 FLAIR sequence, mostly in the frontal lobes and scattered throughout the subcortical white matter (). The lesions remained unchanged on repeat MRI at 2 weeks and again at 4 months following presentation, suggesting that these lesions may be consistent with glial scars without acute inflammation of the brain. PCR revealed presence of EBV in the blood (2300 copies/ml). Cerebrospinal fluid (CSF) also demonstrated EBV (73 copies/ml). CSF was otherwise normal apart from only slightly elevated CSF WBC (8 cells/mm3), of which 79% were lymphocytes and 21% monocytes. Intravenous gamma globulin 1 g/kg and intravenous ganciclovir 10 mg/kg/day were started immediately. However, despite 14 days of ganciclovir treatment, EBV counts remained significantly elevated. Rituximab was administered on days 16 and 23 of admission. Prednisolone 1 mg/kg/day was given daily on days 16 through 23, and IVIG 1 g/kg was repeated on day 23. Valganciclovir 45 mg/kg/day was continued for 4 months after ganciclovir treatment. Prior to rituximab infusion, EBV counts had reached 2300 copies of EBV genome/mL of blood. Five days after the second rituximab infusion CD19+ and CD20+ lymphocytes and EBV PCR were found to be absent in the blood and remained absent for 5 months, at which time hematopoietic stem cell transplant (HSCT) was performed ( and ). IgM to EBV was undetectable at the time of presentation, and the patient never seroconverted.

title: pmc-6011100-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-6011100-1
病例摘要：一名12岁女孩（身高144厘米；体重40公斤）因癫痫发作和意识障碍入院。当时她的血糖水平为60毫克/分升（随机血糖正常值：70–200毫克/分升）。给予葡萄糖后，她恢复了意识。在入院前，她没有其他重要的合并症。通过家族史进一步检查，她被诊断患有MEN-1相关的胰岛素瘤和高钙血症。计算机断层扫描动脉期图像显示一个直径为20毫米的血管丰富的肿瘤位于胰头部位。肿瘤的供血动脉在血管造影中未清晰显示，并且选择性动脉钙注射也未能明确。我们考虑根据术中的发现可能需要进行扩展手术，如胰十二指肠切除术；因此，计划进行开腹手术而不是腹腔镜手术。她的完整甲状旁腺激素水平为66.0皮克/毫升（正常值：10–65皮克/毫升），调整后的血钙水平为10.3毫克/分升（正常值：8.7–9.9毫克/分升），尽管甲状旁腺超声检查未发现甲状旁腺肿瘤。其他与MEN-1相关的肿瘤也未被检测到。术前其他检查结果均无异常。手术前一天，将Medtronic Diabetes（美国诺斯ridge）Enlite™传感器插入她的上臂。虽然MiniMed 620G结合了胰岛素泵，但我们并未使用该泵。SCGM系统按照制造商的建议与OneTouch® UltraVue™血糖仪测量的毛细血管血糖进行了校准。未给予术前用药，她自行走进手术室。毛细血管血糖为80毫克/分升且SCGM系统已校准。连续葡萄糖输注开始于每小时4.6克，并用80毫克丙泊酚、50微克芬太尼和每分钟0.02微克/公斤的瑞芬太尼诱导全身麻醉。通过给予30毫克罗库溴铵获得肌肉松弛，随后进行气管插管。全身麻醉诱导后，在第八和第九胸椎间隙插入硬膜外导管。维持麻醉使用1.7%七氟醚、每分钟0.01–0.02微克/公斤的瑞芬太尼以及间歇性胸段硬膜外注射0.25%左布比卡因（3毫升）。插入动脉导管，通过ABL800 Flex血气分析仪（Radiometer，美国贝拉）测量动脉血糖为71毫克/分升，与胰岛素水平73毫克/分升一致。手术开始前静脉给予额外2克葡萄糖，术后20分钟内血糖从77毫克/分升上升至101毫克/分升（）。之后，血糖轻微下降并在一小时后几乎回到同一水平。外科医生告知我们肿瘤将很快通过剜除术切除。在肿瘤切除前不久，动脉血糖为76毫克/分升，胰岛素水平为80毫克/分升。手术20分钟后，胰岛素水平迅速上升。因此我们将连续葡萄糖输注速率降低至常规剂量每小时1克，并且胰岛素水平逐渐下降并稳定在约140毫克/分升左右。手术过程中，血压在90/50到120/70毫米汞柱之间波动，心率在60到90次/分钟之间变化。她被拔管后在手术室中，并转至普通外科病房。手术时间为2小时24分钟，麻醉时间3小时53分钟。术后疼痛通过持续硬膜外镇痛（每小时12微克芬太尼和0.2%左布比卡因4毫升）以及每隔6小时给予600毫克对乙酰氨基酚得到良好控制。她的术后恢复过程顺利，并在出院当天第10天出院。

metadata.original_text: A 12-year-old girl (height, 144 cm; weight, 40 kg) was presented to the hospital with an episode of seizure with impaired consciousness. Her BG at that time was 60 mg/dL (normal value of casual BG: 70–200 mg/dL). Glucose was administered and she recovered consciousness. She had no significant comorbidities prior to hospital admission. From her family history and further investigation, she was diagnosed as having insulinoma and hyperparathyroidism in MEN-1. Arterial phase images of computed tomography showed a vascularity-rich tumor of 20 mm in diameter located in the head of the pancreas. The feeding artery of the tumor was not clearly demonstrated by angiography and selective arterial calcium injection. We considered that extended surgical procedures such as pancreatoduodenectomy might be required depending on intraoperative findings; therefore, open abdominal surgery rather than laparoscopic surgery was scheduled. Her intact parathyroid hormone level was 66.0 pg/ml (normal value: 10–65 pg/mL) and her adjusted serum calcium level was 10.3 mg/dL (normal value: 8.7–9.9 mg/dL), although parathyroid ultrasound examination revealed no parathyroid tumor. Other tumors complicated with MEN-1 were not detected. The results of other preoperative examinations were unremarkable. On the day before surgery, an Enlite™ sensor of MiniMed™ 620G (Medtronic Diabetes, Northridge, CA, USA) SCGM system was inserted into her upper arm. Although MiniMed 620G was combined with an insulin pump, we did not use the pump. The SCGM system was calibrated as recommended by the manufacturer with capillary BG measured by OneTouch® UltraVue™ Blood Glucose Meter (Johnson & Johnson, New Brunswick, NJ, USA). No premedication was given and she walked into the operating room. Capillary BG was 80 mg/dL and the SCGM system was calibrated. Continuous glucose infusion was started at 4.6 g/hr, and general anesthesia was induced with 80 mg of propofol, 50 mcg of fentanyl, and 0.02 mcg/kg/min of remifentanil. Muscle relaxation was obtained by administration of 30 mg of rocuronium, and the trachea was intubated. After induction of general anesthesia, an epidural catheter was inserted at the eighth and ninth thoracic interspace. Anesthesia was maintained with 1.7% sevoflurane, 0.01–0.02 mcg/kg/min of remifentanil, and intermittent thoracic epidural administration of 0.25% levobupivacaine (3 ml). An arterial catheter was inserted, and arterial BG measured by an ABL800 Flex Blood Gas Analyzer (Radiometer, Brea, CA, USA) was 71 mg/dL, which was compatible with IG of 73 mg/dL. An additional 2 g of glucose was given intravenously before the start of surgery, and IG increased from 77 mg/dL to 101 mg/dL at 20 minutes (). After that, IG mildly decreased and returned to almost the same level after 1 hour. The surgeon informed us that the tumor would be removed by enucleation shortly. Just before tumor resection, arterial BG was 76 mg/dL and IG was 80 mg/dL. At 20 minutes after tumor resection, IG showed a rapid increase. We therefore decreased the continuous glucose infusion rate to the usual dose of 1 g/hr, and IG gradually decreased and was stabilized at about 140 mg/dL. During surgery, blood pressure was between 90/50 and 120/70 mmHg, and heart rate was between 60 and 90 bpm. She was extubated in the operating room and transferred to the general surgery ward. The operation time was 2 h and 24 min, and the anesthesia time was 3 h and 53 min. Postoperative pain was controlled well by continuous epidural analgesia (12 mcg of fentanyl and 0.2% levobupivacaine at 4 ml/hr) and administration of 600 mg of acetaminophen (every 6 hr). Her postoperative course was uneventful and she was discharged on POD 10.

title: pmc-6011104-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-6011104-1
病例摘要：一名83岁的女性因左马蹄肾中直径20毫米的肿瘤进一步检查而被转介至我们部门。除了49岁时患有子宫癌外，她没有其他显著的病史。实验室数据显示轻度贫血和肝功能略低（血红蛋白12.3 g/dL，AST 52 IU/L，ALT 44 IU/L，LDH 201 IU/L）。对比增强计算机断层扫描(CT)显示一个被囊包裹且几乎被肾脏覆盖了近30%的肾肿瘤。该肿瘤由四条动脉向左肾供血（）。我们按照图示设置腹腔镜穿刺点。首先从腹内接近，然后切断腹膜并接近肾脏。我们遇到了一条细小的动脉，并在确认供应区域后将其切断。随后夹闭主动脉并以1毫米手术边缘切除肿瘤。未观察到尿漏。使用双极电凝止血后，用1-0 Vicryl（Ethicon, 俄亥俄州辛辛那提）缝合，然后喷洒Arista AH（BARD; 罗德岛州沃里克）。如图所示固定线。确认无活动性出血后，放置引流管并关闭切口。手术总时间为2小时39分钟，夹闭时间为11分钟。病理检查结果显示为透明细胞癌（分级2级，INFα，v[−]，pT1a）。患者术后第11天出院，并且在43个月中未出现复发。

metadata.original_text: An 83-year-old woman was referred to our department for further examination of a left renal tumor 20 mm in diameter in her horseshoe kidney. She had no remarkable medical history except for uterine cancer at 49 years of age. The laboratory data showed slight anemia and a low liver function (Hb 12.3 g/dL, AST 52 IU/L, ALT44IU/L, and LDH 201 IU/L). Contrast-enhanced computed tomography (CT) showed a renal tumor covered with a capsule and buried by nearly 30%. The tumor was supplied by four arteries toward the left kidney (). We set the laparoscopic ports as shown in . We first approached intraperitoneally and then cut the peritoneal and approached to the renal helium. We encountered a thin artery and cut it after confirming the supplied area by clamping. We then clamped the main artery and cut the tumor with a 1 mm surgical margin. No urinary tract leakage was observed. After coagulation using bipolar forceps, we sutured using 1-0 Vicryl (Ethicon, Cincinnati, OH, USA) then sprayed with Arista AH (BARD; Warwick, RI, USA). We then fixed the thread as shown in . After confirming the lack of active bleeding, we placed a drainage tube and closed the incision. The total operation time was 2 h 39 min, with 11 min of clamping. A histopathological examination revealed clear cell carcinoma (grade 2, INFα, v[−], pT1a). The patient was discharged 11 days after surgery and has been free from recurrence for 43 months.

title: pmc-6011110-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-6011110-1
病例摘要：一名50岁的男性接受了活体腹腔镜供肾切除术（LLDN），通过经腹途径为其妹妹捐献左侧肾脏。该手术过程顺利，患者在术后三天出院。然而，在手术后一周内，患者出现了左侧阴囊和左大腿疼痛。体检时发现阴囊敏感性增高（所有odynia），但未见其他异常。泌尿科医生会诊后未发现泌尿系统并发症。神经病理性疼痛区域符合生殖股神经（GFN）的分布。开始使用抗精神病药物及L1/L2脊神经背根阻滞和脉冲射频消融等保守治疗，但这些治疗方法未能显著缓解疼痛，患者无法工作。从神经病理性疼痛开始后三年，为了缓解疼痛进行了手术治疗。在多学科讨论中，认为生殖股神经受压可能是导致患者神经病理性疼痛的最可能原因。最终，进行了经腹腔镜探查术。经过广泛的粘连松解后，在肾切除时用于闭合输尿管的止血夹被发现与GFN密切相关并被移除。由于局部瘢痕组织的存在，无法手术评估生殖股神经是否实际受损或形成了神经瘤。然而，似乎高度可能疼痛起源于该区域的生殖股神经。因此在正常外观的一段神经上切除了生殖股神经（）。病理分析证实该组织包含神经组织。术后两周内，患者完全无痛，并能恢复正常活动。

metadata.original_text: A 50-year-old man underwent live laparoscopic donor nephrectomy (LLDN), through transperitoneal approach, on his left kidney as a donor for his sister. This procedure went uneventful and the patient was discharged 3 days after surgery. However, within one week after the procedure the patient experienced pain at the left side of the scrotum and left upper leg. During physical examination, a hypersensitive scrotum (allodynia) was noted whereas no other abnormalities were seen. The urologist was consulted but no urologic complications were found. The neuropathic pain area befitted the genitofemoral nerve (GFN). Conservative treatment was initiated with neuroleptic drugs and blocks of the L1/L2 dorsal roots with local anaesthetics and pulsed radiofrequency lesioning. These treatments did not result in significant pain relief and he could not work. Three years after the start of the neuropathic pain, operative treatment aiming at pain relief was initiated. In a multidisciplinary meeting it was concluded that a nerve entrapment of the GFN was suspected to be the most likely cause of the patient's neuropathic pain. Eventually, an exploratory transperitoneal laparoscopy was performed. After extensive adhesiolysis, a hemoclip used for closure of the ureter at the time of nephrectomy was identified in close relation to the GFN and removed. Due to the local scarring it could not be surgically assessed to which extent the GFN was actually damaged or a neuroma was formed. It seemed, however, highly likely that the pain originated from the GFN in this area. We therefore cut the GFN proximally in a normal looking segment (). Pathological analysis of the tissue confirmed this to contain nerve tissue. Within 2 weeks following surgery, the patient was completely pain-free and could return to his normal activities.

title: pmc-6011111-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-6011111-1
病例摘要：一名32岁白人男性，有抑郁症病史，在自杀企图中因长时间吸入二氟乙烷（DFE）后出现暴力行为，被警方陪同送至急诊科。入院时情绪波动大，并在与警方的肢体冲突中有左肩和上肢挫伤。最初他意识模糊且言语攻击性，但六小时内变得定向力正常、合作并能提供可靠的病史。患者表示过去一年中每周吸入几次键盘清洁剂；然而，在过去的一个月里，频率增加到每天多次。除了抑郁症外，患者没有其他已知的医疗问题。否认有肾病个人或家族史。他否认饮酒，并报告过去两年每天抽半包香烟。除DFE外，否认其他物质滥用。未使用非甾体抗炎药（NSAID）药物。在本次二氟乙烷滥用期间，没有失去意识，但出现了令人恐惧的幻视和幻听以及焦虑，即使回到他自述的心理状态基线后这些症状仍然持续存在。初步实验室检查显示白细胞计数为21,000，多形核粒细胞占81%，血清肌酐升高至1.5mg/dL（无已知基线值），尿素氮为10mg/dL，肾小球滤过率为54 mL/min/1.73 m²，乳酸性酸中毒，肌酸激酶为350 U/L，血红蛋白碳氧合物水平为3.1%。尿液分析显示有3+蛋白质尿、中度血液、14个红细胞、3个白细胞和3个透明管型。尿毒筛查结果为阴性。患者在急诊科接受了单次调整肾功能剂量的万古霉素和哌拉西林-他唑巴坦治疗，静脉0.9%氯化钠溶液以及鼻导管吸氧，在入院前接受治疗。接下来24小时内，他接受了静脉液体和氧气治疗，乳酸、肌酸激酶和白细胞计数恢复正常。他的血清肌酐下降至1.3mg/dL。然而，在住院36小时后，他的血清肌酐无故上升到2.3，同时血红蛋白碳氧合物水平升至3.6%，而尿量保持稳定（）。重复尿液分析显示少量血液、2个红细胞、阴性蛋白质尿和无感染证据。他的生理盐水输注转换为碳酸氢钠与生理盐水混合溶液，但因出现瘙痒症状后停止输液。最终，他被转换回每小时75毫升的生理盐水输液。肾超声显示双侧肾脏回声增强，符合医疗性肾病，未见大小、萎缩或囊肿变化（）。因此，患者在入院前可能有一定程度的慢性肾病（CKD）。接下来三天内，他继续接受静脉生理盐水治疗，并且血清肌酐有所改善，尿液分析恢复正常。出院时血清肌酐为1.6。

metadata.original_text: A 32-year-old Caucasian male with a known history of depression presented to the emergency department accompanied by police after a violent outburst following prolonged DFE abuse during a suicide attempt. On admission, he was emotionally labile and had contusions on his left shoulder and upper extremities due to a physical altercation with police. He was initially confused and verbally abusive, but within six hours he was oriented, cooperative, and able to provide a reliable history. The patient stated that he had huffed keyboard cleaner several days per week for the past year; however, the frequency had increased over the last month to several times daily. Other than depression, the patient had no other known medical problems. He denied any personal or family history of kidney disease. The patient denied drinking alcohol, and he reported smoking one-half pack of cigarettes per day for the previous two years. He denied any other substance abuse except for DFE. He reported no use of nonsteroidal anti-inflammatory (NSAID) medications. During this episode of difluoroethane abuse, he had no loss of consciousness, but experienced frightening visual and auditory hallucinations as well as anxiety that persisted even after returning to his self-reported baseline mental status. Initial labs revealed a WBC count of 21,000 with polymorphonuclear predominance of 81%, an elevated creatinine of 1.5mg/dL with no known baseline, BUN of 10mg/dL, GFR of 54 mL/min/1.73 m2, lactic acidosis, creatine kinase of 350 U/L, and a carboxyhemoglobin level of 3.1%. Urinalysis was significant for 3+ proteinuria, moderate blood, 14 RBCs, 3 WBCs, and 3 hyaline casts. He had a negative urine drug screen. The patient received single renally adjusted doses of Vancomycin and Piperacillin-Tazobactam, intravenous 0.9% saline, and oxygen by nasal cannula while in the emergency department prior to admission. Over the next 24 hours, he received intravenous fluids and oxygen with subsequent normalization of lactic acid, creatine kinase, and leukocyte count. His creatinine down trended to 1.3mg/dL. However, 36 hours into admission, his serum creatinine inexplicably rose to 2.3 with a rise in carboxyhemoglobin to 3.6%, while his urine output remained stable (). Repeat urinalysis showed a small amount of blood with RBC of 2, negative proteinuria, and no evidence of infection. His normal saline infusion was transitioned to bicarbonate with saline, but was discontinued after the patient developed pruritus. Ultimately, he was transitioned to normal saline at 75 ml/hour. A renal ultrasound showed increased echogenicity of both kidneys consistent with medical renal disease, without change in size, atrophy, or cystic lesions (). Thus, it is likely that the patient had some degree of chronic kidney disease (CKD) prior to admission. For the next three days, he continued to receive intravenous normal saline with subsequent improvement of creatinine and normalization of his urinalysis and was discharged with a creatinine of 1.6.

title: pmc-6011113-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-6011113-1
病例摘要：一名44岁女性患者因种植体植入前往圣保罗里贝拉普雷托牙科学院口腔颌面外科和牙周病科就诊。初次检查时发现右上中切牙有一个不满意的临时Richmond型冠，该冠被金属内核、桩以及新的临时冠所替换。新临时冠安装在患者使用的可摘局部义齿上（）。制作了手术导向模板，并将患者转诊至种植体植入区域12、35、36、44和46号牙处。大约8个月后，前部区域的种植体位置进一步偏向根尖和颊侧（），从美学角度来看无法成功制作种植冠。使用种植体取出器械（Implant Retrieval Tool；Nobel Biocare）逐渐移除该种植体，并进行旋转操作（）。术后安装了一个新的种植体（锥形莫氏3.5×11 mm，Conexão，巴西），扭矩为30 N，并在近远中方向定位。具体来说，种植体放置得更靠近14号牙的颊舌侧，在骨嵴上（位于通过现有牙齿颊面的假想曲线上方约1毫米处，在冠根向下方约1毫米处）（）。手术后移除了可摘局部义齿。随后制作了一个临时固定桥用于在11和14号牙期间进行骨整合，仅出于美学目的：同时安装了35、36、44和46号牙区域的种植体修复体。第二阶段手术后立即使用愈合帽作为基台并以侧切牙为近中悬臂制作临时固定桥。在康复过程中，将临时固定桥更换为带有近中悬臂螺丝固定的临时固定桥。在此期间，定期向临时义齿添加树脂实施物以促进龈缘适应（图和）以及三角形闭合（图和），并改善龈缘美学。两个月后安装了带有近中悬臂的种植体修复体（）。该病例报告已获得机构人类研究伦理委员会批准，并遵循《赫尔辛基宣言》的伦理原则，同时符合特定立法要求。

metadata.original_text: A 44-year-old female patient reported to the Department of Oral and Maxillofacial Surgery, and Periodontology at the Dental School of Ribeirao Preto, University of São Paulo for a placement of implants. During the initial examination, it was observed that the right upper central incisor had an unsatisfactory temporary Richmond type crown that was changed by a metal core, post, and new temporary crown. The new temporary crown was fitted to the removable partial denture that was used by the patient (). Surgical guides were made and the patient was referred for implant placement, in the region of teeth 12, 35, 36, 44, and 46. After approximately 8 months, it was verified that the implant located in the anterior region was positioned further apical and buccal () making it impossible to fabricate a successful implant crown from an esthetic point of view. The implant was gradually removed using the implant removal instrument (Implant Retrieval Tool; Nobel Biocare), with antirotational movement (). Following this surgical procedure, a new implant was installed (cone morse 3.5 × 11 mm, Conexão, Brazil), with a torque of 30 N, and positioned in the mesiodistal direction. Specifically, the implant was placed closer to tooth 14 in the buccal-palatine direction on the bone ridge (located around 1 mm for the palatal from an imaginary curvature passing through the buccal surfaces of the present teeth and 1 mm infraosseo in the coronoapical direction) (). After the surgery, the removable partial denture was removed. This was followed by the fabrication of a temporary fixed partial prosthesis with retention used during the osseointegration phase on teeth 11 and 14 (): this was only for esthetic purpose. This was in addition to the installation of prostheses on the implants in the regions of teeth 35, 36, 44, and 46. Immediately after the second stage surgery, the temporary fixed partial denture was performed using the healing cap as an abutment and a lateral incisor as a mesial cantilever. Following the rehabilitation procedures, this temporary fixed partial denture was changed to a provisional fixed prosthesis with the mesial cantilever screwed into the implant. During this phase, periodic acrylic resin implements were added to the temporary prosthesis to promote gingival conditioning (Figures and ) and black triangle closure (Figures and ) and also to improve gingival esthetics. At the end of two months, the implant prosthesis with a mesial cantilever was installed (). This case report was approved by the institution's Ethics Committee on Human Research and followed the ethical principles of the Declaration of Helsinki, in addition to complying with specific legislation.

title: pmc-6011114-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-6011114-1
病例摘要：一名26岁的也门男性患者来自也门塔伊兹省，被转介至沙特阿拉伯国王萨乌德大学的修复牙科诊所。他的主要症状是由于牙齿普遍变色导致的不愉快笑容。他的既往病史无关紧要。塔伊兹省的水中氟含量超过3.6 mg/L []。临床检查显示普遍性氟斑牙，外釉质在不规则区域部分缺失，以及由合并窝沟和显著磨损引起的形态变化（）。根据Thylstrup和Fejerskov指数（TFI）对氟斑牙分类，该患者的氟斑牙被归类为TFI = 7 []。临床检查后，拍摄了X光片、术前照片，并取上下颌藻酸盐印模以制作诊断模型。患者被告知治疗选项，包括瓷贴面或复合树脂贴面，以及每种方案的优点和缺点。鉴于他希望获得最佳美学效果并长期保持结果，患者同意使用瓷贴面对上前牙进行微笑改善。瓷贴面将覆盖从右侧第二前磨牙到左侧第二前磨牙的上颌牙齿。由于经济能力有限，患者决定暂时不为下颌牙齿进行贴面治疗。通过分析诊断模型来评估咬合情况，并制作了白色蜡型以供患者预览牙齿的理想外观。此蜡型对于临时修复体透明基模的制作也至关重要。使用VITAPAN经典比色板（VITA Zahnfabrik，德国）选择了所需的色调。使用平端锥形金刚石钻针在8颗上颌牙齿的釉质上制备了0.5-0.75 mm厚的面部减薄层，并保留了与龈缘齐平的肩台。邻面边缘延伸至面部和龈沟。完成牙齿预备后，使用止血剂浸泡的超细纤维线（Ultrapak Cord #00，美国犹他州南乔丹市Ultradent Products Inc.）进行龈缘牵引。使用聚硅氧烷印模材料（Virtual，Ivoclar Vivadent，纽约州阿默斯特）取印模，并按照制造商说明操作印模材料。临时修复体通过在每个预备牙齿的面部表面点涂37%磷酸酸蚀后进行固化20秒（Total Etch，Ivoclar Vivadent，列支敦士登施安）。使用高强度LED固化灯（Elipar S10，3M ESPE，明尼苏达州）对临时修复体进行了每颗牙齿10秒的光照固化。然后轻轻将基模从预备好的牙齿上移开。使用12号手术刀去除部分固化的临时修复体。使用薄金刚石盘精修面部和舌侧沟槽、调整咬合，并用抛光盘和尖进行抛光（）。瓷贴面由锂钉玻璃陶瓷材料（IPS e.max Press，Ivoclar Vivadent，列支敦士登施安）制作。临时贴面被移除，牙齿使用氧化镁清洁。使用透明色调试色膏（Variolink Veneer try-in paste，Ivoclar Vivadent，列支敦士登施安）进行瓷贴面的试戴以评估边缘适应性和色调。之后，对瓷贴面进行了粘接准备。贴面的预备表面用60秒酸蚀剂（Porcelain Etchant 9.5%，Bisco Inc.，伊利诺伊州沙可布市）酸蚀60秒后，在流动水下冲洗60秒，并使用气枪干燥。在瓷贴面上涂覆一层

metadata.original_text: A 26-year-old Yemeni male patient from Taiz Province was referred to the restorative dental clinics at King Saud University, Saudi Arabia. His chief complaint was an unpleasant smile caused by generalized tooth discoloration. His medical history was irrelevant. The fluoride level in the water around Taiz Province is >3.6 mg/l []. Clinical examination revealed generalized fluorosis with loss of the outermost enamel in irregular areas involving less than half of the entire surface, as well as changes in the morphology caused by merging pits and marked attrition (). In this case, based on the Thylstrup and Fejerskov index (TFI) for dental fluorosis classification, the dental fluorosis was classified as TFI = 7 []. After the clinical examination, radiographs, preoperative photographs, and upper and lower alginate impressions for diagnostic models were taken. The patient was presented with treatment options, which included ceramic or composite veneers, along with the advantages and disadvantages of each option. The patient agreed to smile enhancement using ceramic veneers for his upper teeth given that he desired an optimum aesthetic and a long-term result. The veneers would be placed on the patient's upper teeth, from his upper right 2nd premolar to upper left 2nd premolar. The patient decided to postpone veneering his lower teeth, given his limited financial capacity. Diagnostic models were analyzed to evaluate the occlusion, and a diagnostic wax-up was made of white-colored wax. The use of the wax-up allows the patient to preview the desired appearance of his teeth, and this wax-up is also essential for the fabrication of a clear matrix for temporary restorations. The desired shade was selected using the VITAPAN classical shade guide (VITA Zahnfabrik, Germany). The enamel of the eight maxillary teeth was prepared using a flat-end tapered diamond bur to a depth of 0.5–0.75 mm facial reduction with 1.5 mm incisal reduction (). A chamfer finish line was maintained at the level of the gingival margin. The proximal margin was extended into the facial and gingival embrasures. Following tooth preparation, gingival retraction was achieved using retraction cords (Ultrapak Cord #00, Ultradent Products Inc., South Jordan, UT, USA) soaked in a hemostatic agent. Impressions were taken with a polyvinylsiloxane material (Virtual, Ivoclar Vivadent, Amherst, NY). The impression material was manipulated according to the manufacturer's instructions. Temporization was performed by spot etching on the facial surface of each prepared tooth with 37% phosphoric acid (Total Etch, Ivoclar Vivadent, Schaan, Liechtenstein). Bonding agent (OptiBond Solo Plus, Kerr, Orange, CA, USA) was applied on the enamel-etched spots and light cured for 20 seconds using a high-intensity light-emitting diode (LED) curing light (Elipar S10, 3M ESPE, MN, USA). The clear matrix that was previously fabricated was loaded with a temporization material (Protemp Plus, 3M ESPE, MN, USA) and placed over the prepared teeth. Light curing was done for 10 seconds per tooth. Then, the matrix was gently teased away from the prepared teeth. A number 12 scalpel blade was used to remove the partially cured temporization material. Facial and lingual embrasures were refined with a thin diamond disk, the occlusion was adjusted, and the temporary restorations were polished using polishing discs and points (). Ceramic veneers were fabricated with a lithium disilicate-reinforced glass ceramic material (IPS e.max Press, Ivoclar Vivadent, Schaan, Liechtenstein). Temporary veneers were removed, and the teeth were cleaned using pumice. Ceramic veneers were tried-in using a transparent shade try-in paste (Variolink Veneer try-in paste, Ivoclar Vivadent, Schaan, Liechtenstein) to assess marginal adaptation and shade. Afterwards, veneers were prepared for bonding. Fitting surfaces of the veneers were etched with hydrofluoric acid (Porcelain Etchant 9.5%, Bisco Inc., Schaumburg, IL, USA) for 60 seconds, washed under running water for another 60 seconds, and dried with an air syringe. title: pmc-6011115-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-6011115-1
病例摘要：一位75岁男性因夜尿症就诊泌尿科医生。血清前列腺特异性抗原（PSA）水平升高至76.2 ng/mL，直肠指检显示前列腺弥漫性增厚。盆腔MRI在弥散加权成像（DWI）中显示出前列腺的广泛高信号。氟脱氧葡萄糖-正电子发射断层扫描/CT显示多个脊椎、骨盆骨和腹主动脉及骨盆淋巴结转移（图示）。根据这些发现，患者被诊断为转移性前列腺癌（cT3aN1M1b），未进行前列腺穿刺活检，接受主要雄激素剥夺疗法（ADT），包括GnRH拮抗剂（degarelix）和抗雄激素药物（bicalutamide）。PSA水平立即下降，在8个月后达到最低值（0.23 ng/mL）。然而，在开始ADT 15个月后（PSA水平，2.33 ng/mL），患者被诊断为去势抵抗性前列腺癌，并转诊至我院。为了评估患者的当前疾病状态，我们进行了CT、骨扫描和WB-MRI检查。我们观察到WB-MRI、骨扫描和CT之间存在差异。CT显示脊椎和骨盆骨的多发成骨性病变（图示）以及腹主动脉淋巴结缩小。骨扫描同样在相同的骨骼部位显示出多个聚集，表明这些成骨性病变几乎不表现出DWI中的高信号，暗示这些病灶中没有存活的肿瘤细胞（图示）。相比之下，原发病变在WB-MRI的DWI中仍显示弥漫性高信号（图示）。随后我们对前列腺和椎体进行了病理检查。前列腺穿刺活检结果显示12个核心中有10个含有可存活的前列腺癌细胞（图示）。同时，我们从第二腰椎的成骨性病灶处进行CT引导下的穿刺活检，该病灶通过CT和骨显像被诊断为骨转移，并由另一家医院的骨科单位排除了前列腺癌引起的脊椎骨转移。病理检查显示该成骨性病灶中无恶性细胞（图示）。考虑到骨穿刺活检的结果，我们综合审查了患者的影像学发现。第二腰椎CT扫描显示成骨性改变（885.4 Hounsfield单位），T1和T2加权MRI显示低信号强度，ADC值较低（0.498 × 10−3 mm2/s）；然而，在b = 0和b = 1200的DWI中未见高信号强度，提示治疗效果引起的良性成骨性改变（图示）。根据腰椎疝气的诊断进行骨科保守治疗后，患者的腰痛和双下肢瘫痪完全缓解。基于WB-MRI和病理检查的结果，我们认为导致疾病进展的主要存活肿瘤细胞可能存在于原发病变而非转移病灶中。为了控制整体疾病，我们将患者药物从bicalutamide更改为enzalutamide以针对潜在的微转移，并增加了前列腺放疗（74 Gy）。之后，他的PSA水平立即下降并被控制在<0.2 ng/mL的水平。

metadata.original_text: A 75-year-old male visited a urological practitioner because of nocturia. An elevated serum prostate specific antigen (PSA) level of 76.2 ng/mL was observed, and digital rectal examination showed diffuse induration of the prostate. Pelvic MRI demonstrated extensive high signal of the prostate in diffusion-weighted imaging (DWI) (). Fluorodeoxyglucose-positron emission tomography/CT revealed multiple spine and pelvic bone and para-aortic and pelvic lymph node metastases (Figures and ). Based on these findings, the patient was diagnosed with metastatic prostate cancer (cT3aN1M1b) and treated without prostate needle biopsy, with primary androgen deprivation therapy (ADT), including a GnRH antagonist (degarelix) and anti-androgen agent (bicalutamide). The PSA level immediately declined and reached nadir (0.23 ng/mL) after 8 months. However, 15 months after the start of ADT (PSA level, 2.33 ng/mL), the patient was diagnosed with CRPC and referred to our hospital. To evaluate the patient's current disease status, we performed CT, bone scan, and WB-MRI. We observed discrepancies between the WB-MRI, bone scan, and CT. CT showed multiple osteoblastic lesions in the spine and pelvic bone (Figures and ) and shrunken para-aortic lymph nodes. Bone scan similarly showed multiple accumulations at the same bone sites as the CT (). However, these osteoblastic lesions showed almost no high signal in DWI of WB-MRI, suggesting that the lesions did not have viable tumor cells (Figures –). In contrast, the primary lesion had a diffuse high signal remaining in DWI of WB-MRI (). We then performed histopathological examinations of both the prostate and the vertebra. The prostate needle biopsy demonstrated that 10 of 12 cores had viable prostate cancer cells (). Meanwhile, we performed the CT-guided needle biopsy from the osteoblastic lesion of the second lumbar vertebra, which was diagnosed with bone metastasis by CT and bone scintigraphy, to exclude vertebral bone metastasis of prostate cancer by an orthopedic unit of another hospital, which the patient visited owing to lumbago and bilateral lower limb paralysis. Histopathological examination of the osteoblastic lesion demonstrated no malignant cells (). Considering the results of the bone needle biopsy, we comprehensively reviewed the patient's image findings. A CT scan in the second lumbar vertebra revealed an osteoblastic change (885.4 Hounsfield unit), T1- and T2-weighted imaging of MRI revealed low signal intensity, and the ADC value was low (0.498 × 10−3 mm2/s); however, b = 0 and b = 1200 of DWI exhibited no high signal intensity, suggesting a benign osteoblastic change induced by the treatment effect (Figures –). With orthopedic conservative therapy in accordance with the diagnosis of lumbar hernia, the lumbago and bilateral lower limb paralysis completely resolved. Based on the findings of our WB-MRI and histopathological examinations, we reasoned that viable tumor cells inducing disease progression may primarily exist in the primary lesions and not in the metastatic lesions. Then, to control the overall disease, we changed the patient's medication from bicalutamide to enzalutamide for potentially existing micrometastases and added prostate RT (74 Gy). After this, his elevated PSA immediately declined and was controlled at a level of <0.2 ng/mL.

title: pmc-6011119-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-6011119-1
病例摘要：一名有80包年吸烟史的64岁男性患者，过去6个月内逐渐出现呼吸困难加重的症状。他之前曾因心房颤动接受过消融治疗，并且还接受了前列腺癌的手术和放疗。在来我们机构前6个月，他曾跌倒导致右侧两根肋骨骨折，在一个月后出现了上呼吸道感染。接下来的3个月里，患者继续经历间歇性发热、寒战、咳嗽、喘息和活动时呼吸困难的症状。最初他被口服抗生素治疗疑似社区获得性肺炎；然而，尽管多次使用抗生素和吸入型支气管扩张剂治疗，症状仍然持续存在，并最终住院治疗。血清学检查未发现组织胞浆菌感染的证据。痰培养生长了正常上呼吸道细菌。胸部X线显示左下肺叶（LLL）浸润影。胸部CT显示左下肺叶实变，伴有左下肺叶支气管狭窄（）。左下肺叶支气管突然截断，但未检测到内膜病变（）。在医院进行的支气管镜检查发现“圆形、非溃疡性、粉红色肿块样生长”阻塞了左下肺叶支气管。从该生长物刷片未发现恶性肿瘤，但没有取得活检组织。他被转介至我们中心评估此内膜病变。进一步检查后，患者回忆起大约6个月前他的运动耐受性显著下降。其肺功能测试显示严重气流受限，FEV1为1.53升（42%预计值），较之前6个月的FEV1 2.2升（63%预计值）有所下降。体格检查发现左侧下肺底呼吸音减弱，喘鸣限于左下肺叶。尽管过去6个月内他继续吸烟，但在当前就诊前3周戒烟了。根据其症状复杂性、气流受限加重以及先前支气管镜检查所见的肿块，可能的鉴别诊断包括原发性肺癌、肺类癌肿瘤和异物吸入。虽然异物吸入的可能性较小，但症状在6个月内的发展和进展也与原发性肺癌或肺类癌肿瘤的表现不一致。患者再次进行了支气管镜检查，发现左下肺叶支气管狭窄，并有一个肉质的内膜肿块（）。使用Wang针（CONMED, Utica, NY）多次进行细针穿刺活检，在快速现场评估中每次均显示为密集急性炎症。随后获取了多个内膜活检组织，从中发现了两个珍珠白色带有棕色脱落覆盖物的结构（）。该物体完全用Zero Tip Airway Retrieval Basket (Boston Scientific, Marlborough, MA)和活检钳取出，并被识别为吸入的杏仁。然后使用超薄支气管镜检查吸入杏仁后的气道远端，未发现任何额外的异物。在病例结束时进行了支气管肺泡灌洗，并将标本送培养。取出的外物病理学检查结果与植物性物质一致（），而支气管肺泡灌洗培养未检出细菌或真菌病原体。由于吸入杏仁导致的肺炎影像证据，开具了10天疗程的氨苄西林-克拉维酸治疗。一个月后的随访检查中，他报告运动耐受性显著增加，并且咳嗽和喘息消失；同时肺功能测试显示FEV1增加至2.12升（60%预计值），而重复的支气管镜检查未发现支气管狭窄。患者表示，在肋骨骨折恢复期间，他的最爱零食（仰卧时享用）是杏仁。

metadata.original_text: A 64-year-old-man with an eighty-pack-year smoking history presented with insidious onset of worsening shortness of breath over a period of 6 months. He had previously undergone ablation for atrial fibrillation, as well as surgery and radiation for prostate cancer. Six months before presenting to our institution, he had fallen and fractured 2 right-sided ribs and developed an upper respiratory tract infection one month later. Over the next 3 months, the patient continued to experience intermittent fevers, chills, cough, wheezing, and exertional dyspnea. The patient was initially treated with oral antibiotics for presumed community-acquired pneumonia; however, his symptoms persisted despite multiple courses of antibiotics and inhaled bronchodilators, and he was ultimately hospitalized. Serum serology for coccidioidomycosis was negative. Sputum cultures grew normal upper respiratory flora. His chest radiograph showed a left lower lobe (LLL) infiltrate. A computed tomogram (CT) of the chest showed a LLL consolidation, with evidence of narrowing of the LLL bronchus (). There was an abrupt cutoff in the LLL bronchus, but no endobronchial lesion was detected (). A bronchoscopy performed at the hospital showed a “rounded, nonulcerating, pink mass-like growth” obstructing the LLL bronchus. Brushings from the growth were negative for malignancy, but no biopsies were obtained. He was referred to our center for evaluation of this endobronchial lesion. Upon further examination, the patient recalled a significant decline in his exercise tolerance about 6 months prior to the current presentation. His pulmonary function tests showed severe airflow obstruction, with FEV1 of 1.53 L (42% predicted), which was a decline from his previous FEV1 of 2.2 L (63% predicted) 6 months earlier. The patient's physical examination revealed decreased breath sounds at the lower left lung base, with wheezing limited to the LLL. Although he had continued to smoke for the past 6 months, he had quit smoking 3 weeks prior to the current presentation. Based on his symptom complex, worsening airflow obstruction, and the mass seen on prior bronchoscopy, the likely differential diagnoses included primary lung cancer, lung carcinoid tumor, and foreign body aspiration. Although foreign body aspiration was unlikely, the development and progression of his symptoms over just 6 months would also be unusual for primary lung cancer or for lung carcinoid tumor. The patient underwent another bronchoscopy, which revealed a narrow LLL bronchus, with a fleshy endobronchial mass lesion (). Multiple fine needle aspirates were obtained using a Wang needle (CONMED, Utica, NY), but every pass was positive for dense acute inflammation on rapid onsite evaluation. Multiple endobronchial biopsies were then obtained, and 2 pearly white structures with a brown detached cover were revealed (). The object was extracted in its entirety using a Zero Tip Airway Retrieval Basket (Boston Scientific, Marlborough, MA) and biopsy forceps; the object was identified as an aspirated almond. An ultrathin bronchoscope was then used to examine the airways distal to the aspirated almond, and there was no evidence of any additional foreign material. A bronchoalveolar lavage was performed at the end of the case, and specimens were sent for culture. Pathology of the extracted foreign body was consistent with vegetable matter (), and bronchoalveolar lavage cultures were negative for bacterial or fungal organisms. A 10-day course of amoxicillin-clavulanate was prescribed due to the imaging evidence of aspiration pneumonia secondary to almond aspiration. On follow-up examination one month later, he reported drastically increased exercise tolerance and his cough and wheezing had disappeared; meanwhile, pulmonary function tests showed an increase in his FEV1 to 2.12 L (60% predicted), and a repeat flexible bronchoscopy revealed no bronchial stricture. The patient shared that while he was recovering from his rib fractures, his favorite snack (enjoyed in the supine position) was almonds. While foreign body aspir

title: pmc-6011120-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-6011120-1
病例摘要：一名11岁的健康女孩因进一步管理右下第二前磨牙（45号牙）未成熟且由于dens evaginatus的牙尖破裂导致的牙髓坏死而被转介至马来西亚国立大学（UKM）儿科牙科诊所。两周前，她在一家普通牙科诊所接受了针对45号牙疼痛的治疗。45号牙在冷热刺激后出现自发性和持续性疼痛。该牙齿被诊断为症状性不可逆性牙髓炎，并进行了根管治疗。牙医通过了根管并移除了牙髓，在根管内放置了非凝固钙氢化物。当前评估时，她的牙齿相关症状已完全消失。全面口腔检查显示存在一般性的轻度牙龈炎症，基本牙周探诊（BPE）评分为1分。患者的口腔卫生状况一般，菌斑指数为30%。患者仍处于混合牙列期，伴有上颌乳尖牙的存在。她的上颌牙弓排列良好，在下颌牙弓中前牙有轻度拥挤。45号牙的咬合面有一个玻璃离子充填物，这是GDP之前为移除牙髓而制作的（）。冷和电活力测试显示所有完全萌出的前磨牙对刺激都有阳性反应，表明牙齿活力正常，除了45号牙。45号牙还存在轻度叩痛。45号牙的根尖片显示根管未成熟，根尖孔开放且有小的根尖周透射影。45号牙的髓腔从冠部到根尖部分宽度均匀（）。根据评估结果，45号牙被诊断为由于dens evaginatus的牙尖破裂导致的牙髓坏死和症状性根尖周炎。初次评估当天，在局部麻醉溶液（2%利多卡因加1：80000肾上腺素）浸润后，使用橡胶隔膜隔离45号牙，并重新进入牙髓室通过之前准备的入口。根管暴露并用生理盐水冲洗。之后，用纸尖干燥根管，并用K-文件No. 60估计牙齿的工作长度。确定工作长度为2毫米短于根尖开口（17毫米）。使用K-文件No. 60轻轻预备根管，然后用1.5%次氯酸钠冲洗。在用纸尖干燥湿根管后，在根管内放置非凝固钙氢化物，并用Cavit™ 3M、美国和玻璃离子水泥（GIC）（Riva Self Cure™ SDI，澳大利亚）双重密封入口。两周后，再次评估45号牙是否有感染迹象或症状。牙齿不再对叩诊有疼痛反应，也没有感染相关迹象或症状。在使用橡胶隔膜隔离后，通过大量1.5%次氯酸钠冲洗根管以去除非凝固钙氢化物。然后用无菌水冲洗并用纸尖干燥根管。随后，用17% EDTA（Pulpdent™，马萨诸塞州沃特敦）冲洗一分钟并用纸尖干燥。最后，在牙科手术显微镜（Carl Zeiss Surgical GmbH, S100）的指导下，使用EndoSequence (BC RRM-Fast Set Putty, Brasseler, USA) 材料在根管口上方4毫米处填充以创建根尖封闭（）。根管口用棉球、临时充填材料（Cavit 3M, 美国）和GIC (Riva Self Cure SDI, 澳大利亚) 双重密封。两周后，再次通过1.5%次氯酸钠冲洗并用纸尖干燥根管。之后，在热塑化牙胶的引导下，使用Obtura III Max System (Obtura Spartan® Endodontics) 系统重新进入根管（）。最后，用GIC (Riva Self Cure SDI, 澳大利亚) 和纳米复合材料（AURA™ SDI, Austra

metadata.original_text: A healthy 11-year-old girl was presented to the National University of Malaysia (UKM) Paediatric Dental Clinic with a referral for further management of pulp necrosis of an immature lower right second premolar (tooth 45), secondary to the fractured tubercle of dens evaginatus. Two weeks earlier, she had treatment at a general dental clinic for pain related to tooth 45. Tooth 45 had spontaneous and lingering pain following cold and thermal stimuli. The tooth was diagnosed to have symptomatic irreversible pulpitis, and root canal therapy was initiated. The canal was accessed, and pulp extirpation performed before the placement of intracanal nonsetting calcium hydroxide by the general dental practitioner (GDP). At the time of current assessment, her tooth-related symptoms had completely resolved. General oral examination showed the presence of generalised mild gingivitis with a basic periodontal examination (BPE) score of 1 in all sextants. The patient's oral hygiene was fair with a plaque score of 30%. The patient is still in her mixed dentition with the presence of the primary maxillary canines. Her upper dental arch was well aligned, and mild crowding of anterior teeth was noted in the lower arch. Tooth 45 has an occlusal glass ionomer dressing of the access cavity made for the pulp extirpation earlier by the GDP (). Cold and electric pulp sensibility testings showed positive responses to all fully erupted premolars indicative of tooth vitality expect for tooth 45. Tooth 45 also has slight tenderness to percussion. Periapical radiograph of tooth 45 showed an immature root with convergent open apex and small periapical radiolucency. The pulp space of tooth 45 is of an even width from the coronal to the apical portion (). Based on the assessments, tooth 45 was diagnosed with pulp necrosis secondary to fractured dens evaginatus and symptomatic apical periodontitis. On the day of initial assessment, tooth 45 was isolated with rubber dam after infiltration of local anaesthetic solution (2% lidocaine with 1 : 80000 adrenaline). Pulp chamber was reentered through the previously prepared access cavity. The root canal was exposed and irrigated with saline. After that, the canal was dried with paper points and the tooth working length was estimated with a K-file No. 60. A working length, 2 mm short of the apical opening, was determined (17 mm). The canal was gently prepared with the K-file No. 60 and then irrigated with a copious volume of 1.5% sodium hypochlorite (NaOCI). After drying the wet canal with paper points, nonsetting calcium hydroxide was placed into the canal and the access cavity was double sealed with Cavit™ 3M, USA, and glass ionomer cement (GIC) (Riva Self Cure™ SDI, Australia). Two weeks later, the tooth was reassessed for any signs and symptoms of infection. The tooth was no longer tender to percussion, and there was no indication of infection-related signs and symptoms. After isolation with a rubber dam, the root canal of tooth 45 was reaccessed and irrigated with a copious volume 1.5% NaOCl to remove the nonsetting calcium hydroxide. Then, the canal was irrigated with sterile water and dried with paper points. Subsequently, the canal was irrigated with 17% EDTA (Pulpdent™, Watertown, Massachusetts) for a minute and dried with paper points. Finally, under the guidance of a dental operating microscope (Carl Zeiss Surgical GmbH, S100), the apical region was filled using the EndoSequence (BC RRM-Fast Set Putty, Brasseler, USA) material up to 4 mm thickness to create an apical seal (). The orifice of the root canal was double sealed with a cotton pellet, temporary filling material (Cavit 3M, USA), and GIC (Riva Self Cure SDI, Australia). Once again, the root canal was reaccessed two weeks later, irrigated with 1.5% NaOCl, and dried with paper points. Next, the dried canal was obturated with thermoplasticised gutta-perca using the Obtura III Max System (Obtura Spartan® Endodontics) (). After that, the access cavity was double sealed with GIC (Riva Self Cure SDI, Australia) and nanohybrid composite (AURA™ SDI, Austra

title: pmc-6011124-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-6011124-1
病例摘要：患者为50岁非裔美国女性，有十二年前双侧乳腺缩小手术史、铁 deficiency 贫血和肥胖。她因右乳疼痛前来外科门诊就诊。患者报告称最近她在右乳疤痕处出现了瘢痕疙瘩，并且有些区域呈现蓝色；左乳无异常。她注意到，在穿戴运动文胸后，瘢痕疙瘩部位的压力增加导致了蜂窝组织炎和水肿。此前，她曾因疑似感染的右乳瘢痕疙瘩接受了两次抗生素治疗，但效果不佳。体格检查发现，右乳下外侧有一个10厘米直径的大面积瘢痕疙瘩区域，并伴有水肿和蜂窝组织炎。该瘢痕疙瘩区无波动感；未触及乳头溢液或右侧腋窝可触及的淋巴结肿大（）。患者8个月前的乳腺X线检查结果为良性，自双侧乳腺缩小手术以来的所有筛查性乳腺X线检查均未发现恶性征象。又进行了乳腺超声检查，提示明显水肿和皮肤增厚，疑似感染，但未观察到明确的液体积聚或潜在可疑肿块。患者因美容目的接受了右乳部分切除术，并切除了感染的瘢痕疙瘩区域。手术中，肿瘤高度血管化、质地坚实，但未固定于胸壁。术后病理检查显示为乳腺高分级原发性血管肉瘤，边缘阴性。患者随后进行了胸部、腹部和骨盆的计算机断层扫描，未发现明显的远处转移证据。之后接受了全乳切除术，并计划进行辅助化疗，方案为吉西他滨联合泰索帝，随后进行放疗。

metadata.original_text: The patient is a 50-year-old African American female with a history of bilateral breast reduction twelve years ago, iron deficiency anemia, and obesity, who presented to the surgeon's office complaining of tenderness of her right breast. The patient reported that recently she had been developing keloids along the scar of the right breast with some areas having a blue hue; her left breast was unremarkable. She noticed that after wearing a sports bra there was increased pressure and abrasions to the keloid, leading to cellulitis and edema. She was previously treated with two courses of antibiotics for what was presumed to be an infected keloidal scar of her right breast but with minimal improvement. On exam, she had a large 10 cm diameter keloidal region on the inferior and lateral aspect of the right breast with edema and cellulitis. The keloidal area had no palpable fluctuance; she exhibited no nipple discharge or palpable adenopathy of the right axilla (). The patient had a benign-appearing mammogram 8 months prior, and all of her screening mammograms since her breast reduction have been without signs of malignancy. Another mammogram was ordered but was not performed due to patient discomfort. An ultrasound of the breast was preformed and suggested marked edema and skin thickening suggestive of infection but no definitive fluid collection or underlying suspicious mass was observed. The patient underwent a right breast partial mastectomy for cosmesis and resection of the infected keloidal area. Intraoperatively, the mass was highly vascular, firm, but not fixed to the chest wall. Postoperatively, the pathology revealed a high-grade primary angiosarcoma of the breast with negative margins. Patient underwent a computed tomography of the chest, abdomen, and pelvis, which did not show any evidence of gross metastatic disease. The patient then underwent completion mastectomy and scheduled for adjuvant chemotherapy with combination gemcitabine and Taxotere, followed by radiation.

title: pmc-6011125-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-6011125-1
病例摘要：41岁男性患者F.C.F.无合并症，否认饮酒、吸烟及常规用药史。他于2016年7月14日开始出现发热、肌痛、食欲不振、呕吐、黄疸和尿色加深的症状。他自行服用抗病毒药物（多羟基二苯甲酮750毫克/天）、马来酸氯苯那敏（6毫克/天）及对乙酰氨基酚（超过4克/天）。当时未使用其他药物。由于临床状况没有改善，他前往医院进行了包括全血细胞计数（CBC）：血红蛋白13.2 g/dL、血细胞比容39.6%、血小板343,000/mm³、白细胞5200/mm³；肝功能检查：天冬氨酸转氨酶（AST）39.8 U/L，丙氨酸转氨酶（ALT）40.1 U/L，γ-谷氨酰转移酶（GGT）346 U/L，碱性磷酸酶98.5 U/L。此外，登革病毒NS1检测为阴性，腹部超声显示肝脏回声弥漫性增加，提示轻度至中度脂肪肝。根据临床表现、实验室检查结果及对乙酰氨基酚的过量摄入，患者被诊断为肝炎。患者住院治疗，在4天的静脉补液和临床评估后出院。出院15天后，患者报告每日高热、食欲减退、出汗、体重减轻（8公斤）并出现进行性加重的症状。2016年8月6日，传染病专家在检查患者时再次下达了新的实验室检查命令。结果显示：血红蛋白10.2 g/dL；血细胞比容30.7%；红细胞4.16百万/mm³；血小板200,000/mm³。还显示有异形性、小细胞性和低色素性贫血；白细胞计数：白细胞9700/mm³，杆状核粒细胞6%，分叶核粒细胞76%，淋巴细胞10%。肝功能检查结果显示：天冬氨酸转氨酶（AST）64 U/L，丙氨酸转氨酶（ALT）85 U/L，γ-谷氨酰转移酶（GGT）560 U/L，乳酸脱氢酶248 U/L。C反应蛋白为134.29 mg/L。进行了莱姆病、斑疹伤寒、肝炎、梅毒、寨卡病毒、基孔肯雅热、EB病毒、巨细胞病毒、弓形虫病和人类免疫缺陷病毒（HIV）的血清学检查，所有结果均为阴性。此外，使用Bact/Alert 3D 120自动微生物检测系统进行了血液培养。初次孵育在5-10% CO₂巧克力琼脂平板中进行，在35°C-37°C下孵育24小时。第一天收集了三个血样，每次抽血间隔至少15分钟，从不同部位采集静脉血。在巧克力琼脂平板上分离的菌落通过形态学、革兰氏染色和氧化酶反应鉴定。菌落光滑、圆形、均匀、灰色/棕色，直径约1毫米。氧化酶试验和丁酰三酯琼脂试验均为阳性。这三个样本中均检测到微小伯克霍尔德菌（M. osloensis）的存在。经食道超声心动图（TEE）显示二尖瓣后叶（P2段）脱垂，附着于心房面的回声结构，大小约为0.47 × 0.85 cm，符合心内膜赘生物，导致瓣膜闭合不全和中度瓣膜反流及偏心射流。腔内心血栓缺失，左室收缩功能和舒张功能正常。根据Habib等人的标准[]，IE诊断成立，并住院接受静脉抗生素治疗。从2016年8月8日至9月28日，患者接受了四天的万古霉素、十天的庆大霉素及六天的氨苄西林治疗，之后根据血液培养结果引入了36天的头孢曲松。自2016年8月12日起观察到症状和体征缓解。实验室检查结果显示有所改善，血液培养为阴性。这些检查再次进行。

metadata.original_text: The 41-year-old male patient F.C.F. showed no comorbidities and denied alcoholism, smoking, and taking regular medication. He started having fever, myalgia, anorexia, vomiting, jaundice, and colure on July 14, 2016. He took antiviral drugs with monohydrate dipyrone (750 mg/day) associated to chlorpheniramine maleate (6 mg/day) and paracetamol (>4 g/day) at his peril. He denied taking any other drugs on that occasion. Because his clinical condition had not improved, he went to the hospital, where he underwent medical tests such as complete blood count (CBC): hemoglobin 13.2 g/dL, hematocrit 39.6%, platelets 343,000/mm3, white blood cells (leucocytes 5200/mm3), liver function Aspartate transaminase (AST) 39.8 U/L, Alanine transaminase (ALT) 40.1 U/L, gamma-glutamyl transferase (GGT) 346 U/L, and alkaline phosphatase 98.5 U/L. In addition, the NS1 test for dengue was negative and the abdominal ultrasound showed the liver with diffuse increase in parenchymal echogenicity, indicating mild/moderate steatosis. The patient was diagnosed with hepatitis due to the clinical signs assessed, results of laboratory tests, and excessive intake of paracetamol. The patient was hospitalized, and after 4 days of intravenous hydration and clinical assessment, he was discharged from the hospital. Fifteen days after his discharge, the patient related that he had daily high fever, appetite loss, sweating, weight loss (8 kg), and progressive worsening. On August 6, 2016, the infectious disease specialist ordered new medical tests when examining the patient. The results revealed that blood count was hemoglobin 10.2 g/dL; hematocrit 30.7%; red blood cells 4.16 million/mm3; and platelets 200,000/mm3. It also revealed anisocytosis, microcytosis, and hypochromia; white blood cells were leucocytes 9700/mm3, banded neutrophils 6%, segmented neutrophils 76%, and lymphocytes 10%. Liver function tests indicated aspartate transaminase (AST) 64 U/L, alanine transaminase (ALT) 85 U/L, gamma-glutamyl transpeptidase (GGT) 560 U/L, and lactic dehydrogenase 248 U/L. C-reactive protein was 134.29 mg/L. Serologies were ordered for leptospirosis, rickettsialpox, hepatitis, syphilis, Zika virus, Chikungunya, Epstein-Barr virus, cytomegalovirus, toxoplasmosis, and human immunodeficiency virus (HIV).
