病例摘要：一名有超过10年病史的39岁女性，过去曾多次（每年4到5次）出现刺激性下尿路症状、肉眼血尿和反复证实的泌尿系统感染。她由她的泌尿科医生转介给我们。在膀胱镜检查中，观察到整个膀胱内弥漫性的不典型扁平黑色色素沉着肿瘤。最初初步诊断为膀胱黑变病。患者接受了广泛的经尿道膀胱切除术（TUR-B），大部分但不是全部的肿瘤形成物被切除。在多个位置，从健康的下黏膜层下方刮除了厚厚的黑色色素细胞层（图）。逆行尿路造影未发现输尿管内病变（图）。组织学检查显示，在所有切除样本中可见类似尖锐湿疣样的良性过度角化鳞状上皮沉积物（图），最终诊断为膀胱表皮松解症。尿液细胞学检查未见恶性征象。术前尿培养仅显示自然皮肤菌群（每毫升100 CFU）。详细的病史表明，她有两次外生性癌症的既往史（宫颈癌，十年前；会阴部癌，三年前），当时膀胱镜检查未发现内生性病变。患者的伴侣没有尖锐湿疣的历史，并且双方从未接种过HPV疫苗。患者仅有的合并症是甲状腺功能减退（每日服用左旋甲状腺素75 µg治疗）和青霉素过敏。她身体状况良好，从不吸烟。进行了HPV筛查（尿道拭子），结果为轻度阳性（HPV42-DNA），随后接种了标准的九价HPV疫苗（Gardasil-9®）。结肠镜检查未发现肠道尖锐湿疣；切除了一例小型的乙状结肠管状绒毛状腺瘤。术后，反复出现的泌尿系统感染和肉眼血尿持续存在。两次术后2个月和5个月的膀胱镜复查显示，表皮松解症有轻微残留，并且广泛瘢痕形成，没有活动性生长的迹象。计划在3个月后进行下一次膀胱镜检查，如果病变进展，则进行再次经尿道膀胱切除术（re-TUR-B）.

metadata.original_text: A 39-year old woman with a history of irritative LUTS with macrohematuria and recurrent proven urinary infections (4–5 per year) over more than 10 years was directed to us by her attending urologist. During cystoscopy diffuse atypical flat black pigmented bladder tumors were seen throughout the bladder. An initial tentative diagnosis was melanosis of the bladder []. The patient received an extensive transurethral bladder resection (TUR-B), in which most (but not all) of the tumor formations were resected. In multiple locations, a thick layer of black pigmented cells was scraped away from a healthy underlying urothelial submucosa (Fig. ). Retrograde ureteropyelography showed no evidence of intraureteral lesions (Fig. ). Histologically, condyloma-like benign hyperkeratotic squamous cell deposits could be seen in all resection samples (Fig. ) and the diagnosis of intravesical ichthyosis was made. Urine cytology showed no signs of malignancy. The preoperative urine culture only showed natural skin flora (100 CFU/ml). A profound anamnesis revealed that there was a 2-time history of extravesical CA (cervical, 10 years ago and perineal, 3 years ago) with cystoscopically no intravesical lesions at that time. The patient’s partner had no history of condylomata and both were never vaccinated against HPV. The patients only comorbidities were hypothyroidism (treated with L-Thyroxin 75 µg daily) and a penicillin-allergy. She was in a good physical condition and had never smoked. HPV-Screening (urethral swab) was mildly positive for HPV42-DNA, a standard HPV-Vaccine (Gardasil-9®) followed. Colonoscopy showed no signs of intestinal condylomata; one small sigmoidal tubulovillous adenoma was resected. Postoperatively, the recurrent urinary infections with macrohematuria persisted. Two control-cystoscopies after 2 and 5 months postoperatively showed minimal persistence of ichthyosis and extensive scarring, with no signs of active growth. The next cystoscopy is planned in 3 months, with a re-TUR-B if lesions progress.

title: pmc-8680332-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-8680332-1
病例摘要：一名57岁的男性患者因顽固性腹水两年前来我院消化内科就诊。他没有代谢综合征或饮酒史。有高血压、甲状腺功能减退和慢性肾炎的病史，正在服用硝苯地平片和甲状腺素片治疗。否认发热、胸痛、皮疹、口腔溃疡、关节疼痛及视力改变等症状，近期无外出旅行史及接触病人史。过去两年中，他在多家医院多次因腹水就诊，并进行了血液检查、腹水检查、胃镜、肠镜、腹部增强CT等检查，但未能明确诊断。患者在多家医院接受了口服或静脉注射呋塞米、螺内酯以及腹腔穿刺引流治疗以缓解腹水，效果不佳。体格检查显示全身状况较差，颈部和腹股沟可触及直径约1cm的淋巴结肿大，腹部膨隆，无压痛及反跳痛，移动性浊音阳性，双下肢轻度水肿，脾脏下缘在肋下3横指处。血常规结果显示白细胞计数为4.44 × 109/L，血红蛋白水平为111.0 g/L，血小板计数为93.0 × 109/L。尿蛋白弱阳性，尿五项检查显示微球蛋白82.40 mg/L（参考值0–30 mg/L），免疫球蛋白IgG为33.40 mg/L（参考值0–8.5 mg/L），转铁蛋白为3.29 mg/L（参考值0–2.2 mg/L），α1-微球蛋白为54.20 mg/L（参考值0–12 mg/L），β2-微球蛋白为0.19 mg/L（参考值0–0.22 mg/L）。其他阳性实验室指标包括尿酸520 μmol/L，白蛋白36.6 g/L，红细胞沉降率（ESR）26.0 mm/h。血清促甲状腺激素（TSH）为5.5400 mIU/L，血清游离甲状腺素（FT4）14.81 pmol/L，血清游离三碘甲腺原氨酸（FT3）1.74pmol/L，略有下降。粪常规、尿素氮、肌酐、C反应蛋白（CRP）、肝功能、血清维生素B12、IgG4、叶酸、A、B、C、D、E型肝炎病毒、肿瘤标志物（CA125、CA199、CEA、AFP、PSA）、脑钠肽（BNP）及结核检测（PPD试验、T-spot），以及其他自身免疫指标如抗核抗体（ANA）、抗中性粒细胞胞浆抗体（ANCA）和类风湿因子均无异常。患者的HIV、EBV、CMV或弓形虫均为阴性，HHV8和IL-6未检测到。胃镜检查显示浅表性胃炎，肠镜检查未见明显异常。心脏超声提示少量心包积液。胸部及腹部增强CT显示肺炎、双侧胸腔积液及腹水。我们为该患者进行了腹腔穿刺术。腹水呈黄色透明状，有核细胞计数40 × 106/L，单核细胞占80.6%，多核细胞占19.4%。Rivalta试验阴性。腹水中腺苷脱氨酶（ADA）含量为2.6 U/L（参考值0–25U/L），乳酸脱氢酶（LDH）74 IU/L（参考值120–250 IU/L），白蛋白15.7 g/L，CA125 542 ng/mL（参考值0–7 ng/mL），CEA、AFP及CA199均在正常范围内。腹水中未发现恶性细胞和结核杆菌。患者的血清腹腔积液白蛋白梯度（SAAG）为20.9 g/L。患者存在腹水，准确来说是多浆膜炎，伴有浅表淋巴结肿大、脾脏增大及甲状腺功能减退。根据现有数据我们进行了鉴别诊断。导致腹水的原因可能有：肝硬化、结核、肿瘤、风湿性疾病、内分泌疾病、心力衰竭和肾炎。SAAG仍然是区分门脉高压引起的腹水与其他原因引起的腹水最敏感和特异的指标。患者的SAAG大于11 g/L，但无肝炎史，未见食管/胃静脉曲张等其他相关病史。

metadata.original_text: A 57-year-old man presented to the gastroenterology department of our hospital with refractory ascites for two years. He had no history of metabolic syndrome or alcohol consumption. He had a history of hypertension, hypothyroidism, and chronic nephritis, who was treated with nifedipine tablets and thyroxine tablets. He denied any fever, chest pain, rashes, oral ulcers, arthralgias and visual changes, and had no recent travel and no sick contacts. In the past two years, he has been treated in the gastroenterology department of many hospitals for ascites, and has undergone blood tests, ascites test, gastroscopy, colonoscopy, abdominal enhanced CT, etc. However, there was no clear diagnosis. The patients received oral or intravenous furosemide, oral spironolactone, and abdominal puncture drainage to resolve ascites in many hospitals, but the results were not satisfactory. The physical examination included a poor general condition, palpable lymph nodes in both sides of the neck and groin with a larger diameter of about 1 cm, abdominal distension, no tenderness and rebound pain, positive mobile dullness, mild edema of both lower limbs, enlarged spleen which lower edge is 3 fingers under the ribs. The blood routine showed that white blood cells were 4.44 × 109/L, hemoglobin was 111.0 g/L, and platelets were 93.0 × 109/L. Urine protein was weakly positive, urine pentaprotein test showed that microalbumin was 82.40 mg/L (reference value 0–30 mg/L), immunoglobulin IgG was 33.40 mg/L (reference value 0–8.5 mg/L), transferrin was 3.29 mg/L (reference value 0–2.2 mg/L), α1-microglobulin was 54.20 mg/L (reference value 0–12 mg/L), β2-microglobulin was 0.19 mg/L (reference value 0–0.22 mg/L). Other positive laboratory indicators included uric acid 520 μmol/L, albumin 36.6 g/L, and erythrocyte sedimentation rate (ESR) 26.0 mm/h. Serum thyroid stimulating hormone (TSH) was 5.5400 mIU/L, serum free thyroxine (FT4) was 14.81 pmol/L, serum free triiodothyronine (FT3) was 1.74pmol/L, which was a slight decrease. Stool routine, urea nitrogen, creatinine, C-reactive protein (CRP), liver function, serum vitamin B12, IgG4, folic acid, hepatitis virus (A, B, C, D, E), tumor markers (CA125, CA199, CEA, AFP, PSA), brain natriuretic peptide (BNP), and tuberculosis detection (PPD test, T-spot), as well as other autoimmunity makers containing antinuclear antibody (ANA), anti-neutrophil cytoplasmic antibodies (ANCA), and rheumatoid factors were all unremarkable. The patient’s HIV, EBV, CMV or Toxoplasma was negative. HHV8 and IL-6 were not detected. The gastroscope showed superficial gastritis, and the colonoscopy showed no obvious abnormalities. The echocardiogram showed a little pericardial effusion. The enhanced CT of the chest and abdomen depicted pneumonia, bilateral pleural effusion, and abdominal effusion. We performed abdominal paracentesis for this patient. The ascites was yellow and clear, the nucleated cell count was 40 × 106/L, the mononuclear cells accounted for 80.6%, and the multinucleated cells accounted for 19.4%. The Rivalta test was negative. The content of adenosine deaminase (ADA) in ascites was 2.6 U/L (reference value 0–25U/L), lactate dehydrogenase (LDH) was 74 IU/L (reference value 120–250 IU/L), albumin was 15.7 g/L, CA125 in ascites was 542 ng/mL (reference value 0–7 ng/mL), CEA, APF, and CA199 were normal. No malignant cells and tubercle bacilli were found in multiple tests of ascites. Serum ascitic albumin gradient (SAAG) was 20.9 g/L. The patient had ascites, which should be polyserositis to be precise, superficial lymphadenopathy, enlarged spleen, hypothyroidism. We made differential diagnosis based on available data. The causes of ascites may be the following: liver cirrhosis, tuberculosis, tumor, rheumatism, endocrine, cardiac insufficiency, and nephritis. SAAG remains the most sensitive and specific marker for the differentiation of ascites due to portal hypertension from ascites due to other causes. The SAAG of the patient was greater than 11 g/L, however, there were no history of hepatitis, no esophageal/gastric var

title: pmc-8680372-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-8680372-1
病例摘要：一名45岁汉族女性于2017年8月因右眼在接触河水一周后出现疼痛、红肿和视力下降的症状，前往角膜专科就诊。立即进行了角膜刮片检查及活体共聚焦显微镜检查。使用蓝乳酚染色的10% KOH湿片中发现了菌丝团，并通过共聚焦显微镜进一步检查。确诊为真菌性角膜炎，随后进行了右眼角膜切削术。初始经验性抗真菌和抗菌治疗包括局部及全身氟康唑、左氧氟沙星和头孢美辛钠的使用。经过两周的治疗后，溃疡未见改善且症状无缓解，患者被收入我院。结膜充血持续存在，并可见中央角膜溃疡，直径约6mm，深入至基质层（图A, B）。伴有亚上皮及浅表基质混浊，呈点状和触须样浸润。术后使用氟康唑进行板层角膜移植术。手术后第一天，前房出现充血和薄的渗出性膜（图C, D）。在进行角膜移植四天后，右眼观察到全厚度中央大范围浸润伴脓液积聚（图E, F）。鉴于浸润及脓液积聚增多且抗真菌治疗无效，最终进行了眼球摘除术。角膜组织的微生物培养结果显示为类似真菌的生物体，表现为长而稀疏分隔的半透明菌丝（图G, H）。通过使用泛真菌引物（ITS1/ITS4）进行核糖体RNA（rRNA）基因测序进一步鉴定该生物体为P. insidiosum，与P. insidiosum菌株（GU137348.1）匹配度达99.23%。随后患者接受了联用抗菌治疗，包括利奈唑胺和阿奇霉素，并在随访中未见感染复发。

metadata.original_text: A 45-year-old female of Han nationality presented to a cirneal clinic in August, 2017 with a history of pain, redness, and decreased vision in her right eye 1 week after being exposed to river water. Corneal scrapings and confocal microscopy in vivo were performed instantly. A mass of hyphae was found in the 10% KOH wet mount stained with lactophenol blue and examined via confocal microscopy. Fungal keratitis was identified, and right corneal keratectomy was performed. Empirical antifungal and antibacterial therapy was initiated including topical and systemic fluconazole, levofloxacin, and cefminox sodium. After treatment of 2 weeks, the ulcer and symptoms did not improve and the patient was admitted to our hospital. Conjunctival congestion persisted, and a central corneal ulcer with a diameter of around 6 mm that reaches deep into the stromal layer can be seen (Fig. A, B). Subepithelial and superficial stromal opacities with dot-like and tentacle-like infiltrates accompanied this. Intracameral fluconazole injection was used to conduct a lamellar keratoplasty. Amphotericin B was administered immediately after the surgery. The first day post-surgery, hyperemia and a thin exudation membrane in the anterior chamber were discernible (Fig. C, D). Four days after the keratoplasty, full-thickness large central infiltrate with hypopyon was observed in the right eye (Fig. E, F). Given the increasing infiltrate with hypopyon and ineffectiveness of antifungal therapy, the right eye was enucleated. Microbial culture for corneal tissue revealed fungus-like organism showing long sparsely septate hyaline hyphae (Fig. G, H). The organism was further identified as P. insidiosum by ribosomal RNA (rRNA) gene sequencing with panfungal primers (ITS1/ITS4), which matched 99.23% with the P. insidiosum strain (GU137348.1). Then, the patient was adjusted with combined antibacterial treatment consisting of linezolid and azithromycin, and no recurrence of infection was observed on follow-up.

title: pmc-8680372-2
text:
病例标题：pmc-8680372-2
病例摘要：一位51岁的汉族女性于2018年9月因右眼在一周前吸入一些烟灰后出现疼痛、红肿和充血等症状被转诊至我院。进行了角膜刮片检查，革兰氏染色、KOH制备及培养均为阴性。开始使用抗真菌和抗菌治疗，包括左氧氟沙星滴眼液、头孢美辛钠和伏立康唑。经过两周的门诊治疗后，患者住院。观察到颞侧中央角膜处有一个灰白色溃疡，大小为4×6毫米。可见炎症浸润边缘呈羽毛状，并伴有深度2毫米的前房积脓，提示真菌感染。角膜显示中心致密性混浊，周围有网状的上皮下和浅层间质浸润（图）。随后进行了穿透性角膜移植术。手术后两天观察到前房渗出物，进行了前房内氟康唑注射。然而，浸润逐渐扩展，并对任何治疗均无反应。因此，在暴露后第28天进行了眼球摘除以移除感染组织并缓解疼痛。一周后，在马铃薯葡萄糖琼脂（PDA）平板上观察到角膜碎片中有少量菌丝生长。在脑心浸出液中培养后，35°C时快速生长出大量菌丝。我们尝试通过基质辅助激光解吸电离-飞行时间质谱（MALDI-TOF-MS）对该菌丝进行鉴定但未成功。尽管蛋白质光谱质量很高，在布鲁克毛霉数据库中也没有参考光谱。该菌丝被送至内转录间隔区（ITS）rRNA基因测序分析，并明确鉴定为P. insidiosum。通过布鲁克MALDI-TOF-MS标准流程添加了P. insidiosum的参考光谱，创建了一个数据库。因此，可以使用MALDI-TOF-MS对该菌丝进行鉴定。

metadata.original_text: A 51-year-old female of Han nationality was referred to our hospital in September 2018 with complications of pain, redness, and hyperemia in her right eye after entry of some cigarette ash 1 week ago. Corneal scraping was performed, and Gram staining, KOH preparation, and cultures were negative. Antifungal and antibacterial treatment was initiated including levofloxacin eye drops, cefminox sodium, and voriconazole. After 2 weeks of outpatient treatment, the patient was hospitalized. A grayish-white ulcer was observed in the central of bitamporal cornea measuring 4 × 6 mm. Inflammatory infiltrates with feathered margins and hypopyon with a depth of 2 mm were seen, suggestive of a fungal infection. The cornea showed dense central stromal opacity surrounded by a reticular pattern of subepithelial and superficial stromal infiltration (Fig. ). Then penetrating keratoplasty was performed. Exudation was observed in anterior chamber on 2 days following surgery, and intracameral fluconazole injection was performed. However, the infiltrates extended progressively, and were unresponsive to any treatment. Therefore, by day 28 post-exposure, an enucleation was performed to remove infected tissue and relieve pain. One week later, a small amount of mycelial growth was observed within the corneal fragment on the potato dextrose agar (PDA) plate. Subculture in brain–heart infusion resulted in the rapid growth of a large mycelium at 35 °C. We have attempted to identify this mycelium by matrix-assisted laser desorption ionization–time of flight mass spectrometry (MALDI-TOF-MS) but failed. There was no reference spectrum in the Bruker Filamentous Fungi databases despite the high quality of the protein spectrum. The mycelium was sent for internal transcribed spacer (ITS) rRNA gene sequencing analysis and unambiguously identified as P. insidiosum.. Three obvious protein peaks of the strain were found by MALDI-TOF-MS, which are 2094.01, 4834.62, and 9682.51 (× 103 m/z), respectively (Fig. ). Then, the reference spectrum of P. insidiosum was added to the in-house database according to Bruker MALDI-TOF-MS standard process to create a library. Therefore, the identification of P. insidiosum could be facilitated using MALDI-TOF-MS.

title: pmc-8680372-3
text:
病例标题：pmc-8680372-3
病例摘要：{
    "title_zh": "pmc-8680372-3",
    "diagnosis_zh": "",
    "text_zh": "一名55岁汉族男性患者因在使用受污染河水洗脸后，左眼出现刺激、疼痛和感觉减退症状持续了3天前来就诊。他前往当地眼科诊所，并被诊断为病毒性角膜炎。经过4天的抗病毒治疗后，症状未见改善，因此患者被收入我院。裂隙灯检查显示结膜增生及靠近鼻缘约2毫米处有浸润生长至角膜的现象。在左眼观察到约2.5毫米的微血管组织增生横跨角膜缘，并且观察到角膜灰白色充血性浸润，直径约为5毫米（图示）。角膜刮片经革兰氏染色和KOH制备后未发现微生物。患者被开具了包括奥硝唑、妥布霉素、万古霉素、纳他霉素和氟康唑在内的经验性强化局部及全身抗生素治疗。入院第三天，症状仍未见改善。左眼进行了翼状胬肉切除术和治疗性穿透角膜移植手术。其角膜组织细菌、真菌和阿米巴培养均为阴性。由于存在角膜神经炎增加的证据，开始使用抗阿米巴药物（氯己定）并添加了伏立康唑。术后12天，角膜混浊再次刮取，并且浸润深入到前房。进行了第二次穿透角膜移植手术，几乎从缘至缘，并连续注射两性霉素B。然而，在第二次手术后10天，感染仍扩散至相邻的巩膜并进展为眼内炎。最终不得不进行眼球摘除术。随后，生长在PDA平板上的角膜培养物通过MALDI-TOF-MS鉴定为P. insidiosum，确诊为丝状真菌病（pythiosis）。
"}`

metadata.original_text: A 55-year-old male of Han nationality presented with irritation, pain, and hyposia in the left eye for 3 days after facial washing with contaminated river water. He went to a local ophthalmic clinic and was diagnosed with viral keratitis. After 4 days of antiviral therapy, the symptoms were not improved, so the patient was admitted to our hospital. Slit-lamp examination showed conjunctival hypertrophy and infiltrated growth into cornea about 2 mm from the nasal limbus. In the left eye, microvascular tissue hypertrophy of about 2.5 mm was seen across the corneal limbus, and hyperemia grayish-white infiltrate of cornea with a diameter of about 5 mm was observed (Fig. ). Direct microscopy of corneal scrapings stained with Gram and KOH preparation was negative for organisms. The patient was prescribed empiric fortified topical and systemic antibiotics, including ornidazole, tobramycin, vancomycin, natamycin, and fluconazole. On the third day after hospitalization, symptom improvement was not noted. Excision of pterygium and therapeutic penetrating keratoplasty were performed in the left eye. Cultures of his corneal tissue for bacteria, fungus, and Acanthamoeba were negative. Because there was evidence of increased keratoneuritis, antiamebic therapy (chlorhexidine) was initiated and voriconazole was added. Twelve days after the surgery, corneal opacity was rescraped and infiltration extended deeply into the anterior chamber. A second penetrating keratoplasty, virtually limbus to limbus, and intracameral amphotericin B injection were performed sequentially. However, 10 days after the second operation, the infection still spread to the adjacent sclera and progressed to endophthalmitis. Enucleation eventually had to be done. Subsequently, the corneal cultures growing on PDA plate were identified as P. insidiosum by MALDI-TOF-MS, confirming the diagnosis of pythiosis.

title: pmc-8682870-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-8682870-1
病例摘要：我们报告了一例58岁非洲裔美国男性病例，其长期患有鳞状瘙痒的脚部。患者于2018年2月8日因双足跖面出现疑似炎症反应前来就诊（和）。从患者的跖面上采集的初始标本在KOH制备下显示有真菌感染的菌丝，这支持了足癣感染的诊断。患者接受了酮康唑外用软膏和20%尿素霜每日涂抹治疗。约6周后的随访显示，基底真菌感染已基本消退，仅残留轻微炎症（和）。考虑到患者最初出现可能由Trichophyton引起的过度免疫反应，我们怀疑存在对真菌的潜在过敏反应（迟发型超敏反应），而不仅仅是皮肤真菌感染。为了验证这一假设，我们对患者的左前臂掌侧进行了皮内试验，分别使用了皮内卡氏枝孢和Trichophyton过敏原。2018年3月21日，患者接受了卡氏枝孢、生理盐水和Trichophyton过敏原的皮内注射（和）.

metadata.original_text: We report a case of a 58-year-old African American male with a long history of scaly itchy feet. The patient presented to the clinic on February 8th, 2018 with an apparent inflammatory reaction on the plantar surface of both feet ( and ). An initial specimen collection from the patient’s plantar surface revealed hyphae indicative of a fungal infection under KOH preparation. This supported the diagnosis of a tinea pedis infection. The patient was treated with ketoconazole topical cream and 20% Urea creams to be applied daily. Follow-up approximately 6 weeks later revealed resolution of underlying fungal infection with minimal remaining inflammation ( and ). With consideration to the subject’s initial presentation of a possible exaggerated immune reaction caused by Trichophyton, we suspected an underlying allergic response (delayed-type hypersensitivity reaction) to the fungus, instead of a cutaneous fungal infection alone. In order to test this hypothesis, we subjected the patient to intradermal skin testing with intradermal Candida and Trichophyton allergens. On March 21, 2018, the patient underwent application of Candida, normal saline, and Trichophyton allergens on the left volar forearm ( and ).

title: pmc-8683160-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-8683160-1
病例摘要：{
    "title_zh": "pmc-8683160-1",
    "diagnosis_zh": "",
    "text_zh": "一名70岁女性，有多重慢性疾病史，包括高血压、终末期肾病（ESRD）和多个假体关节，包括左侧全膝关节置换术（TKA），因左膝疼痛、红肿及肿胀一周前来急诊。在出现膝部症状之前，她曾有腹泻和腹痛的症状，这些症状在患者出现膝痛前已自行缓解。患者否认近期受伤史、皮疹或最近的旅行史。体格检查显示心动过速，心率147次/分钟，呼吸频率25次/分钟，体温100.5华氏度（38.1摄氏度），在室内的血氧饱和度为100%。血压为101/59毫米汞柱。左侧膝关节红肿且活动受限。其余体格检查无异常发现。实验室检查结果显示：血红蛋白15.2 g/dL（正常范围13.5–17.5 g/dL）；白细胞计数14,900个/μL（正常范围4.5–11 k/μL），总胆红素0.8 mg/dL（正常范围0.3–1.0 mg/dL）；天冬氨酸转氨酶35 U/L（正常范围13–39 U/L）、丙氨酸转氨酶33 U/L（正常范围4–33 U/L）、碱性磷酸酶124 U/L（正常范围34–104 U/L）、血清肌酐2.3 mg/dL；钠和钾均在正常范围内。左侧膝关节的侧位X光片和前后位X光片显示了之前的全膝关节置换术，但未发现其他显著异常（图略）。初步诊断考虑为假体膝关节感染性关节炎及腹泻后的反应性关节炎。痛风及其他风湿性疾病的可能性较小。初步诊断为由于感染性关节炎引起的败血症，并给予静脉液体支持、经验性抗生素治疗（万古霉素和泰能）以及退热药。进行了关节穿刺术，抽取了脓液并送检革兰氏染色及培养。革兰氏染色显示大量白细胞和革兰阴性卵圆形杆菌。次日培养结果显示为革兰阳性卵圆形杆菌，鉴定为耶尔森菌肠炎。该细菌对所有测试的抗生素均敏感。血液培养也检测到了耶尔森菌肠炎。耶尔森菌肠炎被确认为感染性关节炎的原因，可能是她在就诊前腹泻的原因。患者接受了骨科会诊，并进行了左侧TKA的切除和生物降解植入物的放置，未出现并发症。患者还接受了传染病科的会诊，根据他们的建议，考虑到她的败血症及膝关节假体材料，出院后在家接受6周的门诊静脉抗生素治疗（每日2克头孢曲松）。患者顺利完成此疗程且无任何并发症。随访时发现感染完全消退，一年以上的随访期内未出现膝部复发或再感染。
"}`whelk

metadata.original_text: A 70-year-old female with multiple medical comorbidities, including hypertension, end-stage renal disease (ESRD), and multiple prosthetic joints including a left total knee arthroplasty (TKA), presented to the emergency room with one-week history of left knee pain, erythema, and swelling. Prior to developing the symptoms in her knee, she suffered from loose stools and abdominal pain that had resolved by the time the patient developed pain in her knee. The patient denied any recent trauma, any rashes, or recent travel. Physical examination was pertinent for tachycardia with a heart rate of 147 beats per minute, respiratory rate of 25 breaths per minute, temperature of 100.5 F, and oxygen saturation of 100% on room air. Blood pressure was 101/59 mmHg. The left knee was red, hot, and swollen. The range of motion of the left knee was restricted. The rest of her physical examination was unremarkable. On laboratory work up, hemoglobin was 15.2 g/dL (13.5–17.5 g/dL); white blood cell (WBC) count, 14,900 cells/uL (4.5–11 k/uL), total bilirubin, 0.8 mg/dL (0.3–1.0 mg/dL); aspartate aminotransferase, 35 U/L (13–39 U/L); alanine aminotransferase, 33 U/L (4–33 U/L); alkaline phosphatase, 124 U/L (34–104 U/L); s. creatinine, 2.3 mg/dl; and sodium and potassium, within normal limits. Lateral and anterior-posterior view X-rays of the left knee joint showed prior total knee replacement but no other significant findings (Figures and ). The initial differentials included septic arthritis of her prosthetic knee joint and reactive arthritis after her recent diarrhea. Gout and other rheumatologic conditions were less likely. A preliminary diagnosis of sepsis due to septic arthritis was made, and supportive management with intravenous (IV) fluids, empiric antibiotics (vancomycin and zosyn), and antipyretics was initiated. Arthrocentesis was performed, and purulent fluid was drained. This was sent for Gram staining and cultures. Gram staining was significant for numerous WBCs and Gram-negative coccobacilli. The culture came back the next day growing Gram-positive coccobacilli that were subsequently identified as Yersinia enterocolitis. This was sensitive to all the antibiotics it was tested against. The blood cultures came back positive for Yersinia enterocolitica too. Yersinia enterocolitica was identified as the cause of the septic arthritis, which was likely the cause of her diarrhea prior to presenting. The patient was seen by orthopedic surgery in consultation and underwent resection of her left TKA and placement of a biodegradable implant without any complications. The patient was also seen by infectious disease in consultation, and based on their recommendations, the patient was discharged home to complete 6 weeks of outpatient IV antibiotics in the form of 2 g of ceftriaxone daily considering her sepsis and prosthetic material in her knee joint. The patient completed this without any complications. The patient was seen on follow-up, and her infection resolved completely. She has not had a recurrence or reinfection of her knee after over a year of follow-up.

title: pmc-8683162-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-8683162-1
病例摘要：一名73岁男性，有慢性阻塞性肺疾病、高血压和右侧偏瘫及言语障碍的病史。他因嗜睡状态被送入急诊室。患者报告全身疼痛、呼吸困难和咳嗽，这些症状在过去两到三天内逐渐加重。患者检测出SARS-CoV-2阳性。他在医院住了大约三个月。以下是第一个月住院期间的简要概述：患者在入院时接受了地塞米松、阿奇霉素和头孢曲松治疗。他的病情因胃肠道出血需要多次输血以及肺栓塞而复杂化。由于胃肠道出血，抗凝治疗无法充分处理肺栓塞。由于COVID-19导致的呼吸状况恶化，他需要进行气管插管，并在住院期间大部分时间都需要使用呼吸机。广谱抗生素继续使用了大多数住院期，之后更换为万古霉素、哌拉西林-他唑巴坦和左氧氟沙星以覆盖机械通气相关性肺炎。由于持续的白细胞增多症以及胸部X光显示浸润迹象的存在，患者需要进行两次三联抗生素治疗来覆盖机械通气相关性肺炎。在住院第二个月初，在完成初始抗生素疗程后，由于呼吸状况恶化，在医院第26天进行了痰培养，结果显示为产酸克氏肠杆菌和窄食单胞菌，这些被用复方新诺明治疗。由于胃肠道出血，患者接受了食管-十二指肠镜检查和结肠镜检查。食管-十二指肠镜检查显示轻度幽门炎、变形的十二指肠球以及一些轻微的憩室病。结肠镜检查发现升结肠处有一个大的肿块。从这个结肠肿块中取了两个活检样本，结果显示为无细胞异型性的管状腺瘤。然而，病理学家建议如果这些活检材料是更大病变的一部分，则不能排除更高级别的恶性病变。由于患者在住院期间不稳定，无法进行肿块切除手术。在医院第38天，患者接受了气管切开术，并且没有并发症地耐受了该过程。在医院第49天，患者出现发热（最高体温101.2°F）。此时，患者已经放置了导尿管和颈内静脉中心线插管（他在住院期间大部分时间都需要这两种插管）。当天进行了尿液分析、尿培养、血液培养以及胸部X光检查。尿液分析显示每高倍视野38个红细胞、13个白细胞/HPF、2+细菌、许多芽生酵母和3+透明管型。由于尿液中的细菌和酵母，当天更换了导尿管。虽然白细胞增多症仅轻微（每立方毫米血液10.6个细胞），但在接下来的四天内继续增加到每立方毫米血液15个细胞。在医院第53天进行的尿培养结果显示为T. asahii。通过在含有5%羊血的TSB琼脂平板上孵育获得T. asahii的分离株，并在35°C的常压孵箱中孵育24小时。使用VITEK 2系统（bioMérieux, Inc., Hazelwood, MO）对分离株进行了鉴定。尽管尿液分析显示有2+细菌，但在尿培养中未见细菌生长。血液培养五天后无生长。血清β-D葡萄糖为阴性。将尿培养送至外部实验室（Quest Diagnostics Nichols Institute, Chantilly, VA）以确定敏感性。在Quest Diagnostics，分离株在Sabouraud葡萄糖琼脂平板上重新孵育。

metadata.original_text: A 73-year-old male with a past medical history of chronic obstructive pulmonary disease, hypertension, and cerebrovascular accident with a right-sided deficit and speech deficit presented in a somnolent state to the emergency room. The patient reportedly had generalized body aches, dyspnea, and cough, which had been progressively worsening over the past two to three days. The patient tested positive for SARS-CoV-2. The patient experienced a prolonged hospital course, remaining in the hospital for approximately three months. A brief overview of the first month of hospitalization is given as follows: the patient was started on dexamethasone, azithromycin, and ceftriaxone at admission. His condition was complicated by a gastrointestinal bleed requiring multiple blood transfusions and a pulmonary embolism. The pulmonary embolism could not be adequately treated with anticoagulation due to his gastrointestinal bleed. His respiratory status declined, due to COVID-19, necessitating intubation which the patient required for most of his hospital stay. Broad-spectrum antibiotics were continued for the majority of his hospital course, switching to vancomycin, piperacillin-tazobactam, and levofloxacin to cover for ventilator-associated pneumonia. The patient required two courses of triple antibiotic therapy to cover for ventilator-associated pneumonia due to persistent leukocytosis and a chest X-ray significant for signs of infiltrates which remained following his initial treatment course for ventilator-associated pneumonia. During the second month of his hospital stay, after his initial antibiotics courses had been completed, due to worsening respiratory status, sputum cultures were performed on hospital day (HD) # 26 which revealed Stenotrophomonas maltophilia and Citrobacter koseri, which were treated with trimethoprim-sulfamethoxazole (). Due to his gastrointestinal bleed, the patient underwent an esophagoduodenoscopy and a colonoscopy. Esophagoduodenoscopy revealed mild antral gastritis with a deformed duodenal bulb as well as some mild diverticulosis. Colonoscopy revealed a large ascending-colon mass. Two biopsy samples were taken of this colon mass, which returned consistent with tubular adenoma without cytologic atypia. However, it was suggested by the pathologist that if this biopsy material was part of a larger lesion, a more advanced malignant lesion could not be excluded. The patient was too unstable during his hospitalization to undergo resection of the mass. On HD # 38, the patient received a tracheostomy which he tolerated well without complications. On HD # 49, the patient experienced a febrile episode (maximum temperature of 101.2 °F). At this time, the patient had both a Foley catheter and an internal jugular central line in place (he required both of these for the majority of his hospital course). Urinalysis, urine cultures, blood cultures, and a chest X-ray were ordered on the same day (). Urinalysis revealed 38 red blood cells per High Powered Field (HPF), 13 white blood cells/HPF, 2+ bacteria, many budding yeast, and 3+ hyaline casts (). Due to the bacteria and yeast in his urine, the Foley catheter was replaced the same day. Leukocytosis was only mild (10.6 cells per cubic millimeter of blood), but continued to increase to 15 cells per cubic millimeter of blood over the ensuing four days (). The urine culture that resulted on HD # 53 revealed T. asahii. Isolates of T. asahii were obtained by performing a culture on a TSA blood agar plate with 5% sheep blood. The isolates were incubated at 35°C in an incubator at an ambient atmosphere for 24 hours. Isolates were identified using the VITEK 2 system (bioMérieux, Inc., Hazelwood, MO). Although the urinalysis had shown 2+ bacteria, no bacterial growth was seen in the urine culture. Blood culture revealed no growth after five days. Serum beta-D glucan was negative. The urine culture was sent to an outside laboratory (Quest Diagnostics Nichols Institute, Chantilly, VA) to determine sensitivities. At Quest Diagnostics, the isolates were reincubated on Sabouraud Dextros

title: pmc-8683165-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-8683165-1
主要诊断：肠结核
病例摘要：一名33岁男性因三天内出现大量便血，血液与粪便混合，并伴有易疲劳症状一周前来我中心就诊。在初次就诊前的一周内他还出现了柏油样黑便一次。然而他没有呕吐物带血、紫癜或瘀点的症状。他也未报告有血尿、体重减轻、夜间盗汗、午后发热、食欲不振、咳嗽、胸痛、呼吸困难、心悸、肢体水肿、腹泻、黄疸和腹胀等症状。出血仅限于肛门。他没有糖尿病、高血压、心脏病和肺结核的既往病史。他有15年每天饮用80克酒精的历史，但从未吸烟。体检显示患者面色苍白，精神状态差，意识清晰，对时间、地点和个人有良好的定向力。但他没有黄疸、杵状指、发绀或水肿的症状。脉搏为每分钟110次，血压为80/60毫米汞柱，体温为98华氏度（36.6摄氏度），呼吸频率为每分钟19次，吸氧饱和度在空气中为95%。直肠指检显示检查手指上有新鲜血液，其他发现正常。腹部和心脏检查均未见异常。实验室检查结果显示血红蛋白水平为10.8克/分升，红细胞比容31.6%。白细胞计数为每立方毫米11510个，中性粒细胞占78%，血小板计数为291000个/微升。凝血酶原时间为14秒，国际标准化比值为1.08。血液中的白蛋白水平为2.4克/分升，总蛋白6.1克/分升，直接和间接胆红素分别为0.7和0.1毫克/分升。丙氨酸氨基转移酶和天门冬氨酸氨基转移酶的水平分别为97单位/升和114单位/升。血液中的糖化血红蛋白（HbA1c）为7.2%。尿液检查中发现微量葡萄糖和++级白蛋白。粪便隐血试验呈阳性。在酸性抗酸杆菌染色的痰液样本中未检测到结核分枝杆菌。胸部X光片显示正常。腹部和骨盆以及上消化道内镜检查均无异常发现。胸部和腹部计算机断层扫描（CT）显示回肠末端与盲肠区域不对称环形增厚，盲肠呈结节状增厚、软组织水肿及坏死性肠系膜淋巴结病变，并在肺部出现不明确的结节。结肠镜检查发现回肠末端和升结肠及横结肠有多处纵行溃疡并覆盖有渗出物。小肠和结肠的病理检查显示散在溃疡伴渗出物、肉芽组织形成、纤维化、深部淋巴浆细胞炎症以及散在血管内纤维素样改变，但结论不明确。然而，基因XPERT检测结果为结核分枝杆菌阳性。他被诊断为回盲部结核。入院两天后血红蛋白水平降至6.1克/分升，并出现与大量出汗和寒战相关的虚弱症状。进行了液体复苏并输注了两单位全血。之后，他的血红蛋白水平上升至10.2毫克/分升。他接受了四种抗结核药物治疗，并表现出显著改善。出院后十天内，他口服抗结核药物（异烟肼、利福平、吡嗪酰胺、乙胺丁醇和维生素B6）进行治疗。两周后的随访显示他对抗结核药物反应良好，症状有所改善，即没有便血现象，并且肝功能检查结果正常。

metadata.original_text: A 33-year-old male presented to our center with chief complaints of profuse per rectal bleed mixed with stool for three days that was associated with easy fatigability for one week prior to the initial presentation. He also had one episode of black tarry stool. However, he had no complaints of blood in vomit, purpuric rashes, or petechiae. He also had no hematuria, weight loss, night sweats, evening rise of temperature or loss of appetite, cough, chest pain, dyspnea, palpitation, limb edema, loose stools, jaundice, and abdominal distension. Bleeding was absent from other orifices. He had no history of diabetes mellitus, hypertension, cardiac diseases, and pulmonary tuberculosis in the past. He consumed 80 grams of alcohol per day for 15 years, but he did not smoke. On examination, he was ill looking, conscious, and was well oriented to time place and person. He had pallor and was dehydrated. However, he had no icterus, clubbing, cyanosis, or edema. His pulse rate was 110 beats/minute, blood pressure was 80/60 mm of Hg, body temperature was 98°F (36.6°C), respiratory rate was 19 breaths/minute, and oxygen saturation was 95% in room air. The digital rectal examination showed fresh blood over the examining finger and otherwise normal findings. Abdominal and cardiac examination was normal. Laboratory investigations showed hemoglobin 10.8 g/dl and hematocrit 31.6%. The total leukocyte count was 11510/mm3, neutrophils were 78%, and platelet count was 291000/mm3. The prothrombin time was 14 seconds, and the International normalized ratio was 1.08. The albumin level in the blood was 2.4 gm/dl, and total protein was 6.1 gm/dl, total and direct bilirubin were 0.7 and 0.1 mg/dl in the blood. Alanine aminotransferase and aspartate aminotransferase level was 97 U/L and 114 U/L, respectively. HbA1C level in the blood was 7.2. The level of urea (33 mg/dl), creatinine (1.1 mg/dl), sodium (132 mEq/l), and potassium (3.6 mEq/l) were within normal range. Traces of sugar and albumin (++) were present in the urine examination. The fecal occult blood was found in the stool. Mycobacterium tuberculosis was not detected in sputum in the acid-fast bacilli (AFB) stain. The chest X-ray was normal. Ultrasonography (USG) of the abdomen and pelvis and upper gastrointestinal endoscopy showed normal findings. A Computed Tomography (CT) scan of chest and abdomen showed asymmetric circumferential thickening in the ileocaecal region with lobulated thickened caecum, soft-tissue stranding and necrotic mesenteric lymphadenopathy, and indeterminate lobule in the lung (). Colonoscopy showed multiple transverse ulcers with overlying exudates in terminal ileum and ascending and transverse colon. Histopathological examination of the ileum and colon showed patchy ulcers with exudates, granulation tissue, fibrosis, deep lymphoplasmocytic inflammation, and crypt regenerative changes with fibrinoid changes in scattered capillaries and venules and was inconclusive. However, gene XPERT was positive for Mycobacterium tuberculosis. He was diagnosed with ileocaecal tuberculosis. The hemoglobin level dropped to 6.1 g/dl after two days of admission, and he had an episode of weakness associated with profuse sweating and rigor. Fluid resuscitation followed by two pints of whole blood transfusion was performed. After that, his hemoglobin was increased to 10.2 mg/dl. He was managed with four antitubercular drugs and showed significant improvement. Following this, he was discharged on oral antitubercular medications (isoniazid, rifampicin, pyrazinamide, ethambutol, and pyridoxine) after 10 days of admission. On follow-up after two weeks, he was responding well to antitubercular medications with improved symptoms, i.e., no per rectal bleeding, and his liver function test was within the normal range.

title: pmc-8683194-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-8683194-1
病例摘要：我们报告了一例46岁女性病例，无吸烟史，有溃疡性结肠炎病史。最初因持续咳嗽、喘息和胸闷6个月前来门诊就诊。体格检查其他系统未见异常，唯一服用的药物是用于治疗溃疡性结肠炎的柳氮磺胺吡啶。她没有环境或职业暴露史，否认过敏史。她否认有肺部疾病的家庭和个人病史。生命体征在正常范围内。该患者由呼吸科评估，并被诊断为咳嗽变异性哮喘，开始使用蒙特鲁卡斯特和按需使用的沙丁胺醇治疗。东北部过敏检测结果无异常。随后因喘息和胸闷再次急诊就诊，计算机断层血管造影（CTA）显示双侧肺内有多发结节状病灶，表现为毛玻璃样改变。最大的结节位于右中叶，直径达1.8厘米。多项血清学标志物被检测以筛查自身免疫性疾病，包括ANA、ANCA、抗dsDNA抗体、过敏性肺炎面板、舍格伦综合征抗体、血管紧张素转换酶和类风湿因子。除了ANA阳性（滴度1:640，均匀型模式）外，其他结果均无异常。由于症状未得到控制，她的吸入剂方案升级为每日两次氟替卡松，按需使用沙丁胺醇。3个月后再次进行胸部CT检查显示弥漫性毛玻璃样改变和多发肺结节没有变化，最大的结节仍为1.8厘米（右中叶）。随后进行了机器人辅助导航支气管镜检查，并对右中叶结节进行了细针穿刺、刷检及经支气管活检（图示-）。结节病理结果显示为一组外观平淡的小蓝细胞，符合低级别神经内分泌肿瘤（类癌）特征。病理结果还显示了嗜铬粒蛋白和突触素阳性，以及Ki-67低表达，表明增殖率较低（图示-）。进行了内镜超声检查，第7级淋巴结未见恶性病变。患者参加了多学科胸部肿瘤会议，并建议她进行PET CT扫描并手术切除经活检证实的右中叶典型类癌肿瘤。

metadata.original_text: We present the case of a 46 year-old-female, never smoker, with a history of ulcerative colitis who initially presented as an outpatient for the evaluation of persistent cough, wheezing, and chest tightness for 6 months. Her review of systems was otherwise negative and her only medication included mesalamine for ulcerative colitis. She had no history of environmental or occupational exposures and denied any allergies. She denied any personal or family history of lung disease. Her vital signs were within normal limits. This patient was evaluated by pulmonology and was diagnosed with cough variant asthma and was started on montelukast and albuterol as needed. A northeast allergy panel was unremarkable. She subsequently presented to the emergency room with an episode of wheezing and chest tightness and Computed Tomography Angiogram (CTA) revealed multiple lung nodules with mosaic attenuation. The nodules were seen bilaterally in clusters, with the largest measuring up to 1.8 cm in the right middle lobe. Multiple serologic markers were ordered to screen for autoimmune disease including ANA, ANCA, anti-dsDNA, hypersensitivity pneumonitis panel, Sjogren's antibodies, angiotensin converting enzyme, and rheumatoid factor. These were unremarkable other than a positive ANA with titer 1 : 640 homogenous pattern. Due to uncontrolled symptoms, her inhaler regime was escalated to Flovent twice daily with as needed albuterol. A repeat CT chest 3 months later indicated no change in diffuse mosaicism and multiple pulmonary nodules, similar in size, with the largest 1.8 cm in the right middle lobe (Figures –). She then underwent robotic-assisted navigational bronchoscopy with fine needle aspiration, brushing, and transbronchial biopsy of the right middle lobe nodule (Figures and). Pathology from the nodule was positive for groups of bland appearing small blue cells, consistent with low-grade neuroendocrine tumor (carcinoid). Pathology was positive for chromogranin and synaptophysin, neuroendocrine markers, and low Ki-67 positivity, indicating low rate of proliferation (Figures –). Endobronchial ultrasound was also performed and Level 7 lymph node was negative for malignancy. The patient was presented at multidisciplinary chest tumor conference and it was recommended that she undergo PET CT scan and surgical resection of the biopsy-proven typical carcinoid tumor in the right middle lobe.

title: pmc-8683236-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-8683236-1
病例摘要：一名35岁女性因过去三个月逐渐加重的运动性呼吸困难和双下肢水肿前来急诊科就诊。患者最初注意到轻微的运动后呼吸困难，逐渐进展到无法一口气爬一个楼梯而需要休息的情况。患者还报告了无痰咳嗽、胸膜性胸痛、偶尔出现端坐呼吸以及一个月内非自愿减轻20磅（9.1公斤）体重的症状。她否认发热、寒战或夜间盗汗；没有恶心或呕吐；也没有容易瘀伤或出血。患者否认近期有其他疾病，也否认有任何结核病的风险因素。她的既往医学史无明显异常，包括之前没有心脏问题、血栓性疾病、结构性心脏病、留置导管或哮喘的记录。她否认目前或过去有过静脉药物滥用（IVDU）。家族和手术史均无重要发现。体格检查显示患者坐卧自如，外观不中毒。生命体征包括体温36.7°C (98.1°F)，心率109次/分钟（轻度心动过速），血压107/64 mmHg，呼吸频率20次/分钟。肺部检查双侧听诊清晰，无异常声音或凹陷性呼吸；然而，患者只能用四到五个词的句子说话，并且有不费力的快速呼吸，没有辅助肌使用。心脏检查显示轻度心动过速，无杂音、摩擦音或奔马律；无颈静脉充盈；无颈动脉杂音。四肢检查发现双下肢中段胫骨处对称性2+凹陷性水肿。皮肤检查未见紫癜、奥尔森结节、贾维埃病变或瘀点。腹部检查无压痛，神经系统检查无局灶性异常。进行了多次实验室检测包括两套血液培养（），仅发现轻度低钠血症，钠离子浓度127 mEq/L，氯化物109 mEq/L，以及轻度贫血，血红蛋白8.5 g/dL。没有白细胞增多，肌钙蛋白不可测得，脑钠肽在正常范围内。这些实验室结果并不特别提示任何特定的病理过程。注意到贫血，但缺乏相应的胆红素升高使急性溶血的可能性较小。低钠血症被认为与患者的高容量临床表现一致。尽管没有白细胞增多，但这一值单独使用时限制了推断的能力。总体而言，实验室结果使得急性失代偿性充血性心力衰竭和细菌性肺炎在鉴别诊断中较低。12导联心电图显示窦性心动过速，轴位和间期正常，没有急性损伤模式，也没有右心室压力增高的证据。胸部X光片（）由放射科医生解读为“双侧斑片状萎陷”——然而，急诊医师认为它显示了右侧下叶基于胸膜的楔形实变影，符合汉普顿凸起。提供者最初考虑的鉴别诊断包括肺栓塞、肺炎、充血性心力衰竭、肺动脉高压、心肌病和感染性心内膜炎。此时，为患者增加了第三套血液培养。急诊科进行了有限的床旁经胸超声心动图（图）显示三尖瓣赘生物可能以及右室轻度增大但无D征象（即在矢状短轴视图中左室呈D形，提示由于右室压力增高导致的心室间隔移位）。因疑似感染性心内膜炎咨询了心脏病学。胸部CT血管造影（CTA）被订购以评估肺栓塞并进一步描述放射学上看到的肺部病变，并且患者接受了静脉注射

metadata.original_text: A 35-year-old female presented to the Emergency Department (ED) for evaluation of 3 months of worsening exertional dyspnea and bilateral lower extremity edema. The patient initially noted mild dyspnea on exertion, which gradually progressed to the point of being unable to climb a single flight of stairs without stopping to rest. The patient endorsed a nonproductive cough, pleuritic chest pain, occasional orthopnea, and an unintentional 20-pound (9.1 kg) weight loss over a one-month period. She denied any associated fevers, chills, or night sweats; had no nausea or vomiting; and had no easy bruising or bleeding. The patient denied any other recent illness and also denied any significant exposures or risk factors for tuberculosis. She had no significant past medical history including any previous cardiac pathology, thromboembolic disease, structural heart disease, indwelling catheters, or asthma. She denied any current or prior intravenous drug use (IVDU). Family and surgical history was also noncontributory. Physical exam demonstrated a nontoxic appearing patient sitting comfortably in bed. Vital signs included a temperature of 98.1°F (36.7°C) with mild tachycardia at 109 beats per minute, blood pressure of 107/64 mmHg, and respiratory rate of 20 breaths per minute. Pulmonary examination revealed lungs clear to auscultation bilaterally without adventitious sounds or retractions; however, the patient was only able to speak in 4–5-word sentences with effortless tachypnea and no accessory muscle use. Cardiac examination demonstrated mild tachycardia without murmurs, rubs, or gallops; no jugular venous distention; and no carotid bruits. Extremity examination was notable for symmetric 2+ pitting edema to the midshin of both lower extremities. Skin exam revealed no purpura, Osler nodes, Janeway lesions, splinter hemorrhages, or track marks. Abdominal exam was nontender, and neurological examination was nonfocal. Multiple laboratory studies including 2 sets of blood cultures were obtained () and remarkable only for mild hyponatremia with a sodium of 127 mEq/L, a chloride of 90 mEq/L, and mild anemia with a hemoglobin of 8.5 g/dL. There was no leukocytosis, troponin was undetectable, and brain-natriuretic peptide was within the normal range. These laboratory findings were not suggestive of any particular pathological processes. The finding of anemia was noted, but the lack of any corresponding elevation in bilirubin made acute hemolysis less likely. The hyponatremia was felt to be consistent with the patient's hypervolemic clinical picture. The lack of leukocytosis was noted, though limited inferences can be made from this value in isolation. Overall, the laboratory results made acute decompensated congestive heart failure and bacterial pneumonia lower on the differential. A 12-lead electrocardiogram revealed sinus tachycardia with normal axis and intervals, with no acute injury pattern and no evidence of right-heart strain. A chest radiograph was obtained () and was interpreted by the radiologist as demonstrating “bilateral patchy atelectasis”—however, the emergency physicians felt it demonstrated a pleural-based wedge-like consolidation in the right inferior lobe consistent with Hampton's Hump. The initial differential considered by the providers included pulmonary embolus, pneumonia, congestive heart failure, pulmonary hypertension, cardiomyopathy, and infectious endocarditis. At this time, a third set of blood cultures were added to the patient's workup. A limited bedside transthoracic echocardiogram (Figures and ) in the ED revealed findings concerning for tricuspid valve vegetations as well as a slightly enlarged right ventricle without any D-sign (i.e., a D-shaped left ventricle on parasternal short-axis view, consistent with right ventricular strain causing shift of the ventricular septum). Cardiology was consulted for concern for potential IE. A CT-angiogram (CTA) of the chest was ordered to assess for pulmonary embolism and further characterize the pulmonary lesions seen on radiography, and the patient received intraven

title: pmc-8683245-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-8683245-1
主要诊断：MAS
病例摘要：我们报告了一名5岁女童，自新生儿早期起即出现皮肤病变、间歇性无痛阴道出血和乳房增大等症状。由于这些症状，父母将孩子带到附近的医疗设施就诊，但未得到进一步处理。与同龄人相比，她从幼儿期开始身高增长迅速，但体重增加不良。在3岁半时，因膝内翻症状首次就诊于骨科诊所，并被观察后回家，没有进行干预。但在一周后，她发生了一次轻微的跌倒事故，并在上下肢均发生了病理性骨折。左侧下臂使用了石膏固定，左股骨进行了开放性固定手术。在手术过程中检测到心动过速，经检查诊断为甲状腺功能亢进症。最初给予丙基硫氧嘧啶（PTU）和普萘洛尔治疗。术后八个月，钢板移位。骨科医生决定进行手术修正，但由于甲状腺功能未得到控制，她被转诊至儿科内分泌科以更好地管理甲状腺功能亢进症。在儿科内分泌科体检时，她体型消瘦。体重为16公斤（第10-25百分位），身高为115厘米（第95百分位）。根据CDC生长曲线，她的体重低于身高的第5百分位（营养不良）。心率为每分钟123次，眼球突出。面部、颈部和躯干上发现CAL斑点（）。在前颈部有一个大小为5厘米×3厘米的不规则表面肿块（）。还有乳房增大。她有三级早期收缩期杂音，在左锁骨上方听得最清楚。右侧肱骨中段肿胀并伴有压痛，左侧下臂有短石膏固定。步态宽大。根据临床表现，诊断为MAS。

metadata.original_text: We present a 5-year-old female child who was symptomatic since the early neonatal period with skin lesions, intermittent painless vaginal bleeding, and breast enlargement. For these complaints, the parents took the child to the nearby health facility, but they were reassured. Compared to her peers, her growth in length was fast since her early childhood, but she had poor weight gain. At the age of 3 ½ years, she presented to an orthopedic clinic with bowlegs for which she was seen and sent home without any intervention. But after one week, she had a trivial fall down accident, and she sustained pathological fractures on both upper and lower extremities. Plaster of Paris (POP) cast was applied for the lower left arm, and open fixation with plate was done for the left femur. During the procedure, tachycardia was detected, for which she was investigated and diagnosed to have hyperthyroidism. She was initially put on propylthiouracil (PTU) and propranolol. After eight months of the procedure, there was displacement of the plate. The orthopedic surgeon decided to revise the operation, but the thyroid function was not controlled for which she was referred to a paediatric endocrinology clinic for better management of hyperthyroidism. On physical examination at the paediatric endocrinology clinic, she was emaciated. Her weight was 16 kg (between 10th and 25th percentiles) and her height was 115 cm (on the 95th percentiles). Weight for height was far less than 5th percentile (underweight), based on CDC growth charts. Her pulse rate was 123 bpm, and she had protruded eyes. CAL spots were noticed on her face, neck, and trunk (). There was a 5 cm by 3 cm anterior neck mass with an irregular surface (). There was also breast enlargement. She had a grade III early systolic murmur best heard at the left upper sternal border. There was swelling and tenderness at the right midshaft of the humerus and short POP on the left lower arm. She had a wide gait. Based on her clinical findings, she was diagnosed to have MAS.

title: pmc-8683699-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-8683699-1
病例摘要：一位54岁的健康男性患者来到我们的诊所，抱怨左眼视力逐渐无痛下降一年。他还报告偶尔有轻微疼痛、畏光和红眼的症状。该患者在就诊前13年接受了双眼未发生意外的白内障手术。使用Snellen视标测量的最佳矫正视力（BCVA）为右眼（OD）20/28，左眼（OS）20/400。裂隙灯生物显微镜检查显示右眼无异常（图）。检查左眼时，前房细胞1+（即每视野6-15个），虹膜后囊相对较小（测量为4.7 mm）。此外，在IOL后面注意到一层厚且混浊的绿色液体，限制了对后囊的观察（图）。由于无法清晰地看到视网膜，进行了B超检查，结果显示有中度密集的玻璃体混浊，提示可能为脉络膜炎。未见视网膜增厚。超声生物显微镜（UBM）显示IOL后面有一个高回声的混浊液体积聚，并伴有囊袋扩张，证实了假定的诊断为CBDS（图）。假设为晚发性CBDS且可能与P. acnes相关，并考虑进行手术干预。在向患者解释手术过程并获得书面知情同意后，进行了经后房切除术（PPV）和后囊切开术。首先，在角膜缘3.5 mm处放置了23G三套PPV穿刺器。然后，通过鼻上巩膜切口插入27G针头穿透后囊并轻轻吸取液化物质。在吸出并清除视轴后，通过同一鼻上端口引入玻璃体切割机进行后囊切开术和核心玻璃体切除术。由于可能与P. acnes内源性眼内炎相关，在手术结束时注射了1 mg/0.1 mL的万古霉素（IV）。术后，吸出的物质被送往组织病理学检查以进行革兰氏染色和培养。72小时后，硫乙醇酸盐肉汤培养物呈P. acnes阳性，证实了假定诊断。术后恢复期无并发症，未发现眼内炎症迹象。在六个月时，患者的BCVA为20/25，并且没有其他抱怨（图）。

metadata.original_text: A 54-year-old medically free Saudi gentleman presented to our clinic complaining of a gradual painless decrease in vision of his left eye over one year. He also reported mild pain, photophobia, and redness from time to time. The patient underwent uneventful cataract surgery of both eyes 13 years prior to his presentation. The best-corrected visual acuity (BCVA) using a Snellen chart was 20/28 in the right eye (OD) and 20/400 in the left eye (OS). Slit-lamp biomicroscopic examination of the OD was unremarkable (Figure ). Upon examining the OS, there were 1+ (i.e., 6-15 cells per field) mixed anterior chamber cells. CCC was relatively small (measured 4.7 mm). In addition, a thick turbid greenish fluid was noted behind the IOL, limiting visualization of the posterior capsule (Figure ). B scan was performed due to poor visualization of the fundus, which revealed moderately dense vitreous opacities suggestive of vitritis. There was no associated choroidal thickening. Ultrasound biomicroscopy (UBM) showed a hyperechoic collection of turbid fluid behind the IOL with a distended capsular bag, confirming the presumed diagnosis of CBDS (Figure ). Late-onset CBDS with a high possibility of associated P. acnes was assumed, and surgical intervention was considered. After explaining the surgical procedure and obtaining written informed consent from the patient, a pars plana vitrectomy (PPV) with a posterior capsulotomy was performed. Initially, 23 gauge three PPV trocars were placed 3.5 mm away from the limbus. Then, through the superonasal sclerotomy site, a 27-gauge needle was inserted to pierce the posterior capsule and gently aspirate the liquified material. After aspirating and clearing the visual axis, a vitreous cutter was introduced through the same superonasal port to create posterior capsulotomy followed by core vitrectomy. Intravitreal vancomycin (1 mg/0.1 mL) was injected at the end of the procedure due to the high possibility of associated P. acnes endophthalmitis. After the procedure, the aspirated material was sent to histopathology for gram stains and cultures. After 72 hours, Thioglycolate broth was positive for the growth of P. acnes confirming the presumed diagnosis. The post-operative period was uneventful, and no signs of intraocular inflammation were detected. At six months, the patient had 20/25 BCVA and did fine without any complaints (Figure ).

title: pmc-8683972-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-8683972-1
病例摘要：一名40岁的女性因右腿严重肢体缺血入院。病史包括人类免疫缺陷病毒感染（HIV），病毒载量未检测到，冠状动脉疾病，周围血管疾病和多药滥用。血管外科进行了双侧下肢血管造影、股动脉球囊扩张术以及股动脉支架植入术。术后恢复过程顺利。出院后开始服用阿哌沙班2.5毫克每日两次，与氯吡格雷、达鲁那韦/柯比司他（Prezcobix）、艾博韦泰/多替拉韦/拉米夫定（Triumeq）、阿托伐他汀、异山梨酯和肼屈嗪一起作为她的药物治疗方案。出院一周后，患者因腰痛返回医院，并进行了计算机断层扫描（CT），显示有较大的肾周血肿（图示）。入院时的血红蛋白水平为9.2 g/dl，较出院时的11.9 g/dl有所下降。她的血清肌酐水平稳定在0.8 mg/dl。到达急诊室时，血压为130/69 mmHg，心率为每分钟87次，呼吸频率为每分钟18次，体温为37.4 °C。患者被保守治疗，并且在整个住院期间她的血红蛋白水平和生命体征保持稳定。出院时按照血管外科团队的建议继续服用阿哌沙班和氯吡格雷。四周后，患者因尿源性败血症再次入院。腹部CT复查显示肾周血肿正在吸收。患者报告在门诊管理期间仅遵守了抗逆转录病毒治疗（ART），而没有遵守抗血小板或抗凝药物（氯吡格雷和阿哌沙班）的治疗。由于担心阿哌沙班与柯比司他之间可能存在潜在的药物相互作用，她的抗凝方案被改为依诺肝素，并继续使用氯吡格雷。这一警告是在电子病历中识别出来的。

metadata.original_text: A 40-year-old woman was admitted for evaluation of critical limb ischemia of the right leg. Medical history is significant for human immune deficiency virus (HIV) infection with undetected viral load, coronary artery disease, peripheral vascular disease, and polysubstance abuse. Vascular surgery performed bilateral lower extremity angiogram, femoral artery angioplasty, and a femoral artery stent. The postoperative course was uneventful. Apixaban 2.5 mg twice daily was added to her medication regimen of clopidogrel, Darunavir/cobicistat (Prezcobix), abacavir/dolutegravir/ lamivudine (Triumeq), atorvastatin, isosorbide dinitrate, and hydralazine. The patient returned one-week post-discharge with low back pain and a computed tomography (CT) scan demonstrated a large retroperitoneal hematoma (Figures -). Her hemoglobin level on admission was 9.2 g/dl, down from a discharge level of 11.9 g/dl. Her serum creatinine was stable at 0.8 mg/dl. On arrival to ED, blood pressure was 130/69 mm of Hg, the heart rate was 87 beats per minute, respiratory rate was 18 breaths per minute, and the temperature was 37.4 °C. The patient was managed conservatively, and both her hemoglobin and vital signs remained stable throughout her admission. She was discharged on apixaban and clopidogrel as recommended by the vascular team. The patient was readmitted four weeks later with urosepsis. A follow-up CT abdomen revealed a resolving retroperitoneal hematoma. The patient reported that during her outpatient management she had only been compliant with her antiretroviral therapy (ART) and not with her antiplatelet or anticoagulant medication (clopidogrel and apixaban). Her anticoagulant regimen was changed to enoxaparin out of concern with potential drug-drug interaction with apixaban and cobicistat, and the team continued clopidogrel. This warning was identified by the electronic medical records.

title: pmc-8684064-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-8684064-1
病例摘要：一名40岁初产妇，孕1产0的白种人，在妊娠39周加6天时因新发疼痛3天入院。在妊娠39周加1天时，由于她的高龄，她开始接受门诊宫颈成熟治疗（使用dinoprostone，Cervidil）。她描述右侧胸部的疼痛为剧烈、射痛和尖锐的，但有时呈胸膜性性质。疼痛从右斜方肌迅速进展到整个右侧胸部，并放射至上腹部、剑突下区域、背部、胸部、肩部和颈部。最初认为她的疼痛可能是神经根病变引起的，因为她有类似病史。初次就诊时的生命体征正常，没有高血压的迹象，也没有关于胎儿状况的担忧。未进行进一步检查，也未记录全面的神经系统检查。在妊娠40周加0天再次就诊时，发现她血压升高至157/101和164/112毫米汞柱。血氧饱和度为98%（在常压下）。到达时心率速率为每分钟110到140次，并在整个产程中持续存在。右侧上腹部有压痛，但没有腹膜刺激征象，妊娠子宫的存在也没有发现肝脾肿大。从颈部右侧至右下背部均有压痛。双侧反射为3+级，无阵挛。胎儿心率正常。血液检查显示血红蛋白105克/升、血小板156,000个/微升、丙氨酸氨基转移酶（ALT）193微升/升、天冬氨酸氨基转移酶（AST）111微升/升和尿酸429微摩尔/升。白细胞计数、肌酐、乳酸脱氢酶（LDH）和凝血功能均在正常范围内。心电图显示窦性心律，无异常特征，仅注意到先前记录的心动过速。诊断为先兆子痫后，立即开始引产，并给予硫酸镁静脉滴注。由于她经历的疼痛非常不寻常且显著，产科及麻醉团队考虑了多种可能的诊断。初步诊断为先兆子痫合并HELLP综合征，但其他可能的诊断包括脂肪肝、神经根病变、胆囊炎、胰腺炎和肾盂肾炎。患者要求启动分娩镇痛，在宫颈扩张至2厘米时放置了一次性脊髓联合硬膜外麻醉。通过程序化的间歇性硬膜外给药并根据需要使用病人自控硬膜外镇痛维持镇痛，这符合我们机构的实践。尽管她报告说对分娩疼痛有满意的缓解，但她仍然抱怨右侧胸部的严重疼痛，这种疼痛对扑热息痛和阿片类药物均无反应。每4小时监测的血液检查显示血红蛋白为103-102克/升、血小板为158,000-165,000个/微升、ALT为176-169微升/升、AST为100-97微升/升和尿酸为400-420微摩尔/升。LDH、肌酐和凝血功能均在正常范围内。使用催产素增强分娩后，尽管有胸痛，她无法有效地用力推动。最终，产科团队同意进行试产钳并可能进行剖宫产。在手术室中，在麻醉下进行了检查，发现胎儿为枕横位，位置0，由于位置过高，决定直接进行剖宫产。一名活力较弱的男婴出生，1分钟和5分钟Apgar评分分别为3分和8分。胎盘娩出顺利。产后出血未遂性处理使用了2单位静脉催产素和肌内注射卡前列甲酯250微克，并给予催产素输注。根据我们的机构实践，在患者有多重风险因素时，仅在必要时才使用催产素的单次剂量。

metadata.original_text: A 40-year-old gravida 1 para 0 Caucasian woman presented at 39 + 6 weeks gestational age with a 3-day history of new onset pain in an otherwise uncomplicated pregnancy. At 39 + 1 weeks gestation she had started outpatient cervical ripening with dinoprostone (Cervidil) because of her advanced maternal age. She described the pain along her right torso as severe, shooting, and sharp, but at times pleuritic in nature. It rapidly progressed from her right trapezius to encompass the entirety of her right torso, from her upper abdominal quadrant and epigastrium, radiating to her back, chest, shoulder, and neck. Her pain was initially attributed to possible radiculopathy, as she had a previous history of the same. Her vital signs at initial presentation were normal, with no hypertension noted, and there were no concerns regarding the fetal status. No further investigations were ordered and a full neurological examination was not documented. She represented less than 24 hours later at 40 + 0 weeks gestational age, and was found to be hypertensive at 157/101 and 164/112 mmHg. Oxygen saturation was 98% on room air. She had sinus tachycardia on arrival, ranging from 110 to 140 bpm and persisting throughout the peripartum period. She was tender in the right upper quadrant, however there were no peritoneal signs, and no hepatomegaly was appreciated in the presence of the gravid uterus. She was tender from the right side of her neck through to her right lower back. Her reflexes were 3 + bilaterally with no clonus. The fetal heart rate was normal. Her blood investigations revealed a hemoglobin of 105 g/L, platelets 156,000 g/L, alanine aminotransferase (ALT) 193 μ/L, aspartate aminotransferase (AST) 111 μ/L, and uric acid 429 μmol/L. White blood cell count, creatinine, lactate dehydrogenase (LDH), and coagulation profile were within the normal range. An electrocardiogram (ECG) showed sinus rhythm with no abnormal features, apart from the previously noted tachycardia. After diagnosing preeclampsia, induction of labor was started, as was an infusion of magnesium sulfate. Due to the unusual but significant pain that she was experiencing, a range of differential diagnoses were considered by the obstetrical and anesthesia team. Preeclampsia with HELLP syndrome was the working diagnosis, however differential diagnoses included fatty liver, radiculopathy, cholecystitis, pancreatitis, and pyelonephritis. The patient requested labor analgesia be initiated and a combined spinal epidural was placed when the patient’s cervix was 2 cm dilated. Analgesia was maintained via programmed intermittent epidural bolus with patient-controlled epidural analgesia as needed, in keeping with our institutional practice. The patient reported satisfactory analgesia with regard to her labor pain, but still complained of severe pain in her right torso that was unresponsive to acetaminophen and opioids. Blood investigations monitored every 4 hours remained stable with hemoglobin of 103–102 g/L, platelets 158,000–165,000 g/L, ALT 176–169 μ/L, AST 100–97 μ/L, and uric acid 400–420 μmol/L. The LDH, creatinine, and coagulation profile remained normal. Labor progressed to full dilation with oxytocin augmentation, but as a result of torso pain she was unable to exert adequate effort with pushing. Ultimately, the obstetrical team consented the patient for a trial of forceps and possible cesarean delivery. In the operating room, the obstetrics team performed an examination under anesthesia, which revealed the fetus to be in an occiput-transverse position at station zero, and the decision was made to proceed to cesarean delivery as the station was too high to perform a trial of forceps. A nonvigorous male infant was delivered with Apgar scores of 3 and 8 at 1 and 5 minutes, respectively. Placental delivery was uneventful. Atonic postpartum hemorrhage was treated with a bolus of 2 units IV oxytocin and carboprost 250 mcg intramuscular (IM), in addition to an oxytocin infusion. As per our institutional practice, a bolus of oxytocin is only used when the patient has multiple risk

title: pmc-8684096-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-8684096-1
病例摘要：患者：一名55岁的日本女性。患者的膝关节外侧室疾病没有肥胖、并发症或精神障碍等致病因素。在透明质酸（HA）治疗期间，尽管我们为她开具了力量训练处方，但由于剧烈疼痛，她并未频繁进行训练。由于膝盖疼痛是因打网球时摔倒引起的，因此不能排除创伤的可能性。2013年，因双膝疼痛，她前往我院就诊并被诊断为膝关节骨性关节炎（OA）。2017年12月，在打网球过程中，右膝出现膝塌陷现象。她在医院进行了检查，并进行了右侧膝关节的MRI检查。观察到外侧半月板水平撕裂和股骨外髁软骨缺损。自2018年起，每两周进行一次透明质酸注射，但关节水肿和疼痛复发得到了缓解。患者已经接受了HA治疗并多次接受皮质类固醇关节内注射；然而这些干预措施效果并不明显。此外，患者不愿意接受这些治疗。她知道我院将开始提供再生医学治疗，并在治疗开始前等待了一年时间。在此期间，患者的HA治疗证明无效。因此，她在2018年4月请求进行ASC治疗。2018年4月，对右侧膝关节进行了MRI检查，在股骨外髁发现软骨缺损，患者希望进行ASC移植。右膝的活动范围为0-145度。2018年4月28日，从腹部收集了20毫升ASCs。2018年6月11日，首次在右侧膝关节进行了ASC移植。2018年7月2日，在治疗一周后，患者感受到效果，但在剧烈运动时疼痛复发。2018年8月6日，患者状况良好。进行Timed Up and Go测试时，从10秒改善到7秒。2018年9月10日，患者状况良好。她恢复了打网球，并几乎不再感到疼痛。2018年12月10日，进行了MRI检查。即使单腿跳跃也没有疼痛，并观察到了修复的软骨缺损。2019年4月22日，在右侧膝关节进行了第二次ASC移植，在左侧膝关节进行了第一次ASC移植。2019年6月22日，手术当天有轻微发热。2019年8月5日，患者状况良好。能够坐立。

metadata.original_text: Patient: a 55-year-old Japanese female. None of the factors contributing to lateral compartment knee disease, such as obesity, complications, or psychiatric disorders, were present in the patient. During hyaluronic acid (HA) treatment, although we prescribed strength training to the patient, she did not perform it frequently enough because of severe pain. As the knee pain was caused by tripping while playing tennis, the possibility of trauma cannot be ruled out. In 2013, due to pain in both knees, she visited our hospital and was diagnosed with OA of the knee. In December 2017, while playing tennis, the right knee developed a knee collapse. She was examined at the hospital, and an MRI of the right knee was performed. Horizontal dissection of the lateral meniscus and cartilage defect on the lateral condyle of the femur were observed. Since 2018, injections of hyaluronic acid have been administered every 2 weeks, but joint edema and pain recurrence have been remitted. The patient had already undergone HA treatment and received multiple steroid joint injections; however, these interventions were not very effective. Moreover, the patient was unwilling to undergo these treatments. The patient was aware that our hospital would start providing regenerative medicine treatments and had been waiting for a year before the start of the treatment. During that period, the patient received HA treatment, which proved ineffective. Therefore, the patient requested ASC treatment in April 2018. In April 2018, MRI of the right knee was performed. A cartilage defect was found in the external condyle of the femur, and the patient desired ASC transplantation. The range of motion of the right knee is 0–145. Anteroposterior (AP) and lateral radiograph of the right knee are shown in Fig. . On 28 April 2018, 20 mL ASCs were collected from the abdomen. On 11 June 2018, the first ASC transplantation was performed on the right knee. On 2 July 2018, although the effect was experienced after 1 week of treatment, the pain recurred when the subject moved violently. On 6 August 2018, the patient was in a good condition. When the Timed Up and Go Test was conducted, it showed improvement from 10 seconds to 7 seconds. On 10 September 2018, the patient was in a good condition. She resumed playing tennis and was living almost without pain. On 10 December 2018, an MRI was performed. There was no pain even when the subject jumped on one leg and a repaired cartilage defect was observed. On 22 April 2019, the second ASC transplant was performed on the right knee and the first ASC transplant was performed on the left knee. On 22 June 2019, there was a slight fever on the day of the procedure. On 5 August 2019, the patient was in a good condition. It became possible to assume a sitting position.

title: pmc-8684121-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-8684121-1
病例摘要：一名32岁的中东肥胖男性，体重指数（BMI）为33，在急诊部门因持续6天的严重、逐渐加重的全腹痛和呕吐症状入院。他在当前住院前13天在一家私立医院接受了袖状胃切除术（LSG）。他被开具了质子泵抑制剂和每日40毫克依诺肝素，一直按时服用。体检时，患者看起来病态，脱水且疼痛。格拉斯哥昏迷量表评分为15分，心率为每分钟135次，血压为132/82毫米汞柱，呼吸频率为每分钟20次，体温为36.5摄氏度。体检发现腹部膨胀并有弥漫性压痛，但腹腔镜切口已愈合。初步实验室检查显示白细胞计数（WBC）为27,300/μL（4000-11,000 μL），血红蛋白为17.3 g/dL（10-15 g/dL），血清乳酸水平为7.6 mmol/L（0.5-1.9 mmol/L）。腹部和骨盆的增强CT检查显示慢性与急性期并存的门静脉和上腔静脉血栓形成，导致小肠缺血（图示）。他被转至急腹外科团队护理，并进行了复苏治疗，随后接受了腹腔镜探查手术，确认了CT检查结果。在转换为中线开腹后，切除了一段255厘米的小肠（图示），并使用负压封闭引流敷料开放腹部（图示）。患者被转至重症监护室。24小时后的复查显示小肠和大肠均健康，因此进行了原位吻合术和腹部闭合手术。逐渐引入固体饮食，并在术后第12天开始服用华法林出院。凝血功能筛查结果为阴性。患者多次随访，能够耐受口服摄入，并将BMI降至19，无短肠综合征的临床表现。

metadata.original_text: An obese 32-year-old Middle Eastern man with a body mass index (BMI) of 33 presented to the emergency department (ED) with a 6-day history of severe, worsening, generalized abdominal pain and vomiting. He had undergone LSG 13 days prior to the current admission at a private hospital. He was prescribed a protein pump inhibitor and enoxaparin 40 mg daily, which he had taken regularly. On examination, the patient looked unwell, dehydrated, and in pain. His Glasgow Coma Scale score was 15, and he had a heart rate of 135 beats per minute, blood pressure 132/82 mmHg, respiratory rate 20 breaths per minute, and body temperature 36.5 °C. On examination, his abdomen was distended with generalized tenderness, but his laparoscopic wounds had healed. Initial laboratory investigations revealed a white blood cell count (WBC) of 27,300/μL (4000–11,000 μL), hemoglobin 17.3 g/dL (10–15 g/dL), and serum lactate 7.6 mmol/L (0.5–1.9 mmol/L). Computed tomography (CT) of the abdomen and pelvis with intravenous contrast revealed extensive acute on chronic portosplenic and superior mesenteric vein thrombosis, with consequent small bowel ischemia (Fig. ). He was admitted under the care of the acute surgical team and resuscitated, and underwent laparoscopic exploration, which confirmed the CT findings. After conversion to midline laparotomy, 255 cm of small bowel was resected (Fig. ) and the abdomen was left open with a vacuum-assisted closure device dressing (Fig. ). The patient was transferred to the intensive care unit. A second look was carried out 24 hours later, and both the small and large intestines appeared healthy, so primary anastomosis and abdominal closure were performed. A solid diet was introduced gradually, and the patient was discharged home on day 12 postoperation on warfarin. A thrombophilia screen was negative. The patient was seen multiple times for follow-up; he was tolerating oral intake and had reduced his BMI to 19 with no clinical manifestations of short bowel syndrome.

title: pmc-8684161-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-8684161-1
病例摘要：一位63岁的女性因右腋窝可触及肿块就诊。超声检查显示右腋窝有一个2.5厘米的不规则低回声肿块，考虑为恶性淋巴结，如转移（图）。与体格检查和乳腺X线摄影类似，超声未在双侧乳房或左侧腋窝发现明显异常。14号 Gauge 针芯活检显示右腋窝淋巴结为可能来自乳腺的转移性癌，雌激素受体（ER）阳性。进行了乳腺磁共振成像以确定是否有隐匿性乳腺恶性肿瘤。右侧乳腺未检测到病灶，而左侧上内象限发现一个0.6厘米不规则增强肿块，评估为乳腺影像报告和数据系统（BI-RADS）4C类（图A）。为了排除除了乳腺癌以外的其他原发恶性肿瘤作为转移来源，进行了胸部计算机断层扫描（CT）和全身正电子发射断层扫描-计算机断层扫描（PET-CT）。除已知的右腋窝转移外未发现特定异常。第二次超声检查显示左侧上内象限有一个0.6厘米不规则、边界不清等回声肿块，与乳腺MRI所见相吻合（图B）。在超声引导下14号 Gauge 针芯活检确认该肿块为非特殊类型的浸润性癌。癌症的ER状态呈阳性，与右腋窝转移相同。因此，怀疑右腋窝转移来自左侧乳腺癌，并计划进行手术以管理和确诊。进行了右侧腋窝淋巴结清扫和左侧保乳手术伴前哨淋巴结活检。左侧乳腺中的浸润性癌大小为6毫米，细胞呈ER和孕激素受体（PR）阳性、人表皮生长因子受体2（HER2）阴性，是一种低级别浸润性癌症，Ki-67表达较低（5%），组织学分级1级，无淋巴管血管侵犯。前哨淋巴结活检未发现左侧腋窝受累。在右侧腋窝中发现了三个大块转移淋巴结，包括已知的可触及转移淋巴结。所有三个淋巴结中的癌细胞病理特征与左侧乳腺肿块中的癌细胞明显不同（图）。对右腋窝转移灶的检查显示高级别癌伴有不规则腺体和异常细胞巢，而对左侧乳腺肿块的检查显示低级别癌症伴分化良好的腺体和较为均匀的核。这些发现清楚地表明，右侧腋窝淋巴结的转移并非来自左侧乳腺癌，尽管两者均呈ER阳性。右侧腋窝转移灶中的癌细胞也呈大囊性病变蛋白-15（GCDFP-15）和GATA结合蛋白3（GATA3）阳性，提示转移来源于乳腺（图）。最终诊断为双侧乳腺癌，包括隐匿的右侧乳腺癌伴腋窝转移（TxN1M0）和早期左侧乳腺癌（T1bN0M0）。手术后进行了四个周期的多柔比星和环磷酰胺化疗，随后是四个周期的紫杉烷（AC-T），每侧乳腺进行放射治疗，并进行激素治疗。术后14个月未观察到复发或转移。

metadata.original_text: A 63-year-old woman visited a clinic for a palpable right axillary mass. US showed a 2.5-cm irregular hypoechoic mass in the right axilla, which was considered to be a malignant lymph node such as metastasis (Fig. ). Similar to physical examination and mammography, US revealed no remarkable findings in both the breasts and the left axillary region. A 14-gauge core-needle biopsy revealed the right axillary lymph node as a metastatic carcinoma, possibly from the breast, with positive estrogen receptor (ER) status. Breast MRI was performed to determine the presence of occult breast malignancy. No lesions were detected in the right breast, whereas a 0.6-cm irregular enhancing mass was observed in the left upper inner breast, assessed as breast imaging reporting and data system (BI-RADS) category 4C (Fig. A). To exclude primary malignancies other than breast cancer as the origin of the metastasis, chest computed tomography (CT) and whole-body positron emission tomography-computed tomography (PET-CT) were performed. They revealed no specific findings, except the known right axillary metastasis. Second-look US showed a 0.6-cm irregular, indistinct, isoechoic mass in the left upper inner breast, corresponding to the mass observed on breast MRI (Fig. B). US-guided 14-gauge core-needle biopsy confirmed the mass as an invasive carcinoma of no special type. The ER status of the cancer was positive, same as that of right axillary metastasis. Therefore, the right axillary metastasis was suspected to originate from the left breast cancer, and surgery was planned for its management and to confirm the diagnosis. Right axillary lymph node dissection and left breast conserving surgery with sentinel lymph node biopsy were performed. The invasive carcinoma in the left breast was 6 mm in size, with cells positive for ER and progesterone receptor (PR) and negative for human epidermal growth factor receptor 2 (HER2). It was a low-grade invasive cancer with low Ki-67 expression (5%), histologic grade 1, and without lymphovascular invasion. Sentinel lymph node biopsy confirmed no left axillary involvement. In the right axilla, three macrometastatic lymph nodes were discovered, including the known palpable metastatic lymph node. Histologic findings of cancer cells in all three lymph nodes were fairly different from those of cancer cells in the left breast (Fig. ). Examination of the right axillary metastasis showed high-grade carcinoma with poorly formed glands and nests of atypical cells, while examination of the left breast mass showed low-grade cancer with well-differentiated glands and fairly uniform nuclei. These findings clearly indicated that the metastasis to the right axillary lymph node did not originate from the left breast cancer, although both of them showed ER positivity. Metastatic cancer cells in the right axilla were also positive for gross cystic disease fluid protein-15 (GCDFP-15) and GATA binding protein 3 (GATA3), suggesting that the metastasis was derived from the breast (Fig. ). Finally, the case was diagnosed as bilateral breast cancer consisting of occult right breast cancer with axillary metastasis (TxN1M0) and early-stage left breast cancer (T1bN0M0). Four cycles of doxorubicin and cyclophosphamide followed by four cycles of taxane (AC-T) chemotherapy, radiation therapy for each breast, and hormone therapy were administered after surgery. No recurrence or metastasis was observed 14 months postoperatively.

title: pmc-8684169-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-8684169-1
病例摘要：一名77岁的日本女性，已生育7次，绝经年龄为48岁，突然出现左侧下腹部疼痛，并前往家庭医生处就诊。计算机断层扫描（CT）显示左侧卵巢囊肿扭转，她被转至我院进行手术治疗。该患者有左侧乳腺癌病史，在67岁时接受了全左乳房切除术，此后未见复发。尽管她是丙型肝炎病毒携带者，但她的肝功能和凝血功能均正常，并且没有接受药物治疗。此外，她因高血压服用硝苯地平和坎地沙坦。同时，她的家族史和社会心理史无异常。她也没有外伤史。CT显示左侧附件区域有一个7.5厘米长的椭圆形肿块，与子宫相连（图）。由于患者的年龄，卵巢萎缩且难以辨认；血液中出现的血迹及其与周围盆腔腹膜的连续性提示为肾周血肿。入院时体格检查如下：身高144.5厘米；体重57.2千克；体质指数（BMI）27.4千克/平方米；血压112/50毫米汞柱；心率72次/分钟；体温37.1摄氏度。体格检查未发现明显异常。在外周和内部分别进行的体检中，左侧盆腔区域未触及肿块或压痛。经阴道超声显示萎缩的子宫；然而，由于萎缩的原因，两侧附件无法识别。左侧盆腔内的血肿可以被识别出来。这些结果与CT的结果一致。血液检查结果显示：血红蛋白值9.5克/分升，血细胞比容28.4%，白细胞计数7970/微升，C反应蛋白水平0.05毫克/分升。尿液分析显示轻微隐血。入院后，血肿没有增大，血红蛋白和血细胞比容也没有下降。经过11天的卧床休息，炎症反应未加重，下腹部疼痛缓解，并出院。出院后，我们计划在门诊进一步调查出血原因，但她在出院6天后因同一部位肾周出血症状复发再次入院。血肿已增大至11.7厘米，磁共振成像显示从子宫左侧延伸到左侧附件区域的异常血管网。三维CT同样显示子宫左侧存在异常血管网，我们怀疑可能是来自子宫动脉到左侧卵巢静脉（LOV）的动静脉畸形（AVM）或动静脉瘘（AVF）（图）。鉴于她反复出血的情况，我们认为需要紧急治疗，并同时进行了血管造影和栓塞疗法。然而，在包括左侧子宫动脉在内的髂内动脉以及左侧髂外动脉的血管造影中，并未发现进入LOV的AVM或AVF。肾动脉造影证实从左肾排出的对比剂并未流入下腔静脉（IVC），而是回流至LOV（图a）。随后的静脉造影也证实了来自左肾静脉的血液并未流入IVC，而是逆流至LOV和腰静脉（图b）。左侧卵巢静脉造影显示血液逆流入盆腔内扩张且扭曲的动脉瘤，并通过子宫周围的静脉流入右侧髂内静脉（图c）。肾周出血的原因是由于反流导致的LOV破裂。我们使用N-丁基-2-氰基丙烯酸酯对LOV进行了栓塞治疗，并在中心放置了一个弹簧圈以防止再通。术后LOV成像显示血液流向左侧上腰静脉和椎动脉丛（图d）。手术后第二天的CT检查证实了LOV的良好栓塞以及肾周血肿体积减小的情况。

metadata.original_text: A 77-year-old Japanese woman, para 7, who went through menopause at age 48, suffered sudden onset of left lower abdominal pain and visited a primary care doctor. Computed tomography (CT) revealed torsion of a left ovarian cyst, and she was transferred to our hospital for surgery. She had a history of left-side breast cancer and underwent total left mastectomy at the age of 67, with no recurrence thereafter. Although she was a carrier of hepatitis C, her liver function and coagulation remained normal, and she was being followed-up without medication. Furthermore, she was taking nifedipine and candesartan cilexetil for hypertension. Meanwhile, her family history and psychosocial history were unremarkable. She also had no history of trauma. CT showed a 7.5-cm long elliptical mass in the left adnexal region that was continuous with the uterus (Fig. ). The ovary was atrophic because of the patient’s age, and difficult to identify; the appearance of blood and the continuity with the surrounding pelvic peritoneum were suggestive of retroperitoneal hematoma. Physical findings at admission were as follows: height, 144.5 cm; weight, 57.2 kg; body mass index (BMI), 27.4 kg/m2; blood pressure, 112/50 mm Hg; pulse, 72 bpm; and body temperature, 37.1 °C. Physical examination detected no significant findings. On external (body surface) and internal examinations, no palpable masses or tenderness were noted in the left pelvic area. Transvaginal ultrasound revealed an atrophied uterus; however, the bilateral adnexa could not be identified due to atrophy. The hematoma in the left pelvis could be identified. These findings were identical to those obtained by CT. Blood test results were a hemoglobin value of 9.5 g/dL, a hematocrit value of 28.4%, a white blood cell count of 7970/μL, and a C-reactive protein level of 0.05 mg/dL. Urinalysis revealed mild occult blood. After admission, the hematoma did not enlarge, and the hemoglobin and hematocrit levels did not decrease. After 11 days of bed rest, with no exacerbation of the inflammatory response, lower abdominal pain was relieved, and she was discharged. After discharge, we planned to investigate the cause of her bleeding on an outpatient basis, but 6 days after discharge, she was readmitted to our hospital after relapse of symptoms caused by retroperitoneal bleeding from the same site. The hematoma had grown to a size of 11.7 cm, and magnetic resonance imaging showed an abnormal vascular network extending from the left side of the uterus to the left adnexal area. Three-dimensional CT (3D-CT) similarly showed an abnormal vascular network on the left side of the uterus, and we suspected a possible arteriovenous malformation (AVM) or arteriovenous fistula (AVF) from the uterine artery to the left ovarian vein (LOV; Fig. ). We decided that urgent treatment was needed for her repeated bleeding and performed vascular embolization therapy simultaneously with angiography. However, angiography of the internal iliac artery, including the left uterine artery, and the left external iliac artery, did not show AVM or AVF into the LOV. Angiography of the left renal artery confirmed that the contrast medium discharged from the left kidney did not flow into the inferior vena cava (IVC) but flowed back into the LOV (Fig. a). Subsequent venography also confirmed that the blood from the LRV did not flow into the IVC but regurgitated into the LOV and the lumbar vein (Fig. b). Left ovarian venography showed retrograde blood flow into a dilated and tortuous aneurysm in the pelvis and into the right internal iliac vein via a vein around the uterus (Fig. c). The cause of retroperitoneal bleeding was rupture of the LOV, the distension of which was caused by reflux. We performed embolization of LOV with N-butyl-2-cyanoacrylate and placed a coil centrally to prevent recanalization. Postembolization LRV imaging showed blood flow to the upper left lumbar vein and vertebral plexus (Fig. d). CT on the second day after the procedure confirmed good embolization of LOV and reduction of the retroperitoneal hematoma to a size

title: pmc-8684173-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-8684173-1
病例摘要：一名48岁、孕3产2的女性因体检就诊于妇科。超声检查（图A）和增强计算机断层扫描（ECT）（图B）显示盆腔肿块。她曾在八年前被建议进行腹腔镜卵巢囊肿切除术以治疗一个交界性卵巢肿瘤。在这八年期间，由于没有疾病症状，她未定期接受医学检查。最终，因盆腔肿块复发为粘液性交界性卵巢肿瘤，她接受了子宫切除术和盆腔淋巴结清扫术（图C）。术后常规检查发现子宫内膜淋巴瘤，其他淋巴结未受累。免疫球蛋白重链（IGH）基因重排检测结果呈阳性（表）。子宫淋巴瘤来源于原发女性生殖系统，并被诊断为非霍奇金淋巴瘤，符合弥漫性大B细胞非霍奇金淋巴瘤。进行了苏木精-伊红（HE）染色和免疫组化分析以分析病例标本（图）。患者还接受了骨髓活检和PET-CT检查以观察是否存在其他淋巴结异常。然而，显微镜检查未发现骨髓受累的证据，并且全身扫描PET-CT也未见异常。目前，该患者已在血液科接受了四次CHOP化疗。随访至今未发现异常。

metadata.original_text: A 48-year-old G3/P2 woman presented to the Department of Gynecology with a physical examination. Ultrasonography (Fig. A) and enhanced computed tomography (ECT) (Fig. B) revealed pelvic masses. She was recommend to undergo laparoscopic ovarian cystectomy for a borderline ovarian tumor eight years before. During the eight years, she did not have regular medical examinations because there were no symptoms of diseases. She chose to undergo surgical treatment for pelvic masses. Finally, she underwent a hysterectomy and pelvic lymph node dissection for a recurrent mucinous borderline ovarian tumor (Fig. C). Postoperative routine examination showed endometrial lymphoma, and the other lymph nodes were not involved. Testing for immunoglobulin heavy chain (IGH) gene rearrangement showed a positive result (Table ). Uterine lymphoma was derived from the primary female genital system and was diagnosed as non-Hodgkin's lymphoma, consistent with diffuse large B-cell non-Hodgkin's lymphoma. Hematoxylin–eosin (HE) staining and immunohistochemistry were carried out to analyze the case specimen (Fig. ). The patients underwent bone marrow biopsy and PET-CT to observe whether there were other lymph node abnormalities. However, there was no evidence of bone marrow involvement by microscopic examination, and there was no abnormality in the whole body scan by PET-CT. Currently, the patient has received four postoperative courses of CHOP chemotherapy in the Department of Hematology. To date, no abnormality has been found in the follow-up.

title: pmc-8684194-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-8684194-1
病例摘要：患者是一位13岁的白人女性，有焦虑、抑郁和神经性厌食症的病史。她曾两次被送入我们医院住院治疗。第一次是在2019年9月，她的父母因她在3-4个月内体重减轻了16公斤而带她来就诊。当时她的体重为40公斤（BMI 16.0 kg/m2，第8.7百分位数，z = -1.4），心率在30-40次/分钟之间有窦性心动过缓。表格和图显示了她在两次住院期间的实验室值变化。患者报告感到悲伤、孤独、对事物缺乏兴趣以及绝望，并承认通过限制饮食来减肥的行为。没有出现呕吐、暴饮暴食或使用泻药的情况。尽管极度消瘦，但她仍低估了自己的营养状况或体重及体型的关注程度。她否认有自杀的想法，但更希望死亡而不是接受厌食症的治疗。患者在学业和课外活动方面表现出强迫性倾向，并且非常有动力。她在童年时期经历了多次搬家，在父母离婚后不久搬去与父亲同住，这增加了她的焦虑感。她还开始了一所新学校。出于安全考虑，我们为她安排了1:1监护。患者大约在十岁左右开始限制饮食，当时正处于青春期的生长突增期之后。被诊断为AN（神经性厌食症）后，她在四个州的不同治疗级别接受了厌食症治疗，包括住院、寄养家庭、部分日间医院或强化门诊项目。她会向工作人员和家人表现出身体攻击行为以破坏她的康复过程，在一次事件中，她在寄养家庭期间咬了姐姐脖子的一块肉，导致被送回家。她承认对这次事件没有悔意。还有一份报告称，当她生气时曾将煤气灶打开试图烧毁房子并杀死母亲和兄弟姐妹。她对此行为也没有后悔。她还有虐待家猫的历史。多年来反复对他人的暴力行为表明可能存在CD（反社会人格障碍）诊断。家族史中有关焦虑、情绪障碍和AN的病史。在住院期间，她藏匿餐食，避免心肺监测，并拒绝鼻胃管喂养。她会进行等长运动并避免躺下。她没有服用抗焦虑药物。由于她在医疗医院未能恢复体重，我们将其转介到一个州外的厌食症住院治疗单位进一步治疗。在转移前，她通过在病房中藏匿剪刀威胁了转移计划，意图伤害儿科医生以报复将她送入住院单位。搜查房间时发现床垫下有多件锋利物品，包括塑料刀、叉和医疗用品。由于持续的攻击行为，她需要物理约束并紧急使用地西泮。患者在此次事件后正式被诊断为CD（反社会人格障碍）。住院治疗期间，厌食症住院单位拒绝接受该患者，导致我们的多学科团队计划通过实施行为期望和积极强化技术来恢复她的体重。一些特权包括使用电话、看电视或玩电子游戏。我们开始并调整了氯丙嗪的剂量，每天两次50毫克用于控制攻击行为。她在大约6周内增重2.7公斤，并且心动过缓得到了缓解（见图）。T3和前白蛋白水平恢复正常（见表）。住院24天后，她出院并计划参加厌食症部分日间治疗项目。出院后，她参加了5天的部分日间治疗项目。在第六天的早上，她进入父亲的卧室用一把厨师刀刺了他三次。她购买了这把刀。

metadata.original_text: Our patient was a 13-year-old Caucasian female with a history of anxiety, depression, and anorexia nervosa. She was admitted twice to our hospital. The first admission was in September 2019, when her parents brought her for losing 16 kg over 3–4 months. She was weighing 40 kg (BMI 16.0 kg/m2, 8.7%ile, z = − 1.4) and had sinus bradycardia (HR 30–40 BPM). Table and Fig. show changes in her lab values during her two admissions. The patient reported sadness, loneliness, anhedonia, and hopelessness and admitted to restrictive eating behaviors to lose weight. There was no history of purging, bingeing or laxative use. Although emaciated, she minimized the severity of her nutritional status or her preoccupation with her weight and body image. She denied suicidal ideation but desired death rather than pursuing an eating disorder treatment. The patient had compulsive tendencies for academic work and extracurricular pursuits and was highly driven. She had several moves during childhood and reported increased anxiety after a recent move to live with her father following parental divorce. She was starting a new school, as well. We placed her on 1:1 for safety concerns. The patient started restricting around the age of ten after having a growth spurt at puberty. Following her diagnosis of AN, she received eating disorder treatment at different levels of care, including inpatient, residential, partial hospitalization or Day Program, and intensive outpatient programs in four states. She would become physically aggressive towards staff and family to sabotage her recovery. In one incident, she bit a chunk off the nape of her sister’s neck during a family visit in her residential stay, leading her to be discharged. She admitted to becoming jealous of the sister as she was to go home after the visit while the patient was to remain confined to the unit. She had no remorse about the incident. There was a report where she left the gas stove on to burn the house and kill her mom and her siblings when she was angry. She again had no regrets about her actions. She had history of hurting the family cat. This history of repeated aggression over several years toward other people and animals indicated a possible CD diagnosis. Family history was pertinent for anxiety and mood disorders and AN. During admission, she hid meals, avoided cardiopulmonary monitoring, and refused nasogastric tube. She would engage in isometric exercises and avoid lying down. She did not take medication for anxiety. As she failed weight restoration in the medical hospital, we referred her to an out-of-state inpatient eating disorder unit for further treatment. Right before the transfer, she jeopardized the transfer by stabbing her pediatrician with a pair of scissors that she hid from the Child Life Services supplies in her room. She intended to hurt the physician for transferring her to the inpatient unit. A room search discovered multiple sharp objects under her mattress, including plastic knives, forks, and medical supplies. For ongoing aggression, she necessitated physical restraints and emergency use of Lorazepam. The patient was formally diagnosed with CD after this incident. The inpatient eating disorder facility refused to accept the patient after the violence, which led our interdisciplinary team to plan her weight restoration by implementing behavioral expectations and positive reinforcement techniques for meeting daily nutritional needs. Some of the privileges were using the phone, watching TV, or playing video games. We initiated and titrated chlorpromazine 50 mg twice daily for aggression. She gained 2.7 kg in about 6 weeks and her bradycardia resolved (see Fig. ). Her T3 and prealbumin normalized (see Table ). After 24 days in the hospital, she was discharged with a plan to start an eating disorder partial hospitalization program. Following discharge, she participated in the partial hospitalization program for 5 days. On the morning of the sixth day, she entered her father’s bedroom and stabbed him three times with a butcher’s knife. She had purchased the knife

title: pmc-8684204-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-8684204-1
病例摘要：一名41岁乌克兰男性（BMI 37.4）因下肢麻木和抽筋、双手拇指至中指周期性麻木、头痛以及逐渐加重的全身无力症状就诊，这些症状持续了8年。在过去2年里，患者注意到双腿完全脱发、下肢皮肤变薄且更加脆弱易损，并出现了脚部局限性严重角化过度。左脚大拇趾处形成的长期不愈合感染伤口导致远节指骨坏疽并最终截肢。体检时发现双脚皮肤变薄伴有色素沉着和掌跖部位的鳞屑状脱皮及角化过度（图a-d）。存在多发性微创伤引起的已愈合和未愈合的感染性伤口。患者还患有II类营养-体质肥胖症。神经系统检查显示外感受障碍，双侧腕掌关节对称性感觉过敏、减退、无痛觉和温热减退至小腿中下1/3处（多发神经型），振动敏感度为5秒（多发神经型）。远端关节位置感减弱。下肢腱反射减弱。根据医学研究理事会（MRC）量表，小腿屈肌群肌力减少4级，伸肌群减少5级，远端部分减少5级。2017年9月开始治疗前，双手握力测量值分别为38公斤和36公斤，经过2018年2月的治疗后增加至46公斤和45公斤。下肢和短足肌肉发现中度萎缩及疼痛。还存在敏感性共济失调。下肢自主营养障碍表现为角化过度、无汗症和网状青斑（图a）。尽管患者及其家属没有抱怨，但使用蒙特利尔认知评估量表（MoCA）得分为18/30分，简易精神状态检查（MMSE）得分为23/30分，前额叶功能评估电池（FAB）得分为13/18分，揭示了认知能力下降。此外，空间定向测试（时钟画图任务和绘制复杂或三维图形）、注意力、延迟回忆及语音活动的测试发现最困难（图g-k）。为了确定多发神经炎综合征的原因，我们排除了内分泌疾病[胰岛素、胰岛素原、糖化血红蛋白A1c、促肾上腺皮质激素、促甲状腺激素（TSH）、三碘甲腺原氨酸（T3）和四碘甲腺原氨酸（T4）水平正常]、感染（巨细胞病毒、EB病毒、疱疹及莱姆病），以及代谢异常起源[维生素B1、B6、B12和同型半胱氨酸水平正常；皮下脂肪中未见淀粉样物质沉积]。血清蛋白电泳排除了β1组分轻度增加和高γ球蛋白血症的存在。在可能的自身免疫原因方面，抗中性粒细胞胞浆抗体（ANCA）、抗核因子及可提取核抗原抗体检测结果为阴性。对糖脂和神经肿瘤相关抗原的免疫印迹也为阴性。然而，重组组织转谷氨酰胺酶2（TG2）IgA抗体水平是正常值的五倍（90.3 IU/ml，正常值小于20 IU/ml）。抗DGP IgG抗体水平正常（22.8 IU/ml）。在所有类别的抗体中，仅IgE水平升高至122 IU/ml。作为确诊克罗恩病的额外证据，HLA-DQ2和HLA-DQ8等位基因均被检测到。心电图和超声心动图未发现病理或异常情况。

metadata.original_text: A 41-year-old Ukrainian male [body mass index (BMI) 37.4] presented with complaints of numbness and cramping in the lower extremities, periodic numbness of fingers I–III of both hands, headache, and general weakness that gradually increased over 8 years. Over the past 2 years, the patient noted complete hair loss in the legs, thinning and increased vulnerability of the skin of the lower limbs, and the appearance of limited areas of severe hyperkeratosis on the feet.
