title: pmc-8700299-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-8700299-1
病例摘要：2019年7月，一名74岁男性患者因调查入院至维罗纳大学医院的传染病科；其血液中检测到乙型肝炎病毒（HBV），病毒载量为26,100,000 IU/mL（cobas® HBV，罗氏分子诊断学公司，美国新泽西州布兰斯伯格），但肝功能正常。尽管他表现出乙型肝炎e抗原（HBeAg）阳性，但HBsAg阴性，而同源的抗-HBs呈阳性（ADVIA Centaur HBV检测，西门子医疗健康护理公司，德国埃尔朗根）。2013年8月，该患者因肾动脉硬化接受了肾脏移植。当时，乙型肝炎病毒血清学筛查显示他HBsAg阴性、抗-HBs阳性（12 mIU/mL）、HBeAg阴性和抗HBe和乙肝核心抗原抗体呈阳性。未检测到丙型肝炎和丁型肝炎病毒感染的抗体标志物；血液中乙型肝炎病毒DNA尚未确定。肝细胞损伤指标正常。肾脏捐赠者HBV检测为阴性。移植后，患者接受了 basiliximab、他克莫司、霉酚酸酯和皮质类固醇的免疫抑制诱导治疗，并按照规定纳入随访计划；整个随访期间，其HBsAg持续呈阴性，伴随肝功能生化指标正常。2019年5月，患者发展为慢性髓系白血病（CML）。在使用伊马替尼甲磺酸盐治疗前，患者重复进行了乙型肝炎病毒血清学检测，在没有游离HBsAg的情况下再次检测到HBeAg；进一步的实时PCR测试显示其血液中存在26,100,000 IU/mL的乙型肝炎病毒DNA。患者仍为抗-HBs阳性（15 mIU/mL），肝酶正常。诊断为慢性乙型肝炎病毒携带者，并于2019年7月开始每天服用0.5 mg恩替卡韦（ETV）治疗，随后在2020年4月因肾功能恶化将剂量减少至每48小时0.5 mg。患者接受了为期6个月的密切随访（每隔两周一次），之后改为每月一次。该疗法导致病毒载量持续下降，在治疗6个月后达到3 Log10 HBV DNA减少的平台期；然而，随后几个月中病毒载量并未进一步降低。未观察到经典ETV耐药突变。然而，我们检测到了rtL269I突变，先前报道该突变可导致对ETV的敏感性降低[]。2021年1月，患者转为使用替诺福韦艾拉酚胺（TAF）治疗；HBV DNA迅速下降，在最后一次随访时降至378 IU/mL。在TAF治疗第2个月出现单次ALT升高（107 U/L），这发生在需要手术清洁的残存左下肢感染过程中。不幸的是，患者因冠心病于2021年9月去世。从2019年7月收集的血清样本使用高灵敏度Lumipulse® G HBsAg-Quant试剂盒（富士瑞比株式会社，日本东京）和HBcrAg（Lumipulse® G HBcrAg，富士瑞比株式会社，日本东京）[]进行了HBsAg和HBcrAg检测。HBV S基因和rt区域的核苷酸序列使用BMR Genomics服务（意大利帕多瓦BMR基因组学公司）的Sanger测序方法确定，并通过ClustalW2软件分析（访问日期：2019年12月23日和2020年12月6日）[]。根据逆转录杂交线探针测定法（INNO-LiPA HBV基因分型，富士瑞比欧洲公司，比利时根特），确定了HBV的基因型。尽管HBsAg检测具有高分析灵敏度以检测HBsAg突变体[]，但未能检测到游离HBs抗原。HBV S基因序列分析在a-d决定区（氨基酸124-147）内发现了四个突变（P/T127H、Q129N、F/Y134H和G145R），以及在主要亲水区域（MHR，氨基酸99-169）内的五个额外突变（T116N、P120S、C121Y、K/R160S和W165S）。随访期间HBcrAg从基线到结束的值持续高于检测上限阈值（>7.0 Log10 U/mL）。病毒分型显示患者感染了乙型肝炎病毒D基因型。

metadata.original_text: In July 2019, a 74-year-old male patient was admitted to the Infectious Disease Section of the Verona University Hospital for investigation; he had HBV in his blood with a titer of 26,100,000 IU/mL (cobas® HBV, Roche Molecular Diagnostics, Branchburg, NJ, USA) but exhibited normal liver function. Although he displayed the hepatitis B e antigen (HBeAg), he was negative for the HBsAg, but positive for the homologous anti-HBs (ADVIA Centaur HBV assays, Siemens Healthcare GmbH, Erlangen, Germany). In August 2013, the patient received a kidney transplant for nephroangiosclerosis. At this time, the serologic screening for HBV had shown that he was HBsAg-negative, anti-HBs-positive (12 mIU/mL), HBeAg-negative and positive for antibodies to the HBeAg and to the hepatitis B core antigen (anti-HBc). No antibody markers of a hepatitis C and hepatitis D virus infection were detected; serum HBV DNA had not been determined. The indices of hepatic cytolysis were normal. The kidney donor was negative for HBV. Post-transplant, the patient received immunosuppressive induction with basiliximab, tacrolimus, mycophenolate and steroids, and was then included in the follow-up program as per protocol; the HBsAg remained negative throughout, accompanied by normal liver biochemistry. In May 2019, the patient developed chronic myeloid leukemia (CML). Before treatment with imatinib mesylate, the patient repeated the HBV serology and the HBeAg was again detected in his blood in the absence of circulating HBsAg; further testing using a real-time PCR showed that he had HBV DNA in serum at a titer of 26,100,000 IU/mL. The patient was still anti-HBs-positive (15 mIU/mL) with normal liver enzymes. A diagnosis of HBVr was made and, in July 2019, the patient started entecavir (ETV) treatment at 0.5 mg/day, which was subsequently reduced in April 2020 to 0.5 mg/48 h because of renal function deterioration. The patient underwent a close follow-up (every 2 weeks) for the first 6 months of treatment and, after, with monthly scheduling. The therapy led to a consistent decrease in viremia, reaching a plateau of 3 Log10 HBV DNA reduction after 6 months of treatment (); however, viremia did not decrease further in the following months. No classic ETV-resistant mutations were observed in the HBV reverse transcriptase (rt) gene. However, we detected the mutation rtL269I, previously reported to confer a reduced susceptibility to ETV []. On January 2021, the patient switched to tenofovir alafenamide (TAF) treatment; HBV DNA rapidly declined and reached a value of 378 IU/mL at the last FU. The single ALT elevation (107 U/L) in the 2nd month of TAF treatment was documented in the course of an infection of the residual left limb requiring surgical toileting. Unfortunately, the patient died from coronary heart disease in September 2021. The serum samples collected from July 2019 were tested for the HBsAg with the highly sensitive Lumipulse® G HBsAg-Quant assay (Fujirebio Inc., Tokyo, Japan) as well as for the HBcrAg (Lumipulse® G HBcrAg, Fujirebio Inc., Tokyo, Japan) []. The nucleotide sequences of the HBV S gene and the rt domain were determined using the Sanger sequencing method at BMR Genomics service (BMR Genomics, Padua, Italy) and analyzed using ClustalW2 software (; accessed on 23 December 2019 and on 6 December 2020) []. The HBV genotype was determined based on a reverse hybridization line probe assay (INNO-LiPA HBV Genotyping, Fujirebio Europe, Gent, Belgium) []. Despite its high analytical sensitivity for HBsAg mutants [], the HBsAg assay failed to detect a circulating HBs antigen. The HBV S gene sequence analysis identified four mutations within the a-determinant (aa 124–147) (P/T127H, Q129N, F/Y134H and G145R) and five additional mutations within the mayor hydrophilic region (MHR, aa 99–169) (T116N, P120S, C121Y, K/R160S and W165S) (). The values of the HBcrAg from baseline to the end of the follow-up were persistently above the upper limit threshold of the assay (>7.0 Log10 U/mL). Viral genotyping showed that the patient was infected with HBV genotype D.

title: pmc-8700368-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-8700368-1
主要诊断：COVID-19重症
病例摘要：我们报告了一例4岁男童的病例，因全身性癫痫发作入院治疗，尽管使用了抗癫痫药物（地西泮）但症状持续存在。该患儿无急性症状史。个人病史显示有输尿管膀胱连接部梗阻、轻度肾盂积水，并且在此次住院前约2个月曾发生过一次全身性癫痫发作，当时建议长期使用丙戊酸钠（德巴金）治疗。需要指出的是，在那次检查中脑部MRI结果正常。家族病史显示父母均有味觉和嗅觉丧失。入院时患儿已插管并机械通气，体检仅见苍白。入院当天的实验室检测结果显示贫血（血红蛋白—Hb 9.98 g/dL，血细胞比容—Htc 28.54%），单核细胞数量显著增加（9624/µL），以及轻度升高的C反应蛋白（CRP 7 mg/L）。考虑到家族病史，在咽拭子样本中进行了实时聚合酶链反应（RT-PCR）检测，结果为SARS-CoV-2阳性。此外，父母双方均被确认感染了此病毒。尿液和血液培养均为阴性。乙型和丙型肝炎病毒血清学检查以及抗核抗体和双链DNA抗体均为阴性。我们进行了胸部计算机断层扫描（CT），结果显示左肺下叶实变并伴有右上肺区密度增高，提示可能为部分肺不张（）。颅部CT未见异常发现。患儿因重症COVID-19被收入重症监护室。我们开始使用抗生素治疗（头孢曲松800 mg每日两次和阿米卡星100 mg每日两次）、抗病毒治疗（洛匹那韦/利托那韦2.5 mL每日两次）、皮质类固醇（地塞米松4 mg每日两次）、抗凝剂（依诺肝素0.2 mL每日一次）以及退热药（对乙酰氨基酚），并继续使用长期的抗癫痫药物丙戊酸钠。入院第三天进行的第二次RT-PCR检测结果也为SARS-CoV-2阳性。不幸的是，患儿病情逐渐恶化，在约72小时住院后出现低氧血症和心动过缓。在心动过缓事件前我们重复了实验室参数检查，并发现白细胞减少（白细胞3500/µL）、中性粒细胞减少（中性粒细胞1111/µL），轻度升高肌酸激酶（280 U/L），铁蛋白水平显著升高（121 ng/mL，正常范围7-84 ng/mL），低白蛋白血症（3.29 g/dL），凝血酶原时间延长（22.3 s）和国际标准化比值增加（INR 1.74）。尽管进行了所有抢救努力，患儿在入院第四天不幸去世。

metadata.original_text: We report the case of a 4-year-old male child, admitted to our clinic for generalized seizures, which persisted in spite of anticonvulsant therapy (Diazepam), with no previous acute symptoms. His personal history revealed ureterovesical junction obstruction, mild hydronephrosis, and an episode of generalized seizures approximately 2 months before the current admission for which chronic therapy with sodium valproate (Depakine) was recommended. We must mention that the brain MRI performed at that time was normal. The family history showed the presence of ageusia and anosmia in both parents. At the time of admission, the patient was intubated and mechanically ventilated and the clinical exam revealed only pallor. The laboratory tests performed on the day of admission revealed anemia (Hemoglobin—Hb 9.98 g/dL, Hematocrit—Htc 28.54%), a severely increased number of monocytes (9624/µL), and a mildly increased C-reactive protein (CRP 7 mg/L). Taking into account the family history, a real-time polymerase chain reaction (RT-PCR) of the oropharyngeal swab was performed and it tested positive for SARS-CoV-2. Moreover, both parents were confirmed with this infection. Both urine and blood cultures were negative. The serology for viral hepatitis B and C, as well as antinuclear and anti-double-strained DNA antibodies were negative. We performed a thoracic computed tomography (CT), which showed consolidation in the lower lobe of the left lung associated with an opacity in the right apex, suggesting possible atelectasis ( and ). The cranial CT revealed no pathological findings. The patient was admitted to the intensive care unit with a diagnosis of COVID-19 in a severe form. We initiated antibiotic treatment (ceftriaxone 800 mg twice a day and amikacin 100 mg twice a day), antiviral therapy (lopinavir/ritonavir 2.5 mL twice a day), corticosteroids (Dexamethasone 4 mg twice a day), anticoagulants (enoxaparin 0.2 mL in a single daily dose), and antipyretics (Paracetamol), and we continued the chronic anticonvulsant therapy with sodium valproate. The second RT-PCR performed on the third day of admission was also positive for SARS-CoV-2 infection. Unfortunately, the patient’s condition deteriorated progressively, and, after approximately 72 h of hospitalization, he developed desaturation and bradycardia. We repeated the laboratory parameters before the bradycardia event and we found leucopenia (leukocytes 3500/µL), neutropenia (neutrophils 1111/µL), mildly increased creatin kinase (280 U/L), a high ferritin level (121 ng/mL, normal ranges 7–84 ng/mL), hypoalbuminemia (3.29 g/dL), a prolonged time of prothrombin (22.3 s) and an increased international normalized ration (INR 1.74). Despite all efforts to resuscitate the patient, he died on the fourth day of admission.

title: pmc-8700459-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-8700459-1
病例摘要：一名43岁白人男性报告了持续一个月的自发性左侧乳头清澈液体分泌，并伴有同侧无痛性乳腺肿块。没有血性分泌物的历史。既往病史包括轻度肥胖（BMI：33.3）和双侧感音神经性听力下降，因骨迷路硬化症所致。家族史中没有乳腺癌或卵巢癌的记录。社会史显示他不饮酒，但有过去十二年前使用烟草制品的历史。体格检查发现一名超重的白人男性，两侧乳房对称。触诊时，双侧假性男子型乳房肿大，左侧乳房在第四象限交界处出现光滑、边界不清的增厚区域。施加压力时，从左侧乳头挤出少量清澈液体，并局限于单一导管内。进行了中位斜位（MLO）投影下的数字乳腺断层合成（DBT），以及两侧CC和LM投影下的合成重建2D图像（s2D）。s2D图像显示乳房按钮区域正常，无男子型乳房表现，左侧乳房第四象限交界处出现不对称密度区，在DBT图像中被识别为结构扭曲区域，伴有散在的周边点状钙化灶，未累及乳头-乳晕复合体。乳腺超声（US）显示与X线摄影发现一致，存在边界不清、低回声的声影区域，周围有无回声空洞，并伴有一处靠近的小导管扩张。根据乳腺影像报告和数据系统（BI-RADS），这些发现被归类为4b类。进行了超声引导下的细针穿刺细胞学检查（US-FNAC）。我们的实验室收到了四张固定在酒精中的显微镜切片，用巴氏染色染色。显微镜检查显示异常导管细胞，肌上皮细胞较少，提示几种类型的非恶性增生性病变，但也包括导管内原位癌（DCIS）。根据2020年版的日本乳腺细针穿刺活检细胞病理学报告系统（IAC Yokohama System for Reporting Breast Fine-Needle Aspiration Biopsy Cytopathology），这些发现被归类为C4级。由于即时现场评估（ROSE）已经显示这种可疑的异常，我们同时进行了超声引导下的活组织检查（US-CNB），使用16号半自动核心针活检针。我们的实验室收到了两个最大直径为1.5厘米的乳腺组织标本，用于常规处理。显微镜检查显示纤维化乳腺实质，伴有局灶性不典型导管增生（ADH），p63阳性，并且有局灶性CK5/6阳性。根据非手术诊断程序和乳腺癌筛查报告指南，这些发现被归类为B3级。细胞学和组织病理学检查结果与影像学评估结合后强调了三联检测的重要性，并建议我们进行疑似区域的外科切除。因此，在多学科团队（MDT）讨论并征得患者同意后，进行了左侧无切口乳头保留乳房切除术，未行前哨淋巴结活检。我们的实验室收到了一个标称为左侧乳腺切除的标本，重90克。该标本由定向纤维脂肪组织组成，大小为8×4.5×4厘米，在宏观检查中发现了一些小囊性结构和直径为0.2厘米的白色病变区域，进行了随机取样。显微镜检查显示导管内乳头状瘤（IP）伴ADH以及单一灶性DCIS实心筛状型，核分级3级（p63+、CK5/6-），切缘阴性。未见浸润癌。该标本进行了雌激素受体（ER）和孕激素受体（PR）的免疫组化检查。组织对两者均呈阳性反应（70%的细胞核）。

metadata.original_text: A 43-year-old Caucasian male reported a 1-month history of spontaneous clear left side nipple discharge with a recent appearance of a homolateral painless breast swelling. There was no history of bloody discharge. Past medical history was pertinent for obesity class I (BMI: 33.3) and bilateral hypoacusia for otosclerosis. There was no family history for breast or ovarian cancer. His social history indicated no use of alcohol, but previous use (twelve years ago) of tobacco products. On physical examination, he was an overweight Caucasian male with symmetrical breasts. On palpation, there was a bilateral pseudogynaecomastia with a smooth, ill-defined left breast thickening, especially at the union of the outer quadrants. With applied pressure, a minimal clear stream of discharge fluid was elicited from the left nipple and was felt to be localized to a single duct. Digital breast tomosynthesis (DBT) with synthesized reconstructed 2D images (s2D) was performed in medio-lateral-oblique (MLO) projections for each breast and in both cranio-caudal (CC) and latero-medial (LM) projections for the left breast. The s2D images showed a regular appearance of the breast buttons without gynaecomastia, and an area of asymmetrical density at the union of outer quadrants of the left breast that was better identified at the DBT images as an area of architectural distortion with scattered peripheral punctate calcifications, sparing the nipple-areolar complex. (). A breast ultrasound (US), performed on the same day, showed in correspondence of the mammographic findings, the presence of an ill-defined, hypoechoic area of acoustic shadowing with peripheral anechoic lacunae and a close small focal ductal ectasia. () According to Breast Imaging Reporting and Data System (BI-RADS) [], these findings were classified as category 4b. An US-guided Fine-Needle Aspiration Cytology (US-FNAC) was performed. Our laboratory received 4 microscope slides fixed in alcohol and coloured with Papanicolaou stain. Microscopic examination showed atypical ductal cells with poor myoepithelium arguing for several types of proliferative non-malignant lesions but also DCIS. According to the IAC Yokohama System for Reporting Breast Fine-Needle Aspiration Biopsy Cytopathology (1st Edition, 2020) [], these findings were classified as category C4 (). Since the Rapid On-Site Evaluation (ROSE) [] already showed this suspicious atypia, we contextually performed an US-guided biopsy (US-CNB) with a 16 Gauge (G) semi-automated core biopsy needle. Our laboratory received two specimens of breast tissue of 1.5 cm of maximum dimension who were submitted for routine processing. Microscopic examination showed breast parenchyma with fibrosis with a focal area of atypical ductal hyperplasia (ADH), p63 positive and with focal positivity for CK5/6. According to Guidelines for non-operative diagnostic procedures and reporting in breast cancer screening [], these findings were classified as category B3 (). All the findings of cytology and histology in association with the radiological assessment underlined the importance of the triple test [] and recommended us to perform surgical excision of the suspected area. Therefore, after discussing with the multidisciplinary team (MDT), according to the patient’s consent, a left subcutaneous nipple-sparing mastectomy was performed without sentinel lymph node biopsy (). Our laboratory received a specimen designated left mastectomy, weighing 90 g (). It comprised oriented fibro-fatty tissue, 8 × 4.5 × 4 cm in aggregate, which on gross examination revealed an area of small cystic formations and a whitish lesion of 0.2 cm on which random samplings were performed. Microscopic examination showed an intraductal papilloma (IP) with ADH and a single focus of DCIS solid-cribriform type, respectively. Nuclear grade was 3 (p63+, CK5/6−) with negative surgical margins. No invasive cancer was present (). The specimen was sent for immunohistochemical examination of estrogen (ER) and progesterone (PR) receptor. The tissue was positive for both ER (with 70% of nuclei

title: pmc-8700490-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-8700490-1
主要诊断：头皮血管肉瘤
病例摘要：2020年12月，一位83岁的女性因前额出现一个大而溃疡、坏死并隆起的病变就诊于我院急诊科。皮疹不明确，呈暗红色斑块状扩展至头顶部和面部。还观察到紫色深色结节。合并症包括慢性阻塞性肺疾病、高血压、糖尿病和缺血性脑病。体格检查显示双侧颈淋巴结肿大。患者的家属提供了病变演变的照片记录。该病变在入院前四个月首次出现，表现为前额2cm的瘀斑样斑块（a），一个月后迅速发展为一个大的紫色斑块（b），最终呈现当前的状态（c）。意大利第二次封锁和对SARS-CoV-2传染的恐惧导致家属推迟了医疗评估。从紫色结节取材的活检显示真皮中充满不规则吻合血管通道，由单层或多层增大的内皮细胞衬里，并在胶原束之间穿行，造成“胶原分解”（a,b）。内皮细胞大而异型，核仁明显，免疫反应性为CD31、CD34和ERG阳性（c,d），未观察到HHV8表达或MYC过度表达。这些数据证实了头皮血管肉瘤的诊断。所有常规检查均正常。全身计算机断层扫描（CT）显示颈淋巴结肿大，但无脑部或内脏转移。尽管考虑了放疗和电化学治疗，但由于患者年龄较大、合并症多及肿瘤体积较大，未进行上述治疗。患者转至姑息性护理。

metadata.original_text: In December 2020, an 83-year-old woman presented to the Emergency Department of our hospital with a large ulcerated and necrotic bulging lesion on her forehead. Ill-defined, dusky erythematous plaques extended on the parietal and frontal areas of the scalp and the face. Violaceous-darkish nodules were also observed. Comorbidities included chronic obstructive pulmonary disease, hypertension, diabetes, and ischemic encephalopathy. The physical examination revealed bilateral cervical lymphadenopathy. The patient’s relatives provided photographic documentation of the evolution. The lesion had emerged four months before admission as a 2 cm bruise-like patch on the forehead (a), before it rapidly developed into a large purplish plaque after 1 month (b), and then to the current presentation (c). The second lockdown in Italy and the fear of the SARS-CoV-2 contagion had led the relatives to postpone the medical evaluation. A biopsy from a violaceous nodule showed a full dermal proliferation of irregular anastomosing vascular channels lined by single or double layers of enlarged endothelial cells, which permeated between collagen bundles, causing “collagen dissection” (a,b). The endothelial cells were large and pleomorphic, with vesicular nuclei and prominent nucleoli, and were immunoreactive for CD31, CD34 and ERG (c,d), with no observed HHV8 expression or MYC overexpression. These data confirmed the diagnosis of angiosarcoma of the scalp. All routine investigations were normal. Total body computed tomography (CT) showed cervical lymphadenopathy without brain or visceral metastases. Although radiotherapy and electrochemotherapy were considered, they were not performed due to the patient’s advanced age, comorbidities, and tumor size. The patient was referred to palliative care.

title: pmc-8700593-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-8700593-1
病例摘要：我们描述了一例患有自闭症谱系障碍（ASD）并伴有轻度智力残疾的18岁男孩的情况（表格中的患者5）。所有参与研究的受试者均获得了知情同意。关于家族史，患者的伯父患有焦虑障碍，并接受选择性血清素再摄取抑制剂治疗。该病例是与健康且无亲属关系的父母无关的第一胎。他在学校得到了支持，尽管有社交焦虑，但他的整体功能和社会关系良好，尽管如此，他的社交技能逐渐有所改善。13岁时，在暑假后，社交孤立突然恶化，并伴有意识模糊状态、精神运动性激越、言语障碍、视幻觉、认知衰退、个人自主权丧失以及焦虑加剧。他被开具了最高剂量为每日300毫克的喹硫平和每日0.50毫克的阿普唑仑，最终完全康复。脑部MRI检查及代谢测试结果均无异常。阵发性全基因组比较分析（Array-CGH）未见显著异常，结果显示6号染色体长臂存在重复，该重复由其父亲遗传而来。15岁时，患者再次出现急性崩溃，接受喹硫平300毫克/日治疗后部分康复（仅情绪症状有所改善），一年后症状恶化，表现为思维紊乱、强迫症症状和反复思考、木僵行为，伴有乏力、自主活动减少、对刺激的反应减弱、肢体僵硬、情感淡漠及社交隔离。在精神科病房初次评估时，体格检查未见异常。喹硫平被替换为阿立哌唑，并逐渐加量，从每日2.5毫克开始，每4天增加2.5毫克，直至达到10毫克/日，同时辅以劳拉西泮治疗，结果临床表现有所改善。两天后，男孩表现出精神运动迟缓、对刺激的过度反应、厌食和乏力症状。出院时肌酸激酶（CK）在正常范围内。7天后，由于症状恶化伴强迫思维增多、发热及CK升高，男孩被紧急送入急诊科并立即停药。患者在重症监护病房住院4周，随后在儿科病房住院1周，最后在我院住院10天。住院期间观察到肢体僵硬、口周肌阵挛和肌阵挛、面部表情缺失、舌部不协调运动及吞咽困难、呼吸急促、心动过速及动脉高血压等症状。静脉补液、丹曲林、可乐定、静脉苯二氮卓类药物及卡维地洛治疗后，逐渐观察到警觉性改善、肌张力减退和发热缓解，并逐步恢复了运动功能。8天后，血液检查结果显示CK水平下降（404 U/L，正常CK范围为0-50 UI/mL）且肝酶轻度升高（ALT 72 U/L）。出院后，患者在我院进行了每月一次的临床及CPK控制检查，并在6个月后进行了全面评估，之前的临床表现得到了持续控制。

metadata.original_text: We describe the case of an 18-year-old boy presented with ASD associated with a mild intellectual disability (patient 5 in the tables). Informed consent was obtained from all subjects involved in the study. Regarding the familial load, the paternal uncle presents an anxiety disorder treated with a selective serotonin reuptake inhibitor. The proband is the first child of unrelated and healthy parents. He attended school with support, had good global functioning and social relationships with classmates, despite his social anxiety, and had progressive improvements in his social skills. At the age of 13 years old, after his summer break, social isolation acutely worsened, associated with a confusional state, psychomotor agitation, speech impairment, visual hallucinations, cognitive regression, a loss of personal autonomy, and increased anxiety. Quetiapine up to 300 mg/day and alprazolam 0.50 mg/day were prescribed, with complete recovery. Cerebral MRI and metabolic tests were unremarkable. Array-CGH test was not significant, showing a duplication of the long arm of chromosome 6, inherited from the father. At the age of 15 years old, the patient had another acute breakdown, which was treated with quetiapine 300 mg/day and had partial recovery (only affective symptoms partly improved) until one year later, when symptoms worsened, with disorganized thought, obsessive symptoms and rumination, catatonic behaviors, associated with asthenia, reduced autonomous mobility, persistent hyporeactivity to stimuli, stiffness in the limbs and hypomymia, apathy, and isolation. Upon initial evaluation in the psychiatric ward, physical examination was unremarkable. Quetiapine was replaced with aripiprazole, with gradual titration, starting with 2.5 mg/day and 2.5 mg increases every 4 days, up to 10 mg/day, with supplementary lorazepam, resulting in a transient improvement in the clinical picture. After 2 days, the boy showed signs of psychomotor retardation, hyperreactivity to stimuli, anorexia, and asthenia. Creatine kinase (CK) was in the normal range when he was discharged. After 7 days, given the worsening symptoms associated with increased obsessive thoughts, hyperthermia, and CK elevation, the boy was admitted in an emergency department and pharmacotherapy was immediately discontinued. The patient was hospitalized in an intensive care unit for 4 weeks, then in a pediatric ward for 1 week, and finally in our hospital for 10 days. During hospitalization, limb stiffness, perioral myokymia and myoclonus, facial amimia, uncoordinated movements of the tongue and difficulty swallowing, polypnea, tachycardia, and arterial hypertension were observed. Intravenous hydration, dantrolene, clonidine, intravenous benzodiazepines, and carvedilol were administered, followed by bromocriptine therapy and intravenous lorazepam 2 mg 5 times a day. A gradual improvement in vigilance, reduction of hypertonus, and resolution of hyperthermia were observed, with gradual motor improvement. After 8 days, blood results showed a reduction in CK (404 U/L, normal CK range 0–50 UI/mL) and a mild increase in liver enzymes (ALT 72 U/L). After being discharged from our hospital, the patient carried out monthly clinical and CPK controls, and after 6 months the patient had a general assessment in our hospital, with persisting control of previous clinical manifestations.

title: pmc-8700620-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-8700620-1
病例摘要：一名63岁的男性因持续6个月的劳力性呼吸困难和右侧为主的双侧胸腔积液，于安科纳大学医院的呼吸疾病病房入院。他是一名前吸烟者，没有石棉职业暴露史。他的病史包括无症状脑动脉瘤、高血压以及多发腰椎间盘突出。入院时，体格检查显示在室内空气中的血氧饱和度、心率和血压均正常，但右侧下肺野的呼吸音减弱。患者首先进行了重复CT扫描，排除了肺栓塞，并确认存在中等程度的右侧胸腔积液伴壁层和脏层胸膜增厚（无显著实质异常）。胸部超声检查显示胸腔积液呈高回声，右下肺基底段萎陷；在胸穿过程中，抽出的液体浑浊且黄色，物理化学检测结果提示渗出性，并且微生物学检查包括抗酸染色均未发现病原体。随后进行了医疗胸腔镜检查（MT），显示存在黄色胸腔积液（总共抽取1800毫升）和壁层胸膜充血伴纤维化斑块。通过钳夹获取了10个壁层胸膜活检，组织病理学检查结果显示大量淋巴浆细胞浸润、纤维化、反应性间皮细胞以及血管增生，未见肿瘤病变或肉芽肿；最终诊断为非特异性胸膜炎（NSP）。进行了广泛的诊断工作，包括心脏超声、腹部CT血管造影、自身免疫、病毒和细菌血清学检查，未能发现任何潜在的已知NSP原因。血液检测结果正常，除了轻度C反应蛋白升高。因此，患者被诊断为特发性NSP，并开始使用皮质类固醇（甲基泼尼松龙0.5 mg/kg）治疗，在一个月内逐渐减量，临床和影像学检查显示改善。六个月后，患者主诉胸部不适及轻微呼吸困难，CT扫描显示右侧少量胸腔积液复发伴弥漫性胸膜增厚；PET-FDG显像仅在右下肺基底壁层胸膜处有轻度摄取，其他器官未见异常摄取。由于胸腔积液量有限且超声检查无滑动现象，我们决定不重复胸腔镜检查，而是将患者转诊至罗马圣安德烈亚大学医院的胸部外科病房进行手术胸膜活检。组织学检查显示弥漫性纤维化性间皮炎，伴有少量胶原样特征、纤维性渗出物以及密集的淋巴细胞和浆细胞炎症。有趣的是，在整个组织标本中，炎症浸润是弥漫性的但分布不规则。免疫过氧化酶染色显示IgG4阳性浆细胞显著增加（高达50/HPF），IgG4+/IgG+比值>40%，达到IgG4疾病诊断阈值水平[]。血清IgG4水平升高（324 mg/dL）[]。基于这些发现，患者被诊断为IgG4相关性胸膜炎[]。在排除了IgG4疾病的全身性疾病后，开始使用皮质类固醇治疗（泼尼松0.5 mg/kg/天共两周，逐渐减量至2.5 mg/天作为维持剂量，共计6个月），胸腔积液完全且稳定地消退，呼吸症状改善，并观察到IgG4血清水平逐步降低并恢复正常范围（64 mg/dL）[]。

metadata.original_text: A 63-year-old man was admitted to our Respiratory Disease Unit at the University Hospital—Ancona, for a 6-month exertional dyspnea and bilateral pleural effusion prevalent on the ride side, detected on chest computed tomography (CT). He was former smoker without occupational exposure to asbestos. His medical history was remarkable for asymptomatic brain aneurysm, blood hypertension, multiple lumbar disc herniation. On admission to our unit, physical examination, oxygen saturation on room air, heart rate and blood pressure were normal, whilst breathing sound was suppressed at the third right lower lung fields. The patient first underwent a repeated CT scan that allowed us to rule out a pulmonary embolism and confirmed moderate right pleural effusion with parietal and visceral pleural thickening, in the absence of significant parenchymal abnormalities (). Thoracic ultrasound (TUS) revealed hyperechogenic pleural fluid with atelectasis of basal segments of the right lower lobe (); at thoracentesis, fluid appeared cloudy and yellow coloured, and a physico-chemical exam was consistent with exudate and microbiological tests, including an acid-alcohol-fast bacilli (AAFB) search, were negative (). A subsequent medical thoracoscopy (MT) revealed the presence of yellow pleural fluid (overall 1800 mL removed) and parietal pleura hyperemia with fibrotic plaques (). Ten pleural biopsies were obtained by forceps on parietal pleura and histopathological examination documented a large lymphoplasmacytic infiltration, fibrosis, reactive mesothelial cells and vascular proliferation, in absence of neoplastic lesions or granulomas; the final diagnosis was suggestive for non-specific pleuritis (NSP). An extensive diagnostic work-up, including echocardiogram, abdominal angiography CT scan, autoimmune, viral, and bacterial serology, failed to detect any potential known cause of NSP and blood tests were normal, except for a mild elevation of C-reactive protein. Thus, the patient was diagnosed with idiopathic NSP and therapy was started with steroids (Methylprednisolone 0.5 mg/kg, tapered in one month with clinical and radiological improvement. Six months later, the patient complained chest discomfort and mild dyspnea, and CT scan showed a relapse of small amount of right pleural effusion associated with diffuse pleural thickening; a PET-FDG showed slight captation on right basal parietal pleural without abnormal captations in other organs (). Due to the limited pleural effusion and the absence of sliding at TUS, we decided not to repeat thoracoscopy, but to refer the patient to the Thoracic Surgery Unit of Sant’ Andrea University Hospital (Rome) for a surgical pleural biopsy. Histological examination revealed a diffuse fibrosing pleuritis, with occasional hyaline features, fibrinous exudate, and a dense lymphocytic and plasma cell inflammation. Interestingly, inflammatory infiltrate was diffuse but with irregular distribution throughout the histological specimen. Immunoperoxidase stains showed a marked increase of IgG4 positive plasma cells (up to 50/HPF) with an IgG4+/IgG+ ratio >40% reaching the diagnostic threshold level for IgG4 disease []. High IgG4 serum levels were found (324 mg/dL) []. Based on these findings, the patient was diagnosed with IgG4-related pleuritis (). After exclusion of systemic involvement of IgG4 disease, steroid therapy was started (Prednisone 0.5 mg/kg/d for 2 weeks, tapering up to 2.5 mg/day as a maintenance dose for an overall period of 6 months) with a complete and stable resolution of pleural effusion, improvement of respiratory symptoms and a progressive reduction of IgG4 serum levels, returned within normal limits (64 mg/dL).

title: pmc-8700622-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-8700622-1
主要诊断：左侧股薄肌间质瘤
病例摘要：我们报告了一个两个月大的女婴病例，因左大腿出现肿块而就诊。该肿块在出生后逐渐增大且持续存在。孕30周的产前超声检查首次描述了胎儿左大腿前方软组织肿块（20/7 mm）。由于胎儿窘迫，患者通过剖宫产分娩，但出生时其他情况正常。发育正常，无家族史相关病史。临床检查发现，在左大腿前内侧有一个25/10 mm的结节，质地坚实、可移动且位于深层组织中。皮肤表面未见异常。身体其他部位未见其他病变。初始X线和超声（US）显示一个大小约为30/13 mm的前方软组织肿块，结构不均匀，低回声区，钙化及弱多普勒信号，位于大腿血管结构前部（A）。腹部超声检查正常。磁共振成像（MRI）显示一个大小为19.33/15.19/34 mm的肿块，具有非特异性血管侵犯（B）。在T1加权图像中，MRI表现为低信号；而在T2加权脂肪抑制图像中，在注射血管内对比剂后病变区域显示出不均匀的对比增强，但晚期趋于均一化，位于左大腿前内侧部分，并对左侧股中间肌产生了重要压迫。考虑该肿块可能是左侧隐神经间质瘤。计划进行择期手术。在左大腿前内侧面进行了一个S形切口，从胫骨结节向下延伸约6 cm。揭示了一个大小约为4 cm × 1.5 cm × 1.5 cm的肿块，包括整个股薄肌厚度（A、B）。在肿瘤的1/3内侧部分进行了解剖分离，将其与大腿血管神经束包隔离而未打开血管神经管鞘。在距肿瘤约2 cm处分别切除股薄肌的远端和近端部分，实现了肿块的完整切除（C）。止血并缝合相邻组织。切除的肿块送病理检查。患者手术结果良好，并于术后3天出院。术后1年随访时，患儿未见复发。从肌肉中取出的肿块在显微镜下表现为锥形细胞排列成不规则螺旋状结构，并伴有细小血管穿行。中央区域观察到双相增生，包括含有坏死和中心钙化的结节，在结节之间，梭形细胞增生呈小交集束状（A、B）。偶尔可见微核。由一层薄的结缔组织<1 mm形成的假包膜覆盖肿块。肿瘤性增生涵盖了病变中心残留的骨骼肌纤维。包膜外和周围少量成熟的脂肪组织中见孤立的大口径血管。免疫染色结果显示：波形蛋白阳性，坏死和钙化结节中的平滑肌动蛋白阳性（miotic nodules），desmin部分阳性，Ki67低表达（约每100个肿瘤细胞中有5个阳性细胞，提示较低的细胞增殖活性）（D-F）。诊断为左侧股薄肌间质瘤。

metadata.original_text: We report the case of a 2 months old female, presented for consultation due to the presence of a lump on her left thigh, with progressive and constant growth after birth. The lesion was first described on the prenatal ultrasound at 30 weeks of gestation as a pre-femoral soft tissue mass of 20/7 mm (). The patient was delivered by cesarean section due to fetal distress but was otherwise normal at birth. Development was normal, and there was no relevant family history. On clinical examination, there was a 25/10 mm nodule on the antero-intern side of the left thigh that was firm, mobile and within the deep layers. The overlying skin was normal. There were no other lesions elsewhere on the patient’s body. The initial X-ray and ultrasound (US) showed a pre-femoral soft tissue mass that measured approximately 30/13 mm, with nonhomogeneous structure, hypoechoic areas, calcifications, and weak Doppler signal, being located anteriorly to the vascular elements of the thigh (A). Abdominal ultrasound was normal. Magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) showed a mass of 19.33/15.19/34 mm, with a nonspecific vascular involvement (B). In T1-weighted images, the MRI appearance consisted of a low signal. In T2-weighted fat-saturated images, a high signal intensity of the lesion was shown with nonhomogeneous contrast setting after intravascular contrast was administered, but with late homogenization, located on the antero-internal part of the left thigh with an important mass effect on the left vastus intermedius muscle. The lesion was considered to be probably a schwanoma of the left saphenous nerve. Elective surgery was scheduled. An italic S-shaped incision on the antero-internal face of the left thigh was performed, from the crural arch distally extended for about 6 cm. A mass of approximately 4 cm × 1.5 cm × 1.5 cm was revealed, which included the entire thickness of the sartorius muscle (A,B). In the 1/3 medial part of the tumor, dissection was performed, isolating it from the femoral vasculo-nervous package without opening the sheath of the vasculo-nervous canal. The sartorius muscle was resected at a distance of about 2 cm distal and proximal to the tumor, with complete tumor resection (C). Hemostasis was performed and adjacent tissue approximated. The excised mass was sent for pathological analysis. The patient had a favorable surgical outcome and was discharged 3 days postoperatively. At one year after surgery follow up, the child had no recurrence. Histologically, the mass in the sartorius muscle was noted as a proliferation of tapered cells arranged in an irregular spiral pattern and crossed by thin-walled vessels. In the central region, biphasic proliferation consisting of nodules with necrosis and central calcifications was observed, and between the nodules, fusiform cell proliferates arranged in small intersecting bundles (A,B). Occasional micronuclei were evident. A pseudocapsule formed by a thin layer of connective tissue <1 mm covered the mass. Neoplastic proliferation encompassed residual skeletal muscle fibers in the center of the lesion. Extracapsular and peripheral scarce mature adipose tissue were seen with isolated large-caliber blood vessels. Immunostaining revealed the following results: vimentin positive, smooth muscle actin positive in nodules with necrosis and calcifications (miotic nodules), desmin focal positive, Ki67 low (about 5 positive cells per 100 tumor cells, suggesting low cell kinetics) (D–F). Diagnosis of IM of left sartorius muscle was made.

title: pmc-8700649-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-8700649-1
病例摘要：病例 1 是一名 7 岁 11 个月大的女童。她因上前牙疼痛前来医院就诊，主诉冷水刺激痛。她在 3 岁时曾有上前牙外伤史，包括右侧中切牙、右侧尖牙和左侧尖牙。下颌双侧中切牙唇侧面观察到脱矿区域，呈棕色-白色（）。没有既往病史记录。未进行基因筛查；认为恒牙的脱矿是由乳牙外伤引起的。患者还抱怨吹气和冷水刺激痛，视觉模拟评分 (VAS) 为 6.5。在治疗敏感性疼痛后，她不再感到吹气或冷水刺激痛，VAS 评分为零。一个月后来医院时，她的 VAS 得分显示为 4；因此再次进行了治疗。经过第四次治疗后，敏感性疼痛仍未完全消失，VAS 评分为 1。第七次治疗时，患者的 VAS 值稳定在 0.5-0。此外，在第七次治疗后，棕色牙齿表面变得几乎呈雾状（）。在此治疗过程中，并未出现着色的无活力牙齿、牙龈炎症和叩痛。数字分析显示，治疗前的雾状程度为 6331 像素，经过治疗显著减少至 65 像素。此外，棕色区域减少了约六倍，从 12,898 像素减少到 2118 像素。这些结果表明，雾状和棕色色度的紊乱均得到了明显改善。

metadata.original_text: Case 1 was a female child aged 7 years and 11 months. She had visited the hospital with a chief complaint of cold water pain in the anterior mandible. She had a history of trauma to the anterior primary teeth, including the lower right central incisor, right lateral incisor, and left lateral incisor, at 3 years of age. Hypomineralized areas, brownish-white in color, were observed on the labial side of her lower bilateral central incisors (). There was no past medical history. Genetic screening was not performed; the permanent tooth hypomineralization was thought to be caused by primary tooth trauma. The patient also complained of pain from air blowing and cold water, and the VAS value was 6.5. Immediately after the treatment to suppress the hypersensitivity, she no longer experienced pain with air or cold water, and VAS was zero. When patient came to the hospital one month later, her VAS score showed 4; therefore, the treatment was reapplied. After the fourth treatment, the hypersensitivity had not completely disappeared, and the VAS was 1. For the seventh treatment, patients’ VAS value of hypersensitivity pain were stable at 0.5–0. Furthermore, the surface of the brownish tooth had changed to appear almost cloudy after seventh treatment (). During the process of this treatment, discolored devitalized teeth, gingival inflammation and percussion pain did not appear. Digital analysis indicated a pre-treatment cloudiness of 6331 pixels, which was significantly reduced to 65 pixels after treatment (). In addition, the area of brown color decreased by approximately six-fold, from 12,898 to 2118 pixels. These results suggest that both cloudiness and brown color disorder were significantly improved.

title: pmc-8700649-2
text:
病例标题：pmc-8700649-2
病例摘要：病例 2 是一名 8 岁 7 个月大的男童。他因冷水刺激后上前牙区疼痛前来就诊。该患儿在 1 岁时有上前牙外伤史，右上乳中切牙冠部折断并用复合树脂修复。既往无其他疾病史。观察到右上恒中切牙位置异常及唇面云雾状改变，这可能是由于乳牙外伤所致（）。检查结果显示冷水刺激的视觉模拟量表评分为 6 分，吹气刺激的评分为 7.5 分。治疗后立即，患儿不再感到冷风或冷水刺激疼痛，视觉模拟量表评分为零。一个月后，冷水刺激时评分为 4 分，吹气刺激时评分为 5 分。治疗每月重复一次。经过四次治疗后，敏感性对患者来说可以接受，视觉模拟量表评分为 2 分。在七次治疗过程中，疼痛并未完全消失，冷水刺激的视觉模拟量表评分为 1-2 分，而吹气刺激的评分为 2-4 分。尽管存在广泛的云雾状改变，颜色调子被遮蔽并有所改善（）。在此治疗过程中，并未出现着色失活牙、龈炎或叩痛。数字分析显示，从 27,886 像素显著减少到 7904 像素（p < 0.03）。（）表明不仅强烈的云雾状改变而且轻微的棕色颜色也得到了显著改善。

metadata.original_text: Case 2 was a male child aged 8 years and 7 months. He visited the hospital with a chief complaint of pain in the anterior maxilla following exposure to cold water. He had a history of trauma to the anterior primary teeth at the age of one year, with composite resin repair of a fracture in the crown of the upper right primary central incisor. There was no past medical history. An abnormal position of the upper right permanent central incisor and clouding of the labial surface were observed, which were likely due to trauma to the primary teeth (). Examination results indicated a VAS value of 6 for cold water and 7.5 for air blowing. Immediately after treatment, the patient no longer felt pain with air or cold water, VAS was zero. One month later, the VAS was 4 by cold water and 5 by air. The treatment was reapplied once monthly. The hypersensitivity had become acceptable to the patient and VAS was 2 after fourth treatment. During the seven treatments, the pain did not completely disappear, the VAS by cold water was 1–2, whereas the VAS by air was 2–4. While extensive clouding remained, the color tone was obscured and improved (). During the process of this treatment, discolored devitalized teeth, gingival inflammation and percussion pain did not appear. Digital analysis showed significantly reduced cloudiness from 27,886 pixels to 7904 pixels (). The hypomineralized tooth was mostly cloudy, with a narrow area with a brown color. However, this area significantly decreased after treatment (p < 0.03). This result indicated that not only strong cloudiness but also slight brown color were significantly improved.

title: pmc-8700649-3
text:
病例标题：pmc-8700649-3
病例摘要：病例3是一位8岁7个月大的女童。她因左侧上颌疼痛就诊，主诉冷水痛。在4岁时，由于严重的龋齿导致根吸收和牙髓炎，她的左上第二乳磨牙被拔除。没有既往病史。观察到第一前磨牙的颊侧牙齿表面有深棕色的脱矿化（）。患者还抱怨吹气和冷水引起的疼痛，视觉模拟评分（VAS）为4。在抑制过敏反应治疗后，她的VAS值降为0。一个月后来医院时，她的VAS评分为1；因此再次进行了治疗。在第七次治疗中，过敏反应有所改善，VAS值为0。第一前磨牙的深棕色表面变为浅棕色（）。数字分析显著减少了棕色色调的面积，从4858减少到1755（）。另一方面，没有检测到浑浊现象。

metadata.original_text: Case 3 was a female child aged 8 years and 7 months. She had visited the hospital with a chief complaint of cold water pain in the left side of the maxilla. The left upper second primary molar was extracted because of apical periodontitis and root resorption due to severe caries, at 4 years of age. There was no past medical history. Dark brown hypomineralization was observed on the buccal tooth surface of the first premolars (). The patient also complained of pain from air blowing and cold water, and the VAS value was 4. Immediately after the treatment to suppress the hypersensitivity, her VAS was zero. When patient came to the hospital one month later, her VAS score showed 1; therefore, the treatment was reapplied. During the seventh treatment, the hypersensitivity improved, and the VAS was 0. The dark brownish tooth surface of the first premolars was changed to pale brown (). Digital analysis significantly reduced the area of the brownish tint from 4858 to 1755 (). On the other hand, cloudiness was not detected.

title: pmc-8700649-4
text:
病例标题：pmc-8700649-4
病例摘要：病例4是一名5岁9个月大的男童。他因上前牙疼痛就诊，没有外伤和乳牙龋齿的历史，也没有其他全身性疾病史。永久牙齿的脱矿原因未确定。下中切牙唇侧观察到棕色白色（）。患者还抱怨吹气和冷水引起的疼痛，VAS评分为3。在抑制过敏反应治疗后，他的VAS值为0。一个月后，经过四次治疗，VAS降低至0.5，并且在七次治疗后，脱矿的颜色有所改善（）。混浊区域从6872减少到1903，棕色区域显著减少从6595到1667（）。

metadata.original_text: Case 4 was a male child aged 5 years and 9 months. He had visited the hospital with a chief complaint of cold water pain in the anterior mandible. There was no history of trauma and caries in the primary teeth and no other systemic history. The cause of hypomineralization in the permanent teeth was not determined. The brownish-white in color were observed on the labial side of his lower central incisors (). The patient also complained of pain from air blowing and cold water, and the VAS value was 3. Immediately after the treatment to suppress the hypersensitivity, his VAS was zero. After one month, VAS was reduced to 0.5 and VAS was zero after four treatments. Seven treatments improved the color of the hypomineralization (). Cloudiness areas improved from 6872 to 1903, and brown areas decreased significantly from 6595 to 1667 ().

title: pmc-8700686-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-8700686-1
病例摘要：一名54岁的女性因一个2.3厘米迅速增长的甲状腺结节接受了细针穿刺活检（FNAB）。细胞学检查显示，背景中淋巴细胞较多的情况下存在实性团块和散在的嗜酸性细胞（Hürthle细胞）。根据这些特征，FNAB 被诊断为低风险不确定病变（AUS/FLUS）。五个月后，结节增长至3.6厘米，因此进行了第二次 FNAB；结果提示可疑恶性。患者接受了全甲状腺切除术（结节大小4.1×3.4厘米），同时进行了颈淋巴结清扫，并切除了被肿瘤侵犯的右内侧静脉。显微镜下诊断为伴有少量细胞异型性癌的Hürthle细胞癌（IVB期；cT3b cN0 Mx/pT4b pN0 M0）。特别指出，大量具有颗粒状嗜酸性胞浆、深染核和明显核仁的大上皮样细胞以实性和网状结构交替排列，并伴有散在的异型梭形细胞和坏死区域。pancytokeratin 和 PAX8 免疫组化染色在这两种成分中均为阳性，而 TTF1 仅在 Hürthle 细胞中表达。甲状腺球蛋白（Tg）免疫组织化学染色在Hürthle细胞和异型梭形细胞中均呈阴性。两年后，由于出现刺激性咳嗽，进行了18-氟脱氧葡萄糖（18-FDG）正电子发射断层扫描（PET），显示多个毫米级肺部高代谢区域。随时间推移，在左旋甲状腺素抑制治疗下，血清Tg从0.15 ng/mL增加至19 ng/mL。两个月后，计算机断层扫描（CT）显示存在多个肺部病灶，特别是中叶的一个侵犯气道的病灶（直径21毫米），右侧下叶一个病灶（4毫米直径）和左侧肺一个病灶（9毫米直径）。对最大病灶进行了经支气管活检，病理检查结果与甲状腺癌转移一致。2019年1月，患者来到我们的观察中，18FDG-PET/CT显示肺部病灶数量、大小及FDG摄取进一步增加，并出现颈部和纵隔多个淋巴结肿大。特别是右侧下叶的病灶增长至8.5厘米，最大标准摄取值（SUVmax）为50。对肿瘤进行了两次独立病理学家的复审，确认诊断为甲状腺未分化癌（ATC）。对原发性甲状腺肿瘤进行BRAF、NTRK和ALK突变检测均为阴性，随后给予顺铂联合多柔比星化疗。经过三个疗程治疗后病情稳定，但在后续三个疗程中疾病进展。患者随后接受了四个周期的紫杉醇治疗，但疾病继续进展。对原发性肿瘤进行了PD-L1免疫组化染色结果为阴性，但观察到肿瘤浸润淋巴细胞（TIL）。使用五种标记物（BAT25、BAT26、D2S123、D5S346和D17S2720）的微卫星不稳定性-MSI检测显示原发肿瘤存在BAT-26、D2S123和D17S2720位点的突变。基于这些结果，于2020年1月开始使用仑伐替尼（每日24毫克）联合派姆单抗（每21天200毫克）作为挽救治疗。经过五个月的治疗后，取得了部分缓解，中叶肺部病灶从8.5厘米缩小至2厘米，并在18FDG PET/CT上SUVmax从50降至4.7。继续治疗过程中，仑伐替尼逐渐减量至每日10毫克以应对3级腹泻、呕吐和体重减轻。经过一年后，派姆单抗的给药间隔延长为每六周一次。仑伐替尼多次停用且患者依从性较低。尽管如此，在18个月治疗期间所有肺部病灶均对治疗有反应（根据RECIST标准，PR，靶病变总直径减少50%）。遗憾的是，出现胸膜

metadata.original_text: A 54-year old woman underwent a fine-needle aspiration biopsy (FNAB) for a 2.3 cm rapidly growing thyroid nodule (). The cytological examination showed both solid groups and discohesive oxyphilic cells (Hürthle cells) in a background featuring lymphocytes. Based on these features, the FNAB was diagnosed as a low-risk indeterminate lesion (AUS/FLUS). Five months later, the nodule grew to 3.6 cm, and thus another FNAB was performed; a diagnosis of suspicious for malignancy was rendered. The patient underwent a total thyroidectomy (nodule 4.1 × 3.4 cm) with cervical lymph node dissection, and a removal of the internal right jugular vein that was invaded by the tumor. Microscopically, a Hürthle cell carcinoma with foci of paucicellular anaplastic cancer was diagnosed (Stage IVB; cT3b cN0 Mx/pT4b pN0 M0). In particular, large epithelial cells featuring granular eosinophilic cytoplasms, hyperchromatic nuclei with evident nucleoli were arranged in a solid and trabecular pattern alternated with scattered anaplastic spindle cells and necrotic areas. Immunohistochemical stainings for pancytokeratin and PAX8 were positive in both these components. Conversely, TTF1 was expressed by Hürthle cells only. Thyroglobulin (Tg) immunostaining was negative in both Hürthle and anaplastic spindle cells (). Two years later, because of the appearance of a hacking cough, a 18-fluorodeoxyglucose (18-FDG) positron emission tomography (PET) scan was performed and revealed several millimetric lung hypermetabolic areas. Over time, the serum Tg under LT4-suppressive therapy had increased from 0.15 to 19 ng/mL. Two months later, a computed tomography (CT) scan revealed the presence of multiple lung lesions, in particular one in the medium lobe invading the airways (21 mm diameter), a second in the right inferior lobe (4 mm diameter) and a third in the left lung (9 mm diameter). A transbronchial biopsy of the largest lesion was performed, and the histology was consistent with a thyroid cancer metastasis. On January 2019, the patient came to our observation, 18FDG-PET/CT showed a further increase in the number, size and FDG uptake of the lung lesions, and the appearance of multiple lymphadenopathies in the neck and mediastinum. In particular, the lesion in the right inferior lobe had grown to 8.5 cm, with a SUV max of 50. The histology of the tumor has been reviewed by two independent pathologists who confirmed the diagnosis of ATC. The molecular test performed on the primary thyroid tumor for BRAF, NTRK and ALK mutations was negative, and chemotherapy with cisplatin plus doxorubicin was given. After three courses of treatment the disease was stable, but after three further courses the disease progressed. The patient was then given four courses of paclitaxel; however, the disease continued to progress. Immunohistochemistry for PD-L1 performed on the primary tumor was negative, but the presence of tumor-infiltrating lymphocytes (TIL) was noticed. The primary tumor was also tested for microsatellite instability-MSI using a panel of five markers (BAT25, BAT26, D2S123, D5S346 and D17S2720), and the tumor was instable for the presence of mutations of BAT-26, D2S123 and D17S2720. Based on these results, on January 2020 a treatment with lenvatinib (24 mg daily) in combination with pembrolizumab (200 mg every 21 days) was started as a salvage therapy. After five months of treatment, a partial response was achieved with a reduction by 76% of the lung lesion in the medium lobe from 8.5 cm to 2 cm and at 18FDG PET/CT a drop in SUVmax from 50 to 4.7. The treatment was continued, but lenvatinib was progressively reduced to 10 mg daily due to grade 3 diarrhea, vomiting and weight loss. After 12 months, the administration of pembrolizumab was delayed every six weeks. The lenvatinib treatment has been withdrawn several times, and the patient compliance was low. In spite of that, after 18 months of treatment all lung lesions continued to respond to therapy (PR with a reduction by 50% of the sum of the diameters of the target lesions by RECIST) (). Unfortunately, a pleural

title: pmc-8700689-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-8700689-1
病例摘要：一名11岁男性因首次牙科检查前来我们的观察室。他的既往病史无异常。患者及其父母均未报告任何症状。面部对称，未见颈部淋巴结肿大。口腔内，恒牙列已完全形成，除了下颌第三磨牙和上颌第二、三磨牙。上下颌骨的唇舌向扩展不明显。进行了全景X线检查以评估第三磨牙的发育情况[]。意外地，在左下颌第三磨牙胚区发现了一个中心透明边缘致密的类环状骨内病变（a）。未观察到其他牙齿异常。该病灶的最大直径为5.7毫米。根据这些发现，考虑了第三磨牙发育异常（如：扩大的牙板瘤）和牙源性（如：牙骨质瘤）及非牙源性（如：成骨细胞瘤或骨样骨瘤）肿瘤的鉴别诊断。为了更好地确定该病灶的性质，需要进行计算机断层扫描（CT）。分析结果显示病变周围骨骼完整，并且与局部神经血管结构独立。此外，在矢状位投影上还发现颌骨颊侧表面附近有一个小间隙（b）。鉴于此状况最显著的临床关注点是发展为牙髓坏死的风险，决定拔除第三磨牙胚及其下方的病灶。为此，在下颌右侧第二磨牙后方局部麻醉下掀起黏膜瓣。移除了唇侧皮质骨板，暴露了卵圆形肿块，该肿块连同下颌牙齿一起被切除。手术瓣膜重新定位并缝合。愈合过程顺利。切除的病变表现为一个几乎不含内容物的空心硬球状结构（）。固定和去钙后常规进行石蜡包埋。组织学检查显示（a,b），外层硬组织为牙本质，内层牙本质与嗜碱性钙化物质连续，后者又在某些区域与骨样基质接触。嗜碱性钙化物质在某些区域呈棒状结构，符合釉质（b, 插图）。更中心部位，病变由纤维血管组织构成。病理发现被认为是扩大的牙板瘤的表现。

metadata.original_text: An 11-year-old male came to our observation for his first dental visit. His medical history was negative. No symptoms were reported by the patient or his parents. The face was symmetric and no swelling of the cervical lymph nodes was observed. Intraorally, the dentition of the permanent teeth was completed, except for the third mandibular molars and the second and third maxillary molars. Bucco-lingual expansion of the jaw bones was not evident. An orthopantomogram was performed to assess the development of third molars []. Unexpectedly, the analysis revealed an intraosseous doughnut-like lesion radiopaque at the periphery and radiolucent in the center associated with the left mandibular third molar germ (a). Additional dental abnormalities were not observed. The maximum diameter of the lesion was 5.7 mm. Based on these findings, developmental abnormalities of the third molar (e.g., dilated odontoma) and odontogenic (e.g., cementoblastoma) and non-odontogenic (e.g., osteoblastoma or osteoid osteoma) tumors were considered for differential diagnoses. To better characterize the lesion, a computed tomography (CT) scan was required. The analysis established bone integrity around the lesion and its independence from the local neuro-vascular structures. In addition, it revealed, on the sagittal projection, a small gap in the proximity of the buccal surface of the mandible (b). As the most significant clinical concern related to this condition is the risk of developing pulpal necrosis, it was decided to extract the germ of the third molar and the underlying lesion. To do this, under local anesthesia, a mucoperiosteal flap was raised posterior to the mandibular right second molar. The vestibular cortical plate was removed, exposing the ovoid mass, which was removed with the germ of the mandibular tooth. The surgical flap was repositioned and sutured. Healing was uneventful. The excised lesion appeared as an empty hard spherical mass virtually devoid of content (). It was routinely processed for paraffin embedding after fixation and decalcification. Histologically (a,b), the outer hard tissue was dentin. The inner part of dentin was in continuity with basophil calcified material, which in turn was focally in contact with the bone-like matrix. The basophil calcified material focally presented a rod-like structure consistent with enamel (b, insert). More centrally, the lesion was composed of fibro-vascular tissue. The pathologic findings were considered as consistent with a dilated odontoma.

title: pmc-8700713-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-8700713-1
主要诊断：NA-AION伴脑白质病变
病例摘要：一名61岁的女性因右眼突然、无痛性视力丧失被转诊至我们的诊所，该症状发生在从巴黎飞往马德里的2小时飞机飞行（海拔30,000英尺）后的24小时内。她的病史显示高胆固醇血症控制良好。24小时后，最佳矫正视力（BCVA）在右眼（RE）为20/200，在左眼（LE）为20/20。存在相对传入瞳孔缺陷（RAPD）、色觉障碍以及右眼颞上象限和下侧视野的中心暗点（A）。眼底检查显示右侧视神经盘360°肿胀，伴有鼻上方火焰状出血、静脉充血和扭曲。左眼正常，杯盘比小于0.1，提示“视神经盘风险”。对右眼进行荧光素眼底血管造影（FFA）显示晚期视神经盘染色（）。心脏和颈动脉多普勒超声、自身免疫和高凝状态测试结果均正常，仅血清胆固醇略升高。颅脑计算机断层扫描（CT）显示存在未知的白质病变（）。诊断为伴脑白质病变的NA-AION。经过一年阿司匹林（每日100毫克）治疗后，在法国阿尔卑斯山为期10天的汽车旅行中，左眼出现视力障碍，累计海拔高度达1500米。右眼BCVA为20/200，左眼为20/40。检查发现左ONH边缘水肿和火焰状视网膜出血、血管扭曲、FFA期间荧光素泄漏以及广泛严重的视野丧失（中心保留），提示左眼NA-AION。截至出版时，双眼BCVA降至20/200，眼底检查显示双侧视神经萎缩，并且光学相干断层扫描证实双眼周边视网膜神经纤维层厚度显著减少（）

metadata.original_text: A 61-year-old woman was referred to our clinic complaining of an isolated, sudden, and painless visual loss in her right eye, within 24 h following a 2 h airplane flight (at 30,000 feet) from Paris to Madrid. Her medical history showed well-controlled hypercholesterolemia. Twenty-four hours later, best-corrected visual acuity (BCVA) was 20/200 in her right eye (RE) and 20/20 in her left eye (LE). There was a relative afferent pupillary defect (RAPD), color vison deficiency, and an inferior hemifield and temporal-superior quadrant scotoma (A) in the RE; funduscopic examination revealed a 360° swelling of the right optic disc, with superonasal flame-shaped hemorrhaging, venous congestion, and tortuosity. The LE was normal, with a cup-to-disc ratio of less than 0.1, suggesting “disc-at-risk”. Fundus fluorescein angiography (FFA) of the RE showed late optic-disc staining (). Cardiac and carotid Doppler ultrasound, autoimmune, and hypercoagulability tests were normal, with the exception of slightly raised serum cholesterol levels. Cranial computed tomography (CT) revealed previously unknown white matter lesions (). NA-AION associated with cerebral SVD was diagnosed. After one year of treatment with aspirin (100 mg daily), the patient developed visual disturbances in her LE, occurring during a 10 days drive in the French Alps, with a daily accumulated altitude of 1500 m. BCVA was 20/200 in her RE and 20/40 in her LE. Examination revealed edematous and flame-shaped retinal hemorrhaging at the border of the left ONH, vascular tortuosity, fluorescein leakage (during FFA), and severe widespread visual field loss with central-sparing (B), suggesting a NA-AION in the LE. At the time of publication, BCVA had decreased to 20/200 in both eyes, fundus examination showed bilateral optic disc atrophy, and spectral domain optical coherence tomography had confirmed a marked decrease in peripapillary retinal nerve fiber layer thickness in both eyes ().

title: pmc-8700716-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-8700716-1
病例摘要：一名83岁女性，患有高血压、高胆固醇血症、颈动脉血管病（类型III，AHA）和吸烟史，受退行性主动脉瓣狭窄影响。2000年接受了St. Jude 21 mm机械瓣膜置换手术。二十年后因呼吸困难入院。超声心动图显示左心室功能不全伴严重假体瓣膜狭窄（主动脉加速时间：140 ms，跨瓣最大速度：4.8 m/s，最大/中位梯度：90/52 mm Hg，指数有效或ifice面积（EOA）：0.3 cm²/mq，射血分数：35%）。经食管超声心动图显示前叶运动减弱。由于假体的遮挡，无法确定是否存在血栓或赘生物（）。由于血栓和赘生物在放射学密度上的差异（HU > 145 和 > 90 分别对应），进行了MDCT检查，结果显示前主动脉瓣被粘连并被低密度组织包围（Hounsfield单位：203.8）位于原生和假体环之间（有效或ifice面积（EOA）：45 mm²，EOA/0.15），表明为赘生物（a-c）。这些信息非常重要，因为患者没有直接开始抗凝治疗，而是接受了再次手术修复并使用了生物瓣膜。病理检查确认了赘生物的诊断。

metadata.original_text: Female, 83 years old (y/o), with hypertension, hypercholesterolemia, carotid vasculopathy (type III, AHA) and history of (h/o) smoking affected by degenerative aortic stenosis, underwent valvular replacement with a St. Jude 21 mm mechanical prosthesis in 2000. Twenty years later, she was hospitalized for respiratory distress. TTE showed left ventricle (LV) dysfunction with severe prosthetic valve stenosis (aortic acceleration time (AAT): 140 ms, transaortic maximum speed: 4.8 m/s, maximum/median gradient: 90/52 mm Hg, indexed effective orifice area (EOA): 0.3 cm2/mq, EF: 35%). TEE showed hypomobility of the anterior leaflet. Due to the shielding from the prosthesis, it was unclear if there was a thrombus or a pannus (). As it is possible to differentiate between a pannus and a thrombus due to their different radiological density (HU > 145 and > 90, respectively) [], MDCT was performed, and it showed that the anterior aortic leaflet was stuck and surrounded by hypodense tissue (Hounsfield units (HU): 203.8) interposed between native and prosthetic annuli (effective orifice area (EOA): 45 mm2, EOA/0.15) indicating a pannus (a–c). This information was of utmost importance as instead of staring anticoagulant treatment, the patient directly underwent repeat surgical repair with a bioprosthesis. The diagnosis of pannus was confirmed by pathology.

title: pmc-8700716-2
text:
病例标题：pmc-8700716-2
病例摘要：一名44岁女性，患有二尖瓣（MV）发育异常（降落伞瓣膜伴有双侧中后乳头肌），以及由纤维肌肉环引起的跨隔下狭窄。她在1989年接受了跨隔下膜切除和室间隔肌切术。由于运动耐受性呼吸困难加重及持续存在的跨隔下狭窄，于2006年（40岁）植入了St. Jude Regent 17 mm假体，她的身体状况有所改善。在过去两年中，经胸超声心动图（TTE）检测到室间隔梯度逐渐增加和左心室肥厚（最大速度：4.1 m/s，最大/中位梯度：64/39 mm Hg）。2020年5月进行的经食管超声心动图（TEE）显示假体瓣膜的正常运动，并确认了严重的跨隔下狭窄（速度：5.5 m/s，最大/中位梯度：120/63 mm Hg）。新形成的跨隔下膜（SAM）疑似存在但未被TEE清晰检测到。多层螺旋CT提供了左心室流出道（LVOT）的准确三维重建，并对新形成的SAM及其周围结构进行了更好的解剖评估。SAM位于主动脉假体环下方7毫米处，最大厚度为5毫米，并沿室间隔表面呈半环形扩展。这些信息对于指导手术切除SAM至关重要（a,b）。

metadata.original_text: Female, 44 y/o, affected by mitral valve (MV) dysplasia (parachute valve with double medioposterior papillary muscle) and subaortic stenosis caused by a fibromuscular ring, underwent subaortic membrane resection and septal myectomy in 1989. Due to worsening exertional dyspnea and persistence of subaortic stenosis, a St. Jude Regent 17 mm was implanted in 2006 (40 y/o) with improvement of her physical condition. In the last 2 years, TTE detected a progressive increase of the intraventricular gradient with LV hypertrophy (maximum speed, 4.1 m/s, maximum/median gradient: 64/39 mm Hg). TEE performed in May 2020 showed normal excursion of the prosthesis’ leaflets and confirmed severe subaortic stenosis (speed: 5.5 m/s, maximum/median gradient: 120/63 mm Hg) (). New subaortic membrane formation (SAM) was suspected but not clearly detected by TEE. MDCT provided accurate 3D reconstructions of the LV outlet tract (LVOT) with a better topographic assessment of the new SAM and its surrounding structures. The SAM was located 7 mm below the aortic prosthetic annulus, with the maximum thickness of 5 mm and hemicircumferential extension along the interventricular septal surface. This information was crucial to guide surgical excision of the SAM (a,b).

title: pmc-8700716-3
text:
病例标题：pmc-8700716-3
病例摘要：男性，80岁，患有代谢综合征。他因右侧颈内动脉锯齿状狭窄接受了血栓内膜切除术。由于双支关键冠状动脉狭窄（前降支和左回旋支）以及严重的退行性主动脉瓣狭窄，他在2019年进行了冠状动脉旁路移植术（CABG：左侧乳内动脉-IV型）和主动脉生物瓣植入术（Intuity 25 mm）。手术后十个月，他开始出现间歇性发热，并且多次血液培养检出粪肠球菌。经胸超声心动图检测到瓣周反流（PVR），并发现瓣膜叶局部高回声增厚。诊断为感染性心内膜炎，抗生素治疗随即开始（根据药敏试验结果从美罗培南改为氨苄西林和头孢曲松）。经食管超声心动图显示在主动脉瓣间隔区存在一个搏动性的假性动脉瘤，其最大轴向尺寸为15 × 10 × 30 mm，并通过一个5 mm的窗口与左心室流出道相通。此外还检测到前侧主动脉周围脓肿，纵向延伸4 cm，仅经食管超声心动图未能清晰显示（a-c）。

metadata.original_text: Male, 80 y/o, with a metabolic syndrome. He underwent thromboendarterectomy because of right internal carotid artery serrate stenosis. Due to bivasal critical coronary stenosis (anterior descending (DA) and left circumflex (LCx)) and severe degenerative aortic stenosis, he underwent coronary artery bypass graft (CABG: left internal mammary artery (LIMA-IVA)) and aortic bioprosthesis implantation (Intuity 25 mm) in 2019. Ten months after surgery, he started developing intermittent fever with serial hemocultures growing Enterococcus faecalis. TTE detected paravalvular regurgitation (PVR) with focal hyperechogenic thickening of the leaflets. Diagnosis of endocarditis was made, and antibiotic treatment was started (meropenem shifted to ampicillin and ceftriaxone according to the antibiogram). TEE showed a pulsatile perivalvular pseudoaneurysm in the mitroaortic intervalvular fibrosa (). MDCT was performed a few hours later, confirming the presence of a pseudoaneurysm with the maximum axial size of 15 × 10 × 30 mm communicating with LVOT through a 5 mm window, and also detected a periaortic abscess in the anterolateral side of the vessel with longitudinal extension of 4 cm, which was only poorly detected by TEE (a–c).

title: pmc-8700716-4
text:
病例标题：pmc-8700716-4
病例摘要：一名69岁男性，有高血压、高胆固醇血症和既往心肌梗死病史。他患有严重的退行性主动脉瓣狭窄，并于2020年4月接受了LOTUS Edge 27 mm经导管主动脉瓣植入术（TAVR）。在TAV植入后几天进行的超声心动图检查发现跨瓣压差增加（最大/中位压差，78/52毫米汞柱），但没有发热或阳性血液培养结果。经食道超声心动图显示生物瓣非冠状瓣叶活动减弱。怀疑瓣膜血栓形成并开始使用肝素治疗。CT血管成像检测到由假体框架折叠不当引起的瓣周漏；瓣膜血栓形成的怀疑也通过在瓣膜下边缘发现两个低密度附着物而得到证实。患者接受了球囊瓣膜扩张术，完全解决了瓣膜功能障碍（a-c）。

metadata.original_text: Male, 69 y/o, with hypertension, hypercholesterolemia and previous myocardial infarction. He was affected by severe degenerative aortic stenosis and underwent trans-catheter aortic valve replacement (TAVR) with LOTUS Edge 27 mm in April 2020. TTE performed a few days after the TAV implantation detected an increased transprosthesis gradient (maximum/median gradient, 78/52 mm Hg) in the absence of fever or positive hemoculture. TEE showed hypomobility of the noncoronary cusp of the bioprosthesis (). Valve’s thrombosis was suspected and heparin administration was started. MDCT detected a paravalvular leak caused by misfolding of the prosthesis’ frame; the suspicion of valve thrombosis was also confirmed by the finding of two hypodense appositions at the lower edge of the valve. The patient underwent balloon valvuloplasty with complete resolution of the valvular dysfunction (a–c).

title: pmc-8700756-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-8700756-1
病例摘要：一名45岁、有多次生育史、超重的女性，有口服避孕药（左诺孕酮0.15毫克和雌二醇0.03毫克每日）使用历史长达13年，在出现持续一周逐渐加重的呼吸困难、全身不适、头痛和味觉丧失后，前往我们机构的急诊室就诊。入院时，患者报告休息状态下有呼吸困难，并伴有间歇性胸骨后的压迫感疼痛，放射至背部。体格检查发现肺部听诊有啰音，生命体征显示呼吸急促、心率加快和低氧血症。开始给予氧气治疗，需要使用12升/分钟的非重复呼吸面罩以维持足够的氧饱和度。进行了SARS-CoV-2的实时荧光定量PCR检测。动脉血气分析结果显示PAO2/FIO2比值为56，随后患者被转至呼吸重症监护室（ICU）。通过RT-PCR检测确认了其COVID-19诊断结果（RNA拷贝数为50/反应）。实验室检查结果显示有严重程度预测指标阳性，包括D-二聚体升高（>20 mg/L）、肌钙蛋白I（0.150 ng/mL）、铁蛋白（2934 ng/mL）和乳酸脱氢酶（879 U/L）水平。其他入院辅助检查显示白细胞增多、中性粒细胞增多、淋巴细胞减少、轻度血小板减少以及转氨酶超过正常上限三倍以上。由于存在细菌性肺炎共感染的风险，开始使用氨苄西林-磺苄西林进行经验性抗生素治疗。鉴于D-二聚体显著升高，根据YEARS方案进行了CT肺动脉造影（CTPA）。CTPA结果显示有大量肺栓塞，涉及左下叶后基底段动脉、左上叶尖后段和下舌段。进行了心脏超声检查，显示右心室功能不全。按照欧洲心脏病学会指南给予重组组织型纤溶酶原激活剂（r-tPA，alteplase）100毫克静脉滴注2小时进行全身溶栓治疗。经过治疗，患者的血流动力学和通气模式有所改善。然而，在住院期间，患者出现了额外的并发症：(1) 由于医院获得性感染导致的脓毒性休克，需要广谱抗生素和支持疗法；(2) 呼吸衰竭，需使用有创机械通气支持，并随后进行气管切开术；(3) 严重贫血，需要输血。患者对治疗反应良好，临床进展满意，成功拔管并转至普通病房。患者的妇产科主治医生认为不应继续使用雌激素避孕药。最终，患者出院时接受不定期的抗凝治疗，使用因子Xa抑制剂。整个住院过程如图所示。

metadata.original_text: A 45-year-old, multiparous, overweight female with a history of OHP use for 13 years (levonorgestrel 0.15 mg and estradiol 0.03 mg daily) consulted the emergency room of our institution following a one-week clinical course of worsening dyspnea, general malaise, headache, and ageusia. At admission, the patient reported dyspnea at rest, associated with intermittent retrosternal oppressive chest pain radiating to the back. The physical exam revealed pulmonary aggregates on auscultation, and her vital signs showed tachypnea, tachycardia, and desaturation. Oxygen therapy was started, requiring a non-rebreathing mask at 12 L/min to maintain adequate oxygen saturation. RT-PCR test for SARS-CoV-2 was indicated. Arterial blood gases analysis showed a PAO2/FIO2 ratio of 56, and the patient was then transferred to the respiratory intensive care unit (ICU). Her COVID-19 diagnosis was confirmed with the positive results of the RT-PCR test for SARS-CoV-2 (50 copies of RNA/reaction). Laboratory test results showed positive severity predictors, including an elevation of D-dimer (>20 mg/L), troponin I (0.150 ng/mL), ferritin (2934 ng/mL), and lactate dehydrogenase (879 U/L) levels. Other admission paraclinical tests showed leukocytosis, neutrophilia, lymphopenia, mild thrombocytopenia, and elevation of transaminases more than three times the laboratory upper limit. Because of the risk of bacterial pneumonia co-infection, ampicillin-sulbactam was started as empiric antibiotic treatment. Due to significant elevation of the D-dimer, a CT pulmonary angiography (CTPA) was taken according to the YEARS protocol. The results of the CTPA showed a massive PTE with compromise to the posterior basal segmental artery of the left lower lobe, inferior lingula, and apical-posterior segment of the left upper lobe. An echocardiogram was performed, showing right ventricular dysfunction. Systemic thrombolysis with r-tPA (alteplase) 100 mg infusion over 2 h was administered according to the European Society of Cardiology guidelines. After treatment, the patient showed an improvement in her hemodynamic and ventilatory patterns. Nonetheless, during the hospital stay, the patient displayed additional complications: (1) septic shock secondary to a hospital-acquired infection requiring broad-spectrum antibiotics and hemodynamic support therapy, (2) respiratory failure with invasive mechanical ventilation support requirement and subsequent tracheostomy, and (3) severe anemia with the need for blood transfusions. The patient had an adequate response to treatment with satisfactory clinical evolution, successful extubation, and transfer to the general hospital floor. The patient was evaluated by the OB-GYN attending physician, who contraindicated the further use of estrogenic hormonal contraceptives. Finally, the patient was discharged from our institution with indefinite anticoagulation therapy with a factor-XA inhibitor. The entire hospital stay course is represented in .

title: pmc-8700797-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-8700797-1
病例摘要：一名74岁的男性，ASA体格分级为III级（身高163厘米，体重73公斤，BMI 27.4），因口底鳞状细胞癌计划进行肿瘤广泛切除、下颌切开术、气管切开术和游离皮瓣重建。他的病史包括高血压，并且之前有双侧输尿管结石的体外冲击波碎石治疗。患者正在服用洛沙坦和氢氯噻嗪，否认任何药物过敏史。手术前10天进行胸部X线检查显示正常图像，超声心动图提示左室功能正常。存在轻微的咳嗽症状。在诱导麻醉前实施了标准监测（心电图、血压和血氧饱和度）。术前生命体征均在正常范围内（心率74次/分钟；血压168/85毫米汞柱；呼吸频率18次/分钟；以及在室空气中的血氧饱和度为94%）。在预充氧后，使用瑞芬太尼（目标控制输注：3 ng/mL）、利多卡因（20毫克）、丙泊酚（180毫克）和琥珀酰胆碱（80毫克）诱导全身麻醉。通过视频辅助插管工具（Trachway®，Markstein Sichtec Medical Corp，台中市，台湾）使用7.5毫米内径的气管导管进行了经口气管插管。在气管插管过程中发现有分泌物。机械通气设置为容量控制模式：潮气量500毫升、呼吸频率10次/分钟和呼气末正压（PEEP）4厘米水柱。使用2%七氟醚维持麻醉，并辅以顺式阿曲库铵。通过桡动脉建立了一条动脉导管，用于连续心率监测。在无事件的气管切开术后放置了一个8.0号内径的气管切开管（Rota-TrachTM，Vitaltec，台中市，台湾，ID 8.0毫米，OD 11.0毫米，长度76毫米）。气管导管被顺利撤出且未发现管腔内有分泌物堵塞。然而，在整个过程中血氧饱和度从100%下降到96%。立即进行了FiO2为1.0的复张操作。当完成气管切开并准备进行颈部第二阶段手术时，患者的血氧饱和度继续下降至89%。最高气道压力从22厘米水柱增加到29厘米水柱，呼气末二氧化碳分压（EtCO2）从42毫米汞柱降至37毫米汞柱。血压仍在正常范围内。给予纯氧，并进行了动脉血气分析（ABG），结果显示在FiO2为1.0的情况下PaO2较低（140毫米汞柱）。同时，体格检查发现左侧胸壁运动正常，但右侧显著抑制。右肺听诊显示右侧胸部呼吸音明显减弱，伴有粗糙的湿啰音和哮鸣音。气管切开管位置不当导致单侧通气立即被排除。由于手术前10天进行的胸部X线检查结果正常且患者没有感染迹象（发热、白细胞增多等），张力性气胸是初步排除的诊断。立即使用带有弯曲探头（2.5至7.5兆赫）的手持超声心动图评估肺部图像。超声心动图显示右侧上肺区域减少的肺滑动和减小的沙丘样征象，以及运动模式下的间歇性肺脉冲（A）。在第二肋间和第五肋间未观察到B线。通过纤维支气管镜检查排除了经气管切开管进行右主支气管插管的可能性（导管尖端位于气管内且高于隆突）。然而，在继续推进支气管镜穿过右侧主支气管时，发现大量粘稠的黄色痰液积聚在支气管分支中，尤其是在右侧上叶支气管处（B）。拍摄了一张便携式胸部X光片，显示右上肺部分萎陷和间质密度增加，与超声检查结果一致（C）。经过充分吸引和复张操作后，进行了

metadata.original_text: A 74-year-old man, ASA physical class III (163 cm, 73 kg, BMI 27.4), was scheduled for tumor-wide excision, mandibulotomy, tracheostomy, and free flap reconstruction because of mouth floor squamous cell carcinoma. His medical history included hypertension and previous cystolitholapaxy for bilateral ureteral stones. The patient was taking losartan and hydrochlorothiazide and denied any drug allergies. A pre-operative chest radiograph (10 days before the surgery) showed a normal picture and an echocardiogram indicated normal left ventricular function. A mild productive cough was noted. A standard monitoring set-up (electrocardiogram, blood pressure, and SpO2) was implemented before induction of anesthesia. Pre-operative vital signs were within normal range (heart rate, 74 bpm; blood pressure, 168/85 mmHg; respiration rate, 18 times per minute; and an oxygen saturation of 94% on room air). Following pre-oxygenation, general anesthesia was induced with remifentanil (target-controlled infusion: 3 ng/mL), lidocaine (20 mg), propofol (180 mg), and succinylcholine (80 mg). Oral tracheal intubation with a 7.5 mm endotracheal tube was performed using a video-assisted intubating stylet (Trachway®, Markstein Sichtec Medical Corp, Taichung, Taiwan). Airway secretion was found during the tracheal intubation procedure. Mechanical ventilation was set at a volume-controlled mode with the following settings: tidal volume (500 mL), respiratory rate (10 times per minute), and positive end-expiratory pressure (PEEP; 4 cmH2O). Sevoflurane at an end-expiration concentration of 2% and cis-atracurium were used for the maintenance of anesthesia. An arterial line was established through a radial artery for continuous beat-to-beat monitoring. A cuffed 8.0 sized tracheostomy tube (Rota-TrachTM, Vitaltec, Taichung, Taiwan, ID 8.0 mm, OD 11.0 mm, TL 76 mm) was placed after an uneventful tracheostomy procedure. The endotracheal tube was then withdrawn without incident and no secretion impaction inside the tube was noted. However, SpO2 dropped from 100% to 96% during the course. An immediate recruitment maneuver with FiO2 1.0 was performed. When the tracheostomy was completed and ready for the second stage of the neck dissection procedure, the patient’s SpO2 continued to drop down from 96% to 89%. Peak airway pressure increased from 22 to 29 cmH2O, and EtCO2 decreased from 42 mmHg to 37 mmHg. Blood pressure was within normal range. Pure oxygen was given, and arterial blood gas (ABG) was checked, which revealed a low PaO2 (140 mmHg under FiO2 1.0). Meanwhile, physical examinations revealed that chest wall movement was normal at the left side but significantly suppressed at the right side. Lung auscultation revealed significantly diminished breath sounds over the right chest with a mixture of coarse crackles and rhonchi. Malposition of the tracheostomy tube with one-lung ventilation was immediately excluded. Since the pre-operative chest radiograph taken 10 days before was normal and the patient did not present any infection signs (fever, leukocytosis, etc.), pneumothorax was an initial impression ready to be excluded. A bedside lung POCUS with a curved transducer (2.5 to 7.5 MHz) was immediately used to evaluate the lung images. The images of the lung POCUS showed decreasing lung sliding over the right upper lung field and a reduced sandy seashore sign with intermittent lung pulse on motion mode (M-mode; A). B-line was not observed within the 2nd and 5th intercostal space. Right mainstem intubation by the tracheostomy tube was excluded by fiberoptic bronchoscopy exam (the tip was within the trachea and above the carina). While advancing the bronchoscope past the right main bronchus, however, copious sticky yellowish sputum was encountered in the bronchial branches, especially at the right upper bronchus (B). A portable chest radiography was taken and showed partial atelectasis over the right upper lobe and increased interstitial lung density, which were compatible with the ultrasound findings (C). title: pmc-8700985-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-8700985-1
病例摘要：病例1：该患者为一名79岁的女性，有高血压、心力衰竭和中脑动脉梗死的病史。手术前血压控制良好，心脏功能正常，并未观察到神经并发症。患者的肺功能测试结果正常，尽管胸部X光显示右中叶肺炎，但已接受治疗。患者在全身麻醉下接受了全髋关节置换术。在全身麻醉前，使用多种监测手段进行了监测，包括心电图、无创血压监护仪、脉搏血氧计和双频谱指数（BIS）监护仪。BIS值维持在40-60之间。诱导麻醉时使用了丙泊酚（2 mg/kg）和罗库溴铵（0.8 mg/kg），并进行了动脉穿刺以进行连续血压监测。手术约20分钟后，患者的氧饱和度从93.1%下降到83.1%。在吸入氧气分数（FiO2）为0.4的情况下通气时，动脉血气分析显示氧分压（PaO2）从161.6降至51.2。我们将正压呼气末压力（PEEP）增加至10 cm H2O，并将FiO2提高到1.0并进行了复张操作；然而，她的氧饱和度仅暂时升高后再次下降至81%。怀疑由于肺部塌陷导致的萎陷，我们逆转了肌肉松弛并诱导自主呼吸。氧饱和度恢复至90%，手术继续进行。术后，患者的氧饱和度恢复到术前状态98%。

metadata.original_text: Case 1: The first patient was a 79-year-old female individual with a history of hypertension, heart failure, and middle cerebral artery infarction. Blood pressure control and cardiac function were in good condition before surgery, and no neurological complications were observed. The patient’s pulmonary function test result was normal, although her chest X-ray revealed pneumonia in the right middle lobe, for which she had been treated. The patient underwent total hip arthroplasty under general anesthesia. Before the general anesthesia, monitoring using several modalities was instituted, including electrocardiography, a noninvasive blood pressure monitor, pulse oximeter, and bispectral index (BIS) monitor. The BIS was maintained at 40–60. Anesthesia was induced with propofol (2 mg/kg) and rocuronium (0.8 mg/kg), and intra-arterial cannulation was performed for continuous blood pressure monitoring. Approximately 20 min into the surgery, the patient’s oxygen (O2) saturation level dropped from 93.1% to 83.1%. While being ventilated at a fraction of inspired oxygen (FiO2) of 0.4, her arterial blood gas showed that the partial pressure of oxygen (PaO2) dropped from 161.6 to 51.2. We increased the positive end expiratory pressure (PEEP) to 10 cm H2O and FiO2 to 1.0 and performed a recruitment maneuver; however, her O2 saturation level increased only temporarily and dropped again to 81%. Upon suspecting atelectasis due to a collapsed lung, we reversed muscle relaxation and induced spontaneous respiration. The O2 saturation level recovered to 90%, and we continued the surgery with spontaneous respiration. After surgery, the patient’s O2 saturation level recovered to the preoperative state of 98%.

title: pmc-8700985-2
text:
病例标题：pmc-8700985-2
病例摘要：病例 2：第二位患者是一位 89 岁的男性，有高血压和谵妄病史。手术前，他的血压控制良好，尽管他在服用抗痴呆药物，但患者能够很好地遵循指令。肺功能测试结果显示为阻塞性模式。使用与第一位患者相同的麻醉方案进行了全髋关节置换术。在吸入氧浓度（FiO2）为 0.4 的情况下，患者出现了低氧血症，氧饱和度从 100% 下降到 80%，动脉氧分压从 129 下降到 53.0。该患者在接受肌肉松弛剂拮抗剂后恢复自主呼吸，氧饱和度水平从 81% 提高到 88%。通过持续正压通气，其氧饱和度水平提高到 90%。与第一位患者类似，第二位患者在手术后的氧饱和度水平也提高到了 98%。两位患者均未出现术后呼吸并发症。第一位患者的胸部 X 光片术后无明显异常发现，而第二位患者右中叶的亚段存在部分萎陷（与术前相比）。

metadata.original_text: Case 2: The second patient was an 89-year-old male individual with a history of hypertension and delirium. Before surgery, his blood pressure was well controlled, and although he was taking dementia medicine, the patient was able to follow commands well. His pulmonary function test results indicated an obstructive pattern. Total hip arthroplasty was performed using the same anesthetic regimen used for the first patient. While ventilating at an FiO2 of 0.4, the patient showed an onset of hypoxia, with O2 saturation level dropping from 100% to 80% and PaO2 dropping from 129 to 53.0. This patient also showed an improvement of O2 saturation level from 81% to 88% after recovering spontaneous respiration by administering a muscle relaxant-reversing agent. His O2 saturation level improved to 90% with continuous positive airway pressure. Similar to the first patient, the second patient’s O2 saturation level improved to 98% after surgery. Neither patient developed any respiratory complications after surgery. The first patient had no notable findings on the postoperative chest X-ray, whereas the second patient showed subsegmental atelectasis on the right middle lobe compared with the preoperative findings ().

title: pmc-8701003-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-8701003-1
病例摘要：患者是一位91岁的白人男性，有冠状动脉疾病、充血性心力衰竭、房颤、高血压、间质性肺病和阻塞性睡眠呼吸暂停的既往病史。他因2周内出现有痰咳嗽、发热、呼吸困难和全身不适而入院。入院时的生命体征显示血压为77/35 mmHg，心率为122次/分，呼吸频率为38次/分，体温为102华氏度，血氧饱和度为98%（使用15 L氧气）。患者出汗，右肺区听诊呼吸音减弱，在腹部触诊时右上腹饱满。初步实验室检查显示白细胞计数升高至22.6 × 109/L，中性粒细胞增多，碳酸氢盐水平为21 mmol/L，乳酸水平为6.5 mmol/L，阴离子间隙为17，ALT为71 IU/L，AST为69 IU/L，ALP为450 IU/L。心电图显示房颤伴快速室率。胸部X光片显示急性右胸腔积液（）。患者因呼吸衰竭进行了气管插管。还开始使用抗生素（哌拉西林-他唑巴坦和阿奇霉素）以及静脉生理盐水，但血压没有改善。随后开始使用去甲肾上腺素和加压素的静脉升压支持，并转入重症监护室（ICU）。由于右上腹饱满、肝酶升高和发热，进行了腹部超声检查，结果显示右肝叶有一个8 × 7 × 6 cm大小的复杂异质性低回声肿块样病变（）。为了更好地确定该病灶，进行了腹部CT。CT显示一个13 × 8 × 7 cm大小的右肝叶下包膜内复杂低密度病变，紧邻右侧前膈肌，并伴有弥漫性胆囊壁增厚伴胆石症和中度右胸腔积液（）。患者接受了胸管置入术，移除了1600毫升浑浊浅棕色液体。胸腔积液分析显示脓胸，白细胞计数为70,800个/微升（其中61%为中性粒细胞），葡萄糖水平低于10 mg/dL，乳酸脱氢酶为4821 IU/L，pH值为7.0，蛋白质为3.6 g/dL，革兰氏染色显示链状革兰阳性球菌。细胞学检查未发现恶性细胞，但显示严重的急性炎症和罕见的间皮细胞。入院时的血液培养生长了β溶血性链球菌。胸腔积液培养生长了厌氧链球菌。在住院第二天，计划进行CT引导下的肝脏脓肿穿刺引流。然而，CT显示右膈下肝周积液显著减少至最大厚度1.5 cm（）。由于肝周积液的改善，未进行CT引导下的引流。因胸腔积液持续存在和胸管排出液体减少，在胸管内注入了溶栓药物，并移除了1.5 L渗出性液体。重复胸部X光片显示右胸腔积液有所改善（），患者在住院第三天成功拔管。在住院第八天，出现新的呼吸困难并恶化，需要再次插管。重复胸部CT显示左主支气管弥漫性狭窄、右侧后段支气管闭塞伴肺不张、左侧下叶完全塌陷因中央支气管闭塞所致，右胸腔少量积液（）。进行了紧急纤维支气管镜检查，并吸除了大量浓稠的黏脓分泌物。支气管肺泡灌洗培养出白色念珠菌，但认为不是病原体。在住院两周后无法将患者从呼吸机上脱机的情况下，患者被终末性拔管，护理重点转向舒适治疗。

metadata.original_text: The patient is a 91-year-old Caucasian man with a past medical history of coronary artery disease, congestive heart failure, atrial fibrillation, hypertension, interstitial lung disease, and obstructive sleep apnea presented with a 2-week history of productive cough, fever, shortness of breath and generalized malaise. On presentation, vitals showed blood pressure of 77/35 mmHg, heart rate of 122 bpm, respiratory rate of 38 bpm, a temperature of 102 F, and oxygen saturation of 98% on 15 L of oxygen. The patient was diaphoretic, with decreased breath sounds in the right lung field, and on palpation of the abdomen, there was right upper quadrant fullness. Initial laboratory studies showed elevated white blood cells (WBC) 22.6 × 109/L with neutrophilia, bicarbonate 21 mmol/L, lactic acid 6.5 mmol/L, anion gap 17, ALT 71 IU/L, AST 69 IU/L, and ALP 450 IU/L. ECG showed atrial fibrillation with a rapid ventricular response. CXR showed acute right pleural effusion (). The patient was intubated for respiratory failure. He was also started on antibiotics (piperacillin-tazobactam and azithromycin) and intravenous normal saline with no improvement in blood pressure. The patient was then started on intravenous vasopressor support with norepinephrine and vasopressin and admitted to the intensive care unit (ICU). Due to the right upper quadrant fullness, elevated liver enzymes and fever, an abdominal ultrasound was performed, which showed an acute complex heterogeneous hypoechoic 8 × 7 × 6 cm mass-like lesion in the right hepatic lobe (). To better characterize the lesion, a CT abdomen was done. The CT showed a complex low-density right hepatic lobe subcapsular lesion measuring 13 × 8 × 7 cm, directly abutting the right anterior diaphragm, along with diffuse gross gallbladder wall thickening with cholelithiasis and a moderate right pleural effusion (). The patient underwent chest tube placement with the removal of 1600 cc of cloudy light-brown-colored fluid. Pleural fluid analysis was consistent with empyema, with WBC of 70,800 cells/mcL (61% neutrophils), glucose less than 10 mg/dL, LDH of 4821 IU/L, pH of 7.0, protein of 3.6 gm/dL, and Gram stain showing Gram-positive cocci in chains. Cytology was negative for malignant cells but showed severe acute inflammation and rare mesothelial cells. The blood culture on admission grew beta-hemolytic streptococci. The pleural fluid culture grew Streptococcus anginosus. On day two of hospitalization, the patient was scheduled for CT percutaneous drainage of liver abscess. However, the CT revealed a significant decrease in the size of the right subdiaphragmatic perihepatic collection to 1.5 cm in greatest thickness (). Due to the improvement of the hepatic collection, the CT-guided drainage of the collection was not performed. Following the persistence of pleural effusion and decreased effluent from the chest tube, an intrapleural thrombolytic was instilled via chest tube with the removal of 1.5 L exudative fluid. Repeat CXR showed improvement in the right pleural effusion (), and the patient was successfully extubated on day three of hospitalization. His hospital course was subsequently complicated by new onset and worsening respiratory distress on day eight of hospitalization requiring re-intubation. Repeat CT chest showed diffuse narrowing of the left mainstem bronchus, occlusion of right posterior segmental bronchi with atelectasis, complete collapse of the left lower lobe due to occlusion of left lower lobe central bronchi with trace right pleural effusion (). Emergent flexible fiberoptic bronchoscopy was done and showed copious thick mucopurulent secretions that were suctioned to clear. The bronchoalveolar lavage grew Candida albicans, which was not thought to be a pathogen. After two weeks of hospitalization and the inability to wean the patient from the ventilator, the patient was terminally extubated, and care was focused on comfort.

title: pmc-8701011-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-8701011-1
病例摘要：一名93岁的患者因低钾血症、营养不良和肾功能减退，由家庭医生发现后就诊于我院。五年前，她曾多次接受肠道切除手术（）。因此，她经历了大约三个月的腹泻，被认为是短肠综合征(SBS)引起的。腹泻自行好转且没有腹痛症状。一年前入院前，出现了水样腹泻，尽管使用了止泻药物但效果不佳。她的既往病史包括结肠穿孔、腹壁疝伴绞窄性肠梗阻和约2米30厘米（59.1英寸）的末端回肠切除术（）。五年前这次入院前，她被诊断为绞窄性肠梗阻，并进行了距末端回肠7厘米、距Treitz韧带50厘米的小肠切除术（）。就诊时，患者的血压为95/67 mmHg，心率为59次/分钟，SpO2为95%，体温36.6 °C。体格检查显示正常的呼吸音和心脏杂音，有轻微的收缩期杂音。腹部平坦柔软。Murphy征阴性，无肋腰角压痛。观察到下肢水肿。血液检测结果如下：白细胞计数15.30 × 103/μ（中性粒细胞78.3%，淋巴细胞15.5%，单核细胞5.6%，嗜酸性粒细胞0.4%，嗜碱性粒细胞0.2%），红细胞计数3.34 × 106/μ，血红蛋白11.3 g/dL，血细胞比容33.2%，血小板计数27.9 × 104/μ，总胆红素1.6 mg/dL，天冬氨酸转氨酶（血清谷草转氨酶）48 IU/L，丙氨酸转氨酶（血清谷丙转氨酶）37 IU/L，总蛋白5.2 g/dL，白蛋白2.5 g/dL，血尿素氮18.7 mg/dL，肌酐1.13 mg/dL，钠143 mEq/L，钾1.7 mEq/L，氯99 mEq/L，钙5.0 mg/dL，磷2.8 mg/dL，镁0.8 mg/dL，估算肾小球滤过率34.1 mL/min/L。腹部CT显示结肠轻度水肿，并无其他明显异常（）。影像学检查未见明显器质性异常，但因多次肠道切除术导致肠道缩短。结肠活检仅显示非特异性炎症表现（a,b）。我们认为这种炎症可能是由于随着年龄增长，肠道保护因素和攻击因素之间的不平衡所致。入院后，通过补充镁和钾纠正电解质失衡并改善肾功能，但腹泻持续存在。进行了结肠镜检查并取病理标本。然而，用于评估腹泻的结肠镜检查未发现特异性表现。此外，粪便培养和组织病理学检查未能确定确切原因。综合来看，这可能是SBS适应不良的一部分临床过程。由于腹泻和电解质异常持续存在，我们得出结论她的肠道无法吸收营养，并因此转为经中心静脉（CV）营养（通过CV导管输送），这改善了她的腹泻症状。在创建CV导管约一个月后，患者处于良好的一般状况下出院。

metadata.original_text: A 93-year-old patient visited our hospital with hypokalaemia, malnutrition, and decreased renal function detected by a family physician. Five years before her visit to the hospital, she had undergone bowel resection several times (). As a result, she had been suffering from diarrhoea for about three months, thought to be caused by SBS. The diarrhoea improved spontaneously and she had no abdominal symptoms. Then, one year before admission, watery diarrhoea appeared, and although antidiarrhoeal medication was prescribed, there was little improvement. Her past history included colonic perforation, abdominal wall hernia with strangulated ileus, and resection of about 2 m 30 cm (59.1 inches) of the terminal ileum (). Five years prior to this admission, she was diagnosed with strangulated ileus, and the small intestine was resected, 7 cm from the terminal ileum and 50 cm from the ligament of Treitz (). At presentation, the patient’s blood pressure was 95/67 mmHg, heart rate was 59 beats per minute, SpO2 as 95%, and her temperature was 36.6 °C. On physical examination, normal breath sounds and heart sounds with mild systolic murmurs were observed. The abdomen was flat and soft. Murphy’s sign was negative, and there was no costovertebral angle tenderness. Lower leg oedema was observed. The results of blood tests were as follows: white blood cell count 15.30 × 103/μ (neutrophils 78.3%, lymphocytes 15.5%, monocytes 5.6%, eosinophils 0.4%, basophils 0.2%), red blood cell count 3.34 × 106/μ, hemoglobin 11.3 g/dL, hematocrit 33.2%, platelet count 27.9 × 104/μ, total bilirubin 1.6 mg/dL, aspartate aminotransferase (serum glutamic-oxaloacetic transaminase) 48 IU/L, alanine aminotransferase (serum glutamic-pyruvic transaminase) 37 IU/L, total protein 5.2 g/dL, albumin 2.5 g/dL, blood urea nitrogen 18.7 mg/dL, creatine 1.13 mg/dL, Na 143 mEq/L, K 1.7 mEq/L, Cl 99 mEq/L, Ca 5.0 mg/dL, P 2.8 mg/dL, Mg 0.8 mg/dL, and estimated glomerular filtration rate 34.1 mL/min/L. An abdominal computed tomography showed mild oedema of the colon, and no other obvious abnormalities (). No obvious organic abnormalities were noted on imaging, but the bowel was shortened because of repeated bowel resections. Colonic specimens showed only nonspecific inflammatory findings (a,b). We believe that this inflammatory finding was due to an imbalance between the protective and aggressive factors of the intestinal tract due to ageing. After hospitalization, her electrolyte imbalance and renal function were improved by an infusion of magnesium and potassium, but the diarrhea persisted. A colonoscopy was performed and pathological specimens were taken. However, the colonoscopy, which was performed to evaluate diarrhea, did not reveal any specific findings. In addition, stool culture and histopathological examination did not reveal the exact cause. Taken together, this was likely to be de-adaptation of SBS, as a part of the clinical course. Since diarrhea and electrolyte abnormalities continued, we concluded that her bowel could not absorb nutrients, and therefore switched to central venous (CV) nutrition (delivered via a CV port), which improved her diarrhea. She was discharged in good general condition about one month after creation of the CV port.

title: pmc-8701217-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-8701217-1
病例摘要：一名29岁男性，自2015年起HIV阳性，免疫抑制严重，在开始抗逆转录病毒治疗（ART）前失访。他于2019年3月因发热、呼吸困难和咳嗽一天的病史首次在急诊室就诊时未提供其HIV状态信息。初步评估显示每分钟呼吸频率为30次/分，低氧血症，体温39°C，C-反应蛋白（CRP）升高，并且胸部X光片显示双侧中下肺野有间质性浸润影。他被收治入院并开始经验性治疗以应对社区获得性肺炎（CAP）。两天后，由于呼吸急促加重至50次/分、严重低氧血症（PaO2 49 mmHg），尽管给予氧气补充仍存在，并且出现纵隔气肿、双侧气胸和胸部CT扫描显示弥漫性磨玻璃样浸润影（a）。CD4+淋巴细胞计数为6/mm³，HIV病毒载量为18,200拷贝/mL。所有其他微生物学检测均为阴性。随后经验性治疗改为复方新诺明（TMP-SMX）15 mg/kg TMP每日三次加上皮质类固醇以疑似诊断为肺孢子菌肺炎（PJP）。后来通过支气管肺泡灌洗液（BAL）免疫荧光检查确诊为肺孢子菌（P. jirovecii）。由于顽固性低氧血症和高概率的气压伤，患者未进行气管插管即开始静脉-静脉体外膜氧合（VV-ECMO）治疗。后来因分泌物清除不良需要进行气管插管，并完成了为期14天的保护性IMV以减少体外支持。他按照推荐的PJP治疗剂量接受了21天的复方新诺明加上皮质类固醇治疗（泼尼松龙40 mg每日两次共5天，然后每日40 mg共5天，之后每日20 mg共11天）。在ICU入院后第15天开始抗逆转录病毒治疗（ART），一个月后病毒载量显著下降至151拷贝/mL。ECMO和保护性IMV维持了40天，随后进行了19天的脱机期。纵隔气肿和双侧气胸保守处理，50天后的CT扫描显示明显改善（b）。他在ICU停留69天后出院并表现出显著肌病症状。在出院三个月后，他作为完全恢复且CD4+淋巴细胞计数有所改善（49/mm³）的患者在门诊复诊。

metadata.original_text: A 29-year-old male, HIV-positive since 2015, severely immunosuppressed that was lost to follow-up before starting ART. He presented in March 2019 at the emergency room (ER) with a one-day history of fever, shortness of breath and cough without providing information about his HIV status.
