Initial assessment showed polypnea of 30 cycles per minute (cpm), hypoxia, fever (39 °C), elevated C-Reactive Protein (CRP) and bilateral middle and lower zone air space opacities on chest X-ray. He was admitted to the ward and started empirical treatment for community acquired pneumonia (CAP). Two days later, he was transferred to the ICU with aggravated tachypnea (50 cpm), severe hypoxemia (paO2 49 mmHg) despite oxygen supplementation and pneumomediastinum, bilateral pneumothorax and diffuse ground-glass opacities on thoracic-CT scan (a). The CD4+ lymphocyte count was 6/mm3 and the HIV-viral load was 18,200 copies/mL. All other microbiologic tests were negative. Treatment was then switched empirically to trimethoprim-sulfamethoxazole (TMP-SMX) 15 mg/kg of TMP each day in 3 takes plus corticosteroids for a presumed diagnosis of PJP. Later the diagnosis was confirmed by positive immunofluorescence as Pneumocystis jirovecii (P. jirovecii) in bronchoalveolar fluid (BAL). Due to refractory hypoxemia and given the high probability of barotrauma, the patient was started on venovenous-ECMO(VV-ECMO) without prior tracheal intubation. He later needed intubation due to poor bronchial clearance of secretions and completed a 14 days-period of protective IMV in an attempt to reduce extra corporeal support. He completed 21 days of therapy with TMP-SMX plus corticosteroids according to recommended PJP treatment dosage (prednisolone 40 mg two times day for 5 days, then 40 mg each day for 5 days and after that 20 mg each day for 11 days). ART was started 15 days after the ICU admission, with a significant reduction in the viral load one month later (151 copies/mL). ECMO and protective IMV were maintained for 40 days, followed by 19 days of weaning off. The pneumomediastinum and bilateral pneumothorax were managed conservatively, and a new CT-scan performed 50 days later showed great improvement (b). He was transferred to the ward after 69 days of ICU stay showing signs of significant myopathy. Three months after discharge, he was revaluated at outpatient care as fully recovered and with CD4+ lymphocyte count improvement (49/mm3).

title: pmc-8701217-2
text:
病例标题：pmc-8701217-2
病例摘要：一名64岁女性，有高血压、血脂异常和慢性肺病史，在接受抗生素治疗疑似社区获得性肺炎后仍出现发热、呼吸困难和咳嗽加重的情况下前往急诊科。她表现出低氧血症，并且CRP单独升高，胸腔CT扫描显示弥漫性磨玻璃样阴影（a）。尽管给予抗生素和支持氧气补充，她在中间监护病房的状态仍然恶化，因此被转至ICU并进行了气管插管。在机械通气和俯卧位治疗三天后，由于顽固性的呼吸性酸中毒，她连接上了体外膜氧合（VV-ECMO）。抗HIV检测呈阳性。免疫和病毒学检查显示严重的免疫抑制（9个/mm³的CD4+细胞）和高血清病毒载量（4,050,000拷贝/mL），因此开始使用复方磺胺甲噁唑加皮质激素治疗，剂量为推荐的肺孢子菌肺炎治疗剂量。诊断通过BAL中抗荧光免疫法检测到卡氏肺囊虫阳性而得到确认。在撤除机械通气的过程中，出现了急性呼吸窘迫综合征（ARDS）的复发，并且需要增加通气参数和俯卧位治疗。考虑院内感染的可能性，开始使用广谱抗生素并重复支气管纤维镜检查，BAL中持续检测到卡氏肺囊虫抗荧光免疫阳性以及在BAL中检出巨细胞病毒聚合酶链反应（PCR）阳性。她总共接受了33天的复方磺胺甲噁唑治疗和21天的更昔洛韦治疗，并且呼吸有所改善，开始接受抗逆转录病毒治疗。她在83天后拔管，并在重症监护病房停留三个月进行肌肉康复后转至普通病房，没有其他功能障碍。随访影像学检查见b。她被转移到一个需要持续氧气支持（2升/分钟）的康复单位，在几个月的肺部康复后恢复了健康。

metadata.original_text: A 64-year-old woman with a history of hypertension, dyslipidemia and chronic pulmonary disease presented at the ER with fever, shortness of breath and a worsening cough despite a previous complete course of antibiotics for presumed CAP. She was hypoxic, with isolated elevation of CRP and diffuse ground-glass opacities on thoracic CT-scan (a). Her status deteriorated despite antibiotics and oxygen supplementation in the Intermediate Care Unit, so she was transferred to the ICU and intubated. Three days after IMV and prone positioning, she was connected to VV-ECMO due to refractory respiratory acidemia. Anti-HIV testing was positive. Immune and viral study revealed severe immunosuppression (9 CD4+/mm3) and high serum viral load (4.050.000 copies/mL) and TMP-SMX plus corticosteroids were started for presumed PJP, at the recommended PJP treatment dosage. Diagnosis was confirmed by positive immunofluorescence for P. jirovecii in BAL. ECMO was discontinued after 10 days. During the weaning off invasive ventilation, there was recrudescence of ARDS with increased ventilatory parameters and need for prone positioning. Nosocomial infection was considered, broad spectrum antibiotics were started and bronchofibroscopy repeated, with persistently positive immunofluorescence for P. jirovecii and a positive polymerase chain reaction (PCR) for cytomegalovirus in BAL. She completed a total of 33 days of treatment with TMP-SMX and 21 days of ganciclovir with respiratory improvement and started ART. She was extubated after 83 days and was transferred to the ward after three months of ICU stay for muscular rehabilitation, without other dysfunctions. Follow-up imaging can be seen in b. She was transferred to a rehabilitation unit with a residual need of oxygen support (2 L per minute), from which she recovered after some months of pulmonary rehabilitation.

title: pmc-8701217-3
text:
病例标题：pmc-8701217-3
病例摘要：一位53岁的女性患者，无相关病史，因两个月渐进性运动迟缓和意识模糊入院，症状在一周前加重。体格检查时她表现出烦躁并发热。头部CT显示左侧额叶和颞叶内有病变。脑脊液（CSF）轻度白细胞增多且蛋白质中等升高。HIV血清学检测呈阳性，并且CSF的核酸测试为弓形虫gondii阳性。她因新发HIV感染伴严重免疫抑制（CD4+计数28个/mm3），临床表现为脑弓形虫病而被收入ICU。第三天，她开始咳嗽并出现呼吸性低氧血症，胸部CT显示双侧弥漫性玻璃样密度增高影（a）。假定诊断为肺孢子菌肺炎（PJP），通过BAL直接染色检查和PCR检测均呈阳性确诊。她接受了TMP-SMX治疗以同时治疗PJP和脑弓形虫病。经过一周的适当医疗治疗后，患者病情好转并出院继续护理。一个月后，因呼吸衰竭和乳酸水平升高再次入ICU。呼吸道分泌物和胃液培养均为结核菌阴性。其他微生物学检查（包括对其他常见机会性病原体的血清学检测）也呈阴性。她重复胸部CT检查，肺部密度增高明显恶化，描述为可能的急性呼吸窘迫综合征/或医院感染。尽管给予皮质类固醇和高流量氧疗（HFOT），临床未见改善，因此进行了气管插管、再次进行支气管纤维镜检查并开始使用广谱抗生素。患者出现脓毒性休克和难治性低氧血症，并被置于VV-ECMO上。BAL间接免疫荧光检测呈肺孢子菌阳性。她完成了21天的PJP治疗和7天的哌拉西林-他唑巴坦治疗，呼吸功能有所改善。在体外膜氧合（ECMO）停止使用12天后，持续发热和炎症标志物升高，并从呼吸道分泌物中分离出多重耐药铜绿假单胞菌。胸部X光片证实了院内获得性肺炎。她开始接受针对抗生素治疗，使用头孢吡肟，临床、生化和影像学反应良好。大约一周后，她拔除气管插管并迅速脱离呼吸支持，无需氧气补充。她的病情演变可以在b图中看到。她在ICU住院一个月后因肌肉康复而出院，并已开始抗逆转录病毒治疗且无急性感染并发症。

metadata.original_text: A 53-year-old woman, with no relevant medical history so far, was brought to the ER due to a two-month history of progressive psychomotor slowness and confusion, which had worsened in the week before. At physical examination, she was agitated and febrile. Head CT scan showed some intra-axial lesions in the left frontal and temporal lobes. The cerebral spinal fluid (CSF) had mild pleocytosis and moderately elevated proteins. The serology for HIV was positive, and the nucleic acid test of the CSF was positive for toxoplasma gondii. She was admitted in the ICU with a de novo diagnosis of HIV infection, with severe immunosuppression (CD4+ count 28 cells/mm3), clinically manifested as cerebral toxoplasmosis. On day 3, she began coughing, with respiratory hypoxemic insufficiency and bilateral diffuse glass opacities on chest-CT scan (a). The presumptive diagnosis of PJP was posteriorly confirmed with both direct dye-examination and PCR positive for P. jirovecii in BAL. She was treated with TMP-SMX for both PJP and cerebral toxoplasmosis. Following one week of appropriate medical treatment, the patient had a favorable response, and was discharged to the ward for further care. At the end of the month, she was readmitted to the ICU because of respiratory failure and elevated lactate. Respiratory secretions and gastric aspirate were both negative for tuberculosis. Other microbiology tests (including blood serologies for other common opportunistic agents) were also negative. She repeated chest-CT, and had severe deterioration in the lung opacities, with bilateral consolidation described as possible ARDS and/or nosocomial infection. As she showed no signs of clinical improvement despite corticosteroids and High Flow Oxygen Therapy (HFOT), she was intubated, had a repeat bronchofibroscopy and started broad spectrum antibiotics. The patient developed septic shock and ARDS with refractory hypoxemia and she was put on VV-ECMO. The indirect immunofluorescence was positive for P. jirovecii in BAL. She completed 21 days of treatment for PJP and 7 days of piperacillin- tazobactam, with respiratory improvement. ECMO was stopped after 12 days. Persistent fever and elevated inflammatory markers ensued, with isolation of multidrug-resistant Pseudomonas aeruginosa in respiratory secretions. Chest X-ray confirmed lobar nosocomial pneumonia. She started a targeted antibiotic course with cefepime, with good clinical, analytical, and radiological response. Roughly one week later, she was extubated to non-mechanical ventilation, and rapidly weaned off respiratory support to no oxygen supplementation. The evolution in her condition can be seen at the images in b. She was discharged to the ward after one month of ICU stay for muscular rehabilitation, already on antiretroviral therapy and free of acute infectious complications.

title: pmc-8701217-4
text:
病例标题：pmc-8701217-4
病例摘要：一名36岁男性患者，患有HIV感染（诊断于2009年），体重超标，并且在入院前的三个月内未遵守预约并且完全停止了抗逆转录病毒治疗（ART）。该患者因持续三周加重的咳嗽、呼吸困难和发热症状前往急诊科就诊。初步评估显示低氧血症，体温39°C，CRP升高，CD4+淋巴细胞计数为6/mm³，并且胸腔CT扫描显示有多处磨玻璃样阴影（a）。他接受了推荐剂量的磺胺甲噁唑-甲氧苄啶联合皮质类固醇的经验性治疗，并被收治入院。接下来几个小时内，需要吸氧支持的需求增加，患者对高流量氧气疗法反应不佳。24小时后，该患者转入ICU并开始使用VV-ECMO（体外膜肺氧合），但未进行气管插管。通过BAL（支气管肺泡灌洗）免疫荧光检测确认了肺孢子菌肺炎（PJP）。在ECMO支持治疗9天后，患者出现谵妄和烦躁不安的症状，这导致体外循环回路中的流速问题，并最终需要使用镇静剂并进行气管插管。他接受了21天的初始磺胺甲噁唑-甲氧苄啶治疗，随后因血液学毒性改为阿托伐醌联合普马喹治疗。ECMO支持维持了26天。在重症监护室停留37天后，患者被转至病房进行康复，并且已经在接受抗逆转录病毒治疗（ART）。随访CT扫描结果见b。所有四名患者均作为我们传染病项目的一部分进行跟踪和定期观察，并且功能和影像学上均已恢复，患者的特征及其演变总结见。

metadata.original_text: A 36-year-old male, overweight and with HIV infection diagnosed in 2009, with poor adherence to appointments and complete discontinuation of ART in the three months before admission. The patient presented at the ER with a 3-week history of worsening cough, dyspnea, and fever. Initial assessment showed hypoxia, fever (39 °C), elevated CRP, 6 CD4+ lymphocytes/mm3 and several ground glass opacities on thoracic CT-scan (a). He started empirical treatment with TMP-SMX plus corticosteroids at the recommended PJP treatment dosage and was admitted to the ward. The need for oxygen support increased in the next few hours and the patient responded poorly to HFOT. Twenty-four hours later he was admitted to the ICU and VV-ECMO was started. No tracheal intubation was performed. PJP was confirmed by positive immunofluorescence in BAL. After 9 days of ECMO support the patient became delirious and agitated, which caused flow problems in the extracorporeal circuit and eventually led to the need for sedation and subsequent intubation. He completed 21 days of treatment, initially with TMP-SMX, then changed to atovaquone plus primaquine due to hematologic toxicity. ECMO support was maintained for 26 days. He was transferred to the ward for rehabilitation after 37 days of ICU stay, and already on ART. The follow-up CT-scan can be seen in b. All four patients are being followed and regularly observed as part of our Infectious Diseases program and are functional and radiologically recovered, a summary of the patients’ characteristics and evolution is presented in .

title: pmc-8701381-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-8701381-1
病例摘要：病史：一名52岁白人男性囚犯，有非甾体抗炎药（NSAIDs）治疗和依那普利治疗高血压的病史。因无出汗反复出现心动过缓，并伴有前一晚呕血及三天前的黑便而被紧急送入急诊室。患者心肺功能不稳定，急性贫血。入院时血红蛋白值为6g/dL，血液中的降钙素原未进行评估。因此进行了腹部计算机断层扫描（CT），结果显示十二指肠第二部分管腔狭窄；进一步的食管胃十二指肠镜检查（EGDS）显示胃内有多发小于1cm淋巴结形成，由于充气导致胃壁正常扩张，胃底和胃体被食物残渣和血块占据；在第一段十二指肠水平处有溃疡病变覆盖着大量血块。病情恶化后，患者被转至重症监护室，进行了插管并接受了恢复心肺功能的治疗。第五天时，心肺功能不稳定且贫血持续存在。在复苏过程中进行了紧急胃镜检查，结果显示食道、胃和十二指肠内无出血，但十二指肠球部有溃疡性病变并向肠壁环形扩展。病情因低血容量常见并发症而加剧。由于肠虫病引起的出血性休克和腹膜炎被评估为死亡原因。在72小时后，根据欧洲理事会部长委员会关于法医尸检规则协调的建议（1999年）及突然心脏骤停（SCD）的一般公认标准进行了尸检。股动脉血液通过顶空气相色谱-火焰离子化检测器联用技术（GC/HS-FID）分析了酒精（乙醇）和挥发性物质。所有死后标本均使用免疫学或色谱法方法筛查了主要的不同类别的药物（处方药和非法药物）。通过LC-MS/MS系统（API 3200三重四极杆ABI-SCIEX）在多重反应监测模式下进行了系统的毒理学分析（STA）.

metadata.original_text: Case History: A 52-year-old white male inmate with a history of non-steroidal anti-inflammatory drugs (NSAIDs) therapy and enalapril therapy for hypertension was admitted to the emergency room for repeated lipothymia in the absence of sweating, with hematemesis from the previous evening and melaena from three days before. The patient was hemodynamically unstable with acute anemia. The hemoglobin value upon admission was 6g/dL, while the procalcitonin in the blood was not evaluated. Therefore, a computed tomography (CT) scan of the abdomen was performed, which revealed a narrow lumen of the second portion of the duodenum; furthermore, the esophagus-gastro-duodenoscopy (EGDS) examination revealed multiple sub-centimeter lymph node formations in the stomach with normodistended walls due to insufflation, and fundus and gastric bodies occupied by food residues and clots; at the level of the first duodenum, there was an ulcerated lesion covered by a large clot. After a worsening of the condition, the patient was transferred to Intensive Care, was intubated and underwent therapy to restore hemodynamic balance. On the fifth day, the hemodynamics were unstable, and the anemia persisted. An emergency gastroscopy was performed in resuscitation, which revealed the absence of blood in the esophagus, stomach, and duodenum, and ulcerative lesion of the duodenal bulb with circumferential extension to the intestinal wall. Conditions precipitated due to common complications of hypovolemia. Hemorrhagic shock and peritonitis due to enterobiasis were assessed as causes of death. After 72 h, an autopsy was performed in accordance with the recommendations on the harmonization of forensic autopsy rules of the Committee of Ministers of the Council of Europe (1999) and according to the commonly accepted criteria for sudden cardiac death (SCD). Femoral blood was analyzed for alcohol (ethanol) and volatiles by head-space gas chromatography coupled with a flame ionization detector (GC/HS-FID). All post-mortem specimens were screened for the presence of the main different classes of drugs (pharmaceuticals and illegal drugs), using immunological or chromatographic methods as appropriate. A systematic toxicological analysis (STA) was performed by the LC-MS/MS system (API 3200 triple quadrupole ABI-SCIEX) in multiple reaction monitoring (MRM) mode.

title: pmc-8701660-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-8701660-1
病例摘要：一名九天大的男婴因发热和一般状况不佳被送入我院。妊娠期间曾出现流产威胁及胎盘早剥的并发症。该婴儿于孕36周+1天通过自发分娩出生。围产期卡托图监测结果为阴性。新生儿血气分析、心肺适应情况正常，一分钟和五分钟Apgar评分分别为7分和8分。出生体重为2950克。随后的早期新生儿期内出现暂时性低血糖；新生儿临床评估结果正常，生后体重减轻在正常范围内（<10%），并于第四天出院。母亲入产科病房时SARS-CoV-2检测结果为阴性，在出院时转为阳性，但无任何症状。第九天，婴儿出现发热（38°C）和食欲不振。鼻咽拭子通过定量实时PCR（AllplexTM SARS-CoV-2 Assay, Seegene）检测SARS-CoV-2呈阳性；因此被送入我们的COVID-19中心。随后24小时内，他出现了进行性呼吸衰竭和腹泻伴肠出血，并转入PICU。腹部X光检查和超声检查排除了肠扭转或坏死性小肠结肠炎的疑虑；心脏超声和心电图结果正常，尽管N末端脑钠肽前体（NT-proBNP）和肌钙蛋白T（TnT）水平升高。婴儿接受了无创通气支持，并开始使用广谱抗生素治疗（氨苄西林、庆大霉素和甲硝唑）。随后几天内，神经状况恶化，表现为意识障碍和病理性自主运动，同时观察到呼吸衰竭加重，导致第三天进行插管和机械通气。胸部X光片和CT扫描显示双侧间质性肺炎的影像学表现，并伴有基底部位广泛的萎陷区。鼻咽拭子（NPS）和支气管肺泡灌洗液（BAL）中SARS-CoV-2病毒载量通过定量实时PCR（Quanty COVID-19 assay, Clonit Srl, 米兰，意大利）评估，在入院时发现高病毒载量。通过实时PCR单核苷酸多态性（SNP）检测方法（COVID-19 Variant Catcher, Clonit Srl, 米兰，意大利, CE IVD）确定了SARS-CoV-2变种，检出N501Y突变和HV69-70缺失，提示为202012/01谱系B.1.1.7变异株（也称为英国变异株）。因此，在第三天和第四天开始使用针对SARS-CoV-2的免疫血浆治疗，并给予地塞米松0.15 mg/kg/die及瑞德西韦，第5天给药2.5 mg/kg，随后9天内每天给药1.25 mg/kg。由于神经功能受损，在第三天进行了腰椎穿刺检查，结果正常，微生物学检测包括SARS-CoV-2均为阴性。血液和脑脊液的代谢测试均正常。免疫筛查未见异常。脑电图显示低电压脑电活动，并伴有不连续模式；未记录到电图或临床发作。头部CT扫描结果正常；MRI检查发现深髓静脉血栓形成，伴随深室周白质（扇形配置）的细胞毒性水肿（, 和 ），因此开始使用依诺肝素100 UI/kg q 12治疗。临床状况逐渐改善；经过十三天后婴儿拔管，并在四天后成为无氧依赖者，能够通过母乳喂养，神经学和脑电图有所改善。扩展的高凝筛查包括同型半胱氨酸、抗心磷脂抗体、抗磷脂抗体、抗β2-糖蛋白抗体、蛋白S、蛋白C、活化蛋白C抵抗、狼疮抗凝物、因子XIII、von Willebrand因子抗原、Factor V Leiden（G1691A）突变、因子II凝血酶原（G20210A）、MTHFR（C677T）突变均正常。CFTR基因检测结果正常。

metadata.original_text: A nine day old male newborn was admitted to our hospital due to fever and poor general condition. The pregnancy was complicated by threatened miscarriage and placental abruption. He was born at 36 weeks + 1 day of GA by spontaneous delivery. Perinatal cardiotocographic monitoring was negative. Neonate blood gas analyses and cardiorespiratory adaption were normal, and the Apgar score was 7 and 8 at 1′ and 5′ minutes, respectively. Birth weight was 2950 g. The subsequent early postnatal period was complicated by transient hypoglycemia; neonatal clinical assessment was normal, postnatal weight loss was within normality range (<10%), and the neonate was discharged on the fourth day of life. The mother was tested for SARS-CoV-2 at admission in the obstetric ward with a negative result and a positive result at discharge, without any symptoms. At day nine, the baby developed fever (38 °C) and poor feeding. The nasopharyngeal swab, tested for SARS-CoV-2 by qualitative realtime PCR (AllplexTM SARS-CoV-2 Assay, Seegene), was positive; thus, he was admitted to our COVID-19 center. In the subsequent 24 h, he developed progressive respiratory failure and diarrhea with enterorrhagia and was admitted to the PICU. Surgical evaluation with abdominal X-ray and ultrasound excluded the suspicion of volvulus or necrotizing enterocolitis; echocardiography and electrocardiogram were normal although the N-terminal prohormone of brain natriuretic peptide (NT-proBNP) and Troponin T (TnT) were elevated (). The baby was supported with noninvasive ventilation, and treatment with antibiotic wide coverage (ampicillin plus gentamycin plus metronidazole) was started. In the subsequent days, the neurological condition deteriorated with impaired consciousness and pathological spontaneous motricity, and we observed worsening of respiratory failure leading to intubation and mechanical ventilation on day three. The chest radiograph and CT scan showed a picture of bilateral interstitial pneumonia with an extensive area of atelectasis in the basal site. On the nasopharyngeal swabs (NPS) and bronchoalveolar lavage (BAL), SARS-CoV-2 viral load was assessed by quantitative realtime PCR (Quanty COVID-19 assay, Clonit Srl, Milan, Italy), revealing a high viral load at admission (). SARS-CoV-2 variant determination was performed by realtime PCR single-nucleotide-polymorphism (SNP) detection approach (COVID-19 Variant Catcher, Clonit Srl, Milan, Italy, CE IVD). N501Y mutation and HV69-70 deletion, suggesting VOC 202012/01 Lineage B.1.1.7 variant (also known as UK variant), were detected. Thus, we started anti SARS-CoV-2 hyperimmune plasma day three and four, plus dexamethasone 0.15 mg/kg/die and remdesivir 2.5 mg/kg day 5 and 1.25 mg/kg for nine more days. Because of the neurological impairment, a lumbar puncture was performed and was normal, with negative microbiological results including SARS-CoV-2. The metabolic test on blood and liquor were normal. Immunological screening showed no abnormalities. The EEG showed hypovolted brain electrical activity with a discontinuous pattern; no electrographic or electroclinical seizure was recorded. The cerebral CT scan was normal; the brain MRI showed deep medullary vein thrombosis associated with cytotoxic edema in the deep periventricular white matter (fan-shaped configuration) (, and ), thus, treatment with enoxaparin 100 UI/kg q 12 was started. The clinical condition progressively improved; after thirteen days the baby was extubated and in four more days became oxygen independent, able to feed on the breast, with neurological and EEG improvement. Extended thrombophilic screening including homocysteine, anticardiolipin antibodies, antiphospholipid antibodies, anti-beta-2-glycoprotein antibodies, protein S, protein C, activated protein C resistance, lupus anticoagulant, factor XIII, von Willebrand factor antigen, Factor V Leyden (G1691A) mutation, factor II prothrombin (G20210A), MTHFR (C677T) mutation all were normal. Genetic investigation of CFTR (Cystic Fibrosis Transmembrane conductance Regulator) showed normal results.

title: pmc-8701878-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-8701878-1
病例摘要：一名5岁男孩，经分子诊断确诊为DMD，因智力障碍、自闭症谱系障碍、关节过度松弛和形态发生异常被转诊进行进一步临床评估。其母亲报告称，该男孩有癫痫史，表现为强直-阵挛发作、光敏感性以及在体力活动后血清肌酸磷酸激酶（CPK）水平中度升高。他由非近亲父母在双胎妊娠中出生，为单卵双生子之一，在35周时因双胎妊娠接受剖宫产手术。他的出生体重为2080克（第50百分位），Apgar评分为81和95分。在他一岁初时，家长对其有了一些担忧。早期就观察到缺乏眼神交流、视觉追踪和社会兴趣，并伴有里程碑延迟。他3个月大时获得了头部控制，直到14个月大才在无支撑的情况下学会翻身和坐立；4岁时独立行走。脑电图显示前额叶和左侧颞叶的局部棘波以及睡眠中的全面棘慢复合波，但没有明显的癫痫发作。脑部MRI结果正常。在检测到CPK水平升高（13,000 UI/L）和肝酶水平升高（AST 272 U/L、ALT 388 U/L）后，怀疑其患有肌营养不良，并进行了 dystrophin 基因的遗传分析。通过MLPA检测到基因内46-51外显子缺失，符合DMD诊断。母亲被发现为杂合子携带者，这与她CPK水平升高的情况相符。在5岁时评估时，该男孩表现出严重的发育迟缓和自闭症特征，包括缺乏眼神交流、无原型指示性指向、注意力缺陷以及社交-沟通能力不足。他无法遵循简单的指令，认知测试无法完成。关节过度松弛和特殊的面部特征被注意到，包括高额头、眼睑褶皱、深陷的眼睛、长脸型和大耳朵。尽管DMD患者中认知障碍和神经行为异常的发病率较高，但该患者的整个临床表型——特别是运动迟缓与严重智力障碍及自闭症谱系障碍的结合以及独特的面部畸形——使我们推测可能存在另一种遗传条件的共病，即脆性X综合征（FXS）。在进行阵列-CGH分析未发现其他CNV异常后，进行了FMR1分子分析。他被发现是携带一个大前突变（PM）和200个CGG三联体扩增的镶嵌体携带者，并且其无症状的母亲为杂合子携带者，带有正常等位基因（20 CGGs）和前突变等位基因（80个三联体）。该男孩目前正在进行康复计划，显示出轻微的进步，尤其是在运动技能方面。

metadata.original_text: A 5-year-old boy with a molecularly confirmed diagnosis of DMD was referred for further clinical evaluation because of ID, ASD, joint hyperlaxity, and morphogenetic anomalies. A history of epilepsy with tonic–clonic seizures, photosensitivity, and moderate elevation in serum creatinine phosphokinase (CPK) levels following physical exercise was reported in his mother. He was born from non-consanguineous parents after an uneventful dizygotic twin pregnancy. A cesarean section was performed at 35 weeks of gestation due to a twin pregnancy. His birth weight was 2080 g (50th centile), and his Apgar scores were 81 and 95. His parents reported initial concerns during the child’s first year of life. A lack of eye contact, visual tracking, and social interest were noted from early on, associated with delayed milestones. He reached head control at 3 months and could not roll over and sit up without support till the age of 14 months; he walked independently at 4 years of age. On EEG, focal spikes over the frontal region and the left temporal region and generalized spike-and-wave complexes during sleep were detected in the absence of overt epilepsy. A brain MRI showed normal results. Following the detection of an increased CPK level (13,000 UI/L) and elevated liver enzymes (AST 272 U/L, ALT 388 U/L), muscular dystrophy was suspected at the age of 4 years and the child underwent the genetic analysis of the dystrophin gene. The deletion of exons 46-51 of the gene was detected through MLPA, consistent with the diagnosis of DMD. The mother was found to be a heterozygous carrier, as expected from her increased CPK level. When evaluated at the age of 5 years, the child presented with severe developmental delays and autistic features, including poor eye contact, the absence of protodeclarative pointing, attention deficit, and inadequate social-communicative abilities. He could not follow simple instructions and a cognitive test could not be performed. Joint hyperlaxity and peculiar facial traits were noted, including a high forehead, epicanthic folds, deep-set eyes, an elongated face, and large ears. Notwithstanding the reported high rate of cognitive impairment and neurobehavioral abnormalities in DMD, the complexity of the whole clinical phenotype of our patient—in particular, the association of motor delay and severe ID with ASD and the distinctive facial dysmorphisms—led us to hypothesize comorbidity with an additional genetic condition, namely, with FXS. Following array-CGH analysis, which detected no additional CNVs, except for the deletion formerly identified in the dystrophin gene, the child underwent FMR1 molecular analysis. He was found to be a mosaic carrier of a large premutation (PM) with 170 CGGs and of an MFM with an expansion above 200 CGG triplets, confirming the clinical hypothesis of FXS (). His unaffected mother was heterozygous for a normal allele with 20 CGGs and a premutation allele with 80 triplets. The boy is currently receiving a rehabilitation program with slight improvement shown, especially in his motor skills.

title: pmc-8701878-2
text:
病例标题：pmc-8701878-2
病例摘要：这名7岁女孩是非近亲结婚的父母唯一的子女。她通过紧急剖宫产于妊娠39周出生，原因是母亲胎膜早破（PROM）。出生时，她出现呼吸窘迫，Apgar评分为51和85分。她的出生体重为3550克（第75百分位），身长为53厘米（第90百分位），头围为36.5厘米（约第98百分位）。出生后不久，她出现了自发的手上肢震颤、轴性肌张力低下和呼吸暂停症状，分别通过苯巴比妥和氧气治疗。脑超声检查和MRI结果均正常。EEG显示持续活动，右侧颞顶区偶尔出现尖锐成分。听力和眼底检查结果均正常。她在3.5个月时获得了头部控制能力，在10个月时坐稳，并在15个月时能够非自主站立。至15个月大时，她表现出粗握物体的困难。语言发展迟缓，仅在13个月时有少量词汇。伴随运动发育迟缓的是头围增大：直到4个月大时，头围处于第98百分位，从8到10个月时则远超第98百分位。体格检查显示前额宽而圆、鼻小且鞍状根部和鼻孔向前倾斜、内眦赘皮、眉弓中部稀疏、胎儿指垫、韧带过度松弛以及足趾间距增宽（脚跟突出）。在4岁5个月大的临床评估中，这名小女孩仅能发出少数简单的词语，行走时步态宽大且缺乏括约肌控制。直接核苷酸测序分析未发现以下基因的异常：lamin A/C、SEPN1、NFIX、EZH2、NSD1、SETD2、COL6A1、COL6A2和COL6A3。阵列-CGH检测到一个大约200kb的“可能良性”9q21.31重复，未在2021年1月18日和2021年1月18日访问时发现相关基因。父母双方的起源未进行调查。脆性X综合征（FXS）的分子分析显示杂合子正常等位基因含有29个CGG重复序列，以及一系列扩增等位基因在PM和FM范围内（73至>200个CGGs）。在确定了这名患者的FXS诊断后，对其父母进行了检查：其父亲携带29个CGG等位基因，而其母亲则有一个正常等位基因含有23个三联体以及一个PM为121-131个CGG三联体。由于脆性X综合征的诊断无法解释患者的全部临床表现，因此进行了三重WES检测，并在患者中发现了PPP2R5D基因（NM_006245.3）的一个新发杂合变异c.592G>A p.(Glu198Lys)。该变异已在HGMD（人类基因突变数据库；CM153575）[]中报道，从未在GnomAD（基因组聚合数据库）中出现。此前，该变异曾在患有轻度至重度智力障碍的患者中被新发报告过[,].

metadata.original_text: This 7-year-old girl is the only child of non-consanguineous parents. She was born at 39 weeks of gestational age via an urgent cesarean section due to maternal premature rupture of the membranes (PROM). At birth, she presented respiratory distress and her Apgar scores were 51 and 85. Her birth weight was 3550 g (75th centile), her length was 53 cm (90th centile), and her OFC 36.5 cm (around 98th centile). Soon after birth, she developed spontaneous tremors of the upper limbs, axial hypotonia, and apnea episodes treated with phenobarbital and oxygen, respectively. A brain ultrasound and MRI were normal. EEG displayed continuous activity, with occasional sharp elements in the right temporo-occipital area. Audiometric and fundus oculi examinations were both normal. She reached head control at 3.5 months, sitting position at 10 months, and non-autonomous standing station at 15 months. Up to 15 months, she presented difficulties in handling objects with coarse grip. Language was poor with very few words developed at 13 months. Psychomotor delay was accompanied by macrocephaly: until 4 months of age, OFC was at the 98th centile and from 8 to 10 months it was abundantly above the 98th centile. Upon physical examination, she presented with a broad and rounded forehead, a small nose with saddle root and anteverted nostrils, a reverse epicanthus, sparse eyebrows in the medial portion, fetal finger pads, ligamentous hyperlaxity, and a sandal gap with prominent heel (). Upon clinical evaluation performed at 4 years and 5 months of age, the young girl pronounced few simple words, walked with a broad-based gait and showed a lack of sphincter control. Negative results came from the direct nucleotide sequencing analysis of the following genes: lamin A/C, SEPN1, NFIX, EZH2, NSD1, SETD2, COL6A1, COL6A2, and COL6A3. Array-CGH revealed a “likely benign” 9q21.31 duplication of approximately 200 kb, with no associated genes accessed on 18 January 2021 and accessed on 18 January 2021). Parental origin was not investigated. Molecular analysis for FXS revealed heterozygosity for a normal allele of 29 CGG repeats and a series of expanded alleles in the range of PM and FM (between 73 and >200 CGGs). After the diagnosis of FXS in the proband was established, the parents were also examined with the following results: her father carried the 29 CGG allele, while her mother had a normal allele of 23 triplets and a PM of 121–131 CGG triplets. As the diagnosis of fragile X syndrome could not explain all the clinical findings of the proband, a trio WES was undertaken and revealed the presence in the proband of a de novo heterozygous variant c.592G>A p.(Glu198Lys) in the PPP2R5D gene (NM_006245.3). This variant is reported in HGMD (Human Gene Mutation Database; CM153575) [] and never in GnomAD (Genome Aggregation Database). The same variant was previously reported de novo in patients affected by moderate/severe ID [,].

title: pmc-8701878-3
text:
病例标题：pmc-8701878-3
病例摘要：患者3是一位33岁的男性，其父母为非近亲。他2岁时开始走路并说出第一个单词。他在10岁那年首次出现癫痫发作，并在22岁时因严重的癫痫发作危机导致昏迷。脑血管MRI显示颞叶内侧硬化、左侧A1段缺失，左前椎动脉起源于右侧环状体，大脑半球室管膜系统不对称，右三角区占优势，以及枕角。他目前仍在接受抗癫痫治疗，使用丙戊酸钠、奥卡西平和托吡酯。他的性格平静，由于服用抗癫痫药物偶尔会有紧张抽搐。目前他在日间中心参加体育（柔道）和休闲活动（舞蹈）。家族史显示还有两位男性患者（均为姨表兄弟的儿子），患有原因不明的智力障碍。体格检查发现面部细长、前额高、耳廓宽且向前倾斜、人中长而扁平、面中部发育不良、关节过度松弛和肌张力低下。进行了FMR1基因的分子分析和阵列CGH检测，结果显示FMR1基因存在一个突变等位基因（>200 CGGs）（A）。根据这一结果，对其母亲进行检测发现她携带一个正常等位基因30个CGG三联体和一个PM等位基因79个CGGs。她在39岁时进入更年期，并在50岁时自发性地发生了股骨骨折。计算机骨矿密度测定显示严重骨质疏松。其母亲没有癫痫发作史。患者的妹妹携带FMR1基因的PM等位基因，她有一个未受影响的女儿和一个患有脆性X综合征的儿子。此外，阵列CGH检测发现2号染色体p25.3区段缺失约500kb，该缺失来自他的半突变母亲（B）。在2号染色体上的缺失区域包括位置1,145,059至1,670,349之间的基因SNTG2、TPO和PXDN，可能还包括MYT1L。由于没有在这一最后位点的44K分辨率阵列中发现特异性探针。考虑到MYT1L基因与智力障碍和癫痫的关系以及患者临床表现伴有严重抽搐，我们对患者的母亲及其进行了实时PCR检测以验证2号染色体微缺失的位置效应是否影响MYT1L转录本水平。结果显示，患者的MYT1L转录本水平低于其母亲及正常对照组（C）.

metadata.original_text: Patient 3 is a 33-year-old man who is the second child of non-consanguineous parents. He started walking and saying his first words at the age of 2. At the age of 10 years he suffered his first seizure episodes and when he was 22 years old he had a coma episode following a severe seizure crisis. Brain angio-MRI showed temporo-mesial sclerosis, left A1 segment agenesis with origin of the left anterior vertebral artery from the right circle, asymmetry of the supratentorial ventricular system due to the prevalence of the right trigone, and an occipital horn. He is currently still undergoing anticonvulsive treatment with valproic acid, oxcarbazepine, and topiramate. His character is calm, with a few nervous jerks (due to seizure medication). Presently, he attends a day center and practices sport (judo) and recreational activities (dancing). Family history revealed two further male patients (both sons of a maternal cousin) affected by ID of an unknown cause and diagnosis. Physical examination showed an elongated face, high forehead, wide and anteverted ears, a long and flat philtrum, midface hypoplasia, joint hyperlaxity, and hypotonia. A molecular analysis of the FMR1 gene and array-CGH were performed, revealing an FMR1 MFM allele (>200 CGGs) (A). Following this result, his mother was tested and found to be heterozygous for a normal allele of 30 CGG triplets and a PM allele with 79 CGGs. She underwent menopause at 39 years and had a spontaneous fracture of the femur at 50 years. Computerized bone mineralometry showed severe osteoporosis. No history of seizures was reported in the mother. The proband’s sister was found to carry a PM of the FMR1 gene and she had a first unaffected daughter and a second son affected by FXS. Additionally, array-CGH revealed a chromosome 2p25.3 deletion spanning around 500 kb, again derived from his premutated mother (B). The deleted region on chromosome 2 was included between positions 1,145,059 and 1,670,349 (according to Genome Browser Assembly hg19, GRCh37, February 2009) and encompasses the SNTG2, TPO, and PXDN genes, and possibly MYT1L. There were no specific probes in this last locus at the 44 K resolution of the employed array. Due to the association of the MYT1L gene with ID and seizures and since the clinical presentation of the proband was complicated by severe convulsions, we quantified the MYT1L transcript levels in the proband and his mother in order to verify if there was a “positional effect” of the microdeletion on chromosome 2. The results of real-time PCR revealed a decreased level of MYT1L transcript in the proband when compared to his mother and neurotypical controls (C).

title: pmc-8701891-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-8701891-1
病例摘要：一名59岁的立陶宛男性因认知功能下降持续2至3年，并在过去三天内恶化而就诊。患者无法完成一些日常生活中的简单任务，失去了以往的兴趣爱好。尽管如此，他仍保持了一定的独立性，如能够自行去超市购物和做家务。既往病史包括高脂血症、动脉高血压以及36岁时发生的一次轻度右侧偏瘫的中风事件。他还经历了几次失语症发作，可以考虑为短暂性脑缺血发作（TIAs）。患者有长期吸烟史。他足月顺产且健康出生；其父母、四个兄弟姐妹和两个子女没有相关健康问题，也没有发现家族遗传性疾病。神经系统检查显示轻度双侧意向性震颤，精神状态检查揭示执行功能障碍和显著的认知减退。简易智能状态检查量表（MMSE）评分为25分，前额叶评估电池（FAB）评分为5分，一分钟内语音流畅性（以P开头的单词）得分为4分，一分钟内语义流畅性（动物名称）得分为3分。实验室血液检测显示显著高脂血症（总胆固醇水平—7.55 mmol/L，低密度脂蛋白水平—5.82 mmol/L）。脑脊液分析无异常发现。颈动脉超声检查显示双侧内、外颈动脉轻度狭窄。磁共振成像（MRI）显示交通性脑积水，最可能是由于大脑萎缩和继发性脑部变化引起，没有明显的梗阻原因（Huckman指数等于66；第三脑室宽度等于10 mm），以及广泛的白质病变，Fazekas评分2-3级，在桥脑背侧、双侧丘脑和右侧小脑半球出现腔隙性病灶。由于患者早期发病并逐渐进展为进行性痴呆，年轻时发生过中风，并有多次短暂性脑缺血发作（TIAs），且脑MRI显示广泛的白质病变，进行了下一代测序遗传学检测以筛查遗传性大脑小血管疾病。随访期间，在60岁时开始出现阳性精神症状（幻觉、妄想、焦虑），需要多次住院治疗。认知功能从基线MMSE评分为25分恶化至3年内降至14分，并逐渐完全依赖日常生活。他在62岁时还出现了尿失禁和大便失禁以及步态失用症。同时，脑MRI显示发现进展：交通性脑积水和白质病变随时间进展（Huckman指数等于82，第三脑室宽度等于11 mm，Fazekas评分3级），并出现新的腔隙性缺血病灶和含铁血黄素沉积。

metadata.original_text: A 59-year-old Lithuanian male presented to our department due to deterioration of cognitive functions that had been observed for 2–3 years and gotten worse over the past three days. The patient could not perform some simple tasks in everyday life and lost his previous interests. He maintained some independence though, such as being able to go to the supermarket and do housework unsupervised. Past medical history was significant for dyslipidaemia, arterial hypertension, and stroke at the age of 36 with mild right hemiparesis. He also experienced several episodes of aphasia, which could be considered as transient ischemic attacks (TIAs). The patient had a history of smoking for a long time. He was born full-term and healthy; his parents, four siblings, and two offspring did not have any relevant health problems and no hereditary diseases were identified among family members. On neurological examination, mild bilateral dysmetria was observed and the mental examination revealed executive dysfunction and pronounced cognitive slowing. Mini–Mental State Examination (MMSE) score was 25, Frontal Assessment Battery (FAB) score was 5, phonemic fluency (words beginning with P) was 4 in one minute, and semantic fluency (animals) was 3 in one minute. Laboratory blood tests revealed significant dyslipidaemia (total cholesterol level—7.55 mmol/L, low-density lipoprotein level—5.82 mmol/L). Cerebrospinal fluid analysis was unremarkable. Low grade bilateral internal and external carotid artery stenosis was detected on carotid ultrasound. Brain magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) revealed communicating hydrocephalus, most likely due to brain atrophy and secondary brain changes, with no obvious cause of obstruction in the ventricles (Huckman index was equal to 66; the width of the third ventricle was equal to 10 mm), and extensive leukoencephalopathy, Fazekas scale score 2–3, lacunar lesions in the dorsal part of pons, thalamus bilaterally, and right cerebellar hemisphere (). Since the patient developed early onset progressive dementia, had a stroke at a young age, several TIAs, and brain MRI was significant for extensive leukoencephalopathy, genetic testing by next generation sequencing for inherited cerebral small vessel disease was performed. On follow-up, the patient began manifesting positive psychiatric symptoms (hallucinations, delusions, anxiety) at the age of 60 that required several hospitalisations to the psychiatric ward. Cognitive functions further deteriorated from baseline MMSE score of 25 to 14 in 3 years, and the patient gradually became fully dependent in daily life. He also developed bladder and bowel incontinence and gait apraxia at the age of 62. In parallel, brain MRI showed evolution of findings: communicating hydrocephalus and leukoencephalopathy were progressing over time (HI was equal to 82, the width of the third ventricle was equal to 11 mm, Fazekas scale score 3), and new lacunar ischemic lesions and hemosiderin deposits appeared ().

title: pmc-8702017-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-8702017-1
病例摘要：患者 2.II.1（右侧）是一名34岁男性，被诊断时发现血清铁蛋白水平升高（但<1000 µg/L），同时伴有血清铁水平升高。此外，他还患有促性腺激素缺乏性性腺功能减退症，并接受睾酮治疗，且有中度肝脂肪变性。如预期的那样，在一种铁过载疾病中，该患者的血清转铁蛋白饱和度较低（0.1919 ng/mL）。一年后，血清铁蛋白水平达到3942 µg/L。磁共振成像未显示心脏铁过载的证据，而肝脏则显示出增加的铁浓度为47 µmol/g，提示肝铁过载（正常值<36 µmol/g）。使用去铁胺作为主要治疗手段。最初，静脉放血与铁螯合剂联合使用，但由于不耐受不得不停止。2020年铁螯合治疗结束时，患者无症状。该患者将继续接受维持疗法。患者 A.II.1 和 A.II.2（上部第一面板）是两名亚洲裔兄弟，分别在35岁和37岁时被诊断为遗传性血色病。两人都表现为血清铁蛋白和铁水平升高，而两者的血清转铁蛋白饱和度分别为0.2395 ng/mL 和 0.0111 ng/mL。肝脏磁共振成像显示严重的肝铁过载（282.97 µmol Fe/g 和 265 µmol Fe/g）。两名患者的治疗方案包括每周静脉放血与铁螯合剂（去铁胺）联合使用。A.II.1 病例在2019年1月开始进行每周一次的静脉放血，并于同年5月开始接受去铁胺治疗。到2021年2月，在进行了100次静脉放血并移除约22克铁后，铁蛋白水平降至正常范围，但转铁蛋白饱和度仍然较高。A.II.2 病例在2017年7月开始每月一次的静脉放血，并于同年1月开始接受去铁胺治疗（初始剂量为每日1080 mg，在2018年5月增加到每日2160 mg）。截至最后可获得的数据（2021年2月），该患者进行了46次静脉放血，共移除9克铁，并导致铁蛋白和转铁蛋白饱和度参数恢复正常。通过最后一次对 A.II.2 患者的肝脏磁共振成像检查确认了铁的减少，显示为中度铁过载（70.33 µmol Fe/g）.

metadata.original_text: Patient 2.II.1 (a right) is a male diagnosed at the age of 34 years old. He presented with high serum ferritin levels (but <1000 µg/L) and high serum iron. In addition, he had hypogonadotropic hypogonadism treated with testosterone and moderate hepatic steatosis. As expected for an iron overload disease, the hepcidin levels of the patient were low (0.1919 ng/mL). One year later, serum ferritin levels peaked to 3942 µg/L. Magnetic resonance shows no evidence of iron overload in the heart while in the liver revealed increased iron concentration of 47 µmol/g indicative of hepatic iron overload (normal values <36 µmol/g). Iron chelation with Desferoxamine was used as the main therapeutic treatment. Initially, phlebotomies were performed in combination with iron chelation but had to be stopped due to intolerance. Iron chelation treatment ended in 2020 and the patient is now asymptomatic. The patient will continue with maintenance therapy. Patients A.II.1 and A.II.2 (b upper first panel) are two male brothers of Asian origin diagnosed with HH at 35 and 37 years old respectively. Both presented with high levels of serum ferritin and iron, while in both patients, the hepcidin levels were 0.2395 and 0.0111 ng/mL respectively. Hepatic magnetic resonance showed a severe hepatic iron overload (282.97 µmol Fe/g and 265 µmol Fe/g). The treatment option for both patients consisted of weekly phlebotomies in combination with iron chelation (Desferoxamine). A.II.1 proband started the phlebotomies in January 2019 (weekly) and the Desferoxamine treatment in May 2019. In February 2021, after 100 phlebotomies and approximately 22 g of iron removal the ferritin levels dropped to normal levels, but transferrin saturation remained high. A.II.2 proband started the phlebotomies in July 2017 (once a month) and the Desferoxamine treatment in January 2018 (initial dose of 1080 mg/day that eventually was increased to 2160 mg/day in May 2018). At the last data available (February 2021), the patient accumulated a total of 46 phlebotomies that removed a total amount of 9 g of iron and resulted in the normalization of ferritin and transferrin saturation parameters. The iron depletion was partially confirmed by the last hepatic magnetic resonance performed to the A.II.2 patient that showed a moderate iron overload (70.33 µmol Fe/g).

title: pmc-8702017-2
text:
病例标题：pmc-8702017-2
病例摘要：患者B.II.1（b上第二面板）是一名46岁男性，于2012年被诊断为血色病，表现为高铁蛋白血症和严重的肝脏铁沉积（300 µmol Fe/g），通过肝部磁共振检查发现。该患者还患有血脂异常和内痔。患者不饮酒，并且自2014年5月起戒烟。基因分析显示，该患者携带HFE基因中的Cys282Tyr突变。由于血色病，患者出现严重的慢性关节病变，包括脚部、脊柱（脊椎关节炎）和手部。最初治疗为每月进行一次红细胞血浆置换术（后来，血浆置换的频率减少至每两个月一次）。2015年1月，开始采用静脉放血作为治疗方法。2017年5月的肝部磁共振检查显示肝脏铁沉积无明显迹象。

metadata.original_text: Patient B.II.1 (b upper second panel) is a male of 46 years old diagnosed in 2012 with hemochromatosis that presented with hyperferritinemia and severe hepatic iron accumulation (300 µmol Fe/g) detected by hepatic magnetic resonance. The patient also suffers from dyslipidemia and internal hemorrhoids. The patient does not consume alcohol and is an ex-smoker as of May 2014. Genetic analysis shows that this patient is a carrier for the Cys282Tyr mutation in the HFE gene. Secondary to the hemochromatosis, the patient presents with severe chronic arthropathy in feet, spine (spondylarthrosis) and hands. The treatment initially was monthly erythroapheresis (later, the rate of erythroapheresis was reduced to once every two months). In January 2015, phlebotomies were introduced as part of the treatment. In May 2017, the hepatic magnetic resonance showed no sign of hepatic iron overload.

title: pmc-8702083-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-8702083-1
病例摘要：一名65岁的女性患者，既往无特殊病史，在意大利罗马“萨皮恩扎”大学 Policlinico Umberto I 口腔外科部门被转诊进行围种植体炎病变的手术重建治疗。该患者已书面详细签署知情同意书，同意接受诊断和治疗方法，并允许使用相关资料进行研究和出版。手术过程包括移除义齿结构、口内及颊侧全厚黏骨膜瓣切开术、表面清创消毒以及使用矿化干燥同种异体骨移植和可吸收膜在非浸润模式下进行引导骨再生（）。在使用小苏打空气粉磨器械（PROPHYflex™ 3 with periotip，KaVo，德国比伯拉赫）对感染种植体表面进行开放瓣清创时，左颊及眶周区域迅速出现肿胀。立即停止手术，并用无菌生理盐水冲洗手术区以清除所有残留的碳酸氢钠颗粒。在重新定位和缝合瓣膜前，进行了口内外检查和触诊面部和颈部，以确定气泡扩散的程度和范围。外侧检查显示面部轻微不对称及完全性左眼睑下垂（），因眶周区域和脸颊肿胀所致。在肿胀区域内可触及捻发音但无压痛。视力、光反射和眼球运动均正常。口内检查未见下颌区肿胀或捻发音，因为空气沿颊肌附着处向上扩散至面部上部和中部松软空间。患者仅诉轻微不适，无疼痛及吞咽、呼吸或言语困难。因此，认为无需进行计算机断层扫描以避免不必要的辐射暴露。根据在气粉清创过程中突然出现的软组织肿胀伴随捻发音而无红斑、水肿、显著疼痛或淋巴结肿大，诊断为皮下气肿。由于缺乏严重并发症的症状和体征，在密切观察下继续治疗。告知患者肿胀应在2-3天内自行减轻，并在7-10天内完全消退且不会出现并发症或后遗症。经过适当的观察期后，患者被开具了875毫克阿莫西林加125毫克克拉维酸钾（Augmentin；葛兰素史克有限公司，伦敦）每日两次和250毫克甲硝唑（Flagyl；赞布公司，米兰）每日三次共十天的处方。抗生素治疗方案旨在预防由于种植体周围炎病原菌扩散至皮下组织而可能引起的需氧和厌氧多微生物感染。此外，为了减少并发症的可能性，建议患者避免咳嗽、打喷嚏和擤鼻涕，这些行为可能会增加口腔内压力。安排了每隔两天的随访检查以监测肿胀逐渐消退及完全恢复的情况，最终在一周内自发性地得到了缓解且未出现任何并发症。

metadata.original_text: A 65-year-old woman with a noncontributory medical history was referred to the Oral Surgery Unit, Policlinico Umberto I, “Sapienza” University of Rome, Italy, to undergo surgical reconstructive therapy peri-implantitis lesion localized around the mandibular left distal implant ( and ). The patient’s written detailed informed consent was obtained for the diagnostic and therapeutic approach and the use of the documentation for research purposes and publishing. The procedure involved the prosthetic superstructure removal, oral and buccal full-thickness mucoperiosteal flaps incision, surface debridement and decontamination, and guided bone regeneration of an infra-bony defect using a mineralized dehydrated bone allograft and resorbable membrane in the non-submerged mode of wound healing []. During open-flap debridement of the infected implant surface with sodium bicarbonate air powder abrasion (PROPHYflex™ 3 with periotip, KaVo, Biberach, Germany) (), rapid onset swelling arose on the left cheek as well as in the periorbital space. The procedure was stopped immediately and the surgical area was rinsed with sterile saline solution to remove all residual bicarbonate particles. Before repositioning and suturing the flap, intra- and extra-oral inspection and palpation of the face and neck were performed to determine the spread and extension of entrapped air. Extra-oral examination revealed slight asymmetry of the face and complete left eyelid ptosis due to swelling of the left periorbital space and cheek (). A crackling sensation with no tenderness was detectable on palpation of the subcutaneous tissue in the swelling area. Visual acuity, light reflex, and extraocular movements were intact. Intraoral examination showed no swelling or crepitus in the mandibular region because air, spreading upwards alongside the buccinator muscle insertion, was entrapped into the upper and middle loose spaces of the face. The patient complained of experiencing only slight discomfort but no pain and no difficulty swallowing, breathing, or speaking. Therefore, computed tomography was deemed unnecessary to avoid undue radiation exposure. Subcutaneous emphysema diagnosis was based on the sudden onset during air-powder debridement of soft tissue swelling associated with crepitus in the absence of erythema, oedema, significant pain, or lymphadenopathy. In the lack of signs or symptoms of serious complications, close observation was performed. The patient was reassured that the swelling should reduce spontaneously in 2–3 days and subside within 7–10 days with no complications or morbidity. After an adequate observation period, the patient was discharged with a prescription for 875 mg of amoxicillin plus 125 mg of clavulanic acid (Augmentin; GlaxoSmithKline, London, UK) twice daily and 250 mg of metronidazole (Flagyl; Zambon, Milan, Italy) three times daily for ten days. The antibiotic protocol was adopted to prevent the potential aerobic and anaerobic polymicrobial infection due to the dissemination in subcutaneous tissues from peri-implantitis lesion microbiota []. Furthermore, to reduce the probability of complications, the patient was advised to avoid coughing, sneezing, and nose-blowing, which could increase intraoral pressure. Follow-up visits were scheduled every two days to monitor the progressive swelling reduction and complete resolution, which was obtained spontaneously after a week without any complications.

title: pmc-8702094-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-8702094-1
病例摘要：一名23岁的男性因反复出现室性早搏被收入我们的心肌病诊所。他心功能稳定，没有其他相关症状。他从未经历过晕厥，并且家族中也没有心肌病或心脏骤停的病例。值得注意的是，他的医疗史包括一年前的一次急性心肌炎发作。当时，他在另一家医院急诊科因胸痛、肌钙蛋白升高和ECG下壁导联T波倒置而入院（）。紧急冠状动脉造影显示冠脉正常。随后进行了心脏磁共振成像(CMR)，结果显示左室(LV)非扩张且射血分数(ejection fraction, EF)低至正常范围，右室(RV)大小和功能正常。T2加权图像显示室间隔中部心肌水肿，并在对比增强后图像中观察到中部晚期钆增强（late gadolinium enhancement, LGE）（）。由于患者未提供知情同意，未进行心内膜活检。出院时诊断为急性心肌炎，并建议密切临床随访。一年后复查时，超声心动图显示LV EF初期减少，涉及侧壁的运动减弱区域，而RV大小和功能保持正常。进行了新的CMR检查，结果显示LV EF轻度降低且未见心肌水肿。然而，在对比增强图像中观察到LV心肌弥漫性环形下层LGE（subepicardial LGE）受累（）。为了排除一种左主导型致心律失常性心肌病的变异型，其中这种LGE模式已被CMR报道，进行了基因检测和详细的家族筛查。他的56岁母亲和30岁妹妹均无症状，在ECG下壁导联中T波倒置，并且在超声心动图上LV EF轻度降低。对这两名受试者进行CMR检查时，发现的LGE模式与患者相似（）。通过探索家族的父系方面未发现相关临床表现。据我们所知，在家族成员中仅记录了一例“心肌炎样”起始的致心律失常性心肌病病例。进行了分子检测，通过基于NGS的方法分析了目标基因面板。使用Illumina变异解释软件将最小等位基因频率阈值设置为5%。基因检测发现DSP基因杂合突变（c.5428C>T, p.Gln1810Ter）。根据美国医学遗传学学会(ACMG)的标准，该变异被分类为很可能致病性（类别IV）。在具有阳性表型的患者亲属中发现了相同的突变（），最终确诊为家族左主导型致心律失常性心肌病。患者及其母亲和妹妹开始使用β阻滞剂治疗，并且患者还植入了可植入式心脏复律除颤器。

metadata.original_text: A 23-year-old man was admitted to our cardiomyopathy clinic for repetitive ventricular ectopic beats. He was hemodynamically stable with no other relevant symptoms. He never experienced syncope and was unaware of any case of cardiomyopathy or sudden cardiac death in his family. Remarkably, his medical history included an episode of acute myocarditis one year before. At that time, he was admitted to the emergency department of a different hospital with chest pain, troponin rise, and T wave inversion in the inferolateral leads on ECG (). An urgent coronary angiogram revealed normal coronary arteries. Then, a cardiac magnetic resonance (CMR) was performed, showing a non-dilated left ventricle (LV) with low-normal ejection fraction (EF), as well as normal RV dimensions and function. T2-weighted images highlighted the presence of mid-wall myocardial edema involving the interventricular septum, where mid-wall late gadolinium enhancement (LGE) was also noted on post-contrast images (). Endomyocardial biopsy was proposed, though the patient did not provide informed consent. The patient was discharged with a diagnosis of acute myocarditis, with a recommendation for close clinical follow-up. When re-assessing the patients at his 1-year follow-up, echocardiography showed an initial reduction of LV EF, with an area of hypo-akinesia involving the lateral wall, and preserved RV dimensions and function. A new CMR study was performed, which confirmed the mildly reduced LV EF with no evidence of myocardial edema. Post-contrast images, however, revealed a diffuse circumferential subepicardial LGE involvement of the LV myocardium (). To exclude a left-dominant variant of arrhythmogenic cardiomyopathy, in which this LGE pattern has been reported with CMR, genetic testing and accurate family screening were then performed. His 56-year-old mother and 30-year-old sister, both asymptomatic, were also found to have inverted T waves in the inferolateral leads on ECG and a mildly reduced LV EF on echocardiogram. Performing CMR on those two subjects, a pattern of LGE very similar to the one detected in the proband was detected (). No relevant clinical findings were identified by exploring the paternal side of the family. To our knowledge, this was the only documented case of a “myocarditis-like” onset of arrhythmogenic cardiomyopathy among the family members. Molecular testing was carried out by analyzing a panel of target genes through an NGS-based procedure. The MAF threshold was set to 5% using Illumina Variant Interpreter Software. Genetic testing identified a heterozygous variant in DSP (c.5428C>T, p.Gln1810Ter). According to the American College of Medical Genetics (ACMG), the variant was classified as likely pathogenic (class IV). The same mutation was found in the patient’s relatives with a positive phenotype (), and a diagnosis of familiar left-dominant arrhythmogenic cardiomyopathy was finally made. The patient, as well as his mother and sister, started therapy with β-blocker drugs, and the proband also received an implantable cardioverter-defibrillator.

title: pmc-8702215-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-8702215-1
病例摘要：一名8岁白人女孩因关节过度松弛、皮肤过伸展和伤口愈合延迟被转诊至我们的诊所。她是非近亲父母的第二个孩子，早产（39周+6天），由于母亲先兆子痫和胎盘剥离紧急进行了剖宫产手术。出生体重低但与孕龄相符（930克；第11百分位数），早产导致她立即被送入新生儿重症监护病房。出生后12小时，她因胎粪性肠梗阻而出现小肠穿孔，需要进行切除手术并随后进行了结肠造口术，没有局部并发症。在随后的几周内，由于早产视网膜病变引起的双眼视网膜脱离也被诊断，并在两个月大时通过激光光凝和玻璃体切割术进行了治疗。此外，她还被诊断出双侧先天性白内障，分别在18个月和3岁时接受了左眼和右眼的手术。眼科预后受到高度近视和视力减退的影响。根据最近的评估，她的左眼视力为3/10，右眼部分失明（仅能感知光线），并接受每日局部β阻滞剂治疗。7岁时，她在一次轻微创伤（从椅子上摔下）后发生右侧股骨骨折，需要手术治疗。体检发现她超重（体重第75-90百分位数；BMI第75百分位数—CDC图表[]），全身关节过度活动（Beighton评分：9/9）(a)，皮肤过伸展，多处萎缩和术后瘢痕(b)，下肢多发瘀斑，舌系带缺失，右侧凸胸脊柱侧弯，双侧膝内翻-后屈曲，肘部过度伸展和双足平足。她没有肌力减退，但有全身性低张力，但肌肉营养良好且深腱反射正常。然而，她确实存在全身性低张力。智力正常。她能借助拐杖行走。双腿的柔软、天鹅绒般的皮肤和皮下组织长期被误诊为轻度淋巴水肿。父母还报告说女儿容易瘀伤。她的家族成员中没有人表现出类似的症状或体征。胸部、脊柱和四肢X光片证实了骨科异常的存在。肺功能检查、腹部超声和颈动脉超声以及视频脑电图均未见异常。全面的心血管评估显示轻度二尖瓣反流，但无临床意义。未发现其他血管或淋巴管畸形。多学科随访包括儿科、眼科、心理和心血管评估，已持续5年。她报告没有疼痛。她在学校表现出良好的认知和社会技能，并每周参加游泳课程。为她开具了支持性鞋垫，但未见明显临床改善。

metadata.original_text: An 8-year-old Caucasian girl was referred to our clinic for joint hyperlaxity, skin hyperextensibility and delayed wound healing. She was the second child of non-consanguineous parents, born preterm (29 weeks + 6 days) with an urgent Cesarean section due to maternal pre-eclampsia and placental abruption. Birth weight was low but appropriate for gestational age (930 g; 11th centile), and prematurity requested prompt admission to the neonatal intensive care unit. Twelve hours after birth, she experienced small bowel perforation due to meconium ileus, which required resection surgery and subsequent ileostomy without local complications. In the subsequent weeks, bilateral retinal detachment likely due to the retinopathy of prematurity was also diagnosed and promptly treated with laser photocoagulation and subsequent vitrectomy at 2 months of age. Additionally, she was diagnosed with bilateral cataract presumably secondary to prematurity. For this complication, she underwent surgery by the age of 18 months and 3 years to the left and right eye, respectively. The ophthalmologic prognosis was complicated by high-grade myopia and visual deficit. According to the last evaluation, she had a visual acuity of 3/10 in the left eye and a partial blindness in the right one (she only perceives lights), treated with daily topic ocular β-blockers. At the age of 7, she had a right traumatic femoral bone fracture after a minor trauma (a fall from a chair), requiring surgical treatment. On examination, the girl was found to be overweight (weight 75–90th centile; BMI 75th centile—CDC charts [], with generalized joint hypermobility (Beighton score: 9/9) (a), skin hyperextensibility, multiple atrophic and post-surgical dystrophic scars (b), multiple ecchymoses in her lower limbs, absence of lingual frenulum, mild right-convex thoracic scoliosis, bilateral genu valgum-recurvatum, cubitus valgus with elbows hyperextensibility and bilateral pes planus. She had no strength deficit, with global hypotonia but normal muscular trophism and deep tendon reflexes. However, she had a global hypotonia. Intellectual abilities were normal. She was able to walk, with the help of a crutch. On both legs, soft, velvety skin and subcutaneous tissues had been long misdiagnosed as a mild lymphedema. Parents also reported easy bruising for their daughter. None of her family members presented with similar signs or symptoms. Chest, spine and limb radiography confirmed the orthopedic abnormalities. Global respiratory function with spirometry, abdominal and supra-aortic trunk ultrasounds and video-electroencephalography all resulted normal. A comprehensive cardiovascular evaluation evidenced a mild mitral valve insufficiency without clinical relevance. No other vascular or lymphatic anomalies were detected. Multidisciplinary follow up, including pediatric, oculistic, psychiatric and cardiovascular evaluations, has been continued for 5 years. She reports no pain. She attends school with good cognitive and social skills and weekly swimming sessions. Support insoles were prescribed without a clear clinical improvement.

title: pmc-8702325-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-8702325-1
病例摘要：一名12岁女孩出现腹痛，并报告过去一个月频繁出现带血便。她在9岁时被诊断为中度左半结肠溃疡性结肠炎（UC）。最初使用泼尼松诱导缓解，由于美沙拉嗪不耐受，她一直依靠硫唑嘌呤维持缓解状态。在使用泼尼松期间，她出现了满月脸和食欲增加等副作用。根据结肠镜检查结果，显示显著的红斑且缺乏血管模式，她被诊断为UC复发。鉴于之前泼尼松治疗的副作用，患者及其监护人拒绝进一步使用皮质类固醇治疗。我们决定使用GMA（胃黏膜移植）诱导缓解。但由于该患者的体型较小（身高：134.9 cm，体重：31.7 kg），预计难以找到两个血管进行GMA手术，因此选择了单针法进行操作。她每周接受一次GMA治疗共10周。使用外径为1.4 mm、长度25 mm的17号透析穿刺针（）插入右肘部。透析机处理的血流量为每分钟40 mL（总血液量：1,800 mL）。在这种情况下，治疗时间为90分钟。在该过程中未观察到血压下降。使用肝素作为抗凝剂。所有10次GMA治疗均顺利完成，没有出现穿刺失败或血液回收不良的情况。此外，也没有观察到副作用。然而，患者并未通过GMA达到缓解状态。在接受口服他克莫司治疗失败后，通过使用英夫利昔单抗（5 mg/kg，每8周一次）治疗10个月后实现了缓解并维持至今。

metadata.original_text: A 12-year-old girl developed abdominal pain and reported frequent bloody stools for over a month. She had been diagnosed with moderate left-sided UC at nine years of age. Remission was initially induced with prednisolone, and she remained in remission with azathioprine due to mesalazine intolerance. She experienced moon face and increased appetite as side effects while taking prednisolone. She was later diagnosed with a UC relapse based on colonoscopic findings of marked erythema and the absence of vascular pattern. Because of the side effects of previous prednisolone therapy, the patient and her guardian declined further steroid therapy. We decided to induce remission with GMA. However, securing two blood vessels for GMA was expected to be difficult because of the patient's small anthropometric measurement (height: 134.9 cm, weight: 31.7 kg). Therefore, we elected to perform GMA with the single-needle method. She underwent GMA once per week for 10 weeks. A 17-gauge dialysis puncture needle (outer diameter: 1.4 mm, length: 25 mm) was inserted into the right elbow (). The dialysis console processed a blood flow rate of 40 mL/min (total blood volume: 1,800 mL). In this case, the treatment time was 90 minutes. No decrease in blood pressure was observed during this procedure. Heparin was used as an anticoagulant. All 10 GMA treatments were completed without puncture failure or poor blood removal. Additionally, no side effects were observed. However, the patient did not attain remission with GMA. After an unsuccessful attempt of oral tacrolimus therapy, remission could be achieved and has maintained with infliximab (5 mg/kg, every 8 weeks) for 10 months.

title: pmc-8702359-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-8702359-1
病例摘要：一名60岁女性因在外院因穿孔阑尾炎进行急诊阑尾切除术四个月后偶然发现的III期非黏液性阑尾腺癌，寻求第二意见而来到我们的三级医疗中心。她的初次病理结果显示为原发性非黏液性、中度分化、III期、pT4pN1aM0阑尾腺癌，侵犯了3个周围阑尾淋巴结中的一个，并伴有广泛的淋巴血管空间浸润。错配修复蛋白完整。她完成了分期计算机断层扫描（CT）和结肠镜检查。影像学检查未发现远处转移的证据，但注意到右侧卵巢囊肿和胆囊壁钙化（）。该卵巢囊肿在初次手术中由妇科医生评估，并认为当时不需要干预。建议进行右半结肠切除术及可能的右侧卵巢切除术，随后接受辅助FOLFOX（叶酸、氟尿嘧啶和奥沙利铂）治疗。然而，她选择当时不进行任何治疗。在此期间，患者无症状。患者因CT检查发现右侧卵巢囊肿增大至4-11厘米，并出现新的6厘米复杂性囊实性肿块沿左侧骨盆壁而就诊（）。初次就诊时，她抱怨下腹部胀满和绞痛，伴有间歇性的腹胀和过早饱腹感。体检主要无异常，除了双侧附件区的胀满。她的病例在多学科肿瘤会议上进行了讨论。当时再次审查了病理结果（）。我们建议进行右半结肠切除术以及切除可疑恶性病变的附件肿块。还讨论了如果在探查时发现腹膜转移，则可能需要进行减瘤手术和腹腔内温热化疗。此外，还建议同时进行胆囊切除术。术中发现弥漫性癌性腹膜炎。减瘤手术包括右半结肠切除术、胆囊切除术、全子宫及双侧输卵管卵巢切除术，并将附件肿块连同周围组织一并切除。随后进行了腹腔内温热化疗，使用了丝裂霉素C。腹膜癌指数（PCI）为20，由于小肠系膜从十二指肠到回肠末端有亚厘米大小的种植灶，减瘤手术完整性评分为1。患者术后恢复顺利，并在术后第6天出院。令人惊讶的是，病理结果显示原发性胆囊腺癌，中度至低分化，在高分级胆管内皮样乳头状瘤和瓷化胆囊背景下生长。癌细胞通过脏层腹膜延伸到胆囊壁的浆膜表面及肝床表面的周围软组织（）。所有从手术中收集的肿瘤转移灶均符合胆道起源的转移。鉴于这一新发现，她的病例在肿瘤会议上重新讨论。初次阑尾标本切片被审查并显示出与胆囊腺癌相似的病理特征（）。讨论了同时发生的胆囊和阑尾原发性肿瘤的可能性，但考虑到两者之间的形态相似性和扩散模式，最可能的诊断是原发性胆囊腺癌伴弥漫性癌性腹膜炎。患者在随访影像学检查显示疾病进展后完成了四个周期的吉西他滨和顺铂治疗，并随后转为FOLFOX方案治疗。在接受第一个FOLFOX疗程后不久，她因穿孔脏器出现急性腹痛而急诊剖腹探查手术。之后，她被转入姑息治疗。

metadata.original_text: A 60-year-old female presented to our tertiary medical center for a second opinion regarding the incidental pathology finding of stage III nonmucinous appendiceal adenocarcinoma after an emergent appendectomy for perforated appendicitis at an outside hospital four months prior. Her initial pathology revealed primary nonmucinous, moderately differentiated, stage III, pT4pN1aM0, appendiceal adenocarcinoma, involving 1 of 3 periappendiceal lymph nodes with extensive lymphovascular space invasion. Mismatch repair protein was intact. She completed staging computed tomography (CT) and colonoscopy. On imaging, there was no evidence of distant metastasis, but a small right ovarian cyst and calcification of the gallbladder wall were noted (). The ovarian cyst had been evaluated intraoperatively at the index operation by a gynecologist, and it was deemed that no intervention was needed at that time. Completion right hemicolectomy and possible right oophorectomy followed by adjuvant FOLFOX (folinic acid, fluorouracil, and oxaliplatin) were recommended. However, she opted to forgo any treatment at that time. The patient was asymptomatic in the interim. The patient represented to clinic with CT findings of growth in the right ovarian cyst, from 4 to 11 cm, with a new 6 cm complex cystic/solid mass along the left pelvic sidewall (). On presentation, she complained of lower abdominal fullness and cramping with intermittent bloating and early satiety. Her exam was mostly unremarkable except for the fullness in bilateral adnexa. Her case was presented at the multidisciplinary tumor board. At that time, her pathology was also reviewed (). We recommended completion right hemicolectomy as well as resection of adnexal masses, which were concerning for malignancy. We also discussed the possibility of cytoreductive surgery and hyperthermic intraperitoneal chemotherapy if peritoneal metastasis was discovered on exploration. In addition, she was recommended to undergo cholecystectomy at the same time. Intraoperatively, the patient was found to have diffuse carcinomatosis. Cytoreductive surgery included right hemicolectomy, cholecystectomy, and total abdominal hysterectomy and bilateral salpingo-oophorectomy with en bloc resection of the adnexal masses. This was followed by HIPEC with mitomycin C. The peritoneal carcinomatosis index (PCI) was 20, and the completeness of cytoreduction score (CC) was 1 due to subcentimeter implants on the small bowel serosa from the jejunum to the terminal ileum. The patient had an uneventful postoperative recovery and was discharged on postoperative day 6. Surprisingly, pathology revealed primary gallbladder adenocarcinoma, moderately to poorly differentiated, arising in a background of high grade biliary intraepithelial neoplasm and porcelain gallbladder. The carcinoma extended through the visceral peritoneum onto the serosal surface and into the pericystic soft tissue on the hepatic bed surface (). All tumor deposits collected from the operation were consistent with metastasis from the biliary origin. With this new finding, her case was rediscussed at tumor board. The original appendiceal specimen slides were reviewed and found to be similar histologically to the gallbladder adenocarcinoma (). The possibility of synchronous gallbladder and appendiceal primaries was discussed but given the morphological resemblance between the two and the pattern of spread, primary gallbladder adenocarcinoma with carcinomatosis was the most likely diagnosis. The patient completed four cycles of gemcitabine and cisplatin before switching to FOLFOX after surveillance imaging demonstrated disease progression. Shortly after receiving the first cycle of FOLFOX, she presented with an acute abdomen secondary to perforated viscus and underwent emergent laparotomy. She was subsequently transitioned to hospice.

title: pmc-8702361-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-8702361-1
病例摘要：这名4岁的女患者是在四年前被我们注意到的。她由父母陪同来看诊，因为抱怨对热和冷有过敏反应，即使在正常呼吸时也是如此。该患者从未接受过牙科检查或治疗。

metadata.original_text: The female patient was 4 years old when she came to our attention. She was brought to the practice by her parents because she complained of hypersensitivity to heat and cold, even during normal breathing. The patient had never undergone a dental examination or treatment.

title: pmc-8710040-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-8710040-1
主要诊断：SJS/TEN，川崎病（MIS-C）
病例摘要：一名25个月大的男孩因发热和斑丘疹被收入莫菲儿童医院。他的父母解释说，发热始于三天前，皮疹在一天后出现。皮疹最初在脚部有轻微的瘙痒感，在第二天扩散到大腿和生殖器区域。尽管服用了抗组胺药，但到了第三天，发热和皮疹仍然持续存在。患者因发热、全身不适、食欲不振、口腔、唇部、结膜及斑丘疹（导致溃疡和水疱形成）等症状入院。到达医院时，他的生命体征如下：体温39.5°C，血压82/10 mmHg，呼吸频率28次/分钟，心率86次/分钟。患者的临床病程、出现的水疱性皮肤病变及黏膜受累导致初步诊断为SJS/TEN。回顾其病史发现，在过去三周内他仅使用了雷尼替丁这一种药物。此外，他的母亲在三周前有上呼吸道感染（URI）的历史，伴有低热，三天后自行缓解。根据初步诊断为SJS/TEN，患者接受了支持性治疗、皮质类固醇和静脉免疫球蛋白（IVIG）。同时进行了实验室检查及新冠病毒PCR检测。结果显示白细胞计数3200/μl（多形核粒细胞58%，淋巴细胞41%），血红蛋白12.3 g/dl，血小板计数29000/μl。此外，红细胞沉降率36 mm/hr和CRP水平58 mg/l。肝功能测试、血尿素氮（BUN）、肌酐（Cr）、白蛋白及乳酸脱氢酶（LDH）均在正常范围内。然而，铁蛋白和纤维蛋白原水平升高（分别为517 μg/L 和615 mg/dL），新冠病毒PCR检测结果为阳性。胸部CT检查未见异常。考虑到患者的总体状况、发热以及实验室检查结果，诊断为川崎病（MIS-C）。随后在治疗中加入了阿扎那韦。第二天，他的体温恢复正常，并开始进食和饮水。四天后，他被以轻微的皮肤病变及正常状态从医院出院。一周后的随访显示，其实验室检测结果均在正常范围内，恢复良好。

metadata.original_text: A 25-month-old boy with fever and maculopapular rashes was admitted to Mofid Children's Hospital. His parents explained that fever began three days ago and rashes developed after one day. The rashes started with mild itching in the feet, spreading to the thighs and the genital area on the second day. Despite taking antihistamines, the fever and rashes continued on the third day. The patient presented to the hospital with fever, malaise, poor feeding, mucosal involvement of the mouth, lips, conjunctiva, and maculopapular rashes, which resulted in ulcer and bulla formation (). On arrival, he had the following vital signs. Temperature: 39.5°C, blood pressure = 82/10 mmHg, respiratory rate = 28, and pulse rate = 86. The patient's clinical course, blistered skin lesions, and mucosal involvement led to the primary diagnosis of SJS/TEN. Reviewing his medical history revealed that ranitidine was the only medication he had used in the past three weeks. Moreover, his mother had a history of upper respiratory infection (URI) three weeks ago, which was accompanied by low-grade fever and resolved in three days. The patient received supportive care, steroids, and intravenous immune globin (IVIG) based on the primary diagnosis of SJS/TEN. In the meantime, laboratory work up and a COVID-19 PCR test were performed. The results showed white blood cells (WBC) count = 3200/μl (Polymorphonuclear (PMN): 58% and lymph: 41%), hemoglobin (Hgb) = 12.3 gr/dl, and platelet count = 29000/μl. Additionally, the erythrocyte sedimentation rate (ESR) was 36 mm/hr and the CRP level was 58 mg/l. Liver function test, blood urea nitrogen (BUN), creatinine (Cr), albumin, and lactate dehydrogenase (LDH) were within the normal ranges. However, ferritin and fibrinogen levels were elevated (517 μg/L and 615 mg/dL, respectively) and the COVID-19 PCR result was positive. The findings of the chest CT scan were unremarkable. Considering the patient's general conditions, fever, and laboratory findings, MIS-C was diagnosed and atazanavir was added to his treatment. On the following day, his fever subsided and he began to eat and drink. After four days, he was discharged from the hospital with minimal skin lesions and a normal condition (). The patient was followed after one week, indicating that his laboratory test results were within the normal ranges and he was doing great.

title: pmc-8718394-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-8718394-1
病例摘要：一名53岁的女性因腰痛和背部疼痛以及下肢麻木超过一个月被转诊至我们的诊所。疼痛与体位无关，活动时症状加重。她有腰椎间盘突出的病史，没有外伤史。初次评估显示生命体征稳定。除了腰部和背部的疼痛外，体检未见明显异常。进行了常规血液检查。进一步的肝功能检查结果正常。血清CA199、CA125、CEA和AFP水平也在正常范围内。胸部CT显示右肺上叶有散在性结节状钙化伴软组织肿块（大小为3.3 cm × 2.4 cm），无胸膜增厚（SOMATOM definition，西门子医疗，埃尔朗根，德国；管电压100-120 kVp；管电流450 mA；层厚0.625 mm；螺距0.992:1；旋转速度：0.5 s/转；ASIR-V：30%）。右侧肺门淋巴结肿大也明显。腹部增强CT显示肝脏有多发性病变伴大量钙化，动脉期表现为轻微的周边强化，门脉期低强化（碘帕醇注射液，拜耳制药公司；动脉期和门静脉期分别在对比剂注射后25秒和60秒获得）。最大的病灶大小为10.2 cm × 5.9 cm，位于右肝叶。CT检查还显示右侧第二肋、第十一胸椎和第一腰椎有溶骨性病变伴大量厚硬化边缘。99mTc-甲基二膦酸盐骨显像显示多个受累骨骼的高代谢活动（）。脑部磁共振成像（MRI）未见异常。患者接受了右肺上叶最大病灶的经胸针刺活检。病理分析显示，上皮样细胞呈腺泡状排列，胞质清晰（）。免疫组化染色结果显示肿瘤细胞CD31、CD34、CAMTA1和EMA阳性，ERG、TFE3、PCK和desmin阴性，Ki-67指数为10%。病理检查提示罕见低度恶性血管内皮瘤，确诊为EHE。鉴于多发肺内、右侧肺门淋巴结、肝脏及骨转移，患者接受了紫杉醇脂质体（240 mg/m²；第1天）和卡铂（550 mg/m²；第1天）的化疗。8个月后，患者完成了四个周期的联合治疗。在8个月随访CT检查中未见疾病进展。

metadata.original_text: A 53-year-old woman was referred to our clinic with waist and back pain and numbness of the lower limbs for more than 1 month. The pain was not related to her posture and became more prominent when she moved. She had a medical history of lumbar disc herniation and no history of trauma. On initial evaluation, her vital signs were stable. Apart from the pain of the waist and back, physical examination revealed unremarkable findings. Routine blood tests were obtained. Further, liver function tests revealed normal results. The blood CA199, CA125, CEA, and AFP levels were also within normal limits. Computed tomography of the chest revealed scattered pulmonary nodules with calcifications associated with a soft tissue mass measuring 3.3 cm × 2.4 cm and without pleural thickening at the superior lobe of the right lung () (SOMATOM definition, Siemens Healthcare, Erlangen, Germany; tube voltage, 100-120 kVp; tube current, 450 mA; slice thickness, 0.625 mm; pitch, 0.992:1; rotation speed: 0.5 s/rot; ASIR-V:30%.). Enlarged lymph nodes of the right hilar were also evident. Abdominal contrast-enhanced CT revealed diffuse lesions with massive calcifications in the liver, which shows faint peripheral enhancement in the arterial phase and low enhancement in the portal phase (Iopromide Injection, Bayer Pharma AG; the arterial phase and portal venous phase were obtained at 25 s and 60 s after contrast injection.). The largest lesion measuring 10.2 cm × 5.9 cm was located in the right lobe of the liver and (). CT examination also revealed osteolytic lesions with a massive thick sclerotic rim in the right second rib, 11th thoracic vertebra, and first lumbar spine. Bone scintigraphy with 99mTc-methylene diphosphonate showed multiple hypermetabolic activities in the involved bones (). Cerebral magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) revealed no anomalies. The patient underwent transthoracic needle biopsy of the largest pulmonary lesion located in the right superior lobe. Histopathological analysis revealed epithelioid cells arranged in a glandular pattern with clear cytoplasm (). Immunohistochemical staining showed that the neoplastic cells were positive for CD31, CD34, CAMTA1, and EMA, but negative for ERG, TFE3, PCK, and desmin, with a Ki-67 index rate of 10%. Histopathological examination indicated a rare low-grade malignant vascular neoplasm, confirming the diagnosis of EHE. Considering the multiple intra-pulmonary, right hilar lymph node, liver, and bone metastases, the patient was treated with chemotherapy with paclitaxel liposome (240 mg/m2; day 1) and carboplatin (550 mg/m2; day 1). At 8 months, the patient had completed four cycles of combination therapy. There were no changes in the patient’s disease status on CT at the 8-month follow-up visit.

title: pmc-8718405-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-8718405-1
病例摘要：以下病例用于说明，从生物心理社会生态学视角出发，在临床实践中为痴呆症患者及其照顾者提供三种不同的服务方法。主要问题：Janice 是一位 85 岁的女性，独立居住在加拿大阿尔伯塔省的老年人住房中。由于 Janice 对支持的需求不断增加，她的女儿 Gwen（主要照顾者）安排了与母亲老年科医生会面，讨论因痴呆症进展而引起的相关健康和功能变化，并计划讨论自己对支持的需求。Gwen 向老年科医生报告说，自上次就诊以来，她母亲的病情一直在稳步恶化，最显著的是短期记忆下降，导致她越来越频繁地丢失物品、难以回忆近期事件、忘记名字、找词困难、处理复杂任务和规划能力下降。她还提到，在过去一年中，她的母亲出现了妄想和视觉幻觉的症状，想象陌生人试图进入家中偷窃珍贵的财物。这些幻觉在过去一年里逐渐增加，并在近一个月内变得更加频繁，每周多次出现在夜间。Gwen 还报告说，Janice 经常打电话寻求帮助，她注意到母亲比以前更加易怒、生气和沮丧。她提到，Janice 会从房间走失，但没有迷路过。Gwen 还指出 Janice 的功能出现了“相当快速”的下降。由于她无法再使用炉灶并烧焦了锅具，最终停止烹饪，依赖微波即食餐和方便食品。尽管 Gwen 给她送饭，但她过去一年内体重减轻了 20 磅。Janice 仍然能够完成基本的日常生活活动如穿衣、梳洗、洗澡、进食、排便、转移和移动。她还能使用电话并独立做家务和洗衣，但 Gwen 发现洗衣机里有被尿液浸湿的衣服，并相信她的母亲一个月没有洗澡了。Gwen 现在管理着母亲的钱财、医疗预约和药物，还负责购物和其他杂务。Janice 的邻居和物业管理开始向 Gwen 报告关于她母亲安全的问题，这大大增加了 Gwen 对母亲居住情况的焦虑。他们提到 Janice 会在设施内任何时间游荡，并且当她对时间和日期感到困惑时会与居民交流。有时她在经历幻觉时会敲邻居家门寻求帮助。邻居们很了解她并安慰和引导她，但 Gwen 担心他们能这样做多久。Janice 坚决否认需要帮助，但最终还是同意接受家庭护理以协助药物管理。然而，最近家护机构通知 Gwen，Janice 并不总是开门让家护人员进入，并且有时会称呼他们为贬义词并叫他们“滚出去”。同时存在的问题：尽管 Janice 长期存在尿失禁的问题，她通过使用卫生巾和后来的防漏内衣来管理。Gwen 描述说她母亲白天的膀胱控制状况良好，但夜间偶尔会在睡衣和床上浸湿。Janice 还有间歇性的大便失禁，并且 Gwen 注意到她的会阴护理有所下降，分享了她在马桶周围发现涂抹状粪便的情况。老年科医生还表达了对 Janice 感觉剥夺的担忧，指出她因黄斑变性而视力受损，并患有双侧听力损失，无法独立管理助听器。Janice 的其他医疗状况包括高血压、骨质疏松症、骨关节炎和甲状腺功能减退症。她从未吸烟，很少饮酒，并给出了

metadata.original_text: The following case is presented to illustrate, using a biopsychosocial-ecological perspective, three different approaches to serving persons with dementia and their caregiver(s) in clinical practice. Presenting concerns: Janice is an 85-year-old woman who lives independently in senior housing in the Canadian province of Alberta. In response to Janice's increasing needs for support, Gwen, her daughter and primary caregiver, scheduled an appointment for them to meet with her mother's Geriatrician to discuss changes in Janice's health and function related to her progressing dementia, and planned to discuss her own needs for support as well. Gwen reported to the geriatrician that her mother's decline had been steady since her last appointment, most notably in her short term memory such that she was increasingly losing items, struggling to recall recent events, forgetting names, and having difficulty finding words, managing complex tasks, and planning. She shared that her mother had developed paranoia and visual hallucinations over the past year during which she imagines that strangers are trying to get into her home to steal her treasured belongings. The hallucinations had increased steadily and had worsened over the past month now occurring multiple times per week usually at night. Gwen also reported that Janice calls her frequently asking for help, and she noticed her mother being more irritable, angry, and frustrated than she used to be. She shared that her mother wanders out of her room but has not gotten lost. Gwen also noted a “quite rapid” decline in Janice's function. Because she was no longer able to use the stove and had burned pots, she ultimately stopped cooking and depends on microwave-ready meals and easy snacks. Even with Gwen bringing her meals, however, Janice has had a 20 pound weight loss over the past year. Janice can still perform basic activities of daily living such as dressing, grooming, bathing, feeding, toileting, transfers and mobilization. She can still use the phone and does housekeeping and laundry on her own, but Gwen finds clothes soaked in urine in the laundry and believes that her mother has not bathed in a month. Gwen now manages her mother's money, medical appointments, and medications, and does her shopping and other errands as well. Janice's neighbors and building management started to raise concerns to Gwen about her mother's safety, which Gwen reported has greatly increased her own anxiety about her mother's living situation. They reported that Janice is seen wandering around the facility at all hours and often checks in with other residents when she gets confused about day and time. There are times when she will knock on her neighbors' doors asking for help while experiencing hallucinations. They know her well and reassure and redirect her but Gwen wonders how long they will be willing to do this. Janice adamantly denies needing assistance but Gwen was finally able to get her to accept homecare for help with medications. The agency recently informed Gwen, however, that Janice does not always open the door for the homecare attendants and that she sometimes calls them derogatory names and yells at them to “get out.” Concurrent problems: While Janice has experienced urinary incontinence for years, she was managing on her own with pads and then protective underwear as the incontinence worsened. Gwen describes her mother's bladder control as “good during the day” but notes that she “occasionally soaks her night clothes and bed during the night.” Janice also has occasional bowel incontinence and Gwen noticed that her pericare had declined and shared that she had found smeared stool around the toilet. The geriatrician also expressed concern about Janice's sensory deprivation noting that she is legally blind due to macular degeneration and that she suffers from bilateral hearing loss and has been unable to manage hearing aids on her own. Janice's other medical conditions include hypertension, osteoporosis, osteoarthritis, and hypothyroidism. She never smoked, rarely consumes alcohol, and gave

title: pmc-8718503-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-8718503-1
病例摘要：我们报告了一例58岁女性患者的病例，该患者患有复发性腹壁疝。六年前，患者因脐疝接受了手术治疗，仅进行了简单的无网修复。患者是一名活跃的吸烟者，并且患有病态肥胖（BMI为43 kg/m2）和COPD等与本案例相关的合并症。患者在消化内科住院期间被外科医生介绍，当时正在进行由于慢性小肠梗阻临床表现而进行的诊断检查。在询问病史时，患者报告腹痛、肿胀以及疝气区域疼痛加剧的症状已持续数周。体格检查发现下腹部有一个较大的不可复性腹壁疝，在触诊时非常疼痛，但柔软，并且当时没有出现嵌顿或绞窄的迹象。考虑到临床表现中存在疝气嵌顿的风险，外科医生未选择在术前优化患者以戒烟和开始减肥计划，而是建议进行半择期手术。在手术过程中，发现腹膜后、部分横结肠以及多段慢性梗阻的小肠作为疝内容物。通过松解粘连将疝内容物还纳至腹腔内。检查发现一个直径约7 cm的疝缺损和垂直方向长约15 cm的缺损，并且在脐上方腹部有明显的腹直肌分离。使用Rives-Stoppa技术，创建了一个广泛的后方肌肉间隙。该空间的侧界为腹直肌外侧缘区域的穿刺神经血管束。通过使用疝囊的一部分来桥接后方腹直肌鞘之间的缺损，容易地闭合后层筋膜。放置了一块30×25 cm的聚丙烯网片，在后方肌肉间隙中确保了在所有方向上至少有5 cm的网片重叠。由于缺陷较大和腹部壁弹性降低，我们观察到前层筋膜无法完全闭合并覆盖网片，因此选择了ACS方法进行腹直肌松解以避免桥接。进行了广泛的前腹壁皮下间隙分离（未保留腹直肌穿孔血管），切开外斜肌腱膜的放松切口。使用Ramirez技术，在半月线附近两侧平行切开腹直肌腱膜的长纵向切口，从肋弓延伸至腹股沟。此操作导致了中线处重要肌肉筋膜瓣的显著松解，并在中线无张力下闭合了疝缺损。然后放置了四个红肠引流管，即两个在后腹直肌间隙内和另外两个在皮下间隙内。术后出现了皮肤缺血并发症。第8天时观察到右侧腹部壁皮肤出现缺血性病变并伴有沿中线的坏死迹象（）。术后第11天，由于伤口分泌物增多进行了多层计算机断层扫描（MSCT）检查。MSCT结果显示腹膜后有大量皮下积液、正常的腹壁肌肉筋膜结构、适当的网片位置和正常的腹腔内状况。进行了皮下积液的穿刺抽吸，并抽取了约800 ml清澈的积液。接下来10天中，缺血情况进一步恶化并出现了两个新的侧方全层皮肤坏死灶（）。考虑到坏死区域相对明确的界限，我们选择了进行手术清创术。在健康组织的安全边缘下进行了腹壁清创术，并考虑了足够的存活腹部皮肤以及局部组织无其他迹象后，完成了手术。

metadata.original_text: We present a case of a 58-year-old female patient with a large recurrent ventral hernia. Six years before, the patient had been operated on for the umbilical hernia, with the simple repair without a mesh. The patient was an active smoker who suffered from morbid obesity with a body mass index of 43 kg/m2 and COPD as comorbidities relevant for this case report. The patient was introduced to the surgeon during hospitalization at the gastroenterology department where a diagnostic workup due to a clinical picture of chronic small bowel obstruction was conducted. While taking the anamnesis, the patient reported frequent abdominal cramps, swelling, and pain in the area of the hernia that had intensified in the last few weeks. The physical examination revealed a large irreducible ventral hernia in the lower abdomen that was quite painful on palpation, but soft and, at that time, without signs of incarceration or strangulation. Taking into account the clinical picture with threatening hernia incarceration, the surgeon did not opt for preoperative optimization of the patient in terms of smoking cessation and starting a weight loss program but made an indication for semielective surgery. On operative procedure, greater omentum, part of the transverse colon, and a cluster of small bowel loops with signs of chronic obstruction were found as hernial content. After adhesiolysis hernial content was reduced into the abdominal cavity. Hernial defect measuring about 7 cm in diameter and about 15 cm in the vertical line with significant rectus diastase in the supraumbilical part of the abdomen was revealed. Using the Rives-Stoppa technique a wide retromuscular space was created. Lateral dissection boundaries of this space were perforating neurovascular bundles in the area of the lateral edges of the rectus muscle on both sides. The posterior fascia was easily closed using also a portion of the hernia sac to bridge the defect between the posterior rectus sheaths. A 30 × 25 cm polypropylene mesh was placed in the retromuscular space ensuring adequate mesh overlap over the edges of the hernia defect of a minimum of 5 cm in all directions. When we observed that the anterior fascia, due to the size of the defect and decreased abdominal wall elasticity, would not close entirely and cover the mesh, we opted for rectus mobilization by the ACS method to avoid bridging. Upon extensive dissection of the anterior abdominal wall subcutaneous space without preservation of the rectus perforator vessels, relaxing incisions of the external oblique muscle aponeurosis were performed. Using the Ramirez technique, long longitudinal incisions of aponeurosis were made bilaterally, adjacently to the semilunar line, extending from the costal arch to the groin. This procedure resulted in the considerable mobilization of the vital musculofascial flap medially, and the hernial defect was closed at the midline without tension. Then, four redon drains were placed, i.e., 2 in the retrorectus space and another 2 in the subcutaneous space. The postoperative course was complicated by skin ischemia. Ischemic lesions of the abdominal wall skin on the right with signs of necrosis along the midline were observed already on day 8 (). On postoperative day 11, multi-slice computed tomography (MSCT) of the abdomen was performed because of the ever more abundant wound discharge. MSCT findings showed a large subcutaneous seroma, a normal musculofascial component of the abdominal wall, appropriate mesh position, and normal intra-abdominal status. Percutaneous puncture of seroma was performed and about 800 ml of clear seroma was evacuated. During the next 10 days, ischemia progressed, along with the development of another two full-thickness skin necrotic foci paramedially (). Considering the relatively strict demarcation area of necrosis, we opted for the operative procedure of necrosectomy. Following abdominal wall necrosectomy with a safety margin of healthy tissue and considering an appropriate amount of vital residual abdominal skin, as well as the absence of signs of local tissue

title: pmc-8718506-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-8718506-1
病例摘要：一名16岁男性患有DOCK8缺陷（携带DOCK8变异NM_203447.3:c.4153+1G>A的纯合子），在一项由国家癌症研究所IRB批准的针对DOCK8患者的HSCT试验（NCT01176006）中注册。他的疾病在他8岁时被诊断出来，表现为反复发生的鼻窦和肺部感染、慢性传染性软疣以及湿疹样皮肤炎症。近期并发症包括在HSCT前4个月诊断出弥漫大B细胞淋巴瘤(DLBCL)。在接受利妥昔单抗（4次剂量）和LMB方案（, ）（2个周期），包括长春新碱、多柔比星、皮质类固醇、甲氨蝶呤以及根据ANHL1131组别B（R-COPADM）的环磷酰胺累积剂量为3300 mg/m²治疗时，出现了化疗相关的III级BKV-HC，通过使用cidofovir和2次第三方供体来源的四价抗巨细胞病毒(CMV)、EB病毒(EBV)、腺病毒(ADV)和BK病毒特异性T细胞(VSTs)（5x10⁷个/平方米）进行管理。这些VSTs耐受良好，没有出现输注反应。HC症状随后消失，但无症状的BK病毒血症持续存在。达到完全缓解后，他进行了HSCT，其父亲作为半相合骨髓供者。减强度预处理方案包括氟达拉滨30 mg/m²×5天（第-6至-2天），白消安剂量调整以目标曲线下面积(AUC)为3600-4000 uM.min/天×3天（第-4至-2天），环磷酰胺14.5 mg/kg×2天（第-6和-5天），以及低剂量全身照射(TBI，200 cGy)于第-1天。移植物抗宿主病(GVHD)预防包括移植后环磷酰胺(PT/Cy)在第+3和+4天使用，以及麦考酚酸酯(MMF)×30天和他克莫司×6个月，两者均从第+5天开始（）。HSCT当天出现轻度膀胱炎，无血尿。BK病毒血症同时从HSCT前3天的588,844拷贝/mL增加到第+4天的6,456,542拷贝/mL（）。他HSCT后的早期过程复杂，伴有大量血尿和疼痛性膀胱痉挛，以及PT/Cy(50 mg/kg)在第+3和+4天使用。第+14天出现IV级大量血尿，伴随急性肾损伤(AKI)，并持续存在（）。持续的输血依赖导致11天内体重增加11公斤。每日使用血小板输注以维持血小板计数≥30 K/μL，但未达到血小板植入≥50 K/μL。中性粒细胞植入在第+21天实现；染色体研究表明100%为供者来源的细胞，没有证据表明GVHD。进行性肾积水和输尿管扩张导致在第+30天放置了Foley导尿管和双侧经皮肾造瘘管。左侧经皮肾造瘘管引起的大量血尿引发了左肾动脉造影，显示与造瘘无关的多处活动性出血，并伴有提示血管炎的特征。进行了两次单独的栓塞操作（第+35天和第+38天），仅提供了暂时稳定。持续的出血和输血需求伴随着总胆红素和直接胆红素水平的增加（分别为2.9 mg/dL和2.7 mg/dL，第+43天）。在第+42天进行了完全左侧肾动脉栓塞，并随后开始静脉注射cidofovir治疗。这稳定了患者的状态，以便他可以接受来自同一供者的第二次VST输注（NCT02532452），这是在他HSCT前的输注中使用的同一批次。第三次VST输注时BK病毒血症测量为5,754,399拷贝/mL，比移植前VSTs中的病毒载量增加了近一个数量级（）。在VST输注后两天（第+45天），发热、低血压、肺部阴影恶化和双侧胸腔积液的出现表明发生了细胞因子释放综合征(CRS)。炎症标志物也升高，CRP峰值为268.7 mg/L，在第+43天达到VST输注后。有趣的是，CRP在VST输注前几天内上升，可能是在大量出血和介入性操作的背景下发生的。从VSTs前两天（第+40天）开始观察到铁蛋白快速上升至4,641 mcg/mL。

metadata.original_text: A 16-year-old male with DOCK8 deficiency (homozygous for DOCK8 variant NM_203447.3:c.4153+1G>A) enrolled on an IRB-approved National Cancer Institute HSCT trial for patients with DOCK8 (NCT01176006). His disease, diagnosed at age 8 years, manifested with recurrent sinopulmonary infections, chronic molluscum contagiosum, and eczematous dermatitis. Recent complications included diagnosis of Diffuse Large B-Cell Lymphoma (DLBCL) 4 months pre-HSCT. Treatment with rituximab (4 doses) and LMB regimen (, ) (2 cycles), including vincristine, doxorubicin, corticosteroids, methotrexate and with cumulative cyclophosphamide dose of 3300 mg/m2 as per ANHL1131, Group B (R-COPADM), was complicated by chemotherapy-associated grade III BKV-HC managed with cidofovir and 2 infusions of third-party donor-derived quadrivalent anti-cytomegalovirus (CMV), -Epstein-Barr virus (EBV), -adenovirus (ADV), and -BK virus specific T-cells (VSTs) at 5x107 cells/m2 (NCT02532452) (). VSTs were well tolerated without any infusion reaction. HC symptoms subsequently resolved while asymptomatic BK viremia persisted. Achieving a complete remission, he proceeded to HSCT with his father as the haploidentical bone marrow donor. Reduced intensity (RIC) conditioning was comprised of fludarabine 30 mg/m2 x 5 days (days -6 to -2), busulfan dosed with target area under the curve (AUC) of 3600-4000 uM.min/day x 3 days (days -4 to -2), cyclophosphamide 14.5 mg/kg x 2 days (days -6 and -5), and low-dose total body irradiation (TBI, 200 cGy) on day -1.
