Graft-versus-host disease (GVHD) prophylaxis was comprised of post-transplant cyclophosphamide (PT/Cy) on days +3 and + 4 along with mycophenolate mofetil (MMF) x 30 days and tacrolimus x 6 months, both of which started on day +5 (). Mild cystitis without hematuria developed on HSCT day 0. BK viremia simultaneously increased from 588,844 copies/mL (3 days pre-HSCT) to 6,456,542 copies/mL on day +4 (). His immediate post-HSCT course was complicated by gross hematuria and painful bladder spasms with PT/Cy (50 mg/kg) on days +3 and +4. Grade IV gross hematuria, managed with daily blood product transfusions, persisted alongside worsening acute kidney injury (AKI, day +14) (). Continued transfusion dependence led to significant fluid retention and 11 kg weight gain over 11 days. Daily platelet infusions were used to maintain platelet count ≥ 30 K/mcL, and platelet engraftment ≥ 50 K/mcL was not attained. Neutrophil engraftment was achieved at day +21; chimerism studies demonstrated 100% donor-derived cells without evidence of GVHD. Progressive hydronephrosis and hydroureter prompted Foley catheter and bilateral nephrostomy tube placement by day +30. Gross hematuria from the left nephrostomy tube occasioned left renal arteriography which revealed active bleeding unrelated to the nephrostomy at multiple sites and features suggestive of vasculitis. Coil embolization performed on two separate occasions (days +35 and +38) provided only transient stabilization. Ongoing bleeding and transfusion needs were accompanied by increasing total and direct hyperbilirubinemia (2.9 mg/dL and 2.7 mg/dL, respectively (day +43)). Complete left renal artery embolization on day +42, followed by initiation of intravenous cidofovir (), stabilized the patient for transport to receive an additional infusion of third-party VSTs (day +43) produced using the same donor as his second pre-HSCT infusion (NCT02532452). BK viremia measured 5,754,399 copies/mL at third infusion, nearly a full log increase from viral load with pre-transplant VSTs (). Two days after VST infusion (day +45), onset of cytokine release syndrome (CRS) was evidenced by fever, hypotension, worsening lung opacities, and bilateral pleural effusions. Inflammatory markers indicative of CRS were also elevated. CRP peaked at 268.7 mg/L on day +43 following VST infusion. Interestingly, CRP had been rising in the days leading up to VST infusion, potentially in the context of significant bleeding and interventional procedures. A rapid rise in ferritin was seen from 4,641 mcg/mL pre-VSTs (day +40)

title: pmc-8718547-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-8718547-1
病例摘要：一名77岁的男性患有冠状动脉疾病(CAD)，于2017年11月和2019年10月接受了经皮冠状动脉介入治疗(PCI)。患者有严重的主动脉瓣狭窄(AS)，跨主动脉瓣平均压力梯度为47 mmHg，并在2019年11月顺利进行了经导管主动脉瓣植入术(TAVR)，使用的是29 mm的Edwards Sapien 3瓣膜。TAVR术后一天，患者的超声心动图显示跨主动脉瓣平均压力梯度为15 mmHg。呼吸困难有所改善，并且患者随后有良好的运动耐受性。一年后(2020年10月)，患者出现加重的心力衰竭和肺水肿。心电图(ECG)显示新发房颤(Af)，超声心动图则显示出跨主动脉瓣平均压力梯度增加至48 mmHg，二尖瓣反流(MR)恶化以及肺动脉高压(PH)。患者对标准的心力衰竭治疗如静脉正性肌力药物和利尿剂的反应不佳。多层螺旋CT(MDCT)显示有假性室壁瘤(HALT)和右心室流出道血栓(RLM)。在继续使用抗血小板药物治疗CAD的同时，由于新发房颤(Af)，并伴有瓣膜叶血栓形成，患者开始服用新型口服抗凝药(NOAC，利伐沙班)。在接下来的三个月内的一系列随访超声心动图显示跨主动脉瓣平均压力梯度逐渐下降至17 mmHg，并且二尖瓣反流和肺动脉高压有所减轻。MDCT显示，在NOAC治疗4个月后，假性室壁瘤(HALT)和右心室流出道血栓(RLM)消失。患者的心力衰竭症状逐渐改善，但房颤持续存在。不幸的是，在同时使用氯吡格雷和利伐沙班的第五个月后，患者出现了柏油样大便，并且血红蛋白降至7.2 mg/dL。患者接受了治疗性内镜检查、质子泵抑制剂以及输血以止住上消化道出血。患者停用了氯吡格雷，但继续使用利伐沙班，并且此后没有出现心力衰竭症状和出血事件。

metadata.original_text: A 77-year-old man had CAD and underwent percutaneous coronary intervention (PCI) in November 2017 and October 2019. The patient had severe AS with trans-aortic valve mean pressure gradient of 47 mmHg and received TAVR with a 29 mm Edwards Sapien 3 valve uneventfully in November 2019. A day after TAVR, echocardiographic-derived mean trans-aortic valve pressure gradient of the patient was 15 mmHg (). Dyspnea was improved, and the patient had good exercise tolerance thereafter. One year later (October 2020), the patient suffered from worsening heart failure with pulmonary edema. ECG of the patient revealed a new-onset Af and the echocardiogram disclosed an increased mean THV pressure gradient to 48 mmHg (), worsening mitral regurgitation (MR), and pulmonary hypertension (PH). Response of the patient to standard heart failure treatment, such as intravenous inotropics and diuretics, was poor. MDCT revealed HALT and RLM (). On the top of the concurrent single antiplatelet medication for CAD of the patient, a NOAC (rivaroxaban) was added for the new-onset Af and leaflet thrombosis. A series of follow-up echocardiograms within 3 months showed a progressive drop in trans-aortic valve pressure gradient to 17 mmHg (), together with reduced MR and PH. MDCT showed resolution of HALT and RLM () 4 months after NOAC treatment. Heart failure symptoms improved gradually but Af persisted. Unfortunately, the patient had a passage of tarry stool and drop of hemoglobin to 7.2 mg/dl in the fifth month after concomitant use of clopidogrel and rivaroxaban. The patient received a therapeutic endoscope, proton pump inhibitors, and blood transfusion for stopping the upper gastrointestinal bleeding. The patient discontinued clopidogrel but kept on using rivaroxaban and was free from heart failure symptoms and bleeding events thereafter.

title: pmc-8718638-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-8718638-1
病例摘要：一名70岁的男性于2017年7月因呼吸困难就诊。他没有报告任何肿瘤或自身免疫家族病史，但有1型糖尿病、血脂异常和动脉高血压的个人病史。胸腔镜检查允许积液排出，并确诊为上皮样恶性胸膜间皮瘤。一线化疗使用顺铂-培美曲塞方案开始，并因肾功能恶化而改为卡铂-培美曲塞（6个周期）。2017年11月，由于胸腔积液复发，他开始接受长春瑞滨治疗。2021年3月，由于呼吸困难加剧并需要多次胸腔穿刺，CT扫描显示胸膜结节性增厚。肿瘤董事会决定在第三线使用纳武单抗进行治疗（每两周240毫克）。在接受第一次输注后（2021年3月18日），他出现了二级乏力、一级呕吐和胃食管反流病（GERD）伴体重减轻3公斤。第二次输注两天后（2021年3月31日），患者因乏力、呕吐和三级腹泻联系我们，严重影响了生活质量（在家使用地索普瑞坦、洛哌丁胺和雷沙吉兰治疗）。第三次输注报告延迟两周。他因水样且有恶臭的腹泻而住院，没有血便，伴有GERD、波动性恶心和呕吐，并发脱水和低血压。体格检查显示一级心动过速、已知的胸腔积液以及正常的腹部。血液学检查结果显示离子浓度、TSH、ACTH和皮质醇的血浆值正常。总免疫球蛋白剂量正常，血清蛋白质电泳仅显示出炎症谱型。粪便培养、艰难梭菌研究及粪便寄生虫检查均为阴性。为了进一步明确诊断，我们进行了内镜评估。回肠结肠镜检查及其回肠和结肠活检均未见异常，排除了克罗恩病、溃疡性结肠炎或ICI诱导的结肠炎。食管-胃-十二指肠镜（EGD）显示主要的十二指肠炎症，表现为红斑样外观及弥漫性浅表性溃疡（）。为了排除感染性肠病，我们进行了肠道活检，并且细菌学和病毒学检查结果均正常。令人惊讶的是，组织病理学检查揭示了克罗恩病的基本病变：上皮内T淋巴细胞增加（>30 IEL/100个肠细胞），隐窝增生，显著的绒毛萎缩以及正常隐窝/绒毛比例（3:1）（）。根据Oberhuber修改后的组织病理学发现分类标准，克罗恩病被分级为3b型。血清IgA抗组织转谷氨酰胺酶抗体阳性（128 U/ml，实验室正常值为10 U/ml），抗内皮细胞IgA抗体阳性（80 U/ml，实验室正常值为10 U/ml）。综合内镜、病理学和血液学结果，我们诊断为由免疫检查点抑制剂（抗PD-1纳武单抗）引起的克罗恩病。他最初接受了静脉注射质子泵抑制剂（PPI）200毫克/天48小时，然后改为每天120毫克（3次分服40毫克）。一个月内使用80毫克的PPI。尽管有止泻药物治疗，腹泻仍持续存在，因此开始使用甲基泼尼松龙1毫克/公斤/天静脉注射3天，随后口服泼尼松龙剂量为1毫克/公斤/天2个月，之后逐渐减量至每天10毫克。在停用皮质激素之前进行了排除肾上腺功能不全的测试。还引入了无麸质饮食作为长期计划的一部分。患者住院两周后停止纳武单抗治疗。出院十天后，他每日仅出现三次腹泻。两个月后的随访中，他表示临床症状有所改善，并且体重增加，坚持无麸质饮食。进行了控制性EGD检查，发现炎症表现和十二指肠溃疡完全愈合（）。十二指肠活检显示绒毛萎缩1级及轻度慢性非特异性胃炎。

metadata.original_text: A 70-year-old man presented shortness of breath in July 2017. He did not report any oncological or autoimmune familial medical history, but had a personal history of type 1 diabetes, dyslipidemia, and arterial hypertension. A thoracoscopy allowed pleural fluid evacuation and the diagnosis of epithelioid malignant pleural mesothelioma. Frontline chemotherapy by cisplatin-pemetrexed was started and was switched to carboplatin-pemetrexed due to deterioration of renal function (6 cycles). In November 2017, he started vinorelbine due to pleural effusion relapse. In March 2021, as he presented an increase of dyspnea and needed several thoracentesis, CT scan showed a nodular thickening of pleura. The tumor board decided to treat him with nivolumab in 3rd line (240 mg every 2 weeks). After the 1st infusion (March 18, 2021), he presented with grade 2 asthenia, grade 1 vomiting, and gastroesophageal reflux disease (GERD) with a 3-kg weight loss. Two days after the second infusion (March 31, 2021), the patient contacted us for asthenia, vomiting, and grade 3 diarrhea, limiting his quality of life (treated at home by diosmectite, loperamide, and racecadotril). The 3rd infusion was reported by 2 weeks. He was hospitalized just before the 3rd infusion because of watery and foul-smelling diarrhea, without blood, GERD, fluctuating nausea, and vomiting, complicated by dehydration and hypotension. Physical examination revealed a grade 1 sinus tachycardia, a known pleural effusion, and a normal abdomen. Biologically, he had normal plasmatic values of ionogram, TSH, ACTH, and cortisol. The dosage of total immunoglobulins was normal, and the serum protein electrophoresis only showed an inflammatory profile. Stool culture, Clostridium difficile research, and parasitological examination of the stool were negative. To progress toward a diagnosis, we performed endoscopic evaluation. Ileocolonoscopy with ileal and colic biopsies were normal, eliminating Crohn’s disease, ulcerative colitis, or ICI-induced colitis. Esophago-gastroduodenoscopy (EGD) showed a major duodenitis with erythematous aspect and diffuse superficial ulcerations (). To eliminate infectious enteropathy, we performed intestinal biopsies with normal bacteriological and virological examination. Surprisingly, histological examination revealed elementary lesions of CeD: increased intraepithelial T lymphocytes (IEL) (>30 IEL/100 enterocytes), crypt hyperplasia, marked villous atrophy, and alteration of normal crypt/villous ratio (3:1) (). The CeD was graded type 3b according to the modified Marsh classification of histologic findings in CeD (Oberhuber). Serum IgA antibodies to tissue transglutaminase were positive (128 U/ml, with a lab norm of 10 U/ml) and anti-endomysial IgA were positive (80 U/ml, with a lab norm of 10 U/ml). Altogether, the endoscopic, histological, and biological results led us to the diagnosis of CeD induced by immune checkpoint inhibitors (anti PD-1 nivolumab). He was initially treated with proton pump inhibitors (PPI) intravenously 200 mg/day for 48 h and then 120 mg/day (40 mg 3 times a day). He received PPI at 80 mg for 1 month. In the face of persistent diarrhea despite anti-diarrheal medication, methylprednisolone 1 mg/kg/day was introduced initially intravenously for 3 days, then prednisolone per os at a dose of 1 mg/kg/day for 2 months, followed by a progressive decrease until 10 mg/day. A test to eliminate adrenal insufficiency was performed, before stopping corticosteroid. A gluten-free diet was also introduced in hospitalization for a long-term perspective. The patient remained in the hospital for 2 weeks and nivolumab was stopped. Ten days after the end of hospitalization, he only had three diarrheas per day. Two months later in the consultation, he mentioned a good clinical improvement and a weight gain with a good adherence of gluten-free diet. A control EGD was realized, finding a complete healing of the inflammatory aspect and of the ulcerations of the duodenum (). Duodenal biopsies showed grade I villus atrophy and mild chronic aspecific gastrit

title: pmc-8718648-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-8718648-1
病例摘要：一名78岁的女性，有自身免疫性肝炎和甲状腺功能减退的既往病史。她因左臂无力和抽搐症状通过紧急医疗服务被送入医院。家人在她进食时目睹了这一事件的发生。没有近期外伤或跌倒的历史。没有耳痛、听力下降或分泌物。没有意识丧失的报告。值得注意的是，她因自身免疫性肝炎正在服用硫唑嘌呤。到达医院后，神经科团队对她进行了评估。生命体征包括：血压升高至153/72 mmHg，脉搏正常91次/分钟，呼吸频率正常17次/分钟。体温正常。实验室检查显示白细胞计数（WBC）为7.2×10^9/L和血红蛋白水平为12 g/dL均在正常范围内。血小板计数低至80×10^9/L。血液化学检测除钠离子偏低（129 mEq/L）外，其他指标无异常。尿毒理学药物筛查结果为阴性。COVID-19 PCR（聚合酶链反应）测试也为阴性。入院时的头部计算机断层扫描（CT）显示左侧颞叶皮质内出血、右侧额叶沟蛛网膜下腔出血和左侧顶叶沟蛛网膜下腔出血。头部和颈部血管成像计算机断层血管造影（CTA）显示广泛静脉窦血栓形成，涉及上矢状窦、双侧横窦和镰状窦。她随后进行了脑部磁共振成像（MRI），包括对比增强的MRI和磁共振静脉成像（MRV），确认了广泛的静脉窦血栓形成和多腔出血。未见受限扩散现象。患者接受了神经介入科、神经外科和神经重症监护团队的评估。她因左上肢抽搐症状接受了卡马西平治疗，以缓解局灶性癫痫发作的症状。她开始使用肝素滴注进行抗凝治疗，并被收治入神经ICU进行密切神经系统监测。在24小时后达到了活化部分凝血活酶时间（aPTT）的治疗目标值67.2秒，并继续留在神经重症监护病房。由于持续存在的左侧肢体无力、弥漫性CVST、多腔出血、血小板减少以及预期中到高风险的不良预后，经过多学科团队讨论后决定在入院约48小时后进行经导管机械静脉血栓切除术。她成功接受了使用INARI FlowTriever系统进行的机械静脉血栓切除术，并且大量血栓被移除。手术后她的临床状况稳定，左上肢无力症状有所改善，在术后第5天无新的出血性中风症状。22法尺寸（7.33毫米）的静脉穿刺采用8字缝合技术进行缝合并辅以手动压迫。未发现术后股部并发症。出院前她被转换为新型口服抗凝药物。在3个月随访期间，脑部磁共振成像包括对比增强显示上矢状窦和左侧横-镰状复合体的血栓负担几乎完全消失。她的3个月改良Rankin评分（mRS）为0。她接受了12个月的阿哌沙班治疗，并计划进行后续脑部磁共振静脉造影检查。

metadata.original_text: A 78-year-old female with past medical history including autoimmune hepatitis, hypothyroidism. She presented to the hospital via emergency medical services with left arm weakness and jerky movements. This event was witnessed by family while she was eating. No recent trauma or fall. No earache, hearing loss, or discharge. No loss of consciousness reported. Of note, she is on azathioprine for autoimmune hepatitis. She was evaluated by the stroke team upon arrival. Vital signs included: elevated blood pressure at 153/72 mmHg, normal pulse 91, and normal respiratory rate at 17. She was afebrile. Laboratory work up revealed normal white cell count (WBC) of 7.2 109/L, and normal hemoglobin of 12 gm/dL. Platelets noted to be low at 80 109/L. Serum chemistry was unremarkable except for low sodium of 129 mEq/L. Urine toxicology drug screen was negative. COVID-19 PCR (polymerase chain reaction) test was negative. A Computed Tomography (CT) head on admission revealed left temporoparietal intraparenchymal hemorrhage, right frontal sulcal subarachnoid hemorrhage, and left parietal sulcal subarachnoid hemorrhage. Vessel images with Computed Tomography Angiogram (CTA) head and neck revealed extensive venous sinus thrombosis involving superior sagittal sinus, bilateral transverse, and sigmoid sinuses. She subsequently underwent Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI) of the brain with and without contrast and Magnetic Resonance Venogram (MRV) which confirmed extensive venous sinus thrombosis and multicompartment bleeding. No restricted diffusion noted (). Patient was evaluated by interventional neurology, neurosurgery, and neuro critical care team. She was started on levetiracetam for symptomatic treatment of focal seizures with left upper extremity shaking. She was started on anticoagulation with heparin drip and was admitted to neuro ICU for close neurological monitoring. Desired therapeutic level of activated Partial Thromboplastin Time (aPTT) at 67.2 s was achieved at 24 h and patient remained in the neuro critical intensive care unit. After a thorough multidisciplinary team discussion due to persistent left-sided weakness, diffuse CVST, multicompartment bleeding while being on anticoagulation, low platelets, and anticipation of moderate to high risk of unfavorable outcome; the decision was to perform endovascular mechanical venous thrombectomy (Approximately 48 h after admission). She underwent a successful mechanical venous thrombectomy using the INARI FlowTriever system with large clot burden extracted. She remained clinically stable after the procedure and her left upper extremity weakness improved at day 5. No new symptomatic ICH. The 22 French (7.33 mm) venous access was sutured with figure of 8 technique followed by manual pressure. No post-procedure groin complications noted. She was switched to novel oral anticoagulation prior to discharge. During the 3 months follow-up–MRI brain with and without contrast revealed near complete resolution of the clot burden in superior sagittal sinus and left transverse-sigmoid complex. Her 3 months modified Rankin score was at 0. She was resumed on apixaban for 12 months with a follow-up brain magnetic resonance venogram planned.

title: pmc-8718678-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-8718678-1
病例摘要：一名44岁男性急性淋巴细胞白血病（ALL）患者在第0天接受了诱导化疗（IC）。各阶段情况概述见。骨髓抑制伴发热和脓毒性休克发生在第10天。患者遭受严重感染，使用了经验性治疗，包括亚胺培南（IPI，每8小时1g静脉注射）、万古霉素（VAN，每12小时1g静脉注射）和伏立康唑（VRC，每12小时200mg静脉注射），作为广谱抗菌和抗真菌预防及经验性治疗。使用了包括抗真菌在内的广谱抗生素。患者血压恢复，但在3天后再次出现发热。当时，在第10至第28天期间，外周血（PB）的多次培养均为阴性。未检测到病原体，并且从第10天到第25天患者经历了中性粒细胞减少症（）。然而，患者的右侧肢体突然出现了偏瘫和半侧抽搐，脑部计算机断层扫描（CT）显示右侧顶叶有一个高密度病变伴有周围水肿，高度怀疑为右侧顶叶脑梗死，并且左侧和右侧顶叶有小的低密度区域。脑部磁共振血管成像（MRA）未见明显异常，但肺部CT在第18天显示多个高密度病灶（）。化疗后出现发热伴脑症状的患者可能高度提示中枢神经系统感染（, ）。治疗继续使用伏立康唑和亚胺培南，并于第22天（广州兆康生物科技有限公司）(1,3)-β-D-葡聚糖检测结果为阳性（100.70 pg/mL）后，改为替考拉宁（TEC，每天400mg静脉注射）作为抗菌和抗真菌药物。在第22天之后的测试中，脑部和肺部病灶更加严重。血清降钙素原（PCT）水平升高至4.40 ng/mL，c-反应蛋白（CRP）达到218.33 mg/L。丙氨酸转氨酶（ALT）和天冬氨酸转氨酶（AST）分别达到145 U/L和242 U/L。其他药物用于保护肝功能。在第25天通过mNGS（北京基因凯医学技术有限公司，NextSeq 500）检测到外周血中米黑霉菌感染（相对丰度约99.94%），并于第25日至第55日立即使用脂质体阿莫芬净（AmBL，每天100mg静脉注射）作为抗真菌治疗。经过3天的治疗后，患者体温恢复正常（36-37°C），并在第28天从中性粒细胞减少症恢复。米黑霉菌感染也在脑脊液（CSF）和支气管肺泡灌洗液（BAL）中通过mNGS检测到，相对丰度分别为约0.35%和28%，且脑脊液的常规和生化检查均为阴性（）。经过2至3周的抗真菌治疗后，CT扫描显示脑部和肺部病灶明显吸收（），PCT和CRP也随着抗真菌治疗而恢复（）。最终，患者的一般状况有所改善，并在第55天部分恢复了右侧肢体功能。由于家庭原因，他要求返回当地医院继续接受抗真菌治疗。经过2个月的电话随访后得知，患者因肝功能恢复正常，在接下来的两个月内改用阿莫芬净（AmB，每天150mg静脉注射）和泊沙康唑（Pos，每天300mg口服）。此外，该患者的影像学检查显示病灶显著缩小。针对ALL的下一次化疗也已准备就绪并计划进行。抗真菌药物方案耐受良好，并取得了显著效果。

metadata.original_text: A 44-year-old man with acute lymphoblastic leukemia (ALL) underwent induction chemotherapy (IC) (day 0). An outline of the episodes is showed in . Bone marrow suppression with fever and septic shock occurred on day 10. Patient suffered serious infection, and empirical treatments were used with imipenem (IPI, 1 g, every 8 h, intravenous injection), vancomycin (VAN, 1 g, every 12 h, intravenous injection) and voriconazole (VRC, 200 mg, every 12 h, intravenous injection) as broad-spectrum antibacterial and antifungal prophylaxis and empirical treatments were used with broad-spectrum antibiotics including antifungal prophylaxis. The patient's blood pressure recovered but recurrent fever occurred after 3 days. At that time, a series of cultures of peripheral blood (PB) were negative from day 10 to day 28. No pathogen could be detected, and the patient experienced neutropenia from day 10 to day 25 (). However, hemiplegia and hemiconvulsions suddenly occurred on patient's right limb, and computed tomography (CT) scans of patient's brain showed a hyperdense lesion with surrounding edema, which was highly suspected as cerebral infarction in the right parietal lobe and small hypodense areas in the left and right parietal lobes. No obvious abnormality was showed by magnetic resonance angiography (MRA) of patient's brain, but CT scans of the lung showed multiple hyperdense lesions on day 18 (). Febrile neutropenia in patients after chemotherapy with cerebral symptoms may be highly indicative of infections in the brain (, ). Treatment was continued VRC and IPI, and changed to teicoplanin (TEC, 400 mg, daily, intravenous injection) as antibacterial and antifungal drugs Treatment was changed to voriconazole (VRC) and imipenem as antifungal and antibacterial methods after a positive result for the test of (1,3)- β-D-glucan (100.70 pg/mL, Guangzhou Zhaokang Biotechnology Co., Ltd) on day 22. However, the fever was unresponsive and the lesions in the brain and lung were more serious a week later. The procalcitonin (PCT) level was elevated to 4.40 ng/mL, and c-reactive protein (CRP) reached 218.33 mg/L. Aminoleucine transferase (ALT) and aspartate transaminase (AST) reached 145 U/L and 242 U/L, respectively. Other drugs were applied to protect patient's liver function. Rhizomucor miehei infection was shown by mNGS (Genskey Medical Technology Co., Ltd, Beijing, China. NextSeq 500) of PB with high relative abundance about 99.94% on day 25 (), and liposome-associated amphotericin B (AmBL, 100 mg, daily, intravenous injection) was immediately used as antifungal therapy from day 25 to day 55. The patient's body temperature returned to normal (36–37°C) after 3 days of treatment and his complete blood count (CBC) recovered from neutropenia on day 28. Infection with Rhizomucor miehei was also proven by mNGS both in CSF with relative abundance about 0.35% on day 28 and BAL with relative abundance about 28% on day 35 (), and the routine and biochemical examinations of CSF were negative (). After 2 and 3 weeks of antifungal treatment, CT scans showed that lesions were obviously absorbed both in the brain () and the lung (), and PCT and CRP were also recovered following antifungal therapy (). Finally, the patient's general condition improved, and his right limb function partly recovered on day 55. He requested to go back to the local hospital to continue antifungal therapy due to his family reasons. After 2 months of follow-up by telephone, we learned that patient changed to receive antifungal treatment with amphotericin B (AmB, 150 mg, daily, intravenous injection) and posaconazole (Pos, 300 mg, daily, orally) for other 2 months, because patient's liver had recovered to normal function. Besides, significant reduction in the size of the lesions on imaging tests of this patient were reported. The next chemotherapy for ALL was also prepared to carried out. The antifungal drug regimen was well-tolerated and achieved a remarkable effect.

title: pmc-8718702-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-8718702-1
病例摘要：2021年1月，一名白种人男孩因急性单侧第六颅神经麻痹就诊于当地眼科医生，并随后被转诊至我们的儿科急诊科进行进一步评估。该患者一般状况良好，突然出现左眼外展功能障碍，表现为持续性外展不足和头部向左侧固定偏斜。他的病史中没有明显的创伤、头痛、呕吐或发热的记录。最近几周内他没有接种过疫苗。除了轻微的步态不稳之外，在临床检查中未发现其他伴随症状或其他局灶性神经功能缺损。该患者无慢性疾病，也没有服用任何常规药物；根据国家推荐，他的疫苗接种已完成。在出现症状前3周，该患者曾经历一次呼吸道感染，表现为呼吸频率增加、干咳、间歇性发热和食欲减退，持续了2周。当地儿科医生给予了对症治疗，并将患者的症状归因于普通感冒而非COVID-19。因此没有采集咽拭子进行SARS-CoV-2或其它病毒的检测。同时，该患者的父亲和他的叔叔也出现了咳嗽、呼吸困难、咽喉痛和肌肉疼痛的症状；其叔叔通过咽拭子PCR检测被确诊为SARS-CoV-2阳性（）。患者的叔叔不住在同一户内，但在参加室内生日聚会时与患者密切接触了4天。当时，COVID-19疫苗尚未对公众开放接种，因此该家庭成员均未接种疫苗。入院时，实验室炎症标志物包括C反应蛋白均为阴性。全血计数显示轻度血小板减少（186×10^9/L），但其他指标正常。颅内对比增强磁共振成像（MRI）显示左侧动眼神经发育不全和相应左侧外直肌萎缩，与对侧相比（）。未见任何提示炎症性颅内过程或颅内压增高的迹象，无视乳头水肿。进行了腰椎穿刺。脑脊液（CSF）开放压力为24 cmH2O，对应正常范围的上限，因此诊断性腰椎穿刺后进行了8 ml CSF的治疗性引流。常规CSF实验室参数结果正常；未检测到寡克隆带。从CSF中进行的多重PCR（Filmarray，BioFire，Biomerieux Lyon，法国）未检出巨细胞病毒（CMV）、肠道病毒、单纯疱疹病毒1型和2型、人疱疹病毒6型、人 parechovirus、水痘-带状疱疹病毒、Cryptococcus neoformans 和 gattii、大肠杆菌K1、流感嗜血杆菌、单核细胞增多性李斯特菌、脑膜炎奈瑟菌以及B群链球菌和肺炎链球菌。另外，从咽拭子样本中进行的多重PCR检测未检出腺病毒、冠状病毒229E、HKU1、NL63和OC43、人副流感病毒、人鼻病毒/肠病毒、甲型和乙型流感病毒、中东呼吸综合征冠状病毒（MERS-CoV）、SARS-CoV-2、副流感病毒1至4型、呼吸道合胞病毒、百日咳杆菌、副百日咳杆菌、肺炎支原体和肺炎衣原体。Borrelia burgdorferi的血清学检测在血清和CSF中均未检出抗体。脑电图（EEG）结果正常。重复的眼科检查显示由于左侧第六颅神经麻痹导致的非共同性斜视角度和左眼显著外展不足，符合左侧动眼神经麻痹的诊断。考虑存在后退综合征的可能性较低，因为症状突然出现且无眼球后退。视神经检查未见异常。对咽拭子样本进行实时逆转录PCR（rRT-PCR）检测SARS-CoV-2结果为阴性。

metadata.original_text: In January 2021, a 2-year-old boy of white Caucasian origin presented to his local ophthalmologist for acute unilateral sixth nerve palsy and was subsequently transferred to our pediatric emergency department for further evaluation. The patient, generally being fit and well, had developed a sudden dysfunction in lateral movement of his left eye, resulting in a continuous abduction deficit with consecutive fixated turn of the head to the left side. His medical history was unremarkable for trauma, headache, vomiting or fever. He had not received any vaccinations within the last few weeks. Apart from a mild gait instability, there were no concomitant symptoms or other focal neurological deficits on clinical examination. The patient did not suffer from any chronic diseases and did not take any regular medication; his vaccination status was complete according to national recommendations. Three weeks prior to onset of symptoms the patient had experienced a respiratory tract infection resulting in an increased respiratory rate, dry cough, intermittent fever and loss of appetite, lasting for 2 weeks. Symptomatic treatment was initiated by his local pediatrician, who attributed the patient's symptoms to a common cold rather than COVID-19. Thus, no oropharyngeal swab for SARS-CoV-2 or other viruses was obtained. At the same time, the patient's father and his uncle developed cough, dyspnea, sore throat and muscle aches; the uncle tested positive for SARS-CoV-2 on PCR from oropharyngeal swab (). The child's uncle does not live in the same household but had been in close contact to the patient 4 days prior to his positive test for several hours due to an indoor-birthday party. The patient's relatives were unvaccinated as at that time the COVID-19 vaccines were still unavailable for the general public. On admission, laboratory inflammatory markers including C-reactive protein were negative. Full blood count showed mild thrombocytopenia (186 109/) but was unremarkable otherwise. Cranial contrast-enhanced magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) showed an hypoplastic left abducens nerve and atrophy of the corresponding left lateral rectus muscle compared to the contralateral side (). There were no signs suggesting any inflammatory intracranial process or elevated intracranial pressure, no papilledema. A lumbar puncture was performed. The cerebrospinal fluid (CSF) opening pressure was 24 cmH2O corresponding to the upper limit of normal range () thus diagnostic lumbar puncture was followed by therapeutic drainage of 8 ml CSF. Routine CSF laboratory parameters yielded a normal result; no oligoclonal bands were detected on CSF/serum. Multiplex-PCR (Filmarray, BioFire, Biomerieux Lyon, France) from CSF was negative for cytomegalovirus (CMV), enterovirus, herpes simplex viruses 1 and 2, human herpesvirus 6, human parechovirus, varicella zoster virus, Cryptococcus neoformans and gattii, E. coli K1, Haemophilus influenzae, Listeria monocytogenes, Neisseria meningitides as well as Streptococcus agalactiae and pneumoniae. An additional multiplex-PCR performed on an oropharyngeal swab sample yielded a negative result for adenovirus, coronaviruses 229E, HKU1, NL63 and OC43, human metapneumovirus, human rhino-/ enterovirus, influenza virus A and B, Middle East Respiratory Syndrome Coronavirus (MERS-CoV), SARS-CoV-2, parainfluenza virus 1–4, respiratory syncytial virus, Bordetella pertussis, Bordetella parapertusssis, Chlamydophila pneumonia and Mycoplasma pneumoniae. Testing for Borrelia burgdorferi showed no antibodies in neither serum nor CSF. An EEG was unremarkable. Repeated ophthalmologic examinations revealed incomitant squint angles due to left-sided sixth nerve palsy and a significant abduction deficit of the left eye, consistent with the diagnosis of left abducens nerve palsy. An underlying retraction syndrome was considered unlikely due to the sudden onset of symptoms and absent globe retraction. Optic nerve examination was unremarkable. Real-time reverse transcriptase PCR (rRT-PCR) test for SARS-CoV-2 (oropharyngeal swab sample) was negative on a

title: pmc-8718755-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-8718755-1
病例摘要：一名42岁的中国男性于2018年9月因右耳流液伴不适3年就诊于第四军医大学西京医院耳鼻咽喉科门诊。患者在2015年8月曾接触过海水，包括在山东省青岛市近海处进行的沿海潜水活动。几天后，患者注意到双耳有少量清澈的分泌物，并伴有轻微不适和耳痒。随着病情进展，在半个月内左侧耳朵的分泌物逐渐消失，而右侧耳朵的分泌物增多并变成浓稠、脓性分泌物，最终变为深棕色或巧克力色。由于分泌物变得非常厚且几乎完全阻塞了外耳道，患者出现了轻度听力下降，并伴有间歇性耳鸣和耳闷感。未经任何药物治疗，他使用棉签自行清理右耳的分泌物后，听力恢复正常并缓解了症状。几天后，新的浓稠分泌物再次阻塞了外耳道，症状重新出现。该患者曾两次在陕西省西安市当地医院就诊，但未明确诊断且病情未见好转。直至2018年3月，右侧耳朵的分泌物逐渐减少并从棕色变为白色，在当地医院使用低浓度过氧化氢溶液冲洗右耳道。患病期间，患者否认有发热、寒战、头痛、眩晕、腹泻或腹胀等伴随症状，并无感染性疾病、糖尿病或免疫抑制状态的病史。在诊断前，该患者进行了听力学检查和耳镜检查，还通过计算机断层扫描影像学检查了颞骨。右侧耳朵的分泌物使用无菌拭子采集并转移至临床微生物实验室进行检测。所有标本处理及细菌学分析程序均获得第四军医大学西京医院伦理委员会批准（编号KY20183304-1）。患者在参与该项目前提供了书面知情同意书。

metadata.original_text: A 42-year-old Chinese man presented to the outpatient clinic of otorhinolaryngology at Xijing Hospital, Fourth Military Medical University, in September 2018, complaining of right ear discharge accompanied by discomfort for 3 years. The patient had a history of seawater contact in August 2015, including underwater diving near the coast of the Yellow Sea near Qingdao City, Shandong Province. After a couple of days, the patient noticed a small volume of clear drainage from both ears, accompanied by mild discomfort and ear pruritus. As the condition progressed, drainage from the left ear gradually vanished within half a month, whereas the drainage from the right side increased and became a thick, purulent exudate containing debris, eventually turning a dark brown or chocolate color. As the ear canal became almost entirely obstructed by the thick excretion, the patient experienced mild hearing loss, coupled with intermittent tinnitus, and experienced a sensation of ear fullness. Without the use of any medications, he removed debris from the right ear using cotton swabs, resulting in a return to normal hearing and the relief of symptoms. Within a few days, new thick drainage would obstruct the ear canal, and the symptoms would reappear. The patient sought health care twice at local hospitals in Xi’an City from Shaanxi Province; however, the underlying illness remained unidentified and did not improve. The discharge from the right ear gradually reduced and turned from brown to white until March 2018, when a low-concentration hydrogen peroxide solution was used to rinse the right ear canal at a local hospital. During the course of the illness, the patient denied any accompanying symptoms, such as fever, chills, headache, vertigo, diarrhea, or flatulence, and he did not have a history of infectious diseases, diabetes, or any immunocompromising condition. Before the diagnosis, the patient underwent audiometric and otoscopic examinations, in addition to radiological examinations using computed tomography imaging to examine the temporal bone. The exudate was collected from his right ear using a sterile swab and was transferred to the clinical microbiology laboratory for examination. All specimen processing and bacteriological analysis procedures were performed with approval from the ethics committee of the Xijing Hospital, Fourth Military Medical University, with assigned number KY20183304-1. The patient provided written informed consent prior to participation in this project.

title: pmc-8718908-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-8718908-1
病例摘要：患者是一位52岁的白人绝经后女性，非吸烟者。在1997年研究开始前的八年，由资深内科医生（P.K.）和资深皮肤科医生（N.S.）根据以下ACR标准诊断为SLE：肾小球肾炎（慢性系膜增生性肾小球肾炎，WHO分类IIIa），表现为镜下血尿；关节痛；荨麻疹性血管炎；口腔溃疡；面部皮疹。此外，她还表现出补体C4减少（低补体血症）、白细胞减少和抗核抗体（ANA，1:2560）增强；抗双链DNA抗体（ds DNA）检测为阴性。药物治疗持续了三年，主要使用类固醇（4-20mg）与非甾体抗炎药（对乙酰氨基酚）联合治疗。患者不耐受抗疟疾药物，并且拒绝进一步的免疫抑制疗法（如硫唑嘌呤、麦考酚酸酯、环磷酰胺），尽管她的疾病符合SLE WHO分类IIIa标准。然而，在药物治疗期间，她的实验室检查结果有所改善（无蛋白尿，无异常尿沉渣）。诊断后，患者接受了为期三年的心理治疗。在1989年首次诊断至1997年研究开始期间的定期随访中，以下与SLE相关的轻度临床表现被识别：口腔溃疡、不同部位的荨麻疹性血管炎（如面部皮疹）、小关节疼痛、疲劳、疲倦和发热。这些症状不需要使用类固醇或免疫抑制药物治疗，并由患者对症处理（例如，用羟乙基喹啉溶液漱口）。在研究开始时，患者的ANA水平升高（1:160，ds DNA阴性，SS-Ro抗体阳性），伴有上述轻度临床症状，这些症状不需要使用类固醇治疗。

metadata.original_text: The patient is a 52-year-old white post-menopausal woman and a non-smoker. Eight years prior to the study start in 1997, the diagnosis SLE was made by a senior internist (P.K.) and a senior dermatologist (N.S.) according to the following ACR criteria: kidney involvement (histological evaluation of chronic mesangial proliferative glomerulonephritis, WHO classification IIIa) with microscopic hematuria; arthralgia; urticarial vasculitis; oral ulcers; facial rash. Moreover, she showed decreased complement C4 (hypocomplementemia), leukopenia and enhanced antinuclear antibodies (ANA, 1:2560); analyses of antinuclear anti-double-stranded DNA antibodies (ds DNA) were negative. Pharmacologic treatment lasted three years and consisted primarily of steroids (4–20mg) in combination with other non-steroidal anti-inflammatory medication (paracetamol). The patient did not tolerate antimalarials; moreover, she refused further immune suppressive therapy (e.g. azathioprine, mycophenolate, cyclophosphamide) although her disease fulfilled WHO classification IIIa for SLE. Nevertheless, her laboratory values improved (no proteinuria, no pathological urine sediment) during pharmacologic treatment. The patient attended psychotherapy for three years following diagnosis. During regular check-ups between first diagnosis in 1989 and study start in 1997, the following minor clinical disease manifestations related to SLE had been identified: oral ulcers, urticarial vasculitis lesions at various body sites (e.g. facial rash), small joint pain, fatigue, tiredness and fever. These symptoms did not require steroidal or immunosuppressive drug therapy and were treated by the patient symptomatically (e.g. mouth rinsing with hexetidin solution). At study start, the patient presented with elevated ANA (1:160, ds DNA negative, SS-Ro-antibody positive) with the above-mentioned mild clinical symptoms, which did not require steroid treatment.

title: pmc-8719313-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-8719313-1
病例摘要：一名60岁女性因颈部肿块持续增大一年，声音嘶哑一周以及呼吸困难五个月入院。患者无甲状旁腺疾病或高钙血症-颌骨肿瘤综合征的家族史。体格检查发现左侧颈部有一个约6.0 cm * 5.0 cm的坚实肿块。实验室检查显示血清PTH水平升高（188.1 pg/ml，参考范围：15–65 pg/ml）和高钙血症（总血钙：3.29 mmol/L，参考范围：2.1–2.6 mmol/L）。甲状腺功能相关指标在正常范围内。喉镜检查显示左侧声带麻痹。超声检查发现左侧甲状腺显著增大，低回声病变几乎占据了整个腺体，并且颈部CT也显示出类似的表现（）。Tc-99m Sestamibi显像显示左侧甲状腺存在双相核素积聚（） 。胸部CT显示多个微小肺部结节（）。在手术探查过程中，我们发现肿瘤侵犯了前颈肌群和左侧的返神经。仅在左侧颈部发现了上甲状旁腺。进行了包括部分受侵的返神经和肌肉组织以及整个甲状腺在内的整块切除术，并进行了左侧中央淋巴结清扫以彻底清除受影响的组织。病理检查结果显示甲状腺明显浸润，正常腺体几乎不可见（）。术后病理检查发现SaPC广泛侵犯同侧甲状腺，并且1/6的淋巴结出现转移。进一步进行免疫组化染色以确认诊断（）：(1) 肿瘤成分：部分PC细胞核parafibromin染色阴性；Cytokeratin (AE1/AE3) (+)；Chromogranin A (+)；E-Cadherin (+)；PTH (+)；Calcitonin (-)；Thyroglobulin (-)；Desmin (-)；KI-67指数 10%；(2) 纤维细胞成分：Desmin (+)；Cytokeratin (AE1/AE3) (-)；Chromogranin A (-)；E-Cadherin (-)；Calcitonin (-)；KI-67指数 30%。此外，在病理检查中还发现了过渡区（）和肿瘤成分及梭形细胞成分中的N-cad阳性染色（）。术后患者恢复良好，但声音嘶哑未见改善。喝水时没有呛咳现象，呼吸困难明显好转。三个月后，患者主诉呼吸困难逐渐加重，并且颈部肿块增大。此期间血钙和PTH水平均无异常升高（）。临床检查提示局部复发及多发性肺转移（）。与之前的胸部CT相比，似乎在首次手术前就已经发生了肺部转移。增强MRI显示肿瘤广泛侵犯了局部器官和组织（）。最终，患者放弃了进一步的医疗治疗。

metadata.original_text: A 60-year-old woman was admitted with a continuously enlarged neck mass for 1 year and hoarseness for 1 week. In addition, she presented with dyspnea for 5 months. The patient had no family history of parathyroid diseases or hyperparathyroidism-jaw tumor syndrome. Physical examination showed a firm left neck mass of approximately 6.0 cm * 5.0 cm. Laboratory findings revealed elevated serum PTH (188.1 pg/ml, reference range: 15–65 pg/ml) and hypercalcemia (total serum calcium: 3.29 mmol/L, reference range: 2.1–2.6 mmol/L). Indicators related to thyroid function were within normal limits. Laryngoscopy showed left vocal cord paralysis. Ultrasonography showed that the left thyroid lobe was enlarged significantly, a hypoechoic lesion nearly occupied the whole lobe, and comparable signs were presented on the neck CT (). Tc-99m sestamibi scintigraphy demonstrated two-phase nuclide accumulation on the left thyroid (). Chest CT showed multiple micro pulmonary nodules (). During the surgical exploration, we found that the tumor invaded the anterior cervical muscle group and left recurrent laryngeal nerve. Only the superior parathyroid was found in the left neck. En bloc resection (including part of the invaded recurrent laryngeal nerve and muscle tissue and entire thyroid) and left central lymph node dissection were performed to completely remove the affected tissue. The tumor profile showed that the thyroid was markedly infiltrated, and the normal gland was almost invisible (). Postoperative histopathological findings revealed that SaPC widely invaded the ipsilateral thyroid, and 1/6 of the lymph nodes showed metastasis. Immunohistochemical staining was further performed to confirm the diagnosis (); results were presented below: (1) Carcinomatous components: Some PC cells show negative nuclear staining of parafibromin (); Cytokeratin (AE1/AE3) (+); Chromogranin A (+); E-Cadherin (+); PTH (+); Calcitonin (–); Thyroglobulin (-); Desmin (-); KI-67 index 10%; (2) Spindle cell components: Desmin (+; ); Cytokeratin (AE1/AE3) (-); Chromogranin A (-); E-Cadherin (-); Calcitonin (-); KI-67 index 30%. In addition, the existence of transition zones () and positive N-cad staining in both carcinomatous and sarcomatoid components () was found during pathological examination. The patient recovered soon postoperatively and remained hoarse. She did not experience choking when drinking water, and dyspnea significantly improved. Three months later, the patient complained of progressively aggravating dyspnea and a gradually growing neck mass. Serum calcium and PTH levels were without abnormal elevation during this time (). Clinical examinations suggested regional relapse and multiple pulmonary metastases (). In contrast to the chest CT before, it seemed that pulmonary metastasis had occurred before the first surgery. Enhanced MRI showed extensive local organ and tissue invasion by the recurred tumor (). At last, the patient gave up the medical treatments.

title: pmc-8719982-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-8719982-1
病例摘要：患者为一名75岁男性，体质指数（BMI）为23.4 kg/m²，美国麻醉医师协会（ASA）分级为三级。他有终末期肾病并接受血液透析的病史，并最初因亚急性功能下降和脑病从外部医疗机构转入我院。入院检查显示白细胞计数为12,800个/μL、粪肠球菌败血症以及双侧胸腔积液。心电图（ECG）显示窦性心律伴一度房室传导阻滞及右束支传导阻滞。患者因败血症接受了广谱抗生素治疗，并后来改为氨苄青霉素。重复血液培养结果为阴性。入院第一天，患者进行了经胸超声心动图检查，结果显示左心室射血分数为45-50%，伴有弥漫性收缩功能不全、中度右室功能障碍、轻度肺动脉高压（PASP 41 mmHg）及无可见瓣膜赘生物。患者右侧胸腔积液进行了胸腔穿刺，并且胸腔液体培养结果显示粪肠球菌感染。鉴于这种多灶性粪肠球菌感染，进行了经食管超声心动图（TEE）检查。入院第九天，在监测麻醉下进行了TEE检查。根据机构指南，因存在肺动脉高压，麻醉科被咨询参与。患者按照美国麻醉医师协会（ASA）的推荐连接了标准监护设备。通过面罩提供补充氧气，并进行呼气末二氧化碳监测。在程序开始时，患者的血压为140/50 mmHg，心率为60次/分左右。在接受丙泊酚后，其血压迅速下降至60/40 mmHg，在程序进行到十五分钟后。此时，患者出现心动过缓并进入无脉电活动（PEA）心脏骤停。TEE探头被移除，并根据高级生命支持算法开始胸外按压。患者进行了气管插管，并在四轮胸外按压和肾上腺素给药后恢复自主循环。随后，患者的节律恶化为室颤，需要进行电击复律及进一步的胸外按压。再次恢复自主循环后，患者被转至重症监护病房。回顾TEE在PEA心脏骤停开始时拍摄的图像，发现右心室严重扩张且收缩功能减弱，并发见少量心包积液（视频）。由于患者的危重状况，其家属决定仅提供姑息性治疗措施。

metadata.original_text: The patient was a 75-year-old man with a body mass index of 23.4 kg/m2 and an American Society of Anesthesiologists (ASA) class of three. He had a history of end-stage renal disease on hemodialysis and was initially transferred to our hospital from an outside facility for subacute functional decline and encephalopathy. His admission work-up was notable for a leukocytosis of 12,800 cells/μL, Enterococcus faecalis bacteremia, and bilateral pleural effusions. His 12-lead electrocardiogram showed sinus rhythm with first-degree atrioventricular block and a right bundle branch block. The patient was started on broad spectrum antibiotics for bacteremia and later narrowed to ampicillin. Repeat blood cultures were negative. On hospital day one, the patient underwent a transthoracic echocardiogram which demonstrated a left ventricular ejection fraction of 45-50% with global systolic dysfunction, moderate RV dysfunction, mild pulmonary hypertension with a pulmonary artery systolic pressure (PASP) of 41 mmHg, and no visible valvular vegetations. The patient underwent thoracentesis of the right sided pleural effusion, and bacterial cultures of the pleural fluid grew Enterococcus Faecalis. Given this multifocal enterococcus infection, TEE was pursued. On hospital day nine, the patient underwent TEE under monitored anesthesia care. The anesthesia service was consulted due to pulmonary hypertension as per the institutional guideline. The patient was connected to standard monitoring as recommended by the ASA. Supplemental oxygen was provided by a face mask, with end-tidal carbon dioxide monitoring. The patient received a total of 70 mg of propofol administered over the first ten minutes of the procedure in boluses of 10 mg-20 mg. Hemodynamically, the patient's blood pressure at the beginning of the procedure was 140/50 mmHg with a pulse in the low 60 s. His blood pressure dropped precipitously after receiving propofol down to 60/40 mmHg fifteen minutes into the procedure. At that point, the patient became bradycardic and went into a PEA cardiac arrest. The TEE probe was withdrawn, and chest compressions were initiated under the advanced cardiac life support algorithm. The patient was intubated, and return of spontaneous circulation (ROSC) was achieved after four rounds of chest compressions and epinephrine administration. The patient's cardiac rhythm then deteriorated into ventricular fibrillation requiring defibrillation and further chest compressions. ROSC was achieved once again, and the patient was transferred to the intensive care unit. Upon review of the images captured by TEE at the onset of PEA arrest, it was noted that the RV was severely dilated with minimal contractile function, and a small pericardial effusion was found (Video ). Due to the patient's critical condition, his family decided to transition him to comfort measures only.

title: pmc-8719983-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-8719983-1
病例摘要：一位作者（Ts Tsai，48岁男性）在台湾屏东科技大学的爬行动物和两栖动物设施中被暹罗眼镜蛇（D. siamensis）咬伤右手拇指根部。事故可能发生在患者手指接触到蛇皮时，他抓住蛇颈检查其口腔和鼻孔是否有感染症状。检查后，患者试图将蛇放回蛇箱，而此时蛇转头咬了患者的右手。现场可见两处fang咬痕、抓痕和瘀青。患者在被咬约30分钟后开始感到脚踝麻木和刺痛，并出现轻微行走困难。患者在被咬30分钟后前往当地医院就诊，在被咬后1小时内接受了4支针对暹罗眼镜蛇的单克隆抗毒血清治疗。然而，9小时后肿胀和红斑已蔓延至手腕（）。因此，又注射了4支抗毒血清，总共在10小时内注射了8支。血液检查显示急性肾损伤、弥散性血管内凝血和凝血障碍（）。未观察到白细胞增多或贫血，开具了如头孢他啶等抗生素。患者入院后，右手中指肿胀和疼痛最为明显，持续2-3天。肿胀和疼痛甚至蔓延至肘部。患者的指尖几乎无法弯曲。使用冰枕敷料缓解疼痛、局部热敷和消肿。幸运的是，并未出现水泡、出血性大疱或手指缺血。患者在第3天和第4天接受了两次高压氧治疗，手部肿胀迅速消退。随后，在第三晚患者的指尖能够稍微弯曲，到第4天时可以弯曲超过90度。住院期间，患者的排便软或呈流质状且颜色深蓝绿色但不发黑，而尿液颜色正常。患者在第5天出院后，在家中出现了大面积红疹和全身瘙痒的症状。经过抗组胺药治疗后，症状消失。患者在蛇咬伤一个月内偶尔仍会感到咬伤部位轻微麻木和疼痛感。

metadata.original_text: One of the authors (TS Tsai, a 48-year-old man) was bitten on the right palm near the base of the index finger by D. siamensis () in the Reptile and Amphibian Facility at the National Pingtung University of Science and Technology in Pingtung, Taiwan. The accident might have occurred when the patient's fingers stuck to the skin of the snake when he grasped the neck of the snake to inspect its mouth and nostrils for symptoms and signs of infection. After inspection, the patient attempted to release the snake back into the snake box, and it then turned its head around and bit the patient's hand while he was releasing it. Two fang bite marks, scratches, and bruises were visible on the spot. The patient started to feel numbness and tingling of the ankles and experienced slight difficulty in walking approximately 30 min after the snakebite. The patient visited a local hospital 30 min later and was administered 4 vials of monovalent antivenom for D. siamensis at the emergency department within 1 h of being bitten. However, the swelling and redness had progressed to the wrist () approximately 9 h after the snakebite. Therefore, 4 more vials of antivenom were administered, for a total of 8 vials within 10 h. Blood tests showed acute kidney injury, disseminated intravascular coagulation, and coagulopathy (). No leukocytosis or anemia was observed, and antibiotics, such as ceftazidime, were prescribed. The patient was admitted after which the right hand showed the most obvious swelling and pain for the first 2-3 days. The swelling and pain even extended to the right elbow. The patients' fingers were almost unable to bend. Ice pillow packing was used to relieve the pain, local heat, and swelling. Fortunately, there were no blisters, hemorrhagic bullae, or finger ischemia. The patient also received two courses of hyperbaric oxygen treatment on days 3 and 4, and the swelling of the hand quickly subsided after that. Then, the patient's fingers were able to bend slightly on the third night and were able to bend more than 90° on day 4. During hospitalization, the patient's daily stool was soft or fluid and dark blue-green but not black, whereas the urine color was normal. The patient was discharged from the hospital on day 5, and on day 8, a large area of elevated red skin rash and itching of the body occurred at home. After administration of antihistamines, the symptoms disappeared. The patient still sometimes experienced mild numbness and painful sensations at the bite site for up to one month after the snake envenomation.

title: pmc-8719986-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-8719986-1
病例摘要：一名41岁，孕6产3（因流产未完成妊娠）的女性患者因胸痛主诉急诊就诊。疼痛始于就诊前2小时，为钝痛，左侧，位于胸骨后方，并放射至左臂，程度为7/10。在就诊前一个月，患者抱怨有异常子宫出血并开始口服诺孕酯/炔雌醇片。该患者无重要的既往病史。她的社会史显示过去10年每天抽半包烟。家族史无早发冠状动脉疾病或血栓形成史。她过去的手术史包括在就诊前两周进行的扩张和刮宫术。家中药物包括每日口服诺孕酯/炔雌醇片。唯一的冠心病危险因素是吸烟和口服避孕药的使用。到达急诊室时，患者生命体征稳定。体检无异常发现。心脏和肺部检查未见明显异常。12导联心电图显示下壁导联ST段抬高1毫米，无反向改变，并且窦性心律，心率60次/分钟（）。STEMI代码被呼叫，患者紧急送往冠状动脉造影室。她接受了急性冠脉综合征（ACS）治疗，包括口服阿司匹林324毫克、口服氯吡格雷600毫克和静脉肝素5000单位。重要实验室数据显示肌钙蛋白为0.615 ng/mL（0-0.04 ng/mL），血红蛋白8.7 g/dL（12.0-15.5 g/dL），白细胞计数13.7 × 109/L（4.5 − 11.0 × 109/L）。冠状动脉造影显示左主干远端、左旋支和前降支近段有血栓形成（血块）（）。TIMI灌注分级为3级，冠状动脉造影期间未进行干预。此外，在前降支的尖端部分也有闭塞。右冠状动脉没有异常。超声心动图显示射血分数估计值为55-60%，伴有心尖部室间隔运动减弱和正常的舒张功能。没有证据表明存在房内分流或左心耳。患者被收治入心脏监护病房（CCU），并接受了10小时的静脉替罗非班治疗，每日口服阿司匹林81毫克、氯吡格雷75毫克，并按ACS方案使用了静脉肝素滴注。肌钙蛋白峰值为11 ng/mL。由于持续性阴道出血，患者输注了2单位红细胞悬液。下肢多普勒检查未发现深静脉血栓的证据。在48小时住院期间的心电图监测未显示心脏节律异常。抗凝血病检测结果显示抗凝血酶活性为88%（80-120%），抗凝血酶III AG 79%，心磷脂AB IGA < 9.4 APL (<20.0 APL)，β - 2糖蛋白IGG < 9.4 U/mL (<20.0 U/mL)，β - 2糖蛋白IGM < 9.4 U/mL (<20.0 U/mL)，心磷脂AB IGM MCLIP < 9.4 MPL (<15 MPL)，心磷脂AB IGG GCLIP < 9.4 GPL (<15 GPL)，凝血酶原G20210A基因阴性，β - 2糖蛋白AB IGA < 9.4 U/mL (<15.0 U/mL)，PS/PT IGG < 9.4 U (<30.0 U)，PS/PT IGM 20.0 U (<30.0 U)，血小板计数为376 K/μL（149-400 K/μL）。妇科会诊后，建议放置宫内节育器以帮助预防出血。在48小时后停用了肝素。出院前的心电图显示ST段抬高已消失（）。由于症状缓解且心电图显示STEMI消退，未进行重复造影。口服避孕药被暂停，并按ACS方案给予抗凝治疗后患者出院。

metadata.original_text: A 41-year-old gravida 6 para 3 female (uncompleted pregnancies due to miscarriages) presented to the emergency department with a chief complaint of chest pain. Pain started two hours prior to presentation, was dull, left sided, substernal, radiated to her left arm, and with a severity of 7/10. One month prior to presentation the patient was complaining of an abnormal uterine bleeding and was started on oral norgestimate/ethinyl estradiol pills. The patient has no significant past medical history. Her social history is significant for smoking 1/2 a pack per day for the past 10 years. Her family history is not significant for premature coronary artery disease or thrombosis. Her past surgical history is significant for dilatation and curettage two weeks prior to presentation. Home medications include daily oral norgestimate/ethinyl estradiol pills. Her only cardiac risk factors were smoking and the use of oral contraceptives. Upon arrival to the emergency department, the patient was vitally stable. Her physical exam was noncontributory. Cardiac and lung exams were unremarkable. A twelve-lead ECG showed 1 mm ST elevations in inferior leads with no reciprocal changes and a sinus rhythm at a rate of 60 beats/minute (). A STEMI code was called, and the patient was taken emergently to the Cath Lab. She was started on acute coronary syndrome (ACS) treatment including oral aspirin 324 milligrams, oral clopidogrel 600 milligrams, and intravenous heparin 5000 U. Significant laboratory data showed a troponin of 0.615 ng/mL (0-0.04 ng/mL), hemoglobin of 8.7 g/dL (12.0-15.5 g/dL), and white blood cell count of 13.7 × 109/L (4.5 − 11.0 × 109/L). Coronary angiogram revealed a saddle clot (thrombus) involving the distal left main artery, left circumflex, and proximal LAD (). TIMI flow grade was 3 throughout, and no intervention took place during the coronary angiogram. There was also an occlusion in the apical portion of the LAD. The right coronary artery did not have any abnormalities. An echocardiogram revealed an estimated ejection fraction of 55-60% with apical septal hypokinesis and a normal diastolic function. There was no evidence of an intra-atrial shunt or left atrial appendage. Patient was admitted to the cardiac care unit (CCU) and was started on intravenous tirofiban for 10 hours, oral aspirin 81 milligrams daily, oral clopidogrel 75 milligrams daily, and intravenous heparin drip as per ACS protocol. Troponin peaked at 11 ng/mL. The patient was given 2 units of PRBC due to persistent vaginal bleeding. Doppler of the lower extremities did not reveal any evidence of a DVT. Telemetry over 48 hours of the hospital stay did not show any evidence of cardiac arrhythmia. Thrombophilia testing lab results showed antithrombin activity of 88% (80-120%), antithrombin III AG 79%, cardiolipin AB IGA < 9.4 APL (<20.0 APL), beta − 2 glycoprotein IGG < 9.4 U/mL (<20.0 U/mL), beta − 2 glycoprotein IGM < 9.4 U/mL (<20.0 U/mL), cardiolipin AB IGM MCLIP < 9.4 MPL (<15 MPL), cardiolipin AB IGG GCLIP < 9.4 GPL (<15 GPL), prothrombin G20210A gene negative, beta − 2 glycoprotein AB IGA < 9.4 U/mL (<15.0 U/mL), PS/PT IGG < 9.4 U (<30.0 U), PS/PT IGM 20.0 U (<30.0 U), and platelet count of 376 K/μL (149-400 K/μL). OBGYN were consulted, and placement of IUD was recommended to help prevent bleeding. After 48 hours, heparin was discontinued. EKG prior to discharge showed resolution of ST elevations (). A repeat angiography was not done as symptoms had resolved and EKG showed resolution of STEMI. OCPs were held, and patient was discharged on oral anticoagulation.

title: pmc-8720013-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-8720013-1
病例摘要：一名29岁男性患者从精神科医院转来，主诉在最近开始服用氯氮平治疗后出现突然发作、逐渐加重的胸痛，并伴有肌钙蛋白升高。该患者有酗酒史和难治性分裂情感障碍病史，有多次自杀未遂经历。因故意摄入对乙酰氨基酚和锂盐，他被强制住院进行强化治疗，包括开始服用氯氮平。初步诊断考虑急性冠脉综合征、病毒或药物引起的肌炎、肺栓塞及肺炎。患者在开始服用氯氮平8天后首次注意到胸骨后的疼痛，在深呼吸时加重，并在接下来的两天内症状逐渐恶化。心电图（ECG）显示ST段抬高，最明显出现在V2-V3导联（未展示）。血液检查结果显示白细胞增多和肌钙蛋白、脑钠肽及炎症标志物升高（未展示）。胸痛持续存在，患者被转至心血管科病房。心脏体格检查发现心动过速，但无杂音或摩擦音。未见周围水肿或颈静脉压升高。肺部听诊清晰。心脏磁共振成像（CMR）显示整体收缩功能减退，左心室（LV）射血分数为45%（图未展示），并有轻微的晚期钆增强和外侧壁及外侧心包的异常参数映射（图未展示），符合肌炎表现。呼吸道病毒检测结果为阴性。氯氮平被停用。美托洛尔用于改善左室功能，秋水仙碱和布洛芬用于治疗心包炎，并迅速缓解症状。重复的心电图显示ST段抬高消失，在监护仪上未见心律失常事件。患者出院回到精神科医院，计划进行心脏超声检查及再次血液检测随访。

metadata.original_text: A 29-year-old man presented from a psychiatric hospital with 2 days of sudden onset, progressive chest pain, and troponin elevation after recently initiating clozapine therapy. The patient had a history of alcohol abuse and treatment-resistant schizoaffective disorder with multiple suicide attempts. After intentional ingestion of acetaminophen and lithium, he was involuntarily hospitalized for intensive treatment, including initiation of clozapine therapy. The differential diagnosis included acute coronary syndrome, myopericarditis from viral or drug-induced etiology, pulmonary embolism, and pneumonia. The patient first noted substernal chest pain worse with deep inspiration 8 days after clozapine initiation. Symptoms worsened over the following two days. Electrocardiogram (EKG) demonstrated ST elevations most prominent in V2-V3 (). Serum labs were notable for leukocytosis and elevated troponin, brain natriuretic peptide, and inflammatory markers (). Chest pain persisted, and he was transferred to the cardiology service. Cardiovascular exam was notable for tachycardia without murmurs or rubs. He had no peripheral edema or elevated jugular venous pressure. Lungs were clear. Cardiac magnetic resonance (CMR) imaging showed global hypokinesis with a left ventricular (LV) ejection fraction (EF) of 45% (Figure ) and subtle late gadolinium enhancement of the epicardial lateral wall and lateral pericardium with abnormal parametric mapping () consistent with myopericarditis. Respiratory viral panel was negative. Clozapine was discontinued. Metoprolol was initiated for impaired LV function with colchicine and ibuprofen for pericarditis with prompt symptomatic relief. Repeat EKG showed resolution of ST-elevation and no arrhythmic events on telemetry. He was discharged back to the psychiatric hospital with planned cardiology follow-up for echocardiogram and repeat laboratory testing.

title: pmc-8720017-1
text:
病例标题：pmc-8720017-1
主要诊断：左侧L4神经根压迫，由左侧L4-5椎间盘突出引起
病例摘要：一名60岁男性因突然出现左侧腿部疼痛（位于L4神经根区域）就诊。体检发现左侧股四头肌神经源性瘫痪（徒手肌力测试3级），左侧髌骨腱反射减弱，左侧直腿抬高试验阳性。MRI检查结果显示左侧L4-5椎间孔突出的椎间盘无碎片进入脊髓内（）。左侧选择性L4神经根阻滞效果显著。根据上述结果，患者被诊断为由左侧L4-5椎间孔突出椎间盘引起的左侧L4神经根压迫。患者进行了术前影像学检查以确定手术方案。双针插入至L4-5椎间盘内，针尖位于髓核中部。最终，谨慎注入3.0毫升碘海醇后未引起左侧L4神经根疼痛的再现。术后，患者主诉左腿麻木感加重但无神经功能缺损。在术中CT和术后造影MRI图像上，突出的椎间盘碎片从神经孔移位至颅内中央管（与之前影像相比未被检测到）（图示）。采用骨质切除法进行了经皮手术（[, ]）。观察神经孔时发现，突出的椎间盘碎片已从神经孔移位至颅内中央管。带有纤维环的2.5克重的椎间盘碎片被完整取出（）。术后，患者的神经功能立即完全恢复。
diagnosis: 左侧L4神经根压迫，由左侧L4-5椎间盘突出引起

metadata.original_text: A 60-year-old man presented with sudden left leg pain in L4 nerve root area. The patient demonstrated neurogenic paralysis on left quadriceps femoris muscle with manual muscle testing 3, hyporeflexia on left patella tendon, and positive left straight leg raising test. MR images revealed left L4-5 foraminal herniated disc without fragment in the spinal canal (). Left L4 selective nerve root block remarkably affect. According to the above results, the patients was diagnosed as left L4 nerve root entrapment by left L4-5 foraminal disc herniation. The patient underwent discography for the presurgical imaging diagnosis. The double-needle was inserted to the L4-5 disc, and tip of the needle was located at middle of the nucleus pulposus. Finally, 3.0 cc of Iohexol was injected cautiously without reproduction of left L4 radicular pain. After discography, the patient complained deterioration of left leg numbness without neurological deficit. On disco-CT and postdiscogram MR images, herniated fragment was migrated from neural foramen to cranial central canal which was not detected in previous images (Figures and ). Herniotomy was performed by osteoplastic approach [, ]. Observing the neural foramen, the herniated disc fragment was migrated from neural foramen to cranial central canal. 2.5 g-weighted disc fragment with annulus fibrosus was extirpated with one piece (). After surgery, neurological status was fully recovered immediately.
metadata.diagnosis_zh: 左侧L4神经根压迫，由左侧L4-5椎间盘突出引起

title: pmc-8720017-2
text:
病例标题：pmc-8720017-2
病例摘要：一名74岁的男性患者因右侧腿部疼痛就诊，疼痛位于L4神经根区域。他之前在其他诊所被诊断为右L4-5椎间孔突出，并接受了地塞米松磷酸钠1.9毫克和盐酸美普卡因1.5毫升的椎间孔阻滞治疗，但随后患者报告右侧腿部疼痛加重。该患者转至我院进行复查，重新检查的MRI图像显示椎间盘突出碎片从神经孔移位到颅内中央管，而在之前的影像中未检测到此情况。未观察到神经系统功能缺损。进行了右L4-5椎间融合术和椎板切除术以去除突出的椎间盘碎片。

metadata.original_text: A 74-year-old man presented with right leg pain in L4 nerve root area. He was treated in previous clinic with diagnose of right L4-5 foraminal disc herniation (). After disc block with 1.9 mg of Dexamethasone sodium phosphate and 1.5 ml of mepivacaine hydrochloride, the patients complained of deterioration of right leg pain. The patient was introduced to our facility, and reexamined MR images showed herniated fragment migrated from neural foramen to cranial central canal which was not detected in previous images (). No neurological deficit was observed. Transforaminal lumbar interbody fusion with right L4-5 facetectomy was performed to extirpate the herniated fragment.

title: trec-cds-2014-1
text:
病例标题：trec-cds-2014-1
病例摘要：一名58岁的非裔美国女性因间歇性前胸压迫/烧灼感疼痛首次出现两天前来急诊室就诊。疼痛始于她行走时，向背部放射，并伴有恶心、出汗和轻微呼吸困难，但不随呼吸加重。最晚一次疼痛发作在她到达医院半小时前结束。她有高血压和肥胖史。否认吸烟、糖尿病、高胆固醇或心脏病家族史。目前未服用任何药物。体格检查正常。心电图显示非特异性改变。

metadata.original_text: A 58-year-old African-American woman presents to the ER with episodic pressing/burning anterior chest pain that began two days earlier for the first time in her life. The pain started while she was walking, radiates to the back, and is accompanied by nausea, diaphoresis and mild dyspnea, but is not increased on inspiration. The latest episode of pain ended half an hour prior to her arrival. She is known to have hypertension and obesity. She denies smoking, diabetes, hypercholesterolemia, or a family history of heart disease. She currently takes no medications. Physical examination is normal. The EKG shows nonspecific changes.

title: trec-cds-2014-10
text:
病例标题：trec-cds-2014-10
病例摘要：一名医生被叫去查看一位67岁的女性患者，该患者早上通过右股动脉进行了心脏导管检查。现在她抱怨右脚感觉冷。体检发现她的右 groin处有一个搏动性的肿块，并且远端脉搏消失，在进入右股动脉的位置听诊可听到杂音。

metadata.original_text: A physician is called to see a 67-year-old woman who underwent cardiac catheterization via the right femoral artery earlier in the morning. She is now complaining of a cool right foot. Upon examination she has a pulsatile mass in her right groin with loss of distal pulses, and auscultation reveals a bruit over the point at which the right femoral artery was entered.

title: trec-cds-2014-11
text:
病例标题：trec-cds-2014-11
病例摘要：一名40岁的女性患者，无既往病史，在入院前一小时开始出现右臂剧烈疼痛而来到急诊科。她否认有外伤史。体检发现她面色苍白、中度不适，并且呼吸急促和心率加快。她的体温正常，血压为80/60mmHg。她的右臂没有颜色变化或活动受限。

metadata.original_text: A 40-year-old woman with no past medical history presents to the ER with excruciating pain in her right arm that had started 1 hour prior to her admission. She denies trauma. On examination she is pale and in moderate discomfort, as well as tachypneic and tachycardic. Her body temperature is normal and her blood pressure is 80/60. Her right arm has no discoloration or movement limitation.

title: trec-cds-2014-12
text:
病例标题：trec-cds-2014-12
病例摘要：一名25岁的女性因长期疲劳前来诊所就诊。她否认睡眠困难，平均每天睡8小时。过去6个月中，她还注意到脱发、声音变化以及体重增加。抱怨怕冷。体检发现其颈部正中有一个明显、柔软且均匀的前颈肿块。

metadata.original_text: A 25-year-old woman presents to the clinic complaining of prolonged fatigue. She denies difficulty sleeping and sleeps an average of 8 hours a night. She also notes hair loss, a change in her voice and weight gain during the previous 6 months. She complains of cold intolerance. On examination she has a prominent, soft, uniform anterior cervical mass at the midline.

title: trec-cds-2014-13
text:
病例标题：trec-cds-2014-13
病例摘要：一名30岁的一般健康女性因呼吸困难入院，症状开始于入院前2小时。她过去没有其他健康问题，除了两次自然流产。她在入院前三周生了一个健康的婴儿。体检时，她显得焦虑、呼吸急促和心率加快，血压为110/70，血氧饱和度为92%。除此之外，体格检查无异常。她的胸部X光片和CBC均正常。

metadata.original_text: A 30-year-old generally healthy woman presents with shortness of breath that had started 2 hours before admission. She has had no health problems in the past besides 2 natural abortions. She had given birth to a healthy child 3 weeks before. On examination, she is apprehensive, tachypneic and tachycardic, her blood pressure is 110/70 and her oxygen saturation 92%. Otherwise, physical examination is unremarkable. Her chest x-ray and CBC are normal.

title: trec-cds-2014-14
text:
病例标题：trec-cds-2014-14
病例摘要：一名85岁的男性因逐渐意识水平下降被带到急诊室。在过去3天里，他停止了自行行走和进食。他没有发热、咳嗽、皮疹或腹泻的症状。他的女儿回忆说，在入院前3周他曾发生过一次车祸，并且当时头部CT检查结果正常。

metadata.original_text: An 85-year-old man is brought to the ER because of gradual decrease in his level of consciousness. In the last 3 days he stopped walking and eating by himself. He has had no fever, cough, rash or diarrhea. His daughter recalls that he had been involved in a car accident 3 weeks prior to his admission and had a normal head CT at that time.

title: trec-cds-2014-15
text:
病例标题：trec-cds-2014-15
病例摘要：一名36岁的女性因停经12周、阴道少量出血且昨日有所增加、下腹部压痛、恶心和呕吐前来急诊科就诊。体格检查显示全腹有压痛，子宫大小相当于怀孕18周，宫颈扩张2厘米。血常规和生化指标均正常。使用截断敏感度为25 mIU/ml的β-HCG床旁妊娠试验结果为阴性。超声检查报告子宫增大（12 cm x 9 cm x 7 cm），内部有多发囊状区域。初步诊断考虑葡萄胎与纤维瘤变性之间的鉴别诊断。

metadata.original_text: A 36-year-old woman presents to the emergency department with 12 weeks of amenorrhea, vaginal spotting that has increased since yesterday, lower abdominal tenderness, nausea and vomiting. The physical exam reveals overall tender abdomen, 18-week sized uterus, and cervical dilation of 2 cm. The complete blood count and biochemical profile are normal. Point of care pregnancy test with cut-off sensitivity of 25 mIU/ml Beta-HCG is negative. The ultrasound reports enlarged uterus (12 cm x 9 cm x 7 cms) with multiple cystic areas in the interior. The differential diagnosis includes vesicular mole vs fibroid degeneration.

title: trec-cds-2014-16
text:
病例标题：trec-cds-2014-16
病例摘要：一名28岁的女性患者，在从加利福尼亚旅行回来三周后出现颈部和肩部疼痛以及左手和手臂的麻木感。她在旅行期间参加了流浪动物收容活动。体格检查除轻微震颤和几乎不可察觉的痉挛外无其他异常。她被开具了非甾体抗炎药（NSAIDS）和局部肌肉松弛剂。三天后，她因出现痉挛性手臂动作、出汗、情绪激越和焦虑、全身不适、吞咽困难以及明显的恐水症而被送入急诊室，并立即住院治疗。

metadata.original_text: A 28-year-old female with neck and shoulder pain and left hand and arm paresthesias three weeks after returning from a trip to California where she attended a stray animal recovery campaign. Her physical exam was unremarkable except for slight tremors and almost imperceptible spasticity. She was prescribed NSAIDS and a topical muscle relaxant. She was brought in to the ER three days later with spastic arm movements, sweating, increasing agitation and anxiety, malaise, difficultly swallowing and marked hydrophobia, and was immediately hospitalized.

title: trec-cds-2014-17
text:
病例标题：trec-cds-2014-17
病例摘要：一名48岁的白人男性，有共同变异免疫缺陷（CVID）的病史，出现急性腹痛、发热、脱水症状，心率为每分钟132次，血压为80/40。体格检查发现有压痛且墨菲征阳性。腹部超声显示肝肿大和大量游离腹腔积液。进行剖腹探查后发现肝脏脓肿破裂，并进行了手术引流。术后患者被送往ICU。

metadata.original_text: A 48-year-old white male with history of common variable immunodeficiency (CVID) with acute abdominal pain, fever, dehydration, HR of 132 bpm, BP 80/40. The physical examination is remarkable for tenderness and positive Murphy sign. Abdominal ultrasound shows hepatomegaly and abundant free intraperitoneal fluid. Exploratory laparotomy reveals a ruptured liver abscess, which is then surgically drained. After surgery, the patient is taken to the ICU.

title: trec-cds-2014-18
text:
病例标题：trec-cds-2014-18
病例摘要：一名6个月大的男婴在重大手术后不久出现尿量低于每公斤体重0.2毫升/小时。体检发现全身性水肿。血压为115/80毫米汞柱，心率为每分钟141次，呼吸频率为每分钟18次。血尿素氮水平为33毫克/分升，血清肌酐水平为1.3毫克/分升。初步尿液分析显示比重为1.017。尿样显微镜检查发现每个高倍视野中有1个白细胞、18个红细胞和5个颗粒管型。他的钠排泄分数为3.3%。

metadata.original_text: A 6-month-old male infant has a urine output of less than 0.2 mL/kg/hr shortly after undergoing major surgery. On examination, he has generalized edema. His blood pressure is 115/80 mm Hg, his pulse is 141/min, and his respirations are 18/min. His blood urea nitrogen is 33 mg/dL, and his serum creatinine is 1.3 mg/dL. Initial urinalysis shows specific gravity of 1.017. Microscopic examination of the urine sample reveals 1 WBC per high-power field (HPF), 18 RBCs per HPF, and 5 granular casts per HPF. His fractional excretion of sodium is 3.3%.

title: trec-cds-2014-19
text:
病例标题：trec-cds-2014-19
病例摘要：一名52岁的非洲裔美国男性，有长期大量吸烟和饮酒史，描述了数月前开始逐渐加重的吞咽困难。最初他发现难以吞咽肉类食物。随后他的吞咽困难进一步发展到固体食物、半流质食物，最终连液体都无法顺利吞咽。他能够定位食物阻塞的位置，在胸骨下端。他已经总共减轻体重25磅。

metadata.original_text: A 52-year-old African American man with a history of heavy smoking and drinking, describes progressive dysphagia that began several months ago. He first noticed difficulty swallowing meat. His trouble swallowing then progressed to include other solid foods, soft foods, and then liquids. He is able to locate the point where food is obstructed at the lower end of his sternum. He has lost a total of 25 pounds.

title: trec-cds-2014-2
text:
病例标题：trec-cds-2014-2
病例摘要：一名8岁男童于3月份因发热（最高体温达39°C）、呼吸困难和咳嗽两天被送至急诊室。他刚从科罗拉多州的五天假期回来。家长报告说，在发热和咳嗽开始之前，他曾有腹泻症状。他否认有任何上呼吸道感染的症状。体检发现他处于呼吸窘迫状态，并且左侧肺部听诊呈支气管呼吸音。胸部X光显示双侧肺部浸润影。

metadata.original_text: An 8-year-old male presents in March to the ER with fever up to 39 C, dyspnea and cough for 2 days. He has just returned from a 5 day vacation in Colorado. Parents report that prior to the onset of fever and cough, he had loose stools. He denies upper respiratory tract symptoms. On examination he is in respiratory distress and has bronchial respiratory sounds on the left. A chest x-ray shows bilateral lung infiltrates.

title: trec-cds-2014-20
text:
病例标题：trec-cds-2014-20
病例摘要：一名32岁的女性在车祸后被送往急诊室。她有多处损伤，包括上肢和下肢骨折。她完全清醒且意识清晰，并报告说当时没有系安全带。她的血压为134/74 mmHg，心率为87次/分钟。体格检查发现腹部有压痛并伴有反跳痛，在四个象限均有存在。她没有肠鸣音。

metadata.original_text: A 32-year-old woman is admitted to the ER following a car accident. She has sustained multiple injuries including upper and lower extremity fractures. She is fully awake and alert, and she reports that she was not wearing a seat belt. Her blood pressure is 134/74 mm Hg, and her pulse is 87/min. Physical examination reveals a tender abdomen with guarding and rebound in all four quadrants. She has no bowel sounds.

title: trec-cds-2014-21
text:
病例标题：trec-cds-2014-21
病例摘要：一名21岁的女性因进行性关节痛和全身不适接受评估。体检发现她有脱发，面部鼻梁和脸颊上主要分布着皮疹，小腿上有轻微的非触痛性紫癜，并且腕部和踝关节肿胀并伴有压痛。她的实验室检查结果显示正细胞正色素性贫血、血小板减少、ANA滴度为4/4阳性以及抗dsDNA抗体阳性。尿液检查发现蛋白尿和红细胞管型。

metadata.original_text: A 21-year-old female is evaluated for progressive arthralgias and malaise. On examination she is found to have alopecia, a rash mainly distributed on the bridge of her nose and her cheeks, a delicate non-palpable purpura on her calves, and swelling and tenderness of her wrists and ankles. Her lab shows normocytic anemia, thrombocytopenia, a 4/4 positive ANA and anti-dsDNA. Her urine is positive for protein and RBC casts.

title: trec-cds-2014-22
text:
病例标题：trec-cds-2014-22
病例摘要：一名15岁的女孩因腹痛前往急诊室。疼痛逐渐出现，最初位于脐周，几小时后定位到右下腹部。她从昨天开始就没有食欲，但否认有腹泻。她没有性伴侣，月经周期规律。体检发现右下腹部有局部压痛并伴有反跳痛。腹部超声检查显示阑尾明显水肿。

metadata.original_text: A 15-year-old girl presents to the ER with abdominal pain. The pain appeared gradually and was periumbilical at first, localizing to the right lower quadrant over hours. She has had no appetite since yesterday but denies diarrhea. She has had no sexual partners and her menses are regular. On examination, she has localized rebound tenderness over the right lower quadrant. On an abdominal ultrasound, a markedly edematous appendix is seen.

title: trec-cds-2014-23
text:
病例标题：trec-cds-2014-23
病例摘要：一名63岁的男性患者因咳嗽和呼吸困难前来就诊。他的既往病史包括大量吸烟、脊柱狭窄、糖尿病、甲状腺功能减退和轻度银屑病。他还有一家系早发性痴呆的家族史。症状开始于入院前约一周，表现为有痰的咳嗽、脓性痰液以及呼吸困难，过去24小时内需要使用家用氧气。他否认发热。体检发现患者发绀、呼吸急促，胸廓呈桶状，肺部弥漫性啰音。胸部X光片显示过度充气，无实变影。

metadata.original_text: A 63-year-old man presents with cough and shortness of breath. His past medical history is notable for heavy smoking, spinal stenosis, diabetes, hypothyroidism and mild psoriasis. He also has a family history of early onset dementia. His symptoms began about a week prior to his admission, with productive cough, purulent sputum and difficulty breathing, requiring him to use his home oxygen for the past 24 hours. He denies fever. On examination he is cyanotic, tachypneic, with a barrel shaped chest and diffuse rales over his lungs. A chest x-ray is notable for hyperinflation with no consolidation.

title: trec-cds-2014-24
text:
病例标题：trec-cds-2014-24
病例摘要：一名33岁的男性运动员因急性腹痛急诊入院。家属表示，患者一周前从自行车上摔下，左侧腹部受到钝性外伤，自那以后一直有轻微腹痛。患者的病史中没有吸烟、吸毒和饮酒的记录。血压：60/30 mmHg，心率：140次/分。患者面色苍白，腹部体检发现肌肉收缩和抵抗。紧急超声检查和腹部CT扫描显示由于脾破裂导致的弥漫性腹腔内出血。

metadata.original_text: A 33-year-old male athlete presented to the ER with acute abdominal pain. Family member says the patient fell off his bike a week earlier and suffered blunt trauma to the left hemi-abdomen, and he has had mild abdominal pain since that day. The patient's history is negative for smoking, drugs, and alcohol. BP: 60/30 mmHg, HR: 140/min. The patient is pale, the physical examination of the abdomen revealed muscle contraction and resistance. Emergency ultrasound and CT scan of the abdomen reveal extended intraperitoneal hemorrhage due to spleen rupture.

title: trec-cds-2014-25
text:
病例标题：trec-cds-2014-25
病例摘要：一名8岁男孩从自行车上摔下，撞击到左侧太阳穴。当时没有立即失去意识，在现场进行简要检查时发现他的瞳孔对称、光反应正常，并且四肢活动自如。摔倒半小时后，孩子变得嗜睡、面色苍白并呕吐。随后被转送至急诊科。到达时心率为52次/分钟，血压为155/98。格拉斯哥昏迷量表（GCS）评分为6分/15分，瞳孔不对称且右侧上下肢运动受限。神经外科团队建议先进行立即治疗而非先行CT扫描。

metadata.original_text: An 8-year-old boy fell from his bike striking his left temple on the pavement. There was no immediate loss of consciousness, and a brief examination at the scene noted his pupils were symmetrical, reactive to the light, and he was moving all four limbs. Half an hour after the fall the child became drowsy, pale, and vomited. He was transferred to the emergency department. Upon arrival the heart rate was 52/min, blood pressure of 155/98. The Glasgow Coma Scale (GCS) was 6/15, the pupils were asymmetrical and movement of the right upper and lower extremities was impaired. The neurosurgical team advised deferring the CT scan in favor of initiating immediate treatment.

title: trec-cds-2014-26
text:
病例标题：trec-cds-2014-26
病例摘要：一个由14名人道主义服务工作者组成的团队正在计划前往巴西亚马逊雨林地区。该团队的所有成员都多次旅行，并持有最新的疫苗接种证书。需要进行疟疾化学预防，但其中三名女性处于不同的怀孕阶段。

metadata.original_text: A group of 14 humanitarian service workers is preparing a trip to the Amazon Rainforest region in Brazil. All the members of the group have traveled on multiple occasions and have up-to-date vaccine certificates. Malaria Chemoprophylaxis is indicated but three of the women are in different stages of pregnancy.

title: trec-cds-2014-27
text:
病例标题：trec-cds-2014-27
病例摘要：一名21岁的大学生因家族史（其兄姐有多发性息肉）接受结肠镜检查。他的哥哥在22岁时接受了全结直肠切除术，而他的姐姐则在28岁时进行了同样的手术，原因是她们的结肠镜检查中发现了数百个结肠腺瘤。两位兄弟姐妹目前健康状况良好，没有发现恶性肿瘤。患者进行乙状结肠镜检查时被发现有数十个小息肉位于直肠和乙状结肠内。其中几个息肉被活检，均为良性腺瘤。

metadata.original_text: A 21-year-old college student undergoes colonoscopy due to family history of multiple polyps in his older siblings. His brother underwent total proctocolectomy at age 22, and his sister underwent a total proctocolectomy at age 28, after both were found to have hundreds of colonic adenomas on colonoscopy. Both siblings are currently well without any findings of neoplasms. The patient undergoes sigmoidoscopy and is found to have dozens of small colonic polyps within rectosigmoid. Several of these are biopsied and are all benign adenomas.

title: trec-cds-2014-28
text:
病例标题：trec-cds-2014-28
病例摘要：一名31岁的女性因闭经就诊。她初潮年龄为14岁，此后月经一直正常。然而，她的最后一次月经是在7个月前。她还抱怨有偶尔的乳头溢液。目前她没有服用任何药物，并希望尽快怀孕。体检显示双侧乳头有白色溢液，但其他检查均未见异常。尿人绒毛膜促性腺激素(hCG)检测为阴性，促甲状腺激素(TSH)正常，但催乳素水平升高。

metadata.original_text: A 31-year-old woman is seen in clinic with amenorrhea. She had menarche at age 14 and has had normal periods since then. However, her last menstrual period was 7 months ago. She also complains of an occasional milky nipple discharge. She is currently taking no mediations and would like to become pregnant soon. Examination shows a whitish nipple discharge bilaterally, but the rest of the examination is normal. Urine human chorionic gonadotropin (hCG) is negative, thyroid stimulating hormone (TSH) is normal, but prolactin is elevated.

title: trec-cds-2014-29
text:
病例标题：trec-cds-2014-29
病例摘要：一名51岁的女性因咨询骨质疏松症来到诊所。她有显著的高血压病史和饮食控制下的糖尿病。目前每天吸烟一包。她的LH和FSH水平记录显示她在过去一年内已经进入更年期。她担心随着年龄增长可能会发生髋部骨折，并寻求骨质疏松预防方面的建议。

metadata.original_text: A 51-year-old woman is seen in clinic for advice on osteoporosis. She has a past medical history of significant hypertension and diet-controlled diabetes mellitus. She currently smokes 1 pack of cigarettes per day. She was documented by previous LH and FSH levels to be in menopause within the last year. She is concerned about breaking her hip as she gets older and is seeking advice on osteoporosis prevention.

title: trec-cds-2014-3
text:
病例标题：trec-cds-2014-3
病例摘要：一名58岁的非吸烟白人女性，有轻微的劳力性呼吸困难和偶尔咳嗽。胸部X光检查发现左肺有一个肿块。她其他方面没有症状。神经系统检查无异常，但头部CT扫描显示右侧额叶有一个孤立的肿块。

metadata.original_text: A 58-year-old nonsmoker white female with mild exertional dyspnea and occasional cough is found to have a left lung mass on chest x-ray. She is otherwise asymptomatic. A neurologic examination is unremarkable, but a CT scan of the head shows a solitary mass in the right frontal lobe.

title: trec-cds-2014-30
text:
病例标题：trec-cds-2014-30
病例摘要：一名72岁的男性患者抱怨在上坡行走时小腿疼痛逐渐加重。症状在过去三个月内逐渐加剧。两年前，他曾经历一次无并发症的心肌梗死；六个月前曾发生短暂性脑缺血发作。过去一个月里，尽管之前通过使用地尔硫卓、氢氯噻嗪和普萘洛尔控制了血压，但他的血压仍然恶化了。目前他正在服用单硝酸异山梨酯、氢氯噻嗪和阿司匹林。体格检查显示他的血压为151/91 mmHg，心率为67次/分钟。右侧颈动脉有杂音。下肢触感稍凉，并且足背动脉搏动减弱。

metadata.original_text: A 72-year-old man complains of increasing calf pain when walking uphill. The symptoms have gradually increased over the past 3 months. The patient had an uncomplicated myocardial infarction 2 years earlier and a transient ischemic attack 6 months ago. Over the past month, his blood pressure has worsened despite previous control with diltiazem, hydrochlorothiazide, and propranolol. His is currently taking isosorbide dinitrate, hydrochlorothiazide, and aspirin. On physical examination, his blood pressure is 151/91 mm Hg, and his pulse is 67/min. There is a right carotid bruit. His lower extremities are slightly cool to the touch and have diminished pulses at the dorsalis pedis.

title: trec-cds-2014-4
text:
病例标题：trec-cds-2014-4
病例摘要：一名2岁男孩因持续5天的高热和烦躁由其父母带到急诊部门。体格检查显示结膜炎、草莓舌、手足部炎症、手指和脚趾皮肤脱屑以及颈部淋巴结肿大，最小的淋巴结直径为1.5厘米。腹部检查发现有压痛且肝脏增大。实验室检测结果显示谷丙转氨酶升高、白细胞计数为17,580/mm³、白蛋白2.1 g/dL、C反应蛋白4.5 mg/L、红细胞沉降率60 mm/h、轻度正色素正细胞性贫血以及尿液中白细胞20/mL，未发现细菌。超声心动图显示冠状动脉中度扩张并可能伴有冠状动脉瘤。

metadata.original_text: A 2-year-old boy is brought to the emergency department by his parents for 5 days of high fever and irritability. The physical exam reveals conjunctivitis, strawberry tongue, inflammation of the hands and feet, desquamation of the skin of the fingers and toes, and cervical lymphadenopathy with the smallest node at 1.5 cm. The abdominal exam demonstrates tenderness and enlarged liver. Laboratory tests report elevated alanine aminotransferase, white blood cell count of 17,580/mm, albumin 2.1 g/dL, C-reactive protein 4.5 mg, erythrocyte sedimentation rate 60 mm/h, mild normochromic, normocytic anemia, and leukocytes in urine of 20/mL with no bacteria identified. The echocardiogram shows moderate dilation of the coronary arteries with possible coronary artery aneurysm.

title: trec-cds-2014-5
text:
病例标题：trec-cds-2014-5
病例摘要：一名56岁的女性患者，在左乳房切除术后第20天因呼吸困难和不适来到急诊部门。患者表示过去两周一直卧床休息。体格检查发现左侧上胸部和右侧小腿有压痛。手术切口未见出血或感染迹象。肺部听诊显示双侧呼吸音减弱，尤其在右下肺野更为明显。实验室检查结果显示D-二聚体水平升高。

metadata.original_text: A 56-year-old female on 20th day post-left mastectomy presents to the emergency department complaining of shortness of breath and malaise. The patient says that she has remained in bed for the last two weeks. The physical examination reveals tenderness on the left upper thoracic wall and right calf. The surgical incision shows no bleeding or signs of infection. Pulmonary auscultation is significant for bilateral decreased breath sounds, especially at the right base. Laboratory tests reveal an elevated D-dimer.

title: trec-cds-2014-6
text:
病例标题：trec-cds-2014-6
病例摘要：一名54岁的肥胖女性，患有糖尿病，并且HbA1c持续升高。她不愿意看营养师，也不遵守糖尿病药物治疗或锻炼计划。她抱怨左小腿下部出现疼痛的皮肤病变。尽管尝试使用外用乳膏和药膏，但该病变面积增大并开始渗出液体。

metadata.original_text: 64-year-old obese female with diagnosis of diabetes mellitus and persistently elevated HbA1c. She is reluctant to see a nutritionist and is not compliant with her diabetes medication or exercise. She complains of a painful skin lesion on the left lower leg. She has tried using topical lotions and creams but the lesion has increased in size and is now oozing.

title: trec-cds-2014-7
text:
病例标题：trec-cds-2014-7
病例摘要：一名26岁的肥胖女性，有双相情感障碍的病史，近期因体重和饮食问题感到抑郁。她表示最近睡眠困难，并且感到过度焦虑和烦躁不安。她还提到有过自杀的想法。她经常坐立不安，无法长时间静坐。她的家人说她变得越来越易怒。目前她在服用碳酸锂和唑吡坦。

metadata.original_text: A 26-year-old obese woman with a history of bipolar disorder complains that her recent struggles with her weight and eating have caused her to feel depressed. She states that she has recently had difficulty sleeping and feels excessively anxious and agitated. She also states that she has had thoughts of suicide. She often finds herself fidgety and unable to sit still for extended periods of time. Her family tells her that she is increasingly irritable. Her current medications include lithium carbonate and zolpidem.

title: trec-cds-2014-8
text:
病例标题：trec-cds-2014-8
病例摘要：一名62岁的男性因进行性记忆力减退和下肢抽动症状就诊神经科。神经系统检查确认存在严重的认知功能障碍和记忆功能异常。脑电图显示弥漫性周期性尖波发放。影像学研究显示中度进展性的大脑萎缩。皮层活检结果显示灰质出现弥散性空泡变性，伴有反应性星形胶质细胞增生，但无炎性浸润。

metadata.original_text: A 62-year-old man sees a neurologist for progressive memory loss and jerking movements of the lower extremities. Neurologic examination confirms severe cognitive deficits and memory dysfunction. An electroencephalogram shows generalized periodic sharp waves. Neuroimaging studies show moderately advanced cerebral atrophy. A cortical biopsy shows diffuse vacuolar changes of the gray matter with reactive astrocytosis but no inflammatory infiltration.

title: trec-cds-2014-9
text:
病例标题：trec-cds-2014-9
病例摘要：一名43岁的女性因颈部出现皮疹就诊皮肤科。检查发现多个皮疹，每个皮疹较小、柔软且呈柄状。最大的一个皮疹直径约为4毫米。不同皮疹的颜色从正常肤色到轻微色素沉着不等。

metadata.original_text: A 43-year-old woman visits her dermatologist for lesions on her neck. On examination, multiple lesions are seen. Each lesion is small soft, and pedunculated. The largest lesion is about 4 mm in diameter. The color of different lesions varies from flesh colored to slightly hyperpigmented.

title: trec-cds-2015-1
text:
病例标题：trec-cds-2015-1
病例摘要：一名44岁男性因多次呕吐被送至急诊室，呕吐物呈“咖啡渣”样。他的心率为135次/分，血压为70/40 mmHg。体格检查发现精神状态减退和四肢冰冷。他接受了快速晶体液输注，并随后进行了浓缩红细胞输注，并被收治入ICU进一步治疗。

metadata.original_text: A 44 yo male is brought to the emergency room after multiple bouts of vomiting that has a "coffee ground" appearance. His heart rate is 135 bpm and blood pressure is 70/40 mmHg. Physical exam findings include decreased mental status and cool extremities. He receives a rapid infusion of crystalloid solution followed by packed red blood cell transfusion and is admitted to the ICU for further care.

title: trec-cds-2015-10
text:
病例标题：trec-cds-2015-10
病例摘要：一名38岁的女性主诉经前期和月经期间严重的盆腔疼痛，月经量多且不规律，并偶尔在两次月经之间出现少量阴道出血。既往病史包括两年的不孕治疗以及26岁时发生的异位妊娠。

metadata.original_text: A 38 year old woman complains of severe premenstrual and menstrual pelvic pain, heavy, irregular periods and occasional spotting between periods. Past medical history remarkable for two years of infertility treatment and an ectopic pregnancy at age 26.

title: trec-cds-2015-11
text:
病例标题：trec-cds-2015-11
病例摘要：一名56岁的白种女性主诉对寒冷的敏感度明显高于大多数人。她还容易疲劳，食欲减退，并最近尝试了一些家庭疗法来缓解便秘。体格检查发现腱反射减弱，膝关节和踝关节反射放松延迟，皮肤非常干燥。她的动作和说话都很缓慢。

metadata.original_text: A 56-year old Caucasian female complains of being markedly more sensitive to the cold than most people. She also gets tired easily, has decreased appetite, and has recently tried home remedies for her constipation. Physical examination reveals hyporeflexia with delayed relaxation of knee and ankle reflexes, and very dry skin. She moves and talks slowly.

title: trec-cds-2015-12
text:
病例标题：trec-cds-2015-12
病例摘要：一名44岁的男子最近发生了一起汽车事故，导致颅骨骨折。在急诊室时，他注意到鼻孔有清澈的液体流出。第二天开始出现剧烈头痛和发热的症状。体格检查发现颈项强直。

metadata.original_text: A 44-year-old man was recently in an automobile accident where he sustained a skull fracture. In the emergency room, he noted clear fluid dripping from his nose. The following day he started complaining of severe headache and fever. Nuchal rigidity was found on physical examination.

title: trec-cds-2015-13
text:
病例标题：trec-cds-2015-13
病例摘要：一名5岁男孩因进行性加重的吞咽困难、流涎、发热和声音变化而被带到急诊部门。他表现出中毒症状，在母亲腿上坐着时身体前倾。他流涎并说话带有含糊不清的“热土豆”声音。父母否认有异物吸入或受伤的可能性，并报告说他们推迟了一些疫苗接种。

metadata.original_text: A 5-year-old boy presents to the emergency department with complaints of progressively worsening dysphagia, drooling, fever and vocal changes. He is toxic-appearing, and leans forward while sitting on his mother's lap. He is drooling and speaks with a muffled "hot potato" voice. The parents deny the possibility of foreign body ingestion or trauma, and they report that they are delaying some of his vaccines.

title: trec-cds-2015-14
text:
病例标题：trec-cds-2015-14
病例摘要：一名27岁的孕妇，怀孕11周，处于第二次妊娠中，血红蛋白（Hb）水平为9.0 g/dL，白细胞计数为6.3 x 10^9/L，血小板计数为119 x 10^9/L，平均红细胞体积为109 fL。进一步检查发现轻度缺铁性贫血。她已经接受铁补充治疗。产科医生两周后再次进行全血细胞计数。结果显示血红蛋白水平为8.9 g/dL，白细胞计数为7.1 x 10^9/L，血小板计数为108 x 10^9/L。她描述有吞咽困难的症状。进行了网织红细胞计数检查，结果升高至180 x 10^9/L。产科医生请求血液科会诊。以下额外结果显示：冷凝集素试验（DAT）阴性，凝血筛查正常，乳酸脱氢酶（LDH）水平升高至2000 IU/L，尿液中存在含铁血黄素，尿常规检查无碎片、未见凝集现象，红细胞形态不均一和异形红细胞。

metadata.original_text: A 27-year-old woman at 11 weeks gestation in her second pregnancy is found to have a hemoglobin (Hb) of 9.0 g/dL, white blood cell count 6.3 x 109/L, platelet count 119 x 109/L, mean corpuscular volume 109 fL. Further investigations reveal mild iron deficiency. She already receives iron supplementation. The obstetrician repeats the complete blood cell count 2 weeks later. The Hb is 8.9 g/dL, WBC count 7.1 x 109/L, and platelets 108 x 109/L. She describes difficulty swallowing. A reticulocyte count is performed and found elevated at 180 x 109/L. The obstetrician requests a hematology consult. The following additional results were found: Negative DAT, normal clotting screen, elevated LDH (2000 IU/L), normal urea and electrolytes, normal alanine aminotransferase (ALT), anisocytosis, poikilocytosis, no fragments, no agglutination, polychromasia and presence of hemosiderin in the urine.

title: trec-cds-2015-15
text:
病例标题：trec-cds-2015-15
病例摘要：凯伦是一位72岁的女性，患有高血压和2型糖尿病。两周前因原因不明的中风入院。当时，计算机断层扫描未发现脑出血，并给予了溶栓治疗，症状有所缓解。经食管超声心动图及脑和大血管磁共振血管成像均未发现异常。目前她的血压为120/70 mmHg，血糖正常，在12导联心电图上表现为正常的窦性心律。她报告有偶尔的心悸、呼吸困难以及几分钟后自行缓解的胸痛病史。

metadata.original_text: Karen is a 72-year-old woman with hypertension and type 2 diabetes, who was hospitalized for cryptogenic stroke two weeks ago. At the time, computed tomography was negative for brain hemorrhage and she was given thrombolytic therapy with resolution of her symptoms. Transesophageal echocardiogram and magnetic resonance angiogram of brain and great vessels found no evidence of abnormalities. She presents currently with a blood pressure of 120/70 mm Hg, normal glucose, and normal sinus rhythm on a 12-lead electrocardiogram. She reports history of occasional palpitations, shortness of breath and chest pain lasting for a few minutes and then stopping on their own.

title: trec-cds-2015-16
text:
病例标题：trec-cds-2015-16
病例摘要：一名4岁男孩因喘鸣被带到急诊室。他有鼻炎的病史，但没有喘鸣的历史。他的母亲报告说，五小时前，他在后院沙箱玩耍时突然开始咳嗽。咳嗽只持续了几分钟，但从那时起他就一直在发出明显的喘鸣声。他的母亲很担心，因为他的呼吸还没有恢复正常，所以带他去了急诊室。体检显示，这名孩子活泼且外观良好，在右侧胸中部可以听到喘鸣音。在空气中氧饱和度为100%。

metadata.original_text: A 4 year old boy presents to the emergency room with wheezing. He has had a history of allergic rhinitis, but no history of wheezing. His mother reports that 5 hours ago patient was playing in the backyard sandbox when she heard him suddenly start coughing. The coughing lasted only moments, but he has been audibly wheezing since. Mother was concerned, because his breathing has not returned to normal, so she brought him to the ED. On exam, the child is playful and well appearing. Wheezing is heard in the mid-right chest area. O2 sats are 100% on room air.

title: trec-cds-2015-17
text:
病例标题：trec-cds-2015-17
病例摘要：一名32岁的女性，无既往病史，前来诊所讨论最近宫颈涂片检查的实验室结果。她没有报告任何不适，并且总体健康状况良好。她的PAP细胞学检查结果为阴性，HPV检测结果为阳性。
