metadata.original_text: A 32 year old female with no previous medical history presents to clinic to discuss lab results from her most recent pap smear. She reports no complaints and is in general good health. The results of her PAP were cytology negative, HPV positive.

title: trec-cds-2015-18
text:
病例标题：trec-cds-2015-18
病例摘要：一名65岁的非洲裔美国男性，过去三周内呼吸困难逐渐加重，与体力活动有关。他还存在平卧时呼吸困难的情况，并开始在夜间使用两到三个额外的枕头。体格检查发现双肺底部湿啰音、踝部凹陷性水肿和颈静脉充盈。

metadata.original_text: A 65 yo African-American male with shortness of breath related to exertion that has been worsening over the past three weeks. He also has difficulty breathing when lying flat and has started using two to three extra pillows at night. Significant physical exam findings include bibasilar lung crackles, pitting ankle edema and jugular venous distension.

title: trec-cds-2015-19
text:
病例标题：trec-cds-2015-19
病例摘要：一名有显著吸烟史和慢性咳嗽的66岁女性，过去两年出现近期逐渐加重的呼吸困难。她从候诊室走到检查室时表现出中度呼吸窘迫。体格检查发现颈静脉轻度扩张、桶状胸以及中度吸气性和呼气性哮鸣音。她过去47年每天吸烟1至2包。

metadata.original_text: A 66yo female with significant smoking history and chronic cough for the past two years presents with recent, progressive shortness of breath. She is in moderate respiratory distress after walking from the waiting room to the examination room. Physical exam reveals mildly distended neck veins, a barrel-shaped chest, and moderate inspiratory and expiratory wheezes. She has smoked 1 to 2 packs per days for the past 47 years.

title: trec-cds-2015-2
text:
病例标题：trec-cds-2015-2
病例摘要：一名62岁男性患者因四天无痰咳嗽和一天发热入院。他正在服用免疫抑制药物，包括泼尼松。他的工作包括支气管镜检查及支气管肺泡灌洗（BAL）。BAL液体检查显示感染细胞核内有owl's eye包涵体。

metadata.original_text: A 62 yo male presents with four days of non-productive cough and one day of fever. He is on immunosuppressive medications, including prednisone. He is admitted to the hospital, and his work-up includes bronchoscopy with bronchoalveolar lavage (BAL). BAL fluid examination reveals owl's eye inclusion bodies in the nuclei of infection cells.

title: trec-cds-2015-20
text:
病例标题：trec-cds-2015-20
病例摘要：一名89岁的男性患者由妻子和儿子在六个月内逐渐出现认知和人格改变后送至急诊科。他开始记忆力减退，表达困难，并表现出异常行为，如将牛奶倒在桌子上以及穿好衣服后立即脱衣。他无法独立完成穿衣、洗澡、使用厕所或行走。体检显示患者的体温为36.5°C（97.7°F），心率为61次/分钟且节律不齐，血压为144/78 mmHg，呼吸频率为18次/分钟。患者意识清晰，能正确识别自己和所在城市，但不能确定年份。他频繁打断检查者。他反复伸手去抓面前的东西，包括检查者的领带和脸部。他无法倒着拼写单词“world”，无法完成涉及多步骤的指令，并且无法进行简单的计算。他的言语流畅，但经常使用发音相似的词语替代。他能立即回忆起三个词中的三个，但在五分钟后却记不起来了。颅神经检查显示有临床意义的病理反射性僵硬。双臂出现肌阵挛抽搐，腱反射对称亢进。腿部的腱反射正常。

metadata.original_text: An 89-year-old man was brought to the emergency department by his wife and son after six months of progressive changes in cognition and personality. He began to have poor memory, difficulty expressing himself, and exhibited unusual behaviors, such as pouring milk onto the table and undressing immediately after getting dressed. He is unable to dress, bathe, use the toilet, or walk independently. On examination the patient's temperature was 36.5°C (97.7°F), the heart rate 61 bpm in an irregular rhythm, the blood pressure 144/78 mm Hg, and the respiratory rate 18 bpm. The patient was alert and oriented to self and city but not year. He frequently interrupted the examiner. He repeatedly reached out to grab things in front of him, including the examiner's tie and face. He could not spell the word "world" backward, could not follow commands involving multiple steps and was unable to perform simple calculations. His speech was fluent, but he often used similar-sounding word substitutions. He could immediately recall three out of three words but recalled none of them after 5 minutes. Examination of the cranial nerves revealed clinically significant paratonic rigidity. Myoclonic jerks were seen in the arms, with symmetrically brisk reflexes. The reflexes in the legs were normal.

title: trec-cds-2015-21
text:
病例标题：trec-cds-2015-21
病例摘要：一名32岁的男性患者因腹泻、腹痛和排气增多前来您的诊所就诊。大便油腻且有恶臭。他还伴有食欲不振和全身不适的症状。他最近从山区徒步旅行回家，途中饮用过自然水源的水。粪便涂片碘染后显示椭圆形囊肿，具有光滑清晰的壁和2+核。

metadata.original_text: A 32-year-old male presents to your office complaining of diarrhea, abdominal cramping and flatulence. Stools are greasy and foul-smelling. He also has loss of appetite and malaise. He recently returned home from a hiking trip in the mountains where he drank water from natural sources. An iodine-stained stool smear revealed ellipsoidal cysts with smooth, well-defined walls and 2+ nuclei.

title: trec-cds-2015-22
text:
病例标题：trec-cds-2015-22
病例摘要：一名65岁男性，有肺结核病史，近期出现伴有血丝的 productive 咳嗽。胸部X光检查显示左上肺叶内有一个圆形不透明肿块。该肿块在仰卧和俯卧位CT成像中位置有所移动。痰液培养发现一种具有分隔、低角度分支菌丝且壁直平行的微生物。

metadata.original_text: A 65-year-old male with a history of tuberculosis has started to complain of productive cough with tinges of blood. Chest X-ray reveals a round opaque mass within a cavity in his left upper lobe. The spherical mass moved in the cavity during supine and prone CT imaging. Culture of the sputum revealed an organism with septated, low-angle branching hyphae that had straight, parallel walls.

title: trec-cds-2015-23
text:
病例标题：trec-cds-2015-23
病例摘要：一名18岁的男性患者近期从亚洲旅行归来，因突发高热、寒战、面部潮红、鼻出血、严重头痛和关节痛前来急诊。其全血细胞计数显示白细胞减少、血液比容增加和血小板减少。

metadata.original_text: An 18-year-old male returning from a recent vacation in Asia presents to the ER with a sudden onset of high fever, chills, facial flushing, epistaxis and severe headache and joint pain. His complete blood count reveals leukopenia, increased hematocrit concentration and thrombocytopenia.

title: trec-cds-2015-24
text:
病例标题：trec-cds-2015-24
病例摘要：一名31岁男性，无重大既往病史，因有productive咳嗽和胸痛前来就诊。他报告说一周前开始出现感冒症状，这些症状在两天前有所改善，但随后出现了新的发热、寒战和咳嗽加重的情况。他的右侧胸部疼痛，在咳嗽时加剧。他的妻子一周前也有类似的感冒症状，但现在感觉良好。生命体征包括体温103.4°F（约39.6°C），心率105次/分钟，血压120/80 mmHg，呼吸频率15次/分钟。肺部检查发现呼气时有哮鸣音、呼吸音减弱以及左下肺野的Egophany现象。

metadata.original_text: A 31 yo male with no significant past medical history presents with productive cough and chest pain. He reports developing cold symptoms one week ago that were improving until two days ago, when he developed a new fever, chills, and worsening cough. He has right-sided chest pain that is aggravated by coughing. His wife also had cold symptoms a week ago but is now feeling well. Vitals signs include temperature 103.4, pulse 105, blood pressure 120/80, and respiratory rate 15. Lung exam reveals expiratory wheezing, decreased breath sounds, and egophany in the left lower lung field.

title: trec-cds-2015-25
text:
病例标题：trec-cds-2015-25
病例摘要：一名10岁男孩因右膝疼痛来到急诊部门进行评估。孩子的监护人表示，过去4天里孩子一直抱怨膝盖疼痛，并且症状逐渐加重。没有受伤史。就诊前一天，男孩出现了发热的症状，而在过去的这一天里他变得越来越嗜睡。体格检查显示血压为117/75 mmHg，心率138次/分钟，体温38.1°C（100.5°F），呼吸频率28次/分钟，血氧饱和度97%。右大腿和膝盖有水肿和压痛，同时存在积液以及极有限的活动范围。感觉和运动功能正常。X光和平扫CT显示骨溶解性病变。

metadata.original_text: A 10-year-old boy comes to the emergency department for evaluation of right knee pain. The child's guardians stated that he had been complaining of knee pain for the past 4 days and it had been getting progressively worse. There was no history of trauma. The day before the visit the boy developed a fever, and over the past day he has become increasingly lethargic. On physical examination blood pressure was 117/75 mm Hg, HR 138 bpm, temperature 38.1 C (100.5 F), respiration 28 bpm, oxygen saturation 97%. There was edema and tenderness of the right thigh and knee, as well as effusion and extremely limited range of motion. Sensation and motor tone were normal. Plain radiography and CT showed an osteolytic lesion.

title: trec-cds-2015-26
text:
病例标题：trec-cds-2015-26
病例摘要：一名28岁的女性，孕次1产次0人工流产史0，因未破裂的异位妊娠被收入妇产科病房。既往病史包括肥胖、8岁时进行了一次无并发症的阑尾切除术、过去3年因不孕接受治疗以及盆腔腹腔镜手术期间轻微右侧输卵管粘连被电凝处理。入院前8周末有最后一次月经。β-HCG为100 mIU/L。主治医生通常会通过腹腔镜手术治疗未破裂的异位妊娠，但对患者的肥胖史和既往粘连情况表示担忧。

metadata.original_text: A 28 yo female G1P0A0 is admitted to the Ob/Gyn service for non-ruptured ectopic pregnancy. Past medical history is remarkable for obesity, a non-complicated appendectomy at age 8, infertility treatment for the past 3 years, and pelvic laparoscopy during which minor right Fallopian tube adhesions were cauterized. Her LMP was 8 weeks prior to admission. Beta HCG is 100 mIU. The attending physician usually treats unruptured ecoptic pregnancies laparoscopically but is concerned about the patient's obesity and history of adhesions.

title: trec-cds-2015-27
text:
病例标题：trec-cds-2015-27
病例摘要：一名15岁的女孩由其母亲陪同，因学校评价问题转诊。在过去三个月中，该女孩的缺勤次数超过预期，在课堂上显得异常疲倦和嗜睡。她的母亲保证女孩饮食充足，并且晚上有充足的睡眠，但承认女孩在周末远足时容易感到疲劳。体格检查：血压90/60 mmHg，心率130次/分钟。值得注意的发现是皮肤和黏膜极度苍白，存在三级收缩期杂音。实验室检测报告血红蛋白4.2 g/dL，MCV 61.8 fL，血清铁<1.8 umol/L，血清铁蛋白2 ng/mL。粪便隐血试验阴性。

metadata.original_text: A 15 yo girl accompanied by her mother is referred for evaluation by the school. The girl has more than expected absences in the last three month, appears to be constantly tired and sleepy in class. Her mother assures the girl is well fed, and getting the proper sleep at night but admits the girls tires easily when they go out on weekend hikes. Physical examination: BP: 90/60. HR 130/min the only remarkable findings are extremely pale skin and mucosae. Grade 3/6 systolic murmur. Lab tests report Hb: 4.2 g/dL, MCV 61.8 fL, serum iron < 1.8 umol/L and ferritin of 2 ng/mL. Fecal occult blood is negative.

title: trec-cds-2015-28
text:
病例标题：trec-cds-2015-28
病例摘要：一名8岁健康男孩因右下肢疼痛和发热前来就诊。他报告过去两天有跛行的情况。父母没有提到之前的外伤史，但记得几个月前在马里兰州度假时被蜱虫叮咬过。他们没有注意到红斑症状。体格检查显示右侧膝关节压痛并肿胀。周围血液白细胞计数和血沉略有升高。

metadata.original_text: A previously healthy 8-year-old boy presents with a complaint of right lower extremity pain and fever. He reports limping for the past two days. The parents report no previous trauma, but do remember a tick bite during a summer visit to Maryland several months ago. They do not remember observing erythema migrans. On examination, the right knee is tender and swollen. Peripheral WBC count and SRP are slightly elevated.

title: trec-cds-2015-29
text:
病例标题：trec-cds-2015-29
病例摘要：一名4岁女孩因持续发热一周前来就诊。家长报告体温曾高达104°F。当家长注意到女孩躯干出现红疹时，将她带到急诊室。体格检查发现草莓舌、红裂唇以及肿胀的红手。双眼球结膜充血但无分泌物。

metadata.original_text: A 4-year-old girl presents with persistent fever for the past week. The parents report a spike at 104°F. The parents brought the child to the emergency room when they noticed erythematous rash on the girl's trunk. Physical examination reveals strawberry red tongue, red and cracked lips, and swollen red hands. The whites of both eyes are red with no discharge.

title: trec-cds-2015-3
text:
病例标题：trec-cds-2015-3
病例摘要：一名65岁男性，无明显心血管疾病史，因急性发作的呼吸困难、呼吸急促和左侧胸痛就诊，且在吸气时症状加重。值得注意的是，在入院前两周他接受了右侧全髋关节置换手术，并由于疼痛管理不佳，在术后几天无法开始物理治疗和康复训练。体格检查的相关发现包括呼吸频率为35次/分钟以及右小腿疼痛。

metadata.original_text: A 65 yo male with no significant history of cardiovascular disease presents to the emergency room with acute onset of shortness of breath, tachypnea, and left-sided chest pain that worsens with inspiration. Of note, he underwent a right total hip replacement two weeks prior to presentation and was unable to begin physical therapy and rehabilitation for several days following the surgery due to poor pain management. Relevant physical exam findings include a respiratory rate of 35 and right calf pain.

title: trec-cds-2015-30
text:
病例标题：trec-cds-2015-30
病例摘要：一名47岁的男性患者在伸直的左前臂摔倒后，出现肘部内外侧疼痛和淤青、肿胀以及无法弯曲手臂的症状。X光检查显示尺骨已从肱骨冠突处脱位，桡骨已从肱骨小头处脱位。

metadata.original_text: A 47 year old male who fell on his outstretched left arm presents with pain and bruising on the inside and outside of the elbow, swelling, and inability to bend the arm. On the x-ray, the ulna has dislocated posteriorly from the trochlea of the humerus. The radius has dislocated from the capitulum of the humerus.

title: trec-cds-2015-4
text:
病例标题：trec-cds-2015-4
病例摘要：一名82岁的女性因早晨被刺痛的胸骨后疼痛唤醒，并伴有放射至左肩和下巴的疼痛以及呼吸困难，而来到急诊部门。患者有高血压、肾动脉狭窄伴慢性肾功能不全、高胆固醇血症、骨质疏松和痴呆病史。血压为199/108 mmHg，呼吸频率为每分钟18次，吸空气时的氧饱和度为98%。心音快速且无杂音。CK-MB为10.9 ng/ml，CK为89 U/l，CK指数为12.2%，肌钙蛋白T为0.40 ng/ml。心电图显示每分钟119次的窦性心动过速，并在V1、V2和V3导联中出现ST段抬高至3 mm。胸部X光片显示肺容积低，右侧基底亚段萎陷。冠状动脉造影未见狭窄或临床显著病变。左心室造影显示前壁无运动，下部膈面和底部膈面运动减弱，并且底部膈面和底部膈面的运动有所代偿性增强。经胸超声心动图显示严重的节段性左心室功能障碍涉及间隔、前间隔区域和心尖部。整体左心室收缩功能轻度受损，并伴有轻微的二尖瓣反流。

metadata.original_text: An 82-year-old woman comes to the emergency department because of chest pain and shortness of breath after being awakened in the morning by stabbing substernal chest pain radiating to the left shoulder and jaw. The patient had hypertension, renal-artery stenosis with chronic renal insufficiency, hypercholesterolemia, osteoporosis and dementia. Blood pressure was 199/108 mm Hg, respiratory rate 18 bpm, oxygen saturation 98% on ambient air. The heart sounds were rapid and with no murmurs. CK-MB was 10.9 ng/ml, CK was 89 U/l, CK index was 12.2% and Troponin T was 0.40 ng/ml. An EKG showed sinus regular tachycardia of 119 bpm, with ST-segment elevations up to 3 mm in V1, V2, and V3. A chest radiograph showed low lung volumes and right basilar subsegmental atelectasis. Coronary angiography showed no stenosis or clinically significant disease. Left ventriculography revealed akinesis of the anterior wall, hypokinesis of the apical and distal inferior walls, and compensatory hyperkinesis of the basal anterior and basal inferior walls. A transthoracic echocardiogram showed severe segmental left ventricular dysfunction involving the septum, anteroseptal territory, and apex. The overall left ventricular systolic function was mildly impaired and there was mild mitral regurgitation.

title: trec-cds-2015-5
text:
病例标题：trec-cds-2015-5
病例摘要：一名31岁的女性，无既往病史，因关节疼痛和疲劳两周前来急诊。最初她有右踝肿胀，并且站立和行走困难，这些症状几天后有所缓解。在过去几天里，她的膝盖、髋部和右侧肘部出现疼痛、肿胀和僵硬。她还报告间歇性发热，体温范围在38.2至39.4摄氏度之间，以及胸部疼痛。

metadata.original_text: A 31-year-old woman with no previous medical problems comes to the emergency room with a history of 2 weeks of joint pain and fatigue. Initially she had right ankle swelling and difficulty standing up and walking, all of which resolved after a few days. For the past several days she has had pain, swelling and stiffness in her knees, hips and right elbow. She also reports intermittent fevers ranging from 38.2 to 39.4 degrees Celsius and chest pain.

title: trec-cds-2015-6
text:
病例标题：trec-cds-2015-6
病例摘要：一名46岁的女性患者，过去9个月出现体重减轻（减少20磅）、多汗、失眠和腹泻的症状。她报告说自己的食欲比平时增加，并且有时候心脏无缘无故地加速跳动。体格检查发现她的手温暖且出汗，脉搏不规则，每分钟110次，同时存在腱反射亢进和轻微的眼球突出。

metadata.original_text: A 46-year-old woman presents with a 9 month history of weight loss (20 lb), sweating, insomnia and diarrhea. She reports to have been eating more than normal and that her heart sometimes races for no reason. On physical examination her hands are warm and sweaty, her pulse is irregular at 110bpm and there is hyperreflexia and mild exophthalmia.

title: trec-cds-2015-7
text:
病例标题：trec-cds-2015-7
病例摘要：一名20岁的女性大学生，既往无重大病史，因疲劳为主要症状前来就诊。她报告过去几个月睡眠和食欲增加，同时在学校作业上难以集中注意力。她不再喜欢与朋友相处，并感到内疚因为她没有花更多时间陪伴家人。体格检查和实验室检查，包括血红蛋白、血细胞比容和促甲状腺激素，均在正常范围内。

metadata.original_text: A 20 yo female college student with no significant past medical history presents with a chief complaint of fatigue. She reports increased sleep and appetite over the past few months as well as difficulty concentrating on her schoolwork. She no longer enjoys spending time with her friends and feels guilty for not spending more time with her family. Her physical exam and laboratory tests, including hemoglobin, hematocrit and thyroid stimulating hormone, are within normal limits.

title: trec-cds-2015-8
text:
病例标题：trec-cds-2015-8
病例摘要：一名10岁男孩，夜间打呼噜、呼吸暂停和夜间觉醒不安。没有头痛或夜惊的历史。最近，男孩的老师联系了他的父母，因为担心他的成绩下降、上课注意力不集中以及过度嗜睡。

metadata.original_text: A 10 yo boy with nighttime snoring, pauses in breathing, and restlessness with nighttime awakenings. No history of headache or night terrors. The boy's teacher recently contacted his parents because she was concerned about his declining grades, lack of attention, and excessive sleepiness during class.

title: trec-cds-2015-9
text:
病例标题：trec-cds-2015-9
病例摘要：一名10岁儿童因肌痛、咳嗽和呼吸困难被带到急诊室。两周前，患者因低热、腹痛和腹泻就诊于儿科医生处，诊断为病毒感染，并开具了非处方药物。三周前，该家庭从一个饲养供食用家猪的亲戚农场回家后出现症状。生命体征：体温39.5°C，血压90/60 mmHg，心率120次/分钟，呼吸频率40次/分钟。体检发现有发绀、颈部轻微僵硬和眼睑明显水肿。实验室检查结果显示白细胞计数为25,000，嗜酸性粒细胞占25%，尿液分析无异常。

metadata.original_text: A 10 year old child is brought to the emergency room complaining of myalgia, cough, and shortness of breath. Two weeks ago the patient was seen by his pediatrician for low-grade fever, abdominal pain, and diarrhea, diagnosed with a viral illness, and prescribed OTC medications. Three weeks ago the family returned home after a stay with relatives on a farm that raises domestic pigs for consumption. Vital signs: T: 39.5 C, BP: 90/60 HR: 120/min RR: 40/min. Physical exam findings include cyanosis, slight stiffness of the neck, and marked periorbital edema. Lab results include WBC 25,000, with 25% Eosinophils, and an unremarkable urinalysis.

title: trec-cds-2016-1
text:
病例标题：trec-cds-2016-1
病例摘要：78岁男性，术后转入养老院进行康复。据报道因小量急性心肌梗死再次入院。昨天被发现有黑色粪便，今天则排出了约9次稀便，其中有些带有隐血和鲜红色血液，在转院前不清楚出血量。

metadata.original_text: 78 M transferred to nursing home for rehab after CABG. Reportedly readmitted with a small NQWMI. Yesterday, he was noted to have a melanotic stool and then today he had approximately 9 loose BM w/ some melena and some frank blood just prior to transfer, unclear quantity.

title: trec-cds-2016-10
text:
病例标题：trec-cds-2016-10
病例摘要：一名55岁女性，患有结节病、慢性阻塞性肺疾病（COPD）、特发性心肌病（EF 40%，伴有舒张功能不全），曾因静脉曲张接受过TIPS手术以及甲状腺功能减退症。今天出现意识模糊的症状。她的丈夫带她到急诊科进行评估，因为注意到她的扑翼样震颤有所加重。在候诊室时，患者变得更具攻击性，随后失去反应能力。在急诊科：生命体征 - 体温97.9华氏度（约36.6摄氏度），心率115次/分钟，血压122/80毫米汞柱，呼吸频率18次/分钟，血氧饱和度98%（使用2升鼻导管）。她处于无反应状态但能够保护气道，因此未进行插管。她呕吐了一次，并接受了昂丹司琼和1.5升生理盐水的治疗。实验室检查结果显示钾离子水平为5.5毫当量/升，血清尿素氮（BUN）46毫克/分升，肌酐2.2毫克/分升（从基线0.8毫克/分升升高），氨浓度为280微摩尔/升。粪便隐血试验阴性。进行了尿液分析和胸部X光检查，结果待出；超声心动图FAST检查显示肝脾肿大但未见腹腔积液。

metadata.original_text: A 55y/o F with sarcoidosis, COPD, idiopathic cardiomyopathy with EF 40% and diastolic dysfunction, varices s/p TIPS and hypothyroidism presenting today with confusion. She was brought to the ED by her husband for evaluation after he noted worsening asterixis. While in the waiting room the pt became more combative and then unresponsive. In the ED: VS - Temp 97.9F, HR 115, BP 122/80, R 18, O2-sat 98% 2L NC. She was unresponsive but able to protect her airway and so not intubated. She vomited x1 and received Zofran as well as 1.5 L NS. Labs were significant for K 5.5, BUN 46, Cr 2.2 (up from baseline of 0.8), and ammonia of 280. Stool was Guaiac negative. A urinalysis and CXR were done and are pending, and a FAST revealed hepatosplenomegaly but no intraperitoneal fluid.

title: trec-cds-2016-11
text:
病例标题：trec-cds-2016-11
病例摘要：一名80岁男性，有痴呆症史和冠状动脉旁路移植术（CABG）病史。今年进行了两次冠脉造影，左侧内乳动脉（LIMA）通畅，SVG至桡动脉（RPDA）完全闭塞，SVG至OM2也闭塞，最近植入了LCX的药物洗脱支架（BMS）。患者近几天出现逐渐加重的胸痛和恶心症状。患者有反复发作的胸部疼痛史，使用吗啡后可缓解。目前患者正在服用阿司匹林、他汀类药物、异山梨酯和肝素。根据家属描述，过去两周内患者在轻微活动时出现了越来越多的胸痛症状。

metadata.original_text: A 80yo male with dementia and past history of CABG, two caths this year patent LIMA, totally occluded SVG to RPDA, SVG to OM2, s/p BMS to LCX, presents with increasing chest pain and nausea over the past few days. The patient has history of repeated episodes of recurrent chest pain with relief with morphine. Pt is on ASA, Statins, Imdur, and Heparin. Last month’s cath showed patent BMS in LCX and no new lesions. According to the family, the patient has increasing episodes of chest pain with minimal exertion in the last two weeks.

title: trec-cds-2016-12
text:
病例标题：trec-cds-2016-12
病例摘要：一名66岁女性行人被汽车撞倒。现场昏迷且无反应。有多处骨折和原发伤后的并发症。经导管栓塞了肱动脉脱落的分支，随后进行了腹腔换气手术，因为怀疑有腹腔间隔室综合征。撤除镇静后CT头部检查显示广泛皮质下出血。

metadata.original_text: 66 yo female pedestrian struck by auto. Unconscious and unresponsive at scene. Multiple fractures and complication secondary to the primary injury. S/p embolization of the avulsed second branch of brachial artery, complicated by exp lap secondary to suspicion of abdominal compartment syndrome. Not much of the response after weaning the sedation with CT of the head showing extensive interparenchymal hemorrhages throughout.

title: trec-cds-2016-13
text:
病例标题：trec-cds-2016-13
病例摘要：一名43岁的女性患者，有横贯性脊髓炎病史导致下肢瘫痪、抑郁、频繁发生压疮。此次就诊表现为寒战，并自述“感觉像是在死去”。入院时，她否认有任何呼吸困难、恶心或呕吐的症状，但报告每天有两次稀便。患者表示与家庭护理人员发生了争执，没有接受过专业的伤口护理。患者情绪激动，伴有寒战，抱怨感到寒冷和背部疼痛。检查发现其尾骨及臀部、脚跟处存在四期压疮。入院实验室检查结果显示血小板增多、乳酸水平升高以及凝血酶原时间延长。

metadata.original_text: A 43 year old woman with history of transverse myelitis leading to paraplegia, depression, frequent pressure ulcers, presenting with chills and reporting she felt "as if dying". Upon presentation, she denied any shortness of breath, nausea, vomiting, but did report diarrhea with two loose bowel movements per day. Patient reported that she had a fallout with her VNA and has not had any professional wound care. Patient is agitated, with rigors, complaining of feeling cold and back pain. Patient rolled and found to have a stage IV decubitus ulcer on coccyx and buttocks, heels. Admission labs significant for thrombocytosis, elevated lactate, and prolonged PT.

title: trec-cds-2016-14
text:
病例标题：trec-cds-2016-14
病例摘要：一名52岁的女性，患有慢性阻塞性肺疾病和乳腺癌，因数周来呼吸困难和背部疼痛到外地医院就诊。她曾因背部疼痛被家庭医生看过，并接受了止痛药治疗。随后出现皮疹，被认为是带状疱疹。最近几天，她的吸氧需求增加，并伴有咳嗽、发热和咽喉痛。在家行走时测得的血氧饱和度为79%。在外地医院被诊断为“多发性肺炎”。在进行计算机断层扫描过程中，对比剂渗入了她的手臂，导致皮肤水疱和肿胀。她接受了头孢曲松治疗，并转至当前医院。

metadata.original_text: A 52 year-old woman with chronic obstructive pulmonary disease and breast cancer who presented to an outside hospital with shortness of breath and back pain for several weeks. Had been seen by primary care provider for the back pain and treated with pain medications. Subsequently developed rash that was thought to be zoster. In the last few days, oxygen requirement increased and she had cough, fevers and sore throat. Noted oxygen saturation of 79% with ambulation at home. At outside hospital she was diagnosed with "multi-focal pneumonia." In the process of obtaining a computerized tomography scan, contrast infiltrated her arm with skin blistering and swelling. She was treated with ceftriaxone and transferred to current hospital.

title: trec-cds-2016-15
text:
病例标题：trec-cds-2016-15
病例摘要：一名67岁的男性患者，患有终末期慢性阻塞性肺病（COPD），在家使用氧气治疗。有气管软化症史，曾植入Y型支架，右侧上叶切除术治疗鳞状细胞癌，并接受过 Cyberknife 放射治疗。患者因咳嗽和大量分泌物导致Y型支架置入复杂，需要多次治疗性吸引。最后一次支气管镜检查在OSH进行，当时有大量分泌物被吸引出来。患者报告使用Mucomyst雾化吸入剂和Mucinex的依从性良好。患者报告食欲减退，在过去6个月内体重减轻50磅。活动耐受性下降。每日吸烟5支。PET扫描显示肺切除术部位附近有一个FDG摄取活跃的软组织肿块，以及一些FDG摄取活跃的淋巴结，提示可能复发。入院时生命体征为体温98.6°F、心率86次/分钟、血压106/78 mmHg、血氧饱和度89%。患者否认胸痛、心悸、外伤、恶心、呕吐或腹泻。患者因呼吸困难加重以及右肩疼痛和无力前来就诊。

metadata.original_text: A 67 y.o. M with end stage COPD on home oxygen, tracheobronchomalacia s/p Y-stent, h/o RUL resection for squamous cell carcinoma with Cyberknife treatment. Patient had Y-stent placed complicated by cough and copious secretions requiring multiple therapeutic aspirations. Last bronchoscopy was at OSH, where patient had copious secretions that were aspirated. Pt reports compliance with Mucomyst nebs and Mucinex. Patient reports decreaed appetitie, 50 lb wt loss in 6 months. Decreased activity tolerance. Smokes 5 cig/day. PET scan revealed FDG avid soft tissue mass adjacent to lung resection site with some FDG avid nodes concerning for recurrence. On arrival, vitals were T98.6 HR86 BP106/78 O289. Pt denied chest pain, palpitations, trauma, F/C, N/V/D. Pt. presents with worsening SOB with R shoulder pain and weakness.

title: trec-cds-2016-16
text:
病例标题：trec-cds-2016-16
病例摘要：一位90多岁的女性，最近因军团菌肺炎住院治疗，并在家继续康复，由其儿子照顾。过去几天里她的恢复情况还算不错，只是有些时好时坏的混乱感，或许还有间歇性的言语不清。今天凌晨1点15分左右，按照他平时的习惯，他的儿子准备去上班。当时他检查了一下病人的情况；她似乎在床上舒适地睡着了，侧卧着。随后不久，他听到了她在走向浴室的声音。在凌晨1点40分左右，他听到了来自浴室的响亮的撞击声。他发现患者倒在浴室的地面上，发出非言语性的声音，并且右侧肢体几乎没有动作。

metadata.original_text: A 90+ year old woman who was recently hospitalized for legionella PNA, and has been continuing her recovery at home with her son. She had been doing fairly well for the last few days except for some waxing and waning confusion, and perhaps intermittent dysarthria. The son was getting ready for work at 1:15am today, as per his usual routine. He looked in on the patient at that time; she appeared to be sleeping comfortably in bed, on her back. Soon thereafter, he heard her walking to the bathroom. At 1:40am, he heard a loud crash coming from the bathroom. He found the patient on the floor of the bathroom, making non-verbal utterances and with minimal movement of the right side.

title: trec-cds-2016-17
text:
病例标题：trec-cds-2016-17
病例摘要：这是一位76岁的女性患者，有舒张性心力衰竭的个人病史，并且正在服用华法林治疗房颤。她因血红蛋白浓度低和呼吸困难前来就诊。她的血红蛋白浓度在过去六周内从28下降到16.9，伴有逐渐加重的呼吸困难，过去两周内症状在劳累后加剧。患者报告有端坐呼吸的症状。她否认发热、寒战、胸痛、心悸、咳嗽、腹痛、便秘或腹泻、黑便、血便、排尿疼痛或皮疹。她的心电图显示与之前相比没有显著变化。她的隐血试验结果为阳性。

metadata.original_text: This is a 76-year-old female with personal history of diastolic congestive heart failure, atrial fibrillation on Coumadin, presenting with low hematocrit and shortness of breath. Her hematocrit dropped from 28 to 16.9 over the past 6 weeks with progressive shortness of breath, worse with exertion over the past two weeks. She reports orthopnea. She denies fevers, chills, chest pain, palpitaitons, cough, abdominal pain, constipation or diahrrea, melena, blood in her stool, dysuria or rash. Her electrocardiogram present no significant change from previous. Her Guaiac was reported as being positive.

title: trec-cds-2016-18
text:
病例标题：trec-cds-2016-18
病例摘要：一名40岁的女性，有酒精中毒的历史，并伴有戒断谵妄和癫痫发作（发生在两年前），多药滥用包括静脉注射海洛因、可卡因、冰毒（最后一次使用是在两年前），吸入式海洛因（最后一次使用是在两天前），丙型肝炎。她自愿入院进行戒毒治疗，以便能够照顾她的孩子。她还抱怨下腹部疼痛，放射至背部，从昨天开始出现，并且自昨天以来症状加重，与进食无关。她还抱怨恶心、呕吐（非血性但呈胆汁样）和腹泻（没有黑色或红色粪便）。她在一周前停止了美沙酮的使用以试图戒除药物滥用。她报告有运动时呼吸困难、端坐呼吸的症状。此外描述体重增加。实验室检查显示脂肪酶水平升高。

metadata.original_text: A 40-year-old woman with a history of alcoholism complicated by Delirium Tremens and seizures 2 years ago, polysubstance abuse ncluding IV heroin, cocaine, crack (last use 2 years ago), heroin inhalation (last use 2 days ago), hep C, presents for voluntary admission for detox. The patient would like to undergo detoxification so she can take care of her children. She also complains of abdominal pain in lower quadrants, radiating to the back since yesterday. She says the pain has worsened since yesterday and is not related to food intake. She also complains of nausea, vomitting (bilious but nonbloody), and diarrhea (no black or red stools). She stopped her methadone 1 week ago in an effort to quit drug abuse. She reports dyspnea on exertion, orthopnea. Also describes weight gain. Labs are significant for elevated lipase.

title: trec-cds-2016-19
text:
病例标题：trec-cds-2016-19
病例摘要：78岁女性，有高血压、慢性心力衰竭、糖尿病、肾功能不全和房颤（正在服用华法林），因近期出现意识模糊和嗜睡被送入心脏科诊所。值得注意的是，她最近因晕厥/跌倒而出院，在此期间停用了呋塞米，并将倍他乐克替换为美托洛尔，因为担心减缓心动过速可能是导致跌倒的原因。她被送往康复机构（之前在家生活）。根据急诊报告，患者在家已有3周的意识模糊症状，但没有家人陪同证实这一说法，且患者否认此情况。患者不确定自己为何住院。今天她见了心脏科医生，因出现脱水、嗜睡和意识模糊而被转至急诊。患者否认头痛、视力模糊、麻木、刺痛或无力。无胸痛。呼吸困难加重，尤其是在活动时。无恶心、呕吐。

metadata.original_text: 78 year old female with PMHx HTN, dCHF, Diabetes, CKD, Atrial fibrillation on coumadin, ischemic stroke, admitted after presenting to cardiology clinic today with confusion and Somnolence. Of note, she was recently discharged after presyncope/falls. At that time, lasix was stopped and atenolol was switched to metoprolol as there was concern that blunting of tachycardia could be contributing to falls. She was discharged to rehab (previously living at home). Per report from the ER, patient has had confusion at home for 3 weeks, though no family accompanies her to corroborate this story, and patient denies this. The patient is not sure why she is in the hospital. She saw her cardiologist today, who referred her to the ER after she appeared to be dehydrated, somnolent, and confused. The patient denies headache, blurry vision, numbness, tingling or weakness. No CP. +SOB, worsening DOE. No nausea, vomiting.

title: trec-cds-2016-2
text:
病例标题：trec-cds-2016-2
病例摘要：一位有高血压、严重主动脉瓣狭窄、高脂血症和右髋关节置换术病史的老年女性。因感到右腿弹响并摔倒在地上而就诊。无头部外伤或意识丧失史。

metadata.original_text: An elderly female with past medical history of hypertension, severe aortic stenosis, hyperlipidemia, and right hip arthroplasty. Presents after feeling a snap of her right leg and falling to the ground. No head trauma or loss of consciousness.

title: trec-cds-2016-20
text:
病例标题：trec-cds-2016-20
病例摘要：一位87岁的女性居民，有慢性心房颤动、高血压和甲状腺功能减退的病史。她因腹痛前来就诊。在5天前，她突然开始出现腹痛。起初，她的腹痛是间歇性的，每次持续几个小时。没有明显的与食物相关的关联。昨天，她注意到疼痛变得更加严重，并且更加集中在右侧。伴随有恶心和呕吐的症状。她呕吐了两次，排出的是清水样的物质，并被送往医院。在医院中，她的血清淀粉酶/脂肪酶水平升高至538和516，胆红素为4.1，AST/ALT分别为198/115，并接受了环丙沙星、甲硝唑以及500毫升生理盐水的治疗，随后被转送到急诊科。在急诊科中，她的生命体征是体温97.9℃，心率83次/分钟，血压157/92mmHg，呼吸频率18次/分钟，血氧饱和度97%，脉搏97%。

metadata.original_text: A 87 year old female NH resident with a history of chronic atrial fibrillation, hypertension and hypothyroidism who presents wit abdominal pain. She had been in her usual state of health until 5 days ago when she suddenly began to have abdominal pain. Her abdominal pain was initially intermittent lasting for a few hours at at time. No clear correlation with food. Yesterday, she noticed that her pain was much more severe and more localized to the right. This was accompanied by nausea and vomitting. She vomitted twice, with clear liquid emesis and was sent to a hospital. At the hospital, she was noted to have elevated amylase/lipase to 538 and 516 with elevated bili to 4.1 and AST/ALT to 198/115 and was given ciprofloxacin, flagyl and 500cc NS and was transferred to the emergency department. At the emergency department her vital signs were TM 97.9 HR 83 BP 157/92 RR 18 sat 97% RA.

title: trec-cds-2016-21
text:
病例标题：trec-cds-2016-21
病例摘要：一名63岁男性，有双表型ALL病史，现为异基因造血干细胞移植后第32天，因持续一周的呼吸困难加重和两天的清水样咳嗽前来就诊。患者表示其呼吸困难发生在平躺时，但活动时不明显。还提到左胸部有时会出现胸闷感，与呼吸困难无关。睡眠时使用三个枕头（与基线无变化），否认端坐呼吸；承认下肢水肿有所增加。有低热至37.7℃和腹部绞痛的症状。否认寒战、夜间盗汗、呕吐或腹泻。患者还有CMV感染、曲霉菌病和军团病的既往史，并正在服用泊沙康唑。他的胸部X光显示左基底肺叶和右上肺叶有实变影，提示可能为肺炎，同时存在少量局限性右侧胸腔积液。

metadata.original_text: A 63 yo man with h/o biphenotypic ALL, now Day + 32 from allogeneic SCT, who presents with one week of worsening SOB and two days of a clear productive cough. The patient states his SOB occured when lying flat, but not with activity. Also admitted to chest pressure which would come and go in his left chest no related to the SOB. Sleeps with 3 pillows (no change from baseline), denies PND; admits to a slight increase in lower extremity edema. Admits to low grade fevers to the 99's and crampy abdominal pain. Denies chills, night sweats, vomiting, or diarrhea. Patient also has a history of CMV infection, aspergillus and Leggionare's disease and is on posaconazole. His CXR showed an opacification of the left basilar lobe and also right upper lobe concerning for pneumonia as well as a small loculated right pleural effusion.

title: trec-cds-2016-22
text:
病例标题：trec-cds-2016-22
病例摘要：94岁男性，有冠状动脉疾病史（曾进行四支冠脉搭桥手术），心力衰竭和急性肾损伤。因室颤心跳停止入院。初步实验室检查显示钾离子水平为2.7。心电图显示窦性心律，心率80次/分钟，并发前降支病变，PR间期延长，V4-V6导联T波低平至倒置，幅度0.5到1毫米。超声心动图显示左室功能轻度减退，重度至中度主动脉瓣反流和轻度二尖瓣反流。

metadata.original_text: 94M with CAD s/p 4v-CABG, CHF, CRI presented with vfib arrest. Initial labs significant for K 2.7. EKG showed sinus rhythm, HR 80 with LAD, prolonged PR, TD 0.5 to 1mm in V4-V6. Echo showed Mildly depressed global left ventricular function, mild to moderate aortic regurgitation and mild mitral regurgitation.

title: trec-cds-2016-23
text:
病例标题：trec-cds-2016-23
病例摘要：85岁男性，患有痴呆、结肠癌，并近期进行了结肠切除术和原位吻合术，术后出现黑便。血红蛋白浓度从30降至23，但血压稳定。NGL检查结果为阴性。体格检查显示收缩压128/50毫米汞柱，心率70次/分钟，呼吸频率16次/分钟，经鼻导管吸氧饱和度100%。患者体型匀称，无明显病史。胸部清晰，颈静脉扩张至8厘米。双肺听诊正常，腹部柔软，有愈合良好的手术疤痕，无水肿或腹水。实验室检查显示白细胞计数7千，血红蛋白浓度24%，钾离子水平4.0毫摩尔/升，肌酐水平0.7毫克/分升。

metadata.original_text: 85M dementia, colon cancer and recent colectomy with primary reanastomosis p/w melena. HCT 30 to 23 but hemodynamically stable. NGL negative. Exam notable for Tm 99 BP 128/50 HR 70 RR 16 with sat 100 on RA. WD man, NAD. Chest clear, JVP 8cm. RR s1s2. Soft abdomen, well healed surgical scar. No edema or cord. Labs notable for WBC 7K, HCT 24, K+ 4.0, Cr 0.7.

title: trec-cds-2016-24
text:
病例标题：trec-cds-2016-24
病例摘要：一名51岁男性，患有多发性硬化症、四肢瘫痪、高血压、限制性肺病、慢性便秘以及肠梗阻（术后），多次泌尿道感染（包括置入耻骨上导管后），因肠梗阻和泌尿道感染就诊。今天被送入医院，因为他的家庭护理助手注意到他夜间尿量减少，通常夜间约1000毫升，而这次只有75毫升。过去两周内，他有轻微的耳痛、咽喉痛以及一些鼻塞症状。他否认有任何腹痛，并未主观感觉到腹部膨胀的变化。在急诊室检查时发现他严重脱水，血清肌酐水平从0.6上升到1.4。

metadata.original_text: 51 year-old man with multiple sclerosis, quadriparesis, hypertension, restrictive lung disease, chronic constipation and small bowel obstruction after ileostomy, multiple urinary tract infections (also after placement of suprapubic tube), presents with small bowel obstruction and urinary tract infection. Admitted today as his home health aide noticed his urine output was low, 75cc overnight when he usually has about 1 liter overnight. Over the past two weeks he has had mild earaches, a sorethroat as well as some rhinorrhea. He denies any abdominal pain, has not sujectively noticed any change in abdominal distention. In the Emergency Department, he was noted to be severely dehydrated on exam, and creatinine level was 1.4 up from 0.6.

title: trec-cds-2016-25
text:
病例标题：trec-cds-2016-25
病例摘要：一名64岁的女性患者，有心房颤动、慢性阻塞性肺疾病、高血压和高脂血症的病史。她曾因房间隔缺损修补术并发胸骨伤口感染及术后心房颤动而接受胺碘酮治疗。最初因呼吸困难和背部疼痛通过急诊部入院，并被发现有心房颤动伴快速室率。计算机断层血管造影显示左前降支弥漫性病变，以及考虑为恶性肿瘤的阻塞性肺炎。针对她的房颤，开始使用地尔硫卓进行治疗。对于肺炎，则给予抗生素治疗。当晚晚些时候，她被转至病房，并开始服用50 mg tid 比索洛尔。在病房期间，进行了支气管镜检查，显示左侧主支气管外部受压，通过细针穿刺活检发现大细胞癌。患者否认胸痛、呼吸困难和呼吸急促。她确实有出汗和偶尔的心悸症状。

metadata.original_text: A 64 yo female with with history of atrial fibrillation, Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease, hypertension, hyperlipidemia, repair of an atrial septum defect which was complicated by sternal wound infection and post-operative atrial fibrillation treated with amiodarone, was initially admitted through the Emergency Department with shortness of breath and back pain, and was noted to have atrial fibrillation with rapid ventricular response. A computed tomography angiography demonstrated diffuse left anterior descending artery and post-obstructive pneumonia concerning for malignancy. For her atrial fibrillation, she was started on diltiazem. For the pneumonia, she was treated with antibiotics. She was then transferred to the floor later that same night on metoprolol 50 mg tid. While on the floor, she had a bronchoscopy performed which showed external compression of her left mainstem bronchus, and she had a biopsy via fine-needle aspiration, which showed large cell carcinoma. She denies chest pain, shortness of breath and tachypnea. She does note some diaphoresis and occasional palpitations.

title: trec-cds-2016-26
text:
病例标题：trec-cds-2016-26
病例摘要：患者为79岁女性，有冠状动脉疾病史（曾进行前降支支架植入术），舒张性心力衰竭，二尖瓣反流1+级，高血压，高脂血症，既往吸烟史和房颤病史。因逐渐加重的呼吸困难直接从家中入院。患者的主要症状是咳嗽已有一周时间，偶尔咳出少量白色痰液。她否认有发热、寒战、恶心、呕吐、胸痛或体重增加等症状。过去三天内她还报告咽喉疼痛。最近进行了胸腔穿刺以处理中等大小的胸腔积液，胸水细胞学检查未发现恶性细胞。患者否认近期出现心悸，并表示一直按时服药。她承认近来感到疲劳，并且有卧位时需要两枕枕头才能呼吸的症状，这种症状已持续数月。目前考虑诊断包括心力衰竭 vs 内在性肺部疾病（浸润性）vs 血栓性疾病。为了优化心脏功能并促进房颤复律，患者进行了电复律，过程中血压下降，出现结节性心律失常需要气管插管。她被给予多巴胺治疗。停用多巴胺后的心脏监测显示QTc延长至700，并且出现了房室逸搏心律。

metadata.original_text: The patient is a 79 yoF w/ a h/o CAD s/p RCA stenting, diastolic CHF, 1+ MR, HTN, Hyperlipidemia, previous smoking history, and atrial fibrillation who presents for direct admission from home for progressive shortness of breath. According to Pt, her primary complaint is not shortness of breath, but cough X 1 week which has been rarely productive of white sputum. She denies associated fevers, chills, nausea, vomiting, pleuritic pain, weight gain, or dietary indiscretion. She also reports a sore throat over the past 3 days. She recently underwent thoracentesis for a moderate size pleueral effusion. Cytology of the effusion was negative for malignant cells. Pt denies recent palpitations, and reports that she has been compliant with all medications. She admits to recent fatigue and 2 pillow orthopnea which has been present for months. Current etiology considerations include CHF vs intrinsic pulmonary disease (infiltrative) vs embolic disease. In order to optimize cardic function with atrial kick, pt underwent cardioversion and became hypotensive with a junctional rhythm requiring intubation. She was placed on dobutamine. Off of dobutamine, cardiac monitoring demonstrated a long QTc of 700 and an atrial escape rhythm.

title: trec-cds-2016-27
text:
病例标题：trec-cds-2016-27
病例摘要：一名96岁的女性在养老院的餐厅内被发现无反应。她在被工作人员发现后大约1分钟内没有反应。患者无法回忆起跌倒前的情况，但有头痛和颈部/肩部不适的症状。NCHCT显示左侧顶叶硬膜下血肿约9毫米。颈椎X光片未见异常。影像学检查：头部CT（无对比剂）显示左側急性硬膜下血肿最大直径为1.5厘米，并伴有8毫米的镰状疝，以及向下的幕下疝导致左侧鞍上池消失和小脑扁桃体疝。未发现骨折或涉及颅底的破坏性浸润性病变。

metadata.original_text: A 96 y/o female found unresponsive on ground at nursing home. Pt was in dining room and found by staff. Unresponsive for 1 min after found. Pt cannot recollect events preceding fall but with some c/o HA and some neck/shoulder discomfort. NCHCT showed ~9mm L parietal SDH. C-spine negative. Imaging: CT head w/o contrast Acute left subdural hematoma measuring 1.5 cm maximal dimensions with leftward subfalcine herniation of 8 mm, downward transtentorial herniation with obliteration of the left suprasellar cistern, and uncal herniation. No fx, destructive infiltrative lesion involving the skull base.

title: trec-cds-2016-28
text:
病例标题：trec-cds-2016-28
病例摘要：这位84岁的男性患者有冠状动脉疾病的病史，因两天的黑便和黑色呕吐物前来就诊。大便颜色逐渐变淡，但他出现了更多的嗜睡症状。今天他被送到了急诊科。初始测量的收缩压在60多毫米汞柱，之后都在110-120毫米汞柱之间。在急诊科，通过洗胃清除咖啡渣样呕吐物，并用600毫升冲洗液进行了处理。在洗胃过程中，患者出现胸痛并伴有V3-V5导联轻度ST段下移，但这些症状自行缓解。患者每天口服阿司匹林81毫克片剂。

metadata.original_text: This 84-year-old man with a history of coronary artery disease presents with 2 days of melena and black colored emesis. Stools becoming less dark, but he had increased lethargy and presented to the emergency department today. Initial systolic blood pressure recorded in the 60s, but all in 110-120s after that. In the ED, he had gastric lavage with coffee ground emesis that cleared with 600 cc of flushing. During the lavage he had chest pressure with mild ST depression V3-V5 that resolved spontaneously. Patient is on ASPIRIN 81 mg Tablet by mouth daily.

title: trec-cds-2016-29
text:
病例标题：trec-cds-2016-29
病例摘要：这是一位54岁的男性患者，患有特发性肺纤维化。他今天打电话报告过去三天呼吸困难逐渐加重的情况。在入院前3天，他的呼吸道状况处于基线状态（静息时使用4L鼻导管，活动时使用6L），但他拥抱了一位养有宠物鼠的表亲，并且家里的地下室出现了暖气上升的情况。他认为这两件事导致了他的呼吸突然恶化，担心是过敏原暴露所致。他否认有任何生病接触史、发热、寒战或流涕。他曾接种过流感疫苗和肺炎球菌疫苗。一个月前因逐渐加重的活动后呼吸困难入院。CT显示下肺野出现增多的磨玻璃样阴影，并伴有肺纤维化，外周嗜酸性粒细胞比例升高（12%）。支气管肺泡灌洗液也检测到嗜酸性粒细胞阳性。他被开始使用高剂量皮质类固醇（泼尼松60mg），计划进行密切的门诊随访以观察嗜酸性粒细胞性肺疾病的进展。出院时使用2-3L鼻导管。随后因自发性气胸来到急诊科，原因不明。在当前住院当天，患者打电话给他的呼吸科医生，抱怨自上周六以来呼吸困难加重。昨天他在参加肺康复训练时，在轻微活动后血氧饱和度降至70%，目前静息状态下使用4L鼻导管。最近没有生病接触史。被要求前往急诊科。在急诊科，初始检查结果为：体温36.8℃，心率96次/分，血压144/97mmHg，呼吸24次/分，血氧饱和度97%，使用6L鼻导管。

metadata.original_text: This is a 54 year old male patient with an idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis, who called today with worsening dyspnea for 3 days. He had been in unusual state of good health at baseline respiratory status (using 4L nasal canula at rest and 6L with exertion) when 3 days prior to admission, he hugged his cousin who has rats for pets and also the heat came up from the basement of his house. He feels that with these two events, his breathing became acutely worse and he is concerned for allergen exposure. He denies any sick contacts, fevers, chills, rhinorrhea. He did receive flu and pneumovax vaccines. He has had a recent admission last month with progressive dyspnea on exertion. The computed tomography revealed increased ground glass opacity in lower lobes superimposed on pulmonary fibrosis with elevated eosinophils peripherally (12%). A bronchoalveolar lavage was also positive for eosinophils. He was started on high dose steroids (prednisone 60mg) with plan for close outpatient follow up for eosinophilic lung disease. He was discharged on 2-3L nasal canula. He then represented to the emergency department for spontaneous pneumomediastinum of unclear etiology. On day of current admission, the patient called his pulmonologist complaining of worsening shortness of breath since Saturday. Yesterday he was at pulmonary rehab and desaturated to the 70s on 6L with minimal exertion, and he is currently on 4L nasal canula at rest. No sick contacts recently. He was asked to go to ED. In the ED, initial vs were: 98.3, 96, 144/97, 24, 97% 6L NC.

title: trec-cds-2016-3
text:
病例标题：trec-cds-2016-3
病例摘要：一名75岁女性，有严重的外周血管疾病（PVD）、冠状动脉疾病（CAD）、糖尿病（DM）和慢性肾病（CKD）的既往史。她在家中被发现昏迷不醒后就诊。检查发现其血糖偏低至29，并伴有低血压和心动过缓。通过补充液体，她的低血压和意识模糊有所改善。尿液分析结果为阳性，最终培养出克雷伯菌。她的体温为96.3°F，呼吸频率为22次/分钟，血压为102/26 mmHg，白细胞计数升高至18，血清肌酐水平为6（基线值为2）。患者的血液培养结果为A群链球菌阳性。在转院当天，她的血压降至60s范围。她一整天都没有尿液排出。早上因低血压和尿中罕见的嗜酸性粒细胞接受了80mg静脉注射的曲安奈德治疗。到达MICU时，患者清醒但昏睡。详细询问病史后，患者否认疼痛、头晕、头痛、颈部疼痛、咽喉痛、近期疾病或接触病人、咳嗽、呼吸困难、胸痛、胃灼热、腹痛、恶心呕吐、腹泻、便秘和尿痛的症状。她对腿部皮疹的持续时间描述不清。

metadata.original_text: A 75F with a PMHx significant for severe PVD, CAD, DM, and CKD presented after being found down unresponsive at home. She was found to be hypoglycemic to 29 with hypotension and bradycardia. Her hypotension and confusion improved with hydration. She had a positive UA which eventually grew klebsiella. She had temp 96.3, respiratory rate 22, BP 102/26, a leukocytosis to 18 and a creatinine of 6 (baseline 2). Pt has blood cultures positive for group A streptococcus. On the day of transfer her blood pressure dropped to the 60s. She was anuric throughout the day. She received 80mg IV solumedrol this morning in the setting of low BPs and rare eos in urine. On arrival to the MICU pt was awake but drowsy. On ROS, pt denies pain, lightheadedness, headache, neck pain, sore throat, recent illness or sick contacts, cough, shortness of breath, chest discomfort, heartburn, abd pain, n/v, diarrhea, constipation, dysuria. Is a poor historian regarding how long she has had a rash on her legs.

title: trec-cds-2016-30
text:
病例标题：trec-cds-2016-30
病例摘要：85岁女性，有高血压、高脂血症病史，曾患乳腺癌及右侧肾盂移行细胞肿瘤（大小为3cm），因进行肾切除手术入院。术后出现躁动，认为是由于使用了镇痛药物所致。今天，她重新开始服用家中常用的药物，在心电监护下，患者的心率降至40次/分左右。在血压70mmHg和心率40次/分的情况下，患者无明显症状。给予1L静脉补液后，她的血压和心率逐渐恢复正常。然而，一个小时后，当她坐起时再次出现心动过缓（30次/分）并伴有低血压。第二次事件发生在体位改变时，并且患者出现了房室节律（30次/分）。

metadata.original_text: 85 y/o F with PMHx of HTN, HL, h/o breast CA and 3cm renal pelvis transitional cell tumor who presented for nephrectomy. Her post op course was complicated by agitation thought due to narcotics. Today, she was restarted on her home meds and while on telemetry, pt was noted to be bradycardic to 40s. Pt was triggered for SBP of 70 and HR of 40 during which she remained asymptomatic. She was given 1L IVF and her HR/BP trended back up to baseline. However, there was a second event an hour later when she sat up and became bradycardic in the 30s with associated hypotension. Second episode occurred with position change and again, pt developped junctional rhythm in 30s.

title: trec-cds-2016-4
text:
病例标题：trec-cds-2016-4
病例摘要：一位87岁的女性患者，有骨质疏松史、多次近期跌倒史、冠状动脉疾病（CAD），从养老院转诊，因C2骨折就诊。该患者在养老院时状态良好，直到昨天早上试图起床去洗手间时发生了跌倒。此次跌倒未被目睹，但患者报告称没有失去意识。她抱怨颈部和肋骨疼痛。她在职业健康中心（OSH）被发现有C2部位的粉碎性骨折。在急诊室，她的生命体征为体温99.1°F，血压106/42 mmHg，心率101次/分，呼吸频率24次/分。进行了心电图检查，结果显示窦性心动过速和V3、V4导联ST段下移。头部CT未见颅内出血（ICH）.

metadata.original_text: An 87 yo woman with h/o osteoporosis, multiple recent falls, CAD, who presents from nursing home with C2 fracture. The patient was in her usual state of health at her nursing home until yesterday morning when she sustained a fall when trying to get up to go to the bathroom. The fall was not witnessed, but the patient reportedly did not lose consciousness. The patient complained of neck and rib pain. She was taken to OSH, where she was found to have a comminuted fracture of C2. In the ED, the patient's VS were T 99.1, BP 106/42, P 101, R 24. She had an ECG which showed sinus tachycardia and ST depressions in V3 and V4. CT head was negative for ICH.

title: trec-cds-2016-5
text:
病例标题：trec-cds-2016-5
病例摘要：一位82岁男性患者，患有慢性阻塞性肺疾病，曾因二尖瓣狭窄和心房颤动接受生物人工心房瓣置换术，右肾切除术（因肾细胞癌），结肠癌手术后。主诉9天内有 productive 咳嗽、发热及呼吸困难。

metadata.original_text: An 82 man with chronic obstructive pulmonary disease, status-post bioprosthetic atrial valve replacement for atrial stenosis, atrial fibrillation with cardioversion, right nephrectomy for renal cell carcinoma, colon cancer status-post colectomy, presents with 9 day history of productive cough, fever and dyspnea.

title: trec-cds-2016-6
text:
病例标题：trec-cds-2016-6
病例摘要：一位94岁的女性患者，有近期肺栓塞/深静脉血栓、心房颤动和冠状动脉疾病的病史。她因发热和腹痛就诊。之前，她曾出现背部疼痛和呼吸困难的症状。检查发现双侧肺栓塞和新发的心房颤动，并开始使用华法林治疗。她的红细胞比容略有下降，需要输血，且粪便隐血试验呈阳性。她出院后再次因腹部绞痛和黑色大便返回。胃镜检查显示有小的胃和十二指肠溃疡（正在愈合），食管狭窄，无活动性出血。腹部CT检查发现胆囊扩张、胆石症以及胆道梗阻，伴有多个胆总管结石。

metadata.original_text: A 94 year old female with hx recent PE/DVT, atrial fibrillation, CAD presents with fever and abdominal pain. Earlier, she presented with back pain and shortness of breath. She was found to have bilateral PE's and new afib and started on coumadin. Her HCT dropped slightly, requiring blood transfusion, with guaic positive stools. She was discharged and returned with abdominal cramping and black stools. EGD showed a small gastric and duodenal ulcer (healing), esophageal stricture, no active bleeding. She also had an abdominal CT demonstrating a distended gallbladder with gallstones and biliary obstruction with several CBD stones.

title: trec-cds-2016-7
text:
病例标题：trec-cds-2016-7
病例摘要：这是一名41岁男性患者，有酒精滥用、胆结石、高血压和肥胖的病史。他因呕血在当地医院就诊。周五晚上，他多次呕吐出鲜红色和暗红色物质。在急诊科，初步检查结果为：体温98.6°F，心率66次/分，血压145/89 mmHg，呼吸频率16次/分，氧饱和度98%，呼吸困难程度正常。他因肝功能测试异常开始接受质子泵抑制剂和奥曲肽静脉滴注治疗。实验室检查显示脂肪酶升高、全血细胞减少和凝血障碍。腹部超声检查发现胆结石、胆汁淤积和腹水。因此，鉴于新出现的腹水和腹痛，他接受了750mg头孢喹肟静脉注射和500mg灭滴灵静脉注射，据称是为了预防自发性细菌性腹膜炎。在病房内，他表示自己有两次呕吐暗红色物质的情况。护士报告说大约75ml，并且是胃内容物培养阳性。他主诉右上腹部疼痛并向背部放射。他还报告过去两天中腹围逐渐增大并出现急性膨胀，下肢肿胀。患者否认发热、寒战、夜间盗汗、头痛、鼻窦压痛、流涕或充血。否认咳嗽、呼吸困难。他也否认胸痛或胸闷。

metadata.original_text: This is a 41-year-old male patient with medical history of alcohol abuse, cholelithiasis, hypertension, obesity who presented to his local hospital with hematemasis. On Friday evening he had several episodes of vomiting of bright and dark red material. In the emergency department, initial vs were: T 98.6 P66 BP145/89 R16 O2 sat 98% RA. He was started on a protonix gtt and octreotide gtt given his elevated liver function tests. Lab tests show elevated lipase, pancytopenia and coagulopathy. He had a right upper abdominal quadrant ultrasound which demonstrated gallstones and sludge and ascites. As such given new ascites and abdominal pain he was given levofloxacin 750mg IV and flagyl 500mg IV reportedly for spontaneous bacterial peritonitis prophylaxis. On the floor, he reports that he had two episodes of vomiting of dark red emesis. Per his nurse it was about 75ml and was gastrocult positive. He has right upper abdominal quadrant pain radiating to his back. He also reports slow increase in abdominal girth with more acute distention and lower extremity swelling over the two days prior to admission. The patient denies fever, chills, night sweats, headache, sinus tenderness, rhinorrhea or congestion. Denied cough, shortness of breath. He also denied chest pain or tightness.

title: trec-cds-2016-8
text:
病例标题：trec-cds-2016-8
病例摘要：一名26岁初产妇，目前预估怀孕10周。有4年1型糖尿病史。最后一次月经时间不详，但大约在三个月前。五天前，患者开始感到肌肉酸痛和鼻塞。她在一个星期前接受了流感疫苗接种。她继续感觉不适，并出现了妊娠剧吐的症状。她在急诊科就诊（未住院），并被给予静脉补液、胃复安和扑热息痛治疗，同时检测到阳性怀孕试验结果。今天，她因症状加重再次返回急诊科。她被收入妇产科病房，并给予了静脉补液和胃复安。值得注意的是，她的实验室检查结果显示血糖为160，碳酸氢盐为11，β-hCG为3373，尿中检测到酮体。她的家人注意到她呼吸急促且非常嗜睡。她似乎处于呼吸困难状态。

metadata.original_text: A G2P0010 26 yo F, now estimated to 10 weeks pregnant, with 4yr hx of IDDM. Last menstrual period is not known but was sometime three months ago. Five days ago, the patient began feeling achy and congested. She had received a flu shot about 1 week prior. She continued to feel poorly and developed hyperemesis. She was seen in the ED (but not admitted), where she was given IVF, Reglan and Tylenol and she was found to have a positive pregnancy test. Today, she returned to the ED with worsening of symptoms. She was admitted to the OB service and given IVF and Reglan. Of note, her labwork demonstrates a blood glucose of 160, bicarbonate of 11, beta-hCG of 3373 and ketones in her urine. Her family noted that she was breathing rapidly and was quite somnolent. She appears to be in respiratory distress.

title: trec-cds-2016-9
text:
病例标题：trec-cds-2016-9
病例摘要：这是一名在34岁、孕次0、产次0的女性第2胎中出生的男性婴儿，孕期为24周加7天，体重678克。产前筛查结果为O型阳性，抗体阴性，乙型肝炎表面抗原阴性，RPR非反应性，风疹免疫，GBS情况未知。这是一例通过体外受精（IVF）怀孕的病例，在第一孕期有出血现象。母亲在分娩当天早晨因胎膜早破入院。大约在分娩前18小时给予贝美格。同时开始使用氨苄西林、庆大霉素和硫酸镁治疗。尽管使用了硫酸镁，母亲的产程仍进展顺利，并出现了发热和寒战的症状。最高体温为38.4°C（101.2°F）。由于产程进展迅速及对绒毛羊膜炎的担忧，决定进行剖宫产分娩。婴儿在分娩室进行了气管插管，一分钟Apgar评分为5分，五分钟Apgar评分为8分。检查发现是一名极早产儿，已进行气管插管。体重为678克。胸部X光显示呼吸系统不成熟，并且双肺内有弥漫性斑片状阴影，左侧多于右侧，伴有肺容积增大。

metadata.original_text: This is a 24 and 2/7 weeks, 678 gm male, born to a 34-year-old G2, P0 to 3 woman. Prenatal screens were O positive, antibody negative, hepatitis B surface antigen negative, RPR nonreactive, rubella immune, and GBS unknown. This was an IVF pregnancy, notable for bleeding in the first trimester. The mother presented to the Hospital on the morning of delivery with premature rupture of membranes. Betamethasone was given approximately 18 hours prior to delivery. The mother was also started on ampicillin, gentamycin, and magnesium sulfate. Mother's labor progressed despite magnesium and she developed fever and chills. Maximum temperature was 101.2 degrees. Because of progressive labor and concerns for chorioamnionitis, the decision was made to deliver the infants. Delivery was by cesarean section. The infant was intubated in the Delivery Room and Apgars were 5 at one and 8 at five minutes. Examination was notable for an extreme pre-term infant, intubated. Weight was 678 gm. Chest x-ray shows respiratory immaturity and diffuse bilateral opacities within the lungs, left greater than right, with increased lung volumes.

title: trec-ct-2021-1
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2021-1
病例摘要：患者是一名45岁男性，有脊索膜细胞瘤病史，伴有严重的下肢无力和尿潴留（术后使用 Foley 导尿管、大剂量皮质类固醇、高血压及慢性疼痛）。肿瘤位于胸腰段脊柱，为不可切除的脊索膜细胞瘤（术前放疗），并伴有进行性下肢无力和尿潴留。患者最初表现为右下肢无力，行走困难且右大腿前侧麻木。MRI显示脊髓终丝肿块，经活检确诊为脊索膜细胞瘤。治疗包括T10-L1区域放疗后，进行了11个周期的替莫唑胺（7天用药，7天停药）。随后接受了4周一次的伊立替康化疗，并辅以每2周一次的贝伐单抗，之后休息2周再重复一个疗程。

metadata.original_text: Patient is a 45-year-old man with a history of anaplastic astrocytoma of the spine complicated by severe lower extremity weakness and urinary retention s/p Foley catheter, high-dose steroids, hypertension, and chronic pain. The tumor is located in the T-L spine, unresectable anaplastic astrocytoma s/p radiation. Complicated by progressive lower extremity weakness and urinary retention. Patient initially presented with RLE weakness where his right knee gave out with difficulty walking and right anterior thigh numbness. MRI showed a spinal cord conus mass which was biopsied and found to be anaplastic astrocytoma. Therapy included field radiation t10-l1 followed by 11 cycles of temozolomide 7 days on and 7 days off. This was followed by CPT-11 Weekly x4 with Avastin Q2 weeks/ 2 weeks rest and repeat cycle.

title: trec-ct-2021-10
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2021-10
病例摘要：患者是一位22岁的女性，身体健康，有5年的系统性肥大细胞增多症病史，通常每年发作3次。此次就诊是因为出现潮红和心动过速，疑似又是一次发作。这是她在两个月内第三次发作，而她仍在进行皮质类固醇减量治疗，这之前从未有过。通过每8小时一次静脉注射125毫克的皮质类固醇以及静脉注射异丙嗪，她的症状得到了缓解，并继续使用家中的常规药物。血细胞计数显示正常。血清色胺水平为84，偏高。由于不良反应，她未能完成阿司匹林挑战试验。她在静脉注射皮质类固醇和静脉注射苯海拉明的治疗下稳定下来，并被转回普通病房。她继续使用家中的组胺受体阻断剂，并从静脉改为口服皮质类固醇和苯海拉明，观察一晚后出院，继续服用家中药物泼尼松减量、胃肠道预防性用药（PPI）、钙和维生素D以及磺胺甲基异噁唑用于PCP预防。

metadata.original_text: Pt is a 22yo F otherwise healthy with a 5 yr history of the systemic mastocytosis, with flares normally 3/year, presenting with flushing and tachycardia concerning for another flare. This is patient's 3rd flare in 2 months, while still on steroid taper which is new for her. She responded well to 125 mg IV steroids q 8 hrs and IV diphenydramine in addition to her continuing home regimen. CBC was at her baseline, w/normal differential. Serum tryptase revealed a high value at 84. The patient failed aspirin challenge due to adverse reaction. She was stabilized on IV steroids and IV benadryl and transferred back to the medical floor. She continued on her home histamine receptor blockers and was transitioned from IV to PO steroids and benadryl and observed overnight and was discharged on her home meds, prednisone taper, GI prophylaxis with PPI, Calcium and vitamin D, and SS bactrim for PCP.

title: trec-ct-2021-11
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2021-11
病例摘要：一位75岁男性，患有转移性滤泡状甲状腺癌，已接受19次放疗。因吞咽固体食物困难加重就诊，过去几天内症状逐渐恶化，伴有食欲不振、近几周体重减轻20磅及一些嗜睡症状。确诊为滤泡状甲状腺癌，并有右侧颈部肿块——已进行颈部肿块切除术；无法进行甲状腺切除术——出血风险高，靠近气管和 recurrent laryngeal nerve（喉返神经），且肿瘤较大——已接受颈部放疗——已进行放射性碘消融治疗——转移至淋巴结及肾上腺——既往有疝修补手术史——既往有扁桃体切除手术史

metadata.original_text: A 75 yo M w/ metastatic papillary thyroid cancer s/p XRT 19 sessions who presented with 2 days of worsening dysphagia for solids, poor oral intake, weight loss 20 pounds over last several weeks and some lethargy. Papillary thyroid cancer dx w/ right neck mass --s/p neck mass resection; unable to perform thyroidectomy --high bleed risk, proximity to trachea and recurrent laryngeal nerve and large tumor size --s/p XRT to neck --s/p RAI ablation --Metastatic to lymph nodes and adrenal glands * s/p hernia repair * s/p tonsillectomy

title: trec-ct-2021-12
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2021-12
病例摘要：一名34岁的女性，患有马凡综合征，并已知有严重的二尖瓣脱垂伴反流。原计划进行二尖瓣修复手术，但失访。她仍然症状明显，现在准备接受二尖瓣修复/替换手术。超声心动图显示左室射血分数为65%。既往病史：马凡综合征、二尖瓣脱垂伴严重二尖瓣反流、胃食管反流病、妊娠期糖尿病、孕期高血压、肥胖、剖宫产两次、激光眼科手术、白内障手术、足部手术（缩短骨长度）

metadata.original_text: 34 year old woman with Marfan's syndrome and known severe mitral valve prolapse with regurgitation, who was planned for a MV repair but was lost to follow-up. She remains symptomatic and is now prepared to undergo mitral valve repair/replacement surgery. EF of 65% on TTE. Past Medical History: Marfans Syndrome MVP with severe mitral regurgitation Gastric reflux disease History of gestational diabetes mellitus Hypertension with pregnancy Obesity c-section x 2 laser eye surgery cataract surgery foot surgery (shorten bone length)

title: trec-ct-2021-13
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2021-13
病例摘要：62岁男性，有脑卒中病史，神经源性膀胱，带有留置的耻骨上导尿管，有多次因泌尿系统感染、意识状态改变和尿源性败血症入院的历史。目前在治疗后尿源性败血症已解决。CT检查显示左侧输尿管有非阻塞性结石，没有证据表明存在尿道狭窄。耻骨上导尿管部位有显著渗漏。开始使用 Ditropan 治疗，后来改为 Detrol。泌尿科医生不担心渗漏问题，并将在下周随访患者。既往病史：脑卒中后神经源性膀胱、留置耻骨上导尿管、反复出现由克雷伯菌/假单胞菌引起的泌尿系统感染、左眼眶非霍奇金边缘区淋巴瘤（2003年确诊，接受6个周期的R-CHOP治疗）、贝尔麻痹、前列腺增生、高血压、部分肠梗阻后行结肠造口术、丙型肝炎、冷球蛋白血症、抗dsDNA抗体阳性、胰岛依赖性糖尿病、真菌性食管炎、可能为第四期尿路感染（假单胞菌和肠球菌）

metadata.original_text: 62 yo male with hx of CVA, neurogenic bladder with indwelling suprapubic catheter with multiple prior admissions for UTIs, altered mental status, and urosepsis presents to the hospital in urosepsis now resolved after treatment with vanc/meropenem. Per CT there is a non-obstructing stone in the L ureter, no evidence of urethral strictures. Significant leaking around suprapubic cath site. Started on ditropan changed over to detrol. Urologist not concerned with leaking and will f/u with pt next week. s/p CVA Neurogenic bladder s/p suprapubic cath Recurrent UTIs with Klebsiella/Pseudomonas Non-hodgkins Marginal Zone Lymphoma of the left orbit Dx in 03 (s/p R-CHOP x 6 cycles) Bells Palsy BPH Hypertension Partial Bowel obstruction s/p colostomy Hepatitis C Cryoglobulinemia SLE with transverse myelitis, anti-dsDNA Ab+ Insulin Dependant Diabetic Fungal Esophagitis Stage IV? Urinary Tract Infections-pseudomonas & enterococcus

title: trec-ct-2021-14
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2021-14
病例摘要：一名70岁患有慢性阻塞性肺病（COPD），基础状态下吸氧量为2.5-3.5升/分钟，伴有睡眠呼吸暂停和肥胖低通气综合征、心力衰竭（dCHF）的患者，在2132年8月24日出院后，目前出现烦躁不安和意识状态改变，并伴有低氧血症，使用双水平气道正压通气（BiPAP），吸氧量为5升。初次就诊时表现为烦躁不安，随后逐渐变得嗜睡。患者的女儿报告称，在家中的过去2-3天内，患者出现了加重的烦躁不安和意识状态改变，并且在家中的血氧饱和度在60%-70%之间波动。此外，还观察到下肢水肿增加和体重增加，这促使她联系了家庭医生并增加了呋塞米剂量（从每日80毫克增至100毫克），虽然有所改善但效果不明显。患者在家中的食欲、进食量、能量水平下降，并且在日常生活中遇到困难。没有近期发热、咳嗽、寒战、咳痰、胸痛或腹部疼痛等症状，仅有一侧大腿的慢性疼痛持续了1-2个月。患者的女儿还报告说，她服药依从性良好，并且夜间使用双水平气道正压通气（BiPAP）也依从性良好。既往病史： - 冠状动脉疾病；于2119年进行了四血管冠脉旁路移植术（CABG） - 心力衰竭，射血分数55%，轻度主动脉瓣狭窄 - 睡眠呼吸暂停低通气综合征 - 阻塞性睡眠呼吸暂停 - 2型糖尿病 - 室性心动过速；于2127年植入了心脏复律除颤器（ICD） - 甲状腺功能减退症 - 精神分裂症 - 慢性阻塞性肺病 - 在2004年7月在某医院治疗肺炎

metadata.original_text: 70 y/o with COPD on 2.5-3.5L O2 at baseline, OSA and obesity hypoventilation syndrome, dCHF, discharged [**2132-8-24**] now presents with agitation and altered mental status with hypoxia and O2 sats 70s on BipAp with 5L. Pt agitated then somnolent at initial presentation. Daughter reported increased agitation and altered mental status x 2-3 days with O2 sats 60s-70s at home. Daughter has also noted increased LE edema and weight gain which prompted a phone call to her PCP and increased lasix dose from 80daily to 100mg daily with some mild improvement in edema. She has had decreased appetite, PO intake, energy level at home with difficulty with ADLs. No recent history of fever, cough, chills, sputum production, CP, abd pain, or other complaints other than chronic right thigh pain last 1-2 months. Daughter also reports med compliance and compliance with BiPap at night. Past Medical History: - CAD; s/p 4 vessel CABG in [**2119**] - CHF; EF 55%, mild AS - obesity hypoventilation syndrome - obstructive sleep apnea - DM2 - ventricular tachycardia; s/p ICD in [**2127**] - hypothyroidism - schizophrenia - COPD - Pneumona treated in [**4-7**] at [**Hospital1 **]

title: trec-ct-2021-15
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2021-15
病例摘要：一名70岁女性，有冠状动脉疾病（CAD）病史，近期发现腹部肿块，并伴有发热、寒战和白细胞增多。在入院前几周内，她经历了中腹部疼痛，放射至左侧腰部。这种疼痛持续一整天，进食不会加重，但会因呕吐而加剧，并且咳嗽时会加重。在[**4-20**]进行无对比剂的腹部CT检查显示左上腹有一个大小为9.5 x 7.5 x 6.0厘米的异质性肿块。患者接受了超声内镜（EUS）和活检，活检结果与胰头腺癌一致。CT还显示脾脏闪烁/胰尾肿块，考虑到患者近期可能有憩室炎病史，这被认为是感染性的液体积聚或脓肿。她接受了静脉抗生素治疗（最初使用Zosyn，随后改为ceftriaxone和flagyl），并将在门诊由ID医生继续观察治疗。既往病史：1. 冠状动脉疾病，一年前在[**State 108**]进行了冠脉支架植入术；2. 二尖瓣脱垂；3. 心房颤动；4. 高脂血症；5. 高血压；6. 慢性肾病（SCr 2.1，在[**3-17**]）；7. 甲状腺功能减退？（TSH 10，在[**3-17**]）；8. 贫血（HCT 30.7，在[**3-17**]）

metadata.original_text: 70 year-old woman with a history of CAD recently noted abdominal mass who presents with fevers/rigors and bandemia. Over the last few weeks leading up to admission, she has been experiencing mid-abdominal pain, radiating to the left flank. It lasts throughout the day is not increased by eating though there is associated vomiting and is worsened with coughing. CT abdomen without contrast was then performed on [**4-20**] showing a large 9.5 x 7.5 x 6.0-cm heterogeneous left upper abdominal mass. Patient underwent a EUS with biopsy. The results of the biopsy were consistent with pancreatic adenocarcinoma at the head of pancreas. Splenic flecture/pancreatic tail mass was also seen on CT, likely diverticular abscess given the patients recent likely history of diverticulitis this was thought to be an infected fluid collection or abscess. She was treated with IV antibiotics (Zosyn, then ceftriaxone and flagyl) and will continue on them until seen by ID as an outpatient. Past Medical History: 1. Coronary artery disease with history of angioplasty in [**State 108**] one year ago 2. Mitral valve prolapse 3. Atrial fibrillation 4. Hyperlipemia 5. Hypertension 6. Chronic kidney disease (SCr 2.1 in [**3-17**]) 7. Hypothyroidism? (TSH 10 in [**3-17**]) 8. Anemia (HCT 30.7 in [**3-17**])

title: trec-ct-2021-16
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2021-16
病例摘要：79岁女性，患有多种因素引起的慢性低氧血症和呼吸困难，怀疑是由于舒张性心力衰竭、肺动脉高压（考虑为长期存在的房间隔缺损所致）以及慢性阻塞性肺疾病。在家吸氧5L/d。因呼吸困难加重入院。心脏科会诊建议进行右心导管检查以评估西地那非的疗效，但患者拒绝。呼吸科会诊建议给予同情性、经验性的西地那非试验治疗，因为严重的呼吸困难症状导致无法进行门诊生活，且患者在住院期间耐受良好未出现低血压。患者将随访呼吸科开始门诊长期使用西地那非，待获得授权后。既往病史：-房间隔缺损修补术[**6-17**]，术后并发窦性停搏并植入起搏器（PPM）。-舒张性心力衰竭，估计干体重94kg -肺动脉高压（RSVP 75在[**11-24**]），考虑为长期存在的房间隔缺损所致。-慢性阻塞性肺疾病在家吸氧（5L/d），基础血氧饱和度高80%至低90%，在此治疗下的基线水平。-睡眠呼吸暂停综合征，不使用CPAP -轻度二尖瓣反流 -小细胞贫血 -甲状腺功能减退 -既往腹股沟疝修补术[**33**] -既往胆囊炎手术[**CCY**] -胆石性胰腺炎，经内镜逆行胰胆管造影（ERCP）及切开术治疗。-由于胺碘酮引起的血清碱性磷酸酶水平升高

metadata.original_text: 79 yo F with multifactorial chronic hypoxemia and dyspnea thought due to diastolic CHF, pulmonary hypertension thought secondary to a chronic ASD and COPD on 5L home oxygen admitted with complaints of worsening shortness of breath. Cardiology consult recommended a right heart cath for evaluation of response to sildenafil but the patient refused. Pulmonary consult recommended an empiric, compassionate sildenafil trial due to severe dyspneic symptomology preventing outpatient living, and the patient tolerated an inpatient trial without hypotension. Patient to f/u with pulmonology to start sildenifil chronically as outpatient as prior authorization is obtained. Past Medical History: - Atrial septal defect repair [**6-17**] complicated by sinus arrest with PPM placement. - Diastolic CHF, estimated dry weight of 94kg - Pulm HTN (RSVP 75 in [**11-24**]) thought secondary to longstanding ASD - COPD on home O2 (5L NC) with baseline saturation high 80's to low 90's on this therapy. - OSA, not CPAP compliant - Mild mitral regurgitation - Microcytic anemia - Hypothyroidism - S/p APPY, s/p CCY ('[**33**]) - Gallstone pancreatitis s/p ERCP, sphincterotomy - Elevated alk phos secondary to amiodarone

title: trec-ct-2021-17
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2021-17
病例摘要：一位64岁女性，有多发性骨髓瘤病史，曾接受异基因移植并复发，伴有系统性淀粉样变（涉及肺部、舌、膀胱和心脏），因终末期肾病进行血液透析。她因全身不适、乏力和广泛肌肉疼痛两天前来就诊。上周她因高钙血症入院，并接受了帕米膦酸钠30mg、降钙素以及透析治疗。最初，她接受过美法仑和泼尼松治疗，随后是VAD方案及自体干细胞移植。由于髓瘤复发，她接受了沙利度胺和硼替佐米的治疗，但由于水肿和肾功能恶化，这些药物最终也被停用。

metadata.original_text: 64yo woman with multiple myeloma, s/p allogeneic transplant with recurrent disease and with systemic amyloidosis (involvement of lungs, tongue, bladder, heart), on hemodialysis for ESRD who represents for malaise, weakness, and generalized body aching x 2 days. She was admitted last week with hypercalcemia and treated with pamidronate 30mg, calcitonin, and dialysis. Patient was Initially treated with melphalan and prednisone, followed by VAD regimen, and autologous stem cell transplant. With relapse of her myeloma, she received thalidomide velcade and thalidomide, which were eventually also held due to worsening edema and kidney function.

title: trec-ct-2021-18
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2021-18
病例摘要：这是一位78岁的男性患者，有前列腺增生（BPH）的病史，并接受了多次泌尿系统手术，包括经耻骨前前列腺切除术。他被发现尿量减少，膀胱扫描显示残余尿量为360毫升。工作人员无法通过导尿管。泌尿科会诊后，在ICU进行了灵活膀胱镜检查并发现了严重的2厘米长的球部尿道狭窄。他们能够通过一个小导管，并将其留在原位。患者在导管周围漏尿，但导管最终自行脱落，他仍然有良好的尿流。每隔4小时进行一次排尿后的膀胱扫描以确保没有高残余尿量。泌尿科建议当患者稳定后需要接受手术治疗以修复狭窄部位。

metadata.original_text: This is a 78 year-old male with h/o BPH s/p multiple urological procedures, including s/p Suprapubic prostatectomy. He was noted to have low urine output and bladder scan showed 360cc residual. It was impossible for staff to pass a foley. Urology was consulted, performed a flexible cystoscopy in the ICU and found severe 2cm bulbar urethral stricture. They were able to pass small catheter through and left in place. The patient leaked around the catheter, the catheter eventually came out but he continued to have good urine output and post-void bladder scans were performed q4h to ensure he did not have high residual volume. Urology suggested that when patient is stable he will have to be taken to the OR to have the stricture surgically fixed.

title: trec-ct-2021-19
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2021-19
病例摘要：一名65岁男性，有冠状动脉疾病（CAD）和既往心肌梗死（MI）、高脂血症（HLD）、高血压（HTN）、室性心动过速及晕厥病史。今日因晕厥和室性心律失常入院评估。他最近因晕厥的阴性检查结果出院，该检查包括植入心脏监测设备。在急诊室进行询问后，报告显示：40秒的室性心动过速（VT），随后出现缓慢的心率39次/分，并与他的症状相对应。夜间，患者在心电监护下发生单形性室性心动过速。患者被发现无反应。开始进行心肺复苏（CPR），不清楚患者是否有脉搏。一分钟内，患者恢复了窦性心律。目前，患者没有报告任何先兆症状，仅感到头晕和恶心，否认胸痛。患者将转至CCU进行冠状动脉造影和电生理研究（EPS）

metadata.original_text: 65 yo man with history of CAD and prior MI, HLD, HTN, ventricular tachycardia, and syncope was admitted earlier today evaluation of syncope and ventricular arrhythmias. He was recently discharged after a negative work-up for syncope which included the implantation of a cardiac monitoring device. It was interrogated at the OSH and per report the monitor read from yesterday: 40 seconds of VT and then bradycardia with a rate of 39 shortly thereafter corresponding with his symptoms. Overnight, the patient went into monomorphic VT on telemetry. The patient was found to be unresponsive. CPR was initiated, unclear if the patient had a pulse. Within one minute the patient returned to sinus rhythm. The patient does not report any symptoms prior to this episode. Currently, the patient feels presyncope and nausea, but denies chest pain. Patient is to be transferred to the CCU for catheterization and EPS.

title: trec-ct-2021-2
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2021-2
病例摘要：一名48岁男性，有高血压、高脂血症、二叶主动脉瓣和吸烟史。他在[**2148-10-1**]因进行性呼吸困难和下肢水肿就诊于心脏病科。超声心动图显示重度主动脉瓣狭窄并伴有左室功能恶化，射血分数为25%。右心房压力为41，并且双房扩大。观察到有中度主动脉瓣反流和轻度二尖瓣返流。他从心脏诊所出院时被给予呋塞米和β阻滞剂（但他不能耐受），症状继续恶化，呼吸困难和下肢水肿加重，最终来此进行评估。入院期间的重复超声心动图确认了重度主动脉瓣狭窄，显示左室肥厚、腔室扩张及严重弥漫性收缩功能减退；存在二叶式主动脉瓣并伴有扩大的升主动脉，轻度肺动脉高压。患者进行了术前心脏瓣膜置换评估，包括胸部CT扫描和颈动脉超声（显示中等程度的不均匀斑块，并且双侧内颈动脉狭窄1-39%）。他还接受了右心导管检查以评估其肺动脉压力，结果显示没有明显的冠状动脉病变。

metadata.original_text: 48 M with a h/o HTN hyperlipidemia, bicuspid aortic valve, and tobacco abuse who presented to his cardiologist on [**2148-10-1**] with progressive SOB and LE edema. TTE revealed severe aortic stenosis with worsening LV function. EF was 25%. RV pressure was 41 and had biatrial enlargement. Noted to have 2+ aortic insufficiency with mild MR. He was sent home from cardiology clinic with Lasix and BB (which he did not tolerate), continued to have worsening SOB and LE edema and finally presented here for evaluation. During this admission repeat echo confirmed critical aortic stenosis showing left ventricular hypertrophy with cavity dilation and severe global hypokinesis, severe aortic valve stenosis with underlying bicuspid aortic valve, dilated ascending aorta, mild pulmonary artery systolic hypertension. The patient underwent a preop workup for valvular replacement with preop chest CT scan and carotid US (showing moderate heterogeneous plaque with bilateral 1-39% ICA stenosis). He also underwent a cardiac cath with right heart cath to evaluate his pulm art pressures which showed no angiographically apparent flow-limiting coronary artery disease.

title: trec-ct-2021-20
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2021-20
病例摘要：一名35岁的女性患者，主诉痤疮和轻度多毛症。初步评估显示其睾酮水平升高。近期她注意到手和脚逐渐增大，并意识到她的戒指不再适合手指。她的月经周期不规律，同时有乳头溢液的情况。此外，她还有打鼾和头痛的病史。体格检查发现面部特征符合肢端肥大症的表现，下颌前突。视野正常。观察到多毛症、软组织增厚以及手和脚出汗增多。空腹状态下实验室检测显示IGF-1为968 ng/mL，随机GH水平为19.7 ng/mL。MRI检查发现有无侵袭性的大腺瘤。她确诊后一直在使用稳定的奥曲肽LAR治疗。她已婚并有两个孩子，正在使用宫内节育器作为避孕方法。

metadata.original_text: A 35-year-old woman presents with history of acne and mild hirsutism. The primary evaluation revealed elevated testosterone levels. She recently noticed gradual enlargement of her hands and feet and recognized that her ring is getting small for her finger. There is some irregularity in her menstrual cycle as well as some nipple discharge. She also has positive history for snoring and headache. The physical examination revealed subtle facial features of acromegaly and prognathism. Visual fields are normal by confrontation. Hirsutism, soft tissue thickening and diaphoresis of the hands and feet are noted. Laboratory evaluation in the fasting state reveals IGF-1 of 968 ng/mL and random GH of 19.7 ng/mL. MRI reveals a macroadenoma with no invasion. She is on stable doses of octreotide LAR since her diagnosis was confirmed. She is married and has 2 children. She is using IUD as her contraceptive method.

title: trec-ct-2021-21
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2021-21
病例摘要：患者是一名57岁的男性，主诉腹痛和呕吐。疼痛始于约20小时前的上腹部和脐周区域，并放射至背部。他每周饮酒约60个单位，每天吸烟22支。他的健康状况良好，无过敏史或正在使用的药物。家族病史显示有2型糖尿病（其父亲和妹妹患病）。他独居且无子女。腹部触诊时有压痛但柔软，肠鸣音正常。心率为115次/分钟，血压为110/75 mmHg。实验室检查结果显示白细胞增多（19.5），血尿素氮8.5，高C反应蛋白（145），高淀粉酶（1200）和血糖水平为15。影像学检查未发现阻塞性胰腺炎的证据。

metadata.original_text: The patient is a 57-year-old man with abdominal pain and vomiting. The pain started gradually about 20 hours ago in the epigastric and periumbilical regions, radiating to his back. He drinks around 60 units of alcohol per week and smokes 22 cigarettes per day. He is healthy with no history of allergies or using any medications. His family history is positive for type 2 diabetes (his father and sister). He lives alone and has no children. The abdomen is tender and soft. His bowel sounds are normal. His heart rate is 115/min and blood pressure 110/75 mmHg. The lab results are remarkable for leukocytosis (19.5), urea of 8.5, high CRP (145), high amylase (1200) and Glc level of 15. Cross-sectional imaging was negative for obstructive pancreatitis.

title: trec-ct-2021-22
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2021-22
病例摘要：患者为31岁女性，主诉腹痛。疼痛始于昨晚，表现为弥漫性腹部不适。她还伴有食欲不振和全身不适的症状。早晨时，疼痛加剧并变得尖锐。早晨时，疼痛定位到右下腹。体温在正常范围内，生命体征正常。在对右下腹进行触诊时观察到局限性压痛和肌肉紧张。左下腹的触诊会引起右侧疼痛。她的实验室检查结果显示白细胞增多。腹部增强CT显示阑尾扩张且阑尾壁增厚，无穿孔、脓肿或坏疽。她适合在全身麻醉下行腹腔镜阑尾切除术。

metadata.original_text: The patient is a 31-year-old woman complaining of abdominal pain. The pain started last night as diffuse abdominal discomfort. She had poor appetite as well as malaise. The pain worsened in intensity and became sharp in the morning. The pain became localized to the right lower quadrant in the morning. The temperature is within the normal limits with normal vital signs. Focal tenderness and guarding were observed during palpation of the right lower quadrant. Palpation of the left lower quadrant causes pain on the right. Her lab work is remarkable for leukocytosis. Computed Tomography of the abdomen with contrast shows the presence of a distended appendix with thickened appendiceal wall without perforation, abscess or gangrene. She is a candidate for laparoscopic appendectomy under general anesthesia.

title: trec-ct-2021-23
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2021-23
病例摘要：一名39岁的男性因咳嗽和呼吸困难前来就诊，这些症状即使使用吸入器也未得到缓解。过去两周内，他出现了5天的上述症状，并在上周加倍了口服皮质类固醇剂量。他是一名厨师，有三年哮喘史，经常出现咳嗽、喘息、呼吸困难和胸闷等症状。每天工作开始后1-2小时内这些症状会变得更加明显，并且整个工作周都会加重。而在工作场所外，他的症状会在1-2小时内得到缓解。肺功能测试显示第一秒用力呼气容积（FEV1）为预测值的63%。他过去有夏季季节性过敏性鼻炎史。他不吸烟也不使用非法药物。他的家族病史中提到父亲和妹妹也有哮喘。目前，他正在使用吸入型皮质类固醇（ICS），以及500 mcg/沙美特罗50 mcg的氟替卡松，每日两次一喷。

metadata.original_text: A 39-year-old man came to the clinic with cough and shortness of breath that was not relieved by his inhaler. He had these symptoms for 5 days during the past 2 weeks. He doubled his oral corticosteroids in the past week. He is a chef with a history of asthma for 3 years, suffering from frequent cough, wheezing, and shortness of breath and chest tightness. The symptoms become more bothersome within 1-2 hours of starting work every day and worsen throughout the work week. His symptoms improve within 1-2 hours outside the workplace. Spirometry was performed revealing a forced expiratory volume in the first second (FEV1) of 63% of the predicted. His past medical history is significant for seasonal allergic rhinitis in the summer. He doesn't smoke or use illicit drugs. His family history is significant for asthma in his father and sister. He currently uses inhaled corticosteroid (ICS) and fluticasone 500 mcg/salmeterol 50 mcg, one puff twice daily.

title: trec-ct-2021-24
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2021-24
病例摘要：患者是一位55岁的男性，因过去9个月出现下尿路症状（包括尿频、尿急、排尿无力、排空不完全和间歇性流尿）而就诊于全科医生。进一步检查结果显示：IPSS评分：15；排尿后剩余尿量：70 mL；前列腺体积（经直肠超声）：60 mL；前列腺特异性抗原（PSA）水平：3.2 ng/mL；最大尿流率在尿量为130 mL时为10 mL/秒。他平时身体健康，仅每日服用维生素D 1000单位。最近的血液生化检查（三天前）结果正常：血红蛋白：13.5 g/dL；白细胞计数：135,000 /mm³；血小板计数：350,000 /μL；凝血酶原时间：11秒；活化部分凝血活酶时间：35秒；国际标准化比值：0.9；肌酐：0.5 mg/dL；尿素氮：10 mg/dL。尿常规检查结果如下：颜色：黄色；外观：混浊；pH：5.3；比重：1.010；葡萄糖：100；亚硝酸盐：阴性；酮体：无；白细胞酯酶：阴性；红细胞：阴性；每高倍视野白细胞数：2；尿/细胞：阴性。

metadata.original_text: The patient is a 55 year old man visiting his primary care physician for lower urinary tract symptoms including frequency, urgency, weak stream, incomplete emptying and intermittent flow for the past 9 months. Further evaluation revealed: IPSS score : 15 Post-void residual: 70 mL Prostate volume (TRUS): 60 mL Prostate-specific antigen (PSA) level: 3.2 ng/mL 10 mL/sec of maximum flow rate when urine volume was 130 mL He is otherwise healthy only using Vit D 1000 units daily. His recent blood chemistry (3 days ago) was normal: Hgb: 13.5 g/dl WBC: 135000 /mm3 Plt: 350000 /ml PT: 11 second PTT: 35 second INR: 0.9 Creatinine: 0.5 mg/dl BUN: 10 mg/dl U/A: Color: yellow Appearance: cloudy PH: 5.3 Specific gravity: 1.010 Glc: 100 Nitrite: negative Ketone: none Leukocyte esterase: negative RBC: negative WBC: 2 WBCs/hpf U/C: negative

title: trec-ct-2021-25
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2021-25
病例摘要：患者是一位42岁的绝经后女性，她在筛查超声检查中发现右侧乳腺有异常。乳腺触诊未触及肿块。进行了核心活检，结果显示左侧上外象限浸润性导管癌，肿瘤大小为1.8厘米。进行了局部切除手术，切缘清晰。肿瘤HER2阳性，ER/PR阴性。腋窝采样发现1个阳性淋巴结，共取样12个。胸部X光检查未见异常。她每天服用“妇女保健”多种维生素，并无其他药物使用史。她经常吸烟，偶尔饮酒。她只有一个固定的伴侣，有3次妊娠和活产史。她曾给所有三个孩子哺乳。

metadata.original_text: The patient is a 42 year-old postmenopausal woman who had a screening sonogram which revealed an abnormality in the right breast. She had no palpable masses on breast exam. Core biopsy was done and revealed a 1.8 cm infiltrating ductal breast carcinoma in the left upper outer quadrant. Lumpectomy was done and the surgical margins were clear. The tumor was HER2-positive and ER/PR negative. Axillary sampling revealed 1 positive lymph node out of 12 sampled. CXR was unremarkable. She is using “well women” multivitamins daily and no other medication. She smokes frequently and consumes alcohol occasionally. She is in a relation with only one partner and has a history of 3 pregnancies and live births. She breastfed all three children.

title: trec-ct-2021-26
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2021-26
病例摘要：一名45岁的女性因持续约4天的腹痛被转诊至急诊科，伴有恶心和两次呕吐。疼痛主要位于上腹部，并放射到右上腹。进食油腻食物后疼痛加剧。患者在过去一年中曾经历类似疼痛两次。她的既往病史包括高胆固醇血症和两次剖宫产手术。她有两个孩子，已进入更年期。她不吸烟、饮酒或使用非法药物。体温略升高。血压为150/85 mmHg，心率为115次/分，呼吸频率为15次/分，体温38.2℃，血氧饱和度98%（鼻导管吸氧）。触诊时，她感到上腹部和右上腹有压痛，但没有反跳痛。肠鸣音正常。实验室检查显示ESR升高、白细胞计数增加并伴有左移。超声检查发现多个胆结石和胆汁淤积，其中最大的胆结石直径为0.7cm。外科会诊建议择期进行胆囊切除术。

metadata.original_text: A 45-year-old woman was referred to the emergency department with abdominal pain lasting about 4 days accompanied by nausea and 2 episodes of vomiting. The pain is localized to the epigastric region and radiates to the right upper quadrant. The pain is worsening after eating fatty food. The patient experienced similar pain twice in the past year. Her past medical history is remarkable for hypercholesterolemia and two C/sections. She has 2 children, and she is menopausal. She doesn't smoke, drink alcohol, or use illicit drugs. She is mildly febrile. Her BP is 150/85, HR 115, RR 15, T 38.2, SpO2 98% on RA. On palpation, she experiences epigastric tenderness and tenderness in the right upper quadrant without rebound. Bowel sounds are normal. Laboratory analysis is remarkable for elevated ESR and leukocytosis with a left shift. The ultrasound revealed several gallstones and biliary sludge. The largest gallstone is 0.7cm. Surgery consultation recommends elective cholecystectomy.

title: trec-ct-2021-27
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2021-27
病例摘要：一名53岁的男性患者因过去两年慢性丙型肝炎感染前来就诊。他的既往病史仅在20岁时有过腹股沟疝手术。他已接受干扰素（每周100毫克）联合利巴韦林（每日400毫克）的组合疗法9个月，6个月前开始添加直接抗病毒药物。他的医疗记录显示之前有阳性丙型肝炎RNA检测结果以及抗HCV抗体酶联免疫吸附试验阳性。最近的活检未发现肝细胞癌，仅见与慢性病毒性肝炎相符的慢性炎症。没有酒精性肝病、食管静脉曲张出血、血色病、自身免疫性肝炎或代谢性肝病的证据。他是一名意识清醒的男性，无急性呼吸困难。血压：130/75 mmHg，心率：90次/分钟，BMI：27。腹部柔软，无腹水或压痛。下肢正常，无水肿。

metadata.original_text: A 53-year-old man presents with chronic HCV infection for the past 2 years. His past medical history is only significant for inguinal hernia surgery when he was 20 years old. He is on IFN (100 mg/week) plus RBV (400 mg/day) combination therapy for the past 9 months. Direct antiviral drugs were added to his treatment 6 months ago. His medical record shows previous positive HCV RNA tests as well as positive enzyme immunoassay for anti-HCV-antibodies. The recent biopsy was negative for hepatocellular carcinoma and was only remarkable for chronic inflammation compatible with a chronic viral hepatitis. There is no evidence of alcoholic liver disease, bleeding from esophageal varices, hemochromatosis, autoimmune hepatitis or metabolic liver disease. He is an alert male with no acute distress. His BP: 130/75, HR: 90/min and BMI: 27. His abdomen is soft with no ascites or tenderness. The lower extremities are normal with no edema.

title: trec-ct-2021-28
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2021-28
病例摘要：患者是一名60岁的西班牙男性，约一天前出现呼吸困难。症状突然开始，并逐渐加重。他两年前被诊断为慢性阻塞性肺病（COPD）。支气管舒张剂治疗后的肺功能测试显示FEV1/FVC = 预测值的60%。他每天吸烟20支。他的既往病史包括良性前列腺增生（BPH），正在使用Flomax进行治疗。他的家族史中，兄弟患有高血压（HTN）。他的药物包括每4小时按需吸入Duo-Neb、每日1000单位的维生素D3和用于BPH的Flomax。他是一名肥胖患者，但意识清晰且精神状态良好。生命体征如下：血压：135/80 次/min 呼吸频率：25 心率：75 bpm 体重指数（BMI）：40 血氧饱和度：90%

metadata.original_text: The patient is a 60-year-old Spanish man presenting with shortness of breath about a day before. The symptoms began acutely and progressively worsened. He is a known case of COPD since 2 years ago. The spirometry revealed post-bronchodilator FEV1/FVC = 60% of predicted values. He smokes 20 cigarette per day. His past medical history is remarkable for BPH and he is using Flomax for that. His family history is positive for HTN in his brother. His medication includes Duo-Neb inhaled q4 hr PRN, Vit D3 1000 units per day and Flomax for his PBH. He is an obese man who is acutely ill but oriented and conscious. The vital signs are as bellow: BP: 135/80 RR: 25/min HR: 75 bpm BMI: 40 O2sat: 90%

title: trec-ct-2021-29
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2021-29
病例摘要：患者是一名24岁的男性，患有1型糖尿病已有11年。他因高血糖和可能的糖尿病酮症酸中毒而来到急诊室，过去3天未服用胰岛素。患者自述目前无家可归，并已失去胰岛素、注射器、血糖仪及血糖测试用品。患者表示，在首次诊断为1型糖尿病时曾住院治疗，当时血糖值超过1000 mg/dL。当时他出现了多尿、多饮和多食的症状。他报告说自诊断以来一直在使用胰岛素，并从未被开具过用于糖尿病管理的口服药物。最近，他每天注射一次甘精胰岛素55单位，每日3次按需使用门冬胰岛素。患者之前有过多次糖尿病酮症酸中毒的经历，均住院治疗。此次高血糖发作时，他没有出现恶心、呕吐或腹痛的症状，并且看起来状态良好。实验室检查结果显示：糖化血红蛋白（HbA1c）：11.3%；肌酐：0.9 mg/dL，估算的肾小球滤过率（eGFR）>60 mL/min；天门冬氨酸氨基转移酶（AST）：17 U/L；丙氨酸氨基转移酶（ALT）：14 U/L；β-羟丁酸：0.1 mmol/L；碳酸氢盐：25 mEq/L；阴离子间隙：14 mEq/L

metadata.original_text: The patient is a 24-year-old man who has had type 1 diabetes for 11 years. He presents to the emergency room with hyperglycemia and concern for possible diabetic ketoacidosis after not taking his insulin for 3 days. The patient reports that he is currently homeless and has lost his supply of insulin, syringes, glucometer, and glucose testing supplies. The patient states that at the time of his initial diagnosis with type 1 diabetes he was hospitalized with a glucose value >1000 mg/dL. At the time, he was experiencing polyuria, polydipsia, and polyphagia. He reports that he has been on insulin since the time of his diagnosis, and he has never been prescribed oral agents for diabetes management. Most recently, he has been using insulin glargine 55 units once daily, and insulin aspart sliding scale 3 times daily. The patient has had previous episodes of diabetic ketoacidosis, for which he was hospitalized. With this episode of hyperglycemia, he is not experiencing any nausea, vomiting, or abdominal discomfort, and he appears well. His lab studies showed: A1c: 11.3% Creatinine: 0.9 mg/dL with eGFR >60 mL/min Aspartate aminotransferase (AST): 17 U/L Alanine aminotransferase (ALT): 14 U/L Beta-hydroxybutyrate: 0.1 mmol/L Bicarbonate: 25 mEq/L Anion Gap: 14 mEq/L

title: trec-ct-2021-3
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2021-3
病例摘要：一名32岁的女性患者因严重的‘爆炸性’头痛前来就诊。她和她的丈夫报告说，昨天她在厨房站立时撞到了橱柜的角落。第二天早上，她突然出现了‘爆炸性’头痛。她来到医院后进行了头部CT检查，结果显示其右心室有大量的出血。神经外科医生评估了她自发性的脑室内出血，并考虑可能存在潜在的血管畸形。进行了脑血管造影检查，显示存在异常血管结构，从左颞叶引流静脉穿透深部白质，符合动静脉畸形（AVM）的表现。患者仍然有头痛，但疼痛药物治疗后症状有所改善。患者拒绝进行物理治疗评估，但仍能独立行走且无困难。她于[**2021-12-06**]被送回家，由其丈夫陪同。

metadata.original_text: A 32 yo woman who presents following a severe 'exploding' headache. She and her husband report that yesterday she was in the kitchen and stood up and hit her head on the corner of a cabinet. The next morning she developed a sudden 'exploding' headache. She came to the hospital where head CT showed a significant amount of blood in her right ventricle. NSGY evaluated her for spontaneous intraventricular hemorrhage with a concern for an underlying vascular malformation. Cerebral angiogram was done which showed abnormal vasculature with a draining vein from L temporal lobe penetrating deep white matter consistent with AVM. The patient did continue to have a headaches but they were improving with pain medication. The patient refused PT evaluation but was ambulating independently without difficulty. She was discharged to home with her husband on [**2155-12-6**].

title: trec-ct-2021-30
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2021-30
病例摘要：患者为33岁女性，主诉疲劳、体重增加及月经间期异常出血。未发现多毛症或乳头溢液。其BMI为34。实验室检查结果显示促甲状腺激素(TSH)水平升高（13 mU/L），游离T4水平降低（0.2 ng/dl）。抗TPO抗体水平极高（120 IU/ml）。诊断为桥本氏甲状腺炎。她的姑妈、兄弟和母亲也有同样的疾病。在开始每日服用250 mcg左旋甲状腺素后，症状显著改善，月经恢复正常。她仍然超重，BMI为31。最近的甲状腺功能检查结果显示除抗TPO抗体外均在正常范围内：TSH: 2.35 mU/L，游离T4: 2.7 ng/dl，抗TPO: 75 IU/ml

metadata.original_text: The patient is a 33-year-old woman complained of fatigue, weight gain and abnormal spotting between menses. No hirsutism or nipple discharge was detected. Her BMI was 34. Her lab results were remarkable for high TSH level (13 mU/L) and low free T4 level (0.2 ng/dl). Her anti-TPO levels were extremely high (120 IU/ml). She was diagnosed with Hashimoto's thyroiditis. Her aunt, brother and mother have the same disease. After starting 250 mcg Levothyroxine per day, her symptoms improved significantly and her periods are normal. She is still overweight with BMI of 31. Her most recent thyroid profile revealed all results except for anti-TPO within the normal range: TSH: 2.35 mU/L Free T4: 2.7 ng/dl Anti-TPO: 75 IU/ml

title: trec-ct-2021-31
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2021-31
病例摘要：患者是一位37岁的女性，因常规巴氏涂片检查来到诊所。检测结果显示宫颈癌一期B级。患者的HPV 16检测结果为阳性。她有三个性伴侣，并且有四个孩子。她已经进行了输卵管结扎手术。她每年吸烟30包，并且经常饮酒。除此之外，她的身体状况良好。她被建议进行根治性子宫切除术。
