metadata.original_text: The patient is a 37-year-old woman who came to the clinic for a routine Pap smear. The test revealed stage 1B of cervical cancer. The patient tested positive for HPV 16. She has three sexual partners and four children. She underwent tubal ligation. She smokes 30 packs/year and drinks alcohol frequently. She is otherwise healthy. She was offered a radical hysterectomy.

title: trec-ct-2021-32
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2021-32
病例摘要：一名17岁的男孩在过去三天内出现呕吐、非血性腹泻、腹痛、发热、寒战和食欲不振的症状。他在腹泻开始前在餐馆吃了一道沙拉。体格检查显示苍白、黄疸和弥漫性腹部压痛。实验室结果显示：血红蛋白：9.7 g/dL 血小板：110,000 /cu.mm 肌酐：3.6 mg/dL 血尿素氮（BUN）：73 mg/dL 直接胆红素：2.4 mg/dL 乳酸脱氢酶（LDH）：881 IU/L（正常范围：110-265 IU/L）。外周血涂片显示中度数量的裂细胞和盔形细胞。在粪便中检测到产生志贺毒素的大肠杆菌（STEC stx1/stx2）。他没有其他基础疾病，也没有服用任何药物。

metadata.original_text: A 17 year old boy complains of vomiting, non-bloody diarrhea, abdominal pain, fever, chills and loss of appetite for the past 3 days. He ate a salad at a restaurant prior to his diarrhea onset. Physical exam was remarkable for pallor, jaundice, and diffuse abdominal tenderness. Lab results were as follows: Hemoglobin: 9.7 g/dL Platelet: 110,000 /cu.mm Creatinine: 3.6 mg/dL blood urea nitrogen (BUN): 73 mg/dL direct bilirubin: 2.4 mg/dL lactate dehydrogenase (LDH): 881 IU/L (normal: 110-265 IU/L) Peripheral blood smear showed a moderate number of schistocytes and helmet cells. Shiga-like toxin-producing E. coli (STEC) stx1/stx2 were found in stools. He has no other underlying disease and he is not on any medications.

title: trec-ct-2021-33
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2021-33
病例摘要：一名42岁的健康女性于十月初来到诊所接种流感疫苗。她在康复中心工作，没有基础疾病。这是她今年第一次接种疫苗。她已婚五年，并使用屏障避孕法。她的月经周期不规律。她不吸烟。她每天至少五天进行30分钟的锻炼。她对任何食物或药物都没有过敏史。她的既往手术史包括扁桃体切除术，除此之外身体状况良好。

metadata.original_text: A 42-year-old healthy woman came to the clinic to have her flu shot in early October. She works in a rehab center and has no underlying disease. It's her first time getting the vaccine this year. She is married for 5 years and uses barrier methods of contraception. Her menstrual cycle is irregular. She does not smoke. She is not on any medications. She exercises regularly for 30 minutes a day at least 5 days a week. She has no history of allergies to any food or drugs. Her past surgical history is significant for tonsillectomy and she is otherwise healthy.

title: trec-ct-2021-34
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2021-34
病例摘要：患者是一名47岁的亚洲女性，主诉持续感到悲伤。她对以前喜欢的活动失去了兴趣。过去三周里，她的情绪大部分时间都处于抑郁状态。她还出现了食欲减退，导致体重减轻约5公斤。她抱怨每天几乎都有精力不足和自责感。她没有使用任何药物，也不吸烟，不饮酒。过去三个月里，她每天至少锻炼30分钟，但现在缺乏足够的能量进行这些活动。最近她还有一些消化问题。她已婚，并有4个孩子。她处于更年期。她的丈夫最近被诊断出患有结肠癌并开始化疗。她的既往病史无特殊之处，药物使用仅每日服用维生素D3 1000单位。家族史中没有心理问题的记录。她的HAM-D评分为20分。

metadata.original_text: The patient is a 47-year-old Asian woman complaining of persistent feelings of sadness. She lost interest in activities she used to enjoy. She states that her mood is mostly depressed for the past 3 weeks. She also lost her appetite , which led to about 5kg weight loss. She complains of loss of energy and feelings of worthlessness nearly every day. She is not using any drugs and she does not smoke. She doesn't drink alcohol. She used to exercise every day for at least 30 min. But she doesn't have enough energy to do so for the past 3 weeks. She also has some digestive issues recently. She is married and has 4 children. She is menopausal. Her husband was recently diagnosed with colon cancer and he is starting his chemotherapy. There is nothing remarkable in her past medical history and her drug history is only positive for Vit D3 1000 units daily. Her family history is negative for any psychologic problems. Her HAM-D score is 20.

title: trec-ct-2021-35
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2021-35
病例摘要：患者是一位15岁的女孩，有反复双侧头痛的病史。发作每周2次或更多，并且每次持续约一天半左右。疼痛性质为搏动性，强度严重，影响她的日常体力活动。发作伴有恶心和畏光。她最近注意到，在月经期间头痛发作增多。她被诊断为偏头痛，并正在接受治疗。她是高中生，与父母同住。她是一个书虫，空闲时间在家中附近的公共图书馆度过。她还喜欢写作故事，用英语写了几篇短篇小说。她很少做运动。她的BMI是21，血压为100/60。体格检查无明显异常。

metadata.original_text: The patient is a 15 year old girl with the history of recurrent bilateral headache. The attacks come 2 times or more per week and each episode lasts around a day or a half. The pain is pulsating in quality and severe in intensity, causing trouble in her routine physical activity. The attacks are associated with nausea and photophobia. She recently noticed that that there are more attacks around her menstrual period. She is diagnosed with the migraine headache and is under treatment. She is a high-school student and living with her both parents. She is a book worm and spend her free time in a public library near her home. She is also interested in writing stories and has several short stories in English. She rarely does exercise. Her BMI is 21 with the BP of 100/60. There is nothing remarkable in her physical exam.

title: trec-ct-2021-36
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2021-36
病例摘要：患者是一位32岁的肥胖女性，因体重问题来到诊所。她的身高为165厘米，体重为113公斤。她抱怨有睡眠呼吸暂停、多囊卵巢综合症以及对自己的体型不满意。她是一名已婚高中教师，结婚五年。过去四个月没有使用任何避孕方法，并且没有之前的怀孕史。她不吸烟也不使用任何药物。她喜欢尝试饮食和锻炼来减肥。她的四步台阶测试完成时间为14秒。血压：130/80 mmHg，心率：每分钟195次，BMI为41.54。实验室检查结果：空腹血糖（FBS）：98 mg/dL，甘油三酯（TG）：150 mg/dL，胆固醇：180 mg/dL，低密度脂蛋白（LDL）：90 mg/dL，高密度脂蛋白（HDL）：35 mg/dL。心脏评估正常。关节和活动范围均在正常范围内。

metadata.original_text: The patient is a 32-year-old obese woman who came to the clinic with weight concerns. She is 165 cm tall and her weight is 113 kg. She is complaining of sleep apnea, PCO and dissatisfaction with her body shape. She is a high-school teacher married for 5 years. She doesn't use any contraceptive methods for the past 4 months and she had no prior pregnancies. She doesn't smoke or use any drugs. She likes to try diets and exercise to lose weight. She completed the four square step test in 14 seconds. Her BP: 130/80, HR: 195/min and her BMI is: 41.54. Her labs: FBS: 98 mg/dl TG: 150 mg/dl Cholesterol: 180 mg/dl LDL: 90 mg/dl HDL: 35 mg/dl Her cardiac assessment is normal. Her joints and ROM are within normal.

title: trec-ct-2021-37
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2021-37
病例摘要：患者为20岁白人女性，因单侧视力丧失、面部无力、构音障碍和麻木持续一天前来就诊。她曾就诊于全科医生，并进行了脑部MRI检查，结果显示脑干内有一个斑块。几个月后，她出现了下肢无力的症状，导致平衡问题。第二次MRI显示左侧大脑半球又出现了一个病灶。在第二次MRI之后确诊为复发缓解型多发性硬化（RRMS）。她的既往手术史包括两年前的剖宫产，并且她有一个孩子。她已离婚，目前没有性伴侣。她每天抽10支烟，偶尔饮酒。她在一家出版社担任编辑，很高兴大部分时间都可以在家工作。她从七个月前开始接受RRMS的治疗。

metadata.original_text: The patient is a 20 year old Caucasian female presents to the clinic with one-sided vision lost and facial weakness, dysarthria and numbness lasting for 1 day. She visited her PCP and underwent brain MRI which revealed a single plaque in the brainstem. After few months, she experienced lower extremities weakness led to balance problem. The second MRI revealed another lesion in the left cerebral hemisphere. The diagnosis of Relapsing Remitting Multiple Sclerosis (RRMS) is confirmed after the second MRI. Her past surgical history is significant for a C-section 2 years ago and she has a one child. She is divorced and is not currently in any sexual relationship. She smokes 10 cigarettes per day and drinks alcohol occasionally. She is working as an editor in a publisher company and she is happy that she can keep working from home most of the time. She is under the treatment of RRMS from 7 months ago.

title: trec-ct-2021-38
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2021-38
病例摘要：患者为35岁女性，患重症肌无力，属IIa类。她主诉复视、疲劳和无力，主要影响上肢。她的抗AChR抗体检测呈阳性，单纤维肌电图（SFEMG）也呈阳性。她每天三次服用吡啶斯的明60毫克。但她仍有部分症状干扰工作。她是研究协调员，并有3个孩子。她的70岁父亲患有高血压。她不吸烟或使用非法药物。她在社交场合偶尔饮酒。体格检查和实验室检查未发现其他异常。血压：110/75，血红蛋白：11 g/dL，白细胞计数：8000 /mm³，血小板计数：300000 /ml，肌酐：0.5 mg/dL，BUN：10 mg/dL，β-hCG：妊娠阴性

metadata.original_text: The patient is a 35-year-old woman with myasthenia gravis, class IIa. She complains of diplopia and fatigue and weakness that affects mainly her upper limbs. She had a positive anti-AChR antibody test, and her single fiber electromyography (SFEMG) was positive. She takes pyridostigmine 60 mg three times a day. But she still has some symptoms that interfere with her job. She is a research coordinator and has 3 children. Her 70-year-old father has hypertension. She does not smoke or use illicit drugs. She drinks alcohol occasionally at social events. Her physical exam and lab studies were not remarkable for any other abnormalities. BP: 110/75 Hgb: 11 g/dl WBC: 8000 /mm3 Plt: 300000 /ml Creatinine: 0.5 mg/dl BUN: 10 mg/dl Beta hcg: negative for pregnancy

title: trec-ct-2021-39
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2021-39
病例摘要：一名3天大的亚洲女婴因黄疸就诊，黄疸始于一天前。她于妊娠38周3天足月分娩，孕期无并发症。家族史无特殊。婴儿纯母乳喂养。生命体征如下：腋下温度：36.3°C，心率：154次/分，呼吸频率：37次/分，血压：65/33 mmHg。体重3.2 kg，身长53 cm，头围36 cm。她的巩膜呈黄色，全身有黄疸。心脏和肺部听诊未发现杂音或其他异常。触诊肝脏和脾脏正常。实验室检查结果如下：血清总胆红素：21.02 mg/dL 直接胆红素：2.04 mg/dL AST：37 U/L ALT：20 U/L GGT：745 U/L 碱性磷酸酶：531 U/L 肌酐：0.3 mg/dL 尿素：29 mg/dL 钠：147 mEq/L 钾：4.5 mEq/L CRP：3 mg/L 完全血液计数在正常范围内。她被诊断为无并发症的新生儿黄疸，可能需要光疗。

metadata.original_text: A 3-day-old Asian female infant presents with jaundice that started a day ago. She was born at 38w3d of gestation, after an uncomplicated pregnancy. The family history is unremarkable. The baby is breastfed. Vital signs are reported as: axillary temperature: 36.3°C, heart rate: 154 beats/min, respiratory rate: 37 breaths/min, and blood pressure: 65/33 mm Hg. Her weight is 3.2 kg, length is 53 cm, and head circumference 36 cm. Her sclera are yellow and her body is icteric. No murmurs or any other abnormalities are detected in the heart and lung auscultation. Her liver and spleen are normal on palpation. Laboratory results are as follows: Serum total bilirubin: 21.02 mg/dL Direct bilirubin of 2.04 mg/dL AST: 37 U/L ALT: 20 U/L GGT: 745 U/L Alkaline phosphatase: 531 U/L Creatinine: 0.3 mg/dL Urea: 29 mg/dL Na: 147 mEq/L K: 4.5 mEq/L CRP: 3 mg/L Complete blood cell count within the normal range. She is diagnosed with uncomplicated neonatal jaundice that may require phototherapy.

title: trec-ct-2021-4
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2021-4
病例摘要：这是一位44岁的女性，有PCOS、肥胖和高血压的既往病史。她因胆囊炎的症状入院，并偶然发现有大量的心包积液。进行了心包穿刺术，液体分析结果与Burkitt's淋巴瘤一致。心包积液中检测到κ轻链限制性CD10阳性单克隆B细胞，表达FMC-7、CD19和CD20，并且存在myc重排，符合Burkitt's淋巴瘤的特征。随后进行的腰椎穿刺和骨髓活检均未发现任何病变，这表明这是一种原发性心脏淋巴瘤。心脏MRI显示在右心房侧壁上有一个3cm x 1cm大小的肿块，靠近房室结。既往病史：1. 偶发偏头痛；2. 高血压；3. 肥胖；4. PCOS/不孕症；5. 病毒性脑炎/脑膜炎-->ICH-->癫痫/中风([**2137**]) =- 由严重鼻窦感染引起，导致轻微非局灶性残留缺损；6. 腰椎引流后并发脑脊液漏伴脑膜炎；7. 右下肢深静脉血栓形成，已放置下腔静脉滤器；8. 关节手术。

metadata.original_text: This is a 44 year old female with PMH of PCOS, Obesity, HTN who presented with symptoms of cholecystitis and was found incidentally to have a large pericardial effusion. A pericardiocentesis was performed and the fluid analysis was consistent with Burkitt's lymphoma. Pericardial fluid was kappa light chain restricted CD10 positive monotypic B cells expressing FMC-7, CD19, CD20, and myc rearrangement consistent with Burkitt's Lymphoma. A subsequent lumbar puncture and bone marrow biopsy were negative for any involvement which made this a primary cardiac lymphoma. A cardiac MRI showed a mass that was 3cm x 1cm on the lateral wall of the right atrium adjacent to the AV junction. Past Medical History: 1. Rare migraines 2. HTN 3. Obesity 4. PCOS/infertility 5. Viral encephalitis/meningitis-->ICH-->seizure/stroke ([**2137**]) =- from severe sinus infxn, caused mild non-focal residual deficits 6. CSF leak w/ meningitis s/p lumbar drain placement 7. R LE DVT s/p IVC filter placement 8. Knee surgery

title: trec-ct-2021-40
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2021-40
主要诊断：骨质疏松性骨病
病例摘要：患者为60岁男性，主诉频繁头痛、全身骨骼疼痛以及咀嚼困难，症状始于6年前且逐渐加重。检查发现双侧磨牙周围肿胀。自上次检查以来，肿胀有所增加。头面部检测到多个黏膜外病变。肿胀无触痛并附着于下方的骨组织。进一步评估显示放射性物质摄取增加以及尿吡啶啉水平升高。其血清碱性磷酸酶为300 IU/L（正常范围是44-147 IU/L）。家族史仅对其母亲高血压和父亲2型糖尿病有重要意义。确诊为骨质疏松性骨病，并将开始使用双膦酸盐作为一线治疗。

metadata.original_text: The patient is a 60 year old man complaining of frequent headaches, generalized bone pain and difficulty chewing that started 6 years ago and is worsening. Examination shows bilateral swellings around the molars. The swellings have increased since his last examination. Several extraoral lesions are detected in the head and face. The swellings are non-tender and attached to the underlying bone. Further evaluation shows increased uptake of radioactive substance as well as an increase in urinary pyridinoline. His serum alkaline phosphatase is 300 IU/L (the normal range is 44- 147 IU/L). His family history is only significant for hypertension in his mother and DM type 2 in his father. The diagnosis of Paget's Disease of Bone was confirmed and Bisphosphonate will be started as first-line therapy.

title: trec-ct-2021-41
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2021-41
病例摘要：一名57岁的农民一年前被诊断为帕金森病。他经历动作迟缓和震颤。他的既往病史包括高血压和高胆固醇血症。他与妻子同住，他们有三个孩子。在诊断之前，他曾经活跃于种植和照顾农场动物。患者抱怨震颤和动作迟缓。他进入门时遇到困难，因为他是冻结状态并需要指导才能进去。他的书写变得越来越小。他正在服用左旋多巴和三苯双脒。他表示药物有助于缓解震颤和动作迟缓，但仍然难以发起运动、僵硬以及整体动作缓慢。他是一个警觉且合作的人，并没有痴呆的迹象。他不吸烟也不使用任何非法药物。

metadata.original_text: A 57-year old farmer was diagnosed with Parkinson's disease a year ago. He experiences slowness of movement and tremors. His past medical history is significant for hypertension and hypercholesterolemia. He lives with his wife. They have three children. He used to be active with planting and taking care of their farm animals before his diagnosis. The patient complains of shaking and slow movement. He had difficulty entering through a door, as he was frozen and needed guidance to step in. His handwriting is getting smaller. He is on Levodopa and Trihexyphenidyl. He stated his medications help with shaking and slow movement. But he still has difficulty initiating movements, stiffness and slowness in general. He is an alert and cooperative man who doesn't have any signs of dementia. He doesn't smoke or use any illicit drugs.

title: trec-ct-2021-42
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2021-42
病例摘要：一名32周+6天妊娠的19岁西班牙裔女性，孕产史为G1P1，因常规随访前来妇产科就诊，主诉轻微头痛和下肢水肿。初步评估显示血压为146/99 mmHg，尿液试纸检测到蛋白质含量3+。她上次就诊时血压和尿常规检查结果正常。数小时后再次测量的血压为150/100 mmHg。实验室检查结果显示血红蛋白浓度、血小板计数以及肝转氨酶水平均在正常范围内。她抱怨有疲劳感，但没有发热或寒战。头痛症状存在，但视力未见改变。未观察到呼吸困难、咳嗽、胸痛、端坐呼吸或心悸等症状，也无皮疹出现。体格检查未发现腹痛、排便习惯改变、恶心、呕吐、尿频、血尿或泡沫尿等异常情况。下肢水肿存在，但没有关节疼痛或背部疼痛。她没有特定的既往病史，仅服用孕期维生素。她的家族史中糖尿病2型和高血压阳性。她有社交饮酒史，无吸烟或吸毒史。过去两年内只有一个性伴侣，并且自两年前以来未使用任何避孕措施。初次就诊时（妊娠6周）的BMI为24。她在怀孕期间体重增长正常。

metadata.original_text: 19 yo Hispanic female G1P1 at 32+ 6 weeks of gestational age presented to the OB clinic for routine follow up complaining of mild headache and leg swelling. Primary evaluation revealed BP of 146/99 and urine dipstick with 3+ proteins. Her BP and U/A were normal in previous visit. Repeat BP a few hours later is 150/100 mmHg. Laboratory studies showed a normal hematocrit, platelet count, and liver transaminase levels. She is complaining of fatigue but no fever or chills. She is also suffering of headaches with no vision changes. No shortness of breath, cough, chest pain, orthopnea and palpitations or skin rash were observed. Her physical exam was negative for abdominal pain, change in bowel habits, nausea, vomiting, dysuria, frequency, hematuria or frothy urine. Leg swelling was observed with no arthralgia or back pain. She has no specific past medical issues and only uses prenatal vitamins. Her family history is positive for DM type 2 and HTN. She is a social alcohol consumer with the negative history of smoking or drug use. She is only have one partner in past 2 years and didn't have any contraceptive methods since 2 years ago. Her BMI was 24 at the first visit when she was at 6 weeks of gestational age. She is getting weight normally during her pregnancies.

title: trec-ct-2021-43
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2021-43
病例摘要：患者为60岁女性，因近期接受过两次静脉抗生素治疗吸入性肺炎而入住脑卒中部门。她发热，并主诉腹痛和腹泻（3小时内排便8次，每次均为大量绿色水样便）。患者的腹部普遍压痛并膨胀，伴有肠鸣音亢进。体温为38.4°C，心率113次/分钟，血压低至80/40 mmHg。粪便样本检测呈艰难梭菌毒素阳性。

metadata.original_text: The patient is a 60-year-old woman admitted to the stroke department with a recent history of a second course of intravenous antibiotics for aspiration pneumonia. She is febrile and complained of abdominal pain and diarrhea (bowel movements eight times in 3 hours, large volumes of greenish, liquid stool each time). The patient's abdomen is generally tender and distend with hyperactive bowel sounds. She is febrile (38.4°C), tachycardic (113/min) and hypotensive (80/40 mmHg). The stool samples must were positive for Clostridium difficile toxin.

title: trec-ct-2021-44
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2021-44
病例摘要：患者是一名14岁的男孩，主诉脊柱侧弯和背部疼痛。他没有其他医疗状况。过去他能够进行篮球和足球等常规活动，但最近遇到了困难。他的腿部和背部疼痛，并且在体力活动中加剧。他大部分时间都倾向于平躺。他对自己的身体姿态不满意，并抱怨肩膀不平衡以及头部偏向右侧。患者是一名着装整洁、营养良好的青少年，精神状态清醒且配合。左侧肩部略高于右侧肩部。脊柱侧弯的角度测量为45度。根据术中MEP监测，该患者符合脊柱侧弯手术指征。

metadata.original_text: The patient is a 14-year-old boy complaining of scoliosis and back pain. He has no other medical condition. He used to be able to play routine activities such as basketball and soccer, however, he recently has problem doing them. The pain is in his leg and back and aggravated by physical activities. He prefer lying down most of the time. He is not happy with his body gesture and complaints of shoulder imbalance and shifting his head to right. Patient is a well-dressed and well-nourished adolescent who is alert and cooperative. The left shoulder is slightly higher than the right shoulder. The scoliotic curve is measured as 45 degree. The patients is candidate for scoliosis surgery according to perioperative MEP monitoring

title: trec-ct-2021-45
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2021-45
病例摘要：患者是一名34岁的非裔美国男性，有镰状细胞病的既往史。因严重骨痛前来诊所就诊。患者的下背部疼痛剧烈，并放射至两条大腿，评分9/10。自儿童时期起，他就有多次镰状细胞危机的历史。过去两周内他也出现了相同的症状，但使用羟考酮治疗并未缓解他的疼痛。他的家庭医生将他转诊至急诊科以接受静脉镇痛药物治疗。患者体温正常，血压在正常范围内。体格检查未发现脾肿大。无药物过敏史。不吸烟且不使用任何非法药物。实验室检查结果如下：血红蛋白（Hgb）: 8 g/dl 白细胞计数（WBC）: 10,000 /mm³ 血小板计数（Plt）: 300,000 /ml 平均红细胞体积（MCV）: 106 fL 血红蛋白电泳：91% HbS，6% HbF，3% HbA2 丙氨酸氨基转移酶（ALT）: 43 U/L 天门冬氨酸氨基转移酶（AST）: 22 U/L 碱性磷酸酶（Alk P）: 53 U/L 铁蛋白：1,200 ng/ml

metadata.original_text: The patient is a 34-year-old African American man with the known history of Sickle cell disease comes to the clinic with severe bone pain. The patient had severe pain in his lower back that radiated to both thighs scored 9 out of 10. The patient has had positive history of sickle cell crises since childhood. He also had the same symptoms in past two weeks treated with oxycodone which was not beneficial to his pain. His PCP sent him to the emergency department to receive intra venous pain modulators. The patient is afebrile within the normal blood pressure. No splenomegaly was detected in the physical exam. He has no positive history of drug allergy. He won't smoke or uses any illicit drugs. The lab study is as bellow: Hgb: 8 g/dl WBC: 10000 /mm3 Plt: 300000 /ml MCV: 106 fL Hemoglobine electrophoresis: 91% HbS 6%HbF 3%HbA2 AST: 22 U/L ALT: 43 U/L Alk P: 53 U/L Ferritin: 1200 ng/ml

title: trec-ct-2021-46
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2021-46
病例摘要：患者A是一位30岁的男性，因持续10天的咳嗽、夜间盗汗和食欲不振入院。他一个月前曾前往印度旅行，并无结核病疫苗接种史。他是一名以前身体健康的人，在一家高科技公司担任工程师。他不吸烟也不使用任何非法药物。体温为38°C，心率为每分钟115次，呼吸频率为22次/分，血压为125/75 mmHg，血氧饱和度为97%。胸部X光显示左肺中叶有直径为1.8厘米的浸润影，并伴有空洞形成。痰液涂片检查发现结核分枝杆菌阳性，且对一线抗结核药物（异烟肼、链霉素、利福平和乙胺丁醇）敏感。实验室检查结果如下：血红蛋白：13 g/dL 白细胞计数：14000 /mm³ 血小板计数：300000 /ml 丙氨酸氨基转移酶（AST）：13 U/L 天门冬氨酸氨基转移酶（ALT）：15 U/L 碱性磷酸酶（Alk P）：53 U/L 总胆汁酸（Bill total）：0.6 mg/dL 钠离子（Na）：137 mEq/l 钾离子（K）：4 mEq/l 肌酐：0.5 mg/dL 尿素氮（BUN）：10 mg/dL 红细胞沉降率（ESR）：120 mm/hr

metadata.original_text: Patient A is a 30-year-old male who was admitted to the hospital after 10 days of cough, profuse nocturnal sweating and loss of appetite. He had traveled to India 1 months ago and has not any positive history of TB vaccination. He is a previously healthy man, working as an engineer in a high tech company. He doesn't smoke o use any illicit drugs. He was febrile (38 c) with heart rate of 115 b/min, respiratory rate of 22, BP of 125/75 mmHg and O2 sat of 97%. Chest X-ray showed infiltrate in the middle of left lung with diameter of 1.8 cm with signs of cavitation. The sputum smear revealed positive sputum culture for Mycobacterium tuberculosis which are sensitive of the first-line TB drugs (isoniazid, streptomycin, rifampicin and ethambutol). Lab study is reported bellow: Hgb: 13 g/dl WBC: 14000 /mm3 Plt: 300000 /ml AST: 13 U/L ALT: 15 U/L Alk P: 53 U/L Bill total: 0.6 mg/dl Na: 137 mEq/l K: 4 mEq/l Creatinine: 0.5 mg/dl BUN: 10 mg/dl ESR: 120 mm/hr

title: trec-ct-2021-47
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2021-47
病例摘要：一名62岁的非洲裔美国男性因左上肢和下肢无力，伴有右眼暗视斑点、右侧面部麻木、面瘫及言语不清而就诊。他否认有呼吸困难、头痛、心悸、胸痛、发热、头晕、尿失禁或意识丧失的症状。他的既往病史包括高血压、高脂血症和甲状腺功能减退。他每天吸烟一包，每周饮酒5至6瓶啤酒。他对家族史不知情。他正在使用左旋甲状腺素、阿托伐他汀和氢氯噻嗪。初步评估时生命体征稳定。体检发现左侧面部下垂、构音障碍及左侧偏瘫。他的国家卫生研究院卒中量表（NIHSS）评分为7分。头部和颈部的CT血管造影未见急性颅内病变。静脉注射重组组织型纤溶酶原激活剂（t-PA），并给予高剂量他汀类药物治疗。患者被收入重症监护室监测24小时。头部MRI显示右侧侧脑室周围白质及右基底节后部有急性1.7厘米的梗死灶。

metadata.original_text: A 62-year-old African-American man presented with left upper and lower extremity weakness, associated with dark visual spot in right eye, right facial numbness, facial drop and slurred speech. He denied dyspnea, headache, palpitations, chest pain, fever, dizziness, bowel or urinary incontinence, loss of consciousness. His medical history was significant for hypertension, hyperlipidemia and hypothyroidism. He smokes cigarette 1 pack per day for 40 years and alcohol consumption of 5 to 6 beers per week. He is not aware about his family history. He is using Levothyroxine, Atorvastatin and HTCZ. His vital signs were stable in the primary evaluation. Left-sided facial droop, dysarthria, and left-sided hemiplegia were seen in the physical exam. His National Institutes of Health Stroke Scale (NIHSS) score was calculated as 7. Initial CT angiogram of head and neck reported no acute intracranial findings. Intravenous recombinant tissue plasminogen activator (t-PA) was administered as well as high-dose statin therapy. The patient was admitted to the intensive care unit to be monitored for 24 hours. MRI of the head revealed an acute 1.7-cm infarct of the right periventricular white matter and posterior right basal ganglia.

title: trec-ct-2021-48
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2021-48
主要诊断：足癣感染
病例摘要：费尔南德斯是一名41岁的职业足球运动员。他因脚痒来到诊所。体格检查发现右脚第三和第四趾间局部出现鳞屑和浸渍，变得发炎且疼痛，并伴有轻微裂纹。脚背和脚底未受影响。受累区域没有脓液或撕裂。他未使用任何外用软膏治疗该病变，也没有糖尿病等基础疾病的阳性病史。他每天抽15支烟并每天喝一杯啤酒。他的家族病史显示母亲有高脂血症，父亲有心肌梗死。他在多个伴侣间交往，并在性行为中使用避孕套。除上述症状外，体格检查和实验室检查结果均正常。通过显微镜KOH湿片检查观察到分段的真菌菌丝，确诊为足癣感染。

metadata.original_text: Fernandez is a 41 year man who is a professional soccer player. He came to the clinic with itchy foot. Physical exam revealed localized scaling and maceration between the third and fourth of his right toe. It became inflamed and sore, with mild fissuring. The dorsum and sole of the foot was unaffected. There is no pus or tearing in the affected area. He didn't use ant topical ointment on the lesion and has no positive history for any underlying disease such as DM. He smokes 15 cigarettes per day and drinks a beer per day. His family history is positive for hyperlipidemia in her mother and MI in her father. He is in relation with several partners and use condom during the intercourse. His physical exam and lab studies were normal otherwise. Tinea pedis infection confirmed as his diagnosis by the observation of segmented fungal hyphae during a microscopic KOH wet mount examination.

title: trec-ct-2021-49
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2021-49
病例摘要：一名12岁的女孩由其母亲陪同前来诊所，主诉身材矮小、青春期延迟和发育迟缓。染色体检查结果显示为45X，确诊为特纳综合征。她从六个月前开始接受生长激素治疗，未进行雌激素治疗以避免初潮并达到理想身高。体格检查显示她是一名肥胖且智力发育迟缓的女孩。乳房发育处于第1期，无阴毛或腋毛。最新的实验室检查结果显示促甲状腺激素(TSH)为3，空腹血糖(FBS)为75。

metadata.original_text: A 12 year old girl came to the clinic with her mother, complaining of short stature, delayed in puberty and developmental delay. Her karyotype study revealed 45X and confirmed the diagnosis of Turner syndrome. She is treating with GH since 6 months ago without estrogen therapy to avoid menarche and reach the ideal height. She is an obese, mentally retarded girl in the physical exam. Her breast bulb were in stage 1 with no course hair in the pubic or axillary. Her TSH was 3 and FBS was 75 in the latest lab study.

title: trec-ct-2021-5
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2021-5
病例摘要：74岁男性，有冠状动脉疾病史（曾进行冠脉旁路移植手术），EF值为60%，既往脑卒中病史（无残留功能障碍），高血压，高脂血症，2型糖尿病，中到重度外周血管疾病。因外周血管疾病的评估被转介至心血管科。体检发现颈动脉杂音。进一步回顾症状后，患者报告偶尔有头晕，无晕厥史，偶有头痛，否认胸痛/呼吸困难。无感觉或运动功能障碍。他回忆大约10-15年前可能有过一次中风，但没有残留的功能障碍。在冠脉旁路移植手术前，仅出现盗汗。进一步的系统回顾显示无胸痛、劳力性呼吸困难、夜间阵发性呼吸困难、端坐呼吸、心悸、晕厥或先兆晕厥。颈部超声检查显示双侧颈动脉显著狭窄（左侧>右侧）。血管造影结果显示右侧内颈动脉80%狭窄，左侧内颈动脉90%狭窄。脑血管造影进一步显示右侧大脑前动脉和大脑中动脉通畅，左侧大脑前动脉和左侧大脑中动脉也通畅。既往病史：冠状动脉疾病（曾进行冠脉旁路移植手术）在[**2154**]年于[**医院1 112**]进行；既往脑卒中；双侧颈动脉疾病；贫血；外周血管疾病；高血压；糖尿病，因视网膜病变和周围神经病变引起；白内障（已手术）；甲状腺结节；结肠息肉切除术；间歇性下背部疼痛；蛋白尿，童年右肘骨折后出现；关节炎

metadata.original_text: 74M hx of CAD s/p CABG, EF 60% prior CVA (no residual deficits), HTN, HL, DMII, Moderate to Severe PVD was referred to cardiology for evaluation of PVD, and on examination patient was found to have carotid bruits. Upon further review of symptoms the pt reports + Occasional dizziness, no prior syncope occasional HA, Denies CP/SOB. No sensory or motor defects. He recalls that he might have had a stroke 10-15 years ago without any residual deficit. Prior to CABG he only had diaphoresis. Further review of systems is notable for absence of chest pain, dyspnea on exertion, paroxysmal nocturnal dyspnea, orthopnea, palpitations, syncope or presyncope. He underwent Carotid U/S that showed significant bilateral carotid stenosis, L>R. Angiography revealed an 80% stenosis of the R ICA and a 90% L ICA stenosis. Cerebral angiography further revealed patent right ACA and MCA and patent left ACA and left MCA. Past Medical History: CAD s/p CABG in [**2154**] ([**Hospital1 112**]) Prior CVA Bilateral carotid artery disease Anemia PVD Hypertension Diabetes c/b retinopathy and peripheral neuropathy Cataracts s/p surgery Thyroid nodule Colon polyps s/p resection Intermittent Lower back pain Proteinuria s/p right elbow fracture as a child Arthritis

title: trec-ct-2021-50
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2021-50
病例摘要：一名5个月大的男婴因右侧阴囊空虚被带到儿科外科诊所。这名男孩是第一个孩子，于38周足月通过阴道分娩出生，母亲健康。母亲孕期正常，无并发症。婴儿体重为3200克，身高50厘米。目前体重6.5公斤，身高62厘米。体格检查未发现发育迟缓。左侧阴囊可触及睾丸，右侧阴囊内未触及睾丸。阴茎形状和大小正常，且未行包皮环切术。诊断性腹腔镜检查显示腹内隐睾。

metadata.original_text: A 5 months old male brought to the pediatrics surgery clinic with the complaint of empty scrotum at the right side. The baby boy is a first child who was born at the age of 38 weeks with NVD from a healthy mother. The mother had a normal pregnancy with no complication. The baby boy weighted 3200 gr with the height of 50 cm. He is breast feeding and now weighted as 6.5 kg with the height of 62 cm. He has no developmental delay in the physical assessment. There is a palpable testis is the left scrotum with non-palpable testis in the right scrotum. The penis is normal in shape and size and he is not circumcised. The diagnostic laparoscopy showed an abdominal undescended testis.

title: trec-ct-2021-51
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2021-51
病例摘要：这是一位25岁的G1P1孕妇，妊娠24周3天。她突然出现发热和寒战，并伴有恶心呕吐。还抱怨尿痛、急迫感和频繁排尿。她还报告说腰部有严重的疼痛。她的生命体征为：体温T=39.7°C，心率P=117次/分，呼吸频率R=20次/分，血压BP=113/74 mmHg。体检发现两侧肋腰角按压痛。她没有妊娠前或任何其他基础疾病的复发性尿路感染史。尿培养结果显示革兰氏阴性杆状细菌细胞、白细胞和白细胞管型。血液培养结果为阴性。血常规显示血红蛋白Hb 12.9 g/dL，血细胞比容Hct 39%，平均红细胞体积MCV 76 fL，白细胞计数WBC 14,120/µL。

metadata.original_text: The patients is a 25-year-old G1 P1 pregnant woman who is 24W3D gestational old who developed a sudden unset of fever and chills, accompany with nausea and vomiting. She also complains of dysuria, urgency and frequency. She also reports some severe pain in the flank. Her vital signs are: T = 39.7ºC, P = 117, R = 20, and BP = 113/74 mm Hg. Physical examination reveals tenderness on palpation of both costovertebral angles. She has no history of recurrent UTI prior to her pregnancy or any other underlying disease. The urine culture showed Gram-negative rod-shaped bacterial cells, leukocytes, and leukocyte casts. The blood culture is negative. A CBC shows Hb 12.9 g/dL, Hct 39%, MCV 76 fL, WBC count 14,120/µL.

title: trec-ct-2021-52
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2021-52
病例摘要：一名34岁的男性患者因头晕和严重腹泻前来就诊，症状始于昨日。他几天前从国外旅行归来，并在苏丹的一个营地生活了一个月。他先是出现腹痛，随后伴有胀气、恶心以及稀便。不久后，开始出现无臭味的大量水样腹泻。粪便呈水样且略带白色，但患者没有发热。卧位时血压为95/62 mmHg，站立时降至75/40 mmHg。皮肤弹性减退。心率为110次/分，患者看起来病态且口腔黏膜干燥。暗视野显微镜检查新鲜粪便标本发现志贺氏菌。实验室检查结果如下：钠 137 mEq/L，钾 2 mEq/L，氯 94 mEq/L，二氧化碳结合力 15 mEq/L，粪便白细胞未见，粪便隐血试验阴性。

metadata.original_text: A 34 year old man comes to the clinic complaining of dizziness and severe diarrhea since yesterday. He has returned from an international trip few days ago and was living in a camp in Sudan for a month. He developed abdominal pain followed by bloating and nausea as well as loose bowel movements. Soon he was having profuse watery diarrhea without odor. The stool is watery and white but the patient has no fever. Blood pressure is 95/62 lying down and drops to 75/40 standing. The skin turgor has reduced. HR is 110 and he looks ill with dry mucosa. V. cholerae was seen in dark-field microscopy of a fresh stool specimen. The lab study is as bellow: Sodium 137 meq/L Potassium 2 meq/L Chloride 94meq/L CO2 15 meq/L Fecal leukocytes None seen Fecal occult blood Negative

title: trec-ct-2021-53
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2021-53
病例摘要：患者是一名来自约旦的34岁女性，因全身性且非特异性骨骼和关节疼痛前来就诊。她已婚并有3名子女。她的既往病史和药物使用史无特殊。她的BMI为23，血压：120/75 mmHg，心率：每分钟75次。实验室检查显示维生素D水平为14 ng/ml，其他指标均正常。（钙：9.2 mg/dl，磷：3.2 mg/dl，PTH：28 pg/ml）

metadata.original_text: Patient is a 34-year-old woman from Jordan who comes to clinic with some general and non-specific bones and joints pain. She is married and has 3 children. Her past medical and drug history are unremarkable. Her BMI is 23, BP: 120/75, HR: 75/min. Her laboratory study is remarkable for Vit D: 14ng/ml and otherwise healthy. (Ca: 9.2mg/dl, Phosphorus: 3.2mg/dl, PTH: 28pg/ml)

title: trec-ct-2021-54
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2021-54
病例摘要：一名57岁的男性患者因四个月前出现体重减轻和持续性干咳入院。胸部计算机断层扫描显示双侧上肺叶有多发渗出影及支气管壁增厚。他的病历中记录有阳性血清MPO-ANCA。经支气管活检发现坏死性肉芽肿并伴有多核巨细胞，确诊为韦格纳肉芽肿。他从四个月前开始接受皮质类固醇和环磷酰胺治疗。自疾病开始以来，他的伯明翰血管炎活动评分（BVAS）一直高于4分。昨天进行的体格检查和实验室检查结果如下：健康、营养良好、无黄疸、合作且警觉。体重：73 kg；身高：177 cm；血压：120/80 mmHg；心率：90次/分钟；呼吸频率：22次/分钟；血红蛋白：13 g/dL；白细胞计数：8,000 /mm³（中性粒细胞：2,700/mm³）；血小板计数：300,000 /μL；AST：40 U/L；ALT：56 U/L；碱性磷酸酶：147 U/L；总胆红素：1.2 mg/dL；血沉：120 mm/hr；MPO-ANCA：153 EU

metadata.original_text: A 57-year-old man was admitted to the clinic because of weight loss and persistent dry cough 4 months ago. Chest computed topography showed bilateral multiple infiltrates in the upper lobes and thickened bronchial walls. There is a documented positive serum MPO-ANCA in his medical record. Transbronchial biopsy revealed necrotic granulomas with multinucleated giant cells and the Wegener's granulomatosis was diagnosed for him. He is treating with corticosteroid and cyclophosphamides since 4 months ago. His Birmingham Vasculitis Activity Score (BVAS) is above 4 since the beginning of his disease. His last physical exam and lab study was performed yesterday and showed the results bellow: A wellbeing, well-nourished man, non-icteric, cooperative and alert Weight: 73 kg Height: 177 BP: 120/80 HR: 90/min RR: 22/min Hgb: 13 g/dl WBC: 8000 /mm3 (Neutrophil: 2700/mm3) Plt: 300000 /ml AST: 40 U/L ALT: 56 U/L Alk P: 147 U/L Bill total: 1.2 mg/dl ESR: 120 mm/hr MPO-ANCA: 153 EU

title: trec-ct-2021-55
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2021-55
病例摘要：一名22岁的白人男性因一年前出现震颤前来诊所就诊。最初，震颤仅出现在右手持物时，后来变得持续不断，并扩展至双上肢和双腿，甚至在休息时也存在。眼科检查发现Kayser-Fleischer环。体格检查显示黄疸、肝脾肿大以及上肢肌张力减低。尽管面部常带微笑，但根据父母的描述，他有攻击性行为。实验室检查结果显示血清铜蓝蛋白水平低下（0.05 g/l），24小时尿铜排泄量升高（120 μg/24 h）。通过肝脏铜浓度高（305 μg/g 干重肝组织）确诊为威尔森病。

metadata.original_text: A 22-year-old Caucasian man came to the Clinic with a history of tremors since a year ago. The tremor was first in his right hand while holding something. Later the tremor became continuous and extended to both hands and legs and even at rest. The Kayser-Fleischer' ring was detected in the ophthalmologic exam. The physical exam revealed jaundice, hepatosplenomegaly and hypotonia of the upper limbs. He had a constant smile on his face, however, he has aggressive behavior according to his parents' explanation. His laboratory study was significant for a low serum caeruloplasmin (0.05 g/l), and a raised 24 hour urine copper excretion (120 μg/24 h). Wilson disease was confirmed by high liver copper concentration (305 μg/g dry weight of liver).

title: trec-ct-2021-56
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2021-56
病例摘要：患者是一名41岁男性，确诊为肢端肥大症，四个月前进行了经蝶窦手术。他来诊所进行术后随访的实验室检查。他的实验室检查结果显示调整性别和年龄后的IGF-1水平为4.5 ULN。随机GH水平为4 μg/L。最近的脑部MRI证实存在垂体肿瘤残留。他的既往病史仅因垂体腺瘤导致的肢端肥大症及近期手术。术后他仅服用维生素D和多种维生素。

metadata.original_text: The patient is a 41-year-old man and a known case of Acromegaly who underwent transsphenoidal surgery 4 months ago. He came to the clinic for the follow up lab studies after his primary resection surgery. His lab study shows the IGF-1 level of 4.5 ULN adjusted by sex and age. His random GH level is 4 ug/L. The recent brain MRI confirmed the residual pituitary tumor. His past medical history is only significant for acromegaly due to pituitary adenoma and the recent surgery. After his surgery he takes only vitamin D and multivitamins.

title: trec-ct-2021-57
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2021-57
病例摘要：患者是一名41岁的肥胖女性，因腹痛和呕吐来到急诊室。疼痛从昨天开始逐渐加重，位于上腹部和脐周区域，并放射至背部。她经常饮酒但不吸烟。没有过敏史，仅每天服用多种维生素。家族病史显示有高血压（其母亲）。与丈夫同住，有3个孩子。腹部触诊时有压痛且柔软。肠鸣音正常。心率为115次/分钟，血压为110/75 mmHg。实验室检查结果显示白细胞增多（19.5），血尿素氮8.5，高CRP（145），高淀粉酶（1200）和血糖水平为15。腹部CT扫描显示急性水肿性间质性胰腺炎，并伴有胆总管和肝内胆管扩张，证实了胆石性胰腺炎的存在。妊娠试验呈阴性且未哺乳。

metadata.original_text: The patient is a 41-year-old obese woman coming to the emergency room with abdominal pain and vomiting. The pain that started gradually yesterday is located in the epigastric and periumbilical regions, radiating to her back. She drinks alcohol frequently and does not smoke. She has no history of allergies and uses only multivitamins daily. Her family history is positive for hypertension (her mother). She lives with her husband and has 3 children. The abdomen is tender and soft. Her bowel sounds are normal. Her heart rate is 115/min and blood pressure 110/75 mmHg. The lab studies are remarkable for leukocytosis (19.5), urea of 8.5, high CRP (145), high amylase (1200) and Glucose level of 15. Her abdominal CT scan revealed acute edematous interstitial pancreatitis with enlarged common bile duct and intrahepatic duct confirming gall stone pancreatitis. Her pregnancy test is negative and she is not breastfeeding.

title: trec-ct-2021-58
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2021-58
病例摘要：患者是一名17岁男孩，四天前开始出现右下腹剧烈游走性疼痛。伴随有恶心和呕吐症状。体检发现发热、压痛、反跳痛及肌紧张。白细胞计数升高，以中性粒细胞为主。CT扫描显示急性穿孔阑尾炎并盆腔内有游离液体。诊断性腹腔镜检查发现脓肿，无其他腹部异常。他现在需要在全身麻醉下行急诊腹腔镜阑尾切除术。

metadata.original_text: The patient is a 17-year-old boy complaining of severe migratory pain in the right lower quadrant of his abdomen that started four days ago. The pain is accompanied by nausea and vomiting. He was febrile with tenderness, rebound tenderness and guarding on palpation. His WBC was elevated with dominant neutrophils. CT scan showed evidence of acute perforated appendicitis with free fluid in the pelvis. Diagnostic laparoscopy revealed phlegmon with no other abdominal abnormalities. He is now a candidate for emergent laparoscopic appendectomy under general anesthesia.

title: trec-ct-2021-59
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2021-59
病例摘要：患者是一名15岁的男孩，一年前被诊断为哮喘。他因呼吸困难、胸闷和咳嗽前来就诊。根据其母亲的描述，他对常用的糖皮质激素吸入剂没有反应。他因严重哮喘急性发作被收入急诊科，并且是接受全身性糖皮质激素治疗的候选人。肺功能测试显示第一秒用力呼气容积（FEV1）为预测值的60%。他的既往病史无特殊，但家族病史中有哮喘，其母亲和叔叔都有哮喘。他过去曾使用吸入型糖皮质激素与扎鲁司特联合治疗。

metadata.original_text: The patient is a 15-year-old boy with asthma diagnosed a year ago. He presents with shortness of breath, chest tightening and cough. According to his mother, he didn't respond to the usual corticosteroid inhaler. He was admitted to the emergency department with diagnosis of severe asthma exacerbation. He is a candidate for general corticosteroid therapy. Spirometry revealed a forced expiratory volume in the first second (FEV1) of 60% of the predicted. His past medical history is non-significant. His family history is significant for asthma in his mother and his uncle. He used to be treated with combination of inhaled corticosteroids and Zafirlukast.

title: trec-ct-2021-6
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2021-6
病例摘要：患者是一位55岁的女性，有既往终末期肾病（ESRD）行血液透析和腹膜透析的病史。此次因水样、无血便腹泻及乏力入院。她有两次之前艰难梭菌感染的历史，最近一次是在一个月前。近一个月内曾使用抗生素治疗，在之前的住院期间也是如此。当时给予了14天口服万古霉素（Vanco）治疗艰难梭菌感染。患者最初被收治在ICU，并因血压支持（多巴胺）下出现白细胞增多但无发热的症状，入院时艰难梭菌检测呈阳性，且患者的白细胞增多符合艰难梭菌感染的表现。患者开始口服万古霉素和静脉注射甲硝唑治疗，当症状有所改善后，在8月29日改为口服万古霉素和甲硝唑。鉴于她反复出现的艰难梭菌感染，患者接受了长达6周的万古霉素治疗。出院时，建议她服用益生菌并对其家庭进行消毒处理。

metadata.original_text: Patient is a 55yo woman with h/o ESRD on HD and peritoneal dialysis who presented with watery, non bloody diarrhea and weakness. She has a history of 2 prior C diff infections, the most recent just 1 month ago. Recent antibx use in the last month on prior admission. Was also txd for Cdiff at that time for 14 d. course with po vanco. Pt was initially admitted to the ICU and was septic on pressors (levophed) until the morning of [**8-26**] with leukocytosis but no fever. C diff assay positive on admission, and pt had leukocytosis consistent with C diff. Patient was placed on Vanco po, Flagyl IV and Flagyl po initially, and when patient improved she was transitioned to Vanco oral and Flagyl oral on [**8-29**]. Patient was treated with Vanco for an extended course of 6 weeks given her recurrent C diff. Pt was also encouraged to take probiotics and to bleach her home when she was discharged.

title: trec-ct-2021-60
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2021-60
病例摘要：患者是一名63岁男性，因过去两天出现急性尿潴留而急诊入院。腹部盆腔CT扫描显示前列腺体积增大且膀胱充满尿液。他适合进行尿道导管插入和经尿道前列腺切除术（TURP）。进一步检查结果如下：排尿后残余尿量：71 mL 前列腺体积（经直肠超声）：63 mL 前列腺特异性抗原（PSA）水平：3.5 ng/mL 他最近的血液生化指标（三天前）正常：血红蛋白（Hgb）：13.6 g/dL 白细胞计数（WBC）：133,000 /mm³ 血小板计数（Plt）：370,000 /ml 凝血酶原时间（PT）：12秒 活化部分凝血活酶时间（PTT）：34秒 国际标准化比值（INR）：0.9 尿素氮（BUN）：10 mg/dL 肌酐：0.5 mg/dL 尿常规检查结果：颜色：黄色 形状：混浊 pH值：5.3 密度：1.010 葡萄糖（Glc）：100 酮体：阴性 硝酸盐：阴性 白细胞酯酶：阴性 红细胞：阴性 白细胞（WBCs/hpf U/C）：2

metadata.original_text: The patient is a 63-year-old man presenting to the Emergency Department with a history of acute urinary retention in the past 2 days. Abdominopelvic CT scan revealed a large prostate and a bladder filled with urine. He is a candidate for urethral catheterization and TURP. Further evaluation revealed: Post-void residual: 71 mL Prostate volume (TRUS): 63 mL Prostate-specific antigen (PSA) level: 3.5 ng/mL His recent blood chemistry (3 days ago) was normal: Hgb: 13.6 g/dl WBC: 133000 /mm3 Plt: 370000 /ml PT: 12 second PTT: 34 second INR: 0.9 Creatinine: 0.5 mg/dl BUN: 10 mg/dl U/A: Color: yellow Appearance: cloudy PH: 5.3 Specific gravity: 1.010 Glc: 100 Nitrite: negative Ketone: none Leukocyte esterase: negative RBC: negative WBC: 2 WBCs/hpf U/C: negative

title: trec-ct-2021-61
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2021-61
病例摘要：患者是一位45岁的绝经后女性，确诊为乳腺癌。核心活检显示左侧上外象限有3厘米的浸润性导管癌。肿瘤HER2阳性，ER/PR阴性。腋窝采样发现5个阳性淋巴结。胸部X光片显示有转移病灶。患者正在服用多种维生素和铁补充剂。她不吸烟也不饮酒。她没有性生活且无子女。她是肿瘤切除的候选人，并同意在化疗前进行手术。

metadata.original_text: The patient is a 45-year-old postmenopausal woman with cytologically confirmed breast cancer. A core biopsy revealed a 3 cm invasive ductal breast carcinoma in the left upper outer quadrant. The tumor is HER2-positive and ER/PR negative. Axillary sampling revealed 5 positive lymph nodes. CXR was remarkable for metastatic lesions. The patient is using multivitamins and iron supplements. She does not smoke or consume alcohol. She is not sexually active and has no children. She is a candidate for tumor resection and agrees to do so prior to chemotherapy.

title: trec-ct-2021-62
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2021-62
病例摘要：一名46岁男性因头晕和频繁头痛前来就诊。他有冠心病（CAD）家族史，但没有其他心血管风险因素如吸烟、高血压和糖尿病，并且身体活动量较大。患者的低密度脂蛋白胆固醇（LDL-C）和高密度脂蛋白胆固醇（HDL-C）水平分别为545 mg/dL和53 mg/dL。空腹血糖和甘油三酯水平（85 mg/dL 和 158 mg/dL，分别）均在正常范围内。患者未使用降脂药物。颈部听诊发现颈动脉收缩期杂音3+/6+，并向颅骨放射。超声检查显示左侧内颈动脉（LICA）有严重狭窄，右侧内颈动脉（RICA）有中度狭窄，估计狭窄程度为40%至50%。对于LICA，峰值收缩期速度（PSV）和终末舒张期速度（EDV）的阈值分别为208.5 cm/s和54.5 cm/s；RICA PSV 为91.72 cm/s，RICA EDV 为37.37 cm/s。观察到内颈动脉和共同颈动脉前壁及后壁有斑块，这些斑块被描述为体积较大的斑块延伸至内冠状动脉（ICAs）的中三分之一，并且主要表现为回声增强型和高回声型，少于50%的区域是无回声且表面不规则。

metadata.original_text: A 46-year-old man presents with dizziness and frequent headaches. He has a family history of CAD, but no other cardiovascular risk factors such as smoking, high blood pressure, and diabetes mellitus and is physically active. The patient's LDL-C and HDL-C levels were 545 and 53 mg/dL, respectively. His fasting glucose and triglyceride levels (85 and 158 mg/dL, resp.) were within normal limits. The patient reported no use of lipid-lowering medications. Neck auscultation revealed a systolic murmur 3+/6+ in the neck, radiating to the skull. Ultrasonography of the carotid arteries, revealed severe stenosis in the left internal carotid artery (LICA), as well as moderate stenosis in the right internal carotid artery (RICA) estimated between 40% and 50%. For the LICA, the peak-systolic (PSV) and end-diastolic velocity (EDV) cutoff values were 208.5 cm/s and 54.5 cm/s, respectively; RICA PSV was 91.72 cm/s and RICA EDV was 37.37 cm/s. Plaque was observed in the anterior and posterior walls of the internal carotid artery and common carotid artery, which were characterized as bulky plates extending to the middle third of the internal coronary arteries (ICAs) and as predominantly echogenic and hyperechoic, with less than 50% of the area being echolucent with uneven surfaces.

title: trec-ct-2021-63
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2021-63
病例摘要：一名54岁的肥胖女性因腹痛入急诊科，疼痛始于四天前，并伴有恶心和呕吐。上腹部疼痛放射至右上腹，在进食油腻食物后加剧。患者在过去一年中曾经历类似疼痛两次。她的既往病史包括高胆固醇血症和2次剖宫产手术。她有两个孩子，已绝经。她不吸烟、饮酒或使用非法药物。她有轻微发热。血压为150/85 mmHg，心率为115次/分，呼吸频率为15次/分，体温38.2℃，血氧饱和度98%（鼻导管吸氧）。她是一名没有急性不适的肥胖女性。在触诊时，她感到上腹部和右上腹有压痛，但无反跳痛。肠鸣音正常。实验室检查显示ESR升高、白细胞增多并伴有左移。超声检查发现多个胆囊结石、胆汁淤积以及胆总管结石，最小的结石直径为14mm。

metadata.original_text: A 54-year-old obese woman admitted to the emergency department with abdominal pain that started 4 days ago with nausea and vomiting. The epigastric pain radiates to the right upper quadrant, getting worse after eating fatty food. The patient experienced similar pain twice in the past year. Her past medical history is remarkable for hypercholesterolemia and 2 NVDs. She has 2 children, and she is menopausal. She does not smoke, drink alcohol, or use illicit drugs. She is mildly febrile. Her BP is 150/85, HR 115, RR 15, T 38.2, SpO2 98% on RA. She is an obese woman with no acute distress. On palpation, she experiences epigastric tenderness and tenderness in the right upper quadrant without rebound. Bowel sounds are normal. Laboratory analysis is remarkable for elevated ESR and leukocytosis with a left shift. The ultrasound revealed several gallstones, biliary sludge and CBD stones. The smallest stone is 14mm.

title: trec-ct-2021-64
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2021-64
病例摘要：患者是一名55岁男性，两年前被诊断为HCV感染，并近期并发了HBV感染。既往无其他重要病史。他已服用IFN、RBV和直接抗病毒药物治疗六个月。患者未服用其他药物。他的医疗记录显示之前有阳性HCV RNA检测结果以及抗-HCV抗体酶联免疫吸附试验阳性。最近的活检未发现肝细胞癌，仅见慢性炎症符合慢性病毒性肝炎。无酒精性肝病、食管静脉曲张出血、血色病、自身免疫性肝炎或代谢性肝病的证据。患者意识清楚，无急性呼吸困难。血压：130/75 mmHg，心率：90次/分钟，BMI：27。腹部柔软，无腹水或压痛。下肢正常，无水肿。

metadata.original_text: The patient is a 55-year-old man diagnosed with HCV 2 years ago and the recent coinfection with HBV. His past medical history is non-significant. He is on IFN, RBV and direct antiviral drugs for the past 6 months. The patient takes no other medications. His medical records show previous positive HCV RNA tests and a positive enzyme immunoassay for anti-HCV-antibodies. The recent biopsy was negative for hepatocellular carcinoma and was only remarkable for chronic inflammation compatible with a chronic viral hepatitis. There is no evidence of alcoholic liver disease, bleeding from esophageal varices, hemochromatosis, autoimmune hepatitis, or metabolic liver disease. He is an alert male with no acute distress. His BP: 130/75, HR: 90/min and BMI: 27. His abdomen is soft with no ascites or tenderness. The lower extremities are normal with no edema.

title: trec-ct-2021-65
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2021-65
病例摘要：患者是一名25岁的男性，7年前通过分子分析确诊为1型糖尿病。他因活动时出现呼吸困难和疲劳前来就诊。他表示爬三层楼后有轻微的呼吸困难，休息时无呼吸困难且无胸痛（纽约心脏协会心功能分级II级）。他被诊断患有心肌病，并将接受ACE抑制剂和β阻滞剂治疗。他正在服用70/30胰岛素和维生素D补充剂。他的既往病史中没有其他重要的医疗问题。他的家族病史显示其叔叔和祖父均患有1型糖尿病。实验室检查结果如下：空腹血糖（FBS）：100 mg/dL，糖化血红蛋白（HbA1c）：6.5%，胆固醇：190 mg/dL，甘油三酯（TG）：140 mg/dL，低密度脂蛋白（LDL）：125 mg/dL，高密度脂蛋白（HDL）：40 mg/dL

metadata.original_text: The patient is a 25-year-old man with type 1 diabetes confirmed with molecular analysis 7 years ago. He presents to the clinic with shortness of breath and fatigue during activities. He claims mild dyspnea after climbing 3 floors, no dyspnea at rest and no angina (New York Heart Association class 2). He is diagnosed with cardiomyopathy that will be treated with ACE inhibitors and Beta blockers. His takes 70/30 Insulin and vitamin D supplements. His past medical history is not significant for any other medical issues. His family history is positive for DM type 1 in his uncle and his grandfather. His lab study is as bellow: FBS: 100 mg/dl HbA1c: 6.5% Cholesterol: 190 mg/dl TG: 140 mg/dl LDL: 125 mg/dl HDL: 40 mg/dl

title: trec-ct-2021-66
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2021-66
病例摘要：一名16岁的女孩因体重增加和月经不规律来到诊所。她的BMI为24，但在过去几周内增加了5公斤。她感到疲劳的频率更高，并且没有精力与朋友一起跳舞。她的实验室检查结果显示促甲状腺激素(TSH)水平升高（15 mU/L），游离T4水平降低（0.18 ng/dl）。抗TPO抗体水平极高（136 IU/ml）。她被诊断为桥本病。她不吸烟，也不进行性活动。

metadata.original_text: A 16-year-old girl came to the clinic complaining of weight gain and abnormal menstrual cycles. Her BMI was 24, but she has gained 5 kg in the past few weeks. She gets tired more frequently and does not have energy to go dancing with her friends. Her lab results were remarkable for high TSH levels (15 mU/L) and low free T4 levels (0.18 ng/dl). Her anti-TPO levels were extremely high (136 IU/ml). She was diagnosed with Hashimoto disease. She does not smoke and she is not sexually active.

title: trec-ct-2021-67
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2021-67
病例摘要：一名54岁女性的宫颈涂片检查结果显示存在异常的宫颈鳞状上皮内病变/腺体病变。她检测出HPV 16阳性。她与丈夫有性生活，并且有四个孩子。她已经进入更年期，未使用避孕措施。她经常吸烟和饮酒。除此之外，她的身体状况良好。她被建议进行宫颈锥切术。

metadata.original_text: A Pap smear in a 54-year-old woman revealed abnormal cervical squamous intraepithelial/glandular lesion. She tested positive for HPV 16. She is sexually active with her husband and has 4 children. She is menopausal and uses no contraception. She smokes and drinks alcohol frequently. She is otherwise healthy. She was offered conization.

title: trec-ct-2021-68
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2021-68
主要诊断：不典型溶血尿毒综合征
病例摘要：患者为23岁男性，因高血压（175/95 mmHg）和败血症症状入院。出现呼吸衰竭需要机械通气，并伴有肾功能衰竭需进行血液透析。其外周血涂片检查显示微血管病性溶血性贫血及血小板减少。实验室检测发现乳酸脱氢酶水平升高，人补体C3水平降低，凝血功能正常。诊断为不典型溶血尿毒综合征。患者之前接种过脑膜炎奈瑟菌ACWY结合疫苗和B群脑膜炎奈瑟菌疫苗。基因检测结果显示ADAMTS13活性大于10%。
diagnosis: 不典型溶血尿毒综合征

metadata.original_text: The patient is a 23-year-old man who came to the hospital with high blood pressure (175/95 mmHg) and signs of septicemia. He developed respiratory failure requiring mechanical ventilation and renal failure requiring hemodialysis. His blood smear showed microangiopathic hemolytic anemia and thrombocytopenia. His blood tests revealed elevated lactate dehydrogenase and reduced human complement C3 levels with a normal coagulation profile. He was diagnosed with atypical hemolytic uremic syndrome. He was treated with plasma exchange and corticosteroids. He has been previously vaccinated with meningococcal group ACWY conjugate vaccine and meningococcal group B vaccine. The genetic survey revealed ADAMTS13 >10%.
metadata.diagnosis_zh: 不典型溶血尿毒综合征

title: trec-ct-2021-69
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2021-69
病例摘要：一位67岁的健康女性在十月初来到诊所接种流感疫苗。她在康复中心工作，没有基础疾病。这是她今年第一次接种疫苗。她已经更年期，并且有4个孩子。她不吸烟也不饮酒。她每天服用多种维生素和降压药。她每周至少五天进行30分钟的规律锻炼。她对任何食物或药物都没有过敏史。

metadata.original_text: A 67-year-old healthy woman came to the clinic to have her flu shot in early October. She works at a rehab center and has no underlying disease. It is her first vaccination this year. she is menopausal and has 4 children. She does not some. She takes daily multivitamins and anti-hypertensive drugs. She exercises regularly for 30 minutes a day at least 5 days a week. She has no allergies to any food or drugs.

title: trec-ct-2021-7
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2021-7
病例摘要：一名60岁男性，患有丙型肝炎引起的肝硬化，食管静脉曲张分级为II级，近期因上消化道出血[**2-9**]非甾体抗炎药引起的胃炎入院。通过肝病诊所转诊至急诊科，出现新的言语不清和思维偏斜的症状。患者还描述了新出现的不平衡感，导致跌倒，可能头部受伤。根据最近一次肝病门诊记录，他已戒酒一年（患者证实），尿毒试验未检测到酒精。CT检查结果正常，神经评估确定这不是缺血性梗死。患者被初步诊断为肝性脑病，并开始使用乳果糖治疗。肝功能测试显示总胆红素和直接胆红素自上次就诊以来显著增加。另一个令人担忧的特征是患者的AFP水平升高。这可能是肝硬化进展的表现，因为他两次对干扰素治疗无效。他将作为门诊患者进行随访以进一步检查。既往病史：丙型肝炎引起的肝硬化（曾用干扰素治疗两次但无反应）门脉胃病食管静脉曲张2级高血压近期住院[**4-/2150**]：上消化道出血[**2-9**]非甾体抗炎药引起的胃炎

metadata.original_text: 60 yo M with Hep C cirrhosis, grade II esophageal varices, recent admission for UGIB [**2-9**] NSAID gastritis, referred for admission throught the ED by hepatology clinic for new slurred speech and tangential thought process. Patient also describes new imbalance leading to a fall during which he may have hit his head on. Per last liver clinic note has been off ETOH for a year (corroborated with pt), utox was negative for alocohol. CT was within normal limits, and neuro evaluation determined this was not ischemic infart. Patient was given a presumptive diagnosis of hepatic encephalopathy and started on lactulose. Liver function tests showed a striking increase in his total and direct bilirubin since last visit. Another worrisome feature was the increase in the patient's AFP. This could be progression of cirrhosis as he failed interferon twice. He is to follow-up as an outpatient to work this up. Past Medical History: HCV Cirrhosis (tx with interferon x2 with no response) Portal Gastropathy Grade II Esophageal varices HTN Recent admission [**4-/2150**]: UGIB [**2-9**] non-steroidal induced gastritis

title: trec-ct-2021-70
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2021-70
病例摘要：一名46岁的亚洲女性，患有抑郁症（MDD），主诉持续感到悲伤和对日常活动失去兴趣。她表示大多数日子情绪仍然低落。她抱怨几乎每天都有能量不足和自责感。尽管过去六个月一直在服用抗抑郁药，但症状仍然存在。她不饮酒或吸烟。过去三周内她没有足够的精力进行至少30分钟的锻炼，并且最近还有一些消化问题。她已婚并有4个孩子。她已经进入更年期。她的丈夫一年前被诊断出患有结肠癌，目前正在接受化疗。她的既往病史无特殊，家族史中无任何心理问题。她的HAM-D评分为20分。

metadata.original_text: A 46-year-old Asian woman with MDD complains of persistent feelings of sadness and loss of interest in daily activities. She states that her mood is still depressed most of the days. She complains of loss of energy and feelings of worthlessness nearly every day. She is on anti-depressants for the past 6 months, but the symptoms are still present. She does not drink alcohol or smoke. She used to exercise every day for at least 30 min., but she doesn't have enough energy to do so for the past 3 weeks. She also has some digestive issues recently. She is married and has 4 children. She is menopausal. Her husband was diagnosed with colon cancer a year ago and is undergoing chemotherapy. Her past medical history is unremarkable. Her family history is negative for any psychologic problems. Her HAM-D score is 20.

title: trec-ct-2021-71
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2021-71
病例摘要：患者是一位34岁的肥胖女性，因体重问题前来就诊。她的身高为165厘米，体重为113公斤（BMI：41.5）。过去，她曾尝试使用减肥药物和食欲抑制剂但未成功。她抱怨有睡眠呼吸暂停、多囊卵巢综合症以及对自己的体型不满意。她是高中教师，已婚五年。在过去四个月中没有采取任何避孕措施且未曾怀孕过。她很少运动，感觉移动对她来说很困难。她在15秒内无法完成四步测试。她不吸烟也不使用任何药物。她的血压为130/80 mmHg，心率为每分钟195次，BMI为41.54。实验室检查结果：空腹血糖（FBS）98 mg/dL，甘油三酯（TG）150 mg/dL，胆固醇180 mg/dL，低密度脂蛋白（LDL）90 mg/dL，高密度脂蛋白（HDL）35 mg/dL。她正在考虑进行腹腔镜胃旁路手术。

metadata.original_text: The patient is a 34-year-old obese woman who comes to the clinic with weight concerns. She is 165 cm tall, and her weight is 113 kg (BMI: 41.5). In the past, she unsuccessfully used antiobesity agents and appetite suppressants. She is complaining of sleep apnea, PCO and dissatisfaction with her body shape. She is a high-school teacher. She is married for 5 years. She doesn't use any contraceptive methods for the past 4 months and she had no prior pregnancies. She rarely exercises and movement seems to be hard for her. She is not able to complete the four-square step test in less than 15 seconds. She does not smoke or use any drugs. Her BP: 130/80, HR: 195/min and her BMI is: 41.54. Her lab results: FBS: 98 mg/dl TG: 150 mg/dl Cholesterol: 180 mg/dl LDL: 90 mg/dl HDL: 35 mg/dl She is considering a laparoscopic gastric bypass.

title: trec-ct-2021-72
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2021-72
病例摘要：患者是一名16岁的女孩，最近被诊断为重症肌无力，属于Ⅱa类。她抱怨有复视和上肢无力的症状。她的抗乙酰胆碱受体抗体检测呈阳性，单纤维肌电图（SFEMG）也呈阳性。她正在接受乙酰胆碱酯酶抑制剂治疗并配合使用免疫抑制剂，但仍有一些症状。她不吸烟也不使用非法药物。她没有性生活，月经周期规律。体检和实验室检查未发现其他异常。血压：110/75 血红蛋白：11 g/dL 白细胞计数：8000 /mm³ 血小板计数：300000 /ml 肌酐：0.5 mg/dL 尿素氮：10 mg/dL 人绒毛膜促性腺激素：未妊娠

metadata.original_text: The patient is a 16-year-old girl recently diagnosed with myasthenia gravis, class IIa. She complains of diplopia and weakness affecting in her upper extremities. She had a positive anti-AChR antibody test, and her single fiber electromyography (SFEMG) was positive. She is on acetylcholinesterase inhibitor treatment combined with immunosuppressants. But she still has some symptoms. She does not smoke or use illicit drugs. She is not sexually active, and her menses are regular. Her physical exam and lab studies are not remarkable for any other abnormalities. BP: 110/75 Hgb: 11 g/dl WBC: 8000 /mm3 Plt: 300000 /ml Creatinine: 0.5 mg/dl BUN: 10 mg/dl Beta hcg: negative for pregnancy

title: trec-ct-2021-73
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2021-73
主要诊断：新生儿黄疸，可能需要光疗
病例摘要：患者为一名3天大的女婴，出现黄疸症状已有一天。她于孕34周分娩，并因早产而在保温箱中监护。生命体征报告如下：腋下温度36.3°C，心率154次/分，呼吸频率37次/分，血压65/33 mmHg。体重2.1 kg，身长45 cm，头围32 cm。她表现为巩膜黄染和全身黄疸。肝脾触诊正常。实验室检查结果如下：血清总胆红素21.02 mg/dL，直接胆红素2.04 mg/dL，AST 37 U/L，ALT 20 U/L，GGT 745 U/L，碱性磷酸酶531 U/L，肌酐0.3 mg/dL，尿素29 mg/dL，钠离子147 mEq/L，钾离子4.5 mEq/L，CRP 3 mg/L。血常规在正常范围内。诊断为新生儿黄疸，可能需要光疗。
diagnosis: 新生儿黄疸，可能需要光疗

metadata.original_text: The patient is a 3-day-old female infant with jaundice that started one day ago. She was born at 34w of gestation and kept in an incubator due to her gestational age. Vital signs were reported as: axillary temperature: 36.3°C, heart rate: 154 beats/min, respiratory rate: 37 breaths/min, and blood pressure: 65/33 mm Hg. Her weight is 2.1 kg, length is 45 cm, and head circumference 32 cm. She presents with yellow sclera and icteric body. Her liver and spleen are normal to palpation. Laboratory results are as follows: Serum total bilirubin: 21.02 mg/dL Direct bilirubin of 2.04 mg/dL AST: 37 U/L ALT: 20 U/L GGT: 745 U/L Alkaline phosphatase: 531 U/L Creatinine: 0.3 mg/dL Urea: 29 mg/dL Na: 147 mEq/L K: 4.5 mEq/L CRP: 3 mg/L Complete blood cell count within the normal range. She is diagnosed with neonatal jaundice that may require phototherapy.
metadata.diagnosis_zh: 新生儿黄疸，可能需要光疗

title: trec-ct-2021-74
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2021-74
主要诊断：骨质疏松病
病例摘要：患者是一名53岁的男性，6年前开始出现频繁头痛、全身骨骼疼痛以及咀嚼困难，并且症状逐渐加重。检查发现双侧磨牙周围肿胀。自上次检查以来，肿胀有所增加。还检测到头部和面部的多处黏膜外病变。这些肿胀无痛且附着在下方骨组织上。进一步评估显示放射性物质摄取增加以及尿吡啶啉水平升高。血清碱性磷酸酶为300 IU/L（正常范围是44-147 IU/L）。患者的姐姐也有类似问题，她在52岁时被诊断为骨质疏松病。确诊为骨质疏松病，并将开始使用双膦酸盐作为一线治疗。

metadata.original_text: The patient is a 53-year-old man complaining of frequent headaches, generalized bone pain and difficulty chewing that started 6 years ago and is getting worse. Examination shows bilateral swellings around the molars. The swellings have increased since his last examination. Several extraoral lesions of the head and face are detected. The swellings are non-tender and attached to the underlying bone. Further evaluation shows increased uptake of radioactive substance as well as an increase in urinary pyridinoline. The serum alkaline phosphatase is 300 IU/L (the normal range is 44- 147 IU/L). The patient's sister had the same problems. She was diagnosed with Paget's disease of bone when she was 52 years old. The diagnosis of Paget's Disease of Bone is confirmed and Bisphosphonate will be started as first-line therapy.

title: trec-ct-2021-75
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2021-75
病例摘要：患者是一名55岁的男性，最近被诊断为帕金森病。他抱怨动作迟缓和震颤。他的病情被评估为轻度，Hoehn-Yahr分期I期。他的既往病史包括高血压和高胆固醇血症。他与妻子同住，他们有三个孩子。在诊断之前，他经常从事园艺活动。他抱怨手抖和动作缓慢。他曾难以通过门进入室内，因为他会冻结并需要指导才能迈步。他的字迹变得越来越小。他被建议使用左旋多巴和三苯双脒。他是一个警觉且合作的人，并没有痴呆的迹象。他不吸烟也不使用任何非法药物。

metadata.original_text: The patient is a 55-year-old man who was recently diagnosed with Parkinson's disease. He is complaining of slowness of movement and tremors. His disease is ranked as mild, Hoehn-Yahr Stage I. His past medical history is significant for hypertension and hypercholesterolemia. He lives with his wife. They have three children. He used to be active with gardening before his diagnosis. He complains of shaking and slow movement. He had difficulty entering through a door, as he was frozen and needed guidance to step in. His handwriting is getting smaller. He is offered Levodopa and Trihexyphenidyl. He is an alert and cooperative man who does not have any signs of dementia. He does not smoke or use any illicit drugs.

title: trec-ct-2021-8
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2021-8
病例摘要：这是一位57岁的男性患者，患有慢性淋巴细胞白血病（CLL）并伴有大细胞转化。他于[**10/2119**]首次因疾病就诊，当时白细胞计数和乳酸脱氢酶（LDH）升高。当时没有脾肿大或任何血细胞减少症。确实存在一些 bulky 淋巴结肿大。随后完成了四周期的 FCR 治疗，该治疗于[**2119年09月**]完成。他对治疗反应良好，并在停药约两年后被监测。然后他在[**7-/2122**]再次因白细胞计数上升就诊，大约50%淋巴细胞，LDH 轻度升高。他还有一些轻微的可触及淋巴结肿大加重。随后接受了四周期的 PCR 治疗，但反应不大，并且治疗方案被调整为 R-CVP，他完成了两周期的治疗。尽管继续有良好的体能状态，但他仍然没有显著反应，最终转用 Campath 治疗。他的淋巴细胞增多症有所缓解，白细胞计数下降明显，但在减少 bulky 淋巴结肿大方面几乎没有反应。随后左颈淋巴结逐渐增大并进行了活检，结果显示发生了 Richter 转化。

metadata.original_text: This is a 57-year-old gentleman with CLL and large cell transformation. He presented with his disease back in [**10/2119**] with an elevated white count and LDH. He was without any splenomegaly or any cytopenias at that time. He did have some bulky lymphadenopathy. He then completed four cycles of FCR therapy, which he completed back in 09/[**2119**]. He had an excellent response to therapy and was monitored off treatment for approximately two years. He then presented in [**7-/2122**] with a rising white count, approximately 50% lymphocytes, and a mildly elevated LDH. He also had some mild worsening palpable lymphadenopathy. He then received four cycles of PCR, but did not have much in the way of response and his treatment regimen was switched to R-CVP of which he received two cycles. He did again not have a significant response, though continued to have an excellent performance status, and he was ultimately switched to Campath therapy. He did have resolution of his lymphocytosis, and his white count has come down nicely, but did not have much in the way of response in terms of reducing his bulky lymphadenopathy. He then eventually had developed an enlarging left cervical node which was biopsied and was found to have Richter's transformation.

title: trec-ct-2021-9
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2021-9
病例摘要：一名41岁男性，有严重的智力障碍、心力衰竭和癫痫病史。因面部右侧抽搐及全身震颤在养老院就诊，需服用20毫克地西泮以停止癫痫发作活动。外院认为患者患有局灶性癫痫并继发性全面性强直阵挛发作，可能由于出生时的缺氧性脑损伤引起，并且与MRI显示的左侧颞叶萎缩变化有关。患者13岁时首次出现癫痫发作，由家人发现全身强直-阵挛发作。两年后再次发作。他一直服用卡马西平和苯巴比妥。患者在接下来的20年里没有再发作。最近停用了卡马西平，并认为这种药物可能是保持其无发作所必需的。住院期间未发生进一步事件，出院时恢复到基线水平。全脑电图报告尚未完成。既往病史：癫痫、心力衰竭、抑郁

metadata.original_text: 41 year old man with history of severe intellectual disability, CHF, epilepsy presenting with facial twitching on the right and generalized shaking in at his NH which required 20 mg valium to cease seizure activity. Per outside medical patient was felt to have focal epilepsy with secondary generalization, likely due to anoxic brain injury at birth, and probably related to the atrophic changes seen on MRI, particularly in the left temporal lobe. The patient first developed seizures at age 13 found by family to have a generalized convulsion. He had a second seizure two years after his first episode. He was maintained on Dilantin and phenobarbital. The patient went 20 years without another seizure. He was recently tapered off Dilantin, and it was felt that perhaps this medication was necessary to maintain him seizure free. The patient had no further events during the hospital course and was back at his baseline at the time of discharge. Full EEG reports are pending at the time of dictation. Past Medical History: Epilepsy as above, CHF, depression

title: trec-ct-2022-1
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2022-1
病例摘要：一名19岁的男性因性方面的一些担忧来到诊所。他最近开始了一段关系，并担心女友的满意度。根据女友的说法，他的“婴儿脸”不够成熟，而且不如同学健壮。体格检查显示有少许阴毛和次级性特征发育不良。在检查中无法嗅出咖啡的味道，但视力正常。超声检查显示睾丸体积为1-2毫升。激素评估显示血清睾酮水平为65 ng/dL，促性腺激素释放激素水平较低。

metadata.original_text: A 19-year-old male came to clinic with some sexual concern. He recently engaged in a relationship and is worried about the satisfaction of his girlfriend. He has a "baby face" according to his girlfriend's statement and he is not as muscular as his classmates. On physical examination, there is some pubic hair and poorly developed secondary sexual characteristics. He is unable to detect coffee smell during the examination, but the visual acuity is normal. Ultrasound reveals the testes volume of 1-2 ml. The hormonal evaluation showed serum testosterone level of 65 ng/dL with low levels of GnRH.

title: trec-ct-2022-10
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2022-10
病例摘要：一名19岁的女孩因左腕肿块前来诊所。四个月前她注意到手腕顶部出现肿胀，并因外观原因而来就诊。体检发现右腕部有一个无痛、圆形的肿块，用手电筒透照时可见。生命体征正常。患者几乎整天都要在电脑上打字。她是左利手。她不吸烟也不使用非法药物。她与两名男性伴侣有性关系，并使用避孕套。

metadata.original_text: A 19-year-old girl comes to the clinic due to a left wrist mass. She noticed swelling on the top of her wrist about 4 months ago and came to the clinic due to cosmetic concerns. Examination shows a nontender, rounded mass on the dorsal wrist that transilluminates with a penlight. Vital signs are normal. The patient needs to type on her computer almost all day. She is left-handed. She does not smoke or use illicit drugs. She is in sexual relationship with two male partners and uses condoms.

title: trec-ct-2022-11
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2022-11
病例摘要：一名63岁的男性因近期无意中的体重减轻前来诊所。患者餐后上腹部不适。他没有已知的医疗问题，也不服用任何药物。他的血压为130/75，心率为88次/分钟。他没有发热。胃镜检查显示胃部有病变，表现为弥漫型腺癌的特点，并伴有典型的印戒细胞，这些细胞不形成腺体。

metadata.original_text: A 63-year-old man comes to the clinic for recent unintentional weight loss. The patient also has epigastric discomfort after meals. He has no known medical problems and takes no medications. His blood pressure is 130/75 and pulse rate is 88/min. He is not febrile. Upper endoscopy shows a lesion in the stomach that shows typical features of diffuse-type adenocarcinoma presenting with signet ring cells that do not form glands.

title: trec-ct-2022-12
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2022-12
病例摘要：一名47岁的男性因例行检查来到诊所。他抱怨有慢性咳嗽和偶尔逐渐加重的呼吸困难。其他医疗状况包括高血压和骨关节炎。患者每天吸一包烟，不饮酒或使用非法药物。他曾是一名建筑工人。体检发现双肺底部呼吸音减弱，并有叩诊浊音。胸部CT扫描显示轻度双侧胸腔积液和弥漫性胸膜增厚。患者的病历资料显示长期接触石棉。肺部标本显示主要在下叶存在肺纤维化，特征是含有石棉小体（呈金棕色、珠状棒状且中心透明）的肺组织。

metadata.original_text: A 47-year-old man comes to the office for routine checkup. He is complaining of chronic cough and occasional but progressive dyspnea. Other medical conditions include hypertension and osteoarthritis. The patient smokes a pack of cigarettes daily and does not use alcohol or illicit drugs. He used to be a construction worker. On examination, there are decreased breath sounds and percussive dullness at the base of both lungs. Chest CT scan reveals a mild bilateral pleural effusion and diffuse thickening of the pleura. The patient's documents show chronic exposure to asbestosis. The specimen of the lungs reveled pulmonary fibrosis that is most predominant in the lower lobes, characterized by the presence of asbestos bodies (golden-brown beaded rods with translucent centers).

title: trec-ct-2022-13
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2022-13
病例摘要：一名24岁的男性因不育症前来就诊。他和他的妻子已经尝试怀孕18个月了。妻子的医疗记录未见异常。患者不吸烟，也不服用任何药物。身高185厘米，体重77公斤。心肺听诊正常。双侧乳房增大，双侧睾丸下垂且质地坚实。下肢显得异常长。染色体检查结果显示为47, XXY，符合克氏综合征（Klinefelter syndrome）的诊断。

metadata.original_text: A 24-year-old man comes to the office complaining of infertility. He and his wife have been trying to conceive for the last 18 months. Medical records of his wife showed no abnormalities. The patient doesn't smoke and takes no medications. Height is 185 cm and weight is 77 kg. Heart and lung sounds are normal. There is bilateral gynecomastia and bilateral descended firm testes. The lower extremities appear abnormally long. His karyotype evaluation shows 47, XXY consistent with Klinefelter syndrome.

title: trec-ct-2022-14
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2022-14
病例摘要：一名39岁的男性因急性发作的严重左脚趾疼痛来到急诊科。他的脚趾发红并伴有肿胀。患者没有发热，也不记得最近有受伤的情况。既往病史仅包括类似发作和痛风性关节炎的诊断。他服用别嘌醇以预防痛风发作。他的父亲也有同样的疾病。然而，41岁的哥哥身体健康，没有痛风性关节炎的历史。体格检查显示第一跖趾关节肿胀、压痛。关节穿刺结果显示白细胞计数高，革兰染色阴性和大量针状晶体，这与痛风性关节炎相符。

metadata.original_text: A 39-year-old man comes to the emergency department with an acute onset of severe left toe pain. The toe is red and exhibits swelling. The patient is not febrile, and does not remember any recent trauma. Medical history is not significant except for the similar attacks and the diagnosis of gouty arthritis. His medication history includes Allopurinol to prevent gouty attacks. His father has the same medical condition. However, his older brother who is 41 years old is healthy with no history of gouty arthritis. Physical examination shows a swollen, tender first metatarsophalangeal joint. Aspiration of the joint showed high leukocyte count, negative Gram stain, and numerous needle-shaped crystals, which is compatible with gouty arthritis.

title: trec-ct-2022-15
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2022-15
主要诊断：DMD
病例摘要：一名8岁男孩由其父母带到诊所，因无力和站立困难就诊。母亲健康，但有一个哥哥在20岁时因残疾并使用轮椅而在最后几年的生命中去世。体格检查显示下肢肌肉力量为3/5级，并伴有腓肠肌肿大。其他体格检查和生命体征均无异常。肌肉活检结果显示缺乏 dystrophin 蛋白。患者被诊断为DMD。

metadata.original_text: An 8-year-old boy is brought to the clinic by his parents because of weakness and difficulty of standing up from a sitting position. The mother is healthy but had a brother who died in his 20th after being disabled and using wheelchairs in the last few years of his life. Physical examination shows 3/5 lower extremity muscle strength and enlarged calf muscles. The other physical examination and vital signs are unremarkable. Muscle biopsy showed absence of dystrophin protein. The patient is diagnosed with DMD.

title: trec-ct-2022-16
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2022-16
病例摘要：一名39岁的女性因腿部关节痛和结节前来就诊。她没有发热或其他皮肤疹子。既往无特殊病史，也不服用任何药物。体格检查显示肝脏轻度肿大。她的腿部病变部位疼痛，主要分布在下肢的前侧。她不吸烟，偶尔饮酒。该患者有2位男性性伴侣。生命体征正常。胸部X光片显示肺门淋巴结增大，实验室检测发现ACE水平升高。皮肤病变活检结果显示非干酪样肉芽肿，未染色真菌及抗酸杆菌。

metadata.original_text: A 39-year-old woman comes to the clinic complaining of arthralgias and nodules on her legs. She has no fever or other skin rashes. The prior medical condition is unremarkable, and she takes no medications. On physical examination, there is moderate hepatomegaly. The lesions on her legs are tender and present predominantly on the anterior surface of the lower extremities. She doesn't smoke and drinks alcohol occasionally. The patient has 2 male sexual partners. Vital signs are normal. Chest x-ray demonstrates enlarged hilar lymph nodes, and laboratory testing reveals an elevated ACE level. Biopsy of the skin lesion shows noncaseating granulomas that stain negative for fungi & acid-fast bacilli.

title: trec-ct-2022-17
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2022-17
病例摘要：一名67岁的男性患者因双眼视力逐渐下降前来就诊。他的症状在夜间更为严重，因此无法夜间驾驶。双侧瞳孔在光照和黑暗环境下直径均正常。其他既往病史无特殊。眼部检查显示视网膜反射消失及视力模糊。视力测试结果显示双眼中距离视力均为50/100，视野检查结果正常。血压为130/70mmHg，心率为68次/分钟，其他体格检查均正常。

metadata.original_text: A 67-year-old man comes to the clinic with slowly worsening vision in both eyes. He is not able to drive at night, as the symptoms are worse at night. His pupils are normal in diameter both in the light and darkness. Other medical history is unremarkable. Ocular examination shows loss of the red reflex and blurry vision. Acuity testing shows 50/100 vision in both eyes with normal visual field testing. His blood pressure is 130/70 and pulse is 68/min. the other physical examinations are normal.

title: trec-ct-2022-18
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2022-18
病例摘要：一名2岁男孩因一周前出现皮疹被父母带到办公室。自婴儿期以来，脸颊、躯干和手臂间歇性出现类似的红色、瘙痒皮疹。患者有几次上呼吸道感染史，但没有重大疾病。疫苗接种按时进行，他不服用任何药物。他的饮食均衡，外观健康。生命体征和发育里程碑检查均在正常范围内。类似发现出现在脸颊和上肢近端。会阴区域清晰，未见黏膜病变。

metadata.original_text: A 2-year-old boy is brought to the office by his parents due to a rash that started 1 week ago. A similar red, itchy rash on the cheeks, trunk, and arms has occurred intermittently since infancy. The patient has had a few upper respiratory infections but no major illnesses. Vaccinations are up to date, and he takes no medications. He is on a balanced diet, and he is healthy in appearance. Vital signs and milestone examination are within normal limits. Similar findings are observed on the cheeks and proximal upper extremities. The diaper area is clear, and no mucosal lesions are present.

title: trec-ct-2022-19
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2022-19
病例摘要：一名7岁女孩由其父母带到急诊部门，主诉全身皮疹。母亲报告说，她在外面穿着裙子玩耍时，在垫子上坐着玩洋娃娃的时候感到手臂有刺痛感。母亲怀疑可能有什么东西蜇了她。患者的血压为75/55 mmHg，心率为122次/分钟。体格检查显示躯干、四肢和面部出现红色、隆起的斑块。肺部听诊发现双侧呼气相哮鸣音。

metadata.original_text: A 7-year-old girl is brought to the emergency department by her parents for generalized rash. The mother reports that she was playing outside wearing a skirt and felt a sharp pain in her arm while seating on a mat, plying with her doll. Her mother suspects that something had stung her. The patient's blood pressure is 75/55 mm Hg and her heart rate is 122/min. Physical examination shows erythematous, raised plaques over the trunk, extremities, and face. Lung auscultation reveals bilateral expiratory wheezes.

title: trec-ct-2022-2
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2022-2
病例摘要：一名32岁的女性因阴道出血前来医院就诊。她的最后一次月经是在10周前。她的月经周期规律，持续6天，每29天一次。既往病史包括阑尾切除术和多次复杂性尿路感染。她有多个男性伴侣，并且不经常使用屏障避孕方法。生命体征正常。血清β-hCG水平为1800 mIU/mL，两天后的重复检测显示异常升高至2100 mIU/mL。盆腔超声检查显示子宫内膜薄，未见妊娠囊。

metadata.original_text: A 32-year-old woman comes to the hospital with vaginal spotting. Her last menstrual period was 10 weeks ago. She has regular menses lasting for 6 days and repeating every 29 days. Medical history is significant for appendectomy and several complicated UTIs. She has multiple male partners, and she is inconsistent with using barrier contraceptives. Vital signs are normal. Serum β-hCG level is 1800 mIU/mL, and a repeat level after 2 days shows an abnormal rise to 2100 mIU/mL. Pelvic ultrasound reveals a thin endometrium with no gestational sac in the uterus.

title: trec-ct-2022-20
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2022-20
病例摘要：一名49岁的男性因腹股沟区突出前来就诊。体格检查显示腹股沟韧带上方有肿块。当患者咳嗽时，肿块的大小增加。他的病史包括轻度血脂异常，通过生活方式调整已得到控制。他不吸烟，但偶尔饮酒。其他生命体征和体格检查无明显异常。他被转介给外科医生，并计划进行择期腹腔镜疝修补术。

metadata.original_text: A 49-year-old man comes to the office because of the bulging in his groin. Physical examination shows a swelling above the inguinal ligament. When the patient is asked to cough, the size of the bulge increases. His medical history is significant for mild dyslipidemia, which is under control by lifestyle modifications. He does not smoke, but drinks alcohol occasionally. His vital signs and other physical examinations are unremarkable. He is referred to a surgeon and scheduled to undergo elective laparoscopic hernia repair.

title: trec-ct-2022-21
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2022-21
病例摘要：一名47岁男子因神经肌肉疾病随访。过去一年中，他逐渐出现左侧上肢无力，并在近几个月中也注意到右侧上肢无力。血压为120/75，心率为80，体温为37°C。上肢的反射活跃，足部反射呈伸展性。存在轻度共济失调步态。患者因ALS正在接受利鲁唑50 mg bid的治疗。

metadata.original_text: A 47-year-old man comes to the clinic for the follow up of his neuromuscular disease. He experienced gradual, progressive weakness of the left upper extremity over the last year. Over the last few months, he has also noticed weakness in the right upper extremity. BP is 120/75, PR is 80 and temperature is 37 C. Reflexes are brisk in the upper extremities, and the plantar responses are extensor. Mild gait ataxia is present. The patient is under treatment of Riluzole 50 mg BID with the diagnosis of ALS.

title: trec-ct-2022-22
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2022-22
病例摘要：一名15岁轻度智力障碍男孩由其父母陪同前来进行常规体格检查。该男孩就读于为学习障碍学生设立的学校。患者被收养，其免疫接种记录完整。患者的医疗记录中值得注意的是染色体研究显示X染色体长臂末端附近存在一个小缺口，这与脆性X综合征一致，这是一种X连锁疾病。缺陷是位于X染色体长臂上的FMR1基因中的三核苷酸重复（CGG）不稳定扩增。他没有使用任何药物，生命体征均在正常范围内。他的血液化学分析如下：血液化学值 正常范围 患者值 葡萄糖 90-120 mg/dl 95 mg/dl 尿素氮（BUN） 7-24 mg/dl 10 mg/dl 创伤素 0.7-1.4 mg/dl 0.8 mg/dl 钙 8.5-10.5 mg/dl 9 mg/dl 钠 134-143 mEq/L 135 mEq/L 钾 3.5-4.5 mEq/L 3.7 mEq/L 氯化物 95-108 mEq/L 98 mEq/L CO2 20-30 mEq/L 25 mEq/L 血液pH值 7.38-7.42 7.39

metadata.original_text: A 15-year-old boy with mild intellectual disability is brought to the office by his parents for a routine physical examination. The boy is going to a school for students with learning disabilities. The patient was adopted, and his immunizations are up to date. Review of the patient's medical records is notable for cytogenetic studies that showed a small gap near the tip of the long arm of the X chromosome, which is consistent with fragile X syndrome, an X-linked disorder. The defect is an unstable expansion of trinucleotide repeats (CGG) in the fragile X mental retardation 1 (FMR1) gene, located on the long arm of the X chromosome. He is not using any medications and vital signs are within normal levels. His blood chemistry analysis as bellow: Blood Chemistry Value Normal Range Patient Value Glucose 90-120 mg/dl 95 mg/dl BUN (Blood Urea Nitrogen) 7-24 mg/dl 10 mg/dl Creatinine 0.7-1.4 mg/dl 0.8 mg/dl Calcium 8.5-10.5 mg/dl 9 mg/dl Sodium 134-143 mEq/L 135 mEq/L Potassium 3.5-4.5 mEq/L 3.7 mEq/L Chloride 95-108 mEq/L 98 mEq/L CO2 20-30 mEq/L 25 mEq/L Blood pH 7.38-7.42 7. 39

title: trec-ct-2022-23
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2022-23
病例摘要：一名40岁的女性因眼睛有沙粒感前来就诊。她还难以吞咽干燥的食物，没有疼痛或反酸的症状。患者是一名教师，在讲课时由于口干需要频繁饮水。她还报告有时有关节痛的情况。既往病史仅确认患有干燥综合征，无其他风湿性疾病。她与丈夫性生活活跃，并有两个孩子，均为自然阴道分娩。她没有手术史。体格检查显示结膜充血和唇部裂纹。其余的检查和病史均正常。她的实验室结果显示ESR升高（50 mm/h）

metadata.original_text: A 40-year-old woman comes to the clinic complaining of gritty sensation in her eyes. She also has difficulty swallowing dry foods with no pain or heartburn. The patient is a schoolteacher and must drink water frequently during lectures due to her mouth dryness. She also reports occasional joint pain. Medical history is not significant other than the confirmed Sjogren disease with no other rheumatologic disease. She is sexually active with her husband and has 2 children both delivered by natural vaginal delivery. She has no history of any kind of surgery. Physical examination shows conjunctival erythema and cracking of the lips. The remainder of the examination and history is normal. Her lab result shows elevated ESR (50 mm/h)

title: trec-ct-2022-24
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2022-24
病例摘要：一名4岁男孩因确诊的ocularcutaneous albinism（眼皮肤白化病）前来就诊。该患者在38周妊娠时出生，无并发症。生命体征正常。体重和身高均位于第50百分位。检查发现虹膜透照阳性，且眼底检查未见明显的foveae（黄斑）。视神经较小且呈灰色。所有毛发包括眉毛和睫毛均为白色。

metadata.original_text: A 4-year-old boy comes to the office for the follow up of his confirmed oculocutaneous albinism. The patient was born at 38 weeks gestation with no complications. Vital signs are normal. Weight and height are at the 50th percentile. On examination, iris transillumination is present, and there are no apparent foveae on funduscopic examination. Optic nerves are small and gray. All the hairs including eyebrows and lashes are white.

title: trec-ct-2022-25
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2022-25
病例摘要：一名50岁的女性因左耳间歇性流脓和听力下降来到诊所。既往病史包括肥胖、高脂血症和糖尿病。她的药物包括二甲双胍、阿托伐他汀和维生素D补充剂。生命体征正常，BMI为37。鼓镜检查显示左侧鼓膜有小穿孔，并且在鼓膜后方有一个珍珠状肿块。左耳传导性听力下降。其余的耳鼻喉科检查均无异常。

metadata.original_text: A 50-year-old woman comes to the clinic with intermittent ear discharge and sense of hearing loss on her left ear. Past medical history is significant for obesity, hyperlipidemia, and diabetes mellitus. Her medications include Metformin, Atorvastatin and Vit D supplement. Vital signs are normal. BMI is 37. Otoscopy shows a small perforation in the left tympanic membrane and a pearly mass behind the membrane. Conduction hearing loss is noted in the left ear. The remainder of the ear, nose, and throat examination is normal.

title: trec-ct-2022-26
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2022-26
主要诊断：原发性肾上腺功能不全（艾迪生病）
病例摘要：一名33岁的女性因过去两个月逐渐加重的疲劳、食欲减退和11磅体重减轻前来就诊。她因为之前诊断为桥本氏病而服用左甲状腺素。她没有其他医疗状况，也不使用烟草、酒精或非法药物。体格检查显示皮肤色素沉着增加。在给予外源性促肾上腺皮质激素（ACTH）前后测量血浆皮质醇水平未见差异。开始稳定剂量的糖皮质激素替代疗法，并诊断为原发性肾上腺功能不全（艾迪生病）
diagnosis: 原发性肾上腺功能不全（艾迪生病）

metadata.original_text: A 33-year-old woman comes to clinic complaining of progressive fatigue, decreased appetite, and 11-lb weight loss in the past 2 months. She uses levothyroxine because of the previously diagnosed Hashimoto disease. She has no other medical conditions and does not use tobacco, alcohol, or illicit drugs. Physical examination shows a generalized increase in pigmentation of the skin. Measurement of serum cortisol before and after administration of exogenous adrenocorticotropic hormone (ACTH) shows no difference in the levels. Stable glucocorticoid replacement therapy starts for her with the diagnosis for primary adrenal insufficiency (Addison disease)
metadata.diagnosis_zh: 原发性肾上腺功能不全（艾迪生病）

title: trec-ct-2022-27
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2022-27
主要诊断：莱姆病
病例摘要：一名31岁的女性因左臂出现3天的皮疹前来就诊。该病变轻微瘙痒但不疼痛。她平时身体健康，月经初期偶尔会服用布洛芬。体温为37°C，血压为110/75 mmHg，心率为95次/分钟。该病变呈靶形，称为游走性红斑。患者最近曾前往新罕布什尔州进行了一次探险旅行。患者被诊断为莱姆病。

metadata.original_text: A 31-year-old woman comes to the office due to 3 days of rash on her left arm. The lesion is mildly pruritic but not painful. She is otherwise healthy and occasionally takes ibuprofen during the first few days of her menstrual period. Temperature is 37 C, blood pressure is 110/75 mm Hg, and pulse is 95/min. The lesion is like a target sign known as erythema migrans. She recently went for an adventure trip in New Hampshire. The patient is diagnosed with Lyme disease.

title: trec-ct-2022-28
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2022-28
病例摘要：一名23岁的女性因鼻出血持续1小时来到急诊部门。她有月经量多的历史，以及在牙科手术后偶尔出现牙龈出血的情况。她的母亲也有月经过多的病史。实验室检查显示凝血时间延长，部分凝血活酶时间略有升高。她没有其他医疗状况，身体状况良好。她的凝血研究结果显示CB = 0.30 IU/mL和FVIII:C = 0.37 IU/mL。她不吸烟，也没有使用任何非法药物。她偶尔饮酒，并与男友交往了两年。

metadata.original_text: A 23-year-old woman comes to the emergency department with a history of nosebleeds lasting for 1 hour. She has a history of heavy menses as well as occasional gum bleeding following dental procedures. Her mother also has a history of menorrhagia. Laboratory tests reveal increased bleeding time and slightly increased partial thromboplastin time. She has no other medical conditions and is otherwise healthy. Her coagulation study shows CB = 0.30 IU/mL and FVIII:C = 0.37 IU/mL. She is not smoking or using any kind of illicit drugs. She uses alcohol occasionally and is in ra elationship with her boyfriend for the past 2 years.

title: trec-ct-2022-29
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2022-29
病例摘要：一名57岁的男性因便秘来到急诊部门。他上次排便是在两天前。每次尝试排便大约花费30分钟。他还伴有下背部疼痛。没有外伤史。这种疼痛在使用非处方止痛药后并未缓解。生命体征均在正常范围内。检查发现，下背部疼痛在背部弯曲和抬腿时加剧，并放射至左腿；肛周区域的针刺刺激不会引起肛门括约肌迅速收缩。神经系统检查其余部分未见异常。怀疑为马尾综合征并被转介进行脊髓MRI检查。

metadata.original_text: A 57-year-old man comes to the emergency department due to constipation. His last bowel movement was 2 days ago. He complains of spending about 30 minutes once attempting to defecate. He also has lower back pain. There is no history of trauma. The pain is not relieved with over-the-counter pain medications. His vital signs are within normal limits. Examination shows low back pain that is worse with back flexion and raising of the legs; it radiates into his left leg. Pinprick in the perianal area does not cause rapid contraction of the anal sphincter. The rest of the neurologic examination is normal. He is suspected of Cauda Equina syndrome and referred to a spinal MRI.

title: trec-ct-2022-3
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2022-3
病例摘要：一名51岁的男性因疲劳和一些性功能问题，包括性欲减退前来就诊。患者不吸烟且未使用任何非法药物。血压为120/80 mmHg，心率为70次/分钟。在室内的氧饱和度为99%。BMI为24 kg/m²。皮肤检查显示色素沉着增加。基因型检测与C282Y突变的纯合子一致。实验室检查结果显示转铁蛋白饱和度为55%，血清铁蛋白水平为550 μg/L。他被诊断为遗传性血色素沉着症。

metadata.original_text: A 51-year-old man comes to the office complaining of fatigue and some sexual problems including lack of libido. The patient doesn't smoke or use any illicit drug. Blood pressure is 120/80 mm Hg and pulse is 70/min. Oxygen saturation is 99% on room air. BMI is 24 kg/m2. Skin examination shows increased pigmentation. Genotype testing is consistent with homozygosity for the C282Y mutation. Laboratory study shows transferrin saturation of 55% and serum ferritin of 550 μg/L. He is diagnosed as a case of hemochromatosis.

title: trec-ct-2022-30
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2022-30
病例摘要：一名47岁的女性因弯腰时小腿和膝盖疼痛前来就诊。这种疼痛限制了她的活动能力。她有骨关节炎的病史，过去两年一直在使用非甾体抗炎药（NSAIDs）治疗。她与丈夫同住，并且有3个孩子。她不吸烟但偶尔饮酒。生命体征正常。在体格检查中，右膝存在少量积液。积液逐渐增大，她在腘窝和小腿出现了压痛性肿胀。随着膝盖的弯曲和伸直，疼痛和肿胀加剧。

metadata.original_text: A 47-year-old woman comes to the office complaining of pain in the calf and knee when she bends down. The pain limits her activity. Her medical history is significant for osteoarthritis, for which she uses nonsteroidal anti-inflammatory drugs (NSAIDs) for the past two years. She is living with her husband and has 3 children. She doesn't smoke but drinks alcohol occasionally. Her vital signs are normal. On physical examination, there is a small effusion in the right knee. The effusion grew a little larger and she developed a tender swelling in the popliteal fossa and calf. Both the pain and swelling worsened as she bent and straightened her knee.

title: trec-ct-2022-31
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2022-31
病例摘要：一名25岁的女性由室友陪同前来诊所。室友表示，患者在交谈过程中曾两次突然睡着。患者平时会在阅读或看电视时偶尔短暂入睡，但通常在小憩后会感觉精神焕发。她还提到，在即将入睡时有时会听到声音。此外，她还抱怨有时会出现一些笨拙的情况，导致她掉落物品或摔倒。多导睡眠监测（MSLT）显示，她的睡眠潜伏期少于8分钟，并且患者几乎立即进入快速眼动（REM）睡眠状态。

metadata.original_text: A 25-year-old woman comes to the clinic with her roommate. The roommate says that the patient has twice fallen asleep while they were talking. The patient has regularly fallen asleep in the afternoon while reading or watching television but typically feels refreshed after a brief nap.
