She also reveals that she sometimes hears a voice prior to falling asleep. She also complains of some episodes of clumsiness that cause her to drop objects or fall. MSLT showed that the sleep latency was less than 8 min and that the patient enters rapid eye movement (REM) sleep almost immediately.

title: trec-ct-2022-32
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2022-32
病例摘要：一名30岁的计算机科学家因实验室检查结果显示无精症来到诊所。患者与妻子有性生活，未使用任何避孕方法。他们尝试怀孕一年未果。患者的既往病史包括反复肺炎、呼吸困难和持续咳嗽，伴有大量浓痰。患者在儿童时期有多次肺部感染的病史。他不吸烟、不使用毒品或酒精。患者没有其他医疗条件的历史，包括过敏或任何形式的手术。体格检查显示手指有杵状指。超声检查显示双侧附睾管缺失，呼吸功能测试中FEV1为75%。

metadata.original_text: A 30-year-old man who is a computer scientist came to the clinic with the lab result stating azoospermia. The patient is sexually active with his wife and does not use any contraception methods. They have been trying to conceive for the past year with no success. The patient has a past medical history of recurrent pneumonia, shortness of breath, and persistent cough that produces large amounts of thick sputum. The patient had multiple lung infections during childhood. He does not smoke, use illicit drugs or alcohol. The patient has no history of other medical conditions including allergies or any kind of surgery. On physical examination, the digits show clubbing. An ultrasound shows bilateral absence of the vas deferens, and FEV1 was 75% on the respiratory function test.

title: trec-ct-2022-33
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2022-33
病例摘要：一名20岁的男性患者因例行检查前来诊所。该患者佩戴近视眼镜，不服用任何药物。生命体征正常。体格检查显示患者身材高大，上肢和手指较长。面部显得狭长，眼裂下垂，颧骨扁平，下巴较小。听诊时肺部清晰。腹部柔软，无器官肿大。患者被诊断为马凡综合征，并且他积极配合医疗预约。他在从事驾驶员工作。

metadata.original_text: A 20-year-old man comes to the clinic for his routine checkup. The patient wears glasses for myopia and takes no medications. Vital signs are normal. On physical examination, the patient is tall with long upper extremities and fingers. The face appears narrow with down-slanted palpebral fissures, flattened malar bones, and a small jaw. The lungs are clear on auscultation. The abdomen is soft with no organomegaly. The patient is diagnosed with Marfan syndrome, and he is cooperative with his medical appointments. He is working as driver.

title: trec-ct-2022-34
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2022-34
病例摘要：一名17岁男性因右肘部疼痛数月前来就诊。疼痛在活动时加重，限制了他的锻炼和活动。他尝试过非处方药但效果有限。既往病史中值得注意的是湿疹，目前使用外用氢化可的松软膏。他与女朋友有性生活，并且使用避孕套。他不吸烟也不饮酒。他每周大部分时间都打网球。全面检查显示肘部外侧疼痛，在施加压力于肱骨外上髁时以及伸直肘关节握拳时疼痛加剧。患者自去年起就有这种疼痛，已经接受了几次物理治疗。

metadata.original_text: A 17-year-old male comes to the office due to several months of right elbow pain. The pain is worse with activity and limits his workouts and activities. He has tried over-the-counter medications with limited relief. Medical history is notable for eczema, and current medications include a topical hydrocortisone ointment. He is sexually active with his girlfriend and uses condoms. He does not smoke or drink alcohol. He plays tennis most of the days of the week. The comprehensive evaluation shows pain on the lateral side of the elbow, made worse by pressure applied on the lateral epicondyle of the humerus and when making a fist with the elbow joint straightened. The patient has this pain since last year and had several courses of physical therapy.

title: trec-ct-2022-35
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2022-35
病例摘要：一名43岁的女性，孕3产3，因近期痛经前来就诊。她的最后一次月经是在两周前。尿β-hCG检测为阴性。初潮年龄为12岁，月经周期为28天，持续5天。她与丈夫有性生活，并且性交时无疼痛。BMI为23 kg/m²，生命体征正常。体格检查发现子宫均匀增大并伴有压痛。诊断考虑腺肌症，建议进行子宫切除手术。

metadata.original_text: A 43-year-old woman, gravida 3 para 3, comes to the clinic complaining of recently painful menstrual cycles. The patient's last menstrual period was 2 weeks ago. Urine β-hCG is negative. Menarche was at age 12, and menstrual periods occur every 28 days and lasts for 5 days. She is sexually active with her husband and does not have pain with intercourse. BMI is 23 kg/m2 and Vital signs are normal. On physical examination, the uterus is uniformly enlarged and tender. She is candidate for hysterectomy with the diagnosis of adenomyosis.

title: trec-ct-2022-36
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2022-36
病例摘要：一名47岁的女性因头晕前来就诊。她还偶尔感到恶心，并且右耳有耳鸣。患者在用左手耳接听电话时听力较差，而右耳听力正常。她的头晕会自行缓解，在发作间歇期感觉良好。既往病史包括甲状腺功能减退和低维生素D水平，目前正在使用左旋甲状腺素和维生素D补充剂。她不吸烟也不饮酒。体格检查显示左侧感音神经性听力损失。她只有一个男性性伴侣，并在两年前绝经。

metadata.original_text: A 47-year-old woman comes to the clinic complaining of dizziness. She also has occasional nausea and ringing in her right ear. The patient also has difficulty hearing while holding her phone to the left ear, although hearing in her right ear is normal. The dizziness improves spontaneously, and she feels fine between episodes. Past medical history is notable for hypothyroidism and low vit D level, for which she is using Levothyroxine and Vit D pearl. She does not use tobacco or drink alcohol. Physical examination shows sensorineural hearing loss in the left ear. She has only one-man sexual partner and menopaused 2 years ago.

title: trec-ct-2022-37
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2022-37
病例摘要：一名47岁的男性因体重增加和疲劳前来就诊。他无法提起重物或爬楼梯。其家族病史显示父亲患有2型糖尿病和高血压。血压为165/90 mmHg，心率为85次/分钟。体格检查发现上肢和下肢近端肌肉对称性无力。空腹血糖水平为138 mg/dL，24小时尿皮质醇水平超过正常上限的两倍。进一步评估显示高剂量但不是低剂量地塞米松抑制了血浆皮质醇水平。血ACTH水平为正常上限偏高。该患者的症状符合内源性库欣综合征。

metadata.original_text: A 47-year-old man comes to the office due to weight gain and fatigue. He is not able to lift heavy objects or climb stairs. Family history is positive for DM type 2 and HTN in his father. Blood pressure is 165/90 mm Hg and pulse is 85/min. On physical examination, there is symmetric proximal muscle weakness of the upper and lower extremities. Fasting plasma glucose level is 138 mg/dL and 24-hour urinary cortisol is twice the upper normal limit. Further evaluation reveals that high-dose, but not low-dose, dexamethasone suppresses serum cortisol levels. Serum ACTH levels are high-normal. This patient's findings are consistent with endogenous Cushing Syndrome.

title: trec-ct-2022-38
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2022-38
主要诊断：原发性震颤
病例摘要：一名60岁的男性患者因几个月前开始的手部震颤前来就诊。当他想从杯子喝水或从瓶子里倒水时，这种震颤最为困扰。他不吸烟，但偶尔会饮酒。最近，由于少量饮酒可以使他的震颤有所缓解，所以他增加了饮酒量。家族史显示其母亲也有类似问题。生命体征正常，患者没有其他医疗状况。神经系统检查发现双上肢有震颤。确诊为原发性震颤。

metadata.original_text: A 60-year-old man comes to the clinic complaining of hand tremor that started few months ago. It is most bothering when he wants to drink from a glass or pour from a bottle. He does not smoke, but drinks occasionally. He recently started consuming more alcohol as his tremor subsides somewhat when he drinks small amounts of alcohol. Family history is significant for similar problems in his mother. Vital signs are normal and the patient has no other medical conditions. Neurologic examination shows bilateral tremor in the upper extremities. The diagnosis of essential tremor is confirmed.

title: trec-ct-2022-39
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2022-39
病例摘要：一名55岁的白人女性前来进行常规体检。她没有重要的既往病史，也不使用烟草、酒精或非法药物。患者的唯一药物是非处方的多种维生素。家族史中值得注意的是其母亲曾发生过髋部骨折。血压为130/80 mmHg，心率为每分钟112次。她偶尔会感到背部疼痛，并且生活方式较为久坐不动，BMI为24 Kg/m²。脊柱X光片显示T10水平有轻微的压缩性骨折。骨密度测量结果显示腰椎部位的骨密度异常偏低，T评分值低于-2.5，这确诊了她的骨质疏松症。

metadata.original_text: A 55-year-old white woman comes for a routine checkup. She has no significant medical history and does not use tobacco, alcohol, or illicit drugs. The patient's only medication is an over-the-counter multivitamin. Family history is notable for a hip fracture in her mother. Blood pressure is 130/80 mm Hg and pulse is 112/min. She has occasional back pain and lives a sedentary lifestyle with the BMI of 24 Kg/m2. Plain X-ray of the spine shows mild compression fracture at the level of T10. X-ray absorptiometry studies demonstrate abnormally low bone density in the lumbar vertebrae and T-score values below -2.5, which confirms the diagnosis of osteoporosis.

title: trec-ct-2022-4
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2022-4
病例摘要：一位66岁的女性因手关节疼痛和晨间持续少于15分钟的关节僵硬前来就诊。疼痛程度中等，日常活动会加重。患者使用对乙酰氨基酚缓解效果有限。既往病史包括高血压和高胆固醇血症。体格检查发现双侧远端指间关节有坚实的小结节。患者的膝盖也有疼痛感。晨起时膝盖僵硬少于30分钟，并且上下楼梯时会加重。在活动中有时能感觉到骨头摩擦的感觉。X线检查显示关节间隙变窄、软骨下骨硬化和关节边缘骨赘形成。

metadata.original_text: A 66-year-old woman comes to the office due to joint pain in the hands and periodic morning stiffness that lasts less than 15 minutes. The pain is moderately severe and worsens with daily activity. The patient used Tylenol with minimal relief. Past medical history is notable for hypertension and hypercholesteremia. Physical examination shows firm nodules over the distal interphalangeal joints, bilaterally. The patient has pain in her knees as well. The knees are stiff in the morning for less than 30 minutes and become worse with climbing stairs. She has some sensation of bone friction during activity. X-ray shows narrowing of the joint space, subchondral bone sclerosis and osteophyte formation along the joints.

title: trec-ct-2022-40
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2022-40
病例摘要：一名23岁的女性在拔牙后立即出现持续性口腔出血。尽管进行了多次干预，出血持续数小时，直到使用去氨加压素（DDAVP）后才停止。该患者每月月经量大。她没有其他医疗问题，也不服用任何药物。她的母亲和祖母也有过月经期间过度出血的情况。体格检查显示腿部有轻微瘀伤。实验室检查结果显示血小板计数正常，凝血因子辅因子试验异常，以及CB <= 0.30 IU/mL 和 FVIII:C <= 0.40 IU/mL。

metadata.original_text: A 23-year-old female has prolonged oral bleeding immediately after a tooth extraction. Despite several interventions, the bleeding persists for hours and stops only after desmopressin (DDAVP) administration. The patient has heavy menstrual cycles each month. She has no other medical problems and takes no medications. Her mother and grandmother have also had excessive bleeding during menstrual period. Review of systems is positive for mild bruising on his legs. Laboratory findings reveal a normal platelet count and an abnormal ristocetin cofactor assay, as well as CB <= 0.30 IU/mL and FVIII:C <= 0.40 IU/mL.

title: trec-ct-2022-41
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2022-41
病例摘要：一名61岁的男性患者因急性视力障碍来到急诊部门。他突然在右眼出现了一次视力障碍，持续了大约15分钟后自行缓解。他在咀嚼时还伴有右侧颌部疼痛。过去几个月中他还抱怨有疲劳感和髋部肌肉酸痛。患者的病史显示有轻度高脂血症，通过饮食和生活方式的调整得到了控制。体检结果显示血压为130/70 mmHg，心率为66次/分钟。神经系统检查未见异常。视力检查也正常。血沉值为103 mm/h。颞动脉活检显示有多核巨细胞和内弹性膜断裂。

metadata.original_text: A 61-year-old man comes to the emergency department complaining of an acute vision disturbance. He had an episode of vision disturbance in the right eye that occurred suddenly and resolved spontaneously in 15 minutes. He also has right jaw pain while chewing. He also complains of fatigue and hip muscle aches over the last several months. The patient has a history of mild hyperlipidemia that has been controlled by diet and lifestyle modifications. On examination, his blood pressure is 130/70 mm Hg and pulse is 66/min. Neurological examination is unremarkable. Visual examination is also normal. ESR is 103 mm/h. Temporal artery biopsy shows multinuclear giant cells and internal elastic membrane fragmentation.

title: trec-ct-2022-42
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2022-42
病例摘要：一名9岁的女孩因身材矮小和超重的体型来到诊所进行评估。患者的母亲身高170厘米，父亲身高181厘米。体格检查显示，该患者身高的百分位数为年龄的第5百分位。其他发现包括低位耳、高拱腭、颈蹼以及肘外翻。染色体分析结果显示为45, XO核型。

metadata.original_text: A 9-year-old girl is brought to the office for evaluation of short stature and overweight body habitus. The patient's mother and father are 170 cm and 181 cm tall, respectively. On physical examination, the patient's height is in the 5th percentile of her age. Other findings include low-set ears, a high arched palate, a webbed neck, and cubitus valgus. Chromosomal analysis reveals a 45, XO karyotype.

title: trec-ct-2022-43
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2022-43
病例摘要：一名27岁的女性因皮肤疹和口腔溃疡来到皮肤科诊所。皮疹轻微瘙痒。患者没有其他医疗状况，也不服用任何药物。生命体征正常。体检发现，在小腿前侧和踝部对称分布有粉红色的丘疹。她的颊黏膜上有一些白色溃疡性丘疹。她与男友保持恋爱关系，并且只有一个性伴侣。她的男友使用避孕套。她每天抽1到2支烟，每天喝一罐啤酒。活检显示显著角化过度，颗粒层增厚。浅表真皮中有单核细胞浸润并涉及上方的表皮。棘层呈现锯齿状外观。

metadata.original_text: A 27-year-old woman comes to the dermatology clinic with skin rash and oral ulcers. The rashes are mildly itchy. The patient has no other medical conditions and takes no medications. Vital signs are normal. On examination, there are pink papules symmetrically distributed over the anterior surfaces of the shins and ankles. There are some white ulcerated papules on her buccal mucosa. She is in relationship with her boyfriend and has only one sexual partner. Her boyfriend uses condoms. She smokes 1 to 2 cigarettes a day and drinks a beer daily. Biopsy reveals prominent hyperkeratosis with a thickened granular layer. There is an infiltration of mononuclear cells in the superficial dermis that involves the overlying epidermis. The rete ridges have a sawtooth appearance.

title: trec-ct-2022-44
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2022-44
病例摘要：一名48岁的男性因胃灼热和反酸症状前来就诊。他服用非处方抗酸药但未见缓解。既往病史无特殊。患者不使用烟草、酒精或非法药物。生命体征在正常范围内。BMI为31 kg/m²。体格检查发现上腹部轻度压痛。胸部X光显示心脏后方有气液平面。钡餐造影显示约三分之一的胃通过食管裂孔疝出。

metadata.original_text: A 48-year-old man comes to the office complaining of heartburn and acid reflux. He has taken over-the-counter antacids but sees no relief. Other medical history is unremarkable. The patient does not use tobacco, alcohol, or illicit drugs. Vital signs are within normal limits. BMI is 31 kg/m2. Physical examination is positive for mild tenderness in upper stomach. Chest x-ray shows an air-fluid opacity behind the heart. A barium swallow study reveals approximately 1/3 of the stomach herniating through the esophageal hiatus.

title: trec-ct-2022-45
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2022-45
病例摘要：一名15周大的婴儿因随访来到诊所。该婴儿面部扁平，耳朵较小，单条手掌纹，眼睛上斜。这名婴儿在39岁孕妇的第39周出生，母亲没有接受产前护理。医疗记录确认染色体21三体（唐氏综合征）。婴儿其他方面健康。

metadata.original_text: A 15-week-old infant brought to the clinic for the follow up. The infant has flat facies, small ears, a single palmar crease, and upward slanting eyes. He was born on 39th week to a 39-year-old woman who didn't have prenatal care. The medical record confirms the trisomy of chromosome 21 (Down syndrome). The infant is otherwise healthy.

title: trec-ct-2022-46
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2022-46
病例摘要：患者是一名38岁的男性，三天前开始出现咳嗽和身体疼痛。最初有发热和寒战，就诊时为低热。他感到疲劳和嗜睡。使用扑热息痛后，他的身体疼痛和肌痛有所好转。新冠病毒核酸检测结果为阳性。生命体征正常，体温为37.9℃。没有淋巴结肿大或咽部白色渗出物。

metadata.original_text: The patient is a 38-year-old man with cough and body ache that started 3 days ago. He had fever and chills at the beginning and has low grade fever at the time of visit. He feels tired and sleepy. His body ache and myalgia get better after using Tylenol. The PCR test for Covid is positive. His vital signs are within normal limits with a body temperature of 37.9 C. There is no lymphadenopathy or white exudates in the pharynx.

title: trec-ct-2022-47
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2022-47
病例摘要：一名41岁的女性因面部红斑，尤其是在前额和脸颊部位的症状前来皮肤科就诊。她注意到这种红斑在夏季和日晒后会加重。她的整体健康状况良好。体格检查显示她在前额、脸颊和鼻子上有多发性丘疹和脓疱，背景为弥漫性红斑和毛细血管扩张。没有其他皮损或结节。患者已婚，并有两个5岁和9岁的孩子。她使用宫内节育器且不打算再生育。她不吸烟也不饮酒。生命体征正常，BMI为21。

metadata.original_text: A 41-year-old woman comes to the dermatology clinic complaining of facial redness, especially on her forehead and cheeks. She noticed that the redness gets worse in the summer and after sun exposure. She is otherwise healthy. On physical examination, she has multiple papules and pustules present on her forehead, cheeks, and nose on a background of erythema and telangiectasias. There are no other lesions or nodules. The patient is married and has 2 children who are 5 and 9 years old. She has IUD and doesn't wish to have more kids. She does not smoke or drink alcohol. Her vital signs are normal, and BMI is 21.

title: trec-ct-2022-48
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2022-48
病例摘要：一名20岁的男性因拔牙后出血来到急诊室。尽管持续施加直接压迫，出血已经持续了大约30分钟。他被诊断为患有A型血友病，并且正在接受FVIII治疗。血压为95/60 mmHg，心率为105次/分。他的体重是70公斤。家族史显示其姨父也患有A型血友病。他还计划手术切除左臂上的脂肪瘤。他的FVIII活性为40%。

metadata.original_text: A 20-year-old man comes to the emergency due to bleeding after a tooth extraction. The bleeding has persisted for approximately 30 minutes despite constant direct pressure. He is a known case of Hemophilia type A treated with FVIII. Blood pressure is 95/60 mm Hg and pulse is 105/min. His weight is 70 Kg. Family history is positive for Hemophilia type A in his maternal uncle. He also has a lipoma on his left arm which he plans to remove surgically. His FVIII activity is 40%.

title: trec-ct-2022-49
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2022-49
病例摘要：一名50岁的女性因吞咽液体和固体食物困难，以及进食时偶尔咳嗽前来就诊。她还发现举臂过头和从椅子上站起来都很费力。这种无力感似乎逐渐加重。患者没有既往的医疗问题，也不服用任何药物。生命体征正常。体格检查显示眼睑部位有红斑性皮疹，手关节处有一些红色丘疹。其余的体格检查未见异常。抗核抗体、Jo-1抗体和MDA5抗体呈阳性。肌肉活检结果显示周围肌束管炎症和肌束及其周围血管萎缩。

metadata.original_text: A 50-year-old woman comes to the clinic complaining of difficulty swallowing both liquids and solid foods, as well as occasional cough while eating. She also has difficulty lifting her arms above her head and getting up from a chair. The weakness seems to get worse gradually. The patient has no prior medical problems and takes no medications. Vital signs are normal. Physical examination shows an erythematous rash on the upper eyelids. There are some red papules over joints of her hands. The rest of the physical examination is unremarkable. Antinuclear antibodies, anti-Jo-1 antibodies and anti-MDA5 antibody are positive. Muscle biopsy shows perifascicular inflammation and atrophy of the fascicle and surrounding blood vessels.

title: trec-ct-2022-5
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2022-5
病例摘要：一名23岁的男性因晕厥来到急诊部门。他在锻炼时感到头晕并昏倒，没有头部受伤。在过去一年中，他有过三次轻度头晕的经历，所有情况都发生在体力活动中。他从未在休息时出现过这种情况。他没有其他医疗状况。患者不使用烟草、酒精或非法药物。他的父亲在35岁时突然去世。生命体征在正常范围内。体格检查显示有粗糙的收缩期杂音。肺部清晰无渗出，超声心动图显示室间隔不对称性肥厚。

metadata.original_text: A 23-year-old man comes to the emergency department following an episode of syncope. He was working out when he felt dizzy and passed out without head injury. He has had 3 other episodes of light-headedness over the last year, all happening during physical activity. He never had this experience while resting. He has no other medical conditions. The patient does not use tobacco, alcohol, or illicit drugs. His father died suddenly at age 35. Vital signs are within normal limits. On physical examination, the patient has a harsh systolic murmur. The lungs are clear with no peripheral edema. Echocardiography shows asymmetric interventricular septal hypertrophy.

title: trec-ct-2022-50
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2022-50
病例摘要：一名70岁的男性由妻子陪同前来就诊。过去几年中，患者经历了逐渐加重的记忆减退。他需要帮助完成一些日常活动，如支付账单。患者的妻子说：“他以前是一个非常独立的人，但现在很多事情都需要帮助，甚至找不到回家的路！”既往病史包括高血压、高脂血症和2型糖尿病。家族史显示其父亲患有阿尔茨海默病。MRI检查结果显示弥漫性皮质和海马萎缩。根据美国国家老龄化研究所和阿尔茨海默病协会（NIA-AA）的标准，诊断为阿尔茨海默病。

metadata.original_text: A 70-year-old man comes to the office accompanied by his wife. The patient has experienced progressive memory loss over the last years. He needs help with some of his routine activities, such as paying bills. The patient's wife says, "He used to be such an independent person, but now he needs help with many things, even finding direction to home!" Medical history includes hypertension, hyperlipidemia, and type 2 diabetes mellitus. Family history includes Alzheimer disease in his father. MRI reveals diffuse cortical and hippocampal atrophy. The diagnosis of AD is made using the National Institute on Aging and the Alzheimer's Association (NIA-AA) criteria.

title: trec-ct-2022-6
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2022-6
病例摘要：一名61岁的男性因无痰咳嗽和进行性呼吸困难前来诊所。患者的病史包括高血压、高胆固醇血症和消化性溃疡病。他过去30年每天吸两包烟。体检发现左侧肺底部呼吸音减弱，叩诊呈浊音。其他生命体征正常。腹部柔软，无压痛。CT扫描显示左侧胸腔积液和胸膜结节状增厚。胸穿抽出的胸水为血性。活检结果显示上皮样细胞增生，微绒毛非常长。

metadata.original_text: A 61-year-old man comes to the clinic due to nonproductive cough and progressive dyspnea. The patient's medical conditions include hypertension, hypercholesteremia and peptic ulcer disease. He smokes 2 packs of cigarettes daily for the past 30 years. On examination, there are decreased breath sounds and percussive dullness at the base of the left lung. Other vital signs are normal. Abdomen is soft without tenderness. CT scan shows a left-sided pleural effusion and nodular thickening of the pleura. The plural fluid was bloody on thoracentesis. Biopsy shows proliferation of epithelioid-type cells with very long microvilli.

title: trec-ct-2022-7
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2022-7
病例摘要：一名3岁女孩由其父母陪同前来诊所评估身高偏矮的情况。体格检查显示肢体短小且头部相对较大。她有扁平的鼻梁和中面部较小。女孩的父亲也表现出类似的体征；然而，她的母亲看起来正常。基因检测结果显示，在成纤维细胞生长因子受体3（FGFR3）基因中发现了常染色体显性突变，符合achondroplasia的诊断，父亲和孩子都存在这种突变。女孩尚未接受任何治疗，这是她移民到美国后的首次就诊。其他精神和发育检查均无异常发现。

metadata.original_text: A 3-year-old girl is brought to the clinic by her parents for assessment of her short stature. Physical examination reveals short limbs and a relatively large head. She has a flat nasal bridge and a small midface. The girl's father exhibits similar physical features; however, her mother looks normal. The genetic testing reveals an autosomal dominant point mutation in the fibroblast growth factor receptor 3 (FGFR3) gene consistent with achondroplasia in both father and the child. The girl has not received any treatment yet, and it is her first visit after immigration to the US. The other mental and developmental examinations are unremarkable.

title: trec-ct-2022-8
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2022-8
病例摘要：一名7个月大的男孩因过去3天出现烦躁不安和无法排便而由其父母带到急诊科。该患儿自出生以来就有便秘和排便不适的症状。进食半固体食物后症状加重。生命体征正常。腹部检查显示膨隆并有触痛，肠鸣音存在。钡餐X线检查显示直肠和直肠乙状结肠段狭窄。此段近端的其余结肠扩张。肛门指检发现大量粪便排出。活组织检查显示大肠末端段缺乏黏膜下神经节细胞。

metadata.original_text: A 7-month-old boy is brought to emergency by his parents due to irritability and inability to defecate for the past 3 days. The patient has had constipation and discomfort with bowel movements since birth. His symptoms worsened after eating semi-solid foods. Vital signs are normal. Abdominal examination shows distension and tenderness to palpation with presence of bowel sounds. Xray with barium shows a narrow rectum and rectosigmoid area. The rest of the colon proximal to this segment is dilated. Digital rectal exam revealed burst of feces out of the anus. The biopsy showed absence of submucosal ganglia in the last segment of the large intestine.

title: trec-ct-2022-9
text:
病例标题：trec-ct-2022-9
病例摘要：一位67岁的女性因近期发生噎食、吞咽困难和咳嗽前来就诊。她的其他医疗问题包括高血压、血脂异常和骨关节炎。她不吸烟也不饮酒。她与丈夫同住，能够自理日常活动。她曾是一名小学教师。血压为135/80 mmHg。患者的呼吸有异味。其他体格检查均正常。钡餐吞咽试验显示上食管存在异常，在咽喉下部与食管上部的交界处有膨出物。

metadata.original_text: A 67-year-old woman comes to the clinic due to recent episode of choking, dysphagia, and cough. Her other medical problems include hypertension, dyslipidemia, and osteoarthritis. She does not smoke or use alcohol. She lives with her husband and she is able to do her own daily activities. She used to teach elementary school. Blood pressure is 135/80 mm Hg. The patient's breath smells bad. Other physical examinations are normal. A barium swallow study reveals an abnormality in the upper esophagus with an outpouching at the junction of the lower part of the throat and the upper portion of the esophagus.
